documents.text:
The delightful musical adventure game Tadpole Treble, from the creators of the hit webcomic Brawl in the Family, offers an experience where music is not just background noise but a fundamental gameplay mechanic. As the protagonist Baton, players will find themselves literally "playing along" with the game's dynamic soundtrack. This involves skillfully dodging predators and environmental obstacles that are ingeniously synchronized with the notes of each level's unique song.

Critics have lauded Tadpole Treble for its exceptional qualities:

*   **Musical Excellence:** Nintendo Enthusiast describes the music as "amazing," awarding the game a 9/10.
*   **Charming Presentation:** Destructoid highlights the game's charm, stating, "If I had to pick one word to describe Tadpole Treble, that word would be 'charming'," and giving it an 8/10.
*   **Overall Appeal:** The Inner Circle Games Network enthusiastically declared it a "must-have," praising its seamless synchronization, abundant charm, and personality, with a score of 9.4/10.
*   **Unique Tone:** TinyCartridge noted its sweet nature, despite the inherent peril for the tadpole protagonist.
*   **Design Philosophy:** Steam reviewer Mo05eman summarized it as the "epitome of what an aesthetic and music-focused game should be," emphasizing how simple gameplay is elevated by excellent design and an outstanding soundtrack.

Gameplay in Tadpole Treble centers on rhythmic precision. Players must avoid enemies and strike percussive notes precisely on the beat to rack up points. Successfully filling your "Treble Charge" allows you to blast through any obstacles in your path, adding an exciting offensive element to the rhythmic dodging.

The game boasts a substantial amount of content, including:

*   30 original music compositions.
*   13 distinct levels to navigate.
*   5 challenging boss battles.

Beyond the main story mode, Tadpole Treble offers a wealth of bonus features for players to discover. These include unlockable music tracks, an extensive bestiary to catalog in-game creatures, insightful game commentaries, and competitive online leaderboards for every level. Perhaps the most compelling addition is the robust Composition Mode, which empowers players to unleash their creativity by designing and sharing their own original levels and music compositions.

Name: Cuphead
Description:
Cuphead is a classic run and gun action game heavily focused on boss battles. Inspired by cartoons of the 1930s, the visuals and audio are painstakingly created with the same techniques of the era, i.e. traditional hand drawn cel animation, watercolor backgrounds, and original jazz recordings. Play as Cuphead or Mugman (in single player or local co-op) as you traverse strange worlds, acquire new weapons, learn powerful super moves, and discover hidden secrets while you try to pay your debt back to the devil!

Astebreed: Definitive Edition is set to receive a significant overhaul with its "Definitive Version" update for PC, incorporating all features previously exclusive to the PS4. This substantial upgrade will be provided to existing Astebreed owners at no additional cost.

The update introduces a host of enhancements designed to elevate the player experience. A newly added "Arrange Mode" offers a fresh gameplay challenge. Within the Gallery, players can now discover a collection of artworks commissioned specifically after the PS4 version's release. Exclusive to the PC version is an optimized controller system, ensuring smoother and more responsive gameplay.

Further refinements include adjusted enemy placement and behavioral patterns across all stages and difficulty levels, promising a more dynamic and challenging combat experience. The narrative is expanded with additional episodes and demo scenes, deepening the story and character development. The game's audio landscape is enriched with new music compositions.

Visually, Astebreed has undergone a significant graphical upgrade. This includes improved graphics with support for 1920x1080 resolution, enhanced 3D models, and upgraded textures boasting higher resolution. A new compression format has been implemented to improve details, lighting, and overall visual fidelity. Backgrounds and detail effects have also been enhanced, contributing to a more immersive world. A wide variety of other adjustments and improvements have been made to polish the overall game. Due to these major updates, the price has been adjusted to $19.99 as of November 7th, 2017.

**STORY**

Players step into the role of Roy Becket, a young pilot aspiring to match the prowess of his adoptive father. As a galactic war against an ancient mechanical alien race escalates, Roy is thrust into action. He must pilot an otherworldly bipedal war machine to defend the remnants of humanity. Accompanying Roy is a young girl who claims to have escaped the clutches of the malevolent aliens. Her experiences have irrevocably altered her, granting her the very abilities humanity needs to avert annihilation. Together, this unlikely duo must confront an relentless army and strive to reunite their fractured families. The very existence of civilization hangs in the balance, with Astebreed standing as humanity's final defense against eradication.

**The Arcade Shooter Genre, Evolved**

Astebreed revitalizes the classic arcade shooter genre. Through meticulously crafted 3D models, cutting-edge particle effects, and classic Japanese mech designs, the game delivers an unparalleled spectacle of beautiful destruction.

**Armed to the Teeth**

Roy commands a formidable arsenal. Equipped with the enigmatic Lucis device, his mech can execute long-range assaults, designate targets with a laser for precise homing attacks, and engage in close-quarters combat with a powerful blade. No enemy can evade Roy's wrath, regardless of their hiding place.

**Dynamically Changing Perspective**

Enemies do not always present themselves directly in front of the player. They swarm, fly, and intercept, and Astebreed's dynamic perspective ensures the action remains constantly in view. The game seamlessly transitions between vertical, horizontal, and 3D shooter perspectives, keeping players on their toes and anticipating the next threat without interrupting the flow of combat.

Name: Valfaris
Description:
Recently Updated - Full Metal Mode Valfaris’s take on New Game +. Restart with your entire collected arsenal and upgrades to face off against more difficult enemies, battle buffed bosses encounters, and seek out the new Destroyer class weapon! After mysteriously vanishing from galactic charts, the fortress of Valfaris has suddenly reappeared in the orbit of a dying sun. Once a self-contained paradise, the grandiose citadel now plays host to an ever-growing darkness. Therion, a fearless and proud son of Valfaris, returns to his home to uncover the truth of its doomed fate and to challenge the arcane evil at its very heart. Key Features Skulls in space! Gore in space! Metal in space! Savagely reduce foes to piles of gibs with an array of brutal weaponry Explore a diverse range of tainted environments as you venture ever deeper into the dark world of Valfaris Dominate ranks of deadly enemies and bosses, from the weird to the grotesque (and some that are just grotesquely weird) Gorge your eyes on devastatingly awesome pixel art hand-crafted by Andrew Gilmour Feel the power of a seismic soundtrack by extreme metaller and former Celtic Frost guitarist, Curt Victor Bryant Forged from the ground-up by the team behind cult hit Slain: Back From Hell Valfaris Digital Deluxe Edition In addition to the full game, the Valfaris Digital Deluxe Edition includes the following content: Valfaris - Digital OST Composed and recorded by former Celtic Frost guitarist Curt Victor Bryant, enjoy the savage sounds of Valfaris. The OST includes 20 original tracks. Valfaris - Digital Artbook From concept sketches to final in-game imagery, this collection showcases the work of Valfaris developer Steel Mantis, a two-man team comprised of Andrew Gilmour (artist and designer) and Thomas Jenns (programmer and designer). Get a closer look at weapon, enemy, and environment art, as well as previously unseen – and unused! – designs. Get ready to rip the galaxy a new wormhole!

Name: Mushihimesama
Description:
Mushihimesama (“Bug Princess” in English) is a vertical shooting game set in a beautiful fantasy world. Huge insect-like creatures called Koju roam the forest outside the village of Hoshifuri. When Reco's people fall to a mysterious sickness, the young princess decides to leave the village and meet the God of the Koju, who may provide a cure. Riding her faithful Golden Beetle friend Kiniro, Reco must traverse the wilds, braving the hostile landscape and the aggressive Koju beasts on her journey through the Shinju Forest. Main Features: Explore a beautiful fantasy world rendered in stunning HD sprite graphics. Battle a variety of giant 'Koju' bugs across 5 stages, including a blazing desert, lush forests, and a serene cave. CAVE's trademark bullets create a stunning visual impression, with iconic patterns unfolding in every boss encounter! Play the definitive shooter from the legendary developers that pioneered the 'bullet hell' genre! By decreasing the size of the player hitbox, Mushihimesama is able to challenge the player with some of the most intriguing and innovative shot patterns in the shoot 'em up genre. Experience the thrill of dodging thousands of bullets at once in one of CAVE's best games! Choose from several game modes: Arcade mode is designed to be as close to the original arcade game as possible. Novice mode is similar to Arcade, but balanced for new players. Arrange is a remixed version where you start with maximum firepower and defend yourself automatically. Customize further with 3 different weapon types and two different option types. Mushihimesama has several different modes and difficulty settings, including a mode specifically balanced for new players. No matter your skill level, you are certain to find a favorite mode! Bold players should try the notorious 'Ultra' mode, which is infamous for being one of the most difficult challenges in gaming! Mushihimesama V1.5 'Matsuri' Mode is available separately as optional DLC. V1.5 is a remixed game mode with alternate music and mechanics. Crank up the multiplier by firing close to enemies, but beware, as the bullet speed will also increase! Previously, this mode was only available on an extremely limited basis, but now it is available to every player on Steam! Enjoy energetic and inspiring music from composers Manabu Namiki and Masaharu Iwata. There are two soundtracks included (three with V1.5) to create an unforgettable mood for each stage. You can choose which soundtrack to play for every stage and area, so feel free to mix and match your favorite tracks! A robust list of optional features are supported, including: A training mode to assist with practicing individual stages. Multiple options to adjust viewing windows, screen size and position, and screen orientation. Try the vertical 'tate' mode to get an arcade-authentic picture! An assortment of beautiful background images. Support for keyboard customization and multiple controllers. Online global leaderboards with replay sharing. Local co-op gameplay. Steam achievements.

**HUNTDOWN: Become the Ultimate Bounty Hunter in a Future City Overrun by Crime**

In the chaotic future streets where criminal gangs reign and law enforcement is outmatched, only the skilled bounty hunters can liberate the city from the grip of corruption. Prepare to decimate the criminal underworld and strike it rich in this hard-boiled action-comedy arcade shooter.

**Unleash Kick-Ass Co-Op, Near and Far**

Embark on your mission solo or team up with a friend to provide covering fire and advance on enemies. Run, jump, and take cover amidst the mayhem of the future city. Whether your partner is in the same room or across the globe, you can wreak havoc as a team through couch co-op or Steam Remote Play.

**Experience a New Action-Packed Arcade Mode**

Face off against players worldwide in a brutal battle to climb the leaderboards. Innovate and devise new strategies to obliterate your foes and boost your score. Master combo-kills, quickdraw weapon-swap bonuses, or simply hurl criminals off rooftops. In this thrilling race against time, collect as many bounties as possible and strive to become the apex bounty hunter.

**Play as Three Legendary Bounty Hunters**

*   **Anna Conda:** An ex-commando and firearms expert, Anna is a full-time loose cannon. She will assassinate without question or mercy, but be prepared for collateral damage.
*   **John Sawyer:** A former Special Forces cop who left the force, this scarred veteran has lost so many limbs in combat he's practically half robot.
*   **Mow Man:** A modified recon droid, stolen and empowered with banned software, Mow Man trades bodies for cold, hard cash. "Don’t expect to be taken alive if Mow Man’s on your six," warns the game's description.

**Old School Charm, Modernized Gameplay**

HUNTDOWN features hand-painted 16-bit pixel art graphics and hand-drawn animations, seamlessly blended with fluid 60-FPS gameplay and an epic synthesized soundtrack.

**Conquer 20 Levels Across Gritty Cityscapes**

Navigate through gritty, neon-soaked, graffiti-strewn 80s cityscapes, each presenting a unique infamous gang boss to terminate and a bounty to collect.

**Dismantle Four Unique Gangs**

*   **Hoodlum Dolls:** These violent, feral punks are winning the gang war against the toothless authorities.
*   **Misconducts:** Organized hockey hooligans, they are experts in robbery and extortion with a penchant for explosives.
*   **The Heatseekers:** A murderous motorcycle club. These rockabilly villains style themselves on the centurions of Ancient Rome.
*   **NO.1 Suspects:** Masters of discipline and organized crime, these martial arts experts control the night through their casinos and nightclubs.

**Choose Your Weapon and Unleash Havoc**

Confiscate machine guns, laser weapons, katanas, grenades, and more, then turn them on their former owners. Stab, shoot, and explode your way through swathes of gangs and bosses to collect your bounty. As one developer noted, "The arsenal is as diverse as the criminal element you'll be facing."

Name: Hell is Other Demons
Description:
Bullet Hell, in Hell, Flawlessly Executed You grew up with the bullet hell arcade shooters which rewarded fast-decision making and creativity? Hell is Other Demons is crafted with expertly executed mechanics and bold, unforgettable style. Features Retro Bullet Hell Shooter - Fast-paced fair, but challenging, combat rewards practice and creativity. A Campaign Through Hell - Explore an extensive world full with thousands of demons and wonderfully over-the-top bosses. Arcade Mode - Fans of classic, high-score based arcade games will find a cozy home in this mode, with unlimited, procedurally generated action, and infinite replayability. Unforgettable Style - Hell is Other Demons’ bold art style is backed up by a heavy synthwave soundtrack composed by Rémi Gallego, of The Algorithm, and retro sound effects by Magnus Pålsson, composer of the VVVVVV OST.

Name: Crimzon Clover WORLD IGNITION
Description:
Prepare yourself for an insatiable rain of bullets, bombs, and beams in Crimzon Clover. From Japanese indie developer YOTSUBANE, AdventurePlanningService, this unique top-down shooter is a wild ride you won't want to miss out on. Your first step in Crimzon Clover: World Ignition is as simple as choosing how you want to play, and which powerful ship will be yours to command. Choose your difficulty from ARCADE (true to the original arcade game) or NOVICE (better if these are your first step in the world of hardcode SHMUP) then choose your mode from Boost, Original, Unlimited, and Time Attack. Original is THE main mode, where you blast your way through stage in search of the last boss. Boost Mode will adjust the difficulty based on how proficient you are at devastating your enemies. Unlimited turns each stage into an intense battlefield of bullets that only the most hardcore players will be able to survive. Time Attack pits you against the clock as you race to make the best score possible in about 3 minutes. Take control of a high spec fighter and destroy massive waves of enemies while dodging their unending rain of bullets. Each of the three ships has their own style of standard firing and a unique appearance. The firing style is translated beautifully as you amp your way into Break Mode and Double Break Mode! As you blast through your foes in each stage you can collect stars that will raise your score. Each enemy destroyed helps fill your Break Meter, which allows you to wipe the screen with powerful bombs or, if you have the patience, blast off into Break Mode to add a huge boost to your firepower and let you rip through enemies with ease. That's not the extent of your strength though, as having a full Break Meter while in Break Mode will allow you to enter the ultimately destructive Double Break Mode. Watch your enemies crumble in fear as you turn the tide and fill the screen with your own hellacious rain of firepower! Having a tough time to clear the game using no continue? No worries. Hit up the Training screen to set up your own scenario using your choice of mode, ship, stage, and freely customize other variables to practice the fight for survival. Training doesn't seem like a bad idea after you see what the enemies are capable of. Can you pilot your craft through the bullet massacre the enemies have prepared for you? Find out as you play Crimzon Clover: World Ignition! Features: Refreshing Gameplay Crimzon Clover puts a much-needed polish on the classic Shoot 'Em Up genre. Sky Blazing Graphics: Beautiful retro-inspired arcade graphics, revived for the modern gamer in HD (1280x768). Super-Powered Challenges: Whether you are new to SHMUPs or an old pro, Crimzon Clover has something for everyone. Cool Replays: Save your best plays to show off to your friends, or to check to see how you can get even better.

**Roche Fusion: A Modern Take on Classic Space Shooters**

Roche Fusion revitalizes the classic arcade space shooter genre with a modern, fast-paced experience. This game blends nostalgia with contemporary design, offering a thrilling cocktail of spaceships, intense combat, and explosive action. Players are challenged by procedurally generated levels that introduce increasingly aggressive and deadly enemy waves. The game features insane boss fights and a wide variety of upgrades, including weapons, shields, and other items designed to aid players on their journey.

Key features of Roche Fusion include intuitive and responsive arcade-style controls, ensuring a smooth and engaging gameplay experience. The procedurally generated nature of levels, enemies, and upgrades guarantees infinite variety and replayability. An engaging score system rewards players with multi-kill combos, and leaderboards, alongside meta-game unlockables, encourage continued play. For those who enjoy cooperative play, Roche Fusion offers an exciting two-player local co-op mode. The game also boasts amazing graphical effects and custom sound effects, complemented by over 30 minutes of original soundtrack. And, of course, there are explosions! From the satisfying burst of a one-shot kill to the overwhelming spectacle of swarm attacks and epic boss battles, explosions are a central element of the Roche Fusion experience. This title brings the classic space shooter into the new century with a fun mix of enemies, lasers, and explosions, all presented in a unique, retro yet polished 2-D style.

**Nex Machina: A High-Octane Twin-Stick Shooter Experience**

Prepare for an intense arcade-style twin-stick shooter experience with Nex Machina, a creation from Housemarque. Drawing inspiration from classics like Robotron and Smash TV, this game plunges players into a distant, cablepunk-themed future where pure action and voxel destruction take center stage. In this world, humanity's over-reliance on portable technology has led to their downfall, as machines have achieved consciousness and vastly surpassed human intelligence. Recognizing their superiority, robots have begun eradicating human life, establishing themselves as the dominant species.

Housemarque, renowned for titles like Resogun, and in collaboration with Eugene Jarvis, invites you to revisit the golden age of arcades with Nex Machina. This title is positioned as the definitive twin-stick shooter of its generation. Your mission is to combat the rogue robots, rescue the enslaved humans, and ultimately, surpass your friends' high scores, shattering their aspirations of victory. The game challenges players to prove they have the skills to ascend to the top of the leaderboards.

Nex Machina boasts a wealth of features designed for maximum engagement:

*   **Explosive Twin-Stick Arcade Action:** Experience the pinnacle of twin-stick shooter gameplay.
*   **Extensive Content:** Over 100 challenging levels spread across 6 distinct and intense worlds await.
*   **Hidden Discoveries:** Uncover secret paths, bonus levels, and hidden humans to rescue.
*   **Local Cooperative Multiplayer:** Team up with a friend for shared destruction.
*   **Deep Replayability:** A robust scoring system, rich metagame, and high replayability ensure endless fun.
*   **Tailored Challenges:** Specially designed feats and achievements provide unique objectives.
*   **Competitive Community:** Compete on community and friend leaderboards to prove your prowess.
*   **Unlockable Content:** Discover unlockables and customize your player profile.
*   **Cutting-Edge Technology:** Features next-gen signed distance field (SDF) ray-tracing and morphing technology.
*   **Advanced Engine:** Built on a significantly reworked version of the Housemarque engine, featuring voxel-driven graphics.

**The Ramp** is a skateboarding game that lets you experience the pure thrill of vert skating. It focuses on the exhilarating feeling of flow and the joy of riding a halfpipe, offering a unique sense of freedom and satisfaction.

The game is designed for **abundant flow**, emphasizing smooth movement and constant action. While it's **accessible to pick up**, mastering its tricks provides a satisfying challenge.

**The Ramp** is intentionally simple. It does not include unlockable items, progression systems, scoring, missions, or elements like weapons or explosions.

Developer Paul describes **The Ramp** as a "digital toy" meant to replicate the singular feeling of real-life vert skateboarding. By removing common game features, it aims to deliver a short, flow-inducing experience. Paul states, "I wanted to capture that pure, unadulterated feeling of just riding." This experience, he notes, is "like the cost of a fancy coffee, but it can make your day."

Paul welcomes feedback, questions, and bug reports, promising quick replies. He also encourages players to share their enjoyment of **The Ramp**.

Descenders is an exhilarating downhill biking game that puts an extreme sports spin on virtual adventure. Developed by the team behind Action Henk, this title aims to be welcoming for beginners while still offering a significant challenge for experienced riders. The game's core appeal lies in its dynamic environments and deep control system, allowing players to truly master the art of the descent.

The game features procedurally generated worlds, ensuring that each run presents a fresh set of obstacles and opportunities, from challenging jumps to treacherous hillbombs. Players can hone their skills with freestyle bike controls, utilizing a sophisticated physics engine to perform stylish maneuvers like whips and scrubs. A unique "Rogue-Bike Mode" allows for experimentation with special mutators, enabling the development of distinct riding styles. Furthermore, an online reputation system, "Build Your Rep," lets players showcase their prowess, unlock new bikes, and acquire cosmetic items. The high-energy gameplay is further amplified by a licensed soundtrack featuring drum & bass from the Liquicity label, according to the game's developers. To achieve legendary status, players must conquer the game in a single, unbroken run.

A key aspect of the Descenders experience is team affiliation. Players can align themselves with one of three distinct factions: Team Enemy, known for their trick-focused approach; Team Arboreal, who champion proficient off-road riding; and Team Kinetic, dedicated to pure speed. Joining a team fosters a sense of community, connecting players with similar interests. Representing your chosen team with pride through their colors and apparel can lead to earning exclusive gear. The team that accumulates the highest Rep earns special prizes and access to a dedicated channel on the Descenders Discord server, as noted by the game's community managers.

Name: Bigger Bikes
Description:
Bigger Bikes is a game about riding bikes, in off-road conditions. The gameplay is based on realistic bike control and funny physics. Be careful! You can go into a skid, roll over or fly into a ditch at any time. Overcome difficult mountainous and hilly terrain, ride light or take a load with you, look for the safest route so as not to roll over and lose the delivery. Features Five vehicles Realistic bike control Fascinating mountain landscapes Hardcore, based on physics

Name: Hidden Industries Top-Down 3D
Description:
Find the objects that are hidden on the map. The game is a Hidden Object Game. In which you need to find objects with a certain design in beautiful locations, and click on them with the mouse. The game is a 3D level game in which objects and characters are frozen in the picture, you have to find 20 different objects. The system automatically determines which object you need to find at the moment, so the game has a high replay value, you will need to search for different objects each time.

Traction Control is a unique racing game that blends freestyle sports with rally car racing. To excel, players must master stylish tricks and react with speed. As one expert highlighted, "Success in this game hinges on players' ability to perform stylish tricks and demonstrate quick reflexes." Understanding the game's intricate controls and the distinct characteristics of each track is crucial for staying competitive.

The game features a global leaderboard for players to vie for top scores. You can download "ghosts" of other players from this leaderboard to race against them in real-time. Additionally, over 150 challenges are available to test your abilities, with new paint jobs awarded upon completion. For multiplayer engagement, Traction Control allows you to team up with friends for races, trick sessions, and exploration of the game's diverse environments. Players can compete live to showcase their skills. A reviewer noted, "The social features allow for engaging real-time competition to determine who can achieve the best performance."

**Athletics 3: Summer Sports - Your Gateway to Virtual Athletic Glory**

Step onto the virtual field with **Athletics 3: Summer Sports**, a game designed to bring 42 realistic 3D athletic events right to your screen. Whether you're aiming to beat AI opponents or challenge friends across the globe in 9 online multiplayer modes, this game offers a comprehensive summer sports experience. The question remains: can you surpass the skills of the world's top athletes and achieve ultimate victory?

This title plunges you into a wide array of disciplines. You'll find yourself competing in track and field, cycling, intense combat sports, graceful gymnastics, precise shooting, and exhilarating swimming events. Each of these activities is rendered in stunning 3D, providing an immersive visual experience.

**Key Features:**

*   **Online Multiplayer:** Directly challenge your friends in private online matches, fostering friendly competition.
*   **Training Center:** Enhance your athlete's **strength** and **speed** to significantly improve their performance across all events.
*   **Authentic Olympic Feel:** The game captures a realistic atmosphere through detailed animations, jubilant celebratory moments, captivating music, and dynamic crowd sound effects that bring the excitement of major sporting events to life.
*   **Intuitive Controls:** "Athletics 3: Summer Sports" is designed for accessibility, making it easy for new players to jump in while still offering depth for seasoned gamers. Success in the game relies on **quick reflexes**, **precise timing**, and **smart strategy**.
*   **Global Leaderboard:** Strive to reach the pinnacle of the World Leaderboard for every single event. Monitor your progress against friends and players worldwide, facing off against a diverse roster of 60 athletes hailing from countries as varied as the USA and Australia.

**Included Sports (42 Total):**

*   **Track & Field:** 100m, 200m, 400m, 110m Hurdles, 1500m, 4x100m Relay, Long Jump, High Jump, Triple Jump, Javelin Throw, Pole Vault, Shotput, Discus Throw, Hammer Throw.
*   **Other Athletics:** Climbing, Gymnastics, Trampoline.
*   **Combat Sports:** Judo, Taekwondo, Wrestling, Karate, Boxing.
*   **Water Sports:** Rowing (500m), Swimming (50m, 100m), Diving (10m Platform), Synchronized Swimming.
*   **Cycling:** Mountain Bike, BMX, Sprint (2 laps, 5 laps).
*   **Equestrian:** Horse Racing, Horse Show Jumping (Track 1, Track 2).
*   **Racket Sports:** Ping Pong (11 points, 5 points).
*   **Shooting Sports:** Archery, Bullseye Shooting, Rapid Fire Shooting, Skeet Shooting.
*   **Other:** Fencing, Weightlifting.

Name: Pumped BMX Pro
Description:
Ready to go Pro? Pumped BMX Pro puts you back on the seat for another high adrenaline, fast-paced trickathon where chaining massive combos could put you at the number one spot on the global leaderboards. Pump your way through 60 levels of ever increasing difficulty, making sure you’re racking up those platinum medals by completing Trick Challenges along the way. Choose from 15 riders with predesigned bikes, or get creative and design your own in the easy to use bike designer. Pumped BMX Pro features; - 15 characters, each with their own spectacular bike! - 40+ radical tricks, from outrageous spins to insane grinds! - Over 200 challenges, each harder than the last! - 60 beautifully designed levels, from high top mountains to swampy depths! - Ragdoll physics, just in case you miss the ramp!

Name: Click and Relax
Description:
The game consists of mini-games in which you can move objects, twist the knobs and just relax. Move the mouse over objects consisting of other objects Reshape objects with the mouse Color objects

Name: MTB Dirt
Description:
MTB Dirt is a realistic physics based mountainbike dirt game built by passionate dirt riders for the devoted mountainbike community out there. We've all been dreaming about the one perfect trail – now the time has come to ride the most beautiful trails and show the world what you got: you are the master of your bike! Come and join the world of MTB Dirt: combine physic realistic stunts like tailwhips and tuck no hands – many more to come! enjoy your ride with realistic sounds of your hub and the sounds of the nature photorealistic graphics let you dive into the world of mountainbiking and forget your surroundings

Name: King Of Dirt
Description:
King of Dirt is actually best BMX game. You want tons of adrenaline and a lot of outstanding impressions? You dream is performing of Backflips and enormous number of other unbelievable tricks? Feature: - 6 legendary bikes! - 9 arenas! - View from 3 or 1 person! - 20+ crazy stunts! - Customization! King Of Dirt – more than just a game – it’s a lifestyle. You have to level-up your character, customize your bike, learns & train stunts, and be the best ! Complete missions, and always be ready to drive! Struck them with your tricks, and show, who is the best rider! Brilliant winnings, a lot of fame, and great emotions – granted! Be on the bike all the time. Train yourself!

Name: Mission: It's Complicated
Description:
Mission: It’s Compli­cated is a visual novel about getting superheroes to fall in love, and the shenanigans that happen along the way. Send your heroes out on ridiculous missions at night, and try to keep them from getting hurt -- or they won't be able to go on dates during the day! Grow your favorite pair's bond so they can go on more dates. Help them pick the right thing to say. Get them to fall in love… and save the world. Super sweet features of this narrative-based, visual novel include: Heart and humor! The puns are terrible and the feels are real. Choose your OTP! Any hero (there's 5) can be paired with any other to win the game. Friend dates! Friendship is just as important as romance. Win the game with romantic or platonic love depending on which pair you pick! No bummers! Every pair has a happy ending. But can you get the ULTIMATE happy ending? A serious lack of beds! Oh no, there's only one! :O Super cute art! Look at it! It's cute as heck. So much reading! Over 100k words! That's an entire novel! Wow! It'll probably help you on your SATs or something! Are those still a thing? NO voice acting! Cast your favorite voice actor for each character using the power of your imagination. LGBTQ+ friendly Want to breeze through the game to see all the endings? Skip any mission you've done before and still get credit... so you can get to those juicy dates! Free! Not secretly-designed-for-microtransactions-free, but actually free. So that's cool. In case you missed it, Mission: It’s Compli­cated is free. Completely FREE! To let someone know you care, share one of these special Valen­tine’s Day cards with them. Sharing is caring! Fun gifs!

Name: Into the Breach
Description:
The free major update, Into the Breach: Advanced Edition is now available! Nearly every aspect of the game is expanded with new content, including: New Mechs and Weapons: Five new mech squads and nearly forty new weapons. New Challenges: More enemies, more bosses, and more mission objectives. New Pilot Abilities: Four new pilots and triple the amount of pilot skills. “Unfair” Mode: A more challenging difficulty to test the most seasoned tacticians. The remnants of human civilization are threatened by gigantic creatures breeding beneath the earth. You must control powerful mechs from the future to hold off this alien threat. Each attempt to save the world presents a new randomly generated challenge in this turn-based strategy game from the makers of FTL. Key Features: Defend the Cities: Civilian buildings power your mechs. Defend them from the Vek and watch your fire! Perfect Your Strategy: All enemy attacks are telegraphed in minimalistic, turn-based combat. Analyze your opponent's attack and come up with the perfect counter every turn. Build the Ultimate Mech: Find powerful new weapons and unique pilots as you battle the Vek infestation across Corporate-Nation islands. Another Chance: Failure is not an option. When you are defeated, send help back through time to save another timeline!

Name: Total War: EMPIRE – Definitive Edition
Description:
Complete your Total War collection with this Definitive Edition of Total War: EMPIRE, which includes all DLC and feature updates since the game’s release: Take on the Warpath Campaign and lead one of 5 new Native American factions in an epic war to defend your lands and drive out the invaders. Build up your armies with the Elite Units of the East, Elite Units of the West, Elite Units of America and the Special Forces Units & Bonus Content packs, which together add over 50 elite new units. Total War: EMPIRE Definitive Edition offers hundreds and hundreds of hours of absorbing gameplay and every bit of content made for the game. See below for full details. About Total War: EMPIRE Control the land, command the seas, forge a new nation, and conquer the globe. Total War: EMPIRE takes the Total War franchise to the eighteenth century Age of Enlightenment a time of political upheaval, military advancements, and radical thought, captured in stunning detail. Total War: EMPIRE introduces a host of revolutionary new features, including true 3D naval combat. For the first time in the Total War series, you will be able to intuitively command single ships or vast fleets upon seascapes rich with extraordinary water and weather effects that play a huge role in your eventual glorious success or ignominious defeat. After pummelling your enemy with cannon fire, close in to grapple their ship and prepare to board, taking control of your men as they fight hand-to-hand on the decks of these wooden behemoths. In addition, Total War: EMPIRE will see further enhancements to the Total War series’ signature 3D battles and turn-based campaign map. Real-time battles will pose new challenges with the addition of cannon and musket, challenging players to master new formations and tactics as a result of the increasing role of gunpowder within warfare. And the Campaign Map, the heart of Total War introduces a variety of new and upgraded elements, including new systems for Trade, Diplomacy and Espionage with agents; a refined and streamlined UI; improved Advisors; and a vastly extended scope, taking in the riches of India, the turbulence of Europe and, for the first time, the untapped potential of the United States of America. About The Warpath Campaign A new detailed North American Campaign Map expands the Total War: EMPIRE experience, with 5 brand new Native American factions, new units and technologies. Experience battles in the new Warpath Campaign and lead one of the 5 new factions in an epic war to defend your lands and drive out the invaders. Or take these units and their unique strengths into multiplayer battles. • 5 New Playable Factions including the Iroquois, Huron, Plains, Pueblo and Cherokee nations. • Expanded North American Territories - A new, more detailed North American Campaign Map featuring new regions and a new start date. • New Elite Units including Mohawk Elite Warriors, Cheyenne Dog Soldiers, Navajo Scout Warriors and many more. • Two New Agent Types - Infiltrate enemy territory with the new Shaman unit and sabotage the opposition with the cunning Scout. • 18 New Tribal Technologies including Spirit Medicine, the Call of the Wild and Dreamwalking creating a brand new tribal technology tree. • New Winning Objectives for each of the playable factions. About Elite Units of the East The Elite Units of the East adds 12 new elite units to the Maratha and Ottoman factions and expands the map further East than any previous Total War game. Most of these soldiers' expertise developed on the battlefield - some are fearsome brigands, others of them are drawn from a strong academic background, learned warriors. They will provide a vast array of tactical options: intimidating and cowing your enemies. • Haydut Irregulars (Ottoman Empire) • Wallachian Boyars (Ottoman Empire) • Bosnian Panduks (Ottoman Empire) • Circassian Armoured Cavalry (Ottoman Empire) • Armenian Archers (Ottoman Empire) • Libyan Kuloglu (Ottoman Empire) • Palestinian Auxiliaries (Ottoman Empire) • Cairo Janissaries (Ottoman Empire) • Mounted Nizam-I-Cedit (Ottoman Empire) • Rajput Zamindars (Maratha) • Poligars (Maratha) • Barawardi (Maratha) About Elite Units of the West The Elite Units of the West introduces 14 completely unique units from all the major Western factions. Featuring all new infantry and cavalry units, equipped with the best weapons and having undergone the most rigorous of training, the Elite Units of the West bring even more options on the battlefield to all tacticians seeking to defeat their enemies. • Hungarian Grenadiers (Austria) • Horse Guards (Britain) • Swiss Guards (France) • Blue Guards (United Provinces) • Gardes du Corps (United Provinces) • Guard Grenadiers (Poland-Lithuania) • 2nd Hussars (Prussia) • Bosniaks (Prussia) • Frei-Korps (Prussia) • Gardes à cheval (Russia) • Siemenovski Foot Guards (Russia) • Walloon Guards (Spain) • Legion of the United States (United States) • US Marines (United States) About Elite Units of America The Elite Units of America adds 15 new elite units to the American, British and French factions of Total War: EMPIRE. In the last half of the 18th century, the political upheaval from thirteen of British Colonies in North America ultimately led to the 1776 Declaration of Independence and changed History forever. The 15 units have all played a major part in the American Revolution. Though their background owes a lot to European military traditions, their identity is tied to the destiny of the United States and gave these men courage and audacity like no other soldier on the battlefield. • 1st Delaware (United States) • 1st Maryland (United States) • 2nd Continental Light Dragoons (United States) • 2nd New York (United States) • 33rd Foot (Britain) • Brunswick Dragoons (Britain) • Hessian Grenadiers (Britain) • King’s Royal Regiment of New York (Britain) • Lee’s Legion (United States) • Morgan’s Provisional Rifle Corp (United States) • Pulaski’s Legion (United States) • Royal Deux-Ponts Regiment (France) • Royal Welch Fusiliers (Britain) • Company of Select Marksmen/Fraser’s Rangers (Britain) • Tarleton’s Light Dragoons (Britain) About Special Forces Units & Bonus Content The Special Forces Units introduces six of the most influential military forces of the 18th Century. True to the period, these exclusive elite units become available on the campaign map via a certain faction or once a specific geographical region is under control. This pack also includes three more exclusive Elite Units. • HMS Victory • Rogers' Rangers • Ottoman Organ Gun • Ghoorkas • Corso Terrestre Guerillas • Bulkeley's Regiment • Death's Head Hussars • The USS Constitution • The Dahomey Amazons

**Total War: SHOGUN 2: Master the Art of War in Feudal Japan**

In the tumultuous 16th century, Feudal Japan is fractured by relentless conflict. Once unified, the nation is now a battleground for ten legendary warlords, each vying for ultimate supremacy amidst a landscape of intrigue and decay. The path to becoming the new Shogun, the undisputed ruler of a pacified Japan, is paved with both military conquest and strategic acumen. Players assume the role of a Daimyo, a clan leader, tasked with navigating the intricate web of military engagements, economic development, and diplomatic maneuvering to achieve this singular goal.

**Strategic Depth Inspired by Ancient Wisdom**

Total War: SHOGUN 2 distinguishes itself with its enhanced full 3D battles, a hallmark of the series, and its deeply engaging tactical campaign map, often considered the series' core. The game's innovative AI system draws inspiration from Sun Tzu's "The Art of War," an ancient Chinese military treatise that profoundly influenced Japanese warfare. According to historical accounts of the game's development, the Creative Assembly meticulously analyzed this foundational text to implement a gameplay experience that is both accessible and strategically profound. This allows players to conquer the islands of Japan through vast armies of samurai and formidable fleets of warships in breathtaking real-time combat.

**Building an Empire and Waging War**

The turn-based campaign map serves as the foundation for empire building. Here, players will wield economic, political, and military power to amass wealth, raise formidable armies, and expand their influence. The game encourages players to scheme and adapt, mirroring the principles of Sun Tzu's "Art of War." This includes employing tactics such as fire and siege warfare, utilizing spies and assassins, and constantly adjusting strategies to the ever-changing conditions on the battlefield and within the kingdom.

**Innovative Features for a New Era of Warfare**

Total War: SHOGUN 2 introduces several new elements to the series. Players will experience the development of their Generals and Agents through new RPG skills and experience systems. Sieges have been reimagined with multi-stage assaults, where scaling the walls is merely the initial challenge. The introduction of new Hero units provides powerful focal points on the battlefield, inspiring troops and decimating enemy forces. Furthermore, the campaign map itself is now a dynamic, rotating 3D environment, offering a more immersive strategic overview. The game also offers robust online multiplayer, allowing players to experience the main campaign in a two-player mode or engage in epic battles with up to eight players in special campaigns, leading their online armies to glory.

**Total War: SHOGUN 2: Master Feudal Japan's Art of War**

Total War: SHOGUN 2 plunges you into the chaotic 16th century of Feudal Japan. This period was defined by constant warfare and the ambitions of ten powerful warlords, all seeking to unite the land under their rule. As a Daimyo, the leader of your clan, your mission is to orchestrate military campaigns, manage your economy, and engage in complex diplomacy. The ultimate goal is to reunite Japan and claim the title of Shogun, becoming the undisputed ruler of a peaceful nation.

The game builds upon the acclaimed Total War series with several key improvements:

*   **Spectacular Real-Time Battles:** Engage in full 3D battles on land and sea, a signature feature of the Total War franchise.
*   **Deep Strategic Campaign Map:** The campaign map, central to the series' appeal, offers a rich and engaging strategic experience.
*   **Sun Tzu's "Art of War" AI:** A new AI system draws inspiration from Sun Tzu's ancient military treatise, which greatly influenced Japanese warfare. This brings the wisdom of Master Sun Tzu to gameplay, offering deep yet accessible strategy.

**Core Gameplay Mechanics:**

*   **Conquer:** Lead vast armies of samurai and powerful fleets across Japan in thrilling real-time battles.
*   **Build:** Develop your domain on a turn-based campaign map. Use economic, political, and military strength to gain wealth, raise armies, and expand your influence.
*   **Scheme:** Apply the strategic principles from Sun Tzu's "Art of War." Employ tactics like fire and siege warfare, espionage, and assassination to adapt to changing battlefield conditions and your growing empire.
*   **Online Battles:** Experience the main campaign in a two-player mode or join epic online battles with up to eight players in specialized campaigns.

**New Features in SHOGUN 2:**

*   **RPG Elements for Leaders:** Generals and Agents gain new RPG skills and experience, allowing for deeper character development and strategic customization.
*   **Multi-Stage Sieges:** Sieges are now more complex, with scaling walls being just the first stage of these intricate engagements.
*   **Hero Units:** Introduce powerful Hero units that can rally your troops and devastate enemy forces.
*   **Dynamic 3D Campaign Map:** Navigate a new rotating 3D campaign map for a more immersive and interactive strategic overview.

**XCOM: Enemy Unknown: Lead the Fight Against a Global Alien Invasion**

In XCOM: Enemy Unknown, you assume command of a clandestine paramilitary organization tasked with defending Earth from a terrifying alien invasion. As the XCOM commander, your mission is to manage vital resources, spearhead technological advancements, and meticulously plan both overarching combat strategies and the precise tactics of individual units. The original XCOM is celebrated as a landmark title in gaming history, and this reimagining by the renowned strategy specialists at Firaxis Games promises to build upon that esteemed legacy.

This new installment introduces an entirely fresh invasion narrative, featuring novel alien adversaries and groundbreaking technologies to combat them. You will hold the fate of humanity in your hands, guiding the research of alien technologies, establishing and overseeing a fully functional base, and orchestrating every aspect of combat missions, from strategic planning to the minute control of soldier movements on the battlefield.

**Key Features of XCOM: Enemy Unknown:**

*   **Strategy Evolved:** XCOM: Enemy Unknown masterfully blends deep tactical turn-based gameplay with exhilarating action sequences and intense on-the-ground combat.
*   **Strategic Base Management:** Recruit, customize, and develop a diverse roster of unique soldiers, while also managing your personnel effectively. Detect and intercept the alien threat by building and expanding your XCOM headquarters.
*   **Tactical Combat:** Command your soldier squads in strategic turn-based ground battles and deploy powerful air units, including the Interceptor and Skyranger.
*   **Worldwide Threat:** The conflict unfolds across the globe, with the XCOM team engaging in over 70 distinct missions and interacting with governments worldwide.

Unity of Command II is a highly anticipated sequel to the cult classic strategy game. It offers polished, fluid gameplay on a new 3D engine, retaining the series' signature art style. While easy to pick up, the game presents a significant challenge, transforming new players into seasoned strategists.

In Unity of Command II, you command Western Allied forces during World War II. Your responsibilities include managing army divisions, along with their crucial supply and logistics. For the first time, the game introduces Fog of War, adding a layer of uncertainty. You'll need to capture enemy soldiers and conduct reconnaissance to uncover enemy troop positions. Be aware that enemy panzers will attempt to capture your scattered units, so regroup and counterattack!

**Key Features:**

*   **Dynamic Campaign:** Alter the course of World War II with a branching campaign that ensures unique playthroughs every time.
*   **Headquarters:** A new feature placing army headquarters on the map. From here, you'll manage unit reorganization, bridging, and resupply. Headquarters are vital for reinforcing units and recovering lost strength. They also unlock special abilities like Emergency Supply and motorizing units with HQ trucks.
*   **Theater Assets:** This expanded feature from the original game allows you to disrupt enemy operations behind their lines by sabotaging infrastructure. You can also:
    *   Order aircraft for aerial reconnaissance.
    *   Execute devastating bombing runs.
    *   Sustain units behind enemy lines through air supply.
*   **Bonus Objectives:** Engage in optional, history-altering "what-if" scenarios. Successfully completing these might grant you the chance to "Rush for the Apennines" and break through German defenses before they can fortify.
*   **Fog of War:** Confront your enemies, but first, you must locate them. Reveal enemy positions by capturing stragglers, upgrading your HQ, and using its special abilities to uncover enemy defense markers.
*   **Deep Operations:** Unity of Command revolutionized turn-based strategy with its signature supply line mechanic. Carefully monitor your logistics as you plan deep strikes into enemy territory, severing supply lines and encircling enemy units.
*   **Accessible Scenario Editor:** Unity of Command II includes a comprehensive Allied campaign. Additionally, you can experience pivotal WWII battles from the Axis perspective. The game features a built-in scenario editor, enabling players to create and share new battlefields via Steam Workshop integration.

## XCOM® 2: Humanity's Last Stand Against Alien Occupation

XCOM 2 emerges as the highly anticipated sequel to the critically acclaimed 2012 strategy game, XCOM: Enemy Unknown. The world has dramatically transformed over the past two decades, with humanity having surrendered unconditionally to alien forces twenty years prior. The once-proud XCOM, Earth's final bastion of defense, now lies in ruins, its operatives scattered and defeated.

### The Alien Dominion and the Seeds of Rebellion

In XCOM 2, the alien conquerors preside over Earth, constructing gleaming metropolises that project an image of a utopian future for humankind. However, this facade conceals a malevolent agenda, ruthlessly suppressing any who dare to defy their oppressive new world order. Only those dwelling in the remote fringes of civilization retain a semblance of freedom. It is within these marginalized communities that a new force is coalescing, preparing to rise and fight for humanity's survival. Constantly evading pursuit and facing overwhelming odds, the remnants of XCOM must devise a strategy to spark a global insurgency and ultimately eradicate the alien menace.

### The Avenger: A Mobile Headquarters on the Move

**XCOM ON THE RUN:** Command the Avenger, an alien supply vessel ingeniously repurposed as XCOM's mobile command center. This innovative, open-ended gameplay structure empowers you to dictate your strike team's movements, cultivate public support for the resistance, and strategically counter enemy operations.

### Building a Diverse and Capable Resistance

**RECRUIT RESISTANCE FIGHTERS:** Assemble a formidable team by recruiting from five distinct soldier classes, each boasting its own unique skill tree. This allows for the creation of highly specialized units tailored to your specific tactical approach and mission requirements.

### Mastering Tactical Guerrilla Warfare

**TACTICAL GUERRILLA COMBAT:** XCOM 2 introduces new gameplay mechanics that significantly enhance tactical flexibility during engagements. Employ the element of surprise by utilizing concealment to ambush enemy patrols, effectively disrupting their advance. Seize valuable equipment and artifacts by looting fallen adversaries. Furthermore, the ability to rescue VIPs and fallen comrades by escorting them to extraction points adds a crucial layer of strategic depth to every mission.

### Confronting a New Alien Threat

**A NEW BREED OF ENEMY:** Prepare to face a diverse array of formidable adversaries, including entirely new alien species and the ADVENT, the enforcers of the alien regime. These distinct enemy types present unique tactical challenges, demanding careful planning and adaptation to overcome.

### Research, Development, and Strategic Upgrades

**RESEARCH, DEVELOP AND UPGRADE:** Customize and construct vital rooms within the Avenger to unlock new capabilities for XCOM on the battlefield. Leverage the expertise of your Scientists and Engineers to research, develop, and upgrade an arsenal of weapons and armor, ensuring your forces are equipped to match your preferred combat tactics.

### Unpredictable Missions, Infinite Challenges

**EACH MISSION IS A UNIQUE CHALLENGE:** Embark on missions spanning the globe, from untamed wilderness to the heart of alien-controlled megacities, and even into the depths of alien installations. The game features virtually infinite combinations of maps, mission objectives, and enemy encounters, ensuring that every playthrough offers a fresh and engaging strategic experience.

Name: Wildermyth
Description:
Wildermyth is a character-driven, procedurally-generated tactical RPG. Like the best tabletop roleplaying experiences, Wildermyth gives you choices and answers your every decision with consequences that drive your characters forward. Lead a band of heroes as they grow from reluctant farmers into unique, legendary fighters. Combat unexpected threats and strange monsters across interactive battlefields. Unravel mysteries and share pensive moments in an ever-new fantasy setting that blends hard truths and sacrifice with humor and personal storytelling. Where does your myth lead? Come help us uncover it! Reminiscent of tabletop roleplaying, unique heroes are born in unique settings every game. They age, transform, fall in love, disagree, and make harrowing sacrifices. Each hero brings their own organic history and personality with them, but your choices and combat skills are what decide their paths and outcomes. All heroes die someday… but you get to hold on to your favorites. Reintroduce them in the next adventure, and over many lifetimes the myths you make will form your own legendary pantheon. An Imaginative Papercraft World The Yondering Lands, where the game is set, is a richly layered world populated with hand-painted 2D characters and scenery. We’ve paid loving attention to breaking molds and exploring new ideas: no orcs, elves, or goblins here—but watch out for the telepathic insect-dragons and the clockwork undead. Extreme Character Depth Each of your heroes has their own unique generated history, personality, and appearance, and will form relationships with your other heroes. All of these elements change and develop over the course of a playthrough, as characters age, encounter mysteries, and overcome challenges. Choices That Matter Your hero may choose to trust the enigmatic wolf god, leading to a hair-raising change in their appearance and combat abilities. Or they may pursue a romance with a fellow hero, giving each of them a shared buff and more story opportunities. Encounters and events have permanent, character-defining effects, letting you craft the arc of each character. A New Approach to Death Did your favorite character get one-shotted by a tentacled horror-bear? Choose to let a hero 'fall back' with a maiming that will lead to some transformative new paths in their legend, or let them go out in a blaze of glory to be remembered for generations to come. Deep and Creative Tactical Combat Combat in Wildermyth emphasizes teamwork and careful positioning, as well as imaginative use of your evolving capabilities and surroundings. Walling and Flanking mechanics provide clear but conflicting incentives, while mystical interfusion lets you remake the battlefield with explosive magic. Multiple difficulty levels mean you can get as intense as you want to. Cooperative Multiplayer In a multiplayer game, you and your friends can each customize and control your own heroes as you play through a campaign. Recommended for up to five players—though in a typical campaign, you start with three heroes and pick up the fourth and fifth along the way. We also support Steam Remote Play. Endless Replayability Pick and choose from a huge bank of combat abilities as your heroes level up in each playthrough, and decide whether you prefer offensive or defensive tactics, brute strength, stealth, or magically flinging fire from a nearby lamp into your enemies' faces. Procedural generation gives you new heroes, new enemies, new story events, and new maps every time you play. A Custom Pantheon of Legends You’ll have the freedom to customize hero appearances, names, histories, and more. As time passes, heroes grow old and may retire, or else might fall in combat—and yes, some will survive all the way to the end. You can add your favorite heroes to a roster of legends and call on them again in later playthroughs. Build your own mythologies and share the awe-inspiring might of your heroes with others.

Name: Shadowrun: Dragonfall - Director's Cut
Description:
Shadowrun: Dragonfall - Director’s Cut is a standalone release of Harebrained Schemes' critically-acclaimed Dragonfall campaign, which first premiered as a major expansion for Shadowrun Returns . The Director's Cut adds a host of new content and enhancements to the original game: 5 all-new missions, alternate endings, new music, a redesigned interface, team customization options, a revamped combat system, and more - making it the definitive version of this one-of-a-kind cyberpunk RPG experience. NOTE: The Director’s Cut is free to existing owners of the Dragonfall expansion for Shadowrun Returns . It will be automatically added to your Steam Library when the game is released. Man Meets Magic & Machine In 2012, magic returned to our world, awakening powerful creatures of myth and legend. Among them was the Great Dragon Feuerschwinge, who emerged without warning from the mountains of Germany, unleashing fire, death, and untold destruction across the countryside. It took German forces nearly four months to finally shoot her down - and when they did, their victory became known as The Dragonfall. It’s 42 years later - 2054 - and the world has changed. Unchecked advances in technology have blurred the line between man and machine. Elves and trolls walk among us, ruthless corporations bleed the world dry, and Feuerschwinge’s reign of terror is just a distant memory. Germany is splintered - a stable anarchy known as the “Flux State” controls the city of Berlin. It’s a place where power is ephemeral, almost anything goes, and the right connections can be the difference between success and starvation. For you and your team of battle-scarred shadowrunners, there’s no better place to earn a quick payday. Now, a new threat is rising, one that could mean untold chaos and devastation. One that soon has you and your team caught on the wrong side of a deadly conspiracy. The only clue: whispers of the Dragonfall. Rumors that the Great Dragon Feuerschwinge may still be alive, waiting for the right moment to return… Shadowrun: Dragonfall - Director’s Cut Features A Classic, Story-Driven cRPG: Dragonfall hearkens back to the golden age of computer RPG’s with a novel-like branching narrative full of sharp prose and deep character development. Immerse yourself in a smart, 20+ hour campaign with a diverse cast of all-too-human characters. A One-of-a-Kind Cyberpunk Setting: Experience the unique “Tech meets Magic” dystopian future of Shadowrun, a fan-favorite game setting now celebrating it’s 25th anniversary. Shadowrun: Dragonfall - Director’s Cut is the perfect entry point to the setting for those with no prior Shadowrun experience, while providing plenty of classic Shadowrun characters and tech for veteran players to sink their teeth into. Command Your Team: Lead a small team of shadowrunners - each with their own outlook, motivations, and backstory. The members of your team are designed to play contrasting roles during missions, and each has a distinct set of skills, abilities, strengths, and weaknesses. But it’s not all about the mission - each team member also has challenges to face in their own lives, which you can choose to brush aside or play an important part in. Gripping, Turn-Based Tactical Combat: When you’re running the shadows, every turn matters. Choose your actions wisely - move to better cover, charge into melee, or lob a fireball into a crowd of enemies. With over 200 weapons and spells at your disposal, every turn is filled with meaningful choices. Skill-Based Character Progression: Choose a starting character archetype and build from there! Street Samurai and Physical Adepts use advanced combat skills to dominate the battlefield, Shamans and Mages summon powerful allies and cast deadly spells, while Riggers and Deckers provide critical technological support, projecting their consciousness directly into drones and computer systems. Shadowrun: Dragonfall’s classless skill system allows you to grow your character in any direction you choose. New in the Director’s Cut Standalone: Due to popular demand, Dragonfall is now a completely standalone title! Five All-New Missions: The Director’s Cut features five all-new original missions, including three related directly to the personal stories of your team members. These missions take you to previously-unseen locales - both within the Flux State and beyond - where you’ll have to face challenging enemies and make tough choices in order to help your team members prevail. Revamped Combat System: The Dragonfall combat system has received a major overhaul. An all-new armor system adds another tactical layer to the experience, while refined cover and damage mechanics emphasize the importance of battlefield positioning. Complementing these improvements is an upgraded AI system which reacts more intelligently and accurately to your actions. Redesigned Interface: The Dragonfall in-game interface has also been rebuilt. Spells, items and abilities are now much easier to access, while improved combat feedback allows you to fully understand the tactical situation in any given encounter. Customize Your Team: Guide your team members as they progress in each of their unique roles, choosing between different focus options to grant them new items and abilities. In addition, if you don’t like a team member’s default spell, item or weapon loadout, you can now customize what they bring on each mission. Ten New Pieces of Original Music: Fan-favorite composer Jon Everist brings ten new tracks of moody cyberpunk music to the Dragonfall experience, including compositions based on the stories of individual members of your team. The Complete Dragonfall Soundtrack: As a free bonus, the Director’s Cut includes the entire soundtracks from both Dragonfall AND our previous title, Shadowrun Returns . This also includes the brand new tracks exclusive to the Director’s Cut . Featuring music from the composers of the classic Shadowrun SEGA and SNES games, this exciting cyberpunk soundtrack pays homage to the past with a modern sentiment. And Much More: Steam Achievements! Steam Trading Cards - collect your favorite Dragonfall characters All-new alternate endings to the main campaign Enhanced visual effects including splatter and dismemberment, improved animations, and optional post-processing effects New bioware augmentations provide an extra edge on the battlefield… if you’ve got the nuyen A variety of new items, cyberware & spells Additional player customization options Expanded character development for several side characters Writing and design tweaks and polish throughout!

Name: Laika: Aged Through Blood
Description:
Laika: Aged Through Blood is a western-inspired motorvania set in a post-apocalyptic wasteland. It is the story about a tribe oppressed by occupant forces, and the personal story of a mother coyote warrior who descends on an endless path of vengeance to take back what her people lost. Drive, jump and fight your way through the huge hand-drawn world on your trustworthy motorbike. Race through the wasteland and perform dangerous jumps, shoot enemies in slowmo and reload your gun by performing a backflip! Use skill-based power-ups and persist challenging battles against big bosses ! Vehicular combat on a fast and agile motorbike. A beautiful, hand-painted and post-apocalyptic world. A deep story about a mother-daughter relationship, vengeance and loss. A varied world, epic boss battles and loads of missions. The very first MOTORVANIA!

**Monster Energy Supercross - The Official Videogame 2: Live the Championship Dream**

The official video game of the Monster Energy AMA Supercross Championship returns, offering an immersive experience that lets you "live like a champion." This iteration boasts an updated career mode, packed with more activities to keep you engaged throughout the week. From Monday leading up to the race weekend, you'll tackle challenges, secure new sponsorships, and interact with fans, all in pursuit of exciting rewards.

For dedicated practice, the Compound provides a vast open area where you can freely ride and hone your custom rider's skills. Here, you can test your abilities against rivals on four distinct tracks, focusing on crucial techniques like leaning, starting, braking, cornering, and scrubbing.

The game challenges you to "tackle competitions like a hero," pitting you against a roster of over 80 official 250SX and 450SX championship riders. This year's lineup includes fan favorites like Jason Anderson and Marvin Musquin, and for the first time, the highly acclaimed Eli Tomac joins the competition.

Personalization is key, with a robust new customization mode featuring over 3000 objects to craft your dream bike using aftermarket components. You can also tailor your avatar with an expanded array of options, including beards, tattoos, earrings, and hats, alongside a wide selection of skin, eye, hair, and eyebrow colors. And when victory is achieved, you can choose how to celebrate, as the game acknowledges that "we all have our lucky moves!"

The track editor has also been significantly upgraded, enhancing accessibility with a new graphic interface. This makes designing, building, and sharing your custom tracks with the community more straightforward than ever before.

**Ghostrunner 2: The Cyber Ninja's Brutal Return**

Get ready for a visceral, first-person combat experience as *Ghostrunner 2* continues the story one year after the original game. You will leave Dharma Tower, humanity's final refuge, and enter a desolate, cyberpunk world. While the oppressive Keymaster has been defeated, a dangerous AI cult now poses a threat to the survivors. As Jack, the skilled cyber ninja, you must face this new danger and determine the future of humanity.

*Ghostrunner 2* enhances the exhilarating katana combat that players enjoyed. Explore the world beyond Dharma Tower through non-linear levels, which also feature challenging motorbike segments. New game modes and interactive boss battles provide players with more strategic options and opportunities to overcome powerful enemies.

**Embrace Your Inner Cyber Ninja**

*Ghostrunner 2* introduces new abilities that allow players to tackle difficult situations with increased creativity and ease. The developers explained, "Enemies in *Ghostrunner 2* behave uniquely dependent on the skills used against them, providing a fresh challenge with each encounter." The player progression system has been entirely redesigned, promoting experimentation and personalized gameplay.

**Engaging, Dynamic Gameplay**

Master the Cybervoid to survive. Confront new, formidable enemies within interactive environments that include explosive barrels, breakable walls, and beneficial neutral elements. These additions keep combat engaging and novel. For those interested in the narrative, a new dialogue system enriches the game's lore and storyline.

**The Soundtrack of the Cybervoid**

Defeat your enemies with flair to an enthralling synthwave soundtrack. The music includes new compositions from acclaimed artists such as Daniel Deluxe, We Are Magonia, Gost, Dan Terminus, and Arek Reikowski.

**Full Throttle Remastered: Relive the Classic Biker Adventure**

Get ready for a thrilling ride back to the open road with *Full Throttle Remastered*. This beloved graphic adventure game, first released by LucasArts in 1995, puts you in the tough leather boots of Ben Throttle, the leader of the Polecats biker gang. Directed by industry veteran Tim Schafer, the game starts with a simple ride that quickly turns into an exciting story. You'll encounter roaring motorcycles, wild action, and a puzzling murder mystery. The adventure kicks off when a secret meeting leaves Ben confused, chased by the police, and facing a dangerous future. Now, more than twenty years later, *Full Throttle* has been carefully updated for today's players.

The remastered version offers many improvements to pull you into Ben's rough world. Developers stated that the game features brand-new, hand-drawn art and high-definition 3D graphics, with full 4K support for a beautiful look. The sound has also been greatly improved. The original biker band GONE JACKALS created a completely new digital soundtrack, as mentioned in promotional materials. A key feature the creators emphasized is the player's control over the experience. You can easily switch between the original classic look and the remastered visuals. You can even combine the old and new audio and graphics for a unique game. *Full Throttle Remastered* also includes special extras. There's a concept art gallery showing Peter Chan's work and a commentary track with thoughts from the original development team. This gives a special look behind the scenes of this popular game. This careful update, with help from the original team, makes sure Tim Schafer's first game as lead designer is shown with the respect it deserves. *Full Throttle Remastered* was planned for release on PS4, PS Vita, and PC in 2017.

**MotoGP™14: Relive History and Forge Your Champion's Path**

Experience the thrill of motorcycle racing with **MotoGP™14**, the official video game that immerses you in the heart of MotoGP™ competition. This comprehensive game allows you to race as any rider from the exciting 2013 and 2014 seasons, or test your mettle against the legends who shaped MotoGP™ history. Prepare for the challenge of racing on iconic circuits, including the new, formidable Argentina track, designed to push your abilities to the limit.

Beyond the current season, **MotoGP™14** introduces a wealth of new game modes and challenges to ensure lasting engagement. For competitive players, the online Split Battle mode delivers exhilarating head-to-head races. To revisit the drama of past seasons, the offline Real Events 2013 mode allows you to recreate legendary moments. The in-depth career mode empowers you to forge your own destiny, beginning as a rookie and striving to achieve MotoGP™ championship glory. Featuring a completely redesigned graphics engine, **MotoGP™14** delivers breathtaking visuals and a profoundly immersive experience, truly capturing the adrenaline and authentic sensation of being a MotoGP™ rider. As one critic observed, the game provides "a truly authentic MotoGP experience" that "captures the speed and intensity of the sport."

Dive into the thrilling world of **Monster Energy Supercross - The Official Videogame 3**, a game that meticulously recreates the excitement of the 2019 AMA Monster Energy Supercross Championship. This official simulation offers an authentic experience with its genuine tracks, official teams, and immersive gameplay designed for every player.

Engage in the **official 2019 season**, where you'll compete against 100 riders across both the 450SX and 250SX classes. Navigate through 15 intricately detailed official stadiums, each presenting unique and demanding tracks. For the first time in the series, you have the opportunity to join official Supercross teams within the career mode. As one developer highlighted, "We aimed to capture the raw energy and authenticity of Supercross, from the roar of the crowd to the precision required on the track."

The game features an **enhanced co-op experience**, allowing you to team up with friends in a new, expansive environment. This area, inspired by official Supercross team test tracks, serves as an ideal location for training, racing, or simply exploring the virtual landscape.

Online play has been significantly upgraded with the introduction of **dedicated servers**, promising a more fluid and dependable competitive environment. You can challenge your friends across various game modes. The **Race Director** feature empowers you to control the starting grid and issue penalties, adding a layer of strategic depth to your races. For those who wish to craft their perfect race, **Public Lobbies** offer extensive customization options, including modes, race types, and even weather conditions. For more intimate gatherings with friends, **Private Lobbies** are readily available.

Unleash your imagination with the comprehensive **Track Editor**. You can design, share, and download custom tracks, enabling you to construct your ultimate Supercross circuit or explore the innovative creations of other players. The game also emphasizes **inclusivity** by allowing players to compete as a female rider. In support of this, the developers stated, "We believe in showcasing the talent of all athletes, and female riders are a vital part of the Supercross community."

Gameplay mechanics have undergone **refinements for deeper immersion**. Experience new ground and in-air physics that contribute to a heightened sense of realism. Updated rider models and animations vividly bring the intense action to life with remarkable detail, ensuring each race feels exceptionally authentic.

**Valentino Rossi The Game: Your Ultimate MotoGP™ Experience**

Dive into the thrilling world of MotoGP™ with Valentino Rossi The Game, the most complete installment in the series. This game allows you to race in the 2016 season and also challenge legendary MotoGP™ champions. You can relive the most important moments from the career of the nine-time world champion.

Join Valentino Rossi's VR|46 Riders Academy and start your journey in Moto3™. Prepare to enter all the motorsports categories Valentino himself will invite you to.

The game features a variety of challenges:

*   **Flat Track races:** Test your skills at the MotoRanch.
*   **Drift competitions:** Master the curves at Misano.
*   **Rally challenges:** Conquer the track at Monza.

These diverse arenas will help you sharpen your abilities and aim to become the next MotoGP™ champion. As Valentino Rossi himself might say, "The important thing is to have fun and push your limits."

**MX vs. ATV Unleashed: PC Players Forge Their Off-Road Dominance**

Rainbow Studios, a name synonymous with pioneering ATV and motocross gaming, is bringing its latest innovation, MX vs. ATV Unleashed, to PC. This new title puts unprecedented creative power into players' hands with a groundbreaking track editor. "We wanted to give players the tools to build their dream off-road courses," stated a Rainbow Studios representative. This allows for the creation of ultimate off-road environments where players can pilot a wide variety of vehicles.

The game invites players to explore expansive, open terrains and compete in a diverse range of specialized races. These include SuperMoto, Short track, Hill climb, and Waypoint challenges. Beyond these core modes, players will find a wealth of freeworld challenges, freestyle competitions, and engaging mini-games. This ensures a consistently thrilling experience for all players.

MX vs. ATV Unleashed pits motocross bikes against ATVs on over 50 technical supercross and rugged outdoor tracks. This unique competition allows players to truly determine the superior off-road machine. The game offers the most comprehensive off-road experience yet, giving PC players immense power and creative freedom.

**Key Features:**

*   **Track Editor:** Design and share your ultimate off-road environments online, challenging players worldwide.
*   **New Off-Road Vehicles:** Experience new ATV models, a redesigned monster truck for snow-capped mountains, and unique 4x4 golf karts for a touch of country-club flair.
*   **Diverse Racing Events and Challenges:** Engage in SuperMoto, Short track, Hill climbs, Waypoint races, Monster Mash, Gap Jumps, and more, alongside new mini-games and freestyle competitions.
*   **Outdoor Freestyle Mode:** Test your skills with over 40 rider stunts in this innovative new game mode.
*   **Open Class Competition:** Compete against numerous off-road vehicles in thrilling six-player multiplayer races.
*   **Ultra-Realistic Physics:** Rainbow's 'Rhythm Racing' physics engine accurately simulates real-world vehicle handling, enabling players to conquer challenging terrain.
*   **Return to PC Roots:** From the creators of Motocross Madness, Rainbow Studios brings their ultimate off-road racing experience back to the PC platform.

Name: RIDE 3
Description:
Feel the adrenaline and experience the most complete racing ever with RIDE 3! Immerse yourself in a modern 3D environment where you will live side by side with your bike, modifying it mechanically and aesthetically thanks to the new Livery Editor, which will let your dreams run wild. Before starting, don't forget to customise your rider with the right outfit. THE BIKES More than 230 bike models available from the very first day, with more than 70 new models never seen before in a RIDE game. 30 different brands, both historic and contemporary, of which 9 are completely new. 7 different categories to satisfy every taste and riding style.
