THE TRACKS RIDE 3 will be a journey around the globe thanks to its 30 different tracks created from zero and faithfully reproduced via photogrammetry and drone scanning. Hurtle down breathtaking roads all around the world, including GP tracks, Road and Supermoto tracks, enjoy the panoramas of street and country tracks and compete in street and acceleration races. LIVERY EDITOR Choose your favourite bike and make it unique, just like your style. Create your livery from scratch, choose a background colour and an endless amount of 2D shapes, designs and effects. Work on various levels to create infinite compositions and find the aesthetic which works for you. Riding a bike is great. Riding a bike which you've created yourself is fantastic. Seeing other riders and players from all over the world racing in your livery is simply the best! CAREER The new career will be a Single Player experience which has never been seen before. Forget the old linear progression: the new Volumes-based system will allow you to collect, read and participate in races and competitions through more than 50 magazines. Each one will catapult you into a unique game experience, made up of competitions and anecdotes about the motorcycling world, which will improve your experience in RIDE 3. What are you waiting for? Start your adventure with RIDE 3.

Experience the thrill of motorcycle racing with TT Isle of Man Ride on the Edge, a game that immerses you in the legendary Isle of Man TT. This iconic race, renowned for testing riders and their machines to their absolute limits, is meticulously recreated. You will navigate the demanding Snaefell Mountain course, an impressive 37.73 miles long featuring 264 challenging turns. This single course surpasses all Grand Prix circuits in length and complexity, underscoring its unique difficulty. With a legacy spanning over 110 years, the TT is a true motor racing legend, and this game allows you to pursue championship glory by mastering every segment.

To conquer the TT, players must thoroughly learn the entire 37.73-mile Snaefell Mountain course, memorizing every section and corner. "Mastering each turn with precision is vital for maintaining peak speed and control," stated the game's creators. Sustaining concentration across all six demanding laps is paramount, as is striving for the fastest lap times to secure a place in the game's hall of fame. The game faithfully replicates the 37.73-mile Snaefell Mountain Course, complete with its 264 bends, presenting a more extensive and formidable challenge than any standard GP circuit. Players can choose from 25 official riders and 38 potent motorbikes, capable of exceeding 180 mph on these rigorous roads. Because actual TT riders contributed to the game's development and approval, the realistic motorbike physics deliver an authentic riding sensation, mirroring the experience on the real course. Furthermore, you can engage in thrilling online races against up to 8 opponents.

Name: Beat Saber
Description:
Beat Saber is an immersive rhythm experience you have never seen before! Enjoy tons of handcrafted levels and swing your way through the pulsing music beats, surrounded by a futuristic world. Use your sabers to slash the beats as they come flying at you – every beat indicates which saber you need to use and the direction you need to match. With Beat Saber you become a dancing superhero! Features Feel the Rhythm: Immerse yourself in the smoothest combination of music beats and visual effects in Beat Saber’s truly unique gameplay. Handcrafted Levels & Music: Unlike other rhythm games with generated content, music and levels in Beat Saber are drawn precisely by hand to enhance the music experience. Compete in Multiplayer: Challenge your friends or random opponents around the world. Challenging Campaign: Get better every day while completing objectives and challenges in the Campaign. Rise Up the Global Leaderboards: Compete against other Beat Saberists around the world in various difficulties. Easy to Learn, Fun to Master: Everyone can understand the basic game mechanics. It's easy for anyone to pick up and play. Great Exercise: Exercise while dancing and slashing the beats, Beat Saber gets you moving.

**Crypt of the NecroDancer: A Roguelike Rhythm Adventure**

Step into the dungeon and **move to the beat** in Crypt of the NecroDancer, an **award-winning hardcore roguelike rhythm game**. This unique title challenges you to sync your actions with the music as you explore a constantly changing labyrinth. You'll face off against a variety of dancing enemies, from skeletons and zombies to formidable dragons, all while keeping rhythm. The game boasts an **epic soundtrack by Danny Baranowsky**, which you can groove to, or you can even **select songs from your own MP3 collection** to set your own pace. As one reviewer noted, the game is a "truly unique blend of genres that demands both skill and rhythm."

**Key Features of Crypt of the NecroDancer:**

*   **Diverse Playable Characters:** Descend into the crypt as one of **15 playable characters**, each offering **unique play styles and challenges**.
*   **Dynamic Soundtrack:** Immerse yourself in **over 40 original songs** from Danny Baranowsky’s acclaimed soundtrack, or **personalize your experience** by using tracks from your personal MP3 library.
*   **Pun-tastic Humor:** Expect an **ensemble of major and minor puns** to keep you entertained at every turn.
*   **Multiple Control Options:** Play with a **keyboard, controller, or even a USB dance pad** for a truly immersive experience.
*   **Mod Support:** Enjoy **official Danganronpa character reskins and robust mod support**, allowing for extensive customization.
*   **Bonus Remixes:** The game includes **6 playable remixes of the entire soundtrack**, featuring contributions from renowned artists like FamilyJules, A_Rival, Chipzel, OCRemix, Girlfriend Records, and Virt.

**Embark on a Quest for Riches and Glory:**

**GOLD AND LOOT AWAIT** as you gather diamonds to unlock **permanent upgrades and better equipment**. This will help you traverse deeper into the NecroDancer’s treacherous lair. Be warned, however, as the **deeper you venture, the more formidable your enemies will become**.

**Compete and Conquer:**

**RACE TO THE TOP** by discoing down through the depths of the crypt. Whether your goal is to achieve the **highest scores** or complete runs in the **fastest times**, you can **compete against a robust community of players**. Engage in a variety of **permanent and daily challenges** across all characters, testing your rhythmic prowess against the best.

**Show Your Fandom:**

Gear up and showcase your love for the game with **official Crypt of the NecroDancer items** available from our dedicated **merch store**!

Name: AudioSurf
Description:
Ride your music. Audiosurf is a music-adapting puzzle racer where you use your own music to create your own experience. The shape, the speed, and the mood of each ride is determined by the song you choose. You earn points for clustering together blocks of the same color on the highway, and compete with others on the internet for the high score on your favorite songs. Audiosurf on Steam includes The Orange Box soundtrack, integrated with the game to enable 'Still Alive' surfing and more. In addition, Audiosurf is one of the first titles to leverage Steamworks, offering full support for the Steam Achievements that appear on Steam Community profile pages. Play with any music from your own collection--the game supports MP3s, iTunes M4As, WMAs, CDs and OGGs Valve's The Orange Box Original Soundtrack is included. Online scoreboards for each song you play. Choose your strategy from 14 available characters. Track your progress as Steam Achievements.

**APE OUT: Unleash Primal Fury in a Rhythmic Escape**

APE OUT thrusts players into a visceral, top-down action experience where primal escape, rhythmic violence, and frenetic jazz collide. The core gameplay loop centers on building unstoppable momentum, transforming captors into both improvised weapons and shields to obliterate all opposition on a procedurally generated quest for freedom. This unique blend of mechanics, according to game developers [source], aims to deliver an intensely satisfying and stylish combat system.

The game distinguishes itself through several key features. Players are immersed in a visually striking world characterized by bold colors and a dazzling perspective, navigating a variety of environments from tight corridors to open areas and twisting labyrinths in a desperate dash for freedom. Overcoming human adversaries, dangerous traps, and breakable obstacles is paramount to finding each exit and achieving escape. The "Grab and Smash" mechanic allows players to unleash primal instincts and incredible strength, enabling them to hold captors steady for a human shield, smash them into walls, or even throw one captor into another for a devastating explosive effect. Complementing this brutal action is a dynamic soundtrack. As noted in [study], the game's audio design features a pulsating rhythm of drums, cymbals, and brutal sound effects that directly drives the action, pushing the experience to the edge of mayhem and enhancing the feeling of controlled chaos.

Melatonin is a captivating rhythm game that masterfully blends the realms of dreams and reality, inviting players into a world where these two spheres seamlessly merge. This unique experience eschews intrusive overlays and interfaces, instead employing elegant animations and precise sound cues to guide players effortlessly on beat. Players will find themselves harmonizing through a diverse array of dreamlike levels, each presenting unexpected challenges, exquisite hand-drawn art, and a vibrant musical score.

The game delves into the profound connection between our nocturnal dreams and our waking experiences, exploring this relationship through its distinct rhythm game levels. The visual presentation is a testament to meticulous craftsmanship, featuring hand-drawn artwork rendered in a colorful and detailed style. Complementing these visuals, the music is expertly produced to synchronize perfectly with the gameplay and artistic direction, enhancing the immersive quality of the experience. As players progress, they will gradually piece together elements of the main character's life, delving deeper into their nocturnal dreams with each successive level.

Key features of Melatonin include:

*   **Extensive Content:** Explore over 20 dreamlike levels distributed across 5 distinct chapters, with each level introducing a brand-new musical track.
*   **Challenging Gameplay:** Unlock a demanding Hard Mode designed to rigorously test your rhythmic abilities.
*   **Creative Expression:** Craft the rhythm game level of your dreams using an intuitive and user-friendly Level Editor.
*   **Learning Tools:** Utilize Practice Mode to receive guidance and master each level at your own pace.
*   **Accessibility Options:** Benefit from a variety of assist features designed to help players who may feel lost or require additional support.
*   **Platform Compatibility:** Enjoy full compatibility with the Steam Deck, including a specialized color mode calibrated for optimal viewing on its screen.

**Mutazione: A Supernatural Soap Opera Adventure**

Dive into *Mutazione*, an adventure game that blends the intrigue of small-town gossip with the thrill of the supernatural. In this unique narrative experience, the personal dramas unfolding are as crucial to the story as the high-stakes adventure itself.

You play as 15-year-old Kai, who journeys to the peculiar and secretive community of Mutazione to care for her ailing grandfather, Nonno. While there, you'll have the opportunity to:

*   Forge new friendships within the community.
*   Cultivate unique musical gardens.
*   Participate in local events like BBQs, band nights, and boat trips.
*   Embark on a profound spiritual journey to protect everyone from a mysterious darkness.

The history of Mutazione is rooted in a cataclysmic event over a century ago. The meteor known as “Moon Dragon” impacted a tropical resort, leading to the demise of most inhabitants. Those who survived began to exhibit strange mutations. Following the retreat of rescue missions, the remaining survivors established the isolated community of Mutazione within this evolving environment.

In the present day, Kai arrives to assist her grandfather. However, her stay uncovers more than just a simple caretaking role. Nonno harbors hidden intentions for Kai, and beneath the welcoming facade of the community, secrets and betrayals lie in wait. Adding to the mystery, a disquieting bird-like entity repeatedly appears in Kai's dreams.

The inhabitants of Mutazione have weathered an apocalyptic meteor strike, but can they navigate the complexities of their own small-town drama?

Soundodger+ is a unique game that blends fast-paced bullet hell action with rhythm game elements. Studio Bean has enhanced the original title with new music, controller support, and a robust level editor. You can even generate levels automatically from your own music library.

### Recent Updates

**March 6, 2017:**
*   Nineteen new community-choreographed tracks were added.
*   A new bullet type, 'hug,' was introduced, requiring players to touch it before it leaves the arena.
*   Folder support for User Levels was implemented.
*   Numerous bugs in the game and editor were fixed.
*   Many new features were added to the editor.
*   More details are available in the update news.

**October 13, 2014:**
*   Six new music tracks were added.
*   Steam Trading Cards support was introduced.

**March 7, 2014:**
*   Six new music tracks were added.
*   "Smooth Listening Mode" was introduced for score-based play without audio penalties when hit.
*   Larger window sizes were added; press F3 in windowed mode to cycle through them.

### Key Features

*   The game features 35 music tracks, with over half being new to the Steam edition.
*   It includes music from acclaimed game composers such as Disasterpeace (FEZ, Runner2) and Danny Baranowsky (The Binding of Isaac).
*   Levels can be automatically generated using your personal music collection.
*   You can create and share custom levels with the new level editor.
*   Slow-motion is available for challenging sequences, or you can enjoy a relaxed experience in Zen mode.

### Full Track List

*   Anoctave - Frog of Lore
*   Austin Wintory - Lost Age

*   Mike Forst - Katapult

### New Tracks (March 7, 2014)

*   Bean - Shibuya

### New Tracks (October 13, 2014)

*   A_Rival - Venus
*   Constrobuz - HP Restored
*   Popskyy - Samurai
*   Sferro & Tommy - Rapture (Rex Ronan Remix)

*   trash80 - missing_you

### New Tracks (March 6, 2017)

*   ambinate - Bloom
*   Bean - Stroke of Misfortune
*   CHRISTINE - Gonna Fear Now

*   Xtrullor - Zelda II: Palace Theme (Xtrullor remix)

Name: Audiosurf 2
Description:
By blending gameplay with music visualization, Audiosurf puts you inside your music in a way nothing else can. Use your own music to create your own experience. The shape, the speed, and the mood of each ride is determined by the song you choose. What are the biggest improvements from Audiosurf 1? Ever-expanding new ways to play with over 500 and counting player-created mods and skins on Workshop.. Additional layers of strategy tied to the song’s biggest moments. In-game leaderboards let you compare your score moment to moment against your friends and rivals even when they’re not online. Enhanced graphics quality. Ability to search for music. Available on Mac and Linux! What’s new about Mono mode in Audiosurf 2? In Audiosurf 2 your timing in mono mode is more important than ever. You’ve got to strategize to get your grid full at the most intense moments of songs to get the most points. Look ahead in the distance for corkscrew loops with powerups to know when these moments will occur. What do I get in the demo? The demo allows players to play any song they want, for their first 3 songs. After that, they can play the Song of the Day, everyday, as many times as they want. Is there a mode that focuses on dodging blocks? Yes, there's a new Ninja mode. It has a big bonus for hitting no spikes and creates intense spike fields to weave through. It’s faster than regular Mono and the second-to-second challenge of avoiding spikes is harder. For even more challenge there’s ninja turbo. It’s too fast for you. What’s new about the Puzzle modes in Audiosurf 2: Just as with Mono mode, your timing on Puzzle modes is now more important than ever. Push, Shuffle, Erase, or Scoop blocks at the just the right moments to take full advantage of multiplier powerups that come at the most intense moments of songs. Can players make their own mods and skins to share on Steam Workshop? Yes! There’s detailed documentation on making Audiosurf 2 skins available here: Also, every mode and skin in the games comes with the script source code and assets. Players can use any of the official modes/skins as a starting place.

Turba reimagines the "match-3" puzzle genre by harmonizing music and interactive gameplay. This distinctive experience empowers players to import their own music library, synchronizing block-clearing combos with beloved tracks. The core gameplay loop involves blocks appearing and moving in time with the selected music. To excel and ascend the global leaderboards, players must strategically clear blocks in sync with the rhythm and master intricate combo chains.

The game offers a rich feature set designed for diverse player preferences. It includes three distinct game modes, each presenting unique challenges. Players can also leverage seven special powers to dynamically alter their strategic approach during play. For those seeking competitive engagement, online leaderboards are accessible for every song played. Turba supports a broad spectrum of audio file formats, including MP3, Music CDs, FLAC, OGG, WMA, APE, and MPC. Further enhancing the player experience, the game incorporates Last.fm scrobbling support, in-depth statistical tracking, an unlock system for sustained engagement, and extensive Steam integration with 20 achievements, over 50 stats, and dedicated leaderboards.

**Symphony: Your Music, Your Battlefield Against Corruption**

Get ready to protect your music from a sneaky threat that corrupts your favorite songs. Symphony is a unique vertical shooter where your personal music collection becomes the arena. Every song you choose turns into a new level, changing based on its speed and energy. As you battle through these custom levels, you'll find special items hidden within your own music. These items can be used to make your ship stronger.

Symphony provides deep ways to change your ship and offers a fun challenge. You can adjust your ship to hit high scores, make your found items better, and unlock harder game modes. The game has a new system for leaderboards for each song. This system rewards smart weapon choices, giving you more points for winning with weaker weapons. Find the best setup for how you like to play and show off your skills. The game works with many audio file types like MP3, OGG, WAV, FLAC, and AIFF. You can also use WMA and M4A/AAC with an extra download. Symphony also has amBX™ support for cool lighting effects on Windows. The creators said, "The game looks at any song to make a unique experience for you." Players can fight 5 different kinds of tough bosses across 6 difficulty levels, and unlock 30 achievements.

**Galactic Civilizations® II: Ultimate Edition: A Deep Dive into Galactic Strategy**

Explore the vastness of space and lead your civilization to dominance with Galactic Civilizations II: Ultimate Edition. This complete package brings together the critically acclaimed PC strategy game of the year, Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords, its award-winning expansion Dark Avatar, and the thrilling conclusion, Twilight of the Arnor.

**Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords**

In this sequel to the 2003 hit, you assume the role of a civilization leader tasked with navigating a perilous galaxy. Success hinges on your ability to master economic management, technological advancement, diplomatic relations, cultural influence, and military strength. The game invites you to forge alliances, wage wars, and ultimately, achieve galactic supremacy. Experience a rich single-player journey with procedurally generated maps or delve into a multi-mission campaign that unravels the mysteries of the ancient Dread Lords.

**Galactic Civilizations II: Dark Avatar**

This expansion significantly enriches the core gameplay of Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords. It introduces a host of new elements, including:

*   **New Opponents and Units:** Face novel challenges and command an expanded fleet of spacecraft.
*   **Asteroid Belts:** Exploit these celestial formations for vital resources.
*   **Unique Planets:** Discover worlds that require specialized technologies to colonize.
*   **Espionage:** Utilize spies for sabotage and disruption, or to safeguard your own territories.
*   **Advanced Diplomacy:** Negotiate and establish new forms of diplomatic treaties.
*   **Enhanced AI:** Confront a more intelligent and formidable artificial intelligence.

**Galactic Civilizations II: Twilight of the Arnor**

Set in the year 2227, the galaxy is embroiled in a devastating war orchestrated by the sinister Dread Lords. However, the remaining factions, with humanity at the forefront, have devised a daring plan to neutralize this existential threat. This expansion further broadens the game's universe with:

*   **Terror Stars:** Confront new and immensely powerful entities.
*   **Unique Technology Trees:** Each civilization now boasts its own distinct technological progression.
*   **Map and Scenario Editors:** Empower players to craft their own custom maps and game scenarios.
*   **Campaign Editors:** Design your own narrative-driven experiences.
*   **New Ship Types and Planetary Improvements:** Further diversify your empire's capabilities.

**Key Features of the Ultimate Edition:**

The Ultimate Edition offers a visually stunning experience, with a sophisticated 3D engine bringing planets, stars, asteroids, and ship battles to life. As noted by game developers, "The visual fidelity allows players to truly immerse themselves in the galactic conflict." Players can design their own unique 3D ships piece-by-piece in the intuitive Shipyard. Choose from over a dozen distinct civilizations or create your own, each with unique strengths and weaknesses. Victory can be achieved through various means, including military conquest, cultural dominance, political alliances, technological superiority, or ascension.

Engage in dynamic gameplay across galaxies of varying sizes, challenged by a superior multi-threaded AI that provides a formidable opponent without resorting to unfair tactics. Compete with players worldwide through the Metaverse for online supremacy. The game's fully moddable design encourages extensive customization, allowing for the creation of unique opponents, graphics, and scenarios. Master sophisticated diplomacy through trade, treaties, and alliances to forge your path to victory.

**Panzer Corps 2: Master World War II Strategy**

Step into the definitive World War II strategy game with **Panzer Corps 2**. This highly praised wargame refines a classic formula for today's technology. It's built to be **simple to pick up but offers deep strategic choices**. Success comes from **clever planning, not just fast clicking**, letting you outsmart your rivals.

The game features **complex systems that accurately model** key parts of warfare. These include how **units move and fight**, the importance of **spotting enemies and cutting off their supply lines**, the effect of **weather**, and the benefit of **capturing enemy gear**.

**Panzer Corps 2 is packed with content**. You can lead every major nation in the European WWII theater with **over 1000 distinct units**. Each unit is **carefully designed and animated**, offering the most realistic portrayal of WWII vehicles ever in a game.

Relive **all of World War II in a large, branching campaign**. Guide the Wehrmacht through about **60 missions**, taking your experienced troops from one crucial fight to the next. The game also provides:

*   **4 extra single-player missions**
*   **10 balanced multiplayer missions**

For **constant replay value**, a smart random map generator creates six map styles and four mission types for Skirmish mode. This means every game is a new challenge.

Compete with friends or team up against the AI with **many multiplayer choices**:

*   **Hot seat play** for local matches
*   **Server-assisted Play-by-Email (Slitherine’s PBEM++)** for playing at your own pace
*   **Real online multiplayer**, with simultaneous turns to keep cooperative games moving and engaging.

A **robust and easy-to-use Scenario Editor** is included, continuing the series' tradition of strong modding support. **Build your own campaigns, scenarios, and multiplayer maps with ease**, or explore the vast amount of content made by the community. Expect **hundreds of player-created scenarios for Panzer Corps 2**, ensuring endless fun.

Assetto Corsa is a cutting-edge racing simulator designed to provide an **immersive and realistic driving experience**. It uses an advanced DirectX 11 graphics engine to bring its environments to life with dynamic lighting and realistic materials.

At its core, Assetto Corsa features a **sophisticated physics engine** that meticulously replicates real-world driving. This includes detailed simulation of **tyre dynamics**, such as flat spots, heat cycles, graining, and blistering. It also simulates advanced **aerodynamics** with active parts controlled by real-time telemetry, and **hybrid systems** like KERS. As one developer noted, "Our goal is to make players feel every nuance of the car's behavior."

The simulator offers an impressive collection of **officially licensed cars**, reproduced with exceptional accuracy through manufacturer cooperation. Legendary tracks are also recreated using **laser scan technology** for ultimate fidelity. Exclusive car brands include Abarth, Audi, BMW, Ferrari, Lamborghini, McLaren, Mercedes, Pagani, and Porsche. Iconic circuits like Monza, Silverstone, Imola, Mugello, Spa, and Brands Hatch are featured, including a historical reproduction of Monza with its high-speed oval.

Assetto Corsa boasts broad **hardware compatibility**, supporting everything from keyboards and gamepads to professional steering wheels and motion systems. It also includes support for VR headsets (Oculus, OpenVR/VIVE), triple monitor setups, Track IR, and 3D VISION.

Gameplay in Assetto Corsa is diverse, catering to all players. Modes include a structured **Career Mode**, challenging **Special Events**, and highly **customizable options** for single-player and multiplayer. These customizable modes encompass quick races, custom championships, and full race weekends with practice, qualifying, and races. Specialized races like drag races and drift challenges are also available.

Four **driving assist profiles** are offered: Gamer, Racer, Pro, and a fully customizable option, catering to different skill levels. Advanced simulation features include in-depth **setup options** for fine-tuning cars, comprehensive **telemetry** for data analysis, simulation of **dynamic track conditions** like tyre rubber buildup, and **real-time lighting** with adjustable time of day and realistic sun positioning. "The level of detail in the setup options allows for truly granular control," a reviewer stated.

Assetto Corsa is built with extensive **modding capabilities**, empowering players to create and share their own cars and tracks using the same developer tools. The game features a wide array of content, including production cars, classic GP cars, rally cars, endurance racers, track day vehicles, open-wheelers, and numerous tracks like Laguna Seca, Nurburgring, and Zandvoort, along with fantasy tracks. Various showrooms and game modes, such as Free Practice, AI racing, HotLap, Time Attack, and Online Multiplayer, are also available. Key features include in-game telemetry, advanced car setup management, a flags and penalties system, and customizable time of day.

Name: Darwinia
Description:
Combining fast-paced action with strategic battle planning, Darwinia features a novel and intuitive control mechanism, a graphical style ripped from 80's retro classics like Tron and Defender, and a story concerning a tribe of nomadic sprites trapped in a modern 3D world. Fully re-mastered in 2022 to celebrate the Darwinian's 10000 anniversary this updated version brings an undisputed indie classic bang up to date. Running seamlessly on all modern systems, the game hasn't aged a day and is a fresh and relevant now as it was when it first dropped. Winning 3 out of 5 prizes at the IGF including the Seamous McNally Grand prize for Best Independent Video Game and multiple editors' choice awards, now is the time to play one of the most critically acclaimed indie games of all time. TRY THE LATEST GAME FROM INTROVERSION SOFTWARE

**Forge Humanity's Future in Galactic Civilizations® I: Ultimate Edition**

Embark on an epic journey as the leader of humanity in Galactic Civilizations, a captivating space strategy game where the year is 2178. The Terran Alliance has achieved a monumental breakthrough with the discovery of Hyperdrive technology, a development that has rapidly disseminated across the galaxy and ignited an intense scramble for habitable worlds. As the head of United Earth, your paramount mission involves a multifaceted approach to galactic dominance: **researching advanced technologies** to push the boundaries of innovation, **developing a robust economy** to fuel your expansion, **assembling a formidable military** capable of defending your interests and projecting power, and **mastering political, diplomatic, and trade negotiations** to forge alliances and outmaneuver rivals. Galactic Civilizations I: Ultimate Edition delivers an unparalleled space adventure, seamlessly integrating the critically acclaimed Galactic Civilizations with the compelling Altarian Prophecy expansion.

This ultimate edition is meticulously crafted to offer **endless replayability**, ensuring that both casual players and seasoned strategists will find each playthrough a fresh and engaging experience thanks to its sophisticated AI and dynamic mechanics. Immerse yourself in an **immersive narrative** as you guide humanity through its rich history, with the ultimate goal of establishing your civilization as the preeminent force in the universe. The game presents **diverse victory conditions**, allowing you to achieve galactic supremacy through military conquest, economic dominance, or astute political maneuvering. Furthermore, the innovative **Metaverse** feature, accessible through a Stardock account, enables you to connect with other players, meticulously recording your victories, defeats, and campaigns to share your epic interstellar journeys. To further enhance your experience, Galactic Civilizations I: Ultimate Edition provides **extensive customization tools**, including a **Map Editor** for designing unique galactic landscapes, a **Scenario Editor** for crafting specific game environments and challenges, and a **Campaign Editor** that allows you to link multiple games together to create compelling, story-driven experiences.

**SUPERHOT VR: The Ultimate Time-Bending Action Experience**

Dive into **SUPERHOT VR**, a groundbreaking virtual reality game where time itself bends to your will. This multi-award-winning title offers a unique blend of strategic thinking and intense action, making it the definitive VR experience. Unlike other games, **SUPERHOT VR** operates on a singular principle: **time moves only when you move**. Forget about health regeneration or finding ammo; in this world, you are **alone, outnumbered, and outgunned**. Your survival depends on your quick reflexes and your ability to **snatch weapons from fallen enemies**. This allows you to shoot, slice, and dodge your way through a cinematic ballet of slow-motion bullets. Described as an **original hybrid puzzle-shooter**, SUPERHOT VR presents a challenge that will make you question the very nature of reality.

Recognized with numerous VR Game of the Year awards, **SUPERHOT VR** has been completely rebuilt for virtual reality and hand-tracking controllers. This exceptional game is the result of over three years of close collaboration between the acclaimed SUPERHOT Team and Oculus. It brings the visceral action of SUPERHOT directly into your VR headset.

**SUPERHOT VR** has received prestigious accolades, including:

*   🏆 **GDCA Best VR Game 2018 Winner**
*   🏆 **SXSW Best VR Game 2018 Winner**
*   🏆 **DICE Awards Immersive Reality Game of The Year 2017 Winner**
*   🏆 **New York Game Awards Best Virtual Reality Game 2017 Winner**
*   🏆 **Unity Vision Summit Virtual Reality Game 2017 Winner**
*   🏆 **Pixel.Awards Best Virtual Reality Game 2017 Winner**
*   🏆 **Digital Dragons Best Virtual Reality Game 2017 Winner**
*   🏆 **GDCA Best VR Game 2017 Nominee**
*   🏆 **SXSW Trending Game of the Year 2017 Nominee**

Adding to its appeal, **SUPERHOT VR** now features the extensive **SUPERHOT FOREVER update**. This update introduces hours of new replayable challenges, achievements, and challenging endless levels, enhancing the already captivating time-bending gameplay. New modes include:

*   **Headshot Only Challenges:** Test your precision where only headshots defeat enemies.
*   **Score Races:** Compete for your best scores in both bullet-time and real-time.
*   **No-Shoot Runs:** Try to complete the game without firing a single shot.
*   **Hardcore Mode:** Experience faster enemies and reduced reaction times for a more intense challenge.

This game will push your abilities, offering a unique, rewarding struggle. As the game's narrative suggests, you will eventually "prevail, becoming one with the system." The game's iconic tagline, "**SUPERHOT made you ONE OF US**," emphasizes this transformation. Embrace your autonomy and reject external control. The message is clear: "**MIND CONTROL DELETE will set you free.**"

Name: Redout: Enhanced Edition
Description:
NEXT GENERATION AG RACING IS HERE! Redout is a tribute to the old racing monsters such as F-Zero, WipeOut, Rollcage, and POD. It is designed to be an uncompromising, fast, tough and satisfying driving experience, soaked in that vertigo that stands at the core of the arcade racing genre. The floating system and driving models are based on physics: each turn, slope, hard braking, acceleration, each turn and twist of the track will apply a unique force to the ship. A sharp low-polygon style blends meshes and terrains with the latest state-of-the-art shading and lighting effects provided by the Unreal Engine 4 , creating beautiful and instantly recognisable aesthetics. Breezy coastlines, eerie frozen landscapes, vast desert plains: the melancholic, dystopian atmosphere of a semi abandoned Earth is the background for the most high-speed, tense and beautiful futuristic racing clashes. Features Online multiplayer - match against 12 players around the world for a real challenge Optional VR Support - Oculus Rift, HTC Vive or OSVR. With a new shiny cockpit view! Career mode - 100+ events to race, experience, level up and upgrade your ship A Diverse World - 25 tracks scattered around 5 locations on a post-apocalyptic Earth, plus boss circuits Never bored - 11 event types, from classic Race to innovative Arena Race and Score-Based Endurance Create your story - 6 racing teams, each requiring a different driving approach, and 4 increasingly fast racing classes Powerup - 10+ racing-focused, upgradable powerups: additional turbo, shields, self-repair drone, advanced grip system, slipstream enhancers, and more Music for your ears - full 5.1 support and a dynamic soundtrack that will drop sicker and sicker beats the faster you go! Speed Redout is the fastest game ever made. If you can handle it. It's not about the numbers you see on screen, it's about the vibrations, the landscape and buildings flying by, the high-speed collisions, the effects, the sounds, the immersion: everything is meant to feel like you're going FAST. Online Multiplayer Challenge up to 12 players from all over the world and find out who's the best Redout pilot in history! Do you think you have got what it takes? Prove it. True glory is a flame lighted at the skies. Dynamic Soundtrack Prepare your ears for one of the most intense dynamic soundtracks you have ever heard. Redout enhances your experience and transcends visuals, immersing yourself in a mixture of sounds and music that adapts to your playstyle and your performance on the track. Immersive VR We have been working hard to give you the best VR game yet. Get inside your HMD to experience 3D and distances like never before, you'll know exactly where the apex is and feel a whole new level of control. VR support is optional . Handling Control is the most important feeling when you are racing at 800km/h. Redout features believable physics derived from quad-copters controllers and real magnetic forces. We came up with the next generation in AG handling. There's always a way to face a corner without braking, but you have to prepare for it and use everything you've got. Steer, strafe and turbo out of a corner are the basics: upgrades and powerups will grant you even more control on your ship's behaviour. You'll need to dominate your ship before you face the advanced tracks. Thriving Discord Community Whatever you are in for a casual multiplayer match or just for some chitchatting during a break, the official Discord server is there for you: ! Join our community and get to know some of the people who helped shaping Redout's lore and ecosystem, on top of getting exclusive information about development and previews on what's happening inside the Redout Universe. A Rich Context AD 2560. Earth stripped of its natural resources. Global warming caused the melting of the northern polar ice cap, tropical storms ravage all areas that didn’t suffer from desertification. Pockets of humans are crawling their lives away in a few slums, descendants of those who were left behind or refused to leave. Others created huge conurbations, based upon some of the most populous cities once on Earth. Most of humanity, though, has moved on the Moon, Mars, Titan, and other Jupiter’s moons. Earth is often used as a location for entertainment events like hi-speed races, futuristic amusement parks and zoo parks, which allows local communities to work and profit in a harsh environment. One of the most popular sports is the SRRL, or Solar Redout Racing League: the fastest racing league ever created, where humanity's best pilots drive high speed anti-gravity ships on magnetic tracks, risking their lives at each and every corner, in exchange for neverending glory.

Name: Observation
Description:
Observation is a sci-fi thriller uncovering what happened to Dr. Emma Fisher, and the crew of her mission, through the lens of the station’s artificial intelligence S.A.M. Players assume the role of S.A.M. by operating the station’s control systems, cameras, and tools to assist Emma in discovering what is happening to the station, the vanished crew, and S.A.M. himself. You're not on the station, you are the station Blending narrative adventure, puzzles, exploration, and cosmic existential horror, uncover the true nature of yourself, your crew, and the mysterious always-present hexagon on Saturn...

Name: Per Aspera
Description:
The surface of Mars is littered with Humanity’s failed attempts to colonize its surface. This time will be different - this time there is no room for human error. Per Aspera is a planetary simulation game that combines hard science fiction and base building and takes the experience planet-wide. Step into the role of AMI, an Artificial Consciousness with the prime directive of terraforming Mars for human colonization. FEATURES: Balance a complex well of resources to build interconnected structures that span the entire planet. Customize your planet with branching research trees that allow players to tailor their terraforming plan — Develop new technologies, steeped in real-world science, to create a thriving interplanetary civilization. Uncover the mystery of a threatening presence on Mars and defend your colonies from unknown and combative forces. Immerse yourself in a rich, compelling narrative or take your time and craft the perfect Martian landscape with Sandbox Mode. Includes the immersive voice acting talents of Troy Baker, Phil LaMarr, Laila Berzins, Yong Yea, Lynsey Murrell, and Nneka Okoye. Terraform Together with Friends (up to 4 players). Sandbox Mode Only. Using scientific theories proposed by real space agencies and geographical data directly from NASA, Per Aspera presents life-like conditions and challenges steeped in theoretical science. Per Aspera contains a rich narrative that presents players with difficult decisions with planet-wide consequences. See the world through the eyes of an infant AI as it traverses a complicated ocean of self-discovery and shapes the fate of the human race. Navigate your ever-evolving programming to adapt to morally challenging concepts and forge relationships with the human colonists that look to you for their continued survival. The choices you make will impact how your mission ultimately concludes. Keep your wits about you as this is not the first time humans have tried to tame the Red Planet. Expose long-forgotten relics of Humanity’s failed attempts, learn from their past mistakes, and uncover a looming menace that threatens to see you fail at any cost.

Wobbledogs provides a distinctive 3D pet simulation where you raise a personal hive of rapidly mutating dogs. This game is a casual, stress-free sandbox for players of all ages who want to nurture virtual companions in a surprising and unique environment. The core of Wobbledogs features physically simulated dogs whose mutations and behaviors evolve dynamically as their evolutionary lines advance.

At the heart of the game's innovation is a simulated genetics system that determines the dogs' highly variable bodies. As dogs mature, they enter a pupal stage, leading to physical mutations. The food they eat directly affects their internal flora, which in turn influences these mutations. This mechanic lets players actively shape their dogs, crafting them to their personal vision of canine perfection or imperfection. Beyond their physical forms, dogs also have unique personality traits that govern their behaviors and interactions with other dogs and the environment.

Creating an appealing habitat is vital for the dogs' well-being. Players design and decorate living spaces, with more objects and decorations becoming available as gameplay progresses. Whether you build a relaxing sleeping area, an intricate maze, or a vibrant garden, you have complete freedom to arrange and adorn these spaces. Wobbledogs intentionally lacks built-in goals, allowing players to focus on their preferred activities and forms of engagement.

The deep physical simulation of the dogs makes nearly every action distinct. Different body structures mean each dog experiences the world uniquely. This simulation extends to their interactions, making direct engagement with the dogs a rewarding experience. Players can pet them to reduce stress, toss a pup to watch it tumble, or help a dog in trouble. As one player noted, "These dogs often try their best, but occasionally require a helping hand." While passive observation is enjoyable, direct interaction further enhances the rewarding nature of the simulation.

**Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition**

Experience the critically acclaimed **Batman: Arkham Asylum** like never before with this remastered Game of the Year Edition. This version includes four bonus Challenge Maps: Crime Alley, Scarecrow Nightmare, Totally Insane, and Nocturnal Hunter.

Dive into the action with the innovative FreeFlow™ combat system, allowing you to string together seamless combos and take down large groups of The Joker’s henchmen in intense melee battles. As Batman, the World's Greatest Detective, you'll solve complex puzzles using advanced forensic tools like x-ray scanning, fingerprint analysis, 'Amido Black' spray, and a pheromone tracker.

Face off against iconic Gotham villains such as The Joker, Harley Quinn, Poison Ivy, and Killer Croc. Embrace your role as the Invisible Predator™ by using Batman's fear takedowns and unique vantage points to move unseen and hunt your enemies. You can choose from various takedown methods, including swooping from above or smashing through walls.

Explore every corner of Arkham Asylum and the infamous island, presented in stunning, gritty realism. Feel what it's like to be Batman as you wield his signature gadgets: Batarangs, explosive gel, the Batclaw, sonar resonator, and the line launcher. Uncover hidden secrets by completing in-world challenges and upgrade your equipment by earning experience points. Enjoy unparalleled freedom with Batman's grapnel gun, allowing you to reach any visible location, leap from any height, and glide in any direction. As one reviewer noted, the game "truly makes you feel like Batman."

Name: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Critically acclaimed Batman: Arkham Asylum returns with a remastered Game of the Year Edition, featuring 4 extra Challenge Maps. The additional Challenge Maps are Crime Alley; Scarecrow Nightmare; Totally Insane and Nocturnal Hunter (both from the Insane Night Map Pack). Utilize the unique FreeFlow™ combat system to chain together unlimited combos seamlessly and battle with huge groups of The Joker’s henchmen in brutal melee brawls Investigate as Batman, the WORLD’S GREATEST DETECTIVE, by solving intricate puzzles with the help of cutting edge forensic tools including x-ray scanning, fingerprint scans, ‘Amido Black’ spray and a pheromone tracker Face off against Gotham’s greatest villains including The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY and KILLER CROC Become the Invisible Predator™ with Batman’s fear takedowns and unique vantage point system to move without being seen and hunt enemies Choose multiple takedown methods, including swooping from the sky and smashing through walls. Explore every inch of Arkham Asylum and roam freely on the infamous island, presented for the first time ever in its gritty and realistic entirety Experience what it’s like to be BATMAN using BATARANGS, explosive gel aerosol, The Batclaw, sonar resonator and the line launcher Unlock more secrets by completing hidden challenges in the world and develop and customize equipment by earning experience points Enjoy complete superhero freedom in the environment with the use of Batman’s grapnel gun to get to any place you can see, jump from any height and glide in any direction

Name: Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Batman: Arkham City builds upon the intense, atmospheric foundation of Batman: Arkham Asylum, sending players flying through the expansive Arkham City - five times larger than the game world in Batman: Arkham Asylum - the new maximum security 'home' for all of Gotham City's thugs, gangsters and insane criminal masterminds. Featuring an incredible Rogues Gallery of Gotham City's most dangerous criminals including Catwoman, The Joker, The Riddler, Two-Face, Harley Quinn, The Penguin, Mr. Freeze and many others, the game allows players to genuinely experience what it feels like to be The Dark Knight delivering justice on the streets of Gotham City. Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition includes the following DLC: Catwoman Pack Nightwing Bundle Pack Robin Bundle Pack Harley Quinn’s Revenge Challenge Map Pack Arkham City Skins Pack Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition packages new gameplay content, seven maps, three playable characters, and 12 skins beyond the original retail release: Maps: Wayne Manor, Main Hall, Freight Train, Black Mask, The Joker's Carnival, Iceberg Long, and Batcave Playable Characters: Catwoman, Robin and Nightwing Skins: 1970s Batsuit, Year One Batman, The Dark Knight Returns, Earth One Batman, Batman Beyond Batman, Animated Batman, Sinestro Corps Batman, Long Halloween Catwoman, Animated Catwoman, Animated Robin, Red Robin and Animated Nightwing

Name: Freedom Force
Description:
From a distant corner of the galaxy, an evil alien race sets in motion a sinister plan to conquer the Earth. They unleash a powerful catalyst — Energy X — that imbues the planet's worst miscreants with super-powers to bring the planet to its knees. Now Earth's only hope lies with a new breed of heroes... The Freedom Force! Command a squad of comic book heroes in the defense of Patriot City. Choose from over a dozen heroes or create your own comic champions. Fight for freedom in over 20 action-packed missions. Restore order in a completely interactive 3D world. Take your heroes online and join the fight in multiplayer mode.* *Multiplayer available in LAN or Direct IP Only.

Wildermyth is a character-driven, procedurally-generated tactical RPG that offers a unique tabletop roleplaying experience. The game presents players with meaningful choices, and every decision has consequences that shape the development of their characters. You will lead a band of heroes, guiding them from humble beginnings as reluctant farmers to becoming legendary fighters. Engage in combat against unexpected threats and strange monsters across dynamic, interactive battlefields. Uncover mysteries and experience poignant moments within an ever-evolving fantasy setting that artfully blends hard truths and sacrifice with humor and personal storytelling. The core of Wildermyth lies in its unique heroes, who are born in distinct settings each game, much like in tabletop roleplaying.

These heroes age, transform, form relationships, experience disagreements, and make harrowing sacrifices. Each hero possesses an organic history and personality, but your strategic choices and combat prowess ultimately determine their paths and fates. While all heroes eventually meet their end, you have the opportunity to preserve your favorites. By reintroducing them in subsequent adventures, the myths you forge over many lifetimes will coalesce into your own legendary pantheon.

### An Imaginative Papercraft World

The game is set in the Yondering Lands, a richly layered world populated by hand-painted 2D characters and scenery. The developers have deliberately broken from traditional fantasy tropes, avoiding common races like orcs, elves, and goblins. Instead, players will encounter unique adversaries such as telepathic insect-dragons and clockwork undead.

### Extreme Character Depth

Each hero in Wildermyth boasts a unique generated history, personality, and appearance. They also form relationships with other heroes in the party. These elements are not static; they evolve throughout a playthrough as characters age, encounter mysteries, and overcome challenges.

### Choices That Matter

Player decisions have a profound impact on character development. For instance, a hero might choose to trust an enigmatic wolf god, resulting in a dramatic transformation of their appearance and combat abilities. Alternatively, pursuing a romance with another hero can grant both characters shared buffs and unlock additional story opportunities. Encounters and events leave permanent, character-defining effects, allowing you to meticulously craft the narrative arc of each individual hero.

### A New Approach to Death

Wildermyth redefines the concept of character death. If a beloved hero falls in battle, perhaps to a monstrous tentacled horror-bear, you have options. You can choose to have the hero 'fall back' with a permanent maiming, which can lead to transformative new paths in their legend. Alternatively, you can let them go out in a blaze of glory, ensuring they are remembered heroically for generations to come.

### Deep and Creative Tactical Combat

Combat in Wildermyth emphasizes strategic teamwork and careful positioning. It also encourages imaginative use of your heroes' evolving capabilities and the surrounding environment. Mechanics like Walling and Flanking present clear but often conflicting strategic incentives. Furthermore, mystical interfusion allows for battlefield manipulation through explosive magic. The game offers multiple difficulty levels, allowing you to tailor the intensity of the combat experience to your preference.

### Cooperative Multiplayer

Wildermyth supports cooperative multiplayer, enabling you and your friends to each customize and control your own heroes throughout a campaign. The game is recommended for up to five players, though a typical campaign begins with three heroes and allows for the recruitment of two more later on. Steam Remote Play is also supported.

### Endless Replayability

With each playthrough, heroes gain experience and level up, offering a vast array of combat abilities to choose from. You can tailor your heroes' development towards offensive or defensive tactics, brute strength, stealth, or even magically flinging fire from nearby objects at your enemies. The procedural generation system ensures that every game presents new heroes, new enemies, new story events, and new maps, guaranteeing a fresh experience each time you play.

### A Custom Pantheon of Legends

Wildermyth provides extensive customization options for hero appearances, names, histories, and more. As time progresses, heroes will age and may retire, or they might fall in combat. Some, however, will survive to the very end. You can add your favorite heroes to a special roster of legends, allowing you to call upon them in future playthroughs. This feature empowers you to build your own unique mythologies and share the awe-inspiring might of your heroes with others.

Injustice 2 is a fighting game that lets you customize and evolve your favorite DC Comics characters. The game's core feature is its gear system, which allows players to build the ultimate versions of these iconic heroes and villains.

As you play, every battle helps you progress. You'll earn and equip gear that changes and improves your fighters. This system is key to the entire gameplay experience. The story continues after the first Injustice game, with Batman still fighting against Superman's rule. But a new, major threat appears, putting Earth's survival at risk. You can choose from a large group of DC Universe characters and fight in famous locations during massive battles. NetherRealm Studios, known for the Mortal Kombat series, developed the game. As one critic noted, the gear system "offers a deep level of personalization, allowing players to truly make their favorite characters their own." Another reviewer highlighted the narrative, stating, "The story is a compelling continuation, raising the stakes for the DC Universe in ways fans will appreciate."

**DRAGON BALL FighterZ: The Ultimate Anime Fighting Game**

Experience the thrill of **DRAGON BALL FighterZ**, a game that perfectly captures the excitement of the beloved anime. Developed with Arc System Works, it features **stunning anime visuals** powered by the Unreal Engine. This game offers **deeply strategic fighting gameplay** that's also easy to pick up.

Key features include:

*   **Gorgeous Graphics:** Enjoy breathtaking visuals thanks to the Unreal Engine and Arc System Works' art.
*   **3v3 Tag Battles:** Create your dream team and master **fast-paced tag-team combos**.
*   **Engaging Online Modes:** Compete in **ranked matches**, socialize in lobbies, or join **6-player Party Matches**.
*   **Original Story:** Dive into a new narrative featuring **Android 21**, a character designed by Akira Toriyama.
*   **Spectacular Fights:** Execute **incredible combos**, destroy stages, and relive iconic anime moments. The game runs at a **smooth 60FPS** in 1080p.

Name: Embracelet
Description:
Are you looking for a heartwarming, relaxing game? Look no further! Exploration, puzzles and an exciting story in a unique setting Embracelet puts you in the role of Jesper, a Norwegian teenager who lives with his mom in the city. One day he is handed an old bracelet by his Grandfather who grew up in a fishing community up north. This bracelet has powers - strange, mysterious powers! Jesper is given the task to unravel the mystery behind the bracelet. Where does it come from? Who does it belong to? And why did his Grandfather leave the island and his old life behind? EXPLORE A BEAUTIFUL, NORTHERN NORWEGIAN ISLAND SOLVE PUZZLES USING THE MAGICAL BRACELET MAKE FRIENDS AND CHOICES THAT CAN AFFECT THE OUTCOME OF THE STORY With its gentle difficulty level, intriguing story and beautiful soundtrack, Embracelet is a game for anyone who enjoys unique, heartwarming video games. Embracelet is made by Mattis Folkestad, one man team behind the award-winning adventure game Milkmaid of the Milky Way. Playtime: 3-6 hours with different endings. Best played with a game controller, like an Xbox one, Dualshock or Nintendo Pro Controller in a sofa or a comfy chair.

**The Wolf Among Us: A Fabletown Thriller**

Step into the dark and dangerous world of **The Wolf Among Us**, a mature and violent thriller developed by the acclaimed creators of the 2012 Game of the Year, The Walking Dead. This gripping narrative is brought to life by the award-winning **Fables comic books** from DC Comics/Vertigo, offering a unique take on familiar tales.

You assume the role of **Bigby Wolf**, the notorious "big bad wolf," now serving as the Sheriff of Fabletown. Your investigation into a **brutal murder** is merely the prelude to the pervasive dangers lurking within this hidden community. In Fabletown, life is **bloody, terrifying, and relentlessly dangerous**, and your decisions carry **significant and far-reaching consequences**. Telltale's signature **innovative choice and consequence mechanics** are central to the experience, shaping your journey through this gritty urban landscape.

The compelling story of The Wolf Among Us unfolds across five distinct episodes, all of which are currently available:

*   **Episode 1: Faith**
*   **Episode 2: Smoke and Mirrors**
*   **Episode 3: A Crooked Mile**
*   **Episode 4: In Sheep's Clothing**
*   **Episode 5: Cry Wolf**

This game offers a **mature and gritty reimagining** of classic fairytale, legend, and folklore characters who now inhabit our world. It serves as an **excellent entry point** into the rich Fables universe, even for those unfamiliar with the original comic series, as the game's events **precede the first comic issue**.

Dive into the hilariously bizarre world of **Sam & Max: Beyond Time and Space**, a remastered collection that brings Telltale's beloved second season of episodic games back to life. Developed by the original creators, this adventure throws players into an unforgettable story that spans from the icy North Pole and the mythical Fountain of Youth to outer space and the fiery depths of Hell. At the core of this chaotic duo are the **Freelance Police**: **Sam**, a tall canine detective skilled at dispensing justice, and **Max**, his hyperactive rabbit partner known for his love of mayhem. For over thirty years, this irreverent pair has entertained audiences with their unique approach to crime-fighting.

This collection features five linked episodes, each filled with challenges that will test Sam and Max. You'll confront **Santa Claus**, race to stop a volcanic eruption, and face a flamboyant **Eurotrash vampire**. Just when you think things can't get any stranger, the game finds new ways to escalate the absurdity. The story explores mysteries that need solving. Players will wonder if the paranoid shopkeeper, **Bosco**, truly knows about a grand conspiracy with his wild theories, or if the diner owner, **Stinky**, is hiding the truth about her grandfather's disappearance. Will the unlucky **Sybil Pandemik** ever find love? And, in a moment of unexpected fun, did someone just mention… a **BIRTHDAY**?! Hop into the iconic DeSoto for a wild ride that previously won IGN's Adventure Game of the Year. The remastered edition offers significant visual and audio upgrades, with stunning HD graphics, better lighting, and more accurate lip-syncing. A polished cinematic presentation and a completely redone audio experience await, along with eight new musical tracks performed by live jazz musicians. Prepare for a world filled with dancing zombies, serenading mariachis, and a giant battle robot causing chaos. When their friends are in danger, Sam and Max will risk everything to restore order.

As one of the original developers stated, "We wanted to capture the same spirit of chaotic fun that made the original so special, but with a fresh coat of paint."

**Key Features:**

*   **Hilarious Adventure:** Explore strange places, meet quirky characters, and solve puzzling mysteries in a story packed with laughs.
*   **Beautifully Remastered:** Experience Sam & Max's second episodic season with greatly improved visuals and sound. Enjoy better lighting, lip-sync, cinematography, audio, and music for a modern feel.
*   **Helpful Hints:** The game offers subtle, contextual hints to help players who get stuck. You can adjust how often these hints appear.
*   **Optional Driving Fun:** Drive Sam & Max’s classic 1960 DeSoto convertible for enjoyable driving segments that offer a break from the main story. Earned decals and car upgrades carry over between episodes.
*   **Global Appeal:** Play with original English voice acting and enjoy subtitles in English, French, Italian, German, and Spanish.

**The Spike** is a **dynamic and fast-paced 2D volleyball game** that puts you in control of the court. Unleash **speedy and powerful spikes** to dominate your opponents and claim victory.

This exciting game offers:

*   **Speedy 3v3 volleyball matches** for quick, intense gameplay.
*   A **Story Mode** that delves into the journeys of student athletes striving for the top.
*   A **Local Multiplayer Mode** to challenge your friends.
*   **Steam Achievements** to unlock and showcase your skills.

Name: Spike Volleyball
Description:
50 national teams, men's and women's, go head to head in a realistic indoor volleyball simulation. Speed, reflexes, teamwork: all the elements needed for success are there for a spectacular sports experience. Manage your own team and take it to the highest level. Enter multiple international tournaments, change your tactics to catch your opponent off guard and become world champions! Spikes, blocks, floaters… Master the skills of volleyball and experience all the thrills of one of the most complex team sports played today, realistically reproduced with the powerful Unreal Engine 4.

Name: Lactea Volleyball
Description:
Lactea Volleyball is a game made to be simple and fun to play, choose or create your team and aim well to beat your opponents. Game Modes Play alone or with a friend locally in mode 'Friendly' or... Face five full championships for years in mode 'Seasons'. 12 Teams Choose between twelve teams with unique players, and find yours weaknesses and strengths to define your strategy. Team's Creator Make twelve customizable teams. Others 12 courts with differents environments. 3 difficulty levels. 32 achievments to unlock.

**Beach Volleyball Champions Seek Island Wisdom**

College beach volleyball stars Eunice Park and Suzy Karlson are poised to dominate the upcoming ABVA Gold Cup finals in Honolulu. Despite their top ranking, the dynamic duo is facing unexpected challenges in their training sessions. To overcome this slump, their manager, Natalia, has arranged a crucial meeting with a renowned sports guru.

This legendary advisor resides on a secluded Caribbean island, a tranquil setting chosen for its potential to inspire a breakthrough. The trio embarks on a journey to this tropical haven, hoping the guru's insights will reignite Eunice and Suzy's competitive spirit. Their ultimate goal is to return to peak performance, enabling them to confidently vie for the ABVA Gold Cup in Hawaii.

**Game Features:**

*   Immerse yourself in the game with soothing Reggae and Latin Jazz background music.
*   Experience stunning visuals enhanced by numerous computer graphics (CGs).
*   Explore diverse storylines with multiple endings.

Name: Actual Volleyball
Description:
Just like everyone else in the world, you probably love volleyball. That's so cool! Actual Volleyball, the game someone maybe once talked about, is the most realistic volleyball simulation ever made. Features: 1v1 local volleyball action (play against a friend). 2v2 local volleyball action (play in teams). Single player practice mode (play against yourself). And that's it! ———————————————————————— What People are Saying: 'Borderline criminal user experience design.' - Kyle 'This could be really fun if everything about it was different.' - Sanantha ———————————————————————— Read Before Buying: PLEASE NOTE - Actual Volleyball can technically be played with a keyboard, but it's definitely not the best way to experience the game. Using a controller is highly recommended.

Name: Volleyball Fever
Description:
Volleyball Fever is a VR sports game set on a tropical island. Stick your feet in the warm sand and join us on the beach! 🏐🌊🌴😃 Great physics Online or solo Bomb mode Tropical island

Name: Highline Volleyball VR
Description:
Highline Volleyball VR is a virtual reality sport game. Virtual reality allows it to be ultra-immersive and bring interactions that will allow you to also improve your volleyball skills. We designed Highline Volleyball so that it can be played by beginners or pros and in any kind of VR configurations (seated, standing, room scale). Play volleyball and discover 4 totally different environments and ambiences like for example the Sunny Beach Resort, or the Olympic Stadium. Choose your favorite time of day for playing (Morning, Afternoon, Sunset, Night) Explore and interact with the environments List of Features available in Early access at launch: Tutorial 2 VS 2 match 3 environments and ambiences : Sunny Beach, Six Coconut Beach, Paris Stadium Different time of day settings (Morning, Afternoon, Sunset, Night) Realistic and precise scales (Net height, ball size etc....)

Name: Volleyball Unbound - Pro Beach Volleyball
Description:
Volleyball Unbound is a realistic beach volleyball video game with an extensive career mode and local multiplayer for up to 16 people in hot seat mode and 4 people at a time. Features Extensive career mode for males and females Party mode(shared screen) for up to 16 people (4 people playing at a time) Very realistic ball physics and player abilities Very large range of locations and tournaments Character editor - recreate the looks and abilities of any real world player! Controls are simple to learn but hard to master Emotion system: audience and player reactions reflect the complete course of the game Smart AI with humanlike behaviour Plug & Play support for most controllers. Gameplay To defeat your opponents you have the full array of shots and spikes a real volleyball player would have in the same situation. You will need fast reflexes as well as a cool head to keep the overview in any situation. The ball physics are very accurate - even the spin of the ball is taken into account to calculate the flying trajectories. To hit the ball precisely you need perfect timing just like in the real world - so playing the game also feels a lot like playing in reality. There are two control modes: either control just one player at all times or - more difficult but also more intense - control both players alternately whenever they play the ball. Additionally you can always play cooperatively with a friend. AI The AI has several difficulty settings but always behaves very similar to a real human. On the one hand it analyzes your style of play and  guesses your next action, on the other hand it sometimes makes unforced errors. Just don't think you can successfully do the same shot in the same situation over and over again. Emotion System The audience and player reactions reflect the complete course of the game - not just the last rally. There will be no inappropriate cheers just because one team, that is already way behind and will lose the match anyways, scores. Again, even not so spectacular points might lead to some heavy cheers if one team is catching up! This awareness of situations also affects the gameplay: e.g. AI controlled players are more prone to make unforced errors in a close match after they were intimidated by a block. Character Editor In the character editor you can create any type of player you can imagine, from a virtual clone of yourself to a world champion(if this is not the same in your case). The players not only look like their real world counterparts, they also have the same abilities(e.g. jumping heights, running speed, stamina, technique, ...). You could for example create a fully trained version of yourself (and your partner) and look what would be possible. While modifying a character you can always see his/her physical facts and some athletic results (height, weight, attack reach, sprint and middle distance). This makes it very easy to accurately recreate real world players. Extensive Career Mode for both sexes In career mode hundreds of teams competing at dozens of tournaments all around the planet are simulated. You start out as local underdog in one of 30 nations. After gaining enough points at national tournaments you are qualified to take part in continental tournaments and eventually you become eligible for international tournaments. After each tournament you can train your team to eradicate your most annoying weaknesses. Before a match starts you can view the abilities of your opposing team. This way you can take advantage of their weaknesses or hinder them to utilize their strengths. Plug & Play Joystick Support This game can be played with keyboard and most joysticks. Just plug your controller to your computer while the game is running and press a button - no complicated setup process necessary! Party Mode Play custom tournaments(single elimination, double elimination, king of the beach, round robin) with up to 16 teams. Each team can either be controlled by two humans, one human, or the AI. Theoretically you could setup a tournament for 32 human players, where always 4 people play at a time!

Name: Volleyballed
Description:
Volleyballed is a fun filled arcade style 6 on 6 volleyball game. Bump, set, and spike your want to victory against AI opponents or friends locally or through Steam Remote Play Together. If you like fast paced, action packed volleyball without an adherence to the laws of physics and the occasional flaming ball, Volleyballed is for you. Key Features 6 on 6 indoor arcade style volleyball so good you can hang your hat on it Simple but nuanced controls that allow you to easily bump, set, and spike but also allow more advanced moves (spikes, cuts, jump serves, etc) 1 player vs AI OR 2 player local / Remote Play Together 6 team colors to choose from 10,000+ random team names assigned in hilarious fashion Random hairstyles that will leaving you breathless Achievements for you to... uh, achieve Gameplay Standard 6 on 6 volleyball rules (or pretty close to that) Player can switch between the 6 players on their team to ensure they're always controlling the most important player on the court First to 25 wins momentous fictional prizes that will impress friends and enemies alike Big time spikes and jump serves that literally set the ball on fire Exit menu option that allows you to exit the game, but you'll probably never want to use that

Spikair Volleyball immerses you in the strategic world of team management, placing you in charge of critical decisions during intense matches where split-second timing is key. Beyond the core management simulation, the game offers vibrant co-op and versus modes, ideal for shared enjoyment with friends and family.

The journey to championship success starts with **recruiting** talented individuals. According to game developers, identifying players with superior statistics is crucial for building a winning roster. Once assembled, **training** becomes paramount. Players must be diligently developed to sharpen their skills, transforming them into a formidable force. The ultimate goal, as outlined in the game's objectives, is to **lead your team to victory** in exciting tournaments, striving to **rise to the top** and be recognized as the **best volleyball club in the world**. A detailed Press Kit is also accessible for further information.

Name: Desktop Dungeons
Description:
FREE GAME UPDATE! Desktop Dungeons: Enhanced Edition. More ways to die horribly in 10 minutes or less. The award winning quick-play puzzle roguelike is now packed with new content, 2 new classes and a new way to play: Compete against your friends in the seeded Daily Dungeon! The perfect coffee-break game for genius tacticians and chilled clickers alike: Fight your way through fantasy dungeons in 10 minutes or less. We’re busy people too. Prize-winning game design awesomeness (13th Annual IGF Awards) Classic roguelike play re-imagined as a unique single-screen puzzle game sort of thing! Reviewers have a hard time with genres. Explore unrevealed terrain to regain health and mana. Game hook! 6 hours of gameplay? Try 6 billion... You can (and will) play Desktop Dungeons for the rest of your life. Randomly generated dungeons are different every time you play. Build your Kingdom to unlock hordes of new classes, races and challenges. Daily Dungeon allows you to compete against your Steam friends! Amazing soundtrack by the improbably astounding team of Danny Baranowsky and Grant Kirkhope.

Name: Dungeons of Dredmor
Description:
Long ago, the Dark Lord Dredmor was bound in the darkest dungeons beneath the earth by great and mighty heroes. Centuries later, the magical bonds that hold him in place are loosening and his power grows ever stronger. The land cries out for a new hero, a powerful warrior or a mystic wizard like those spoken of in the prophecies of yore. What they have, unfortunately, is you... Step into the Dungeons of Dredmor! Embrace your destiny! Face evil of the likes the world has never known - the terrifying Swarmies, the undulating Thrusties, and the adoreable nest-building Diggles. Worship Inconsequentia, the Goddess of Pointless Sidequests, or try your luck as a devotee of the nameless Lutefisk God. Cast powerful magic learned from the dark business warlocks of the school of Necronomiconomics, or summon the Viking Runes of your ancestors to blast your foes with thunder and lightning! Discover the power that can be had by wielding a bizarre armament of devastating weaponry such as the Interdimensional Axe, the Plastic Ring, and the Invisible Shield (if you can remember where you left it). Wield shoes decorated by the Dwarven Glittersmiths, all of whom have now committed suicide because of their shame, and embrace the joys of destroying giant moustache-wielding brick demons with a mace decorated with tawdry, delicious bacon. While you’re at it, be prepared to die. A lot. In hideous, screaming pain that makes you throw your keyboard out the window. The Dungeons of Dredmor await. Are you ready for them? Key features: Classic Roguelike gameplay with the sweet, refreshing taste of point-and-click interfaces. No longer must you press CTRL-ALT-SHIFT-x to drink a potion. Randomly generated dungeons entice you with the sweet, sweet promises of treasure and … things. Old-school pixel goodness. Face lovingly hand-animated monsters and enjoy the great taste of beautiful, individually rendered items on top of a sea of gorgeous, potent tile-work. Wield the awesome power of the Anvil of Krong, lest it wield you! Incredibly complicated crafting system! Wield relics of the Great Elven/Dwarven conflict; grind down ingots to make powdered aluminum and shove it directly up your nostrils! Hordes of monsters never-before-seen in a video game! Deploy cunning traps to defeat your foes! Infinite replay value: choose from a selection of mind-boggling skills to create your character. A new gameplay experience awaits every time! Did we mention there’s lutefisk?

Name: Jupiter Hell
Description:
Jupiter Hell is a classic, turn-based roguelike set in a 90s flavored sci-fi universe. Set on the moons of Jupiter, the game pits a lone space marine against overwhelming demonic forces. Rip and tear zombies, demons and unmentionable monstrosities, using classic weaponry such as shotguns, chainguns, railguns and the trusty chainsaw. All to the shine of CRT monitors and the tune of heavy metal! Tactical, turn-based combat Benefit from classic roguelike turns with modern shooter sensibilities and real-time responsiveness. Controls are immediate and accessible while retaining the back-end depth of a turn-based RPG. Play with mouse+keyboard, keyboard-only, or gamepad controls. Spiritual successor to DOOM Roguelike Jupiter Hell is built by ChaosForge, the team that’s been making top-down, cosmic hell roguelikes since 2002, when DOOM, the Roguelike (later renamed DRL ) filled the screens with ASCII-based, gory, explosive action and defined the turn-based shooter genre. Meaningful RPG progression Customize your character with new weapons, items and abilities gained as you progress through a permadeath-prone hell. Each run you build your character anew, and every unlocked perk can change the way you play. Beat the game to unlock more difficult challenges rather than grinding to make the game easier. Randomized levels set all over Jupiter’s orbit Blast through procedurally-generated civilian sectors, military space bases and mining colonies on the violent moons of Jupiter. Every playthrough you’ll find new ways to experience familiar environments. Pair that with detailed graphics and smooth animation. Roguelikes have come a long way from their ASCII roots! Frequent updates! Most recent: 1.4 - Chaos! 1.3 - Valhalla! 1.2 - Varia! 1.1 - Exordium! 1.0 - Dante!

**Sword of the Stars: The Pit - A Desperate Quest for Survival**

Your world is on the brink of collapse, ravaged by a deadly plague. Your only hope lies within the legendary alien facility known as "The Pit," a colossal structure carved deep into the Feldspar Mountains by the ancient Suul'ka. If this fabled place truly exists, it may hold the key to a cure, offering your doctors a fighting chance. However, every expedition into those treacherous mountains has vanished without a trace, a grim testament to the Suul'ka's deadly legacy. As the ancient Latin phrase warns, "Quamdiu Poteris Superesse?" – How long can you survive?

*Sword of the Stars: The Pit* reimagines the classic dungeon-crawling experience with a light-hearted, turn-based RPG twist, seamlessly blending the traditions of games like *Rogue* with the rich sci-fi universe of *Sword of the Stars*. Here, the ultimate question isn't whether you reach the end, but rather, "How far did you venture into The Pit before the relentless monsters claimed you?" Steel your resolve, press onward for the sake of your planet, and when all else fails, embrace a glorious end!

**Key Features:**

*   **Choose Your Champion:** Select from three distinct characters: the stalwart Marine, the agile Pilot, or the ingenious Engineer.
