*   **Expanded Roster:** The *MindGames* expansion is now integrated, offering five bonus characters to bolster your team. Plus, a secret hidden character awaits discovery – a quest for the truly dedicated!
*   **A Perilous Descent:** Navigate 30 levels of ancient, malevolent science, each step bringing you closer to the cure and deeper into danger. Enhance your character, hone your skills, and strive to survive the crushing depths.
*   **A Universe of Foes:** Confront dozens of unique enemies drawn directly from the *Sword of the Stars* universe, each presenting a fresh challenge.
*   **Arsenal of Destruction:** Wield over 50 weapons and armors, featuring a diverse array of special effects. Unleash the power of flamethrowers, rocket launchers, plasma cannons, and the formidable powered Brawler armor.
*   **Unpredictable Augmentations:** Randomized augmentation effects for both your equipment and your character ensure that no two playthroughs are ever the same, adding a layer of unique replayability.
*   **Master of Crafting:** Utilize a robust crafting system to forge special items from the salvaged remains of your defeated enemies.
*   **Vast Item Discovery:** Unearth over 100 items, ranging from familiar tools to ancient, exotic technologies that could turn the tide of battle.
*   **Enigmatic Environments:** Explore dozens of distinct room types, each filled with a host of exotic devices designed to aid – or perhaps impede – your progress.
*   **Uncover the Lore:** Discover and decipher hidden messages, unlock new crafting recipes, and piece together fragments of the compelling *Sword of the Stars* lore.
*   **Fiendish Fates:** Prepare for a multitude of deadly ends, including poisoning, disease, cunning traps, lethal radiation, gnawing starvation, and, of course, the ever-present threat of MONSTERS. As one developer noted, "The Suul'ka were masters of creating environments that were as hostile as they were technologically advanced."

Name: Nova-111
Description:
Navigate mind-warping puzzles and engage in strategic battles with bizarre creatures in a twisted environment where the turn-based world and the real-time world collide. As you progress through the universe, you'll need to protect yourself by collecting new abilities and upgrade modules for your ship, but remember, your greatest weapon is SCIENCE itself! Features Innovative Gameplay - Innovative mix of turn-based and real-time gameplay Strategic Combat - Fight smart. Brains beats brawn Mind-Warping Puzzles - Designed to melt your brain Beautifully-Crafted Planets - Each with its own unique enemies, environments and strategies Powerful Abilities - Use special lasers or abilities like the TIME-STOP to bend time to your will Ship Upgrades - Collect upgrades and modules for your ship Dynamic Soundtrack - Music suited to your play style SCIENCE - Because who doesn't like scientific progress? Created by former developers of the PixelJunk series. Supported by Indie Fund .

Rift Wizard is a challenging retro fantasy roguelike that focuses on combat and character development. You are an immortal wizard with amnesia, tasked with rebuilding your spellbook and defeating your rival. The game features 25 randomly generated levels, each presenting unique, procedurally generated challenges designed to test your strategic thinking and creativity.

Key features of Rift Wizard include:

*   **Open-ended character advancement:** Explore deep synergies and spell interactions.
*   **Vast spell and skill library:** Build your character from a huge selection of spells and passive skills.
*   **Player agency:** Experience low randomness and high player control.
*   **Diverse monster design:** Encounter a wide variety of unique enemies.
*   **High difficulty and permadeath:** Face a tough challenge with permanent consequences.
*   **Limited resources:** Manage your inventory and abilities carefully.
*   **Retro aesthetics:** Enjoy crisp 1990s RPG visuals.

Inspired by classics like Nethack, Dungeon Crawl Stone Soup, Brogue, and Tales of Maj'Eyal, Rift Wizard shifts the genre towards a more strategic, combat-centric experience. It shares similarities with board games more than traditional RPGs. The game prioritizes intense wizard battles and intricate buildcraft over extensive plot or exploration.

The creator's goal for Rift Wizard is to innovate within the roguelike genre. They aim to craft a deep, challenging experience that offers over a thousand hours of replayability. The game is designed to present hundreds of potential strategies, making each playthrough a novel and engaging intellectual puzzle. Ultimately, Rift Wizard seeks to inspire players to be resourceful, creative, and intelligent.

Name: Living the Nightmare
Description:
Fire up the Chainsaw. Just because you're dead doesn't mean anything is over, let alone the killing. Massacre and loot your way through this shifting woodland Nightmare, grow in power and improve your tactics, and maybe, if you can reach all six Carrion Shrines and slay every horrible thing that crawls out of the shadows to stop you, you might just make it back to life. You might even get your revenge. Just know that a wrong move will be your end. Again. For now. It's a harsh Nightmare. You know what they say—if at first you don't escape, die, die again. Living the Nightmare is a difficult Horror Roguelike with fast-paced, turn-based gameplay, random and procedural generation, loot and monsters galore, all made entirely by a team of two. MAIN FEATURES A Turn-Based, Hex-Grid, Strategic, Difficult, Horror Roguelike where death is one misstep away. Being turn-based doesn't mean the action is slow. Commands play out as quickly as you input them. Monsters come in packs, but take their turns all at once. Nonetheless, if you want to think about your actions carefully, you have all the time in the world. Death is very patient and a painful Reconstitution is just a click away. Scavenge, Survive, and Improve as you rip equipment, ammo, and hearts from the carcasses of your foes. You can find and wield 70 weapons, masks and items. You can also build your own Faceless and try different tactics utilizing over 40 perks. A Shifting Nightmare made with a mix of random and procedural generation, featuring multiple biomes and a host of over 50 bosses and monsters with a multitude of mechanics to learn. Streamlined Control makes the game intuitive and playable with just the mouse, freeing aspiring Killers to focus on slaughter and survival. Even loot is collected automatically. Dive Right In with a short intro/tutorial and get right to the killing. Easy to learn, hard to master is definitely the right phrase, and there is a retro styled in-game Manual for players who want a deeper understanding of the game mechanics.

Name: Dungeon Limbus
Description:
A mysterious blacksmith and a young woman who manages the village of resurrection at the border between death and life. Head deep into the dungeon in search of lost memories. Repeated death will make you stronger. Dungeon Limbus is a turn-based Roguelike, and has the following six features. 1. Easy play with turn-based control in tile maps. 2. Character growth through drawing equipment and making weapons. 3. The use of colleagues, magic, and cooking through the construction of card deck in a village. 4. Random maps of various themes give different fun each time. 5. Strategic battle with the patterned giant boss. 6. Various collection elements and multi endings to enjoy for a long time.

Name: 中国象棋-残局大师
Description:
'中国象棋-残局' is a single leisure chess game. This game mainly focuses on the classic remnant game of Chinese chess, currently provides 60 levels, followed by nearly 460 levels. In the final game, the principle is 'red first, red must win'. If you go the right way. The red side will surely win. If you miss a step, you will lose everything.

Name: C:\raft
Description:
Join our human adventurer on an adventure! Is this adventurer even a hero? Is he even actually an adventurer? Who cares? Not the Crafting Goddess Joann, apparently! All she wants is a slave to make crap for her, and that slave appears to be this poor soul. I guess now that he's been chosen by a trans-dimensional entity to do some kind of bidding he doesn't really have a choice of sorts. At least there's some fun to be had as he traverses the dungeons generated from your old high-school reports and questionable images. Wait a second, did I just say old high-school reports?! They have value now? You sure bet! You'll have to delve deep into your hard drive's dungeons to create the list of items the goddess has bestowed upon you to create. All the dungeons are randomly generated from the files that you select on your hard drive, with bigger files creating bigger dungeons, and different file types designating different kinds of loot you can find. Items, craftables, and monsters all have generated names with randomly selected adjectives attached. Even the requirements to make the crafted items are random! Use every menu and tool at your disposal to collect items and serve the goddess Features Randomly generated dungeons based on your files Randomly generated items BOSS FIGHTS An unpredictable play time Being able to play with one hand with a beer in the other Multiple ways to reach your goal Hand drawn pixel art made with love and care Disclaimer C:\raft is a very text heavy, no hold hands kind of game made by a fan of old roguelikes for other fans. Things are explained within dialog, tooltips, and in-game manuals. It is expected that players will at some point in time need to read the manuals to understand more complex mechanics so they may unlock new parts of the game. Still, it is an easily accessible and expansive experience, but it may not be the most welcoming to players new to the rogue genre. Within minutes you can already be collecting tons of loot, exploring your hard drive, and of course dying. The game features practically no story, but many ways to play, and its crafting experience is no more than a glorified fetch quest. There's plenty to sink time into, and its accessibility emphasizes an ability to play quickly, such as during a coffee break.

Portal 2 builds upon the acclaimed foundation of its predecessor, which garnered over 70 industry awards and a dedicated fanbase for its innovative gameplay, compelling narrative, and memorable music. This sequel expands significantly on the original's success.

The single-player experience introduces a vibrant new cast of characters, introduces novel puzzle mechanics, and presents a considerably larger array of challenging test chambers. Players will venture into uncharted territories within the Aperture Science Labs and reconnect with GLaDOS, the famously unpredictable AI who previously guided them. As one critic noted, "GLaDOS remains a captivating, if slightly terrifying, presence."

Portal 2 also features a robust two-player cooperative mode, boasting its own distinct campaign, unique story, specialized test chambers, and two new playable characters. This cooperative element demands a fresh approach to problem-solving, requiring players to "think cooperatively, not just act cooperatively," as the developers have stated.

**Product Features:**

*   **Extensive Single Player:** Experience next-generation gameplay coupled with a deeply engaging story.
*   **Complete Two-Person Co-op:** Dive into a multiplayer mode with its own dedicated narrative, characters, and gameplay mechanics.
*   **Advanced Physics:** The game's physics engine enables the creation of a wide spectrum of inventive challenges, resulting in a larger, yet still accessible, game.
*   **Original Music:** Enjoy a soundtrack composed specifically for the game.
*   **Massive Sequel:** The original Portal was recognized as Game of the Year by over 30 publications in 2007.
*   **Editing Tools:** Portal 2 will include comprehensive editing tools for players to create their own content.

Portal, a groundbreaking single-player game from Valve, immerses players in the enigmatic Aperture Science Laboratories. This unique experience fundamentally changes how players interact with and understand their surroundings. Similar to how the Gravity Gun in Half-Life 2 revolutionized object handling, Portal requires players to think differently and solve problems creatively.

Inside Aperture Science, players face a variety of complex, physics-driven puzzles. The main feature is the portal gun. This tool lets players create two linked portals, enabling instant travel between any two points in the game world. It also allows for the movement of the player and objects. This system encourages players to discover new ways to use each space, leading to a fresh and captivating game.

Name: Neon White
Description:
Neon White is a lightning fast first-person action game about exterminating demons in Heaven. You are White, an assassin handpicked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a chance to live permanently in Heaven. The other assassins seem familiar, though… Features: • You play as Neon White, an assassin plucked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a shot at redemption. • Collect “Soul Cards” to attack your foes or discard them to use unique movement abilities. • Compete for the best times by cleverly combining cards to discover massive shortcuts. • Uncover Heaven’s mysteries by getting to know the other assassins… did you know them in a past life?

**Prince of Persia®: The Sands of Time**

Journey to the heart of ancient Persia, where a legend whispered in an ancient tongue tells of a kingdom built on betrayal and ruled by deceit. In *Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time*, a young Prince, lured by the dark allure of a magical dagger, inadvertently unleashes a terrible evil upon his beautiful homeland. With the help of a cunning princess and the extraordinary power of the Sands of Time, the Prince embarks on a perilous quest. His mission: to reclaim the Palace's cursed halls and bring peace back to his ravaged land.

This game is hailed as a "technological masterpiece," pushing the boundaries of what was possible on consoles. It set new benchmarks in game development, influencing areas like physics, lighting, graphics, and animation. The Prince himself is an "unmatched hero," returning to action-adventure with incredible feats of acrobatics, fierce combat abilities, and the power to manipulate time itself to achieve his destiny.

Ubisoft's Montreal Studio developed *The Sands of Time* as a significant advancement, described as a "technological breakthrough that will change the face of action-adventure gaming forever." Players can "erase the past, behold the future, and freeze the present in real-time," offering endless gameplay possibilities. Explore exotic and vast kingdoms within a world previously untouched by action-adventure games. Medieval Persia, a land of myth and danger, presents a stunning variety of landscapes to discover and conquer. This sweeping adventure of betrayal and triumph brings the epic legends and fearsome creatures of mythic Persia to life in a suspenseful narrative filled with more twists than the Palace's own labyrinthine corridors.

Embark on an unforgettable cooperative adventure with **It Takes Two**, a game built from the ground up for two players. This unique experience lets you invite a friend to join for free using the Friend's Pass, allowing you to tackle a wide range of wildly inventive gameplay challenges together.

You'll play as Cody and May, a couple magically transformed into dolls. Trapped in a whimsical world filled with surprises, they must reluctantly work together to mend their strained relationship.

**Key Features of It Takes Two:**

*   **Pure Co-op Perfection:** Invite a friend to join for free with Remote Play Together. This thrilling adventure is designed exclusively for two players. Enjoy couch or online co-op with split-screen play, and face constantly changing challenges where teamwork is crucial for success.
*   **Wildly Inventive Gameplay:** From battling rogue vacuum cleaners to charming love gurus, you'll never know what's coming next. The game features genre-bending challenges and new character abilities to master in each level, blending gameplay and story in a way that redefines interactive storytelling. As Josef Fares, the game's director, stated, "We wanted to create something that was truly unique and pushed the boundaries of what co-op games could be."
*   **A Universal Story About Relationships:** Discover a touching and heartfelt narrative about the difficulties of getting along. Help Cody and May overcome their differences as you encounter a diverse cast of strange and memorable characters. Join forces and embark on an adventure you'll cherish.

In **It Takes Two**, you'll master unique and interconnected character abilities in every new level, helping each other overcome numerous unexpected obstacles and share hilarious moments. Prepare to battle gangster squirrels, pilot a pair of underpants, DJ a lively nightclub, and bobsleigh through a magical snow globe. Experience a heartfelt and funny story where the narrative and gameplay weave together into a uniquely metaphorical journey.

Developed by the award-winning studio Hazelight, a pioneer in cooperative play, **It Takes Two** offers a wild and wonderful ride where one thing is certain: "We're better together," as the developers emphasize.

**About Hazelight:**
Hazelight is an acclaimed independent game development studio based in Stockholm, Sweden. Founded in 2014 by Josef Fares, a film director and creator of the celebrated game *Brothers: A Tale of Two Sons*, Hazelight is committed to expanding the creative horizons of interactive entertainment. In 2018, Hazelight released the BAFTA award-winning *A Way Out*, the first-ever co-op only, third-person action-adventure, as part of the EA Originals program.

**About EA Originals:**
EA Originals supports passionate, independent, and talented game studios globally. Discover innovative and unforgettable gaming experiences from highly creative game makers who aim to captivate and inspire.

Name: Psychonauts 2
Description:
Razputin “Raz” Aquato, trained acrobat and powerful young psychic, has realized his lifelong dream of joining the international psychic espionage organization known as the Psychonauts! But these psychic super spies are in trouble. Their leader hasn't been the same since he was rescued from a kidnapping, and what's worse, there's a mole hiding in headquarters. Combining quirky missions and mysterious conspiracies, Psychonauts 2 is a platform-adventure game with cinematic style and tons of customizable psychic powers. Psychonauts 2 serves up danger, excitement and laughs in equal measure as players guide Raz on a journey through the minds of friends and foes on a quest to defeat a murderous psychic villain. Experience an imaginative, cinematic story that mixes humor and intrigue, brought to you by legendary game designer Tim Schafer (Grim Fandango, Brütal Legend, Broken Age). Explore unique environments using Raz’s ability to dive into people’s brains to battle their inner demons, unlock hidden memories, and resolve their emotional baggage. Leap acrobatically through the air, traversing tightropes and trapezes in a varied, challenging, and joyful platforming experience. Wield a powerful array of psychic powers to blast, burn and levitate things, or even slow down time itself to solve environmental puzzles and battle strange enemies.

Name: Psychonauts
Description:
A Psychic Odyssey Through the Minds of Misfits, Monsters, and Madmen. This classic action/adventure platformer from acclaimed developers Double Fine Productions follows the story of a young psychic named Razputin. In his quest to join the Psychonauts--an elite group of international psychic secret agents--he breaks into their secret training facility: Whispering Rock Psychic Summer Camp. But this is no average psychic summer camp! A mysterious villain has kidnapped Raz’s fellow campers and stolen their brains. Now he must use his psychic powers of Telekinesis, Levitation, and most of all his ability to project himself into the minds of others--to find the loose noodles and keep them from falling into the wrong hands. Fight mental demons! Uncover hidden memories! Sort emotional baggage! Explore the fantastic realm of the inner mind! Join the Psychonauts!

OlliOlli World is a vibrant skateboarding action-platformer that invites players into the unique world of Radlandia. This game focuses on the core experience of skateboarding, allowing players to "flip and flow through the vivid and vibrant world of Radlandia." As you progress, you'll encounter a cast of "colorful characters" on your journey to find the "mystical skate gods" and achieve the ultimate goal of Gnarvana.

The game emphasizes exploration and player freedom. You'll traverse a "delightful and weird world," taking on various missions and challenges while forging new friendships. OlliOlli World offers extensive customization options, letting you personalize your character's appearance, tricks, and overall style. The explorable levels are designed with multiple paths, providing "an array of opportunities for player expression."

For those seeking competition, OlliOlli World offers global Leagues where you can challenge other players. You can also directly challenge friends to beat your high scores on "millions of sharable levels." The game is praised for its "accessibility, depth, and player freedom," all built around its signature "flow state gameplay."

This title marks the third installment in the acclaimed OlliOlli series, developed by Roll7, a studio recognized with BAFTA and multiple other awards. The game's world is described as a "lush skateboarding utopia," filled with "eccentric characters and vibrant locations that are begging to be explored." Players can discover new routes, side quests, and trick opportunities in diverse areas like Inflatable Alley and Los Vulgas. The experience is further enhanced by a curated soundtrack of "IDM and Electronica tracks."

Roll7 highlights the game's refined mechanics, stating that "super tight controls combine with highly refined gameplay to ensure a silky smooth ride." OlliOlli World is designed to be welcoming to newcomers, with developers noting, "Not a Pro? Don’t worry – OlliOlli World welcomes you with open arms, allowing new players to tear down streets and pull off sick method grabs without fear of faceplanting the curb."

For experienced players, the game offers significant depth. You can achieve mastery through the sandbox mode's "millions of unique levels" or compete globally in Leagues. The game features a "hugely deep combo system with over 100 moves to master and combine" in the pursuit of the highest scores. Unlocking special rewards allows for further character customization, from looks to tricks and style. The developers emphasize the game's inclusive nature, stating, "Want to skate in your flip flops… go for it. Want to wear a bumble bee onesie …ok then… no judgement. In OlliOlli World as long as you’re on board anything goes!"

**Prince of Persia: The Two Thrones™: A Darker Journey Awaits**

In *Prince of Persia: The Two Thrones™*, the Prince, a seasoned warrior, returns to his homeland of Babylon with Kaileena, the Empress of Time. However, their homecoming is shattered by war, and the Prince finds his kingdom turned against him. Captured and facing despair, Kaileena makes a selfless sacrifice, unleashing the Sands of Time to save him.

Now a fugitive on the streets, the Prince is haunted by his past. A deadly Dark Prince, a manifestation of his inner turmoil, begins to possess him. This duality allows players to "wield the powers and weapons of two master warriors with different combat styles, attitudes, and histories," as described by the game's developers.

The game emphasizes player choice in combat. You can "master the expanded Free-Form Fighting system to destroy enemies in your own style," utilizing new stealth tactics like surprise decapitations or the "deadly Daggertail" to strangle enemies from afar.

Players will "battle freely through Babylon," navigating perilous rooftops, chaotic streets, and dark underground passageways. The narrative promises "unparalleled depth in storytelling," immersing players in a "twisting tale filled with adrenaline, tension and discovery."

Time manipulation remains a core mechanic, allowing players to "execute powerful attacks against entire armies by slowing down or rewinding time," or employ "all-new Sands of Time powers" for surprise attacks. *The Two Thrones™* delivers a "masterful blend of gameplay," combining action combat, agility challenges, and story-driven puzzles, true to the acclaimed Prince of Persia franchise.

Name: Death's Door
Description:
Reaping souls of the dead and punching a clock might get monotonous but it's honest work for a Crow. The job gets lively when your assigned soul is stolen and you must track down a desperate thief to a realm untouched by death - where creatures grow far past their expiry and overflow with greed and power. Talon Sharp Combat: Utilize melee weapons, arrows and magic to overcome a fantastic array of beasts and demigods. Mistakes are punished and victory is rewarded. Gain an edge by customizing your character stats and mastering the abilities and upgrades you obtain. A Beautifully Bleak World: Venture beyond the Doors and explore a land full of twisted inhabitants and countless secrets, bringing hope to the weird and wonderful characters you’ll meet along the way. A Dark Mystery to Unravel: Track down and defeat colossal tyrants with stories and motivations of their own. Experience a somber yet darkly comedic tale, uncovering the truths behind the flow of souls, the role of the Crows and the origin of the Doors.

**The Ramp: Pure Vert Skateboarding Thrills**

For those seeking an authentic vert skateboarding experience, **The Ramp** delivers an unadulterated thrill. While keyboard input is supported, the game is best enjoyed with a controller, according to the developer. This digital toy is crafted for players who crave pure flow and the exhilarating sensation of shredding a halfpipe, intentionally stripped of unnecessary complexities.

**The Ramp** focuses on delivering satisfying and unique skateboarding gameplay that emphasizes smooth, continuous movement. It's designed to be accessible for newcomers yet challenging to master, offering a rewarding progression. Unlike many games, **The Ramp** features no unlockable content, no scorekeeping, no missions, and no external objectives. The developer's intention was to capture the unparalleled feeling of real-life vert skateboarding, presenting it as a focused experience akin to a digital toy. This deliberate omission of extraneous elements, such as guns or explosions, allows players to immerse themselves in those crucial moments of flow that can elevate an ordinary day. The developer encourages feedback and welcomes positive experiences from players.

**When Ski Lifts Go Wrong: A Thrilling Engineering Challenge**

Embark on an exciting journey in **When Ski Lifts Go Wrong**, a game that tests your engineering prowess from gentle foothills to treacherous mountain peaks. Your mission is to design and build safe and efficient ski lift systems, ensuring every passenger reaches their destination. Prepare for **realistic physics** that can lead to hilarious disasters!

**Build and Conquer Diverse Challenges**

Construct a variety of facilities, including chairlifts, gondolas, jumps, bridges, and ramps. As you progress through over **100 challenging levels**, you'll build increasingly complex structures. **Manage your materials wisely**; cutting corners might save money, but it could lead to comical passenger mishaps!

**Master Original Physics Puzzles**

Step into the role of a mountain resort engineer and **master rope physics**. Understand the stresses and strains on different structures you build. Seamlessly switch between **Build Mode and Simulation Mode** to refine your designs.

**Experience Extreme Sports**

After construction, the fun continues with a range of extreme sports! From winter to summer, enjoy snowboarding, skiing, motorbiking, and more. **Take direct control of your riders**, feel the mountain air, and give them that extra push to reach their destination and claim the top spot on the leaderboards.

**Climb the Ranks**

Keep a close eye on your **budget** and complete bonus objectives to ascend the **online leaderboards**. Collect all the trophies and tackle puzzles ranging from easy green to challenging black difficulty.

**Unleash Your Creativity in Sandbox Mode**

Once you've mastered the game's slopes, dive into the **Sandbox Builder Mode**. This intuitive level editor allows you to create your own challenges, limited only by your imagination.

**Engage with the Community**

Test your engineering skills against creations from players worldwide via the **Steam Workshop**. Share your proudest moments or most spectacular failures with the community using the built-in **GIF and MP4 exporter**, making it easy to share your replays and creations online.

Name: Steep™
Description:
Ride a massive open world across the Alps, where the powder is always fresh and the run never ends. Tame the wilderness on the American continent in the Alaska free update, a new region filled with challenges. The mountain is yours to explore. So strap in, suit up, and drop in. - RIDE YOUR WAY -Conquer the world's most epic mountains on skis, wingsuits, snowboards, and paragliders. - LIVE UNFORGETTABLE MOMENTS WITH OTHERS -Ride solo or drop in next to other players to share thrilling, adrenaline-fueled rides. - THE MOUNTAIN IS YOURS TO EXPLORE -Create your own path through a massive open-world, and share your best custom lines with friends. - PUT YOUR SKILLS TO THE TEST -Prove that you're king of the mountain in unique and spectacular challenges. - SHARE EVERYTHING -Capture your most insane stunts and share via social media. A permanent internet connection is required in order to play the game. - SET YOUR SIGHTS ON THE ALPS Rip through the terrains of a snowy open world. Strap in and suit up for some epic stunts as you ride your way to the peak of the excitement. Experience 360° of visual freedom while you explore the Alps. Let your gaze immerse you in the massive winter playground. Situational awareness has never been more fluid with the integrated Tobii Eye Tracking feature set. Using your gaze to shred the hills enhances your gameplay and lets you embark on the ride of your life. Compatible with all Tobii Eye Tracking gaming devices. ---- Additional notes: Eye tracking features available with Tobii Eye Tracking.

Name: Endless Ski
Description:
Rediscover the 90s classic Ski Free, re-imagined in Unreal Engine The player controls a skier on a mountain slope, avoiding obstacles, performing stunts, and avoiding that Yeti! Features Exciting snow landscape adventure Perfect game for all ages! Dodge the dog. Dodge the snowboarder. But most importantly dodge that Yeti! Ski through flags to gain the points The longer you ski, the greater the score! Fun atmospheric music to listen to Special Effects! (In the Menu's)

Name: K-Point Ski Jumping
Description:
Become professional Ski Jumper ! Starting in Junior Cup, you will cllimb the ladder to become next Wolrd Cup winner ! Compete on 34 real world based ski jumping hills located all around the world. Take part in famous tournements like 4 Hills, Raw Sky, Winter Olympics, World Cup, Summer Grand Prix or Ski Flying. Earn money and buy your dream car or dream house, hire coach. Keep track of your morale. Better you do in competitions, your morale will grow higher. Choose on of 4 Ski Jumping styles , including old school one ! Be the best in the world and try to beat online world records!

Name: Snowtopia: Ski Resort Builder
Description:
Welcome to Snowtopia, a world of endless winter fun. Build the ideal ski resort to keep your skiers smiling all the way down the mountain. Get to know every cliff and crevice as you plan pistes, place lifts and build essential facilities. Take on the challenge to create a resort where life is always good! Plan your pistes Place pistes on the mountainside in just a few clicks with the easy-to-use creation tool. Read the terrain, and choose the best spot to lay down trails for every skier ability. 11 different types of ski lift give you plenty of choice for scaling the heights. 12-person gondola lifts are fast, but tricky to build on the steep mountain slopes. A two-person chairlift might be a better choice, but watch out for queues at the bottom! Luckily, ever-advancing ski lift technology means there are always new options to try. The latest models can make even the highest peaks accessible in no time. Plan, build and improve until you’ve created your dream ski area. Welcome skiers of every kind You might have thought perfect pistes were enough to keep skiers happy, but it’s not so simple. With 12 different skier profiles in the game, some are more interested in a good raclette, while others come to commune with nature. And then there are the hardcore ski fanatics, who won’t settle for anything less than the longest run the mountain has to offer. There’s no money in Snowtopia. Make your skiers happy enough and they might join the team of volunteers running the resort. Divide your workforce between the lift operators, maintenance crew, service facilities, and resort improvement team. Growing the reputation of your resort leads to more skiers on the slopes. But beware - more skiers means more accidents! Make sure you have enough snow groomers and ski patrols to keep the slopes safe at all times. Remember, no one likes a broken chairlift, but everyone loves sunbathing on the terrace! Sit back and chill on the mountain Once your resort is built and your skiers are happy, you deserve a little break. So find yourself a perfect little corner on the mountain to drink it all in, maybe near a pretty forest piste next to a ski lift perched on a picturesque clifftop. You’re in the mountains. Enjoy the frosty kiss of the cold air on your face and kick back to some cool tunes. Welcome to Snowtopia, the game where it’s good to just chill.

**Gustav Vasa: A King's Perilous Journey Through the Dales**

In 1522, the young nobleman Gustav Eriksson Vasa received devastating news: his father had been murdered during the brutal Stockholm Bloodbath. Aware that King Kristian the Tyrant of Denmark would soon be hunting him, Gustav embarked on a perilous journey through the rugged Swedish Dales, a region that would become central to his rise to power.

The game immerses players in this dramatic period, beginning with Gustav's desperate flight. **Danish soldiers relentlessly pursue Gustav** as he navigates the picturesque, snow-covered landscapes of the Dales on skis. His journey takes him from village to village, where he seeks crucial aid and support from the local populace. The gameplay features **thrilling 3D chase sequences**, demanding that players skillfully utilize the environment to evade the pursuing Danish soldiers who fire arrows with deadly accuracy.

Interspersed with these heart-pounding chases are **engaging 2D sidescrolling adventure segments**. These sections are dedicated to unfolding the compelling narrative of Gustav Vasa, a Swedish nobleman destined to become king. The story masterfully blends historical fact with the rich legends surrounding this pivotal figure. Players will witness and participate in **key moments of Gustav Vasa's remarkable story**, including his famous and impassioned speech in Falun, where he successfully rallied the Dalesfolk, and ultimately, his triumphant coronation in Stockholm.

The game is brought to life through a **distinct and captivating visual style**. Players will be treated to beautifully hand-painted environments and characters, an artistic choice deeply inspired by classic Swedish artwork originating from the Dales region. This unique aesthetic creates a truly immersive and memorable experience.

Developed by Ingeborg Asplund, Stanislav Hallberg, Natali Hallberg, Joakim Bengtsson, and Gertrud Bondesson, this game offers a unique blend of action and narrative, allowing players to experience the formative adventures of a future king.

Let's Go! Skiing VR is a fun, competitive virtual reality sports game designed for players of all ages. It's an excellent choice for parties and can encourage children to embrace an active lifestyle. In this game, players experience the thrill of real skiing competition. You'll slide down slopes, gather coins, and skillfully avoid obstacles.

Key features include a local leaderboard, allowing you to compete with friends and track who achieves the highest score. The game presents a "dangerous track" filled with numerous obstacles, including the threat of avalanches. "Let's go! Skiing has cartoon-like graphics, which makes it great for children!" according to the game's description. The controls are designed for simplicity. As the game's creators note, "in the game you use the controllers as skiing sticks and you steer with your head. It can't get easier!" This intuitive design ensures that players can quickly jump into the action and enjoy the virtual skiing experience.

Name: Just Ski+
Description:
Just Ski is a challenging, minimalist, physics driven game that will frustrate and punish you in the beginning but reward you with the feeling of mastery in the end. The Controls The controls for Just Ski are borrowed from an old, abandoned game called Ski Stunt Simulator. Your only control over the skier is to move your mouse down to make him crouch or up to make him extend. It's a very simple to understand mechanic but requires a healthy amount of practice to master. The key to success with Just Ski is learning to control your rotation while in the air. It's all about gaining a feel for the conservation of angular momentum: crouch to spin faster, extend to spin slower. Your Goal Just ski to the cabin. Learning Curve Like learning to ride a bike, Just Ski is going to feel clunky and impossible in the beginning, but once mastered will feel smooth and rewarding with just the right amount of challenge to keep things interesting. -Have fun and thanks for playing!

Name: Ski Park Tycoon
Description:
Gameplay mechanics The core gameplay mechanics of Ski Park Tycoon lie in ski lift and slope construction. Before building a park, the player needs to study the mountain topography and terrain. Therefore, it was imperative to allow the player complete freedom of camera movement. Building lifts and slopes is as easy as drawing lines on the ground. Skiers coming to the resort want to enjoy their stay so - apart from lifts and slopes - the player also needs to provide other infrastructure such as restaurants, ski patrols, snow cannons etc. This is where the economic simulation aspect of the game comes into play. You can learn more about the game in the online tutorial ( ). Game features classic tycoon gameplay full 3D environment explore your park in third person view hundreds of skiers in one resort 7 types of lifts 12 types of buildings campaign with 29 missions of various objectives sandbox and unlimited game modes real world ski resorts

**Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition: Dive into World War II Strategy**

The **Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition** serves as your entry point to the acclaimed World War II real-time strategy experience. This purchase also provides access to the latest updated version, simply titled 'Company of Heroes,' within your Steam library. **For online multiplayer, please utilize the updated 'Company of Heroes' version.** You can further enhance your gameplay by exploring the active **COH1 Steam Community** and its extensive **Modding scene**, accessible through these links:

*   [COH1 Community Hub](link-to-community-hub)
*   [COH1 Steam Workshop](link-to-steam-workshop)

**Immerse Yourself in the Intense Reality of WWII Combat**

Company of Heroes redefined real-time strategy with its **visceral portrayal of World War II**. The game masterfully captures the sacrifices of soldiers, the devastation of war-torn landscapes, and the dynamic nature of battlefield combat. Your journey begins with the pivotal D-Day invasion of Normandy, where you will lead Allied squads in their fight against the formidable German war machine. Progress through a compelling single-player campaign that immerses you in some of WWII's most crucial battles, experiencing the **cinematic intensity and the profound bravery of soldiers** facing unprecedented challenges.

**Discover the Core Gameplay Elements:**

*   **Cinematic Single-Player Campaign:** Experience the profound emotional impact and strategic depth of World War II like never before.
*   **Intelligent Squad AI:** Witness your soldiers react dynamically to their surroundings, instinctively seeking cover and employing sophisticated tactics to outmaneuver and defeat enemy forces.
*   **Exceptional Visual Fidelity:** Powered by Relic's advanced engine, the game boasts **unparalleled graphical quality** and a truly physics-driven world, setting a new standard for real-time strategy titles.
*   **Dynamic Environmental Strategy:** The integration of real-time physics and a **fully destructible environment** guarantees that every battle unfolds uniquely. You possess the power to **destroy virtually anything**, fundamentally altering the battlefield to your advantage. Strategically utilize buildings and terrain for cover and tactical superiority, or deny these vital resources to your opponents.
*   **Engaging Multiplayer Battles:** Test your strategic prowess in **2-8 player matches**, playable via LAN or online. Team up with friends for epic showdowns between Axis and Allied forces, offering the ultimate competitive experience.

Name: Company of Heroes
Description:
DISCLAIMER FOR ADDITIONAL USER REVIEWS , please visit the 'Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition' page. Total conversions available on Steam for COH1 are also listed on the Legacy Edition page. DESCRIPTION Delivering a visceral WWII gaming experience, Company of Heroes redefines real time strategy gaming by bringing the sacrifice of heroic soldiers, war-ravaged environments, and dynamic battlefields to life. Beginning with the D-Day Invasion of Normandy, players lead squads of Allied soldiers into battle against the German war machine through some of the most pivotal battles of WWII. Through a rich single player campaign, players experience the cinematic intensity and bravery of ordinary soldiers thrust into extraordinary events. A Cinematic Single Player Experience that captures the turmoil of WWII as never before. Advanced squad AI brings your soldiers to life as they interact with the changing environment, take cover, and execute advanced squad tactics to eliminate all enemy opposition. Stunning Visuals - Relic's next generation cutting-edge engine provides graphic quality and a physics driven world that is unprecedented in an RTS. Environmental Strategy - Real-time physics and a completely destructible environment guarantee no two battles ever play out in the same way. Destroy anything and re-shape the battlefield! Use buildings and terrain to your advantage, or deny them to the enemy. 2-8 Player Multiplayer Competition via LAN or Internet - Go online with friends and join the ultimate battle of Axis versus Allies.

**Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare: Redefining the Modern Combat Experience**

Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare, developed by Infinity Ward, ushered in a new era for the action game genre by offering a compelling and realistic portrayal of modern warfare. The game immerses players in a world grappling with a global crisis, allowing them to step into the boots of both a U.S. Marine and a British S.A.S. operative. This dual perspective provides an intense and multifaceted look at contemporary conflicts. The narrative is characterized by unexpected twists and turns, demanding strategic deployment of advanced weaponry, cutting-edge technology, and meticulously planned assaults. Success hinges on rapid reflexes, pinpoint accuracy, and seamless teamwork.

The game boasts an impressive arsenal of over 70 authentic weapons and pieces of equipment. Players can wield assault rifles equipped with laser sights, devastating .50 caliber sniper rifles, and the formidable M-249 SAW machine gun. For tactical advantage, the game incorporates elements like night-vision goggles and ghillie suits, enabling stealth operations. The depiction of modern combat is rendered with remarkable detail, featuring crucial elements such as air support, helicopter insertions, and the presence of attack helicopters. The game's visual and auditory presentation is exceptional, with next-generation graphics, lifelike physics, and immersive sound design that collectively create a palpable sense of being on a real battlefield. Beyond its captivating single-player campaign, Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare also features a highly addictive online multiplayer mode. This online environment allows for extensive character customization through the innovative "create-a-class" system. Players earn experience points to unlock a wide array of new gear and abilities. Features like robust matchmaking and competitive leaderboards enhance the online experience, fostering a vibrant and engaged player community.

**Call of Duty®: Experience World War II Like Never Before**

Prepare for an unparalleled immersion into the **gritty realism and cinematic intensity** of World War II's most pivotal battlefield moments. Call of Duty® places you directly into the boots of **citizen soldiers and unsung heroes** from a diverse alliance of nations, whose collective efforts irrevocably shaped the course of modern history.

Experience the **chaos of battle firsthand** as a vital member of a well-trained squad. You'll lay down crucial covering fire, pull your wounded comrades to safety, and witness how each soldier's **distinct personality and specialized training** emerge under the immense pressure of combat. This is a war where **no single soldier or nation** achieved victory alone.

For the first time, Call of Duty® offers a **multi-perspective narrative**, allowing you to fight through the war from the viewpoints of **American, British, and Russian soldiers**. Embark on a journey across **24 missions** meticulously crafted into **4 interconnected historical campaigns**. Your objectives will vary dramatically, from daring sabotage missions and all-out assaults to **stealth operations, intense vehicle combat, and critical rescue missions**.

Every element has been painstakingly recreated to ensure the most **authentic World War II experience** yet. From the **accurate weaponry and historically faithful locations** to the **period-appropriate vehicles and visceral sound design**, you will be completely immersed in the heart of the conflict.

© 2003 Activision Publishing, Inc. Activision and Call of Duty are registered trademarks of Activision Publishing, Inc. All rights reserved. All other trademarks and trade names are the properties of their respective owners.

**Silent Hunter® III: The Ultimate WWII Submarine Simulation**

Experience the pinnacle of submarine warfare with Silent Hunter® III, a game that redefines realism in WWII naval simulations. This installment boasts an all-new 3D engine, introducing enhanced crew command features and an unprecedented level of authentic WWII naval action. Its cinematic graphics and intensely engaging, yet accessible, gameplay cater to both dedicated realism enthusiasts and casual gamers alike.

The game immerses players in a meticulously crafted, suspenseful environment. Realistic 3D water modeling, dynamic day/night cycles, and historically precise submarines, ships, and aircraft create an unparalleled sense of presence. According to Ubisoft, the developers, the detailed U-boat interiors, evolving weather effects, and captivating audio design contribute to the ultimate WWII submarine warfare experience. Players can command a formidable arsenal of U-boats, including the Type II, VII, IX, and XXI submarines. Engage Allied convoys and warships, employing stealth to lie in wait beneath threatening escort vessels, launching devastating torpedo attacks, or surfacing to engage enemies with the deck gun.

Silent Hunter® III offers a dynamic campaign where players forge their own naval war narratives. Military careers are shaped by successful command decisions within an unscripted and non-linear WWII campaign. The game is designed with an accessible learning curve, making it easier to handle than many traditional simulations. The naval academy tutorial guides new players through the basics, and customizable realism settings allow for gameplay tailored to a wide spectrum of WWII combat fans. Players can also command their crew, who will respond to orders and develop based on patrol outcomes. For a shared experience, Silent Hunter® III supports multiplayer cooperative play for up to eight players via LAN.

Name: Total War: EMPIRE – Definitive Edition
Description:
Complete your Total War collection with this Definitive Edition of Total War: EMPIRE, which includes all DLC and feature updates since the game’s release: Take on the Warpath Campaign and lead one of 5 new Native American factions in an epic war to defend your lands and drive out the invaders. Build up your armies with the Elite Units of the East, Elite Units of the West, Elite Units of America and the Special Forces Units & Bonus Content packs, which together add over 50 elite new units. Total War: EMPIRE Definitive Edition offers hundreds and hundreds of hours of absorbing gameplay and every bit of content made for the game. See below for full details. About Total War: EMPIRE Control the land, command the seas, forge a new nation, and conquer the globe. Total War: EMPIRE takes the Total War franchise to the eighteenth century Age of Enlightenment a time of political upheaval, military advancements, and radical thought, captured in stunning detail. Total War: EMPIRE introduces a host of revolutionary new features, including true 3D naval combat. For the first time in the Total War series, you will be able to intuitively command single ships or vast fleets upon seascapes rich with extraordinary water and weather effects that play a huge role in your eventual glorious success or ignominious defeat. After pummelling your enemy with cannon fire, close in to grapple their ship and prepare to board, taking control of your men as they fight hand-to-hand on the decks of these wooden behemoths. In addition, Total War: EMPIRE will see further enhancements to the Total War series’ signature 3D battles and turn-based campaign map. Real-time battles will pose new challenges with the addition of cannon and musket, challenging players to master new formations and tactics as a result of the increasing role of gunpowder within warfare. And the Campaign Map, the heart of Total War introduces a variety of new and upgraded elements, including new systems for Trade, Diplomacy and Espionage with agents; a refined and streamlined UI; improved Advisors; and a vastly extended scope, taking in the riches of India, the turbulence of Europe and, for the first time, the untapped potential of the United States of America. About The Warpath Campaign A new detailed North American Campaign Map expands the Total War: EMPIRE experience, with 5 brand new Native American factions, new units and technologies. Experience battles in the new Warpath Campaign and lead one of the 5 new factions in an epic war to defend your lands and drive out the invaders. Or take these units and their unique strengths into multiplayer battles. • 5 New Playable Factions including the Iroquois, Huron, Plains, Pueblo and Cherokee nations. • Expanded North American Territories - A new, more detailed North American Campaign Map featuring new regions and a new start date. • New Elite Units including Mohawk Elite Warriors, Cheyenne Dog Soldiers, Navajo Scout Warriors and many more. • Two New Agent Types - Infiltrate enemy territory with the new Shaman unit and sabotage the opposition with the cunning Scout. • 18 New Tribal Technologies including Spirit Medicine, the Call of the Wild and Dreamwalking creating a brand new tribal technology tree. • New Winning Objectives for each of the playable factions. About Elite Units of the East The Elite Units of the East adds 12 new elite units to the Maratha and Ottoman factions and expands the map further East than any previous Total War game. Most of these soldiers' expertise developed on the battlefield - some are fearsome brigands, others of them are drawn from a strong academic background, learned warriors. They will provide a vast array of tactical options: intimidating and cowing your enemies. • Haydut Irregulars (Ottoman Empire) • Wallachian Boyars (Ottoman Empire) • Bosnian Panduks (Ottoman Empire) • Circassian Armoured Cavalry (Ottoman Empire) • Armenian Archers (Ottoman Empire) • Libyan Kuloglu (Ottoman Empire) • Palestinian Auxiliaries (Ottoman Empire) • Cairo Janissaries (Ottoman Empire) • Mounted Nizam-I-Cedit (Ottoman Empire) • Rajput Zamindars (Maratha) • Poligars (Maratha) • Barawardi (Maratha) About Elite Units of the West The Elite Units of the West introduces 14 completely unique units from all the major Western factions. Featuring all new infantry and cavalry units, equipped with the best weapons and having undergone the most rigorous of training, the Elite Units of the West bring even more options on the battlefield to all tacticians seeking to defeat their enemies. • Hungarian Grenadiers (Austria) • Horse Guards (Britain) • Swiss Guards (France) • Blue Guards (United Provinces) • Gardes du Corps (United Provinces) • Guard Grenadiers (Poland-Lithuania) • 2nd Hussars (Prussia) • Bosniaks (Prussia) • Frei-Korps (Prussia) • Gardes à cheval (Russia) • Siemenovski Foot Guards (Russia) • Walloon Guards (Spain) • Legion of the United States (United States) • US Marines (United States) About Elite Units of America The Elite Units of America adds 15 new elite units to the American, British and French factions of Total War: EMPIRE. In the last half of the 18th century, the political upheaval from thirteen of British Colonies in North America ultimately led to the 1776 Declaration of Independence and changed History forever. The 15 units have all played a major part in the American Revolution. Though their background owes a lot to European military traditions, their identity is tied to the destiny of the United States and gave these men courage and audacity like no other soldier on the battlefield. • 1st Delaware (United States) • 1st Maryland (United States) • 2nd Continental Light Dragoons (United States) • 2nd New York (United States) • 33rd Foot (Britain) • Brunswick Dragoons (Britain) • Hessian Grenadiers (Britain) • King’s Royal Regiment of New York (Britain) • Lee’s Legion (United States) • Morgan’s Provisional Rifle Corp (United States) • Pulaski’s Legion (United States) • Royal Deux-Ponts Regiment (France) • Royal Welch Fusiliers (Britain) • Company of Select Marksmen/Fraser’s Rangers (Britain) • Tarleton’s Light Dragoons (Britain) About Special Forces Units & Bonus Content The Special Forces Units introduces six of the most influential military forces of the 18th Century. True to the period, these exclusive elite units become available on the campaign map via a certain faction or once a specific geographical region is under control. This pack also includes three more exclusive Elite Units. • HMS Victory • Rogers' Rangers • Ottoman Organ Gun • Ghoorkas • Corso Terrestre Guerillas • Bulkeley's Regiment • Death's Head Hussars • The USS Constitution • The Dahomey Amazons

**Sid Meier's Civilization III Complete: Your Complete Strategy Adventure**

Sid Meier's Civilization III Complete is your gateway to a full strategy adventure, combining the original game with all its expansions. This package includes the classic quest for discovery, along with the updated multiplayer expansion, Sid Meier's Civilization III: Play the World. You'll also get all the new civilizations, scenarios, and features from Sid Meier's Civilization III: Conquests!, creating a rich and varied game world.

This complete edition makes your game experience even better with more ways to play. Firaxis Games, the developer, states that players can win in many different ways, offering new paths to victory. The complete content means you get the original game, the multiplayer expansion, and the Conquests expansion all in one easy package. While online multiplayer for Sid Meier's Civilization III: Play the World ended on May 31st, 2014, 2K Games confirms that Local Area Network (LAN) play is still available.

**Total War: SHOGUN 2: Master the Art of War in Feudal Japan**

Total War: SHOGUN 2 plunges you into the **mid-16th Century**, a tumultuous period known as the **darkest age of Japan**. This era was defined by **endless war**, as the once unified empire fractured into warring clans. Ten legendary warlords now vie for supremacy, navigating a treacherous landscape of **conspiracies and conflicts**. Only one will ultimately triumph, claiming the nation's heart and the coveted title of **new shogun**, while the rest will fall to his blade.

In this strategic masterpiece, you assume the mantle of a **Daimyo**, a powerful clan leader. Your path to victory lies in a strategic blend of **military engagements, economic management, and shrewd diplomacy**. The ultimate goal is to **re-unite Japan** under your banner and establish yourself as the **undisputed ruler of a pacified nation**.

**Key Game Features:**

*   **Enhanced Full 3D Battles:** Immerse yourself in spectacular real-time battles on both land and sea, a signature of the Total War series.
*   **Tactical Campaign Map:** This is the strategic core of the game. Here, you will meticulously build your kingdom and manage your burgeoning empire.
*   **AI Inspired by the 'Art of War':** A sophisticated new AI system draws profound wisdom from Master Sun Tzu's ancient Chinese text. This influences Japanese warfare and facilitates **deep, yet accessible strategic gameplay**. As one developer noted, "The AI's approach to warfare is directly informed by the principles of Sun Tzu, making for a truly challenging and rewarding experience."
*   **Conquer Feudal Japan:** Command vast armies of disciplined samurai and formidable fleets of giant warships as you traverse the islands of 16th-century Japan.
*   **Build Your Kingdom:** Leverage economic, political, and military might to amass wealth, raise armies, and expand your influence across the turn-based campaign map.
*   **Scheme with the 'Art of War':** Employ devastating fire and siege tactics, alongside cunning spies and deadly assassins. Adapt to the constantly shifting conditions on the battlefield and within your domain.
*   **Online Battles:** Experience the main campaign in a thrilling two-player mode. You can also join epic online clashes with up to 8 players, leading your digital army to glory in specialized campaigns.

**New to Total War: SHOGUN 2:**

*   **RPG Skills and Experience:** Cultivate your Generals and Agents through new skill trees and robust experience systems.
*   **Multi-Stage Sieges:** Scaling the castle walls is merely the initial challenge in these complex and demanding sieges.
*   **Hero Units:** Rally your troops and carve a path through enemy formations with the introduction of powerful new hero units.
*   **Rotating 3D Campaign Map:** Navigate a visually enhanced and highly interactive campaign map.

**Total War: SHOGUN 2: Forge Your Empire in Feudal Japan**

Total War: SHOGUN 2 invites you to the tumultuous 16th-century landscape of Japan, a nation fractured by conflict. Ten powerful warlords vie for dominance, shattering the country's unity. As a Daimyo, you will command your chosen clan, aiming to unify Japan and ascend to the position of Shogun, the ultimate ruler of a peaceful land. This ambitious undertaking demands skillful military strategy, astute economic management, and intricate diplomatic maneuvering.

**Fundamental Gameplay**

Building upon the renowned Total War franchise, this installment introduces significant enhancements. Engage in thrilling, full 3D battles across both land and sea. The strategic campaign map serves as the heart of your operations, facilitating in-depth kingdom management and turn-based planning. A sophisticated new AI, drawing inspiration from Sun Tzu's timeless "The Art of War," delivers a challenging yet approachable gaming experience.

**Pillars of Strategy**

*   **Dominate:** Command formidable samurai armies and impressive naval fleets across Japan in breathtaking real-time combat.
*   **Develop:** Cultivate your domain on the turn-based campaign map. Accumulate resources, recruit forces, and extend your dominion through economic, political, and military strength.
*   **Strategize:** Implement the strategic wisdom of Sun Tzu. Employ tactics such as fire and siege warfare, espionage, and assassination to adapt to the evolving battlefield and political climate.
*   **Engage Online:** Test your mettle in a two-player campaign or participate in grand online battles with up to eight players in unique campaign scenarios.

**Innovations in SHOGUN 2**

*   **Character Progression:** Generals and Agents develop new abilities and gain experience, enriching character advancement.
*   **Complex Sieges:** The conquest of enemy fortifications is made more demanding through multi-stage siege mechanics.
*   **Elite Units:** Potent new Hero units bolster troop morale and inflict heavy damage on adversaries.
*   **Dynamic Campaign Map:** A novel rotating 3D campaign map provides a more fluid and comprehensive strategic perspective.

Name: Battlefield 3™
Description:
Ramp up the intensity in Battlefield™ 3 and enjoy total freedom to fight the way you want. Explore 29 massive multiplayer maps and use loads of vehicles, weapons, and gadgets to help you turn up the heat. Plus, every second of battle gets you closer to unlocking tons of extras and moving up in the Ranks. So get in the action. Key features Play to your strengths — The 4 player classes — Assault, Engineer, Support, and Recon — each have specialties, and working together is key to victory. Go anywhere, do anything — Commandeer any vehicle you come across, from tanks and buggies to helicopters and jets. Even slam your F/A-18E Super Hornet directly into an enemy combatant! Experience total mayhem — Enjoy 29 multiplayer maps. Massive destructible environments? Yup. Wide open spaces for crazy vehicular combat? Roger that. Grab loads of unlockables — Every battle gains you Ranks, Ribbons, Medals, and more, enhancing your prowess. Stick with your helicopter, master your piloting, and unlock IR flares to ward off oncoming missiles or opt to increase your stealth. Battlefield 3 Premium Edition includes: The game and all 5 expansion packs — The Premium Edition includes 20 new maps, 20 new weapons, 10 new vehicles, and 4 new game modes. Multiplayer Head Start kit — Instantly unlock 15 advanced weapons, plus gadgets, vehicle upgrades, and more. Powerful new features — Reset your stats for a fresh start, get priority in server queues, and score new decals for Platoon emblems. Plus, join unique events like Double XP weekends and take part in exclusive competitions. Exclusive in-game items — Get unique in-game items not available anywhere else, including new soldier and weapon camos, the ACB-90 knife, and a unique set of dog tags.

Prepare for Dwarf Fortress, a game offering the deepest, most intricate simulation of a world ever created. This isn't just generated geometry; it's a fully simulated world where civilizations rise and fall, complete with unique personalities, creatures, and cultures. Expect infinite hours of gameplay, now enhanced with beautiful pixel graphics!

Learn the basics with in-game tutorials. Dwarf Fortress is a lifetime "living" project, continuously created and updated since 2003 with no end in sight. Generate your unique world and manage a bustling colony of dwarves as they mine towards their eventual demise. This new, endless hobby is just for you! The legendary Dwarf Fortress is now on Steam. Build a fortress and strive to help your dwarves survive threats like starvation, dragons, and madness.

In this complex construction, management, and roguelike simulation, each generated world presents a unique challenge. These challenges stem from dwarves with their own simulated personalities or the presence of aquifers. Observe how your civilization declines and learn for next time, knowing that something else will inevitably go wrong. The combat model is incredibly detailed, featuring skills, body parts, material properties, aimed attacks, wrestling, pain, nausea, various poison effects, and much more.

The depth of the generation is difficult to fully convey. Hundreds of animals and monsters, many randomly created for each world, populate the game. You'll also find generated poetry, musical forms, instruments, and dances for your dwarves to practice and perform. A dynamic weather model tracks wind, humidity, and air masses to create fronts, clouds, storms, and blizzards. Over two hundred rock and mineral types can appear in their proper geological environments. Remember the game's mantra: "Losing is fun!"

Nothing substantial has changed under the hood; it's still the classic Dwarf Fortress, but with graphics and music included by default. As the developers, Tarn "Toady One" and Zach "Threetoe" Adams, stated, "A few bells and whistles won’t change that." You might be familiar with the tile set mod packs from Michał “Mayday” Madej and Jacob 'Ironhand' Bowman. Their combined efforts have led to an all-new tileset featuring brand new pixel art by artists Carolyn Jong and Neoriceisgood. The Dwarf Fortress Steam edition boasts a 15-track soundtrack by Dabu, Simon Swerwer, and Águeda Macias, including tracks in the Dwarvish language.

It's never been easier to start playing! The new player experience has been improved with tutorials to guide you through building your first fort and keeping your dwarves happy. Command your dwarves as they search for wealth in their generated mountains. Your dwarves will need a steady supply of food and beer, but they'll also require your guidance to survive attacks from hostile civilizations, the wilderness, or even the undead.

Key gameplay elements include:
*   Crafting treasures and furniture from various materials.
*   Establishing a barony and supporting increasingly demanding nobility.
*   Reading your dwarves’ thoughts to keep them happy.
*   Building floodgates to divert water for farming or prevent magma mishaps.
*   Constructing structures and observing your dwarves discover and build their culture, including taverns, libraries, temples, and developing skills in pottery, animal training, bookbinding, and more.

Dwarf Fortress served as the original inspiration for games like RimWorld, Prison Architect, and Minecraft. It was also one of the first video games acquired by the Museum of Modern Art in New York. Updated for over 16 years by the Adams brothers, their goal is to simulate all of existence. Bay 12 Games estimates they are currently only about 44% done with this monumental task.

**Sid Meier's Civilization III Complete: Your All-in-One Strategy Experience**

Dive into the complete world of Sid Meier's Civilization III with this ultimate package. Sid Meier's Civilization III: Complete brings together the beloved base game, known for its addictive exploration and empire-building, with its enhanced multiplayer expansion, Sid Meier's Civilization III: Play the World.

This comprehensive edition also includes all the exciting new content from Sid Meier's Civilization III: Conquests. You'll discover:

*   **New Civilizations:** Lead a variety of unique cultures to victory.
*   **Engaging Scenarios:** Experience diverse historical and fictional challenges.
*   **Innovative Features:** Explore fresh gameplay mechanics and strategic options.

Sid Meier's Civilization III: Complete offers expanded ways to play, more strategic depth, and diverse paths to achieve victory, all conveniently packaged together.

*Please note: Online multiplayer functionality was suspended on May 31st, 2014. Local Area Network (LAN) mode remains supported.*

Factorio is a captivating game centered on the intricate art of building and managing vast industrial complexes. Players embark on a journey of resource extraction, technological advancement, infrastructure development, production automation, and defense against hostile alien forces. Initially, you'll be manually harvesting trees, mining ores, and crafting essential components like mechanical arms and transport belts. However, your operations will rapidly evolve into an industrial behemoth, complete with expansive solar farms, sophisticated oil refining and cracking processes, and the deployment of construction and logistic robots to meet your ever-growing resource demands.

This intense exploitation of the planet's natural wealth inevitably draws the ire of the indigenous inhabitants, necessitating a robust defense strategy for your burgeoning machine empire. The game also offers a robust cooperative multiplayer experience, allowing players to join forces, construct colossal factories, and efficiently delegate tasks among friends. Furthermore, Factorio's comprehensive modding support empowers creators worldwide to introduce a wealth of innovative features, ranging from minor enhancements and helpful utilities to complete game overhauls.

While the primary gameplay unfolds in the freeplay scenario, a variety of engaging challenges are presented through distinct Scenarios. Should these not capture your interest, the intuitive in-game Map Editor provides the tools to craft your own unique environments, meticulously placing entities, enemies, and terrain, and even incorporating custom scripts for novel gameplay experiences.

Regarding pricing, the developers have stated, "We don't have any plans to take part in a sale or to reduce the price for the foreseeable future."

Here's what players and notable figures have to say about Factorio:

"No other game in the history of gaming handles the logistics side of management simulator so perfectly." - Reddit

"I see conveyor belts when I close my eyes. I may have been binging Factorio lately." - Notch, Mojang

"Factorio is a super duper awesome game where we use conveyor belts to shoot aliens." - Zisteau, Youtube

Name: Rise of Nations: Extended Edition
Description:
Rise of Nations Rise of Nations is a real-time strategy game that spans all history. Start with a single city in the Ancient Age; gather resources; build an infrastructure; research technologies; construct Wonders of the World such as the Pyramids and the Eiffel Tower; and expand your military might across the world, conquering hostile nations with bombers, battleships, and tanks—all over your lunch hour! In Rise of Nations there are: 18 Nations—each with special abilities and unique military units. Over a hundred military units operating on the ground, sea, and air— from Hoplites to Frigates to Helicopters. Over two dozen buildings with upgrades and technologies that will take your nation from a small City to an Information Age society. 14 Wonders of the World—the Terra Cotta Army, the Taj Mahal, the Eiffel Tower. Each gives your nation special bonuses. More than a dozen map types, ranging from the Amazon Rainforest to the Himalayas to the Nile Delta. Conquer the World campaign—a linked series of dozens of scenarios. The Extended Edition includes: Rise of Nations Rise of Nations: Thrones and Patriots New in the Extended Edition: Improved Visuals Improved water Improved textures Full-screen anti-aliasing Full Steamworks Integration Multiplayer with ranked matches (ELO) Achievements Trading Cards Cloud saves

Name: Sid Meier’s Civilization® VI
Description:
Civilization VI offers new ways to engage with your world: cities now physically expand across the map, active research in technology and culture unlocks new potential, and competing leaders will pursue their own agendas based on their historical traits as you race for one of five ways to achieve victory in the game. ‎‏‏‎‎‏‏‎ See the marvels of your empire spread across the map like never before. Build powerful specialty districts to specialize and boost city output. Customize each city to suit your needs or take advantage of the local terrain. Boost your civilization’s progress through history to unlock powerful bonuses before anyone else! To advance more quickly, use your units to actively explore, develop your environment, and discover new cultures. As the game progresses, so do your diplomatic relationships. From primitive first interactions where conflict is a fact of life, to late game alliances and negotiations.

In Mini Motorways, you take control of a city's traffic flow. This simulation game, from the creators of Mini Metro, challenges you to design and build road networks for a growing urban landscape. Your goal is to create a thriving metropolis by strategically placing roads, one by one. As the city expands, you'll need to adapt your designs to ensure traffic keeps moving smoothly. Careful management of upgrades, such as highways and roundabouts, is crucial to meet the increasing demands of your road network. The game asks: "How long can you keep the cities of the world moving?"

Mini Motorways offers a unique experience with its dynamic cities that evolve throughout each playthrough. The game features stunning maps inspired by real-world locations. Players can select from a range of upgrades to manage their expanding road systems. Customization options include various color palettes, with accessibility features like colorblind and night modes. The game also boasts a responsive soundtrack by Disasterpeace that dynamically adjusts to the city's growth. As you progress, you can unlock new maps and achievements, and even export GIFs of your city layouts to share with friends. For those seeking a competitive edge, Daily and Weekly Challenges allow you to test your skills against other players.

Name: RimWorld
Description:
RimWorld is a sci-fi colony sim driven by an intelligent AI storyteller. Inspired by Dwarf Fortress, Firefly, and Dune. You begin with three survivors of a shipwreck on a distant world. Manage colonists' moods, needs, wounds, illnesses and addictions. Build in the forest, desert, jungle, tundra, and more. Watch colonists develop and break relationships with family members, lovers, and spouses. Replace wounded limbs and organs with prosthetics, bionics, or biological parts harvested from others. Fight pirates, tribes, mad animals, giant insects and ancient killing machines. Craft structures, weapons, and apparel from metal, wood, stone, cloth, and futuristic materials. Tame and train cute pets, productive farm animals, and deadly attack beasts. Trade with passing ships and caravans. Form caravans to complete quests, trade, attack other factions, or migrate your whole colony. Dig through snow, weather storms, and fight fires. Capture refugees or prisoners and turn them to your side or sell them into slavery. Discover a new generated world each time you play. Explore hundreds of wild and interesting mods on the Steam Workshop. Learn to play easily with the help of an intelligent and unobtrusive AI tutor. RimWorld is a story generator. It’s designed to co-author tragic, twisted, and triumphant stories about imprisoned pirates, desperate colonists, starvation and survival. It works by controlling the “random” events that the world throws at you. Every thunderstorm, pirate raid, and traveling salesman is a card dealt into your story by the AI Storyteller . There are several storytellers to choose from. Randy Random does crazy stuff, Cassandra Classic goes for rising tension, and Phoebe Chillax likes to relax. Your colonists are not professional settlers – they’re crash-landed survivors from a passenger liner destroyed in orbit. You can end up with a nobleman, an accountant, and a housewife. You’ll acquire more colonists by capturing them in combat and turning them to your side, buying them from slave traders, or taking in refugees. So your colony will always be a motley crew. Each person’s background is tracked and affects how they play. A nobleman will be great at social skills (recruiting prisoners, negotiating trade prices), but refuse to do physical work. A farm oaf knows how to grow food by long experience, but cannot do research. A nerdy scientist is great at research, but cannot do social tasks at all. A genetically engineered assassin can do nothing but kill – but he does that very well. Colonists develop - and destroy - relationships. Each has an opinion of the others, which determines whether they'll become lovers, marry, cheat, or fight. Perhaps your two best colonists are happily married - until one of them falls for the dashing surgeon who saved her from a gunshot wound. The game generates a whole planet from pole to equator. You choose whether to land your crash pods in a cold northern tundra, a parched desert flat, a temperate forest, or a steaming equatorial jungle. Different areas have different animals, plants, diseases, temperatures, rainfall, mineral resources, and terrain. These challenges of surviving in a disease-infested, choking jungle are very different from those in a parched desert wasteland or a frozen tundra with a two-month growing season. Travel across the planet. You're not stuck in one place. You can form a caravan of people, animals, and prisoners. Rescue kidnapped former allies from pirate outposts, attend peace talks, trade with other factions, attack enemy colonies, and complete other quests. You can even pack up your entire colony and move to a new place. You can use rocket-powered transport pods to travel faster. You can tame and train animals. Lovable pets will cheer up sad colonists. Farm animals can be worked, milked, and sheared. Attack beasts can be released upon your enemies. There are many animals - cats, labrador retrievers, grizzly bears, camels, cougars, chinchillas, chickens, and exotic alien-like lifeforms. People in RimWorld constantly observe their situation and surroundings in order to decide how to feel at any given moment. They respond to hunger and fatigue, witnessing death, disrespectfully unburied corpses, being wounded, being left in darkness, getting packed into cramped environments, sleeping outside or in the same room as others, and many other situations. If they're too stressed, they might lash out or break down. Wounds, infections, prosthetics, and chronic conditions are tracked on each body part and affect characters' capacities. Eye injuries make it hard to shoot or do surgery. Wounded legs slow people down. Hands, brain, mouth, heart, liver, kidneys, stomach, feet, fingers, toes, and more can all be wounded, diseased, or missing, and all have logical in-game effects. And other species have their own body layouts - take off a deer's leg, and it can still hobble on the other three. Take off a rhino's horn, and it's much less dangerous. You can repair body parts with prosthetics ranging from primitive to transcendent. A peg leg will get Joe Colonist walking after an unfortunate incident with a rhinoceros, but he'll still be quite slow.
