Buy an expensive bionic leg from a trader the next year, and Joe becomes a superhuman runner. You can even extract, sell, buy, and transplant internal organs. And there's much more than that! The game is easy to mod and has an active mod community . Read more at . (All non-English translations are made by fans.)

## Startopia: Rebuild a Galactic Civilization

The galaxy is in ruins. Once vibrant space stations and planets now stand as empty relics of a past apocalypse. But a new era of hope is dawning. You are called to lead the rebuilding effort, restoring the network of space stations to meet the standards of various alien races. By attracting these diverse species, you'll harness their unique expertise and drive forward new technological advancements. This journey promises a humorous and cunning struggle, filled with daring adventures.

### A Living, Breathing Alien Society

Startopia features a fully realized alien society. Experience the complexities of interspecies relationships, from fierce rivalries and budding friendships to the realities of crime and punishment. Leisure and entertainment are vital, as is a robust and functioning economy.

### Innovative Gameplay Mechanics

Explore the unique 'Torus' play area, offering a perspective never before seen in a game. Each space station is divided into 16 habitable subsections spread across three decks. The bio-deck allows for editable landscapes and manageable ecosystems, giving you complete control over terraforming.

### Multiplayer and Varied Challenges

Connect with up to three other stationmasters in multiplayer mode. Startopia offers a range of gameplay experiences, from a simple sandbox mode for relaxed exploration to detailed station micromanagement for those who crave intricate control.

Name: Cities: Skylines
Description:
Cities: Skylines is a modern take on the classic city simulation. The game introduces new game play elements to realize the thrill and hardships of creating and maintaining a real city whilst expanding on some well-established tropes of the city building experience. You’re only limited by your imagination, so take control and reach for the sky! Multi-tiered and challenging simulation Constructing your city from the ground up is easy to learn, but hard to master. Playing as the mayor of your city you’ll be faced with balancing essential requirements such as education, water electricity, police, fire fighting, healthcare and much more along with your citys real economy system. Citizens within your city react fluidly, with gravitas and with an air of authenticity to a multitude of game play scenarios. Extensive local traffic simulation Colossal Order's extensive experience developing the Cities in Motion series is fully utilized in a fully fleshed out and well-crafted local traffic simulation. Districts and Policies Be more than just an administrator from city hall. Designating parts of your city as a district results in the application of policies which results in you rising to the status of Mayor for your own city. Utilize the Day and Night Cycle The city changes during the hours of the day and affects citizen schedules. Traffic is visibly slower at night and some zoned areas do not work with full efficiency. Cities: Skylines will put you in control of managing the different aspects of the day and night cycles. Extensive modding support Build or improve on existing maps and structures. You can then import your creations into the game, share them as well as download the creations of other city builders on the Steam workshop.

Name: Age of Empires II: Definitive Edition
Description:
Age of Empires II: Definitive Edition celebrates the 20th anniversary of one of the most popular strategy games ever, now with stunning 4K Ultra HD graphics, and a fully remastered soundtrack. Age of Empires II: DE features “The Last Khans” with 3 new campaigns and 4 new Civilizations. Frequent updates include events, additional content, new game modes, and enhanced features with the recent addition of Co-Op mode! Explore all the original Campaigns and the best-selling expansions like never before. With over 200 hours of gameplay and 1,000 years of human history, improved experiences await. Head online to challenge other players in your quest for world domination with 35 different Civilizations. You can also experience new Civilizations and Campaigns with the Lords of the West DLC! Recent updates include a Battle Royale game mode, ongoing support for the Scenario Editor, Quick Play for easy social games, enhancements to the game UI, and more! Choose your path to greatness with an eye-catching and engaging remaster to one of the most beloved strategy games of all time.

Name: Dead Cells
Description:
Roguelite? Metroidvania? Roguevania! You grew up with the roguelikes, witnessed the rise of the roguelites and even the birth of the roguelite-lites? We'd now like to present for your consideration our RogueVania , the illegitimate child of a modern Roguelite ( Rogue Legacy, Binding of Isaac, Enter the Gungeon, Spelunky, etc.) and an old-school MetroidVania ( Castlevania: SotN and its ilk). Features: RogueVania : The progressive exploration of an interconnected world, with the replayability of a rogue-lite and the adrenaline pumping threat of permadeath. 2D Souls-lite Action : Tough but fair combat, more than fifty weapons and spells with unique gameplay, and of course, the emergency panic roll to get you out of trouble. Nonlinear progression : Sewers, Ossuary or Ramparts? Once unlocked, special permanent abilities allow you to access new paths to reach your objective. Opt for the path that suits your current build, your play style or just your mood. Exploration : Secret rooms, hidden passages, charming landscapes. Take a moment to stroll the towers and breath in that fresh sea mist infused air... Interconnected levels and progressive unlocking of access to the island provides you with a real incentive to explore your surroundings. Add in a degree of evolution for your character and permanent weapon upgrades and you can see where Dead Cells borrows from the long line of MetroidVanias that precede it. At the end of the day though, it’s YOUR skills as a player that matter most! Roguelites are about constantly getting better, until what was an insurmountable obstacle becomes a walk in the park. Unforgiving combat wed to the absence of any kind of safety net makes for an adrenaline pumping ride each and every run and unrivaled replayability. Dead Cells left Early Access on August 7th 2018 and comes with: 13 Levels - Each one with its own atmosphere , foes and secrets to discover. 4 Bosses - Made by the most sadistic of the devs , raised on the salt of the testers. 90 or so weapons and skills - Spears, swords, bows, freeze blast, etc. 4 special powers, unlocking new areas and paths (metroidvania gear lock items). 1 epic responsive, fluid and fun to play combat system. 1 Daily Run Mode Complete with leaderboards for lording it over your mates. Hours of fun (depending on your skill, anything from 10 to 30 hours or more). A few rage-quits, Ok a lot of rage quits… But you’ll git gud… Eventually.

Name: Rogue Legacy 2
Description:
Rogue Legacy is back! But now it's got a 2 on the end of it! Rogue Legacy 2 is a genealogical rogue-LITE. That means it has all the trappings of a typical rogue-like (randomized runs, changing characters, and more), but with persistent upgrades, and persistent dead heirs. In this game, your legacy defines you. Spend your parents’ inheritance and grow the family manor to give your children a better fighting chance. Each child is unique, with their own traits and abilities. Your daughter could be a Ranger. She could also be vegan. It’s a new experience every time. Rogue Legacy 2 also lets you play how you want to. Go hard and fast, and dive deeper into the depths of a randomly-generated world. Or take it slow and steady and build your character up until you’re ready for greater challenges. Every Adventure is Unique New monsters, new traps, and new layouts await you every time you enter the Kingdom. This is a world where improvisation, and not memorization is the key to success. Wildly New Classes No two classes play the same. Hide atop Ivy Canopies as the Ranger, and rain poisoned arrows down onto your foes. Take to the skies as a Dragon Lancer and fly across the skies striking foes at massive speeds. Or sing and dance through your enemies, as the joyous bard, leaving only a trail of bodies behind you. Rogue Legacy 2 supports 15 new classes, with 15 distinct styles of play. Brand New Style We’re taking a whole new artistic approach to Rogue Legacy 2. The sequel features 2.5D stylings, with 3D characters against hand-drawn backdrops. The art uses heavy shading and all animations are done using stepping techniques to keep the familiar RL look and feel. Revamped Biome Generation We went all-out with biome generation to make each area in RL2 feel completely new. Each biome adopts different “build strategies” to create completely unique yet-still-randomly-generated regions. True Metroidvania To really push the metroidvania flair, RL2 introduces heirlooms: special items that permanently give your heroes new abilities that fully reveal the world’s secrets. These are not basic lock-in-key abilities, but powers that fundamentally change how you play. And heirlooms are not simply handed to you. You must prove your worth, provided you can find them. Traits 2.0 Though fun the first time, the traits in RL1 often wore their welcome later in the game. We’ve now added gold modifiers to entice players to take on new challenges. The more debilitating the trait is (in-game), the bigger the reward. This makes choosing your heirs a meaningful decision every time. Relics and Resolve One of the most exciting new features to Rogue Legacy 2 is the ability to pick up Relics, which are unique items that change how your run is played. Gain stat modifiers, complete special challenges, and even gain brand new abilities as you traverse the kingdom. But be careful, the more Relics you obtain the more your resolve is shaken, and all Relics are lost if your hero perishes. Improved Accessibility We’ve taken accessibility to the next level with the introduction of House Rules. Toggle contact damage, tweak global damage and health, and even give yourself flight for difficult platform sections. You have complete control over how you want to play the game. We’ve also introduced new mechanics such as Off-shore Banking to give struggling players more ways to succeed. A Rich Narrative Not only is the lore to the world of Rogue Legacy greatly expanded in the sequel, but it runs deep. New lore awaits you all the multiple NG’s in. Beating the game once is only the beginning. Learn about the inevitable collapse of a once thriving kingdom, and discover the dark secrets of the ones responsible. And connect and build relationships with the characters you meet along the way. New Game+ for Days Your journey has only begun after beating the final boss in RL2. There is a ton more to explore and discover on multiple playthroughs. You must choose how the game gets harder, from unique biome hazards, to special boss fights. The experience keeps changing for near infinite replayability. More of Everything Of course we’re also adding more of everything people loved from the original Rogue Legacy. More traits, more spells, more classes, more biomes, more enemies, more equipment, more rooms, more story. More secrets ... Just more everything. Clownanthropy. Holy smokes! Punching clowns! AND THERE'S A WHOLE LOT MORE. This only scratches the surface of what Rogue Legacy 2 has to offer. Scar Challenges, Fairy Rooms, the Curio Shoppe, the list goes on, but reading is for nerds. Go out and discover the world of Rogue Legacy 2 for yourself! /

Rogue Legacy is a unique rogue-lite game where heroism is passed down through generations. When your character dies, their child inherits the throne. Each heir has different traits that change how you play. These traits can be anything from colorblindness to vertigo or dwarfism. The game shows that you don't need to be perfect to win, but skill is very helpful due to its tough difficulty.

Gold earned in each run is used to upgrade your manor. This gives your next heir better abilities to fight the game's evil. While the trailer shows the game's basics, here's a closer look at its main features:

*   **Randomly Generated Castles:** Each new life explores a unique castle, making every playthrough fresh and unpredictable.
*   **Rogue-lite Growth:** Dying is part of the game. It helps your family line grow stronger over time.
*   **Unique Traits:** Many different traits add special challenges and twists to each game. For example, you might play as a dyslexic character.
*   **Many Classes:** Choose from over eight classes, each with unique skills. This lets you change your playstyle.
*   **Diverse Enemies:** Fight over sixty enemy types, including many variations. This keeps you on your toes.
*   **Big Skill Tree:** A large, upgradeable skill tree lets you develop your character significantly. Loot collected helps improve the manor and gives heirs an edge.
*   **Special Shops:** Visit shops like the Blacksmith and Enchantress to get better weapons, armor, and new abilities like flight or air jumping.
*   **Secret Content:** Discover many secrets and easter eggs hidden throughout the game world.
*   **Controller Support:** Rogue Legacy works perfectly with a controller and is Big Picture ready for easy setup.

Name: ScourgeBringer
Description:
From the developers of NeuroVoider, ScourgeBringer is a fast-paced free-moving roguelite platformer. Set in a post-apocalyptic world where a mysterious entity wreaked havoc on all humanity, ScourgeBringer puts you in the shoes of the deadliest warrior of her clan: Kyhra. Help her to explore the unknown and slash her way through ancient machines guarding the seal of her past, and maybe the redemption of humanity. Dive into fast-paced rogue-platforming gameplay described by Eurogamer as 'Dead Cells meets Celeste' Slash and shoot your way smoothly with super fluid platforming controls Sharpen your skills with a frantic combat system focused on attacks only Dash forward to the otherworldly adaptive sounds of Joonas Turner (Nuclear Throne, Downwell, Broforce...) Defy hordes of unspeakable enemies and giant bosses holding the secrets of the Scourge Explore the infinite depths of an ever-changing dungeon Uncover mysteries and find mementos of previous explorers to unlock reality defining secrets ScourgeBringer is being made with the help of the community ! You can follow its development through our weekly newsletter, or join our Discord.

Embark on a perilous pilgrimage in **Dark Devotion**, a game that tests your Templar faith against the mysteries of a fallen temple. Join the Hibernian Workshop community on Discord and delve into a world where devotion means facing the deepest darkness for answers that challenge your very existence.

In **Dark Devotion**, your bravery and piety are measured by your willingness to make any sacrifice in praise of your God. The game unfolds a richly detailed, immersive narrative, presenting a somber tale of your Templar religion's irresistible calling. Each encounter pushes your fortitude and conviction as you navigate a cursed pilgrimage across four unique, intricately designed worlds. Wield dozens of weapons and uncover the Temple's secrets, all while battling dark enemies and devious bosses determined to destroy your soul.

As you explore, you'll discover an array of weapons, armors, and relics to enhance your character. Each item boasts unique attributes and statistics, further customizable with mystical runes. "It is essential that you maximize your strengths and adapt your inventory to the enemy you’re facing," the developers advise. "Choose wisely..."

**Dark Devotion** is a story of perseverance, dedication, and secrets. Every chest and item encountered reveals another piece of the narrative—be it a letter, weapon, or clue—aiding your quest. These secrets may be found in the shadows or in the dead hands of fallen characters.

Within the Temple, Faith is your primary recourse against the heathen hordes. Defeating them grants Faith, unlocking secret paths and special chests. However, use this resource sparingly, as "nothing lasts forever." Your survival hinges on employing the right item at the right time to heal wounds or dispel curses. Some items are looted, while others are hidden, requiring wise use. "The eye of your God is ever-watchful," and acts of bravery may earn blessings. Conversely, the Temple harbors despair and sickness, preying on those who lack courage. Learn its ways quickly, or suffer.

Salvation is fleeting, and each world offers multiple interconnected paths, none of which can be retraced. Completing your quest demands shrewd interpretation of the Temple's secrets. Getting lost might even bring favor, depending on what you uncover. The Temple may reveal a hidden altar for saving your story if honored appropriately, or it may not.

**Dark Devotion** features:
*   Dynamic and intense combat
*   Dozens of weapons, armor, and items for diverse fighting styles
*   An intricate system of blessings, curses, and illnesses
*   Challenging boss battles
*   A rich, complex storyline
*   Dark, brooding environments

**Abyss Odyssey: A Deep Dive into Procedural Combat and Possession**

Prepare for a challenging descent into **Abyss Odyssey**, a side-scrolling action-adventure game from Chilean developer ACE Team. This title plunges players into procedurally generated levels, offering a unique blend of intricate combat and a compelling possession mechanic. You'll initially command three distinct warriors: the bold Katrien, the tortured Ghost Monk, and the ethereal Pincoya. Mastering their unique abilities is key to performing devastating combos and chain attacks against the horrors that await at the pit's bottom.

The true depth of **Abyss Odyssey** unfolds with its innovative possession system. By taking control of your enemies, you can harness their skills and combat prowess, effectively expanding your arsenal with their unique fighting styles. According to ACE Team, each foe encountered is as technically intricate as the main warriors, demanding players utilize every available option to conquer the infinite abyss. This procedural generation ensures that side-scrolling levels are never the same twice, offering a fresh experience with each playthrough. As you descend, you'll face a constant stream of monsters, discover vital merchants, and unearth hidden treasures. The game's combat system is heavily influenced by the fighting game genre, with each playable character boasting an expansive array of basic and special attacks, complemented by universal mobility options and advanced techniques. Players can hone their skills and invent new combos in a dedicated Training room, selecting any character they've unlocked, including enemies, to perfect their strategy. The procedurally generated levels guarantee that no two delves into the Abyss are alike, with randomized room layouts, enemy spawns, equipment, and items each time. Players can unlock up to three hero characters to level up, acquire new skills, and collect equipment, customizing their heroes to match their play style. Skill points earned through leveling can upgrade each hero's unique abilities, and a wide range of weapons and accessories grant new powers. A standout feature is the ability to play as any character encountered, including bosses, by using an "ultra attack" to steal enemy souls and assume their form. ACE Team states there are over 30 unique enemies to capture, each offering entirely new move sets and character styles. The game also fosters community engagement, with players working together to defeat the final boss. Collective player achievements unlock new in-game content, such as fresh enemies. Visually, **Abyss Odyssey** features beautiful graphics inspired by Art Nouveau, with a story deeply rooted in Chilean culture and folklore, set in late 19th-century Santiago. Players can embark on their campaign solo or with a friend through online or local cooperative multiplayer, with a second player able to join or leave at any time. Additionally, a bonus versus mode allows up to four players to compete in free-for-all or team-based battles, utilizing any unlocked character for a roster of dozens of playable fighters.

Name: A Valley Without Wind
Description:
A 2D sidescroller without a linear path. An action game with tactical combat and citybuilding. An adventure game that lets you free-roam a vast, procedurally-generated world. A Valley Without Wind defies genre stereotypes. Unlike other procedurally-generated games, you also get a logical progression in difficulty, plus helpful tips and checklists to guide your travels (should you need them). Choose for yourself how to prepare to face the vastly stronger Overlord. Complete a variety of missions to earn new spells, and/or roam the wilds to uncover secret missions and stashes of magical crafting loot. Customize your characters with unique combinations of enchants and spells that change how you move, jump, and fight. Or rescue people and bring them back to your settlement so that they can then be sent on dispatch missions; you don't have to carry the burden of your fledgling civilization alone! You choose how to play, and the world adapts around you. Key features: Travel alone or with friends across an ever-expanding world of dangerous creatures, powerful magic, high technology, and mysteries. You have choice. The world of Environ is a procedurally generated sandbox, and lets you go anywhere you see -- including right into the overlord's keep at any time. (Good luck with that.) Environ is endless. When you save one continent from an overlord, a larger and more complex continent appears. The game adapts to how you play: as you demonstrate your proficiency, monsters and missions upgrade accordingly. Killed 100 bats? Okay, time for... bats on fire! Crazy amounts of character customization. Combine a multitude of spells, enchants, and equipment to create specialized character builds. Play as a long line of brave adventurers. It's not a question of IF your character is going to die, but WHEN. Any character that dies is permanently lost, but you keep all your inventory, enchants, and general progress in the game. Become a community leader. Rescue NPCs for your settlement, construct buildings for them, and improve their skill and mood -- then send them on dispatch missions to help you in return! Be a clever problem-solver. Challenges have more than one solution, each with its own pros and cons. You get to figure things out rather than just jumping through a set of hoops. Difficulty levels give exactly the challenge you want, from casual to hardcore on platforming, combat, and citybuilding independently. All owners of Valley 1 also get the much-improved sequel absolutely free! Valley 2 is out now, and features a different style of more-focused, non-sandbox play. Both games are quite distinct from one another, but you don’t have to choose between them -- both are yours for the price of one!

Name: Aura of Worlds
Description:
Aura of worlds is a creative tactics rogue-lite platformer. Explore multiple worlds where you must utilise your creative abilities to twist adversity to your advantage. You'll need planning, wits and reflexes to make a way through these ever-changing death labyrinths. Escape flooding passages, outrun toxic pollen, face off against gargantuan bosses that have made entire mazes their home. Do you play defensively with the spear and energy shield, or swing into the fray with a boomerang and grapple hook? Do you scour the levels for potions and runes; or do you dive headfirst into the chaos? Adversity as your ally F.A.Q. Let's be transparent... 'What Gamepads are compatible?” Currently Xbox and Xbox 360 controllers though other Xinput controllers may work. NOTE: Not natively compatible with Playstation controllers yet. Keyboard and mouse works just as well. Is there much of a story in game? There's minimal story exposition as of the current build. We do plan on integrating a loose narrative as development progresses though... “I'm running the game on an old computer, how can I make it run faster?” Please see the following forum thread on optimization : “Where can I report bugs/issues/suggestions?” Please look to the forums, we check messages there each day. Feedback is welcome and there are some excellent community members who are willing to help to. 'Anything else to be aware of?' Default gamepad controls are slightly different from convention, due to optional 360 degree aiming with right analogue stick. Though buttons can be rebound to suit. It’s designed to be challenging, and death may be encountered frequently during your initial runs. Though there is no stunlocking/one-hit demises on the player. Being able to multi-task between abilities will greatly increase survivability. **The game has a steeper learning curve than the average platformer, particularly in the first 25 minutes Every challenge has multiple solutions For example, if there is a chest on the other side of a lava pit; do you...? Grapple across Bend time and bounce off enemies Use a boomerang to fetch the item Blow up the pit with a grenade; setting everything nearby alight! ... More Features Over 80 unique enemies and traps 12+ randomized level themes. Such include tidal corridors filled with mines, rising lava, caverns lined with toxic and carnivorous plants... 4+ Primary world types (grotto, gardens, temple, cold crust caverns) each with their own traps, enemies, boss and special theme layouts. A plethora of creative abilities ranging from parkour to cloaking to warping time itself! Every object has multiple uses E.g. you can grab that lantern from the ceiling, and carry it around to use as a portable light source or improvised flaming molotov... Hand crafted pixel art and animations Regular updates A unique musical score. Customize character skin and clothing colors. Permanent progression: allows you to unlock world shortcuts, new items, character backgrounds... So much more... Whilst functionally complete; the game is under active development and more content is being added. This project was Greenlit by the community back in 2016.

Name: GetsuFumaDen: Undying Moon
Description:
GetsuFumaDen: Undying Moon combines intense roguelike hack-and-slash action with a stunning dark fantasy world, brought to life through the stroke of traditional Japanese art. As the chosen leader and guardian of the land of the living, wield the otherworldy arsenal and powers of the Getsu clan as you overcome multiple 'Death' and descend deeper into the depths of Hell to eradicate the source of the cataclysm. Distinct Ukiyo-e Inspired Visuals Inspired by the Japanese ukiyo-e art style, the world of GetsuFumaDen is as beautiful as it is deadly. Vibrant, dynamic 2D animations bring the artistic world to life. Brutal, Larger than Life Boss Battles A reanimated demon lord, a colossal centipede, and a five-headed hydra are only some of the myriad massive and fearsome monsters and yokai standing in your way. Defend yourself against their relentless onslaught and emerge victorious to descend deeper into the depths of Hell. Dynamic, Weapon-Based Combat. Master the rythmn of intense sword fighting action: pacing and timings of movements are inspired by Japanese martial arts. Utilize the unique special moves of a wide range of weapon types including katanas, battle umbrellas and spears to outsmart your enemies. Authentic Roguelike Action While death is not the end, the world of Hell lives and breathes, presenting new map layouts and challenges to overcome with each attempt. Permanent upgrades, customizable weapons, and variable level progression provide new opportunities and challenges for every run. Immersive Weapon Enhancement System The crafting process gives you complete control over the ability to collect, enhance and unlock abilities of main and sub weapons. Unlock enhancements to your favorite weapons at each run, and get back in the action! Soul Devour Power-Up System Collect souls during each descent to power up in real time. Utilize the unique power-up system to dynamically and strategically select enhancements. The Digital Deluxe Edition includes the following bonus contents. ・Bonus game - 1987 FC version 'GetsuFumaDen': discover the original game with an added English Menu (in-game text in Japanese only), the original Japanese guidebook and Quick Save features ・Digital Artbook: browse through 29 pages packed with key art, stage art, character designs and lore from the original world of GetsuFumaDen ・Mini-OST: listen to 15 tracks from the game's stunning atmospheric soundtrack

**Dungeon Warriors: A Roguelike Shooter with Evolving Gameplay**

"Dungeon Warriors" is a dynamic barrage shooter where your character grows as you explore its randomly generated levels. You will collect loot, uncover secrets, and battle a variety of enemies. Interacting with characters like businessmen and shopkeepers can also yield powerful items to aid your quest. The primary objective is to become stronger and survive.

We regret to announce that "Dungeon Warriors" has been delayed. This decision allows for further changes and improvements to the game. We anticipate a launch by September and sincerely appreciate your enthusiasm and support.

The game is still under development. Here are some of the features you can expect:

**Enemies in the Game:**

*   **Red Zombie:** This enemy moves erratically and increases its speed upon spotting you.
*   **Green Zombie:** Similar to the Red Zombie, it moves randomly and accelerates when you are close, exhibiting varied attack strengths.
*   **Skeletons with Guns:** These adversaries periodically fire 1-3 bullets in your direction.
*   **Skeletons Holding Swords:** These skeletons will randomly throw 1-3 swords at you.
*   **Skeleton Bomb Monster:** This foe has the potential to hurl 1-3 bombs at you.
*   **Blue Standing Pile:** This enemy unleashes a barrage of bullets in all directions.
*   **Golden Bird:** This creature fires bullets that spin in response to your movement.
*   **King Kong Robot:** Its specific actions and role within the game will be revealed as you progress.

**Key Features of the Game:**

*   **Dynamic Weather System:** This feature ensures that the game's environment feels distinct with each playthrough.
*   **Atmospheric Lighting:** Enhances the overall visual appeal and mood of the game.
*   **Random Weapon Drops:** Guarantees that every combat encounter presents a unique challenge.
*   **Procedurally Generated Maps:** Each adventure unfolds in a newly created area, offering endless exploration.
*   **Varied Enemy Encounters:** The diversity of enemy challenges keeps the gameplay consistently engaging.
*   **Random Power-Ups:** Provides temporary advantages that can shift the tide of battle.
*   **Persistent Progression:** Successfully completing levels allows you to retain earned upgrades, fostering a sense of lasting achievement.
*   **Advanced Enemy AI:** Monsters exhibit more intelligent movement and pursuit behaviors, increasing the difficulty.

**Trials Evolution: Gold Edition Brings Beloved Motorcycle Stunt Series Back to PC**

PC players can now experience the thrill of the **Trials franchise** with the arrival of **Trials Evolution: Gold Edition**. This release marks a significant moment for fans who have long awaited the series' return to the platform. The franchise first captured attention on PC with **Trials 2 SE** in 2008, an indie success that later expanded to Xbox. RedLynx, the developer, has responded to the ongoing requests from PC gamers for more of the franchise's signature physics-based motorcycle challenges.

The **Gold Edition** offers a substantial package, combining two complete Trials games previously unavailable on PC. It features all the content from the highly successful XBLA title, **Trials Evolution**, plus all the single-player tracks and skill games from the original **Trials HD**. This means players receive double the content, providing a massive amount of challenging courses and addictive gameplay.

**Trials Evolution: Gold Edition** has been specifically **optimized and enhanced for PC**. Key features that defined the series' appeal are back and better than ever. The **powerful in-game editor** returns, allowing players to build and share their own custom tracks. As one developer noted, the editor is "a cornerstone of the Trials experience, empowering players to become creators." This user-generated content can be easily shared with a worldwide community through the **player sharing functionality**. For those seeking competition, **global leaderboards** let players compare their best times and scores against others around the globe. The game also boasts exciting **multiplayer modes**, varied **indoor and outdoor settings**, deep **bike and rider customization options**, and thrilling **global challenges**.

Name: Lonely Mountains: Downhill
Description:
Just you and your bike - take it on a thrilling ride down an unspoiled mountain landscape. Make your way through thick forests, narrow trails and wild rivers. Race, jump, slide and try not to crash - all the way from the peak to the valley! Explore the rich mountain worlds at your own pace or face the ticking clock. Each mountain features several trails - ride along quiet mountain lakes, majestic forests and steep canyons. A custom physics system lets you carefully drop from boulder to boulder, sprint over abysses or slide through muddy grounds. It’s all up to you! Take the relaxing scenic route or go off-road to find the fastest way to the finish line! Master the tight and responsive controls to make your way to hidden resting places and secret shortcuts. No audience, no barrier tapes - experience a beautiful nature unspoiled by men. Unlock new difficulty modes and prove your speed-running talents on the leaderboards! Train your skills day and night to ultimately compete with the best riders in the world in the risky Free Ride mode! Each bike handles differently, so find the perfect one for your playstyle and make your way down the mountain to unlock dozens of paint jobs and outfits! JOIN HERE!

Descenders is an extreme downhill biking game that offers a fresh take on extreme sports. Developed by the creators of Action Henk, it's easy to pick up but hard to master.

**What Makes Descenders Stand Out:**

*   **Endless Worlds:** Every time you play, you'll encounter new jumps, hills, and obstacles thanks to procedurally generated environments.
*   **Skillful Riding:** Master precise rider movements with a detailed physics system that lets you perform stylish whips and scrubs.
*   **Unique Abilities:** Unlock special modifiers in "Rogue-Bike Mode" to find abilities that fit how you like to ride.
*   **Earn Your Fame:** An online reputation system lets you show off your skills and get new bikes and equipment.
*   **Awesome Music:** The game features a soundtrack from the drum & bass label Liquicity, adding to the mountain-riding thrill.

**Aim for Legend Status:**

The ultimate challenge in Descenders is to finish the game in one go and become a legendary Descender.

**Pick Your Crew, Build Your Legacy:**

Your team is a big part of Descenders. You can join one of three groups:

*   **Team Enemy:** These riders are all about difficult tricks and a determined attitude.
*   **Team Arboreal:** They excel at skillful riding on rough, off-road paths.
*   **Team Kinetic:** This team focuses on pure, high-speed action.

You'll join up with other players who choose the same team. Show your team spirit by wearing their colors and gear to earn special items. The team that earns the most Rep gets access to exclusive rewards and a special spot on the Descenders Discord server. As one developer noted, "The community aspect is really important to us, fostering that sense of belonging and competition."

Experience the thrill of MotoGP™ like never before with MotoGP™14, the official video game that puts you in the heart of the action. This immersive title brings together the complete roster of riders from both the 2013 and 2014 seasons, alongside iconic champions from MotoGP™ history. Prepare to race on every official track, including the electrifying new Argentina circuit, and challenge your rivals in a variety of exciting game modes.

Dive into new gameplay experiences such as the online Split Battle and the offline Real Events 2013 mode, or get lost in the deep and engaging career mode. MotoGP™14 has undergone a significant transformation, powered by a brand-new graphics engine. This technological leap ensures players can truly feel the adrenaline and intensity of being a professional MotoGP™ rider, offering an unparalleled simulation of the sport.

Name: RIDE 3
Description:
Feel the adrenaline and experience the most complete racing ever with RIDE 3! Immerse yourself in a modern 3D environment where you will live side by side with your bike, modifying it mechanically and aesthetically thanks to the new Livery Editor, which will let your dreams run wild. Before starting, don't forget to customise your rider with the right outfit. THE BIKES More than 230 bike models available from the very first day, with more than 70 new models never seen before in a RIDE game. 30 different brands, both historic and contemporary, of which 9 are completely new. 7 different categories to satisfy every taste and riding style. THE TRACKS RIDE 3 will be a journey around the globe thanks to its 30 different tracks created from zero and faithfully reproduced via photogrammetry and drone scanning. Hurtle down breathtaking roads all around the world, including GP tracks, Road and Supermoto tracks, enjoy the panoramas of street and country tracks and compete in street and acceleration races. LIVERY EDITOR Choose your favourite bike and make it unique, just like your style. Create your livery from scratch, choose a background colour and an endless amount of 2D shapes, designs and effects. Work on various levels to create infinite compositions and find the aesthetic which works for you. Riding a bike is great. Riding a bike which you've created yourself is fantastic. Seeing other riders and players from all over the world racing in your livery is simply the best! CAREER The new career will be a Single Player experience which has never been seen before. Forget the old linear progression: the new Volumes-based system will allow you to collect, read and participate in races and competitions through more than 50 magazines. Each one will catapult you into a unique game experience, made up of competitions and anecdotes about the motorcycling world, which will improve your experience in RIDE 3. What are you waiting for? Start your adventure with RIDE 3.

**RIDE: Experience the Thrill of Realistic Motorcycle Racing**

Prepare for an immersive motorcycle racing experience with **RIDE**, a game designed to capture the authentic thrill of high-speed biking on diverse global circuits. The developers aimed to create a simulation that truly mirrors the excitement of real-world motorcycle racing.

At the heart of **RIDE** lies the **World Tour** mode, where players participate in Motorcycle Festivals. These festivals feature three distinct race types: the high-speed **GP Tracks**, the scenic **Country Tracks**, and the challenging **City Tracks**. Players can choose from an extensive collection of over 100 authentic motorcycles from renowned manufacturers. A sophisticated new physics engine ensures that each bike offers a unique handling experience. Throughout the game, players have the ability to customize and upgrade their bikes, enhancing both performance and aesthetics. The ultimate objective is to ascend the global leaderboards. Beyond the World Tour, **RIDE** offers a variety of other engaging game modes, including Quick Race, Time Trial, Split Screen, and competitive online races for up to 12 players. Players can also personalize their rider's appearance with a wide selection of outfits and customize their bikes with various parts. The game boasts 15 distinct race tracks, enhanced by an innovative "Evolving Track System" that dynamically alters the circuit during races, demanding constant adaptation and strategic thinking from players.

**RIDE 2: Your Ultimate Motorcycle Digital Garage**

Welcome to the ultimate temple of motorcycles! **RIDE 2** is your digital garage, offering an unparalleled experience to discover, transform, and test the world's fastest and most iconic bikes. Prepare to compete with the best from renowned brands and showcase their full potential in a unique video game.

**Over 170 Bikes Await**

The undisputed stars of this highly anticipated two-wheel racing game are the **over 170 bikes**. Feel the adrenaline surge as you tackle challenging bends with the passion of a professional rider. RIDE 2 features tracks from the most thrilling races ever, spanning various categories: Country, City, GP, Road, Motard, and Drag. Conquer diverse terrains and leave your mark with every tire squeal!

**Build Your Dream Garage**

Collect them all to create your personalized garage. Choose from powerful and iconic categories and models, including **Nakeds** and **Supersports**.

**Explore World-Class Tracks**

Embark on an unforgettable journey across the globe. Experience an extraordinary sequence of events on over **30 tracks**, featuring legendary circuits like the **Nürburgring Nordschleife**.

**Unleash Your Customization Potential**

Elevate your bike's performance by modifying five key areas:
*   **Engine**
*   **Brakes and Suspension**
*   **Wheels**
*   **Transmission**
*   **Aesthetics**

With **over 20 different modifications**, including the new race transmission for fiberglass fairings, you can tailor your ride for extreme races. Personalize your rider's profile, clothing (Street/Race/Supermoto), and riding style with an advanced pose editor.

**Experience 12 Thrilling Game Modes**

Enjoy a long-lasting and fun gaming experience with **12 distinct game modes**. Master the queen of tracks, the Nürburgring, ride motocross-style, navigate winding layouts with jumps and parabolic curves, and compete in special slaloms. Be quick and precise to outmaneuver opponents, as time waits for no rider!

**RIDE 2: Key Highlights**

*   **Over 170 bike models**
*   New categories like **Sport Bike 2 Strokes**, **Supermotos**, and **Naked Café Racers**
*   **30 diverse tracks** with unique features
*   **22 of the world's leading motorcycle manufacturers**
*   **Over 1200 customizable parts** and **600+ liveries** to create your unique bike
*   New **social features** and **friends integration** for an enhanced experience

**Urban Trial Freestyle: Master the City Streets on Your Bike**

**Urban Trial Freestyle** turns the urban landscape into your personal extreme sports arena. This game lets you execute **impressive stunts** such as backflips, 360s, wallrides, and ollies on a customized trials bike, offering unparalleled freedom.

You have the ability to adjust your bike for peak performance in either **Time Attack** or **Stunt mode**. Strategic decisions are vital, as you must carefully balance **speed and style** to develop your own distinctive riding approach.

Test your skills against the best in **Ghost Mode**, where you race against recorded performances of skilled riders. The game presents **numerous distinct and complex levels** crafted for lasting engagement, motivating you to achieve **flawless performances** and aim to **surpass top global competitors**.

One developer highlighted the game's objective: to deliver an "authentic experience" through "sophisticated physics and fluid animations."

**Key Features:**

*   **Engaging Environments:** Discover 5 unique and captivating settings.
*   **Varied Gameplay:** Conquer Stunt, Time Attack, and special Challenges.
*   **Customization:** Personalize both your bike and your rider.
*   **Authentic Simulation:** Enjoy advanced physics and seamless animations.
*   **Global Competition:** Vie for top rankings on over 140 online leaderboards and utilize Ghost mode.

**Ducati World Championship: Race Like a Legend**

Experience the adrenaline-fueled world of motorcycle racing with **Ducati World Championship**. This game places you directly in the rider's seat, delivering an authentic simulation of Ducati's iconic motorcycles. You have the opportunity to **choose your ultimate bike from over 70 genuine Ducati models**, each meticulously crafted as a **flawless replica** of its real-world counterpart. As one gaming expert noted, "The attention to detail in replicating each Ducati model is truly remarkable, making you feel like you're on the actual machine." You're not confined to a single ride; with Ducati World Championship, you can **experience the entire Ducati legacy!**

The game features an extensive collection of **over 70 exquisitely modeled motorbikes**, thoughtfully organized into four distinct categories: **Classics, Sports, Road, and Grand Prix**. Get ready to prove your racing prowess on **more than 34 thrilling circuits**, each presenting a unique and demanding challenge. As you compete, you'll uncover a **vast array of unlockable extras**, significantly enhancing the depth and longevity of your gameplay.

**Ducati World Championship** offers a comprehensive, 360-degree immersion into the heart of professional motorcycle racing. Players can step into the boots of a pilot, advancing through **amateur, semi-professional, and professional racing tiers**. The ultimate aspiration? To claim the coveted **Superbike and the Grand World Championship titles**.

Engage in friendly competition with friends in the **split-screen multiplayer mode**, or put your skills to the ultimate test in **60 tournaments spread across five distinct game modes**. Feel the unbridled power as you **shatter the track at speeds exceeding 210 MPH on your Ducati Desmosedici**.

Explore the rich diversity of the bike lineup, from timeless **Classics** to the cutting-edge performance of **Sports** and **Road** models, and the pinnacle of racing technology found in **Grand Prix** machines. The **34 heart-pounding circuits** are further enriched by a **wealth of unlockable bonus content**, guaranteeing sustained replayability. Enjoy dynamic racing experiences with **varied weather and track conditions**, all brought to life by **realistic lighting effects**.

Aspiring champions can refine their techniques with **Loris' Riding Lessons**, a feature specifically designed to impart the secrets of becoming a champion rider. Climb the ranks in the **demanding Career Mode**, where you will face progressively faster bikes and be captivated by the visual splendor of **stunning Race Queens**. With **three distinct gameplay modes – arcade, normal, and simulation** – **Ducati World Championship** provides an abundance of options for **countless hours of exhilarating fun!**

Get ready for **Urban Trial Tricky™ Deluxe Edition**, the ultimate motorbike stunt experience! This game lets you unleash your creativity as you navigate the urban landscape. With a complete set of motorbike tricks, stylish moves, and challenging levels, you'll be unstoppable. 🏍️

**KEY FEATURES:**

*   **Engaging, light-hearted gameplay:** Enjoy a fun and casual experience.
*   **Unique blend:** Combines tricks, platforming, and racing for exciting gameplay.
*   **Killer tricks:** Master and combine tricks in endless combos.
*   **Smooth performance:** Experience a fluid and seamless game.
*   **Multiple modes:** Features three distinct single-player modes.
*   **Abundant content:** Over 30 levels plus extra side challenges.
*   **Extensive customization:** Personalize your rider and bike with savage options.
*   **Competitive leaderboards:** Aim to top the charts and prove your skills.
*   **Endless replayability:** Enjoy infinite gameplay possibilities.
*   **Full freedom:** Ride in both directions for more fun and control.

**Urban Trial Tricky Deluxe Edition** adds six new, savage customization options. Each includes a unique rider skin, a signature special trick, and a matching motorbike paint job.

**DEFY GRAVITY WITH CRAZY TRICKS! BECOME A CRAZY TRICKSTER!**

Jump on your bike and perform the most incredible tricks and combos. Ride with freedom, spin through the air, and switch directions effortlessly. Get lost in the fun, fast-paced gameplay, vibrant visuals, and smooth controls. As one reviewer noted, the game offers a "truly exhilarating ride" with its dynamic trick system.

**GET STYLISH!**

Learn new freestyle, breakdance, and FMX moves to develop your personal style. Unlock wild costumes and customize your motorbike to your heart's content.

**PUSH YOURSELF AND OTHERS TO GREATNESS!**

Conquer challenges and master a multitude of outstanding maneuvers and tricks to dominate the leaderboards. The game encourages players to "push the boundaries of what's possible on two wheels," according to developer notes.

Name: BioShock™
Description:
BioShock is a shooter unlike any you've ever played, loaded with weapons and tactics never seen. You'll have a complete arsenal at your disposal from simple revolvers to grenade launchers and chemical throwers, but you'll also be forced to genetically modify your DNA to create an even more deadly weapon: you. Injectable plasmids give you super human powers: blast electrical currents into water to electrocute multiple enemies, or freeze them solid and obliterate them with the swing of a wrench. No encounter ever plays out the same, and no two gamers will play the game the same way. Biologically modify your body: send fire storming from your fingertips and unleash a swarm of killer hornets hatched from the veins in your arms. Hack devices and systems, upgrade your weapons and craft new ammo variants. Turn everything into a weapon: the environment, your body, fire and water, and even your worst enemies. Explore an incredible and unique art deco world hidden deep under the ocean. BioShock: Breaking the Mold A free download that takes an inside look at the art of BioShock. Download it now (75MB .PDF)

Name: BioShock Infinite
Description:
Indebted to the wrong people, with his life on the line, veteran of the U.S. Cavalry and now hired gun, Booker DeWitt has only one opportunity to wipe his slate clean. He must rescue Elizabeth, a mysterious girl imprisoned since childhood and locked up in the flying city of Columbia. Forced to trust one another, Booker and Elizabeth form a powerful bond during their daring escape. Together, they learn to harness an expanding arsenal of weapons and abilities, as they fight on zeppelins in the clouds, along high-speed Sky-Lines, and down in the streets of Columbia, all while surviving the threats of the air-city and uncovering its dark secret. Key Features The City in the Sky – Leave the depths of Rapture to soar among the clouds of Columbia. A technological marvel, the flying city is a beautiful and vibrant world that holds a very dark secret. Unlikely Mission – Set in 1912, hired gun Booker DeWitt must rescue a mysterious girl from the sky-city of Columbia or never leave it alive. Whip, Zip, and Kill – Turn the city’s Sky-Lines into weaponized roller coasters as you zip through the flying city and dish out fatal hands-on punishment. Tear Through Time – Open Tears in time and space to shape the battlefield and turn the tide in combat by pulling weapons, turrets, and other resources out of thin air. Vigorous Powers – Throw explosive fireballs, shoot lightning, and release murders of crows as devastatingly powerful Vigors surge through your body to be unleashed against all that oppose you. Custom Combat Experience – With deadly weapons in one hand, powerful Vigors in the other, and the ability to open Tears in time and space, fight your own way through the floating city of Columbia to rescue Elizabeth and reach freedom. 1999 Mode – Upon finishing BioShock Infinite, the player can unlock a game mode called “1999 Mode” that gives experienced players a taste of the kind of design and balance that hardcore gamers enjoyed back in the 20th century.

Name: Thief™ Gold
Description:
Stalk your prey on the quest for stolen goods with your blackjack, sword, and an assortment of unique arrows. Steal for money and uncover the hidden agendas of your allies and enemies as you play through an unravelling story of deception and revenge. Survive in a world where shadows are your only ally, trust is not an option, and confrontation results in death! Key Features: Pioneering stealth based gameplay brings a new dimension to first person action. Thief™ Gold includes Thief™ The Dark Project (12 huge missions with multiple environments) and the Gold update (3 new campaign missions which deepen the plot and add five new types of enemies) Advanced enemies can see, hear, speak, and sound alarms. Your arsenal includes: blackjack, sword, fire arrows, water arrows, rope arrows and more

## Dishonored: A Supernatural Assassin's Revenge

Dishonored is a deeply immersive first-person action game that places you in the role of a supernatural assassin fueled by a burning desire for revenge. The game's exceptionally flexible combat system empowers you to creatively eliminate your targets by seamlessly blending supernatural abilities, a diverse arsenal of weapons, and an array of unusual gadgets. You can choose to pursue your enemies under the cloak of darkness, moving like a phantom, or to launch a direct, ruthless assault with weapons drawn. Crucially, the outcome of each mission is directly shaped by the critical choices you make throughout your journey.

### The City of Dunwall: A World of Shadows and Intrigue

The narrative of Dishonored unfolds in Dunwall, a sprawling industrial whaling city where peculiar steampunk-inspired technology and unsettling otherworldly forces exist in a precarious balance within the shadows. You begin as the once-trusted bodyguard of the beloved Empress. However, you are unjustly framed for her murder, transforming you into an infamous assassin, recognized solely by the disturbing mask that has become your chilling calling card. This is a period of profound uncertainty; the city is not only besieged by a devastating plague but also governed by a corrupt regime wielding advanced industrial technologies. Amidst this turmoil, dark forces conspire to bestow upon you extraordinary abilities, far surpassing those of any ordinary man, but this power comes at a significant cost. The truth behind your betrayal remains as obscure as the murky waters surrounding the city, and the life you once knew is irrevocably lost.

### Key Features: Unlocking Your Assassin's Potential

#### Improvise and Innovate Your Playstyle

Approach each assassination with a unique style tailored to your preferences. You can leverage the advantages of shadow and sound to navigate levels silently, remaining unseen by your adversaries, or opt for a head-on confrontation, engaging enemies as they react to your aggressive presence. The game's remarkably flexible combat system encourages you to creatively combine your innate abilities, potent supernatural powers, and ingenious gadgets as you progress through the levels and dispatch your objectives. The freedom to improvise and innovate is paramount in defining your personal play style.

#### Action with Meaningful Consequences

The world of Dishonored dynamically reacts to your actions and the way you choose to play. You can move through the environment like a ghost, actively resisting the city's corruption, or you can show no mercy, leaving a devastating path of destruction in your wake. Your decision regarding the approach for each mission directly influences the subsequent outcomes, ensuring that your choices have tangible and lasting effects.

#### Master Supernatural Abilities

The game offers a suite of potent supernatural abilities that dramatically expand your tactical options. You can utilize teleportation for stealthy infiltrations, possess any living creature to manipulate your surroundings, or even stop time itself to orchestrate unearthly and precise executions. Combining these extraordinary supernatural abilities with your arsenal of weapons unlocks even more inventive ways to overcome obstacles and efficiently eliminate your targets. Furthermore, the game's comprehensive upgrade system allows for the mastery of deadly new abilities and the development of devious gadgets, further enhancing your assassin's toolkit.

#### A City Unlike Any Other

Dishonored invites you to explore an original world meticulously envisioned by Viktor Antonov, the art director behind the acclaimed Half-Life 2. Arkane Studios and Bethesda Softworks present a captivating steampunk city where the forces of industry and the supernatural collide, forging an atmosphere thick with intrigue and mystery. This richly detailed world is yours to discover and explore at your own pace.

Alchemical engineering is crucial for civilization's survival, a point emphasized by Anataeus Vaya, a leading alchemist. Vaya has become the Head Alchemist for House Van Tassen, a wealthy and old family in the city. However, the family's wealth hides dangers, showing that alchemy might not solve every problem.

Zachtronics, known for games like SpaceChem and Infinifactory, presents Opus Magnum. This new puzzle game lets players explore this complex world. In Opus Magnum, you'll learn to use the transmutation engine, an alchemist's advanced tool. This engine helps create medicines, gems, weapons, and more.

The game provides a rich experience with these features:

*   **Build Machines:** Create intricate machines for alchemical tasks. You'll use parts like programmable arms, tracks, and special devices such as Van Berlo's wheel and the Glyph of Animismus.
*   **Creative Puzzles:** Compete with others to find the best solutions for puzzles. Share your designs as animated GIFs.
*   **Steam Workshop:** Make and share your own puzzles using Steam Workshop. You can also play puzzles from the Journal of Alchemical Engineering, chosen by Zachtronics.
*   **Engaging Story:** Dive into a world of secrets and plots within the city's old families. Alchemists, who can create almost anything, are valuable but also dangerous. As one expert noted, "Alchemists are highly coveted—and exceptionally perilous."
*   **Solitaire Game:** Alchemical engineering requires focus. Take a break with Sigmar's Garden, a solitaire game where every game can be won.

Torchlight II, the acclaimed Action RPG, returns with an expanded and enhanced experience, offering players an even more thrilling adventure. This installment is packed with **randomized levels, enemies, and loot**, ensuring that no two playthroughs are ever the same. While retaining the beloved flavor and excitement of its predecessor, Torchlight II significantly broadens the game world and introduces highly anticipated features, most notably **online and LAN multiplayer**. Once again, the ultimate destiny of the world rests squarely in your capable hands.

Torchlight II boasts a diverse range of **character classes**, providing players with a multitude of distinct play styles to explore. Each class offers the flexibility of being played as either a male or female hero, complete with **customizable cosmetic features and appearances** to ensure your avatar is truly unique.

The game offers robust **multiplayer options**, allowing you to team up with friends for cooperative play via LAN or over the internet, completely free of charge. A sophisticated matchmaking service facilitates connections with players globally, making it easy to find and join games with others from around the world.

Embark on an epic journey through the expansive **open world** of Vilderan, traversing its vast overworld and numerous hub towns. Experience dynamic environmental changes as you battle through **rain, snow, and shifts between day and night**. The inherent **level randomization** guarantees fresh layouts, unique paths, varied loot, and challenging monsters with every new game session.

For those who wish to further tailor their experience, Torchlight II offers extensive **mod support** through the Steam Workshop. This integration allows for seamless mod subscription and synchronization, granting access to over a thousand community-created modifications that can dramatically alter gameplay. Furthermore, the powerful **GUTS editor** empowers you to create and share your own unique content with the global community.

The challenge doesn't end with the primary campaign. Torchlight II features a compelling **New Game Plus** mode, allowing you to continue your adventure with the same character for a **significantly greater challenge**. You'll retain all your hard-earned skills, gold, and gear, making your subsequent playthroughs even more rewarding.

Beloved features from the original game, such as **pets and fishing**, make a triumphant return in Torchlight II, now enhanced with more options and improved visual effects. Your loyal pet will continue to assist you by making trips to town to sell your accumulated loot, freeing you to focus on the action.

## BioShock 2: A Return to the Depths of Rapture

**BioShock 2** invites players back to the atmospheric and decaying underwater metropolis of Rapture, approximately a decade after the events of the original game. This time, you embody the iconic **Big Daddy**, a hulking protector tasked with navigating the city's haunting beauty and confronting a new, unseen threat that is abducting young girls and dragging them back into Rapture's crumbling embrace. Your mission is to unravel the mysteries of this resurgence of past sins and fight for your own survival within this once-grand, now-ruined world.

The single-player campaign offers an **evolved combat experience**, allowing for innovative new strategies through the dual-wielding of weapons and Plasmids, creating exciting and dynamic combat combinations. This narrative continues the award-winning storytelling that made the first game so acclaimed, driving forward one of gaming's most captivating and terrifying storylines. You will truly **experience the raw power and strength of Rapture's most feared denizen** as you battle a host of new enemies. Beyond the main story, the **Protector Trials** present intense combat challenges designed to test your mastery of weapons and Plasmids. In these trials, you must protect your Little Sister as she gathers ADAM from fallen foes, facing mounting opposition and a relentless onslaught. Each trial provides unique weapon and Plasmid load-outs, with an additional bonus load-out unlocked upon successful completion.

Adding another layer to the BioShock universe, the multiplayer mode serves as a rich prequel narrative, exploring the origins of Rapture and its inhabitants. Set during the city's catastrophic fall, you assume the role of a Plasmid test subject for Sinclair Solutions, a prominent provider of Plasmids and Tonics. To survive this unique experience, you will need to **master the full BioShock arsenal**. This genetically enhanced multiplayer allows you to earn experience points to unlock new Weapons, Plasmids, and Tonics, enabling the creation of hundreds of unique character builds tailored to your individual playstyle. You will **experience Rapture's civil war firsthand**, playing as its citizens and participating in the conflict that ultimately tore the city apart. Furthermore, you can **see Rapture before its fall**, engaging in combat within iconic locations like the Kashmir Restaurant and Mercury Suites, meticulously reimagined for the multiplayer arenas. This robust multiplayer experience is brought to you by Digital Extremes, a studio with over a decade of expertise in first-person shooter development.

The game also includes a wealth of downloadable content. The **Sinclair Solutions Test Pack** allows you to increase your rank to 50, offering new weapon upgrades, 20 additional Trials, two new playable characters, and five new Masks. The **Rapture Metro Map Pack** introduces six new maps within the Rapture Metro system. A fresh melee mode, **"Golf" Melee Mode**, transforms blunt objects into golf clubs for a unique combat experience. Finally, you can play as the distinct multiplayer characters **Zigo & Blanche**. Please note that all downloadable content requires the full game to play.

**Thief II: The Metal Age** invites you back into the shadows as Garrett, the master thief, for a thrilling stealth-action adventure. This sequel immerses you in a world filled with **new technologies, fervent religions, and widespread corruption**, where you'll need to be clever and precise to succeed.

The game features **15 detailed, open-ended levels**. Each level acts as a playground for **collecting valuable items and outwitting watchful guards**. Game critics have noted that the **smarter enemy AI** makes the game much harder, requiring players to change their tactics. To help Garrett, players can use **new tools and advanced master thief equipment**. The **engaging story** unfolds over these 15 large missions, with interesting side stories woven in. The game's significance is highlighted by its placement on **Gamespy's Greatest Games of All Time** list and its win for **Outstanding Achievement in Character or Story Development** at the 2000 Academy of Interactive Arts and Sciences Awards.

## Explore the Cosmos Aboard a Victorian Steam Train in *Sunless Skies: Sovereign Edition*

Embark on an extraordinary Victorian space adventure with *Sunless Skies: Sovereign Edition*. This definitive edition invites you to command a magnificent steam locomotive as a burgeoning Victorian empire ventures into the vast expanse of the cosmos. It meticulously integrates all post-launch enhancements, including new officers, formidable enemies, advanced engines, compelling storylines, and even charming mascots. The game also boasts a completely reimagined region, a dedicated "Full Steam" mode for exhilarating long voyages and desperate escapes, and the highly anticipated horn functionality, alongside numerous quality-of-life improvements.

Your journey commences by defining your captain's past, allowing you to shape their origins from a streetwise urchin to a devout priest or a fiery revolutionary. Uncover their deepest motivations and hidden secrets. As your character advances, you will select another defining aspect of their history, such as being the Black Sheep of the family or harboring a Lost Love. The unforgiving nature of the skies dictates that most captains will meet their end, but their legacy will endure, leaving a crucial inheritance for those who follow in their footsteps.

Delve deeper into the rich, dark, and wondrous Fallen London Universe, a setting previously explored in *Sunless Sea*. While this is a new narrative, players can immerse themselves fully without prior experience. The High Wilderness presents a breathtaking yet terrifying vision of space where conventional rules simply do not apply. Experience winds that howl through shattered celestial ruins, fogs that coil amidst stellar jungles, and industrial sprawl that chokes the heavens with smog. The very stars, known as the Judgements, are vast intelligences that govern existence but are mysteriously fading, leaving their thrones vacant. Your captain must navigate this impossible world, engaging in trade, exploration, combat, and survival.

Your locomotive serves as your sole bastion against the myriad dangers lurking in the Heavens. Meticulously maintain and upgrade it with exotic weaponry and specialized equipment, such as a Pneumatic Mining Array or the swift Brassraven. Learn to craft formidable weapons, like the Wrath of Heaven, from the spoils of your defeated adversaries. Acquire new locomotives, perhaps the spacious Pellinore-class Trader or the sleek Medea-class Destroyer. Confront rival locomotives, opportunistic pirates, experimental imperial navy warships, monstrous entities like the nightmarish Undeparted, and swarms of irate Chorister-bees. Master playing factions against each other and learn each foe's unique combat behaviors. Utilize the Full Steam mode to either evade perilous situations or relentlessly pursue your quarry. Effectively manage your crew's morale and your captain's own internal struggles with nightmares. Carefully balance fuel and supplies against your insatiable desire to explore, pursue knowledge, or amass riches. The darkness has a profound and transformative effect on all who venture into it. Populate your vessel with upgradeable officers, each with unique questlines, such as a repentant devil, an incognito princess, an entire brigade of rats, or even your own Aunt.

The Victorian Empire, liberated from gravity, has extended its dominion across the celestial expanse, even constructing a new sun. The Empress, wielding control over time from her Throne of Hours, presides over an empire of vast ambition and scant mercy. Your captain must carve out an existence in this extraordinary world, making critical choices that could tip the balance of power. Will you align with Her Majesty's new empire, support the rebels striving to break free from London's rule, or forge your own independent path? Your ultimate fate will be determined by your actions: will you retire in triumph, or be irrevocably lost to the encroaching darkness?

*Sunless Skies: Sovereign Edition* offers over 800,000 words of interconnected stories, drawing inspiration from literary giants like C.S. Lewis, Jules Verne, H.P. Lovecraft, and H.G. Wells. Experience a beautifully rendered world through lush, hand-drawn 2D art, exploring four distinct regions: the celestial wilderness, an impossible industrial empire, a pagan midnight expanse, and the domain of the dead. Engage in thrilling real-time battles against horrifying celestial foes and merciless pirates. Equip your engine with bizarre and powerful equipment and weaponry, and battle against starvation, mutiny, terror, and nightmares. Choose to build a lineage of captains, with each death passing on an inheritance, or reload your most recent captain to continue your journey. Uncover your captain's past and develop their story as you traverse the skies. Earn your fortune through a unique, story-driven trading system, or embrace smuggling. Gather a menagerie of unique pets, including the Inadvisably Big Dog, Useless Cat, and Perfect Pangolin. Enjoy seamless gameplay with key remapping for keyboard and mouse, and comprehensive controller support. Failbetter Games, a small, independent British game studio, crafted this immersive narrative experience. As Failbetter Games stated, "We wanted to create a world that felt both familiar and utterly alien."

**Dishonored 2: A Masterpiece of Choice and Consequence**

Step back into the shadows as a supernatural assassin in Dishonored 2. This highly anticipated sequel to Arkane Studio's acclaimed first-person action game, Dishonored, has earned widespread praise. PC Gamer called it "brilliant," while IGN described it as "amazing" and "a superb sequel." Eurogamer declared it a "masterpiece," and Game Informer hailed it as "a must-play revenge tale among the best in its class." Dishonored 2 invites you to forge your own path in a world where magic and industry clash.

Will you embody Empress Emily Kaldwin or her loyal protector, Corvo Attano? The choice is yours. You can navigate the game unseen, unleash brutal combat, or master a blend of both. Discover how to combine your chosen character's unique powers, weapons, and gadgets to outwit and eliminate your foes. Your decisions shape the narrative, leading to intriguing outcomes across meticulously crafted missions.

**A World in Turmoil**

Fifteen years have passed since the tyrannical Lord Regent was overthrown and the devastating Rat Plague became a memory. Now, an otherworldly usurper has stolen Empress Emily Kaldwin's throne, plunging the Isles into uncertainty. As either Emily or Corvo, you must journey from the familiar streets of Dunwall to Karnaca, a once-vibrant coastal city that holds the key to reclaiming the throne. Empowered by the Mark of the Outsider and new supernatural abilities, you will hunt down your enemies and reclaim what is rightfully yours.

**Key Features:**

*   **The Assassins:** Both Emily Kaldwin and Corvo Attano are fully voiced characters, offering distinct perspectives and emotional depth. Utilize their unique powers, gadgets, and weapons creatively. Whether you fight openly or move like a ghost, your approach to eliminating or sparing enemies is entirely up to you.

*   **Supernatural Powers:** Advanced bonecharm crafting and new upgrade trees allow for deep customization of your abilities. Become a living shadow to stalk your targets, link enemies to share their fate, or mesmerize foes to control their minds. The game offers near-infinite combinations of combat styles, powers, and weapons to achieve your objectives.

*   **Imaginative World:** From the grimy, rat-infested alleys of Dunwall to the exotic, decaying shores of Karnaca, immerse yourself in stunning environments crafted by Arkane's art and narrative teams. The world itself is a character, brimming with lore, unique architecture, and memorable individuals. Signature mission locations, like the dust-choked Dust District and a madman's mansion with shifting walls and clockwork soldiers, offer unforgettable experiences.

*   **The Void Engine:** Dishonored 2 is brought to life by the new Void Engine, a significant advancement in rendering technology. Built on id Tech and heavily customized by Arkane Studios, it supports world-class art direction and leverages modern hardware. This engine enables substantial improvements in AI for stealth and combat, lighting, graphical fidelity, densely populated urban environments, and narrative presentation.

**Leisure Suit Larry Returns: Navigating 21st Century Dating in *Wet Dreams Don't Dry***

*Leisure Suit Larry: Wet Dreams Don't Dry* brings the beloved '80s icon into the 21st century for a hilarious point-and-click adventure. The game challenges Larry to adapt his outdated views on romance and women to today's world. Despite the vast cultural and technological changes, Larry is determined to find love and navigate modern dating.

A key element of Larry's quest is "Timber," a dating app reflecting today's digital relationships. Players must help Larry date women, satisfy their needs, and boost his Timber score. His main objective is to win over Faith, assistant to the CEO of Prune, a major tech company. The game offers a non-linear experience with over 30 hand-drawn locations and more than 30 unique characters. These characters provide opportunities for puzzles and interactions. Larry will also encounter "Instacrap," a parody of social media, adding satirical commentary. This mix of classic gameplay and modern themes offers a fresh take on the Leisure Suit Larry series.

Name: Dream Daddy: A Dad Dating Simulator
Description:
Dream Daddy: A Dad Dating Simulator is a game where you play as a Dad and your goal is to meet and romance other hot Dads. You and your daughter have just moved into the sleepy seaside town of Maple Bay only to discover that everyone in your neighborhood is a single, dateable Dad! Will you go out with Teacher Dad? Goth Dad? Bad Dad? Or any of the other cool Dads in this game? With minigames, sidequests, and a variety of paths and endings, Dream Daddy: A Dad Dating Simulator is this year's most anticipated Dad-based game. Features 7 dateable Dads Dad character creator - Create your Dadsona! Multiple endings per-Dad Voiced by the Game Grumps and friends Written and created by Leighton Gray and Vernon Shaw Game Directed by Tyler J. Hutchison Artwork and pinups by Shanen Pae, J.N. Wiedle, Anna Pan, Tyson Hesse, Ellen Alsop, Evan Palmer, Ego Rodriguez, and many more! Original score by Jesse Cale Dad-themed mini and micro games throughout each date path So many Dad puns. Like, to the point where it made us all uncomfortable Secretssssssss.

Name: Genital Jousting
Description:
Genital Jousting is an online and local multiplayer party game about flaccid penises and wiggly anuses for up to eight players at once. Players control a detached penis complete with testicles and an anus. Multiple game modes provide a stimulating orgy of objectives: penetrate and be penetrated as fast as possible or compete in absurd, silly and sexually suggestive games and challenges. New Story Mode Play as John, a dick who wants to find a date for his high school reunion. He'll need some help along the way. He's wobbly, he's soft. But he wants to be hard. So very hard. He wants to show everyone his astounding rigidity. And with your help, that's exactly what he'll do. Features If this is something that makes you uncomfortable or sounds unappealing, please do not purchase or play Genital Jousting, or even continue reading. Online and Local Multiplayer for Eight: Genital Jousting is more fun with friends and can satisfy up to eight players at once! Find a few willing partners, cuddle up on the couch, and share controllers or go online to joust with anonymous players from all over the world. Traditional and Party Modes: Dabble in the throbbingly fast-paced Traditional Mode or jostle your way through some stiff competition in Party Mode including challenges like Double Delight, Obstacle Intercourse, and Weiner Round Up. Customize Your Member: Genitals come in all shapes and sizes so pick your favorite color and decorate it with the most appealing outfit to customize a penis you can really get behind!

Name: Lust for Darkness
Description:
/ Don't miss the new edition of the fan-favorite sequel! / Jonathan Moon receives a letter from his wife who has gone missing a year before. Following information from the message he heads for a secluded mansion where an eldritch, occult ceremony takes place. Gates to another world - the profane, perverse land of Lusst’ghaa are opened. TWO WORLDS Move in both a Victorian mansion and Lusst’ghaa - an alien dimension filled with otherworldly creatures. Lusst’ghaa used to be similar to our earth until the local beings decided to undergo total degeneration at their own wish. Through experiments they transformed their bodies so that they could never cease to experience carnal delights. Hundreds of years have passed since that metamorphosis and Lusst’ghaa is now a land overgrown with alien vegetation and full of monstrosities squirming in a never ending ecstasy. FEATURES Erotic and occult themes World design inspired with works of Lovecraft, Giger & Zdzisław Beksiński Exploring a Victorian mansion and the world of Lusst’ghaa Using portals to traverse between two alternative realities Searching for hidden items to unlock side stories find out more about the game’s backstory Escaping the creatures of Lusst’ghaa Original soundtrack by a known composer (Draco Nared)

Name: The Tower of Five Hearts
Description:
Story There are five continents of roughly-equal size, side-by-side, and all of them meet to an approximate point in the middle. At this meeting of borders, there is a tower: The Tower of Five Hearts. One Royal Family is in charge of upholding the peace for every continent, by marrying off their child to a prospective girl from one of the continents.
