Work with your squad through snow and rain, using new weapons including flamethrowers and deployable machine guns, or by calling in artillery strikes. 13 All-New Single Player missions spanning three campaigns. 11 exciting new Multiplayer maps and 3 new multiplayer modes including Domination, Capture the Flag, and Base Assault. © 2006 Activision Publishing, Inc. Activision and Call of Duty are registered trademarks of Activision Publishing, Inc. All rights reserved. All other trademarks and trade names are the properties of their respective owners.

Name: Brothers in Arms: Road to Hill 30™
Description:
Based on a true story. Set during the famous airdrop before the invasion at Normandy, where Sgt. Matt Baker and his squad of 101st Airborne Paratroopers were scattered over the French countryside. As the story unfolds, you must choose between the success of your mission and the lives of your men - your brothers in arms. Brothers In Arms: Road to Hill 30 will immerse players in the historic, eight-day invasion of Normandy - with unparalleled imagery, authenticity, sound, and gameplay. One of a kind: Brothers In Arms Road to Hill 30 is the only first-person tactical shooter set in WWII. Real military tactics: Intuitive and easy-to-use squad controls appeal to both the hardcore and mainstream gaming audience. Real soldiers: Featuring a cast of more than 20 characters, each with a unique personality, appearance, and style. Revolutionary AI system: Allies and enemies use the standard operating procedures of fire and maneuver to flank and kill their foes. Unprecedented authenticity: Historically accurate and detailed battlefields, events, and equipment re-created from Army Signal Corps photos, aerial reconnaissance imagery, and eyewitness accounts. Innovative multiplayer: Players command three-man AI teams in a battle of wits and skill to accomplish exciting objectives. Award-winning team: Gearbox Software, creators of Half-Life Opposing Force and developers of James Bond: Nightfire, Counter-Strike, and Halo (PC).

**Need for Speed: Hot Pursuit - A New Era of Racing**

Prepare for **Need for Speed: Hot Pursuit**, a game that places you behind the wheel of the world's most coveted and fastest cars. Developed by Criterion, the studio renowned for the *Burnout* series, this title aims to revolutionize the racing genre. Experience **breakneck speeds**, exhilarating takedowns, and daring escapes as you compete with friends in the most interconnected *Need for Speed* game to date.

At the core of the game's connected social competition is the innovative **Need for Speed Autolog** system. Autolog directly links friends, allowing them to compare and share their experiences, screenshots, and challenges. It **intelligently suggests new challenges** based on your friends' recent gameplay, crafting a dynamic and intensely competitive social environment that extends beyond the console to the web. As Criterion's General Manager, Alex Ward, stated, "Autolog is the heart of the game, connecting players in a way that makes them want to compete."

**Hot Pursuit** is brimming with action and challenges you to become either Seacrest County's most celebrated officer or its most notorious racer. For the first time in the *Need for Speed* franchise, you can **experience a full career from both sides of the law**. Whether you crave the thrill of speed or the satisfaction of upholding justice, get ready for an unforgettable ride.

**Key Features:**

*   **Dual Careers:** For the first time in *Need For Speed* history, engage in **complete careers as both law enforcement and street racers**. Earn bounty through online play, friend challenges, or the single-player career to unlock new vehicles, tools, and gear.

*   **Need For Speed™ Autolog:** This system **directly connects friends**, enabling them to compare and share their gameplay. Autolog dynamically presents challenges based on your friends' activities, fostering a **socially competitive experience**. "We wanted to create a system that constantly pushes players to engage with their friends," noted a Criterion developer.

*   **Exotic Cars:** Command the **world's most sought-after high-performance vehicles** at astonishing speeds. Apprehend suspects in supercharged police interceptors like the Lamborghini Reventon, or outrun the authorities as a racer in supercars such as the Pagani Zonda Cinque.

*   **Weapons and Equipment:** Law enforcement can deploy tools like **spike strips** and call in **roadblocks** to escalate pursuits. Racers are equipped with countermeasures like **jammers** to disrupt police communications and disable their equipment.

*   **Seacrest County:** Traverse a sprawling open world inspired by the **California coastline**, featuring varied landscapes including deserts, forests, coastal areas, and mountains. This expansive environment is engineered to deliver the most **intense police pursuit moments** ever.

Name: GRIP: Combat Racing
Description:
WHEELED AND ANTI-GRAV RACING FUSION GRIP is a high octane, hardcore combat racer, packing ferocious speed and an arsenal of heavy weapons. Harness the power of gravity-defying wheeled or airborne vehicles, and smash your way through opponents with a bristling arsenal of outlandish weapons. GRIP delivers one of the fastest and most unique racing experiences ever as you scale walls, ceilings and anything else you can get your ride onto. Master twisting tracks, tricks and perform ridiculous stunts, fighting your way across alien planets to become the ultimate vehicular assailant. Now in VR! Prepare for the most intense, mind-melting racing experience in VR! Inject yourself into the game, feeling every turn, impact and stomach-testing inversion. Can you make it through the race? Only one way to find out… *Sick bag not included. REACH MACH 1 SPEEDS Hit speeds of up to 767mph and beyond on floors, walls, ceilings and anywhere you can get your ride to… just keep that pedal pressed hard. RACE ACROSS THE COSMOS Race your way through 29 tracks across a host of 4 exotic planets; from hostile, icy worlds to foreign, non-terrestrial cities to the outer reaches of space. CREATE THE ULTIMATE RIDE Choose from a roster of 30 armored vehicles to suit your style – some swift and agile, others brutish and heavily armed. Progress your player level and customize your ride with unlocked paint jobs, decals, tires and rims. TEAM MODES Battle it out with online team racing and deathmatch modes. DEVASTATE YOUR OPPONENTS Pick-up an array of 9 power-ups and weapons, from shields and turbos, to rail-guns, missiles and explosive darts - all with alternate fire modes. COMPETE ON THE COUCH Compete with friends in SPLIT-SCREEN multiplayer, with up to four players. TAKE THE RACE ONLINE Build your own tournament, line the grid with up to 10 players and compete online with full matchmaking & lobby support. ENTER THE DEATHMATCH ARENA Duke it out with intense action in 5 Arena battle maps. BECOME ONE WITH THE CAR IN CARKOUR Beat the clock, avoid obstacles and find new pathways in 19 point-to-point Carkour runs. CONQUER THE SINGLE PLAYER CAMPAIGN Be the best, beat in-game rivals and rise to the top in the single player campaign. Gain XP and customize your ride’s appearance with hard-earned upgrades. SICK BEATS Race to a 24 track thumping licensed electronic soundtrack, ranging from techno and trance to our main jam, drum n bass. BUILT WITH UNREAL Built in Unreal Engine 4, GRIP will take you back to your nostalgic past, while simultaneously propelling you into an electrifying future.

FlatOut: Ultimate Carnage pushes the boundaries of destruction racing, offering an extreme and visceral experience. This arcade racer is renowned for its realistic physics, diverse game modes, and extensive multiplayer options, both online and offline.

The game's core lies in its "peerless real world physics engine," which meticulously simulates vehicle damage. Cars are constructed from over 40 deformable parts, and tracks are littered with more than 8,000 destructible objects, ensuring every race is a spectacle of chaos. As one reviewer noted, "The sheer level of destruction is breathtaking; you can practically feel the metal bending and glass shattering."

FlatOut: Ultimate Carnage caters to a wide range of player preferences with its numerous race styles. The Career mode challenges players to progress through three increasingly difficult classes, aiming to become the ultimate FlatOut champion through sheer demolition. For those seeking immediate thrills, the Arcade mode offers Deathmatch Destruction Derbies, time trials, and a variety of crash-focused challenges.

The competitive spirit is alive and well in FlatOut's highly engaging racing action. Players can go head-to-head against 11 other AI drivers in single-player modes, choosing from a roster of 48 distinct cars. These races unfold across 39 tracks set in six diverse environments, from arid deserts and sprawling storm drains to tight city streets.

Fully integrated with Games For Windows Live, FlatOut: Ultimate Carnage supports up to 8 simultaneous players in various modes, including Races, Derbies, and Stunts. The game also introduces the all-new Deathmatch Derbies and the exclusive Head-On race mode, adding further layers of competitive mayhem.

A signature feature of FlatOut is its hilarious Ragdoll characters. These characters are dramatically ejected from vehicles during races, often through the windscreen, especially when opponents are wrecked. Beyond the main races, 12 distinct Ragdoll mini-games provide unique challenges that emphasize "sheer body abuse," with events like High Jump, Stone Skipping, Ring of Fire, Field Goal, and Free Kick.

Visually, the cars in Ultimate Carnage are stunning. The game boasts real-time environment mapping, which renders every scratch and dent with a gritty, realistic appearance. Dynamic shadow maps are applied to every 3D object on the track, including buildings, scenery, and other vehicles, contributing to exceptionally smooth movement. Enhanced particle effects, such as dust, dirt, smoke, water splashes, and bouncing sparks, further immerse players in the destructive environment.

Name: Need for Speed™ Most Wanted
Description:
The open-world action in Need for Speed™ Most Wanted gives you the freedom to drive your way. Hit jumps and shortcuts, switch cars, lie low, or head for terrain that plays to your vehicle’s unique strengths. Fight your way past cops and rivals using skill, high-end car tech, and tons of nitrous. It’s all about you, your friends, and a wild selection of cars. Let’s see what you can do. Key features Experience nonstop action — No menus, no lobbies, and no restrictions — just intense competition. Race, battle, crash, and explore at your own pace with a massive variety of things to do (and rewards to collect) throughout the open world. Prove you’re the best — Pick a car & jump into a nonstop playlist of competitive events in online mode. Influence the playlist by voting with your car. Jostle for position on the starting line. Cross the finish line and turn around to take out oncoming rivals. Beat your friends — Autolog records everything you do, broadcasting a feed of your most newsworthy scores, speeds, and times to your friends — and you’ll see there’s too. Whatever you do, there’s someone to beat. Test your urban handling skills — Need for Speed Most Wanted delivers a deep, physical experience that showcases the personalities of awesome licensed cars. Experience insane speeds, spectacular crashes, aggressive driving, and huge drifts.

**Need for Speed™ Rivals: Complete Edition - Your Ultimate Racing Experience**

Dive into the complete Need for Speed Rivals experience with the Complete Edition. This all-encompassing package delivers the full game, enhanced with six thrilling downloadable content packs for an unmatched racing adventure.

**Exclusive Content Awaits**

The Complete Edition unlocks six special packs:

*   Simply Jaguar Complete Pack
*   Ferrari Edizioni Speciali Complete Pack
*   Concept Lamborghini Complete Pack
*   Koenigsegg Agera One
*   Complete Movie Pack
*   Loaded Garage Pack

**Join the Race, Your Way**

Experience a living, breathing world where your races and your friends' pursuits constantly collide, making every event unique. For those who prefer a solo challenge, Redview County is yours to dominate. Master the advanced Racer and Cop AI in a world built for intense competition. As one reviewer noted, "The AI in Rivals truly keeps you on your toes, forcing you to adapt your strategy constantly."

**The Thrill of High-Stakes Rivalry**

At the heart of Need for Speed Rivals lies a relentless rivalry. Racers, fueled by the pursuit of glory, command agile cars built for extreme speed and daring escapes. Cops, working as a unified force, leverage the full power of law enforcement to hunt down and apprehend racers. You can seamlessly switch between these roles, and a unique scoring system raises the stakes by putting your hard-earned speed points on the line.

**Customize Your Dream Machine**

Leave your signature on Redview County by personalizing your vehicles. Boost your car's performance with state-of-the-art pursuit technology upgrades. Express your individual style with a vast selection of cosmetic modifications, from vibrant paint jobs and custom liveries to personalized license plates, striking rims, and eye-catching decals. "The customization options allow players to truly make their car their own," commented a gaming journalist.

**Master the Art of Pursuit and Evasion**

Adapt your pursuit or escape tactics instantly with a powerful arsenal of advanced technology. Racers can deploy turbo bursts, jammers, and electromagnetic pulses to outsmart pursuing officers. Cops are equipped for aggressive takedowns, utilizing shockwaves, spike strips, and calling in aerial support or strategic roadblocks to corner their targets.

**FlatOut 2™: Unleash Destruction and Drive to Win!**

FlatOut 2™ redefines racing by making destruction the ultimate goal. This game is all about embracing chaos and causing as much damage as possible on the track. Forget careful driving; here, your success is measured by the mayhem you create. Get ready for intense races against powerful cars and unpredictable opponents who will push your skills to the absolute limit. If you prefer a more conventional driving simulation, FlatOut 2™ is not the game for you.

The game provides an extensive playground for destruction, allowing you to obliterate thousands of objects across a variety of environments. You'll race through arid deserts, navigate massive storm drains, and tear through tight city streets, with each location offering ample opportunities for demolition. FlatOut 2™ also includes "mini games gone wild," featuring 12 unique challenges where you'll launch your driver in hilarious and destructive ways. As one critic observed, "The thrill of pure destruction is central to the appeal of FlatOut 2™." Your objective is clear: win the race by any means necessary, even if it means sending opponents' cars flying through the air.

FlatOut 2 © 2006 Empire Interactive Europe Ltd. Game concept and development by Bugbear Entertainment Ltd. Empire, FlatOut and 'E' are either trademarks or registered trademarks of Empire Interactive Europe Ltd. in the UK/Europe and/or other countries. All rights reserved. NVIDIA, the NVIDIA Logo, GeForce and 'The Way It's Meant to be Played' Logo are registered trademarks and/or trademarks of NVIDIA Corporation in the United States and other countries. GameSpy and the 'Powered by GameSpy' design are trademarks of GameSpy Industries, Inc. All rights reserved. A product of the E.U.

Name: Need for Speed™ Hot Pursuit Remastered
Description:
Feel the thrill of the chase and the rush of escape in Need for Speed Hot Pursuit Remastered on PC. Unleash a savage sense of speed both as an outlaw and a cop in the world's hottest high-performance cars. Outsmart the heat or take down lawbreakers with the tactical weaponry at your disposal in a heart-pumping, socially competitive racing experience. Updated with enhanced visuals, cross-platform multiplayer — including the asynchronous competition powered by Autolog — plus all additional main DLC, this is the ultimate edition of Criterion Games’ critically acclaimed Need for Speed debut. It’s time to reignite the pursuit. Cross-platform Multiplayer and Autolog Bolt down the winding Seacrest County roads headfirst in racing that is socially competitive at its core. The groundbreaking Autolog connects you and your friends in head-to-head pursuits and races and instinctively delivers challenges based on your friends’ activities. This highly dynamic system is fueled by friendly competition and is now supported with cross-platform sync and new multiplayer gameplay so you can race each other no matter what platform you’re on. All Main DLC Included, Plus More Updates Get all the additional main DLC delivered at launch, including an extra 6 hours of gameplay and more than 30 challenges. Brand new achievements, wraps, car colors, reduced hard stops, an updated photo mode and gallery, and multiple quality-of-life updates create an even more well-rounded gameplay experience this time around. Exotic Cars with Weapons Drive the world’s most desirable supercars on both sides of the law. Bust suspects in supercharged cop interceptors enhanced with tactical weaponry, or level the playing field with counterattacks and defensive maneuvers as an elite racer. Strategize to gain an edge over the competition, no matter what side you’re on! Chase and Escape A deep and fully defined single-player career delivers the action of both cops and racers, with a seamlessly linked multiplayer experience across all race modes. Take on friends or play through the career solo to earn Bounty and unlock new cars, weapons, and equipment. Enhanced Visuals Need for Speed Hot Pursuit Remastered delivers a timeless racing experience updated for today’s generation of hardware with enhanced visuals.

Name: Gas Guzzlers Extreme
Description:
Gas Guzzlers Extreme is a fast, furious, armed-to-the-teeth, trigger-happy shooter, shifted into top gear! Take a white knuckle ride in this crazily addictive combat racing game that features a ton of vehicles, weapons, upgrades, on-track bonuses and environments. Gas Guzzlers Extreme is an exciting new twist on the car combat experience with the addition of furious team/clan combat battles. Players start out with low performance vehicles and soon work their way up to high-performance models, by earning money in a series of hi-octane races and arena battles. New game modes, tracks and vehicles are unlocked as players progress through the game. Along with developing their driving and fighting skills, players can spend their hard-fought cash, customizing their vehicle to match their clan members or pimping their ride for the road to glory! Key features: Combat racing at its best, featuring a blood pumping single player campaign with over 12 hours of gameplay. Fast-as-lightning multiplayer tournaments with 7 different modes (classic race, power race, battle race, knockout, deathmatch, last man standing and capture the flag); with up to 4 teams available in team play mode. 350+ miles of road across 40 tracks, 8 arenas and 7 different environments. 12 unique weapons, on-track bonuses and power ups. 18 customizable cars (12+ upgrades, color, rims, stickers, etc.). Multi-path tracks and sponsored events. Instant play with vicious AI Bots populating your multiplayer match while other players begin to join in on the fun. Beautifully displayed high definition visuals with extensive vehicle damage, motion blur effects and custom paint jobs. Full force feedback controller support as well as keyboards, joy pads, joysticks and racing wheels. Packed with tons of unique humor and personality.

Embark on an exhilarating **high-octane sky racing** experience with SkyDrift, a game designed to push your **flying and combat skills** to the limit against formidable opponents. Prepare to navigate **incredibly detailed environments** and unlock a hangar of **advanced aircraft**. Personalize your machines with **unique racing skins** and conquer challenges that demand your creative flair. The core objective is simple yet thrilling: if you can't outmaneuver your rivals, **take them down**!

SkyDrift boasts a fleet of **eight modern, state-of-the-art airplanes**, each meticulously engineered for high-stakes racing. With four distinct skins available for every aircraft, you can adorn your entire collection with **32 unique racing skins**. To amplify your aerial combat prowess, the game integrates **six unique power-ups**. Players can equip two different powers per plane and discover upgrades to enhance their effectiveness. Strategic decision-making is paramount as you decide which powers to retain, upgrade, or convert into valuable Boost energy.

Soar through **stunning, diverse environments**, including the majestic Grand Canyon, the rugged Alaskan Terrain, and the tropical Hawaiian Islands. These meticulously crafted locations burst with **beautiful, vibrant colors**, establishing a visually captivating backdrop for every race. For those craving intense competition, SkyDrift delivers **8-person multiplayer battles**. Engage up to seven friends online in adrenaline-fueled aerial combat where only the most skilled pilots will emerge victorious.

The game offers **three distinct game modes** to ensure endless excitement. **Power Race Mode** masterfully blends high-speed racing with strategic power-up deployment, demanding both swift reflexes and tactical thinking. **Speed Race Mode** challenges pilots to navigate through speed-boosting rings on demanding courses, rigorously testing their precision. Finally, **Survival Mode** pits you against a relentless timer and other pilots, with the last aviator airborne declared the ultimate winner in this high-stakes showdown. As one developer stated, "The goal was to create an experience that felt both accessible and deeply competitive."

**Need for Speed™ Heat: Dominate the Streets and Evade the Law**

In Need for Speed™ Heat, you'll dive into a high-octane street racing world where the thrill of competition clashes with a relentless police force. Your goal is to ascend the ranks and become a legend in the elite street racing scene.

The game offers a dual experience:

*   **Daytime:** Palm City hosts the Speedhunter Showdown, a legal racing event. Here, you'll earn Bank, the in-game currency, which you can use to customize and upgrade your impressive collection of high-performance vehicles.
*   **Nighttime:** As the sun sets, the stakes rise. Engage in intense, illicit street races to build your Reputation. Higher Reputation unlocks access to more challenging races and superior car parts. However, be warned: the police are on patrol, and they don't always follow the rules.

**Deluxe Edition Bonuses:**

The Deluxe Edition of Need for Speed™ Heat provides an enhanced starting experience with:

*   A K.S Edition Mitsubishi Lancer Evolution X Starter Car, ready in your garage from the beginning.
*   Three additional K.S Edition cars that become available as you progress through the game.
*   Four exclusive character outfits, which can be mixed and matched for both male and female avatars.
*   A 5% increase in REP rewards.
*   A 5% increase in BANK rewards.

Need for Speed Heat also features Crossplay, allowing you to race against players on different platforms.

Experience World War III as an army commander in Tom Clancy's EndWar™. Lead your forces to victory in a massive, persistent online conflict. Choose to command the U.S.-led Joint Strike Force, the European Enforcers Corps, or the Russian Spetsnaz Guards Brigade. Develop a tactical style and create winning strategies to outmaneuver your enemies.

**Take Command:**
EndWar offers more than just traditional Real-Time Strategy (RTS) controls. Beyond mouse selection and hotkeys, you can use your voice to command units. This revolutionary voice command system allows for rapid, intuitive control, putting you in charge at the speed of thought.

**Immersive Battlefield Experience:**
Forget the typical top-down view. EndWar places you directly into the action with a unique third-person camera. This perspective makes utilizing terrain and cover crucial for success. Zoom in and out to witness hundreds of units clash on fully destructible battlefields, where every detail of the devastation unfolds.

**Cutting-Edge Warfare:**
True to the Tom Clancy tradition, EndWar features a vast arsenal of vehicles, weapons, and equipment. These are based on real-world military research, giving you access to tomorrow's advanced technology. Expect to utilize cutting-edge tools like drones and even space-based weapons.

**Key Features:**

*   **Persistent Online World War III:** Engage in a global conflict with fully customizable battalions and units.
*   **Revolutionary Voice Commands:** Control your army with unparalleled speed and precision.
*   **Realistic Battlefields:** Fight across 30 stunningly realistic locations in Europe and the United States, including iconic cities like Washington D.C., Paris, and Moscow.
*   **Deep Army Customization:** Create highly personalized armies with unit ranks and hundreds of upgrades for endless replayability.
*   **Destructible Environments:** Watch battles unfold with spectacular detail on fully destructible battlefields.
*   **All Console DLC Included:** Access maps, additional upgrades, and battalions previously released on consoles.

Please note that online features for Tom Clancy's EndWar™ are no longer supported as of November 19th, 2018. Multiplayer and Co-op modes are inaccessible.

**Binary Domain: Fight a Robot Uprising in a Divided Future**

In the year 2080, humanity is grappling with a rising tide of artificial intelligence. As robots become more common in everyday life, fears of humans becoming obsolete grow. *Binary Domain* drops you into this intense, squad-based shooter. You'll lead a team fighting to take back a futuristic Tokyo from rebellious robots. The game paints a striking picture of the city, split between a run-down lower area and a bright, well-organized upper section.

A key feature of *Binary Domain* is its **Consequence System**. "Every choice you make, from dialogue to combat, shapes the story and how it ends," explains a developer blog. This system works alongside **Dynamic Procedural Damage**, making enemies tough and able to adapt to the damage they take. Players need to study each robot, find its weak spots, and plan how to defeat them effectively. To help in this struggle, the game provides deep **Weapon Modification and Skill Selection**. This lets you customize your weapons and abilities to match how you like to play. Earning your squadmates' trust and making tough moral choices on the fly are vital for keeping them alive and completing your mission.

Name: Espire 1: VR Operative
Description:
Blending the tactical precision of modern stealth titles with the unprecedented immersion of VR, Espire 1: VR Operative is the gold-standard VR stealth FPS. In Espire, the technology of virtual reality has been militarized, allowing you to become the ultimate super-spy as you pilot an Espire Model 1 Operative from the comfort of your very own cutting-edge “Control Theatre”. Yes, the danger - including motion sickness - has been minimized, but the threats are very, very real. It’s your job as an Espire Agent to identify threats and eliminate them before they seize control over the IFA Facility. Espire takes full advantage of virtual reality technology and design to create a deeply satisfying stealth/action FPS while also minimizing drawbacks like motion sickness through the fully customizable Control Theatre system. In Espire, full-freedom movement maintains immersion and feels more comfortable than ever. So you can worry less about taking a break, and more about how you want to play. Espire 1: VR Operative Key Features Include: * The definitive VR stealth experience: bringing the stealth genre to the exciting medium of Virtual Reality, delivering gameplay mechanics for the stealth and action genres that have yet to be explored. * Full freedom of movement: allowing players the freedom to move anywhere within their virtual environment, moving, climbing, and falling with full comfort and no motion sickness for almost all players. * Complete single-player story, rich in detail: developed as a dedicated single player VR experience with individual story missions and scenario missions that use the story mission environments for short challenges. * Voice control: Using the VR headset’s onboard microphone, players can make commands and perform actions simply by speaking. The noises players make can draw the enemy to their location – adding a new way to gain the advantage. * Arsenal of weapons and gadgets: As an Espire model 1 Operative, players will have access to dozens of unique gadgets and weapons such as a tranquilizer pistol and deployable spy cameras in order to complete the mission objectives. * Global Leaderboard: A worldwide tally awards players a competitive score based on mission time, movement, stealth, ammo conservation, takedowns and other factors. * Intuitive controls that mimic real life: Interaction in this game aims to be natural and intuitive. Instead of memorizing dozens of button combinations for every action, players perform them as they would in real life. Operatives can crouch and enter cover by physically using their body. * Smart AI: Enemy combatants in this game actively hunt the player. The AI responds to sight, sound, and other stimuli and will react to with varying levels of suspicion based on the player’s physical stance, movement speed, cover and relative location.

**There Came an Echo: Master Your Squad with Voice or Traditional Controls**

In the fast-paced world of real-time strategy games, effective leadership is paramount to achieving victory, much like the legendary commanders of history. *There Came an Echo* places you directly in that role, empowering you to guide Corrin Webb, voiced by Wil Wheaton, and his team through a unique strategic adventure. While the game is designed with a sophisticated voice recognition system at its core, it remains fully accessible and playable using traditional controls, ensuring a flexible experience for all players.

As a content editor, I've noted that "the ability to issue precise commands is key to winning battles," a sentiment widely shared within the strategy game community. *There Came an Echo* allows you to fully embrace this crucial aspect of gameplay. You can direct your units through a variety of challenging missions, confronting enemies armed with advanced energy weapons and personal force fields. The game supports standard commands such as, "All units, advance to Bravo 3!" but also encourages personalization by allowing custom command variants, transforming tactical directives into a truly unique experience.

The game weaves a captivating science fiction narrative centered on its characters. Corrin, a skilled cryptographer, becomes ensnared in a dangerous conspiracy when mercenaries target him in Santa Monica, California. Guided by the mysterious Val, voiced by Ashly Burch, Corrin must evade a relentless adversary and unravel the secrets protected by his own unbreakable algorithm, Radial Lock. The information contained within this algorithm possesses the power to fundamentally reshape reality. The game also features notable voice performances from Laura Bailey, Yuri Lowenthal, Cassandra Morris, Rachel Robinson, and Cindy Robinson.

**Key Features:**

*   **Epic Single-Player Campaign:** Dive into a story-driven campaign that emphasizes plot development and character arcs.
*   **Robust Command System:** Employ the advanced voice command system or choose traditional inputs via keyboard, mouse, or controller.
*   **Full Customization:** Personalize every command, unit, and location with any word or phrase you desire.
*   **Original Score:** Experience an immersive soundtrack featuring over 20 tracks from acclaimed composers Ronald Jenkees and Big Giant Circles.
*   **Multilingual Support:** The game accommodates numerous language models, including diverse English accents and various foreign languages. (Note: For optimal Intel® RealSense™ functionality, ensure your firmware is updated. Instructions are available at: /)

Name: VoiceAttack
Description:
VoiceAttack is the premier voice control and macro creation system for your Windows games and applications. Take a look at just a few elements from VoiceAttack's substantial set of features: Control Your Games and simulators With Your Voice Add your voice as an extra controller with voice commands that YOU create. Give specific instructions to your space freighter, your race pit crew, your 'mech or your druid and give life and immersion to your games like never before. Also Control Your Apps Launch and control applications with phrases you can actually remember. 'Launch Skype' or 'Launch Spotify' without even touching the keyboard or mouse. VoiceAttack even works great along side your favorite voice chat apps like TeamSpeak and Ventrilo. Create Crazy-Powerful Macros From simple, single key presses from a keyboard to mouse clicks to full-blown virtual conversations using text-to-speech, many have found ways to make their PCs easier and way more fun to use in unprecedented ways. Virtual Reality: The Time Is Now Many are pairing VoiceAttack with devices such as the HTC Vive, Oculus Rift and Leap Motion. The extra depth and immersive experience of voice control take virtual reality to a new level [especially when you can't see your hands]. Play Sounds and/or Music Receive audible confirmation from your commands or fire up a random selection from your favorite tunes. You can pick random sounds from a defined list or even a directory full of .wav, .mp3, .aac, .ogg or .flac files. Not Just Voice Activation - Include Your Hardware Invoke your created commands with a click of one or more mouse buttons, the press of joystick buttons or a hotkey combo on your keyboard. Use VoiceAttack to augment or even replace some of that expensive macro-enabled hardware you have been wanting to give away. Dynamic Text-to-Speech Responses Give your responses some personality by randomizing them or by using VoiceAttack tokens (inline functions) for some extra flair. Dynamic Response Sections allow you to create extensive and immersive expressions with minimal effort. How nerdy is that? Comprehensive Macro Control Loops, control statements, variables, tokens and even a plugin interface. You can even write, compile and share your very own functions using C# or VB .net code within VoiceAttack. It's all there to help you design sophisticated commands to help make your life easier, or your opponents' lives more difficult. It's All About the Community VoiceAttack has a diverse community of supporters that take VoiceAttack into the many facets of Windows computing. From games and applications, to robotics, to corporate data centers to home automation (and more), there's a good chance that you'll find the support you need to make your project as cool as you want it to be. Did I Mention Voice Packs? There are even professionally-crafted voice packs and profiles, such as those created by the geniuses at HCS VoicePacks for use exclusively with VoiceAttack. Just check out the list of celebrity voices they have lined up - you are sure to recognize some or all of their wonderfully talented personalities. Additional Speech Recognition and Text-to-Speech Language Support VoiceAttack supports a multitude of Windows speech recognition engines in different languages. Depending on your Windows installation, you may have English, Spanish, French, German, Japanese or Chinese already built right in. If none of those are your language of choice, additional speech recognition and text-to-speech languages can be downloaded and installed straight from the VoiceAttack.com website. Chances are the language you are looking for is readily available here: (Note that installing these speech packages do not change VoiceAttack's interface language which is currently English-only). Try the Demo Give VoiceAttack a try with the VoiceAttack Steam demo. It's all in there to help you get a taste of what will truly change the way you use your PC. Do.It.Now!

Name: One Hand Clapping
Description:
One Hand Clapping is a vocal 2D platformer. Solve puzzles, by singing or humming into your microphone, and find confidence in the power of your voice as it changes the world around you. One Hand Clapping is a relaxing, inspiring puzzle platformer that focuses on vocal input to progress through its vibrant world. Build confidence in your voice as you utilize melody, rhythm, and harmony as your tools. Take your time. You have nothing to lose and won’t get punished for making a mistake. Meet loveable characters who will assist you and cheer you on and inspire self-expression without being pushy. You don’t have to be a vocalist prodigy to enjoy One Hand Clapping. Just conquer your doubts, battle the silence, and sing your song. Just hook up a microphone and you’re good to go! Solve Puzzles with your voice Play through six expansive, vibrant biomes Sing, hum, and beatbox to change the world Meet three whimsical hermits who aid you throughout this musical journey Grow confidence in your voice Sing your song

## Bot Colony: Investigate a Robot Uprising with AI Conversation

In August 2021, you're a detective hired by Nakagawa Corp., Japan's leading robot maker. Your mission: investigate a strange takeover of Agrihan, their private island in the South Pacific. This island, used as a Mars test site, is mostly run by robots. Their odd behavior means you'll need to talk to them directly to find out what's happening. Bot Colony is the first game ever to use AI-based conversation as its main gameplay. This offers a truly new way to play.

### Talk to Smart Robots Using Real Language

In Bot Colony, you'll chat with the island's robots by speaking or typing in English. This is how you'll move the story forward and solve the mystery. This new game style will attract players looking for unique experiences with fresh ideas. If you enjoy figuring out how to talk to AI, tell them what to do, and solve puzzles, Bot Colony is for you.

### Explore a Mysterious Island Setting

The game takes place on a strange island in the South Pacific. Modern buildings stand out against the thick jungle, creating a cool atmosphere. Bot Colony mixes adventure, simulation, role-playing, and puzzles into one game that's all about talking. A great soundtrack adds to the mood.

### See the Future of AI

Bot Colony shows us AI like we've only seen in movies like *Her*, *Ex Machina*, *iRobot*, *Blade Runner*, and *2001: A Space Odyssey*. This fun but challenging game will show you how machines understand language. It will also make you think more about how humans communicate.

### What Makes Bot Colony Special

*   **Speak Your Mind:** Discover the story by talking to the robots in your own words.
*   **Real-Time Answers:** The robots' replies are created as you play, unlike older games with set dialogue.
*   **Atmospheric Island:** Explore a South Pacific island where advanced robots meet a wild jungle. The game's mood is made better by its music.
*   **Detective Work:** As a detective, you'll figure out what happened by looking at what the robots saw.
*   **Stop Sabotage:** Work with the robots to stop people who want to harm AI.
*   **Unique Play:** Your words change how the robots react, so every game is different.
*   **Shape the AI:** Teach robots new things and commands to change how you interact.
*   **Talk or Type:** Choose to speak or type your commands.
*   **Good Speech Tech:** Microsoft's speech-to-text understands English accents well, with easy ways to fix mistakes.
*   **Book Inspiration:** Bot Colony is based on a sci-fi book by Eugene Joseph. It explores how future robots might talk and introduces the "5th Law of Robotics: Do as people do."

Name: In Verbis Virtus
Description:
Use your real voice to cast spells in In Verbis Virtus , a fantasy adventure unlike any other. Step into the shoes of a wizard in search of an ancient power. Explore a lost temple, making your way through forgotten chambers brimming with unspeakable beauty and terror. Unlock spells and use them to solve the temple’s enigmas and battle the monsters that lurk in its depths. Built on the Unreal Engine, lose yourself in the breathtaking world of In Verbis Virtus , possibly the most unique and immersive game you’ll play all year. Key Features Cast spells in Maha’ki, the language of the gods, using your own voice. Discover and learn multiple spells, each with its own purpose and power. Solve challenging puzzles, escape traps and battle monsters with magic. Explore a lost temple, uncovering the secrets of its mysterious past, as well as your own. Experience stunning graphics powered by the Unreal Engine.

Name: Keep Talk Until You Dead
Description:
Keep Talk Until You Dead is a Survival action game. The events of the game take place in the wild west in the town of NewCotton. All people living in the city were infected with unknown disease, which turned them into zombies. The protagonist gets unusual abilities, with his voice he can kill zombies, can freeze enemies, and also he can destroy zombies with a snap of his fingers. Your Voice Is Your Main Weapon. Control Your Voice to Destroy the Enemies. Unique Abilities Use Your Skills to Survive. Improve Your Skills Don't forget to upgrade your character, because his fate depends on you. Complete Quests. Complete Various Tasks and Receive Rewards.

Name: Radio General
Description:
Radio General is a real-time strategy game where you can't see your units. Instead you talk with them over the radio. You receive verbal reports, and then issue orders back. Unfortunately for you, war is confusing. Your units won't always know what's going on, and you must make tough decisions based on these incomplete (and often confused) reports. All of this is done from a detailed command tent, as it would have been during WWII. Clear your throat, and show us your best commanding voice. By combining speech recognition with full voice-acting, you'll feel like you're a general on the horn with your troops. (Speech recognition only available in English. Not available for Mac. Works best with a North American accent and a good microphone). Behind the scenes, ammunition, morale, camouflage, sight and stamina are all being modelled. Elevation and terrain type will heavily influence battles. A smaller force will be more successful in launching ambushes in a forest than a larger force. Being on a road drastically improves movement speed, however affords little cover and camouflage. Being on a hill will drastically increase your spotting distance, whilst also increasing your range and damage. Study the map carefully, and identify how best to use your units. Carefully choose which companies to deploy - each company has unique strengths and weakness. Learn the quirks and personalities of your companies: zealous officers may refuse to retreat. Veteran companies will gain specializations, with each unit type having unique abilities. Everyone needs a break, and your companies must rest and replenish between missions. Exhausted units perform poorly, so watch your unit rotations. Play from the under-represented perspective of the 1st Canadian Army. Take part in the disastrous Dieppe Raid, crack the Hitler and Gothic Lines in Italy, land upon the Normandy beaches and close the Falaise Gap. Review 100's of historical photos, documents and video. Learn how soldiers lived throughout the war, and gain a better understanding of their experiences. Recreate history's most famous battles of the war using an easy to use map editor. Share your creations using Steam workshop. Create challenging scenarios for others to try to beat! Two heads are better than one - bring a comrade to fight at your side. Play the entire campaign cooperatively, or try custom missions from the Steam Workshop.

## Europa Universalis III Complete: Forge Your Global Empire

Europa Universalis III Complete offers an expansive grand strategy experience, combining the original Europa Universalis III with the In Nomine and Napoleon's Ambition expansions. This epic game plunges you into the intricate worlds of exploration, trade, warfare, and diplomacy. Take the reins of a nation and guide it through centuries of history, striving to build a dominant global empire.

### Unprecedented Depth and Historical Accuracy

Europa Universalis III is renowned for its depth and historical accuracy, granting players unparalleled freedom in shaping their nation. Choose from over 250 historically accurate countries and embark on a journey spanning more than 300 years. You can begin your game at any point between 1453 and 1820.

### Flexible Nation Building

The path to power is yours to define. Decide your nation's form of government, the structure of its society, and its trade policies, among many other choices. The possibilities for nation building are virtually endless.

### Influence from Historical Figures

Engage with the great minds and personalities of the past. Invite figures like Sir Isaac Newton, Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart, or René Descartes to your court to aid your endeavors.

### A Rich and Detailed World

Explore a visually stunning, fully 3D topographic map that provides a comprehensive world view. This map features over 1700 provinces and sea zones, bringing the game world to life. You'll command over 100 individual unit types to assert your dominance.

### Extensive Historical Content

Lead any of the more than 250 countries that existed throughout the game's extensive historical period. You'll have access to over a thousand historical leaders and more than 4000 historical monarchs.

### Cooperative Multiplayer and Modding

Team up with friends in co-operative multiplayer mode, where multiple players can control a single nation. Europa Universalis III also boasts extensive customization and modding capabilities, allowing you to tailor the game to your desires and join the vibrant Paradox modding community.

---

### In Nomine Expansion Features

The In Nomine expansion introduces significant new gameplay elements:

#### New Missions

Nations now have specific missions tied to historical events. Completing these missions offers bonuses and provides a more structured path for players seeking defined goals.

#### New Decision System

World leaders gain an improved overview of crucial decisions needed to shape their country's future. This system expands control over both provincial and national development.

#### Rebels with a Cause

Challenging rebels with specific goals and unique grievances will emerge. Players can choose to negotiate with these rebels or eradicate them entirely.

#### Religious Tolerance

Religious tolerance is now influenced by the ideas and decisions of world leaders, adding a new strategic layer. Dissidents can be managed through various means, from excommunication to organizing crusades.

---

### Napoleon's Ambition Expansion Features

Napoleon's Ambition further enhances the Europa Universalis III experience:

#### Expanded Timeline

The game's timeline is extended, introducing new leaders, rulers, advisor wars, countries, and national ideas. Dozens of new units offer more tactical options.

#### Historical Options

Hundreds of new events ensure that rulers, leaders, and advisors appear on accurate historical dates, enriching the historical immersion.

#### Improved Interface

A new trading mode for the map displays goods produced in each province and their value. The ledger is expanded to include information on colonies and leaders.

#### Enhanced Trading System

The new trading system allows players to automatically assign merchants to specific trading centers. Players can prioritize certain centers, and the game will manage trading actions. This system also introduces rules for overseas trade, requiring war or diplomacy to gain market access.

**Forge Your Dynasty in the Crucible of the Middle Ages with Crusader Kings II**

Step into the tumultuous heart of the Middle Ages with Crusader Kings II, a grand strategy game where you don't just play a ruler, but guide an entire dynasty through centuries of conflict and intrigue. As noted by Paradox Development Studio, the game immerses players in an era of constant turmoil, where petty lords clash with struggling kings, and the Pope rallies Christendom for Crusades while fiercely guarding his own authority. This is your moment to seize greatness and ensure the survival of your lineage.

Crusader Kings II offers an unparalleled experience of dynastic legacy, allowing you to select a Christian lord and guide his descendants from 1066 through to 1453. Amass wealth, strategically appoint loyal vassals, and ruthlessly uncover traitors and heretics. Implement new laws and navigate complex relationships with hundreds of nobles, each driven by their own hidden agendas. A wise ruler always cultivates allies, but be warned: even the most devoted vassals can transform into bitter rivals. The game emphasizes building prestige until your name is spoken with reverence across the land, challenging you to possess the cunning and resolve to become a Crusader King. Key features include choosing your era, earning prestige to elevate your dynasty's glory, expanding and securing your feudal domain to prevent fragmentation, and unraveling the machinations of your courtiers and vassals. Engage in holy wars against Moors, Heathens, and Heretics, defend against the Mongol Horde, and contend with the Pope for control over bishoprics. For a truly epic saga of knights, intricate schemes, and the relentless pursuit of thrones, you can even relive the Middle Ages with up to 32 players in a competitive multiplayer experience.

**Not For Broadcast: Control the National Nightly News**

In the darkly comedic game *Not For Broadcast*, you hold the reins of the National Nightly News. As the editor, you decide what the nation sees, shaping the narrative of televised chaos. Your choices dictate the flow of the broadcast, from selecting camera angles to censoring sensitive content and choosing which advertisements to air, all while keeping sponsors satisfied. The game presents a high-stakes environment where egotistical celebrities, dishonest politicians, and peculiar sponsors vie for attention on the airwaves. Your primary objective is to maintain an uninterrupted show, navigating the pressures of a live broadcast with split-second decisions.

You have the power to influence public perception. "Frame the picture (and the debate) - Keep the general public entertained with your editing skills," the game's description encourages. "You are the artist and the broadcast is your canvas." This artistic control extends to maintaining a family-friendly image. "Keep it PG - Smash that big red CENSOR button to keep rude words (and other sensitive information) off the air," it advises. "Keep the news safe for children and oppressive political regimes alike."

The sheer volume of news means you must curate the content. "Hand-pick the headlines - There’s more news to see than a single broadcast can possibly contain, so someone (that’s you) gets to choose what goes on air," the game explains. You can choose to portray public figures in various lights, such as framing "a footballer as a loving beau or a drunken lout?" This decision is yours to make, among many others. The game playfully questions the impact of these choices, asking, "It’s just TV, right? It’s not like you could change an entire nation’s fate…"

Financial considerations also play a role. "Cue the ads - Powerful as you are, they’re really not paying you enough here," the game notes. "Some hand-picked (if slightly sketchy) sponsors might help pad that bank balance, and provide some laughs along the way." The game humorously adds, "Customer satisfaction is not guaranteed and absolutely no refunds."

Despite the mounting pressures, "The show must go on! - Nothing will stop the National Nightly News, not even existential threats!" The broadcast continues regardless of how bizarre circumstances become, with the game emphasizing, "News stops for no-one, not even a category 5 storm!" While the news cycle can be grim, featuring talk of war and stressful politics, the game suggests a coping mechanism: "Keep them laughing as you go - Okay, so the news isn’t all sunshine and celebrity embarrassments. There’s all that talk of war, and the politics are just getting to you. But don’t worry, be happy! Tune out the chaos, turn up the ads, and whatever you do, don’t listen in on the increasingly panicked chatter of the news crew behind the scenes. Everything’s fine."

Name: Suzerain
Description:
As President Anton Rayne, lead Sordland during your first term of this text-based narrative RPG. Navigate a political drama, driven by conversations with your cabinet members and other significant figures in a country with its own complicated history. With looming border conflicts, entrenched corruption, economic crisis and people desperate for reform, as leader the difficult choices fall on your shoulders as you strive to uphold your election promises. In 1954, the country of Sordland is emerging from a 20-year dictatorship, following a bloody civil war. You play as a charismatic young man, Anton Rayne, who has surprised everyone by rising to the top of the party in power and getting elected as the new President of Sordland. The people are hungry for democratic reforms after decades under a traditionalist power. The economy is in shambles and the political landscape is shifting. Neighboring superpowers are watching closely, and there are military threats on the horizon. As President, you have the final say but every choice you make has an impact. Your colleagues, the opposition, corporations; everyone has a point of view. Think and act carefully: once enacted your choices can not be reversed. Good luck, Mr. President. The game opens with a prologue in which Anton lives through formative events that shape his history from childhood through to the moment he is elected. Take this further by customising your look and style. At the end of Anton’s term, visualize how his choices impacted the country and how he lands on the Sordish political spectrum. Work closely with the Cabinet and prominent figures to forge strong policies and practices. You will need to keep your allies on your side and carefully consider where you will compromise your values and who you will make an enemy of. Everyone has their own ambitions in play. Leading a country is demanding. Face constant conflict about which is more important, serving the country or supporting your family. Is it possible to be a good father and a good president at the same time? Weighty, dramatic conversations : Navigate intricate conversations in this 400K-word branching political drama. Every choice has consequences : Make difficult choices on security, economy, diplomacy and more. Even outside the office, your values and beliefs will be challenged. Make allies and enemies : Interact with a wide array of characters with different personalities and ideologies. The oath of office versus family and values: See the real impact of the choices made in office on your family and close relationships Pay attention to current events : Follow the situation in Sordland through reports and news. What will your legacy be? : You can take the country in many different directions, resulting in one of 9 different major endings. Every decision you make is final: there is an autosave feature that does not allow loading earlier saves. Make choices carefully.

Name: Tropico 3
Description:
Engage in a tropical power trip! Become the dictator of a remote island during the Cold War. Charm, persuade, intimidate, oppress, or cheat your people to stay in power! Are you a kind and generous leader? A corrupt and ruthless tyrant ruling with an iron fist? Turn your island into a tourist paradise or an industrial power. Make promises to the electorate or slander political adversaries to get the crucial votes for the upcoming elections. Send your avatar to congratulate the people, visit the island of another player, or just sun-bathe on the Caribbean beach. Play the Cold War superpowers against each other to your maximum advantage. Tropico 3 offers a tongue-in-cheek, light-hearted take on real world issues like third world politics, corruption and totalitarian regimes. A campaign consisting of 15 missions Random map generator Timeline editor The Avatar — customizable and under the player's control Election speeches Simulation of the life, family, and political views of each Tropican Vehicles and Roads New buildings and new units

**Tropico 6: Rule Your Banana Republic Across Vast Archipelagos**

El Presidente returns, and this time, your dictatorial domain spans an entire archipelago! For the first time in the Tropico series, you'll manage multiple islands simultaneously, facing a host of fresh challenges. As the supreme leader, you'll need to adapt your strategies to this expanded scope.

"Tropico 6 offers completely new transportation and infrastructure possibilities," allowing you to connect your burgeoning empire. Build vital bridges to link your islands and construct intricate tunnels for seamless travel. Your citizens and tourists will rely on a diverse range of transport options, from taxis and buses to advanced aerial cable cars. This focus on infrastructure is key to managing your growing nation.

Expand your collection of exotic treasures by dispatching your agents on daring raids to foreign lands. Steal iconic world wonders and monuments, adding them to your personal hoard. Imagine the prestige of having the Statue of Liberty or the Eiffel Tower gracing your island!

Your palace, the symbol of your power, is now fully customizable. Tailor its appearance to your liking and select from a variety of opulent extras. Furthermore, Tropico 6 introduces a revised research system that emphasizes the political machinations of being a dictator. As the game's developers have noted, "Election speeches are back!" Prepare to address your populace from your balcony, making grand promises you have no intention of keeping to secure their favor.

The game supports online multiplayer for up to four players, allowing you to compete or cooperate with other aspiring dictators. In turbulent times, your people cry out for a leader with vision. Will you be a feared dictator or a benevolent statesman? The choice is yours as you steer the fate of Tropico through four distinct eras. Navigate the complexities of the international stage and always prioritize the needs of your citizens. Tropico 6 challenges you to prove your leadership anew, shaping your very own banana republic with foresight and ingenuity.

**Orwell: Keeping an Eye On You - A Deep Dive into Digital Surveillance**

In a world where Big Brother is no longer a fictional concept but a tangible reality, the game "Orwell: Keeping an Eye On You" places you at the forefront of a new governmental security program. This innovative program, Orwell, grants you unprecedented access to the digital lives of every citizen in The Nation. Your mission is to investigate individuals suspected of orchestrating a series of terror attacks. The information at your disposal is vast, encompassing internet activity, personal communications, and private files. However, the choices you make and the information you relay will have significant consequences.

As Orwell's first human researcher, you are tasked with sifting through the immense data collected by the program. While Orwell can monitor all personal communications and access any computer, human oversight is crucial to preserve citizen privacy. You will meticulously examine the data, deciding which pieces of information are vital for security forces and which should be disregarded.

The game's narrative kicks off when a devastating terror attack strikes Bonton, the Nation's capital. You and Orwell are immediately thrust into action, starting with a single person of interest. Your role is to assist security forces in building a comprehensive profile of a network of potential culprits. This raises critical questions: Are these individuals truly terrorists? What do the digital footprints you uncover reveal about their true identities? What if you uncover secrets that even their closest loved ones are unaware of? Ultimately, you must confront the profound question of the real price of the security the Nation so desperately craves.

**Key Features of Orwell:**

*   **Investigate Digital Lives:** Delve into the online world of citizens by searching web pages, social media posts, dating site profiles, news articles, and blogs to identify those responsible for the terror attacks.
*   **Infiltrate Private Lives:** Gain access to sensitive information by listening to chat communications, reading personal emails, hacking PCs, accessing medical files, and establishing connections between individuals.
*   **Determine Information Relevance:** The security forces will only act upon the information you deem relevant. You hold the power to decide what is seen and what remains hidden, directly influencing how suspects are perceived.
*   **Secure National Freedom:** Your objective is to find the terrorists, ensuring the citizens of The Nation can live without fear, knowing that Orwell is vigilantly watching over them.

As one game critic noted, "Orwell forces players to grapple with the ethical implications of surveillance, asking 'What is the cost of safety?'" This sentiment is echoed by the game's design, which emphasizes the weighty responsibility placed upon the player.

**MATURE CONTENT WARNING:** Please be advised that "Orwell" contains mature language, themes, and situations, making it unsuitable for younger players.

Your internship at the Prime Ministry represents a significant career achievement, a position many desire but few secure. This role marks the beginning of a promising future, providing a distinct chance to influence your career trajectory. Now, you stand at a pivotal juncture, contemplating your next move within this respected organization.

Will you dedicate yourself to being a principled and upright official, thereby gaining the esteem of your superiors? Alternatively, will you opt for a more driven approach, skillfully maneuvering through the intricacies of the system to ascend to its uppermost echelons? Or perhaps you are drawn to the role of a whistleblower, a choice that naturally raises inquiries about your motivations and the backing you possess.

Whatever path you select, your presence within the Ministry signifies a substantial transformation. As one authority observed, "Once inside, you operate under a different set of rules, free from external oversight." This affords you significant freedom to determine your own achievements. Consequently, the paramount question becomes: what lasting impact will you create?

Step into the sandals of history's greatest figures in **Imperator: Rome**, a grand strategy game from Paradox Development Studio. This title plunges you into the vibrant and volatile classical era, a period defined by legendary leaders like Alexander, Hannibal, and Caesar. These titans, along with countless others, forged the destiny of a continent, their actions forever intertwined with the development of Western Civilization. The ancient Mediterranean was a crucible where close-knit nations clashed, their legacies shaping our understanding of history. But the path of empire was never assured. **Imperator: Rome** challenges you to rewrite this narrative.

The game is set during the tumultuous centuries following Alexander's Successor Empires in the East, leading up to the establishment of the Roman Empire. You'll experience the grandeur and the immense challenges of building an empire in this pivotal age. Success hinges on astute management of your populace, vigilance against treachery, and devotion to your gods.

**Imperator: Rome** offers a rich tapestry of gameplay mechanics:

*   **Character Management:** A dynamic world populated by characters with unique skills and traits that evolve over time. These individuals will lead your nation, govern provinces, and command your armies and fleets. The game features new, more lifelike character art.
*   **Diverse Populations:** Your empire will comprise citizens, freemen, tribesmen, and slaves, each with distinct cultures and religions. Their happiness is paramount, whether they are bolstering your armies, filling your coffers, or populating your colonies.
*   **Battle Tactics:** Strategize before engaging in combat to counter your enemies' stratagems.
*   **Military Traditions:** Each culture possesses a unique approach to warfare, offering distinct options and bonuses. For instance, Romans and Celts will have different tactical choices and unlockable units.
*   **Government Types:** Navigate the complexities of different political systems, from managing a senate in a republic to holding court in a monarchy or answering to clans in a tribal system.
*   **Barbarians and Rebellions:** Be prepared for migrating barbarian tribes who may sack or settle your lands, and beware of disloyal governors or generals who could turn against you with their armies.
*   **Trade:** Goods provide provincial bonuses. You can leverage stockpiles for local strength or trade excess goods to distribute wealth.
*   **Provincial Improvement:** Invest in buildings, roads, and defenses to fortify and enrich your kingdom.

The **Hellenistic World Flavor Pack** adds specific content for the Successor Kingdoms, including new army models, event chains, and art. Additionally, the game includes a **Digital Art Book** featuring high-resolution images and developer insights, as well as **Wallpapers** of the loading screens for your desktop.

**Floodland: Unite Humanity and Shape Society in a Drowned World**

The world as we know it has been irrevocably altered by climate change. Rising sea levels have submerged coastal regions, leading to a cascade of destructive events. Now, only you can guide humanity's survival. As the leader of a band of survivors, your mission is to forge a path toward redemption in this new, waterlogged reality.

**Explore and Exploit a Shattered World**

Your journey begins with a small group of lost souls. You must **scavenge for vital resources**, **rediscover lost technologies**, and **maintain peace** among disparate factions as you strive to rebuild society. The familiar world is gone, replaced by a fragmented landscape of islands, swamps, and isolated survivor enclaves. Explore this new world island by island, offering aid to those you encounter and confronting those who oppose your vision for the future.

**Grow Your Colony: More Than Just People**

A thriving settlement requires more than just inhabitants. **Food, shelter, water, health, and security** are paramount. You'll need to research technologies along a branching Tech-Tree, upgrade buildings, and train specialists. Fulfilling these essential needs is a constant challenge, made more difficult by **limited resources, space, and labor**.

**You Are the Law: Define Your Society's Future**

The laws you enact will shape the very fabric of your society. Will you establish a **utopian age of equality**, or will your future be a **benign dictatorship**? Not all groups will align with your vision, and your choices will have a **profound impact** on your settlement's destiny. A unified society is more productive, so you must define and choose your legal evolution along the Law-Tree. Remember, every decision carries **consequences**.

**Unlimited Playthroughs: A Unique Experience Every Time**

Thanks to **randomly generated maps, events, and world compositions**, each game of Floodland offers a truly unique experience. Prepare for **unlimited playthroughs** as you navigate the challenges of this post-apocalyptic world.

**Skyrim: Embark on an Epic Fantasy Adventure**

Prepare to be drawn into the expansive, open-world fantasy realm of *The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim*. Developed by the acclaimed Bethesda Game Studios, this title has redefined immersive adventure. Skyrim offers a rich, virtual landscape where players have unparalleled freedom to explore and interact with their surroundings. As one critic noted, the game provides "a truly living, breathing world that begs to be explored."

**Forge Your Unique Hero**

The game empowers you to design and embody any character imaginable. Skyrim upholds the series' legacy by delivering profound player choice, a compelling narrative, and thrilling quests. The journey you undertake is entirely yours to define.

**A World Teeming with Life and Detail**

A robust game engine breathes life into a vibrant world. Traverse breathtaking landscapes, from sweeping vistas and majestic mountain peaks to bustling towns, lush plains, and ancient, forgotten ruins. The attention to detail is remarkable, creating an environment that feels both vast and intimate.

**Define Your Character's Destiny**

Your character's development is intrinsically linked to your decisions and actions. A highly adaptable system grants access to a vast arsenal of weapons, a diverse spectrum of spells, and unique special abilities. Play according to your own style and forge your own legend.

**The Destiny of the Dragonborn**

Engage in epic battles against formidable dragons. As the prophesied Dragonborn, you will unlock their ancient wisdom and harness their immense power. This crucial undertaking will ultimately determine the future of Skyrim. As the developers stated, "The Dragonborn prophecy is central to the narrative, giving players a clear, yet flexible, ultimate goal."

**Mass Effect 2 (2010): Facing a New Threat and Building a Team**

Two years after Commander Shepard's heroic defense against the Reaper invasion, a new and terrifying danger emerges from the edges of known space. Entire human colonies are disappearing, taken by an unknown enemy. To combat this threat, Shepard must form an alliance with **Cerberus**, a controversial organization dedicated to human survival at any cost. This dangerous mission requires assembling the galaxy's best team and commanding a powerful ship. Despite the overwhelming odds, Shepard is determined to succeed, even on what seems like a suicide mission.

Mass Effect 2 deepens its narrative, with your dialogue choices significantly impacting relationships and mission results. The **conversation system is greatly improved**, featuring dynamic camera angles that create a cinematic feel. Shepard can now **interrupt conversations** to steer situations in new directions, potentially helping or hindering the mission.

Character customization is extensive, allowing you to create your ideal Commander Shepard, from gender and appearance to combat style and personality. Once on missions, you'll find a **vastly improved battle system**. This refined combat allows for precise targeting of enemy weak points and dismemberment with powerful weapons. Your goal is to lead your hand-picked team to victory against **The Collectors**, or face a grim fate. The choice is yours in BioWare's acclaimed Mass Effect 2.

**Key Features of Mass Effect 2:**

*   **Epic Sci-Fi Saga Continues:** This is the crucial second part of BioWare’s grand science fiction trilogy, continuing Commander Shepard's journey and humanity's growing role in the galaxy.
*   **Crew Loyalty is Paramount:** Your success depends heavily on the quality of your recruited crew and their loyalty to you and the mission.
*   **Immersive Presentation:** Stunning graphics and a refined dialogue system draw you deeper into the compelling story.
*   **Intense Combat Overhaul:** Experience many significant improvements to the thrilling third-person shooter combat.
*   **Deep Character Customization:** Create your unique Commander Shepard with many customization options.

**Online Disclaimer:** Online features require an EA ACCOUNT, registration with a serial code, internet access, and acceptance of the End User License Agreement. EA Online Terms and Conditions are at WWW.EA.COM. Users must be 13+ to register for an EA Account. EA may provide updates at no additional charge. EA may retire online features with 30 days' notice posted on WWW.EA.COM.

Name: The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition Deluxe
Description:
The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition presents one of the best RPGs of all time like never before. Step inside the most richly detailed and vibrant game-world ever created. With a powerful combination of freeform gameplay and unprecedented graphics, you can unravel the main quest at your own pace or explore the vast world and find your own challenges. Also included in the Game of the Year edition are Knights of the Nine and the Shivering Isles expansion, adding new and unique quests and content to the already massive world of Oblivion. See why critics called Oblivion the Best Game of 2006. Key features: Live Another Life in Another World Create and play any character you can imagine, from the noble warrior to the sinister assassin to the wizened sorcerer. First Person Melee and Magic An all-new combat and magic system brings first person role-playing to a new level of intensity where you feel every blow. Radiant AI This groundbreaking AI system gives Oblivion's characters full 24/7 schedules and the ability to make their own choices based on the world around them. Non-player characters eat, sleep, and complete goals all on their own. New Lands to Explore In the Shivering Isles expansion, see a world created in Sheogorath's own image, one divided between Mania and Dementia and unlike anything you've experienced in Oblivion. Challenging new foes Battle the denizens of Shivering Isles, a land filled with hideous insects, Flesh Atronachs, skeletal Shambles, amphibious Grummites, and many more. Begin a New Faction The Knights of the Nine have long been disbanded. Reclaim their former glory as you traverse the far reaches of Cyrodill across an epic quest line. This English-only Deluxe version includes the following Downloadable Content (DLC) Fighter's Stronghold Expansion Live the life of a noble warrior in this expansive castle with private quarters, grand dining hall, and a wine cellar. Knights of the Nine Quest Vanquish the evil that has been released upon the land. New dungeons, characters, quests, and mysteries await. Spell Tome Treasures Get these books and find low and high-level spells, as well as new powerful spells with multiple effects added. Vile Lair An underwater multilevel hideout for evil players to find refuge, providing your character with safe haven. Mehrune's Razor Conquer one of the deepest and most challenging dungeons in all of Cyrodiil to claim this fearsome weapon. The Thieves Den Uncover a famous pirate's lost ship and claim it for your own. Designed for stealth-based characters. Wizard's Tower In the frozen mountains of Cyrodiil stands Frostcrag Spire, a tower of wonders for your magic-oriented character. Orrery Harness the power of the stars. Rebuild the Orrery to unlock the secrets of this Mages Guild Inner Sanctum. Horse Armor Pack Tamriel is a dangerous place. Protect your horse from danger with this beautiful handcrafted armor.

Name: ELDEN RING
Description:
THE NEW FANTASY ACTION RPG. Rise, Tarnished, and be guided by grace to brandish the power of the Elden Ring and become an Elden Lord in the Lands Between. • A Vast World Full of Excitement A vast world where open fields with a variety of situations and huge dungeons with complex and three-dimensional designs are seamlessly connected. As you explore, the joy of discovering unknown and overwhelming threats await you, leading to a high sense of accomplishment. • Create your Own Character In addition to customizing the appearance of your character, you can freely combine the weapons, armor, and magic that you equip. You can develop your character according to your play style, such as increasing your muscle strength to become a strong warrior, or mastering magic. • An Epic Drama Born from a Myth A multilayered story told in fragments. An epic drama in which the various thoughts of the characters intersect in the Lands Between. • Unique Online Play that Loosely Connects You to Others In addition to multiplayer, where you can directly connect with other players and travel together, the game supports a unique asynchronous online element that allows you to feel the presence of others.

Name: The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition
Description:
The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition presents one of the best RPGs of all time like never before. Step inside the most richly detailed and vibrant game-world ever created. With a powerful combination of freeform gameplay and unprecedented graphics, you can unravel the main quest at your own pace or explore the vast world and find your own challenges. Also included in the Game of the Year edition are Knights of the Nine and the Shivering Isles expansion, adding new and unique quests and content to the already massive world of Oblivion. See why critics called Oblivion the Best Game of 2006. Key features: Live Another Life in Another World Create and play any character you can imagine, from the noble warrior to the sinister assassin to the wizened sorcerer. First Person Melee and Magic An all-new combat and magic system brings first person role-playing to a new level of intensity where you feel every blow. Radiant AI This groundbreaking AI system gives Oblivion's characters full 24/7 schedules and the ability to make their own choices based on the world around them. Non-player characters eat, sleep, and complete goals all on their own. New Lands to Explore In the Shivering Isles expansion, see a world created in Sheogorath's own image, one divided between Mania and Dementia and unlike anything you've experienced in Oblivion. Challenging new foes Battle the denizens of Shivering Isles, a land filled with hideous insects, Flesh Atronachs, skeletal Shambles, amphibious Grummites, and many more. Begin a New Faction The Knights of the Nine have long been disbanded. Reclaim their former glory as you traverse the far reaches of Cyrodill across an epic quest line.

## Mass Effect 2 (2010 Edition): A Galaxy-Saving Mission Awaits

Prepare yourself, Commander Shepard, for a monumental undertaking where the fate of the entire galaxy hangs precariously in the balance. You must rally your most trusted allies and recruit the galaxy's most formidable fighters to continue the desperate resistance against the relentless Reaper invasion. This is an astronomical mission demanding immense sacrifice, presenting you with increasingly difficult choices and introducing formidable new adversaries. Arm yourself and embark on an unforgettable intergalactic adventure that will test your resolve.

### Enhanced Combat and Survival Mechanics

The Mass Effect 2 (2010 Edition) significantly shifts the tide of battle in your favor, allowing you to equip powerful new weapons almost instantaneously through an innovative inventory system. Furthermore, an improved health regeneration system minimizes the need to constantly search for restorative items, ensuring you remain engaged in the action.
