Instead, players must meticulously build an intricate network of mines, refineries, power plants, and research facilities to achieve this ambitious objective.

**Defending Your Foothold: Facing Hostile Inhabitants**

Your presence on Galatea 37 will inevitably attract attention. As your industrial operations expand and disrupt the planet's natural equilibrium, you will be perceived as a threat. Consequently, robust defenses are paramount. The game requires players to construct walls, barriers, and defensive towers, anticipating increasingly formidable attacks as each day progresses. You will confront thousands of hostile creatures intent on eradicating your presence from the planet.

**Exploration and Resource Management: Unveiling Galatea 37's Secrets**

Galatea 37, situated within the Sycorax belt of the Milky Way galaxy, is an uncharted world. Initial long-distance surveys indicated its habitability and suitability for colonization. The planet is rich in rare minerals and substances, discoverable across its diverse landscapes. Varied biomes present unexpected flora and fauna, alongside challenging weather conditions. To efficiently manage these resources, players are encouraged to construct local outposts in resource-rich areas, utilizing rift technology for seamless transportation.

**The Campaign: An Epic Journey of Survival and Discovery**

The campaign invites players on an epic journey across the varied biomes of Galatea 37. You will establish multiple persistent bases, forming the backbone of your in-game economy. This involves researching alien substances and lifeforms while simultaneously battling hordes of indigenous creatures, clearly displeased by your intrusion. The campaign offers a substantial playtime and a remarkable degree of player freedom within a meticulously detailed, procedurally generated world. As the sole human presence, you have the autonomy to prioritize your objectives and select the technologies you wish to employ.

**Survival and Sandbox Modes: Tailoring Your Experience**

For those seeking a pure test of endurance, the Survival mode challenges players to withstand increasingly difficult waves of enemy creatures for a set duration. Each mission in this mode is randomized, ensuring a high degree of replayability. Alternatively, the Sandbox mode offers complete control over the game's parameters, including resources, enemy spawns, and weather conditions, for players who prefer a less intense experience.

**Customization and Community: Shaping the Game**

*The Riftbreaker™* offers extensive gameplay customization to align with individual playstyles. Players can adjust the frequency and strength of enemy attacks, resource availability, weather events, enemy damage, and numerous other settings. Multiple difficulty presets cater to both hardcore strategy enthusiasts and those seeking a more relaxed base-building adventure. The developers also emphasize community-driven development, actively encouraging feedback and suggestions through their forums, Discord server, and social media channels. This collaborative approach aims to ensure *Riftbreaker* evolves into the game players truly desire.

Name: HELLDIVERS™ Dive Harder Edition
Description:
HELLDIVERS™ is a hardcore, cooperative, twin stick shooter. As part of the elite unit called the HELLDIVERS, players must work together to protect SUPER EARTH and defeat the enemies of mankind in an intense intergalactic war. HELLDIVERS™ Dive Harder Edition is a free upgrade for all existing owners and include: A NEW GAME MODE: 'Proving Grounds'. Take on challenging missions with unique modifiers. NEW loadout system with random- and favorite-loadout options All previous expansions (A New Hell, Masters of the Galaxy, Turning Up The Heat and Democracy Strikes Back). Up to 4 player local and online co-op on STEAM. Full friendly fire - “accidentally” kill your friends, again and again. Direct the full might of the military with a wide variety of Support Stratagems. Community-driven galactic campaign. A universe of worlds to liberate. 100+ hours of gameplay

Name: METAL GEAR RISING: REVENGEANCE
Description:
Developed by Kojima Productions and PlatinumGames, METAL GEAR RISING: REVENGEANCE takes the renowned METAL GEAR franchise into exciting new territory with an all-new action experience. The game seamlessly melds pure action and epic story-telling that surrounds Raiden – a child soldier transformed into a half-human, half-cyborg ninja who uses his High Frequency katana blade to cut through any thing that stands in his vengeful path! A huge success on both Xbox 360® and PlayStation®3, METAL GEAR RISING: REVENGEANCE comes to PC with all the famed moves and action running within a beautifully-realised HD environment. This new PC version includes all three DLC missions: Blade Wolf, Jetstream, and VR Missions, in addition to all customized body upgrades for Raiden, including: White Armor, Inferno Armor, Commando Armor, Raiden’s MGS4 body, and the ever-popular Cyborg Ninja. 'CUTSCENES' option added to the Main Menu. Play any and all cutscenes. 'CODECS' option added to the Main Menu. Play all and any codec conversation scenes. Menu option added to the CHAPTER Menu enabling user to play only the Boss battles. 'GRAPHIC OPTIONS' added to the OPTIONS Menu. Modify resolution, anti-aliasing, etc. There is an option reading 'ZANGEKI' that will modify the amount of cuts you can make.

Name: Persona 5 Royal
Description:
Prepare for the award-winning RPG experience in this definitive edition of Persona 5 Royal, featuring a treasure trove of downloadable content included! Forced to transfer to a high school in Tokyo, the protagonist has a strange dream. “You truly are a prisoner of fate. In the near future, ruin awaits you.” With the goal of “rehabilitation” looming overhead, he must save others from distorted desires by donning the mask of a Phantom Thief. Key Features: Explore Tokyo, unlock Personas, customize your own personal Thieves Den, experience alternate endings, and more Become the ultimate Phantom Thief and defy conventions, discover the power within, and fight for justice in the definitive version of Persona 5 Royal Includes over 40 items of previously released downloadable content Choose between Japanese and English VO

Name: Beat Saber
Description:
Beat Saber is an immersive rhythm experience you have never seen before! Enjoy tons of handcrafted levels and swing your way through the pulsing music beats, surrounded by a futuristic world. Use your sabers to slash the beats as they come flying at you – every beat indicates which saber you need to use and the direction you need to match. With Beat Saber you become a dancing superhero! Features Feel the Rhythm: Immerse yourself in the smoothest combination of music beats and visual effects in Beat Saber’s truly unique gameplay. Handcrafted Levels & Music: Unlike other rhythm games with generated content, music and levels in Beat Saber are drawn precisely by hand to enhance the music experience. Compete in Multiplayer: Challenge your friends or random opponents around the world. Challenging Campaign: Get better every day while completing objectives and challenges in the Campaign. Rise Up the Global Leaderboards: Compete against other Beat Saberists around the world in various difficulties. Easy to Learn, Fun to Master: Everyone can understand the basic game mechanics. It's easy for anyone to pick up and play. Great Exercise: Exercise while dancing and slashing the beats, Beat Saber gets you moving.

**Okami HD: A Legendary Adventure Reimagined**

Embark on an unforgettable journey with Okami HD, a visually stunning masterpiece. This beloved game features a unique Sumi-e ink art style, now presented in breathtaking high definition.

You play as Amaterasu, the Japanese sun goddess. She takes the form of a legendary white wolf, tasked with a crucial mission:

*   **Defeat Orochi:** This eight-headed demon is a tyrannical monster.
*   **Restore Nippon:** Orochi has plunged the world of Nippon into a ruined wasteland.

Okami HD offers players a choice in presentation:

*   **Modern Widescreen:** Enjoy the game in a contemporary format.
*   **Original 4:3 Ratio:** Relive the experience as it was originally released.

The game also includes interactive loading screens, a nostalgic feature from the original title.

**Mission: It's Complicated: A Visual Novel Where Love and Saving the World Collide**

Dive into *Mission: It's Complicated*, a unique visual novel that expertly blends superhero action with romantic relationships. In this game, you guide five distinct heroes on daring nighttime missions. The main challenge is keeping them safe, as any injuries could prevent them from attending important daytime dates. Success depends on building strong bonds between your favorite hero pairings. This connection unlocks more opportunities for romantic or platonic encounters.

As a story-driven game, your choices are crucial. Helping your heroes choose the right dialogue is key to their developing affection. The ultimate goal is to help them fall in love, all while saving the world.

This charming narrative adventure offers many engaging features. The developers describe the game as full of "heart and humor," with delightfully terrible puns and genuinely impactful emotional moments. A key gameplay element is the freedom to "choose your OTP," allowing any of the five heroes to be paired with any other to win.

Beyond romance, the game highlights the importance of platonic relationships through "friend dates." Winning the game can be achieved through either romantic or platonic love, depending on the chosen pair. Every pairing is guaranteed a happy ending, but the real challenge is uncovering the "ULTIMATE happy ending." The game also humorously notes a "serious lack of beds."

The "super cute art" is a visual delight. With over 100,000 words, the game offers a reading experience comparable to a novel, potentially even boosting vocabulary. Notably, *Mission: It's Complicated* features "NO voice acting," encouraging players to imagine their favorite voice actors for each character. The game is also proudly LGBTQ+ friendly.

For those wanting to see all possible outcomes, a skip function lets players bypass completed missions while still getting credit. This speeds up the process of discovering all endings and "juicy dates." In a refreshing move, *Mission: It's Complicated* is entirely free to download and play, with no hidden microtransactions. This accessibility is a core part of the game's release. To spread the cheer, developers offer special Valentine's Day cards, embodying the spirit of "sharing is caring." The game also includes "fun gifs" to enhance the player experience.

Street Fighter® IV revitalizes the iconic fighting series by blending the **classic moves and techniques of Street Fighter® II** with Capcom's cutting-edge technology. This creates an **extraordinary experience** that reintroduces the world to the art of virtual martial arts.

**Everything that made Street Fighter II a global hit** returns in Street Fighter IV. Players can choose from **beloved classic characters** like Ryu, Ken, Chun-Li, and Guile. They can also meet **exciting new fighters**, including Crimson Viper, Abel, El Fuerte, and Rufus.

The game features **stylized 3D characters and environments**, but maintains the **classic 2D Street Fighter gameplay perspective**. This is enhanced with dynamic 3D camera angles. The **traditional six-button control scheme** is back, now with a host of **new special moves and gameplay features**. Street Fighter IV offers a **brand new fighting game experience** for fans worldwide.

**Key Features:**

*   **High Definition stylized 3D environments and characters.**
*   **Traditional '2D' Street Fighter six-button gameplay.**
*   **25 Fighters:**
    *   **Classic Street Fighter characters reimagined** for a new generation.
    *   **New brawlers:** including female super-spy Crimson Viper, lucha libre wrestler El Fuerte, and mixed martial artist Abel.
*   **New special moves** that push the boundaries, such as **Focus Attacks, Super Combos, and the Ultra Combo system**.
*   **New gameplay elements** challenge both newcomers and seasoned pros.
*   **Global Online gameplay.**
*   **Exclusive PC visual shaders:** Watercolor, Poster, and Sumi-E ink styles offer a unique artistic look.

Name: OPUS: Echo of Starsong - Full Bloom Edition
Description:
OPUS: Echo of Starsong - Full Bloom Edition is the definitive edition of the visual novel-style adventure game, now with all-new voice acting. Dive in and enjoy an intergalactic journey that transcends time through love. Echo of Starsong is a visual novel style adventure game. Asteroids emitting a sound known as 'Starsongs' have become the center of conflict for the immense power they hold. Determined to claim asteroids of his own, a young man ventures out with a girl who can imitate starsongs, lending her voice to unravel an ancient myth deep in the heart of space. 'I will claim the starsongs, and bring honor to the clan.' Exiled by his people, Jun ventures out in search of starsongs to redeem himself. But progress is slow, until he saves Eda, a witch who can pick up on the sound of asteroids. However, what appears to be a blessed encounter, will end up becoming a lifelong burden... The female protagonist - Eda, can hear the thunderous sound of starsongs in space, and navigate their spaceship towards the asteroid it came from. The male protagonist - Jun, can explore asteroids to locate the starsong's source, which reside in magnificant temples deep within the asteroids, hiding their ancient secrets. Throughout their journey, the crew will encounter people of all sorts. From starsong intel brokers, to asteroid excavation enforcement officers. Some may act as an obstacle, while others will prove themselves to be allies. Most people of Thousand Peaks have a personal story to tell when it comes to the conflicts that have ravaged their homeland. Uncover the troubled history of this solar system as you get to know each character. The story's main setting, Thousand Peaks, has been in a state of chaos ever since the war. Help the crew travel through the territories of different factions, as they gather intel on the fabled starsongs. Echo of Starsong is a narrative-driven game. Although light puzzles and resource management are involved throughout the story, gameplay is kept simple to provide an accessible experience.

**Bayonetta on PC: A Masterclass in Pure Action**

SEGA proudly brings *Bayonetta*, the iconic character action game from acclaimed director Hideki Kamiya, to PC. This celebrated title places you in the role of the last witch of an ancient clan, tasked with safeguarding the balance between light, dark, and chaos. After a 500-year entombment to protect herself and the world, Bayonetta awakens to a world in turmoil, facing relentless waves of angelic enemies and colossal foes in a 100% pure action experience. For the most immersive gameplay, **experience Bayonetta on PC with a controller**.

This PC port offers a wealth of enhancements, according to SEGA. **Enjoy enhanced PC graphics** with unlocked resolutions up to 4K, advanced options like anti-aliasing, anisotropic filtering, SSAO lighting, and scalable texture and shadow quality. The game also features **full Steam support**, including Achievements, Cloud Saves, Trading Cards, Leaderboards, and Big Picture Mode. **Bilingual voiceovers** allow you to seamlessly switch between English and Japanese, with corresponding subtitles. At its core, *Bayonetta* delivers **deadly grace** with its stylish and captivating heroine, pushing your senses to the limit. Prepare for **climax action** through over-the-top combat in extreme environments, offering continuous high tension and excitement. The **extravagant combat** system is intuitive and fluid, allowing you to wield an impressive arsenal of weapons and unleash devastating combos. You can also employ **supernatural powers**, including gruesome torture attacks like the Iron Maiden and Guillotine, to dispatch enemies.

Neon White is a high-octane first-person action game where players are tasked with eliminating demons in the celestial realm of Heaven. You embody White, a former assassin summoned from Hell, who must compete against other skilled demon slayers for the ultimate prize: permanent residency in Heaven. Intriguingly, the other assassins you encounter bear a striking resemblance to individuals from your past.

The gameplay centers around Neon White, an assassin specifically chosen from Hell to vie for redemption by battling demons. A core mechanic involves collecting "Soul Cards," which can be used for offensive attacks or discarded to activate unique movement abilities. Players are encouraged to strategically combine these cards to discover hidden shortcuts and achieve the fastest times. Beyond the combat, the game invites players to unravel the mysteries of Heaven by forging relationships with the other assassins, hinting at a shared history from a previous existence.

Name: Street Fighter V
Description:
Experience the intensity of head-to-head battle with Street Fighter® V! Choose from 16 iconic characters, each with their own personal story and unique training challenges, then battle against friends online or offline with a robust variety of match options. Earn Fight Money in Ranked Matches, play for fun in Casual Matches or invite friends into a Battle Lounge and see who comes out on top! PlayStation 4 and Steam players can also play against each other thanks to cross-play compatibility! This version of Street Fighter V displays the “Arcade Edition” title screen and includes Arcade Mode, Team Battle Mode and the online-enabled Extra Battle Mode, where you can earn rewards, XP and Fight Money! Fight Money can be used to purchase additional characters, costumes, stages and more! Download the cinematic story “A Shadow Falls” today for FREE! M. Bison deploys seven Black Moons into orbit, granting him unimaginable power as the earth falls into darkness. Street Fighter V: Champion Edition is the ultimate pack that includes all content (excluding Fighting Chance costumes, brand collaboration costumes and Capcom Pro Tour DLC) from both the original release and Street Fighter V: Arcade Edition. It also includes each character, stage and costume that released after Arcade Edition. That means 40 characters, 34 stages and over 200 costumes! V-Trigger 1 and 2 Release powerful techniques and exclusive moves by activating V-Trigger 1 or 2 with the character of your choice! Do huge bursts of damage or make that much needed comeback win by pressing hard punch and hard kick simultaneously while your V-Gauge is fully stocked. V-Skill 1 and 2 Fundamentals win matches and V-Skills are the building blocks of victory. Each V-Skill grants your character a unique move and/or ability that will help fill up your V-Gauge. V-Reversal Put a stop to your opponent’s offense by utilizing V-Reversal. V-Reversal costs one V-Gauge stock, but is very much worth it as it can potentially give you breathing room to create your own offensive. Special Attacks and EX Special Attacks A staple of Street Fighter, Special Attacks are the key to a solid strategy in Street Fighter V: Champion Edition. Use various Special Attacks to zone out opponents, impose your will, and build up your Critical Gauge for even more damage. EX Special Attacks are more powerful versions of Special Attacks at the cost of one Critical Gauge bar. Critical Art The most highly damaging attack in Street Fighter V: Champion Edition is called the Critical Art. A Critical Art can be performed as long as the Critical Gauge is fully stocked.

Devil May Cry 5, a new installment in the acclaimed over-the-top action series, is now available on PC. This game plunges players into a demonic world, featuring the series' signature blend of high-octane, stylized action and unique, otherworldly characters. Director Hideaki Itsuno and his dedicated team have crafted what they describe as "the most insane, technically advanced and utterly unmissable action experience of this generation!"

The threat of demonic power looms large once more in Devil May Cry 5. The invasion commences as a "demon tree" begins to sprout in Red Grave City. As this infernal incursion escalates, the young demon hunter Nero arrives with his associate, Nico, in their mobile base, the "Devil May Cry" motorhome. Finding his right arm incapacitated, Nero relies on Nico, a self-proclaimed weapons artist, to create a range of specialized mechanical Devil Breaker arms. These enhancements grant him the power to confront formidable demons, including the blood-sucking Empusa and the colossal Goliath.

Key features include:

*   **High-octane stylized action:** Players can control three distinct characters, each boasting a radically different and stylish combat approach as they battle the demon-infested city.
*   **Groundbreaking graphics:** Developed using Capcom's proprietary RE engine, the series reaches new levels of visual fidelity. The game showcases photorealistic character designs, stunning lighting, and impressive environmental effects.
*   **Take down the demonic invasion:** Engage in adrenaline-fueled battles against epic bosses across the overrun Red Grave City, all set to a "truly killer soundtrack."
*   **Demon hunter:** Nero, a central protagonist with the blood of Sparda, journeys to Red Grave City to confront the demonic onslaught. He is aided by Nico, a skilled weapons craftswoman and his new partner. Nero is also joined by the legendary demon hunter Dante and the enigmatic newcomer, V.

**Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition: Your Gateway to Classic WWII Strategy**

This legacy version of **Company of Heroes 1 (COH1)** grants you access to the latest updated version, simply titled **'Company of Heroes'** on Steam. **We strongly recommend using the latter for online play.** You can also explore the vibrant COH1 Steam Community and Modding scene by visiting the associated pages: [COH1 Community Hub](link) and [COH1 Steam Workshop](link).

**Experience the Sacrifice and Intensity of WWII**

Company of Heroes delivers a **visceral WWII gaming experience**, revolutionizing real-time strategy. It brings to life the **sacrifice of heroic soldiers**, **war-ravaged environments**, and **dynamic battlefields**.

**Lead the Charge from D-Day Onward**

Begin your journey with the **D-Day Invasion of Normandy**. You'll lead Allied squads against the formidable German war machine through some of WWII's most pivotal battles. A **rich single-player campaign** immerses you in the **cinematic intensity** and bravery of ordinary soldiers facing extraordinary events.

**Advanced AI and Destructible Environments**

Experience a **cinematic single-player campaign** that captures the turmoil of WWII like never before. **Advanced squad AI** makes your soldiers feel alive. They interact with the changing environment, take cover, and execute **sophisticated squad tactics** to defeat all enemy opposition.

**Stunning Visuals and Unprecedented Strategy**

Relic's cutting-edge engine delivers **stunning visuals** and a **physics-driven world** unmatched in RTS games. **Environmental strategy** is key. Real-time physics and a **completely destructible environment** ensure no two battles are alike. **Destroy anything and reshape the battlefield!** Utilize buildings and terrain for your advantage, or deny them to your enemy.

**Multiplayer Mayhem: Axis vs. Allies**

Engage in **2-8 player multiplayer competition** via LAN or the internet. Go online with friends for the ultimate battle between **Axis and Allies**.

**Company of Heroes: A Groundbreaking WWII RTS**

For players interested in user reviews and information about total conversions for Company of Heroes (COH1), the 'Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition' page on Steam is an excellent place to start.

Company of Heroes delivers a deeply immersive World War II real-time strategy (RTS) experience, setting a new benchmark for the genre. It powerfully portrays the human toll of war, featuring war-torn environments and dynamic battlefields. Players are placed in key WWII battles, starting with the crucial D-Day landings in Normandy. You will command Allied forces against the powerful German army in a captivating single-player campaign that highlights the bravery of individual soldiers facing immense challenges.

The game's sophisticated squad AI makes your units feel realistic. They intelligently respond to their environment, find cover, and execute tactical movements. Relic's advanced engine provides striking visuals and a physics-based world, allowing for a fully destructible environment. This means players can actively alter the battlefield by destroying buildings, using terrain for protection, and preventing enemies from gaining strategic advantages. In addition to its engaging single-player mode, Company of Heroes supports multiplayer battles for 2-8 players, enabling intense online or LAN conflicts between Axis and Allied forces.

**Rome: Total War™ - Collection: Command the Roman Empire**

Experience the thrill of ancient warfare with the Rome: Total War™ - Collection. This compilation brings together two acclaimed games from the Total War series, placing you at the head of the mighty Roman Empire. Your mission is to expand its territories and protect it from all enemies, both foreign and domestic.

The Collection Edition includes:

*   **Rome: Total War:** Choose one of three powerful Roman families and strive for dominance over the Roman world in a century-long campaign.
*   **Rome: Total War - Barbarian Invasion:** Experience the twilight of Roman power as barbarian tribes surge against the empire. This official expansion plunges you into a fierce internal struggle between rival factions.

**Key Features:**

*   **Epic Battles:** Lead thousands of soldiers in massive, large-scale battles. As one critic observed, the combat is "truly epic in scale."
*   **Strategic Depth:** Manage your empire's economy, infrastructure, religion, and military across a sprawling historical campaign.
*   **Historical Figures:** Engage with legendary leaders like Julius Caesar, Spartacus, and Hannibal.
*   **Diverse Forces:** Command or face varied groups such as Attila the Hun, the Saxons, and other formidable factions, each with unique tactics and equipment.

The original Rome: Total War received significant acclaim, including being honored as the 2004 Best Strategy Game by IGN, GameSpy, and GameSpot. This ultimate collection invites you to defend your empire or engineer its collapse.

Dota 2 is a highly popular game on Steam, attracting millions of players daily to engage in strategic battles with over a hundred distinct heroes. Whether you're a new player or have thousands of hours logged, Dota 2 offers continuous opportunities for discovery. The game's mechanics, features, and heroes are regularly updated, allowing Dota 2 to evolve naturally. As one experienced player observed, "Dota 2's constant evolution means there's always a new strategy to discover."

The game features a single map but provides endless strategic depth. Dota 2's strength lies in the variety of its heroes, their abilities, and powerful items, ensuring that every match feels unique. Each hero can fulfill multiple roles, and a wide array of items allows players to customize their strategy based on the game's specific needs. Dota 2 doesn't dictate how to play; instead, it empowers players to showcase their personal playstyles.

Importantly, all heroes in Dota 2 are free to access. The game prioritizes competitive balance, and to ensure fairness, all crucial gameplay elements, including the full roster of heroes, are available to every player. While players can purchase cosmetic items for their heroes and the game environment, all essential gameplay components are unlocked from the start.

Teaming up with friends is a key aspect of the Dota 2 experience. Despite its complexity and ongoing development, it's always a good time to start playing. New players can grasp the basics by playing against AI bots or practice their skills in the hero demo mode. The game's matchmaking system, which considers player behavior and skill, aims to pair players with suitable opponents for a more balanced and enjoyable experience.

Name: Total War: EMPIRE – Definitive Edition
Description:
Complete your Total War collection with this Definitive Edition of Total War: EMPIRE, which includes all DLC and feature updates since the game’s release: Take on the Warpath Campaign and lead one of 5 new Native American factions in an epic war to defend your lands and drive out the invaders. Build up your armies with the Elite Units of the East, Elite Units of the West, Elite Units of America and the Special Forces Units & Bonus Content packs, which together add over 50 elite new units. Total War: EMPIRE Definitive Edition offers hundreds and hundreds of hours of absorbing gameplay and every bit of content made for the game. See below for full details. About Total War: EMPIRE Control the land, command the seas, forge a new nation, and conquer the globe. Total War: EMPIRE takes the Total War franchise to the eighteenth century Age of Enlightenment a time of political upheaval, military advancements, and radical thought, captured in stunning detail. Total War: EMPIRE introduces a host of revolutionary new features, including true 3D naval combat. For the first time in the Total War series, you will be able to intuitively command single ships or vast fleets upon seascapes rich with extraordinary water and weather effects that play a huge role in your eventual glorious success or ignominious defeat. After pummelling your enemy with cannon fire, close in to grapple their ship and prepare to board, taking control of your men as they fight hand-to-hand on the decks of these wooden behemoths. In addition, Total War: EMPIRE will see further enhancements to the Total War series’ signature 3D battles and turn-based campaign map. Real-time battles will pose new challenges with the addition of cannon and musket, challenging players to master new formations and tactics as a result of the increasing role of gunpowder within warfare. And the Campaign Map, the heart of Total War introduces a variety of new and upgraded elements, including new systems for Trade, Diplomacy and Espionage with agents; a refined and streamlined UI; improved Advisors; and a vastly extended scope, taking in the riches of India, the turbulence of Europe and, for the first time, the untapped potential of the United States of America. About The Warpath Campaign A new detailed North American Campaign Map expands the Total War: EMPIRE experience, with 5 brand new Native American factions, new units and technologies. Experience battles in the new Warpath Campaign and lead one of the 5 new factions in an epic war to defend your lands and drive out the invaders. Or take these units and their unique strengths into multiplayer battles. • 5 New Playable Factions including the Iroquois, Huron, Plains, Pueblo and Cherokee nations. • Expanded North American Territories - A new, more detailed North American Campaign Map featuring new regions and a new start date. • New Elite Units including Mohawk Elite Warriors, Cheyenne Dog Soldiers, Navajo Scout Warriors and many more. • Two New Agent Types - Infiltrate enemy territory with the new Shaman unit and sabotage the opposition with the cunning Scout. • 18 New Tribal Technologies including Spirit Medicine, the Call of the Wild and Dreamwalking creating a brand new tribal technology tree. • New Winning Objectives for each of the playable factions. About Elite Units of the East The Elite Units of the East adds 12 new elite units to the Maratha and Ottoman factions and expands the map further East than any previous Total War game. Most of these soldiers' expertise developed on the battlefield - some are fearsome brigands, others of them are drawn from a strong academic background, learned warriors. They will provide a vast array of tactical options: intimidating and cowing your enemies. • Haydut Irregulars (Ottoman Empire) • Wallachian Boyars (Ottoman Empire) • Bosnian Panduks (Ottoman Empire) • Circassian Armoured Cavalry (Ottoman Empire) • Armenian Archers (Ottoman Empire) • Libyan Kuloglu (Ottoman Empire) • Palestinian Auxiliaries (Ottoman Empire) • Cairo Janissaries (Ottoman Empire) • Mounted Nizam-I-Cedit (Ottoman Empire) • Rajput Zamindars (Maratha) • Poligars (Maratha) • Barawardi (Maratha) About Elite Units of the West The Elite Units of the West introduces 14 completely unique units from all the major Western factions. Featuring all new infantry and cavalry units, equipped with the best weapons and having undergone the most rigorous of training, the Elite Units of the West bring even more options on the battlefield to all tacticians seeking to defeat their enemies. • Hungarian Grenadiers (Austria) • Horse Guards (Britain) • Swiss Guards (France) • Blue Guards (United Provinces) • Gardes du Corps (United Provinces) • Guard Grenadiers (Poland-Lithuania) • 2nd Hussars (Prussia) • Bosniaks (Prussia) • Frei-Korps (Prussia) • Gardes à cheval (Russia) • Siemenovski Foot Guards (Russia) • Walloon Guards (Spain) • Legion of the United States (United States) • US Marines (United States) About Elite Units of America The Elite Units of America adds 15 new elite units to the American, British and French factions of Total War: EMPIRE. In the last half of the 18th century, the political upheaval from thirteen of British Colonies in North America ultimately led to the 1776 Declaration of Independence and changed History forever. The 15 units have all played a major part in the American Revolution. Though their background owes a lot to European military traditions, their identity is tied to the destiny of the United States and gave these men courage and audacity like no other soldier on the battlefield. • 1st Delaware (United States) • 1st Maryland (United States) • 2nd Continental Light Dragoons (United States) • 2nd New York (United States) • 33rd Foot (Britain) • Brunswick Dragoons (Britain) • Hessian Grenadiers (Britain) • King’s Royal Regiment of New York (Britain) • Lee’s Legion (United States) • Morgan’s Provisional Rifle Corp (United States) • Pulaski’s Legion (United States) • Royal Deux-Ponts Regiment (France) • Royal Welch Fusiliers (Britain) • Company of Select Marksmen/Fraser’s Rangers (Britain) • Tarleton’s Light Dragoons (Britain) About Special Forces Units & Bonus Content The Special Forces Units introduces six of the most influential military forces of the 18th Century. True to the period, these exclusive elite units become available on the campaign map via a certain faction or once a specific geographical region is under control. This pack also includes three more exclusive Elite Units. • HMS Victory • Rogers' Rangers • Ottoman Organ Gun • Ghoorkas • Corso Terrestre Guerillas • Bulkeley's Regiment • Death's Head Hussars • The USS Constitution • The Dahomey Amazons

## Master the Art of War in Total War: SHOGUN 2

Total War: SHOGUN 2 plunges players into the tumultuous 16th century of Feudal Japan, a period defined by relentless conflict and the struggle for national unity. In this era, ten legendary warlords vie for supremacy, their ambitions clashing amidst a landscape of intrigue and warfare that threatens to consume the empire. Ultimately, only one will emerge victorious, securing the loyalty of a nation and the coveted title of Shogun, while the others will fall.

### Assume the Role of a Daimyo

As a Daimyo, the esteemed leader of your clan, you will command military campaigns, manage your clan's economy, and engage in intricate diplomatic maneuvers. Your overarching objective is to unite Japan under your banner, thereby claiming the title of Shogun and ushering in an era of peace.

### Key Game Features

Total War: SHOGUN 2 distinguishes itself with its enhanced full 3D battles, encompassing both land and sea engagements, a hallmark of the acclaimed series. These intense combat scenarios are complemented by the tactical campaign map, widely regarded as the heart of the Total War experience.

#### Strategic Depth Rooted in Ancient Wisdom

The game incorporates a new AI system, drawing inspiration from the timeless Chinese military treatise, "The Art of War," penned by Master Sun Tzu. This ancient text, which profoundly influenced Japanese warfare, was meticulously studied by The Creative Assembly to craft gameplay that is both strategically deep and accessible in Total War: SHOGUN 2. As Sun Tzu himself wisely stated, "The supreme art of war is to subdue the enemy without fighting." This philosophy is deeply integrated into the game's mechanics, encouraging players to pursue strategic victories beyond direct confrontation.

### Conquer, Develop, and Strategize

*   **Conquer:** Embark on a campaign to dominate the islands of Japan during the 16th century. Lead vast armies of samurai and formidable fleets of warships in breathtaking real-time battles.
*   **Develop:** Expand your domain on the engaging, turn-based campaign map. Leverage economic, political, and military might to amass wealth, raise powerful armies, and extend your influence across the land.
*   **Strategize:** Apply the tactical principles from Sun Tzu's "Art of War." Employ devastating fire and siege tactics, deploy cunning spies, and dispatch skilled assassins to adapt to the ever-shifting conditions on the battlefield and throughout your burgeoning realm.

### Engage in Online Battles

Experience the main campaign in an exciting two-player mode, or participate in massive online battles with up to eight players. Lead your online army to victory in specially designed campaigns, testing your strategic acumen against other commanders.

### Innovations in SHOGUN 2

Total War: SHOGUN 2 introduces several new elements to the series:

*   **RPG Skills and Experience:** Enhance your Generals and Agents with new role-playing abilities and experience points.
*   **Multi-Stage Sieges:** The challenge of capturing a castle now extends beyond simply breaching its walls, with new multi-stage siege mechanics.
*   **Hero Units:** Inspire your troops and carve a path through enemy lines with powerful new Hero units.
*   **Rotating 3D Campaign Map:** Navigate and plan your strategy on a dynamic, rotating 3D campaign map.

**Total War: SHOGUN 2: Master the Art of War in Feudal Japan**

Step into the tumultuous 16th Century of Feudal Japan, a land fractured by endless conflict. In this era, the once unified empire has splintered into numerous warring clans, with ten legendary warlords vying for ultimate dominion. Amidst a landscape of conspiracies and strife, only one will emerge victorious, uniting the nation and claiming the title of Shogun. The rest will fall to the blade.

In Total War: SHOGUN 2, you assume the mantle of a Daimyo, a clan leader tasked with navigating the intricate paths of military conquest, economic development, and shrewd diplomacy. Your ultimate objective: to reunite Japan under your supreme command and establish yourself as the undisputed ruler of a pacified land.

**Key Game Features:**

Total War: SHOGUN 2 elevates the series' renowned full 3D land and sea battles, complemented by the tactical campaign map, often hailed as the series' core. The game introduces a novel AI system, drawing inspiration from the ancient Chinese military treatise, "The Art of War," penned by Master Sun Tzu. This foundational text, which profoundly influenced Japanese warfare, has been meticulously analyzed by The Creative Assembly to imbue Total War: SHOGUN 2 with strategically deep yet accessible gameplay.

*   **Conquer Japan:** Embark on a campaign to dominate the islands of Japan during the 16th century. Command formidable armies of samurai and vast fleets of warships in visually stunning real-time battles.
*   **Build Your Empire:** Develop your kingdom on an engaging, turn-based campaign map. Employ economic, political, and military strategies to accumulate wealth, raise armies, and expand your influence.
*   **Scheme with Sun Tzu:** Embrace the principles of "The Art of War." Utilize innovative tactics such as fire and siege warfare, alongside espionage and assassination, to adapt to the dynamic battlefield and the complexities of your domain.
*   **Online Warfare:** Experience the main campaign in a compelling two-player mode. Furthermore, engage in epic online battles with up to eight players, leading your digital armies to glory in specialized campaigns.

**New to Total War: SHOGUN 2:**

*   **Enhanced Leadership:** Generals and Agents gain new RPG skills and experience, allowing for deeper customization and strategic impact.
*   **Multi-Stage Sieges:** The challenge of siege warfare is amplified, with scaling walls merely being the initial phase of conquest.
*   **Hero Units:** Introduce powerful Hero units to inspire your troops and decimate enemy forces.
*   **Dynamic Campaign Map:** Navigate a newly implemented rotating 3D campaign map for a more immersive strategic overview.

Name: Sacrifice
Description:
Sacrifice is the acclaimed real-time strategy game that focuses on combat instead of resource gathering. The only two resources you'll need to worry about are mana and souls. Need more units? Capture the souls of your enemy. Cast spells of awesome power. Choose which gods to support and you will be rewarded with a different selection of spells. Banish your enemy by sacrificing one of your allies at his altar...

Name: Rise of Nations: Extended Edition
Description:
Rise of Nations Rise of Nations is a real-time strategy game that spans all history. Start with a single city in the Ancient Age; gather resources; build an infrastructure; research technologies; construct Wonders of the World such as the Pyramids and the Eiffel Tower; and expand your military might across the world, conquering hostile nations with bombers, battleships, and tanks—all over your lunch hour! In Rise of Nations there are: 18 Nations—each with special abilities and unique military units. Over a hundred military units operating on the ground, sea, and air— from Hoplites to Frigates to Helicopters. Over two dozen buildings with upgrades and technologies that will take your nation from a small City to an Information Age society. 14 Wonders of the World—the Terra Cotta Army, the Taj Mahal, the Eiffel Tower. Each gives your nation special bonuses. More than a dozen map types, ranging from the Amazon Rainforest to the Himalayas to the Nile Delta. Conquer the World campaign—a linked series of dozens of scenarios. The Extended Edition includes: Rise of Nations Rise of Nations: Thrones and Patriots New in the Extended Edition: Improved Visuals Improved water Improved textures Full-screen anti-aliasing Full Steamworks Integration Multiplayer with ranked matches (ELO) Achievements Trading Cards Cloud saves

**Commandos 2: Men of Courage** plunges you into the heart of World War II, offering a **deeply tactical action and strategy experience**. As the leader of an **elite commando unit**, you'll embark on daring missions deep behind enemy lines. Your objective: to leverage the **unique skills of each commando** to achieve a series of challenging, mission-based goals.

Prepare to go **covert into a variety of authentic WWII locations**. These include the very heart of the Third Reich, a clandestine submarine installation in Northern Europe, and the Japanese army's central headquarters. The game emphasizes **unprecedented environmental interaction**. You can **steal enemy uniforms and weapons**, **climb poles**, **swing from cables**, **swim**, **operate vehicles**, and **seamlessly enter and exit buildings, ships, and planes**.

Command your team of **nine distinct commandos**, each with specialized abilities. Your roster includes a **Green Beret**, a **Sniper**, a **Demolitions Expert**, a **Seductress**, a **Thief**, and even a **dog**.

The game boasts an **all-new 3D engine**, allowing you to **rotate the environment a full 360 degrees**. Experience fluid movement in and out of buildings, submarines, planes, and underwater environments, with the ability to **zoom in and out** for detailed observation. Innovative camera control features **simultaneous management of multiple gameplay windows in real time**, providing a comprehensive tactical overview.

Engage in **authentic WWII scenarios** across **10 missions** set in **9 diverse environments**. These missions unfold in both **day and night settings**, enhanced by **realistic weather effects**. For those on PC, a **cooperative multiplayer mode** allows you to join forces with others and go to war together. The game also introduces a range of **new WWII vehicles and weapons**, including jeeps, tanks, trucks, ships, bazookas, and flamethrowers.

Name: Tumblestone
Description:
Tumblestone is the first original action-puzzle game of the past fifteen years. Race your friends in multiplayer or challenge yourself in story mode. Solve progressively more difficult and creative puzzles, help a sausage make friends, and find out what happened to the Tumblecrown. Key Features Competitive multiplayer : Tumblestone's intense puzzle-solving action will turn playing 'just a few more rounds' with friends into a late-night Tumblestone marathon. Local multiplayer : Up to four players on a single computer. Online multiplayer : Play online against your friends or make new ones using Tumblestone's ranked matchmaking system. Bots : Have an open slot? Play against the computer. But can anyone withstand the punishing Nightmare bot? Story mode : The 40+ hour story campaign will test your puzzle-solving prowess. Featuring 10+ gameplay modifiers, challenge puzzles, and boss battles. Arcade modes : Kick back and relax with the casual Marathon mode, scratch an intellectual itch with the Infinipuzzle mode, or get your blood pumping with the fast-paced Heartbeat mode. Leaderboards : Online leaderboards let your friends know you're better than them. Quests : Hundreds of unique quests to complete. Stats : Rank up, then compare how you stack up against your friends. Personalization : Choose from a dozen unique characters and environments.

Name: PuzzleQuest: Challenge of the Warlords
Description:
PuzzleQuest: Challenge of the Warlords delivers, for the first time ever, classic puzzle-game action backed with an epic story of good vs. evil. Challenge your match 3 skills as you battle against computer opponents to save the Kingdom of Etheria from the evil Lord Bane. Make matches of different crystal types which build your inventory of spells. Outscore your oponents and unleash your spells to disrupt their matching chances and lower their totals. Build your heroic character by winning head to head battles. Or play classic match 3 in quick play mode. Explore the expansive kingdom as you experience a puzzle game like nothing you have played before. Embark on an epic single-player campaign comprising more than 150 challenging quests. Jump into this exciting puzzle game and outmatch your opponent in Quick-play mode. Build your empire as you capture cities, build castles and gain a party of companions that will aid you in battle. Earn money with each gold title to buy helms, weapons, armor and more! Experience tiles grant you additional experience instantly. Match skull tiles to inflict damage on other players.

Embark on an epic journey into a captivating puzzle game fantasy realm, teeming with extraordinary creatures, formidable weaponry, and engaging minigames. This sequel to the acclaimed Puzzle Quest masterfully intertwines addictive Match 3 mechanics with a deeply immersive role-playing experience, inviting you to dive headfirst into the adventure. You can personalize your hero by selecting from four distinct classes, each boasting a unique set of skills and abilities, allowing for diverse gameplay strategies. As you advance through the narrative, you will accumulate experience points and acquire valuable treasure, subsequently unlocking potent new spells and increasingly demanding Match 3 puzzles. The ultimate challenge awaits: will you prove yourself a valiant hero capable of liberating the once tranquil village of Verloren from the malevolent grip of the demon Gorgon?

Key Features of Puzzle Quest 2 include:

*   **Master New Abilities:** Acquire proficiency with innovative mana gems, powerful spells, and a variety of potent weapons.
*   **Character Customization:** Tailor your hero with four distinct classes, available in both male and female options, enabling a personalized playstyle.
*   **Immersive Story Mode:** Traverse an expansive and richly detailed fantasy world, unraveling its compelling narrative.
*   **Engaging Minigames:** Participate in a multitude of unique minigames designed to reward you with treasure and valuable experience.
*   **Character Progression and Online Battles:** Enhance and equip your character, then test your mettle against friends in thrilling online multiplayer matches.

**Bejeweled® 3: The Ultimate Gem-Matching Experience**

Bejeweled 3 invites you to dive into the biggest and brightest installment of the world's favorite puzzle game, offering new and exciting ways to enjoy classic gem-matching fun. With an impressive **eight distinct game modes**, players can discover the perfect experience to suit any mood, ensuring endless hours of captivating gameplay.

The game features a diverse array of modes designed to appeal to every type of player. **Classic Bejeweled** delivers the timeless joy of cascading gems, now enhanced with more powerful new gems and refined gameplay. For those seeking a challenge, **Quest Mode** presents a journey through 40 intricate puzzles, each offering a unique and multifaceted test of skill. **Lightning Mode** provides a dose of non-stop action with its electrifying, timed gameplay, demanding quick thinking and intense gem-blasting. Alternatively, **Zen Mode** offers a revolutionary way to unwind, allowing players to create a personalized, relaxing retreat by customizing sights, sounds, and even binaural beats.

Beyond these core experiences, Bejeweled 3 holds even more surprises. **Unlock four all-new secret games** as you progress, adding significant depth and variety to your gem-matching adventures. To further enhance the experience, the game boasts stunning **high-definition graphics**, making every gem sparkle with unprecedented brilliance. Players can also prove their mastery by earning up to **65 achievement badges**, showcasing their skills across the game's many challenges. The ultra-smooth action, where multiple matches can occur as new gems fall into place, guarantees an **endless stream of gem-matching fun**.

Name: Critical Mass
Description:
Critical Mass is an action puzzle game that takes traditional match 3 and brings it into the world of 3D. We combine fast addictive game play with strategy to create a new and innovative experience. Key features: Fast Addictive Gameplay 4 Unique Game Modes Online Leaderboards & Ranking Systems Achievements & Skillpoint Rewards Accessible to Everyone Exciting Colorful Art Style Great Music & Sound Effects.

In the vibrant world of Victusia, the esteemed Battle Chef Brigade stands out for its members' extraordinary talents: they expertly vanquish monsters and then artfully transform their spoils into delectable culinary creations. To earn a coveted spot among their ranks, aspiring chefs must navigate a rigorous and demanding competition. This game invites players to step into the shoes of Mina and Thrash, two ambitious contestants striving to conquer the tournament's formidable trials. The ultimate goal is to become a Brigadier, a feat achieved by hunting down fearsome monsters through dynamic, combo-driven combat. Following the thrill of the hunt, players must then engage in captivating puzzle-based cooking challenges, transforming their hunted ingredients into winning dishes for the judges, all under the pressure of a strict time limit.

The game unfolds through a charming campaign that masterfully blends the visceral action of old-school brawlers with the cerebral engagement of combo-based puzzling, all while incorporating light RPG progression elements. Players can embody two distinct chefs, Mina and Thrash, each brought to life with a visually striking art style and expressive voice acting. As one critic aptly observed, the characters are "vibrantly illustrated and voiced," imbuing the entire experience with a significant and memorable personality.

The Deluxe edition of the game introduces an exciting new playable character, Ziggy, the Undead Necromancer Chef. Ziggy is now available to wield in a variety of thrilling game modes:

*   **Local Multiplayer:** Engage in head-to-head culinary combat with friends.
*   **Break the Dishes:** A unique and challenging culinary puzzle mode.
*   **Survival:** Test your endurance and resourcefulness against the relentless clock.
*   **Free Play:** Unleash your creativity and experiment freely with an array of recipes.

Further elevate your competitive spirit with the inclusion of Local Multiplayer, allowing you to face off against other aspiring Brigadiers. You have the freedom to choose your champion, playing as Mina, Thrash, or the newly introduced Ziggy in custom matches where you dictate the rules of engagement. Who will ultimately be crowned the champion of the culinary arena?

Hone your gastronomic prowess across a diverse range of additional game modes:

*   **Daily Cook-Off:** Vie for the top positions on the global leaderboard.
*   **Restaurant Rush:** Experience a fast-paced and demanding cooking simulation.
*   **Break the Dishes:** A particularly challenging puzzle mode designed to test your limits.
*   **Survival Mode:** Strive for high scores on the leaderboards by showcasing your most impressive culinary feats.

Additionally, refine your strategic cooking approaches in the all-new Free Play Mode, a space dedicated to discovering your ultimate recipe combinations and culinary synergies. The game also proudly presents a BRAND NEW Art Gallery, a dedicated space where players can gather and immerse themselves in the stunning illustrations that define Battle Chef Brigade. As the developers themselves shared, the gallery serves as a place to "collect and admire the brilliant illustrations." Vive la Brigade!

Name: Zuma's Revenge!
Description:
An irresistible force has taken our fearless frog to an island where the ribbeting puzzle-action of Zuma has evolved in amazing ways… but evil spirits and tenacious tiki bosses rule the land! Survive the ire of the island by firing stone spheres to destroy the deadly stream of balls. Conquer over 60 levels by staying sharp and avoiding hidden traps. Slide and hop for smarter shots; hit targets for exotic bonuses; detonate new power-up balls; battle six imposing tiki bosses and guide your agile amphibian to victory in four all new game modes! Will you succumb to the perilous pitfalls, or can you tame the jungle in this PopCap ball-blasting challenge? Conquer over 60 levels and defeat six mini-game Boss Battles Score explosive power-ups including three new shots Explore new gameplay like lily-pad hopping, slide-aiming, and more Take a shot at 70 all-new Challenges in the Jungle of Mystery, Quiet Village, Lost City and Mosquito Coast. Run the Iron Frog gauntlet — beat 10 levels in a row! Turn up the heat in Heroic Frog mode Enjoy amazing graphics and effects that bring Zuma into the modern world of gaming

Name: Bejeweled Twist
Description:
Spin, match, explode... WOW! It's a brilliant new way to play Bejeweled! Get set for a vivid sensory rush as you spin and match explosive gems for shockwaves of fun. Rotate jewels freely to set up electrifying combos, outwit surprising obstacles like Locks and Bombs, and create high-voltage Flame and Lightning gems. When you need to dial up the intensity or fine-tune your skills, turn to Challenge mode or five-minute Blitz. And if relaxing is more your style, kick up your feet with stress-free Zen. No matter the mode, you'll discover new strategies, improve your moves, and find endless ways to win! Use the revolutionary Gem Rotator to move gems around and make matches anywhere on the board Relax, rev up, refocus or recharge in four game modes  Classic, Zen, Challenge and Blitz Clear away Locks and Bombs for magnificent bonuses Create Flame and Lightning power gems, then blast them to smithereens just because you can Relive your best moves with Instant Replay and see where you rank on the high-score list Start playing quickly and easily with in-game tips Enjoy eye-popping graphics and special effects... you've never seen Bejeweled like this before!

Name: Turba
Description:
Turba provides a gameplay experience unlike any you have encountered before. Load in music from your PC and combo blocks to your favorite tunes in this unique new twist on the “match-3” style game! The blocks on the game board generate and move to the beat of the song you choose. Clear blocks in time with the beat and make expert combos to maximize your score while you compete in online leaderboards for any and every song you play. Key features: Three modes of play Seven Special Powers to change up how you play Online leaderboards for each song you play Supported file types: Mp3, Music CDs, Flac, Ogg, Wma, Ape, Mpc Last.fm Scrobbling support In-depth stat tracking and unlock system 20 Steam achievements, 50+ Steam stats, Steam leaderboards

**Might & Magic: Clash of Heroes** is a strategic RPG that plunges players into the world of Ashan, set four decades before the events of *Heroes V*. The game follows five distinct heroes on their dangerous quests across five unique regions. Their ultimate goal is to gain strength, uncover a dark demonic conspiracy, and protect their world from the encroaching forces of Chaos.

At the heart of *Clash of Heroes* is its **dynamic combat system**, where mastering the "Art of Tactics" is key. This means strategically **forming offensive or defensive unit formations** to outwit opponents, learning **advanced combo techniques** for powerful attacks, and wisely using **spells and artifacts** to create winning strategies and defeat enemies. The game offers various challenges, such as **standard battles** against enemy heroes and their forces, unique situations and tough bosses in **special challenges and boss fights**, and complex **puzzle battles** that demand finding the right unit combinations to defeat foes within a set number of turns.

Effective unit management is vital. Players will **recruit and hire units** with varied traits and skills, then **experiment with different army combinations** to build their strongest force. Heroes and their units grow stronger throughout the adventure by earning **experience points** after each battle, leading to hero and unit level-ups and the unlocking of new or improved abilities.

The game features a striking presentation, with **HD art, music, and sounds**, and **vibrantly detailed environments** filled with knights, elves, wizards, necromancers, and demons, all within a **unique manga-style aesthetic**. This epic prequel lets players explore the past of well-loved characters, playing as younger versions of Anwen, Godric, Fiona, Aidan, and Nadia, the five main heroes from *Might & Magic Heroes*.

The game also provides extensive multiplayer options, including **local and online play** for 1v1 hot seat battles or matches for 2 to 4 players. Players can select from **10 distinct characters**, each with unique spells and abilities, and choose the best creature and artifact combinations for **Player vs. Player modes**. Furthermore, **cooperative battles** allow players to team up with friends against up to two opponents in engaging strategic matches.

Name: Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition
Description:
DISCLAIMER This legacy version of COH1 will also give you access to the latest updated version of COH1 - simply called 'Company of Heroes' in your Steam library. PLEASE USE THE LATTER TO PLAY ONLINE , and visit the associated pages to join the COH1 Steam Community & Modding scene: COH1 Community Hub COH1 Steam Workshop DESCRIPTION Delivering a visceral WWII gaming experience, Company of Heroes redefines real time strategy gaming by bringing the sacrifice of heroic soldiers, war-ravaged environments, and dynamic battlefields to life. Beginning with the D-Day Invasion of Normandy, players lead squads of Allied soldiers into battle against the German war machine through some of the most pivotal battles of WWII. Through a rich single player campaign, players experience the cinematic intensity and bravery of ordinary soldiers thrust into extraordinary events. A Cinematic Single Player Experience that captures the turmoil of WWII as never before. Advanced squad AI brings your soldiers to life as they interact with the changing environment, take cover, and execute advanced squad tactics to eliminate all enemy opposition. Stunning Visuals - Relic's next generation cutting-edge engine provides graphic quality and a physics driven world that is unprecedented in an RTS. Environmental Strategy - Real-time physics and a completely destructible environment guarantee no two battles ever play out in the same way. Destroy anything and re-shape the battlefield! Use buildings and terrain to your advantage, or deny them to the enemy. 2-8 Player Multiplayer Competition via LAN or Internet - Go online with friends and join the ultimate battle of Axis versus Allies.

**Company of Heroes: A Deep Dive into WWII Real-Time Strategy**

For those seeking user reviews and information on total conversions for Company of Heroes (COH1) on Steam, the 'Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition' page is the definitive resource.

Company of Heroes delivers a compelling World War II real-time strategy experience. It distinguishes itself through its realistic portrayal of soldier sacrifice, war-torn environments, and dynamic battlefields. The game immerses players in pivotal WWII battles, commencing with the D-Day landings in Normandy. You will command Allied squads against German forces in a captivating single-player campaign that highlights the cinematic intensity and bravery of ordinary soldiers facing extreme circumstances. As one reviewer aptly put it, the game "truly captures the grit and sacrifice of the common soldier."

The core gameplay is engineered for profound engagement. The **single-player campaign** plunges you into the heart of WWII's chaos, following regular soldiers as they confront extraordinary challenges. **Intelligent squad AI** ensures your troops behave realistically; they adapt to their surroundings, seek cover, and employ clever tactics to outmaneuver enemies. Visually, the game is **impressive**, built on Relic's advanced engine to deliver exceptional graphics and a physics-driven world within the RTS genre.

Strategic depth is further enhanced by **environmental interaction**. **Dynamic battlefield destruction** is a standout feature. Real-time physics and a fully destructible environment ensure that each battle unfolds uniquely. Players can demolish buildings to gain an advantage or alter the terrain, utilizing structures and the landscape for strategic benefits or to impede enemy advances. Beyond the campaign, players can participate in **multiplayer battles**, competing online with 2-8 players over LAN or the internet in the grand conflict between the Axis and Allied powers. This aspect has garnered praise from experts, with one commentator noting that "the destructible environments add a layer of tactical depth rarely seen in RTS games."

Name: Dwarf Fortress
Description:
Prepare for the deepest, most intricate simulation of a world that has ever been created. Not just generated geometry -- a whole simulated world. Generated rise and fall of civilizations, personalities, creatures, cultures, etc. Infinite hours of gameplay. Now with beautiful pixel graphics! Learn the basics with in-game tutorials A lifetime “living” project - created/updated since 2003, with no end in sight Generate your unique world and manage a bustling colony of dwarves, even as they probably mine towards their eventual demise. A new endless hobby, just for you! The legendary Dwarf Fortress is now on Steam! Build a fortress and try to help your dwarves survive, despite threats of starvation, dragons, and madness. In this complex construction/management/roguelike simulation, every generated world brings a unique challenge, whether it’s dwarves with their own simulated personalities or aquifers. Observe what makes your civilization fall into eventual decline, and learn for next time… until something else inevitably goes wrong. The combat model includes skills, body parts, material properties, aimed attacks, wrestling, pain, nausea, various poison effects, and much more. It’s difficult to convey the depth of the generation. Hundreds of animals and monsters, many of which are randomly created for each world, as well as generated poetry, musical forms, instruments, and dances for your dwarves to practice and perform. A dynamic weather model tracks wind, humidity, and air masses to create fronts, clouds, storms, and blizzards. Over two hundred rock and mineral types can appear, in their proper geological environments. Remember: Losing is fun! Nothing substantial is new or changed, under the hood. It’s still good old Dwarf Fortress, but with graphics support and music by default. A few bells and whistles won’t change that. You may already be familiar with the tile set mod packs from Michał “Mayday” Madej and Jacob 'Ironhand' Bowman. Together, their efforts are creating an all-new tileset featuring brand new pixel art by artists Carolyn Jong and Neoriceisgood. Dwarf Fortress Steam edition will have a 15 track soundtrack by Dabu, Simon Swerwer and Águeda Macias including tracks in the Dwarvish language! It's never been easier to start playing! We've improved the new player experience with the addition of tutorials to guide you through building your first fort and keeping your dwarves happy. Command your dwarves as they search for wealth in their generated mountain. Your dwarves will need a steady supply of food and beer, but they’ll also need your guidance in surviving attacks from hostile civilizations, the wilderness, or even the dead. Craft treasures and furnitures from various materials Establish a barony and support the increasingly demanding nobility Read your dwarves’ thoughts to keep them happy Build floodgates to divert water for farming, and/or prevent magma mishaps Build structures and watch your dwarves discover and build their culture, like taverns, libraries, temples, honey, wax, pottery, animal training, bookbinding, and more. The original inspiration for RimWorld, Prison Architect, Minecraft and more. One of the first video games acquired by the Museum of Modern Art in New York Updated for over 16 years by two brothers, Tarn “Toady One” and Zach “Threetoe” Adams With the goal of simulating all of existence, Bay 12 estimates they’re only about 44% done.

Embark on an epic space strategy adventure with **Galactic Civilizations® II: Ultimate Edition**. This comprehensive package includes the acclaimed PC strategy game of the year, **Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords**, the award-winning expansion **Dark Avatar**, and the latest addition, **Twilight of the Arnor**. This ultimate collection invites you to lead your civilization to galactic supremacy, offering a deep and engaging experience for both seasoned strategists and newcomers.

**Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords** places you in charge of a growing space-faring society navigating a dangerous galaxy. Success hinges on balancing economic growth, technological advancement, diplomacy, cultural influence, and military strength. You'll forge alliances, wage wars, and aim for domination. The game offers a compelling single-player experience with randomly generated maps for endless replayability, alongside a multi-mission campaign exploring the lore of the ancient Dread Lords. The **Dark Avatar** expansion enhances gameplay with new features like mineable asteroid belts and unique planets requiring special tech to colonize. Espionage becomes vital for sabotage or defense. This expansion also introduces new treaties, a more challenging AI, new opponents, units, and a captivating campaign. Set in 2227, **Twilight of the Arnor** plunges the galaxy into a war orchestrated by the Dread Lords. Humanity and other factions devise a plan to defeat this threat. This expansion adds powerful Terror Stars, unique tech trees for distinct civilization paths, and advanced editors for creating maps and scenarios. Players will also find new ship types and planetary improvements.

**Galactic Civilizations II: Ultimate Edition** features stunning visuals from a beautiful 3D engine, bringing planets, stars, and ship battles to life. Unleash creativity with extensive customization, allowing you to design 3D ships in the Shipyard. Choose from a dozen distinct civilizations or create your own. Achieve victory through multiple paths: military conquest, cultural domination, political alliance, technological supremacy, or ascension. Experience dynamic gameplay with galaxies of varying sizes, ensuring fresh challenges. The challenging AI offers a tough, multi-threaded opponent without unfair advantages. Engage in online competition by posting scores to the Metaverse. The game's fully moddable design lets players create unique content, extending its lifespan. Advanced diplomacy allows for trade, treaties, and crucial alliances.

Name: Factorio
Description:
Factorio is a game in which you build and maintain factories. You will be mining resources, researching technologies, building infrastructure, automating production and fighting enemies. In the beginning you will find yourself chopping trees, mining ores and crafting mechanical arms and transport belts by hand, but in short time you can become an industrial powerhouse, with huge solar fields, oil refining and cracking, manufacture and deployment of construction and logistic robots, all for your resource needs. However this heavy exploitation of the planet's resources does not sit nicely with the locals, so you will have to be prepared to defend yourself and your machine empire. Join forces with other players in cooperative Multiplayer , create huge factories, collaborate and delegate tasks between you and your friends. Add mods to increase your enjoyment, from small tweak and helper mods to complete game overhauls, Factorio's ground-up Modding support has allowed content creators from around the world to design interesting and innovative features. While the core gameplay is in the form of the freeplay scenario, there are a range of interesting challenges in the form of Scenarios . If you don't find any maps or scenarios you enjoy, you can create your own with the in-game Map Editor , place down entities, enemies, and terrain in any way you like, and even add your own custom script to make for interesting gameplay. Discount Disclaimer: We don't have any plans to take part in a sale or to reduce the price for the foreseeable future. What people say about Factorio No other game in the history of gaming handles the logistics side of management simulator so perfectly. - Reddit I see conveyor belts when I close my eyes. I may have been binging Factorio lately. - Notch, Mojang Factorio is a super duper awesome game where we use conveyor belts to shoot aliens. - Zisteau, Youtube

**XCOM: Enemy Unknown: Defend Earth from an Alien Invasion**

Prepare to take command of XCOM, a clandestine paramilitary organization tasked with defending Earth from a terrifying global alien invasion. In XCOM: Enemy Unknown, you'll manage vital resources, research groundbreaking technologies, and orchestrate both overarching combat strategies and the precise tactics of individual units. This reimagining of the legendary XCOM, widely hailed as one of the greatest games ever, comes from the renowned strategy experts at Firaxis Games.

XCOM: Enemy Unknown builds upon its esteemed legacy with a fresh invasion narrative, introducing new alien adversaries and advanced technologies to combat them. The fate of humanity rests in your hands as you delve into alien technology research, establish and manage a fully functional base, meticulously plan combat missions, and guide your soldiers through intense battles.

**Key Features:**

*   **Strategy Evolved:** XCOM: Enemy Unknown masterfully blends strategic turn-based gameplay with thrilling action sequences and intense ground combat. As one critic noted, the game offers a "compelling blend of strategic depth and tactical execution."
*   **Strategic Base Management:** Recruit, customize, and develop unique soldiers, while also managing your personnel. Detect and intercept the alien threat by building and expanding your XCOM headquarters.
*   **Tactical Combat:** Lead your soldier squads in turn-based ground battles and deploy powerful air units, including the Interceptor and Skyranger.
*   **Worldwide Threat:** Engage in over 70 unique missions that span the globe. You'll interact with and negotiate with governments worldwide to coordinate the defense of Earth.

**Rise of Nations: Extended Edition** lets you guide a civilization through all of human history in a lively real-time strategy game. You start with a small city in the **Ancient Age**, focusing on gathering resources, building your infrastructure, and researching new technologies. As your civilization grows, you can build **Wonders of the World**, like the Pyramids or the Eiffel Tower, and build up your military to take on the world. A major part of the game is conquering other nations with a variety of units, from early bombers and battleships to modern tanks, all in one continuous game.

The **Extended Edition** expands on the original **Rise of Nations** by including its expansions, **Thrones and Patriots**, and adding new features. These include **better graphics** with updated textures, improved water effects, and full-screen anti-aliasing, plus **full Steamworks integration**. This integration brings features like ranked multiplayer games using an ELO system, achievements, trading cards, and cloud saves, as noted by Steam. The game features **18 distinct nations**, each with unique abilities and military units, and over **100 military units** across land, sea, and air, from ancient Hoplites to modern helicopters. Players can develop their societies through **many buildings** and research many technologies, moving from a small town to an Information Age society. Additionally, **14 Wonders of the World** can be built, each giving important national bonuses, and players can explore **different maps** on various terrains, from rainforests to deltas. The **Conquer the World Campaign** offers a series of linked scenarios, providing a clear path to global victory.

**Company of Heroes: Opposing Fronts: Dive into WWII Strategy**

Company of Heroes: Opposing Fronts, an expansion for the acclaimed real-time strategy (RTS) game, plunges players into the heart of World War II combat. This expansion introduces two distinct armies, each boasting unique abilities and upgrade paths. Players can engage in two compelling narratives: commanding the resilient British 2nd Army in their liberation of Caen, France, or taking control of the formidable German Panzer Elite as they counter a massive airborne assault.

The expansion offers two full campaigns, allowing players to experience the strategic depth of the war. As the British 2nd Army, players will fight to reclaim the strategically vital city of Caen. Conversely, as the German Panzer Elite, players will face the immense challenge of repelling the Allied airborne invasion during Operation Market Garden. Game developers emphasized that Opposing Fronts is built on the principle of "Real War, Real Battlefields, Real War Enhanced." They integrated features such as Mission Persistence, Dynamic Weather Effects, and Enhanced Vehicle Tactics to heighten realism and introduce novel combat approaches.

Opposing Fronts also expands multiplayer options. When combined with the original Company of Heroes, the total number of playable armies in online battles increases to four. This opens up diverse strategic possibilities, such as pairing British artillery with American armor against German forces, or employing the swift maneuvers of the Wehrmacht and Panzer Elite to thwart Allied advances. Industry critics highlighted that with DirectX® 10 support, the game delivers a visually stunning RTS experience, featuring improved lighting and highly detailed environments.

**Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War - Dark Crusade: Facing the Necron Menace on Kronus**

The planet Kronus is home to a **vast and ancient Necron threat**, a formidable menace that has awakened after millennia of slumber. Beneath the desert sands lies an extensive network of tunnels and chambers, once the heart of a grand necropolis. This city of the dead was built to bury the fallen from Necron conquests, but it eventually became the **eternal resting place for the Necrons themselves**. Over ages, sand and rock buried this civilization until recent excavations accidentally disturbed the deathless, starting their **awakening**.

In **Dark Crusade**, players lead one of seven distinct races, all fighting for **absolute control over the planet Kronus**. Victory comes from capturing the **strategic strongholds** of enemy factions. These vital points are won through fierce battles on **unique maps**, each tied to a specific stronghold. Dark Crusade adds two **powerful new races**: the mysterious **Tau** and the ancient **Necrons**. Leading these armies lets players unleash **devastating destruction** on their foes, opening up new strategic options. The game also features an **expanded online multiplayer** mode, letting players test their skills against others. Fight in thrilling battles across **12 new maps**, where up to **8 players** can compete for galactic dominance. Embark on an **epic single-player campaign** with the goal of conquering Kronus. Players can choose any of the seven races and follow their own path through an **all-new, non-linear story**. Experience **distinct storylines** from each race's point of view, leading your forces on a crusade across the war-torn planet. As your hero grows stronger, you can **customize their weapons, items, and abilities**. You can also personalize your army with a **wide array of insignias, squad colors, banners, and names**, creating a unique fighting force that matches your playstyle.

According to the game's developers, the Necrons represent a "truly ancient and terrifying force" that has been dormant for eons. They further explain that their awakening on Kronus presents a "unique challenge" for all other factions, forcing them to adapt their strategies.

Name: RimWorld
Description:
RimWorld is a sci-fi colony sim driven by an intelligent AI storyteller. Inspired by Dwarf Fortress, Firefly, and Dune. You begin with three survivors of a shipwreck on a distant world. Manage colonists' moods, needs, wounds, illnesses and addictions. Build in the forest, desert, jungle, tundra, and more. Watch colonists develop and break relationships with family members, lovers, and spouses. Replace wounded limbs and organs with prosthetics, bionics, or biological parts harvested from others.
