Fight pirates, tribes, mad animals, giant insects and ancient killing machines. Craft structures, weapons, and apparel from metal, wood, stone, cloth, and futuristic materials. Tame and train cute pets, productive farm animals, and deadly attack beasts. Trade with passing ships and caravans. Form caravans to complete quests, trade, attack other factions, or migrate your whole colony. Dig through snow, weather storms, and fight fires. Capture refugees or prisoners and turn them to your side or sell them into slavery. Discover a new generated world each time you play. Explore hundreds of wild and interesting mods on the Steam Workshop. Learn to play easily with the help of an intelligent and unobtrusive AI tutor. RimWorld is a story generator. It’s designed to co-author tragic, twisted, and triumphant stories about imprisoned pirates, desperate colonists, starvation and survival. It works by controlling the “random” events that the world throws at you. Every thunderstorm, pirate raid, and traveling salesman is a card dealt into your story by the AI Storyteller . There are several storytellers to choose from. Randy Random does crazy stuff, Cassandra Classic goes for rising tension, and Phoebe Chillax likes to relax. Your colonists are not professional settlers – they’re crash-landed survivors from a passenger liner destroyed in orbit. You can end up with a nobleman, an accountant, and a housewife. You’ll acquire more colonists by capturing them in combat and turning them to your side, buying them from slave traders, or taking in refugees. So your colony will always be a motley crew. Each person’s background is tracked and affects how they play. A nobleman will be great at social skills (recruiting prisoners, negotiating trade prices), but refuse to do physical work. A farm oaf knows how to grow food by long experience, but cannot do research. A nerdy scientist is great at research, but cannot do social tasks at all. A genetically engineered assassin can do nothing but kill – but he does that very well. Colonists develop - and destroy - relationships. Each has an opinion of the others, which determines whether they'll become lovers, marry, cheat, or fight. Perhaps your two best colonists are happily married - until one of them falls for the dashing surgeon who saved her from a gunshot wound. The game generates a whole planet from pole to equator. You choose whether to land your crash pods in a cold northern tundra, a parched desert flat, a temperate forest, or a steaming equatorial jungle. Different areas have different animals, plants, diseases, temperatures, rainfall, mineral resources, and terrain. These challenges of surviving in a disease-infested, choking jungle are very different from those in a parched desert wasteland or a frozen tundra with a two-month growing season. Travel across the planet. You're not stuck in one place. You can form a caravan of people, animals, and prisoners. Rescue kidnapped former allies from pirate outposts, attend peace talks, trade with other factions, attack enemy colonies, and complete other quests. You can even pack up your entire colony and move to a new place. You can use rocket-powered transport pods to travel faster. You can tame and train animals. Lovable pets will cheer up sad colonists. Farm animals can be worked, milked, and sheared. Attack beasts can be released upon your enemies. There are many animals - cats, labrador retrievers, grizzly bears, camels, cougars, chinchillas, chickens, and exotic alien-like lifeforms. People in RimWorld constantly observe their situation and surroundings in order to decide how to feel at any given moment. They respond to hunger and fatigue, witnessing death, disrespectfully unburied corpses, being wounded, being left in darkness, getting packed into cramped environments, sleeping outside or in the same room as others, and many other situations. If they're too stressed, they might lash out or break down. Wounds, infections, prosthetics, and chronic conditions are tracked on each body part and affect characters' capacities. Eye injuries make it hard to shoot or do surgery. Wounded legs slow people down. Hands, brain, mouth, heart, liver, kidneys, stomach, feet, fingers, toes, and more can all be wounded, diseased, or missing, and all have logical in-game effects. And other species have their own body layouts - take off a deer's leg, and it can still hobble on the other three. Take off a rhino's horn, and it's much less dangerous. You can repair body parts with prosthetics ranging from primitive to transcendent. A peg leg will get Joe Colonist walking after an unfortunate incident with a rhinoceros, but he'll still be quite slow. Buy an expensive bionic leg from a trader the next year, and Joe becomes a superhuman runner. You can even extract, sell, buy, and transplant internal organs. And there's much more than that! The game is easy to mod and has an active mod community . Read more at . (All non-English translations are made by fans.)

**Rome: Total War™ - Collection: Master the Roman Empire and Its Foes**

Immerse yourself in the strategic grandeur of ancient Rome with the Rome: Total War™ - Collection. This comprehensive package unites two celebrated entries from the acclaimed Total War franchise, delivering an unparalleled experience of empire management and large-scale warfare.

The Collection Edition includes:

*   **Rome: Total War:** Assume the mantle of leadership for one of three powerful Roman families, navigating a century of political intrigue and military campaigns to forge your dominion over the Roman Empire.
*   **Rome: Total War - Barbarian Invasion:** Step into the tumultuous final days of Roman supremacy. This official expansion thrusts you into a desperate conflict against encroaching barbarian tribes and internal strife, as highlighted by historical accounts of the era.

**Core Gameplay Elements:**

*   **Vast Armies:** Command legions of thousands in breathtaking battles, a hallmark of the series that has been praised for its scale and visual fidelity.
*   **Legendary Personalities:** Engage with or embody historical titans such as Julius Caesar, Spartacus, and Hannibal, whose influence shaped the ancient world.
*   **Varied Combatants:** Wield the might of Roman legions or lead formidable barbarian confederations, including the Huns under Attila and the formidable Saxons, each with distinct strengths and tactics.
*   **Holistic Empire Management:** Oversee the intricate balance of your empire, from its economy and civil infrastructure to its religious and military might, across an expansive campaign map.

The original Rome: Total War garnered significant critical acclaim, earning accolades such as "Best Strategy Game" in 2004 from prominent gaming publications like IGN, GameSpy, and GameSpot.

**Assassin's Creed® Brotherhood: Lead the Brotherhood in Rome**

Step into the boots of Ezio Auditore da Firenze, a legendary Master Assassin, as he embarks on an epic struggle against the formidable Templar Order. This time, Ezio's mission takes him to the heart of Italy's most influential city, Rome, a place rife with power, greed, and corruption. To strike at the core of the enemy, Ezio must not only rely on his own formidable skills but also on his ability to lead. He commands an entire Brotherhood, a legion of assassins who will rally to his cause. It is through their united strength that the Assassins can overcome their eternal adversaries.

For the first time in the series, Assassin's Creed Brotherhood introduces an award-winning multiplayer experience. Players can select from a diverse roster of unique characters, each boasting their own signature weapons and assassination techniques. Test your mettle against other players from across the globe in thrilling competitive matches.

**Key Features:**

*   **Become a Legend:** Embark on a new adventure with Ezio, now a seasoned Master Assassin, in over 15 hours of compelling single-player story-driven gameplay.
*   **Lead and Command a Legendary Brotherhood:** Recruit and customize your own guild of assassins. Train them, level them up, and command them to assist you in your critical missions.
*   **Deploy Secret Weapons:** Swiftly and silently eliminate your foes using an arsenal of ingenious tools. These include poison darts, parachutes, dual hidden blades, concealed firearms, and even an advanced flying machine.
*   **Win the Heart of a City:** Utilize your hard-earned currency to revitalize the crumbling cityscape of Rome. Rally the citizens to your cause, unlocking additional factions and challenging missions.
*   **Award-Winning Multiplayer:** Choose from multiple authentic character classes, each equipped with distinct signature weapons and lethal finishing moves. With richly detailed maps and a variety of unique multiplayer modes, no two battles will ever be the same.

**Bonus Content:**

*   **Project Animus Update #1 Multiplayer DLC:** To navigate the treacherous, narrow roads and multi-leveled architecture of the Mont Saint-Michel map and conquer the challenging Advanced Alliance multiplayer mode, Abstergo recruits must master free-running and refined hunting skills.
*   **Project Animus Update #2 Multiplayer DLC:** The Pienza Map offers an ideal free-running environment where predators and targets can seamlessly blend and disappear. In the Chest Capture Multiplayer Mode, two teams of three players each, partnered with fellow Templars, will either defend or attempt to capture Chests. This update also introduces the new Templar Score feature, designed to reward diligent work by Abstergo recruits.
*   **The Da Vinci Disappearance Single-Player and Multiplayer DLC:** Following the downfall of the Borgias, Leonardo Da Vinci is abducted. Ezio embarks on a relentless quest to recover him, uncovering new locations and gameplay features. The multiplayer component of this DLC represents the largest expansion to the award-winning multiplayer yet, featuring a new map, new characters, and new game modes.

Name: The Forgotten City
Description:
Travel 2,000 years into the past and relive the final days of a cursed Roman city, where if one person sins, everyone dies. Combat is an option, but violence will only get you so far. Only by questioning an intertwined community of colourful characters, cleverly exploiting the time loop, and making difficult moral choices can you hope to solve this epic mystery. Here, your decisions matter. The fate of the city is in your hands. Explore an open-world ancient Roman city with historically authentic art, architecture, costumes and customs Investigate a gripping, non-linear mystery with multiple endings Become entwined in the lives of richly detailed, deeply interactive characters Grapple with moral dilemmas which have life-and-death consequences Play as whoever you want, by choosing your character’s gender, origin and backstory Solve problems with reason, charm, bribery, intimidation, violence, or by cleverly exploiting the time-loop

Name: Field of Glory II
Description:
Field of Glory II is a turn-based tactical game set during the Rise of Rome from 280 BC to 25 BC ;v=veTBw3GCZ4w The game that brought the fun and excitement of the tabletop experience to digital form is back. Developed by legendary designer Richard Bodley Scott in a completely new 3D engine, Field of Glory is ready to set new standards in computer wargaming. Field of Glory II allows you to fight large or small battles for or against Rome, or between the other nations who are as yet unaware of the Roman threat, or what-if battles between nations that never actual came into conflict historically, but might have done if the course of history had been different. Take command of a huge variety of armies employing vastly different tactical doctrines. Lead your chosen army and its named generals to victory in set-piece historical battles or 'what-if' custom battle situations against an AI or human opponent. Victory will require determination and tactical mastery! FEATURES Accurate simulation of Ancient battle in the last three centuries of the pre-Christian era. 86 historically accurate units, built from fully animated 3D troop models, each with many variants. These allow Field of Glory II to represent the full range of troop-types and tactical doctrines that make this era one of the most interesting to wargamers and military historians. To name just a few, there are Roman legionaries before and after the reforms of Marius, Greek hoplite and Carthaginian African spearmen, Hellenistic pike phalanxes, thureophoroi spearmen and xystophoroi lancers, Gallic warbands, Skythian horse archers, Sarmatian lancers, Roman, Carthaginian, Greek and Gallic spear-armed cavalry, war elephants, Celtic and Indian chariots, scythed chariots, a wealth of light troops and many many more. 12 Historical scenarios covering key engagements of the period on an epic scale. These include Bagradas 255 BC, Trebia 218 BC, Cannae 216 BC, Ilipa 206 BC, Zama 202 BC, Magnesia 190 BC, Pydna 168 BC, Chaironeia 86 BC, Tigranocerta 69 BC, Bibracte 58 BC, Carrhae 53 BC and Thapsus 46 BC. The player can play as either side. Custom Battle system allows unlimited “what-if” scenarios using historically realistic armies from carefully researched army lists, on realistic computer generated terrain maps. Armies covered include Romans, Carthaginians, Hellenistic Kingdoms (Macedon, Seleucids, Ptolemaic Egypt etc.), Gauls, Ancient Britons, Galatians, Spanish, Numidians, Spartacus’s Slave Revolt, Thracians, Skythians, Sarmatians, Parthians, Indians and lots more. Campaign mode allows you to rewrite history as you play through the battlefield careers of some of ancient history’s greatest generals, or war with any ancient nation against any other. Each victory increases the experience and elan of your core units. Quick to resolve strategic decisions allow you to go straight from one battle to the next without any delay. Random map generator produces an infinite variety of historically realistic battlefield maps for custom battles and campaigns. Scenarios include open battle, pursuit, awaiting reinforcements, enemy awaiting reinforcements, flank march, rearguard action, advance guard, remove the head, and protect the baggage. Classic turn-based, tile based gameplay. Easy to use interface, hard to master gameplay. Cohort-sized units. Battles can range from a few units to as many as 80 units per side. Named generals who can influence combat and morale of units under their command. Single player and multiplayer battle modes. Effective AI makes sound tactical decisions. 6 difficulty levels allow the challenge to increase as you develop your battlefield skills. Numerous different unit organisations, combat capabilities and tactical doctrines allow full representation of tactical differences and developments through the period. Mod friendly game system with built-in map editor. Multiplayer mode allows historical scenarios and “what-if” scenarios to be played by two players using Slitherine’s easy to use PBEM server.

Name: The Age of Decadence
Description:
The Age of Decadence, our first but hopefully not the last RPG, is now available. If you've been following it or playing it in Early Access, you know what to expect. If you've just discovered it, 'stay awhile and listen'. The most commonly asked question is: What Kind of Game Is It? It’s a very different game than anything you’ve ever played. I’m sure you’ve noticed that the RPG genre hasn’t really been explored yet and most RPGs follow the formula that didn’t change in 20 years. While there were always games that strayed off the beaten path – Darklands, Planescape: Torment, King of Dragon Pass – such games were the exceptions that only reinforced the rule. The Age of Decadence is an experiment, an attempt to explore a different direction, taking you back to the PnP roots of the genre. It doesn’t mean that the game is awesome. In fact, there is a good chance that you won’t like it, precisely because we took too many liberties with the established design. So What Sets The Age of Decadence Apart From Other Games? 1. The Setup Traditionally, many fantasy RPGs are about killing things, clearing up dungeons, and being a hero. There is nothing wrong with mindless fun and wish fulfillment, but we want to offer you something different. To quote Tom Chick (Quarter to Three's game critic): 'But Age of Decadence wants nothing to do with kobolds, just as it wants nothing to do with Doo-dads of Unimaginable Power. The overarching idea is a crumbling society divided among three noble Houses, each fumbling around in its own version of darkness to comprehend what destroyed the world. That’s the central mystery. It plays out like noir in that you are the detective, piecing together what really happened from differing accounts, all vividly written with clear voices and efficient prose. And like a detective in a noir yarn, you can’t help but become part of the central mystery, effecting an outcome you might not have intended.' The Age of Decadence is not a game about killing monsters or exploring mystical lands, but rather, surviving amid the greed and brutality of your fellow humans and carving out a name for yourself. Good and bad are purely relative. It’s a world of scheming and backstabbing in which your words and actions have the potential to forge alliances and sow discord, and your path is never certain. You get to play with seven different factions: three Noble Houses and four 'professional' guilds: merchants, assassins, thieves, and the army, all fighting for power or influence; over 100 named characters, over 750 ‘generic’ characters with unique IDs taking part in violent take-overs, assassinations, and power grabs, and over 600,000 words of dialogue: a well-developed and thought through world, believable characters, realistic motivations, but no elves, dwarves, magic, and wizards in fashionable, pointy hats. 2. Combat difficulty Another design aspect worth mentioning is combat difficulty. It’s a hard game. Combat difficulty is integrated into the setting. You can’t say that the world is harsh and unforgiving and then let the player kill everyone who looks at him or her funny. The game has to be hard, dying should be easy, and you should have reasons to pick your fights. You aren’t a powerful hero who can defeat anyone and save the world and it is the difficulty that reinforces this notion. Make the game easier and we’re back to the powerful hero setup. So unless you’re a natural born killer, watch what you say and think before you act or you’ll end up dead before you can blink. 3. Choices & Consequences Choices are what the game is all about - crafting your own narrative via a variety of choices that alter the story, playing field, and your options down the road. From multiple quest solutions to branching questlines you'll have plenty decisions to make and consequences of said decisions to deal with, which is what makes the game incredibly replayable. Starting the game as a mercenary and joining the Imperial Guards will give a completely different experience, different quests, different content and points of view than, say, playing the game as a merchant (less buying low and selling high, more scheming and plotting to gain advantages for the guild), a praetor serving a Noble House, or an assassin. The questlines are interwoven, forming a large, overarching story, so playing the game only once will be like witnessing events from a single perspective, which is limited by default. You will have to play the game several times to better understand what’s going on, piece everything together, and see the full effect of the choices you make. The Big Question: Should You Buy The Game? Try before you buy. Even if everything I said sounds exactly like your kind of game, try the demo first. That’s what it’s there for. It gives you access to the first Chapter, consisting of 3 locations and about 30 quests split between mutually exclusive questlines and decisions.

Total War: ATTILA thrusts players into the brutal realities of 395 AD, a period of unprecedented famine, disease, and war that heralded the dawn of the Dark Ages. From the Eastern steppes, a formidable new power emerges, threatening the Roman Empire with an overwhelming force of a million horsemen. This installment in the acclaimed PC series presents a stark survival challenge: will you fight to establish your own barbarian or Eastern kingdom, or will you strive to defend the crumbling remnants of Rome against the approaching storm? The "Scourge of God" is nigh, and your world is poised to be consumed by fire.

The game introduces **apocalyptic destruction mechanics**, allowing players to unleash the devastating power of **fire in battle** to set buildings ablaze and sow terror among enemy ranks. Furthermore, the **raze mechanic** enables the complete eradication of entire cities and regions from the campaign map, leaving only desolate ashes in their wake.

A particularly challenging **legendary start position** is the Western Roman Empire. While initially controlling vast territories, players will quickly find their dominance eroded by intense internal political struggles and relentless external threats, transforming the game into a desperate fight for survival.

Total War: ATTILA features **overhauled game mechanics**, including a refined user interface and optimized systems for politics, family trees, civic management, and technological progression. Players will immerse themselves in an **authentic period detail**, with new technologies, weaponry, religions, cultures, and social upheavals specific to the Dark Ages. The game boasts **outstanding visual fidelity**, presenting a chilling vision of impending apocalypse and the fall of civilization. Combined with breathtaking scale and atmosphere, improvements and optimizations to both campaign and battle visuals deliver an enhanced graphical performance, allowing players to truly experience the end of days and the potential rise of a legend.

In Expeditions: Rome, the fate of the Roman Empire rests on your shoulders. You play as a young Legatus whose father's assassination by a shadowy political foe forces you to flee the city and join a military campaign against a Greek uprising. Through intense combat and strategic growth, you'll transform from a fugitive into a formidable Legatus, earning both respect and fear. As one commentator noted, "The choices you make will echo through the ages, shaping not only your destiny but the very future of Rome."

This immersive role-playing game challenges you to wield Roman power across diverse landscapes, from the sun-drenched shores of Greece to the dense forests of Gaul. Will you rule with an iron fist or a silver tongue? Will you uphold the Republic's traditions or forge a new path through the treacherous Roman Senate? Every decision carries weight, impacting your legion, your loyal companions, and Rome itself.

Forge your own Roman Legatus by customizing appearance, gender, class, and skills to suit your playstyle. Engage in deep, turn-based tactical combat, where an intricate skill system and varied weaponry dictate your battlefield effectiveness. Journey with five distinct companions, uncovering their rich backstories and unique personalities. Explore a vibrant, historically inspired world spanning North Africa, Greece, Gaul, and Rome itself, all brought to life through a fully voiced narrative where your choices have profound consequences.

Develop each character by leveling up and selecting from a wide array of skills and passive abilities, unlocking a vast spectrum of tactical possibilities. Enhance your gameplay further by looting, crafting, and equipping a diverse arsenal of weapons, armor, and tactical items, offering immense customization for every character. Lead your legion through three expansive war campaigns in Greece, North Africa, and Gaul. Recruit legionaries, fortify your warcamp, conquer territories, manage resources, and defend your lands as you guide your legion to ultimate victory.

For dedicated retro gaming enthusiasts, a remarkable gem from 1996 awaits discovery: **Time Commando**. This captivating title plunges players into a desperate struggle against a catastrophic time-warping virus that has infiltrated a top-secret military supercomputer, threatening global technological collapse. To avert this impending disaster, you must embark on an urgent mission through the annals of history, confronting a formidable array of vicious warriors whose lethal intentions demand your immediate and decisive action.

Your journey through time and space in Time Commando promises an unforgettable experience, characterized by:

*   **Diverse Worlds:** Explore nine distinct environments, each meticulously crafted to represent a different era and location, including:
    *   Prehistoric landscapes
    *   Ancient Rome
    *   Feudal Japan
    *   The Medieval period
    *   The era of the Conquistadors
    *   The Wild West
    *   Modern warfare settings
*   **Extensive Arsenal:** Wield an impressive array of weaponry, ranging from traditional Katanas and rifles to mystical spells and the technologically advanced combat yo-yo, ensuring a dynamic combat experience.
*   **Engaging Gameplay:** Immerse yourself in a blend of challenging combat, intriguing puzzle-solving elements, and a compelling original story, all presented with distinctive, stylized visuals that contribute to hours of entertainment.

Time Commando stands out as a truly unique title, offering a gameplay experience that is both entertaining and challenging, making it an essential addition to any serious game collection.

**Important Disclaimers:**

*   This game requires DosBox for operation.
*   This specific version is the European release, featuring an introduction without voice-over.
*   For a more accessible entry point, it is recommended to begin your adventure on the easy mode.

Name: Rome: Total War™ - Alexander
Description:
Rome: Total War - Alexander is the second official expansion pack to Rome: Total War. An entirely new campaign map that stretches from Macedonia to Greece and into the heart of the ancient Persian Empire New campaign game that tasks players with matching the exploits of Alexander the Great as he swept across Central Asia and dominated the Persian Empire Four new factions including the Macedonians, Persians and Indians Over 25 new units, including Alexander's own renowned historical troops Historical Alexander the Great campaign with six new historical battles that unlock sequentially, telling the story of Alexander and providing a historical backdrop to each of the battles All-new movies to support the Alexander campaign, with professional voiceovers by actor Brian Blessed (Alexander, Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace)

**Europa Universalis: Rome - Gold Edition: A Grand Strategy Journey Through the Roman Republic**

Dive into the heart of ancient history with Europa Universalis: Rome - Gold Edition, a comprehensive package that merges the acclaimed grand strategy game Europa Universalis: Rome with its substantial expansion, Vae Victis. This title invites you to experience a pivotal era of world history, meticulously crafted by masters of the genre. Immerse yourself in the grandeur of the greatest cultural and military civilizations, brought to life with remarkable strategic and tactical depth.

Set during the flourishing Roman Republic, a time when the Senate held sway over the vast empire, Vae Victis introduces a wealth of additions and enhancements to Europa Universalis: Rome. This expansion significantly enriches a game already renowned for its expansive portrayal of the era. A primary focus of Vae Victis is the overhaul of the game's government systems, designed to foster more fluid and balanced gameplay. The historical figures of the ancient world have also undergone a significant transformation, with improvements across various aspects. Furthermore, the addition of new missions, decisions, and laws ensures that Vae Victis is brimming with fresh content.

As noted by Paradox Development Studio, the creators of the game, "Vae Victis is an expansion packed with a huge amount of new content." This sentiment is echoed in the game's features.

**Key Features:**

*   **Immersive 3D Map:** Explore a fully 3D map with integrated graphics and detailed topography, offering a visually rich representation of the ancient world.
*   **Flexible Starting Dates:** Begin your campaign at any point between 280 B.C. and 27 B.C., allowing for diverse historical playthroughs.
*   **Vast Civilizations and Factions:** Choose from 10 distinct cultures, including Roman, Celtic, Greek, and Egyptian, with over 53 playable factions spread across hundreds of provinces.
*   **Dynamic Character Development:** Witness your characters evolve new traits through political intrigue and interactions with thousands of other individuals.
*   **Strategic Gameplay:** Engage in trade, diplomacy, and warfare with neighboring powers, and advance your technologies to achieve dominance over the Mediterranean World.
*   **Robust Multiplayer:** Challenge up to 32 players in competitive or cooperative multiplayer modes.

**New Key Features in Vae Victis:**

*   **Advanced Military AI:** Experience a completely revised military AI, particularly in the execution of military campaigns, leading to more challenging and realistic battles.
*   **Living Characters:** The characters within the Republic will truly come to life, possessing their own personal goals and agendas. As one developer stated, "The dynamics of the characters that live in the Republic will come to life as the men and women have their own personal goals and agendas."
*   **Senate Influence:** As a republic, you will now need to actively consider the Senate's influence. Characters will align with various parties based on their objectives, values, and ambitions.
*   **Monarchy and Tribal Courts:** Monarchies and Tribes will feature their own distinct courts. Be wary of ambitious individuals, as "bootlickers and sycophants who will stop at nothing to replace your divinely appointed ruler."

**Don Bradman Cricket 17: Elevating the Cricket Simulation Experience**

Don Bradman Cricket 17 introduces a significant leap forward in cricket gaming, focusing on an advanced control system that provides exceptional depth and accuracy for batting, bowling, and fielding. Players can now experience the thrill of "batting like a pro" with the addition of new shots like the helicopter, reverse sweep, and scoop, offering a wider range of offensive options.

The bowling mechanics have also been refined, allowing players to "stump their opponent" through strategic variations. This includes the ability to blend fast deliveries, such as leg-cutters and off-cutters, with spin options like the doosra and googly. Complementing these improvements is an enhanced fielding system, featuring a new 'reflex catching' mechanism. Realistic slides, boundary tap-backs, and relay throws further contribute to the immersive gameplay.

A more comprehensive career mode allows players to choose their path, whether starting as an experienced professional or a rookie beginning in club cricket. Notably, Don Bradman Cricket 17 is the first in the series to feature motion-captured first-class cricketers, including female players, integrated across all game modes.

The game also boasts a "world-first stadium and logo creator," empowering players to design and share their unique creations. Additionally, the community-driven aspect is strengthened by the ability to download and play with thousands of user-generated players, teams, umpires, stadiums, and logos.

*Please note: An internet connection is necessary for the initial launch of the game. Once the main menu is reached, you may disconnect from the internet.*

Name: Cricket Captain 2014
Description:
Cricket Captain is back for the 2014 season, with a beautiful new interface, updated 3D graphics engine, and all the attention to detail that you expect from the series. Cricket Captain has been hailed as the best cricket management simulation every created, and with one of the most exciting cricket seasons for a decade in prospect, it’s about time you took control. Game-play options & features: New Interface: beautifully designed to enhance your playing experience. Improved Highlights: adding atmosphere and excitement. New Stadiums: new stadiums will be added shortly after release. Classic England vs. India scenarios: play one of the classic test series between these nations. Cup Modes: World Cup, Twenty Over Cup and Champions Cup modes. Domestic and International Modes: Captain domestic teams from the English, Australian and Indian leagues, an international team, or both. International and 'All-Time Greats' Series: Play international series with current or all-time-great players. On-Line Play: updated and improved on-line engine. Play domestic and international matches over the internet, including improved detection of edited teams. Match Engine: further refinements to the game engine, giving greater realism in all match-types. Choose the Teams You Want to Captain: twenty over, one-day, first-class (or all three) for domestic and international competitions. Complete statistical update. Statistics: Player statistics for all domestic competitions. Database: Complete player database of over 4000 players, containing every current first-class or limited-over player from around the world. Records: Updated partnership and team records for first-class, one-day and twenty-over matches. Squads: Up-to date county, state and domestic twenty over squads for the new season. Fixtures: Comprehensive domestic and international fixture lists, including updated competition formats and rules.

Name: Cricket Captain 2016
Description:
The number one cricket management game returns for 2016 with the launch of Cricket Captain 2016 .   It’s time for cricket fans from around the world to put their cricketing expertise to the test with the most in-depth Cricket Captain game ever made. Developed in association with Chris Rogers, captain of Somerset County Cricket Club and former Australian opener, Cricket Captain 2016 has more playable teams and more great features than ever before!   Cricket Captain has been hailed as the best cricket management simulation ever created and Cricket Captain 2016 takes the game to the next level – new teams, a beautiful new interface, updated 3D graphics engine and all the attention to detail that you expect from the series. Key features for 2016 include: 79 playable domestic teams across 5 domestic leagues, including 12 new teams from the New Zealand and South African domestic cricket leagues Updated One Day International (ODI) and 20 over (T20) World Cup Tournament modes. Play as any international team that played in the last two World Cups including Afghanistan, Hong Kong, Ireland, Netherlands, Oman, Scotland or the UAE.  Day/Night matches New 3D lighting system Improved One Day and T20 match engine combined with improved player form calculation for One Day and T20 Updated kits for International teams Sri Lanka and Pakistan historical scenarios New database with improved player ability ratings New and improved interface In-Game Help System New Achievements

Name: VR Batting
Description:
'VR Batting' is a virtual reality cricket simulator made for the HTC Vive. Pickup the bat, take guard and play! From smashing the ball out of the park to playing textbook cover drives, play real cricket shots all over the ground in a virtual cricket field. Features: - 360 degree freedom of stroke-play. - Face deliveries of up to 100 miles per hour and challenge your reflexes. - Variations in deliveries: Medium-Fast, Fast, Conventional Swing, Reverse Spin and Spin. - Shred the ball past the fielders and battle against their AI to score runs. - Two game modes: 5 Overs Mode and Survival Mode. - Bat right handed or left handed. - Leaderboards for highest score, survival mode and six distance, to compete against players from around the world. - Immersive look and feel enhanced with haptic and audio feedback. Upcoming features: - Game achievements - Different fielding settings

Name: Cricket 19
Description:
Earn World Glory At The Pinnacle Of Cricket! Lead your team to international glory with Cricket 19. The truly global cricket simulation from Big Ant Studios, the leading name in authentic, realistic cricket action, Cricket 19 allows you to take control of your team, from club through national level, and lead them to T20, ODI, or Test Match glory. Create your own club, stadia, sponsor logos and uniforms via Big Ant’s acclaimed Cricket Academy to recreate your local matches and dramas! Build a rookie player’s career from their junior years at club cricket. Perform well and before you know it, you’ll be leading your nation on to the field. Key features include: Deep player, stadia, logo and scenario creator. Full support for all formats of cricket - T20, ODI and Test Match. Real world AI and tactics. Dozens of teams to choose between.

**Cricket Captain 2017: Mastering the Game of Cricket Management**

Cricket Captain 2017 delivers a deeply immersive cricket management simulation, building upon its predecessors with significant enhancements. The game introduces the most extensive domestic team expansion in the series' history, featuring 130 playable domestic teams across eight countries. This expansion, a collaborative effort with cricket legend Jimmy Anderson, adds new twenty-over leagues in the West Indies, South Africa, Pakistan, and Bangladesh. Players can now fully engage with the domestic leagues of the West Indies and Pakistan, offering unprecedented depth for simulation enthusiasts. Gaming reviewers have noted the game's expanded statistics, including comprehensive ground and international versus records, alongside an updated interface and a refined match engine.

Key improvements in Cricket Captain 2017 include the addition of three entirely new domestic systems, granting players broader managerial control. You can compete in all major global 20-over leagues, covering India, England, Australia, the West Indies, Pakistan, South Africa, Bangladesh, and New Zealand. The game provides access to detailed individual, team, and partnership records for over 130 grounds and all ten Test-playing nations across various formats. Four new, meticulously modelled grounds—Cardiff, Taunton, Bristol, and Hobart—have been added, with existing grounds also receiving updated models. Historical scenarios allow players to relive iconic cricketing moments from England vs. South Africa and England vs. West Indies matches. Early access reviews highlighted a revamped database that enhances player ability and player type accuracy for more realistic gameplay.

The expanded domestic play offers deep immersion. In Pakistan, players can manage one of 16 domestic teams and 6 franchise 20-over sides. The West Indies features 12 playable teams across both domestic and franchise systems. Bangladesh includes 8 playable 20-over teams, and a new 20-over league debuts in South Africa. The updated season and interface provide a refreshed look for the 2017 edition, including an updated English domestic season with 8 teams in Division 1, reflecting Durham's points deductions. Tournament modes have been updated, featuring the prestigious 2017 Champions Trophy. New achievements are also available to unlock, further enhancing the simulation's replayability.

Name: JUST BAT (VR CRICKET)
Description:
JUST BAT is a revolutionary new VR CRICKET game that allows you to master the art of batting. An innovative new control system allows unrivalled control of shots in any style and direction. Set high scores and compete with others around the world. Features Include: - Spin and Fast Bowling - Ball Speed Control - Ball Line and Length Control - Helmet View - Feedback on Bat-Ball Collision Position - Force Feedback - Two Game Modes: 5 Over Challenge and Free Play - A Global Leader Board for the 5 Over Challenge - AI Fielders - Pick Gaps and Score Runs - Bowler Animation - Full Freedom with Shot Selection - Separate Field Settings and Bowling Configurations for Left and Right Hand Batsmen

Cricket Captain 2021 immerses you in a dynamic cricket season, focusing on management and featuring new, prestigious competitions. This year, the game introduces the inaugural Test Match Championship and a new ODI World Championship, offering a pathway for teams to qualify for the 2023 World Cup. The game also embraces the evolving sport with the debut of the 100 Ball competition, a fast-paced, strategic short-format game. You can guide your chosen team through these and many other exciting tournaments and formats.

Significant enhancements have been made to the 20 Over match simulation in Cricket Captain 2021. A rebalanced match engine and an updated batting aggression bar provide finer control over scoring. Realism is boosted with increased outfield catches when batsmen play aggressively. The previous target RPO indicator is replaced by an estimated RPO (E.RPO) system, which accounts for bowler tactics for more accurate scoring predictions. In 20 Over matches, dot ball percentage now replaces maidens, offering a more detailed view of bowler performance. The thrilling Super Over, a one-over tie-breaker, also makes its debut.

The English domestic system is comprehensively updated, reflecting the latest competition rules and overseas player regulations. Similarly, the South African domestic system has been revitalized with 15 new teams. Cricket Captain 2021 includes a complete database update with new statistics for fastest 50s and 100s across various records, offering chances to break historical benchmarks. The game continues to advance cricket management simulation with an extensive array of options for championship success.

Key features include:

*   **World Championships:** Compete in the new ODI World Championship and the inaugural Test Match Championship.
*   **Super Over:** Experience one-over shootouts for tied matches.
*   **20 Over Simulation:** Enjoy an improved engine with enhanced controls and new statistical insights, including dot ball percentage.
*   **Domestic Systems:** Navigate updated English and South African domestic leagues, the latter featuring 15 new teams.
*   **New Competitions:** Manage updated squads in the exciting 100 Ball competition.
*   **Records:** Pursue thousands of new records for the quickest 50s and 100s.
*   **Match Engine:** Benefit from a rebalanced engine with improved outfield catches and E.RPO that considers bowler tactics.
*   **Historical Scenarios:** Relive classic England Test series.
*   **Tournament Modes:** Participate in standalone World Cups or create custom series.

The comprehensive stats update for Cricket Captain 2021 features over 7,000 players, updated versus, ground, and team records, and updated domestic squads for all 150 playable teams. Recent series statistics for all players are also updated.

**Ashes Cricket: Relive the Legendary Rivalry**

**Ashes Cricket** is the officially licensed video game that immerses you in cricket's most storied rivalry. This game delivers the **thrilling action, powerful shots, and strategic gameplay** that characterize this iconic competition. Experience the Ashes with unparalleled realism, placing you directly into the heart of the competition. Guide your team to victory during the **men's and women's 2017/2018 Ashes tours**.

Utilizing Big Ant's innovative **photogrammetry technology**, Ashes Cricket showcases **lifelike representations** of all the Australian and English men's and women's teams. This technology makes you feel as though you are present at the actual matches. As one developer noted, "Key Test players have been **fully motion-captured** to ensure authentic movements on the field." Players can also tailor their experience by selecting their preferred **batting or bowling style**. Big Ant's most sophisticated cricket engine to date provides **true 360-degree batting**, guaranteeing a unique experience for every player.

This title stands as the most **comprehensive and authentic cricket simulation** available, boasting a variety of features:

*   **Extensive Career Mode:** Start as a novice, refine your abilities in club matches, and ascend to the international stage, or immediately assume the role of a renowned player.
*   **Full Customization Options:** The **Cricket Academy** empowers you to design your own players, teams, and even umpires. These creations can then be shared with the global online community.
*   **Authentic Venues:** Compete in all the **officially licensed stadiums** that hosted the 2017/18 Ashes tour.
*   **Design Your Ideal Tournament:** Craft your own **stadiums and logos** to personalize your gaming journey and make it uniquely yours.
*   **Multiplayer Engagement:** Challenge players globally in what is recognized as the **most competitive online cricket game** to date.

Cricket Revolution delivers an unparalleled multiplayer cricket sports action experience on PC, designed to immerse players in the thrill of the game. This title distinguishes itself through its inventive gameplay mechanics, a wide array of engaging game modes, and a formidable AI that provides a true test of skill. Players can anticipate intense global competition as they strive to ascend the ranks of the online leaderboards.

The game boasts several key features that contribute to its unique appeal:

*   **Authentic Batting Mechanics:** Players gain precise control over shot selection and placement, utilizing intuitive, action-oriented controls. The combination of player attributes, skill levels, and motion-captured animations results in a deeply satisfying batting experience. As one developer noted, "We wanted to give players the feeling of truly being in control of every shot."
*   **Recognition Through Awards:** Significant achievements are meticulously recognized within the game. From outstanding performances and match-defining innings to remarkable hat tricks and unbroken streaks, Cricket Revolution presents an extensive catalog of awards to celebrate player success.
*   **In-Depth Statistics:** Every wicket taken, century scored, and run accumulated is meticulously recorded and analyzed. Players can delve into past scorecards, examine their batting history, monitor their averages, and tally their wickets, all contributing to their climb up the leaderboards.
*   **Mastering the 'Bowling Gadget':** This innovative system grants bowlers precise command over speed, spin, swing, seam movement, and specialized deliveries. It empowers bowlers to concentrate on strategic play and outmaneuver batsmen through psychological tactics.
*   **Revolution Servers for Global Play:** Engage in worldwide competition with friends and rivals on the Revolution Online leaderboards. The game integrates a robust in-game community network, featuring chat rooms, friend lists, organized tournaments, detailed rankings, and comprehensive leaderboards.

Name: OMORI
Description:
Explore a strange world full of colorful friends and foes. Navigate through the vibrant and the mundane in order to uncover a forgotten past. When the time comes, the path you’ve chosen will determine your fate... and perhaps the fate of others as well.

Rakuen is a touching adventure game that centers on a young boy confined to a hospital. He dreams of a magical world from his favorite storybook, wishing to visit this land and ask the Guardian of the Forest for a special favor. To achieve this, the Boy must help his fellow patients by engaging with their fantasy world counterparts and overcoming various challenges.

These challenges involve assisting:

*   **A curmudgeonly old man:** He guards a broken music box and laments his isolation.
*   **A young woman in a coma:** Her devoted husband stays by her side.
*   **A young girl:** She mourns a friend she couldn't say goodbye to before falling ill.

The Boy gradually understands that his neighbors' troubles and hidden stories are deeply connected to the mysterious hospital. As one reviewer observed, the game "explores themes of loss, memory, and the power of connection in a truly unique way."

**Key Features:**

*   **Compelling Story:** Dive into a heartfelt narrative filled with unforgettable characters.
*   **Distinctive Gameplay:** This non-violent adventure blends charming dungeons, clever escape room puzzles, and story-driven mysteries.
*   **Understanding and Support:** Step into each character's shoes to understand their unresolved issues and help them find peace.
*   **Original Music:** Enjoy an original score featuring multiple vocal tracks, each connected to a specific character's journey.
*   **Creating a Community:** Collect items and build relationships to foster a more pleasant hospital environment.
*   **Imaginative Quests:** Embark on amusing quests alongside unusual beings in the fantasy realm.

Name: Jimmy and the Pulsating Mass
Description:
Jimmy and the Pulsating Mass is a Japanese-style RPG made by a guy from Texas. It was very much influenced by SNES-era jRPGs, particularly Earthbound , Final Fantasy 5 , and the Breath of Fire series, among others. It was also heavily influenced by Yume Nikki . The game takes place in the dream of an eight-year-old boy. When an alien entity appears and threatens his family and the stability of the dream world itself, Jimmy sets out on an adventure to save his family and eradicate the threat of the Pulsating Mass. Along the way, Jimmy will have to work with his family, confront his own shortcomings, and brave the creeping nightmares of his subconscious. Features: -Full-length Japanese-style RPG. -Classic turn-based combat with some modern sensibilities. -A big emphasis on exploration. -As an empathetic kid, Jimmy gains the ability to imagine himself as several of the monsters he meets, allowing him to interact with the world in new ways. -These different transformations can also be leveled up, granting Jimmy higher stats and new abilities. -A story for adults delivered from the perspective of a child. -Jokes. -Unspeakable horrors. Note: for some versions of Mac, the game may not be able to save if you've placed the game in the root '/Applications' folder. Instead, put it somewhere in your home folder, such as '~/Documents.'​​

**Reliving Life's Dreams: A Journey to the Moon**

In a remarkable service, Dr. Rosalene and Dr. Watts provide a profound opportunity: the chance to experience your entire life from its very beginning, all within the confines of your own mind. This unique procedure is designed for individuals on their deathbeds, offering them a final chance to realize lifelong dreams that remained unfulfilled. The life they construct becomes their ultimate memory, creating a deeply personal and meaningful conclusion.

This narrative centers on the doctors as they assist an elderly man named Johnny in fulfilling his most cherished dying wish. Their journey takes them through his past in reverse, uncovering scattered fragments of his life and gradually revealing the motivations behind his ultimate desire. Johnny's poignant wish is to **go to the moon**.

"To the Moon" is celebrated as a story-driven adventure that places a strong emphasis on emotional resonance and thoughtful exploration, rather than combat. It artfully combines adventure game mechanics with the classic aesthetics of RPGs, resulting in a distinctive gameplay experience. The critically acclaimed original soundtrack further elevates the emotional journey, and the entire experience is expertly crafted with a singular focus on narrative impact, ensuring no element detracts from the core story.

Name: Finding Paradise
Description:
Dr. Rosalene and Dr. Watts have peculiar jobs: They give people another chance to live, all the way from the very beginning... but only in their patients' heads. Due to the severity of the operation, the new life becomes the last thing the patients remember before drawing their last breath. Thus, the operation is only done to people on their deathbeds, to fulfill what they wish they had done with their lives, but didn’t. Finding Paradise is the 2nd full episode of To the Moon 's series. It follows the life of the doctors' new patient, Colin, as they attempt to unravel a life that is split down the middle, and fulfill a wish that appears to be self-contradictory by nature. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- *Like To the Moon , this is a standalone full game that does not require having played any previous games in the series.

Name: Impostor Factory
Description:
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Impostor Factory is a narrative-driven adventure game that is categorically out of its mind. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Dr. Watts and Dr. Rosalene have peculiar jobs: They give people another chance to live their lives, all the way from the very beginning. But this isn't their story. Probably. Instead, it's about Quincy . Let me tell you a story about him. One day, Quincy was invited to a fancy parteh at a suspiciously secluded mansion. So, he accepted and went; because even though the mansion was suspicious and secluded, it was also fancy and had a parteh. In fact, it turned out to be so fancy that there was a time machine in its bathroom. Quincy could wash his hands and time-travel while he was at it. Talk about a time-saver! But of course, then people start dying, because that's what they do. And somewhere along the way, things get a little Lovecraftian and tentacles are involved. Anyway, that's around 1/3 of what the game is really about. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Key Features A story that will make you curse at the screen A cozy mix between adventure game elements and classic RPG aesthetics Dialogues that read so wrong but feel so right An espresso execution with zero filler and no time drains long cat ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- F.A.Q.: Q: Is playing To the Moon & Finding Paradise necessary before playing this game? A: Impostor Factory can be played independently, just like the games before it. Q: Is Impostor Factory the sequel to To the Moon & Finding Paradise ? A: Maybe not. Maybe it's a sequel. Maybe it's a prequel. Maybe it's both. But again, there is no prerequisite to playing Impostor Factory.

Name: OneShot
Description:
www.oneshot-game.com A surreal puzzle adventure game with unique mechanics / capabilitie s . You are t o guide a child through a mysterious world on a mission to restore its l ong-dead sun. ...Of cour s e, things are never tha t simple. The world knows you ex i st. The c onsequences are real. Saving the world may b e impossible. You only have one shot. FEATURES Gameplay mechanics that go beyond the game window. A haunting original soundtrack and artwork designed to match. A unique relationship between a game and its player. A lingering feeling that you're not getting the full story unless you know where to look. CONTENT WARNING Although OneShot is not a horror game in the traditional sense, parts of the game may induce some paranoia. Please proceed with caution. CLOSING THE GAME WINDOW Do not worry, it is safe to do so. It only saves your progress.

Name: The Chronicles of Nyanya
Description:
Thrilling like a payday, a story of cats in funny costumes that do RPGish things. It is full of many unexpected and incredible twists, the tragedies of an individual lured into the trap of an adventourist internship, and friendly pastry, which is very sensitive to nihilism. The game also contains many thrilling conversations, walking around the map with some logical puzzles sprinkled in here and there – but don’t worry, even a liberal arts student should be able to solve them – raising pastry, and deliberations about important moral and existential issues, the majority of which will affect the ending you get. The ending will sum up the fates of the most important characters, in-game achievements, your proficiency in fighting the ultimate bad guy, your finesse in raising pastry and the degree of faith in friendship. This results in dozens of possible ending combinations. After completing the game, you can try NewGame+ to unlock additional, normally unavailable skills for the main character. The world of Nyanya Nyanya is an enormous cat world that can take up to 20 hours to fully explore. The main plotline itself is good for more than 8 hours of fun, but the game also includes many side quests found on numerous maps, hundreds of interactions with NPCs and over a thousand descriptions of nearly everything. You can also find dozens of exciting items such as the legendary Excalipurr and the frightening Berserker Catnip. The role of the majority of animals is played by various kinds of rolls, which, together with cats, pidgins, and sneks, constitute the entirety of Nyanya’s fauna. Kibble is found in mines and on can triis, almost all buildings are boxes (because cardboard boxes are cats’ natural habitat) and cleaning fur is a matter of importance to the state. The sense and logic of this world are therefore highly debatable... But don’t worry about its coherence. We made sure that it is top-notch. All this mess is watched over by cat gods, such as the mysterious Great Bowl of Goodness – a giant stone leg, whose calf disappears in the clouds, Meowrida the Brave – goddess of shooting, and Overcat – the creator of everything that's feline. The game is produced in a retro jRPG style. Party The protagonist of the game is Catair, a meowsassin, who is as optimistic and sweet as sandpaper. When she sets out on her amazing journey, she has the chance to discover friendship, love, and revenge and to travel through many wonderful lands that she does not want to visit... And yet, she has no choice. She will join the party led by the veteran of the war in Furajevo – Francat the clericat. Their adventourist paths will cross with Purrgli, a yes-cat and an outstanding purrior, Catniss – a fighter for friendship and even more friendship, as well as meowmage Meowdledore, whose parents bought him gifts instead of giving him some attention. You can meet them here . Combat The game features tons of epic turn-based jRPG fights, where you will have an opportunity to use dozens of such unique cat techniques as Boot to the Head, Slipper Comet or a Hairball of Darkness. The characters represent traditional classes such as meowsassin, meowmage and purrior. With their powers combined, they are able to face adversities such as student internships and unpaid overtime. Among the dozens of opponents, you will find monstrosities such as orcats, aggressive cat fetuses enchanted in slime, or Purrevar, Prince of the Underpurr. What is more, The Chronicles of Nyanya is probably the only game in which you can charge Nazi furniture on your rollicorn or fight their mysterious Wundermöbelwaffe. Parody and pop culture The game is filled with familiar-sounding places and names. If you love comic books, memes or just pop culture in general, you will feel right at home in Nyanya. You will meet Cateris, talk with Granny Weathercat, Furry Catter and Nyoda and listen to the moving stories of Catmerian guards, who always wanted to be adventourists like you, but they took an arrow to their knees. In other games, references are Easter eggs, in Nyanya they are the main course. Creators The game was created by hamstercube studio, made up of Ilona, author of chatolandia and Adrian. The graphics were created mainly by Revv, known from her Tak bardzo źle blog; Ilona also had something to do with it. The moving music, which tickles your aesthetic sense was composed by Marcin Maślanka, an experienced composer of soundtracks for games and films.

Name: Echoes of Aetheria
Description:
From the creators of the hit game, Skyborn , comes their latest RPG epic: Echoes of Aetheria . Echoes of Aetheria has a humble, perhaps even classic, beginning. A wedding interrupted, a bride kidnapped; our heroes give chase. Though their motives are different, they soon find themselves thrown together as their simple quest to recover the bride spirals into an epic saga of war, love, and betrayal. Treason, defection, rebellion, and even the creation of a new nation are all parts in which you’ll have a role to play. As you progress further, the scope of the story will grow with your heroes. By the end, you’ll have to weigh your decisions and their consequences against the fate of entire nations. FEATURES Characters Make the Story – Echoes of Aetheria is more than just a story; it’s a tale about people. Every character has fully fleshed out dreams, goals, motivations, and flaws. These characters exist in a world with its own legends, intrigue, and drama. In turn, this sets the stage for our story, which begins as a whimsical light-hearted adventure and ends as an epic campaign of unprecedented size and scope. There's No Place Like Home – As you travel around the world, you’ll always have a home base to return to. This home is more than just a place to hang your hat; it’s the hub on which the wheel of the story spins. Shop, craft, and converse with members of your party to progress story elements. Participate in the Battle Arena combat challenges for fun, loot, and xp! Explore Like Magellan – Finding loot from exploration is only one reward; you gain experience from these hidden caches as well. Take the time to explore the world and be rewarded in full! Get Busy Crafting – THOUSANDS of items can be crafted, salvaged, or augmented. A fully integrated crafting system lets you create, purchase, or sell the materials you need. Those who fully explore the system will be rewarded in combat! Random Encounters? Not Here! – Enemies all have their own map AI. Will you brute force through encounters or stealthily sneak by to save resources? You can sneak up behind an enemy to gain the advantage of surprise. But be wary, because they can also sneak up on you! A New Battle System – Tired of JRPGs that still rely on outdated RPG mechanics? Echoes of Aetheria features a new 15 tile combat system using both sides of the battlefield. Character position and formations are just as important as the skills and spells you’ll use. Sweeping Orchestral Sound – Our epic soundtrack will keep you enjoying every last note.

**Actual Sunlight: A Haunting Indie Game About Life's Bleak Realities**

Actual Sunlight is a critically acclaimed indie game that explores the profound loneliness and depression of its protagonist, Evan Winter. The game directly asks, "Why keep getting up, day in and day out, even though your life is going nowhere?" This text-based adventure is celebrated for its sharp insights and dark humor. It delivers a deeply affecting narrative that starts provocatively and ends with a shattering impact. Actual Sunlight offers a challenging, haunting, and beautiful gaming experience.

The game delves into themes of video game addiction, unfulfilling work, and deep solitude. Its evocative artwork, a mix of original pixel and CG art, vividly portrays the streets, offices, and personal spaces of Toronto, Canada. A moody soundtrack of original music enhances the game's tone, mirroring the harsh indifference of real life. As the game's creator, Will O'Neill, has stated, "Actual Sunlight is about the struggle to find meaning in a world that often feels meaningless." It's crucial to know that Actual Sunlight contains explicit language and addresses extremely mature themes, including depression and suicidal thoughts. Therefore, it is not suitable for players under 18. Like other powerful artistic works that tackle these difficult subjects, Actual Sunlight can be an intensely emotional experience. For the latest updates, follow Will O'Neill on Twitter.

Football Manager 2019 (FM19) puts you in the manager's seat, allowing you to craft your team's unique journey. Every decision you make shapes your team's destiny. While players score the goals, your strategic vision is what makes it all possible. FM19 introduces exciting new features and enhanced gameplay, offering fresh and realistic ways to manage your squad. This creates a compelling, evolving narrative as you progress through the game.

### Key FM19 Features

**Revamped Tactics Module**
Design distinctive team tactics that mirror contemporary football styles. The updated system incorporates new tactical approaches and phases, reflecting modern game trends. For those seeking a quicker start, pre-made tactical presets are available for immediate implementation.

**Overhauled Training System**
Take granular control over player development. You can now construct bespoke training sessions and schedules, designed to emulate professional club preparation. Alternatively, you have the option to delegate training responsibilities to your coaching staff.

**New Manager Induction Program**
A comprehensive new guide is in place to support aspiring managers. Your Assistant Manager will walk you through the fundamental principles of football management, setting you on a clear path toward achieving success.

**Welcome to the Bundesliga**
Experience the thrill of managing in Germany's top two professional leagues for the very first time. Both the Bundesliga and 2. Bundesliga are fully licensed, featuring official club emblems, team kits, and authentic player appearances.

**Refreshed User Interface**
FM19 boasts a contemporary, redesigned visual aesthetic. This iteration is recognized as the most visually appealing and user-friendly version to date.

### Other Improvements

Beyond these core features, FM19 incorporates significant enhancements to match simulation. These include the integration of VAR and goal-line technology. You will also benefit from improved agent feedback during transfer negotiations. Managerial environments are now more dynamic, and pre-match team talks offer greater detail. Additionally, general user interface refinements and new Steam achievements have been implemented.

Rocket League is a unique sports game that combines fast-paced arcade soccer with exciting car action. It's easy to learn but offers deep competitive play. The game's physics-driven mechanics and simple controls create a fluid and engaging experience for millions of players.

The game features various modes for different playstyles. **Online matches** include casual and competitive playlists. **Season Mode** offers a full offline experience. **Extra Modes** add fun twists inspired by hockey and basketball. **Mutators** let players customize rules for unique challenges.

Rocket League also offers extensive cosmetic customization. Players can create over **500 trillion unique vehicle combinations**. This depth and engaging gameplay have earned the game over **150 "Game of the Year" awards and nominations**. With more than **57 million players**, Rocket League continues to evolve with updates, including new **DLCs, content packs, features, modes, and arenas**.

Recent updates have improved the player experience. **Rocket Pass** is a premium option that gives a **50% XP bonus** and allows players to unlock up to **70 rewards**, such as a new Battle-Car and Goal Explosion. The **Challenge System** lets players earn exclusive Rocket Pass rewards by completing **Weekly Challenges** in Online Matches. The **Esports Shop** allows fans to support professional teams by purchasing Decals, Wheels, and Player Banners.

Rocket League has also updated its platform support. The game now uses technologies like **DirectX 11** and a **64-bit client**. However, support for **macOS and Linux (SteamOS)** has ended. The final patch for these platforms was on **March 10, 2020**, disabling online features. Offline modes like Local Matches and splitscreen play are still available. Players on SteamOS and macOS may experience bugs not present in the Windows version, and these issues are unlikely to be fixed.

Online multiplayer is also restricted in certain regions due to agreements with the online service provider. Players in **China, Crimea, Cuba, Iran, North Korea, Sudan, and Syria** cannot access online services. The developers apologize for any inconvenience. All software and online features are subject to the game's license, terms of use, and privacy policy, available at rocketleague.com/eula, rocketleague.com/tou, and rocketleague.com/privacy.

Name: Football Manager 2020
Description:
Run your football club, your way. Every decision counts in Football Manager 2020 with new features and polished game mechanics rewarding planning and progression like never before, empowering managers to develop and refine both your club’s and your own unique identity. Walk down the tunnel to a living, breathing football world with you at the very heart of it. Around here, your opinion matters! This is a world that rewards planning and knowledge but, unlike other games, there’s no pre-defined ending or script to follow – just endless possibilities and opportunities. Every club has a story to tell and it’s down to you to create it. They say football is a game of dreams. Well, managers are a special breed of dreamers. They don’t see problems, only opportunities: the chance to prove themselves against the best in the world, to develop and instil a new footballing philosophy, to nurture talent through the ranks, to lift the club to greater heights and end the wait for silverware. How you get to the top is up to you… you’ll own your decisions, and the consequences they bring… Base yourself in 50 of the biggest footballing countries worldwide Oversee a new era of success at one of 2,500 clubs at every level Sign the best and mould the future – scout more than 500,000 real players and staff Create your tactical vision and bring it to life on the training pitch Kick every ball with our most immersive and smartest match engine to date DEVELOPMENT CENTRE Take full control of your youth team operations in a new all-encompassing hub. Nurture your young stars from the moment they arrive at your club and through the youth ranks until they’re ready for first-team action. CLUB VISION Develop a culture, work with the board to achieve ongoing objectives and plot a course for your club to progress in seasons to come. Club vision goes far beyond the boardroom; impacting on transfers, playing style and competition expectations as you look to strengthen your club’s identity and meet the multi-year milestones. PLAYING TIME PATHWAY A whole new way to define a player’s standing in your squad. Build in current and future playing time across the length of a contract, defining a clear pathway from Fringe Player to Star Player and everything in between. BACKROOM STAFF New roles, advice and interaction make your staff more involved and important than ever. More collaboration across more areas brings the game closer to the structure of a real-life backroom team. GRAPHIC IMPROVEMENTS Redesigned player and manager models, improved lighting and overhauled pitch visuals combine to create the most realistic and best-looking match experience to date.

The **PRO EVOLUTION SOCCER 2018: FC Barcelona Edition Bundle** is designed for devoted fans of both FC Barcelona and the PRO EVOLUTION SOCCER game series. This special bundle aims to fully immerse players in the world of their favorite club. It includes exclusive in-game content for the popular myClub mode. Konami, the game's developer, stated that this edition is meant to strengthen the bond between players and the renowned FC Barcelona team within the virtual football environment.

This bundle offers more than just club-specific items; it also significantly helps players advance in myClub. In addition to the exclusive FC Barcelona content, such as a special FCB Agent and an FCB Legend Special Agent, players receive a substantial boost to their in-game resources. Promotional materials for the game detail this bonus myClub content. It includes 1,000 myClub coins, four Start Up Agents, one Partner Club Agent, and 10,000 GP awarded weekly for ten weeks.

PRO EVOLUTION SOCCER 2018 itself features many improvements. These include a "Gameplay Masterclass" with better strategic dribbling and Real Touch+ for improved ball control, plus updated set pieces. The game's presentation has also been greatly enhanced with new menus and authentic player images. For competitive players, PES League modes, including myClub, offer new ways to compete. An Online Co-op Mode has also been added for teamwork. The popular Random Selection Match mode returns with updated features. The Master League has been significantly upgraded with new pre-season tournaments, a better transfer system, and improved presentations. These gameplay and presentation enhancements are supported by improved visuals. These include new lighting effects, updated player models and animations, and detailed facial expressions and body movements, all contributing to a more realistic football simulation.

Name: PRO EVOLUTION SOCCER 2019
Description:
Also get these bonus PES 2019 myClub items below: Standard Edition • David Beckham 2018 - 10 match loan • Philippe Coutinho - 10 match loan • Premium Agent (3 Players) x 10 weeks • 3 Player Contracts x 10 weeks David Beckham Edition • David Beckham 2018 • Philippe Coutinho 10 match loan • Premium Agent (3 Players) x 20 weeks • 3 Player Contracts x 20 weeks Legend Edition • PES Legend Player • David Beckham 2018 • Philippe Coutinho 10 match loan • Premium Agent (3 Players) x 30 weeks • 3 Player Contracts x 30 weeks PES 2019 new features: •• AUTHENTIC LEAGUES – Huge addition of licensed leagues • MAGIC MOMENTS – Player individuality has been taken to the next level with 11 new skill traits. Score great goals with improved shooting motion & animation, and see stamina have an impact with Visible Fatigue • NEW MYCLUB - Every element has been redone, from how you sign players, to special versions of players released throughout the year • THE BEAUTIFUL GAME – Experience photo-realism with stunning animation flow, supporting 4K HDR • ML REAL SEASON – Experience life as a real manager with 3 significant changes: ICC pre-season, in-depth transfer system and new league licenses The Legend Edition includes a special 3D scanned version of David Beckham from 2018, and PES Legend Player for myClub!

Name: Altitude
Description:
Blast your way across the cartoon skies in this fast-paced game of aerial combat. Nimbly Games has crafted an instantly accessible, rewardingly deep, and ravishingly fun multiplayer action game. The sirens have sounded, bogies are coming in hot… Jump into the fast and agile Loopy and drop your enemies from the sky with a tactical EMP blast - but hit your afterburners before your Biplane support tears them to pieces with 20mm cannons blazing! Barrel roll through the enemy minefield and arm your nuke as you enter the drop zone. There it is - the enemy base - but two Mirandas just warped in with lasers hot and an Explodet is lumbering into position over their hangar decks — will you carry your team to victory? Multiplayer Done Right: Altitude combines Call-of-Duty style perks with the gameplay variety of Team Fortress 2 in a fresh multiplayer experience. Carefully refined controls, netcode, and balance make for hundreds of hours of deep, rewarding gameplay. Seven Engaging Game Modes: Plane Ball's constant action makes it a favorite among new and casual players while team-based tactical maneuvers like passing and blocking provide a fun challenge for veterans. Team Base Destruction offers an intense, competitive experience where coordinated pushes and strategic loadout decisions turn the tide. Try a friendly pickup game or join a clan and play in the 'Altitude ProLeague' - a competitive tournament scene run by hardcore gamers from the Starcraft and Counter-Strike communities. For the ultimate test of dogfighting skills try 1-life Deathmatch or compete in Demolition for a more tactical, objective-based experience. Or enjoy classic game modes like Free For All and Team Deathmatch.

Name: NBA 2K19
Description:
TAKE CONTROL WITH TAKEOVER Harness your MyPLAYER’s full basketball potential with the new Takeover feature. Unlock special moves and abilities never before seen on the court, or activate Team Takeover and unleash the power of your full squad. RUN THE NEIGHBORHOOD (ONLINE SERVICE DISCONTINUED FOR NBA 2K19) You won’t want to miss a single day in the updated Neighborhood. Make a name for yourself on the court, at the Under Armour Cages, and during live events on the block. Ball until dawn with new day to night transitions, walk on at the Jordan Rec Center, or get the old Crew back together for exciting 3 on 3 streetball action. MyTEAM (ONLINE SERVICE DISCONTINUED FOR NBA 2K19) Create your very first MyPLAYER card, and ball with LeBron, Kobe, and the rest of your collection in a variety of competitive modes. Introducing the new Unlimited mode, allowing you to pick any five cards from your deck without restrictions and battle against other players online. MyCAREER From neighborhood legend to global phenomenon. The original career story mode returns with an all-new, immersive narrative charting your journey from China to the G League and eventually the NBA. Featuring an all-star cast, endorsements tied to your popularity, and new team chemistry elements that allow you to dominate the hardwood

**Captain Tsubasa: Rise of New Champions: An Arcade Football Experience**

Captain Tsubasa: Rise of New Champions injects arcade-style excitement into the football genre. This game offers exhilarating action and over-the-top shots, setting it apart from typical football simulations.

Key features include:

*   **Build Your Dream Eleven:** Create custom characters with unique skills and abilities. Assemble your ultimate team for both offline and online play.
*   **4-Player Versus:** Determine who reigns supreme among your friends with offline matches supporting up to four players.
*   **Online Competition:** Engage in various online modes to earn trophies and valuable rewards.
*   **Two Story Modes:** Relive the events of the anime or immerse yourself directly in the world of Captain Tsubasa.

## Football Drama: A Unique Football Management Experience

**Football Drama** offers a unique take on the football management genre, placing you in the role of Rocco Galliano, a manager given a second chance at Calchester Assembled Football Club after a seven-year absence. Billionaire president Boris Aluminovitch has hired you to revive the team's fortunes following the previous manager's dismissal for poor performance.

Your decisions are central to the game's narrative. Will your passionate sideline shouts motivate the players, or will you consult the ancient "Book of Changes" for guidance? Your past may also resurface, with potential encounters involving corruption, crime, drugs, and romance, each carrying its own consequences. Surviving a full season is a significant challenge, but remember, in **Football Drama**, you can lose the championship and still win the game.

This interactive narrative experience allows meaningful choices to shape the game's direction. Your life and in-game decisions influence the outcome through a karma or chaos system. Matches are presented with turn-based gameplay and live-action animations within a procedural 18-week championship, where you can be fired at any moment.
