The primary objective is to construct an unbreachable network of traps designed to dismember, pulverize, and incinerate enemies before they can breach the sanctity of the rift.

Key gameplay features and modes include:

*   **Trap Customization and Upgrades:** The thrill of devising ingenious traps is amplified by the ability to unlock new ones and enhance existing ones for devastating effectiveness. Players will meticulously fortify their strongholds with a variety of diabolical contraptions, engineering hilariously violent fates for the encroaching hordes. Each encounter necessitates a unique strategic approach, as the combined forces of elemental powers and physics provide potent tools against the relentless waves of enemies.
*   **Diverse Hero Roster:** The game challenges players to prove their mettle as mages capable of defending the rifts. A wide array of distinct and potent heroes, each offering deep gameplay mechanics, presents an abundance of creatively brutal methods for halting the advance of orcs. Familiar faces like Max and Gabriella return to join forces with new heroes such as Blackpaw, Hogarth, Stinkeye, and Bloodspike. Whether players favor brute strength or cunning, there is a hero perfectly suited for every orc-slaying disposition.
*   **Varied Game Modes:**
    *   **Survival Mode:** This mode allows players to ascend the ranks of orc-slayers through cooperative 3-player defense gameplay, a feature sure to delight every dedicated Orcs Must Die! enthusiast.
    *   **Weekly Challenges and Daily Quests:** These provide opportunities for players to acquire additional traps and upgrade components.
    *   **Endless Mode:** The perennial favorite, Endless mode, makes a triumphant return, now enhanced with 3-player cooperative play.
    *   **Sabotage Mode:** This entirely new mode pits two teams of three players against each other in a competitive race to achieve the highest score, employing spells and bosses to disrupt their opponents.

Orcs Must Die! Unchained introduces the exhilarating new Sabotage mode, offering a fresh and dynamic way to engage with the game's mechanics. In this fast-paced mode, players form a team to defend their rift while simultaneously, on the same map but in a parallel dimension, another team actively works against them. These opposing players can deploy spells, minions, and colossal bosses to distract and impede your team, thereby depleting your rift points. Players can retaliate in kind, employing their own disruptive tactics. The team that accumulates the most rift points by the match's conclusion emerges victorious.

**Plants vs. Zombies GOTY Edition: A Strategic Defense Against the Undead**

Prepare for an engaging battle where your home is under siege by a relentless zombie invasion. In Plants vs. Zombies GOTY Edition, your primary defense relies on a unique arsenal of plant-powered warriors. You'll command an extraordinary collection of zombie-zapping flora, from the explosive Cherry Bomb to the rapid-fire Peashooter. Success hinges on quick thinking and even quicker planting to halt the advancing undead horde.

The game introduces escalating challenges through environmental obstacles. A setting sun, creeping fog, and even a swimming pool demand strategic placement and adaptation of your defenses. With five distinct game modes to explore – Adventure, Mini-Games, Puzzle, Survival, and the tranquil Zen Garden – the fun is designed to be as enduring as your plant defenses.

Embark on a 50-level Adventure mode, where you'll navigate through diverse environments including day, night, fog, swimming pools, and rooftops. You will face off against 26 distinct zombie types, such as agile Pole-vaulters, stealthy Snorkelers, and the formidable "Zomboni" drivers. To aid your defense, you can cultivate 49 powerful perennial plants and gather coins to acquire a helpful pet snail, crucial power-ups, and other essential items.

The in-game Almanac serves as a valuable resource, offering detailed information on all your plant and zombie adversaries. This includes amusing "facts" and insightful commentary. Crazy Dave's shop is your go-to for procuring special plants and essential tools to repel any zombie assault. The game is further enhanced by its amazing graphics and a captivating soundtrack, complete with a bonus music video. Players can expect infinite replayability, as each playthrough presents a fresh and unpredictable challenge. Unlocking all the Steam Achievements offers the ultimate bragging rights. As one player aptly described the experience, "The sheer variety of plants and zombies keeps you on your toes, making every level feel fresh." Another player highlighted the game's depth, noting, "It's a surprisingly deep strategy game disguised as a simple tower defense."

In a post-apocalyptic world, a new and disturbing threat has emerged: the world's beloved dogs are vanishing. Players assume the role of Alpha, a lone wanderer who lost his own canine companion as a child. While exploring the desolate wastelands, Alpha encounters mutants dognapping a lost puppy.

During this encounter, Alpha discovers he can understand the puppy's speech. The pup, named T. Juan, reveals that dogs are disappearing. Together, they embark on a quest to uncover the truth behind these disappearances. This adventure invites players to join Alpha and T. Juan in a mission to rescue these pups and unleash them against the villains. The game features a diverse cast of canine allies, each with unique abilities. For example, the Newfoundland provides passive healing, the Tibetan Mastiff can enter "beast mode," and the Beagle is ready for action.

The world of "The Last Friend" has been dramatically transformed, with some suggesting it has truly "gone to the dog house." Players will navigate challenging environments, including deserted badlands, ruined cities, military installations, and forgotten jungles. An upgradable RV will serve as a mobile base of operations. The gameplay emphasizes a "dog eat dog world" mentality, requiring players to employ their best strategies against various adversaries.

"The Last Friend" offers a distinctive approach to the tower defense genre. Offensive capabilities extend beyond combat, as players will face enemies ranging from "overly tanned mutants" to electrifying foes. To defend territory, players can deploy defensive and offensive tools. These include super soakers, steel walls, and wire traps, offering strategic options to keep the "yard" secure.

**The Riftbreaker: Survive and Colonize a Hostile Alien World**

In The Riftbreaker, you step into the powerful Mecha-Suit of Captain Ashley S. Nowak, a scientist-commando on a critical one-way mission to Galatea 37. This distant planet, located in the far reaches of the Milky Way, is your new home and your target for establishing a base capable of sending you back to Earth and paving the way for future colonization. Your advanced suit, 'Mr. Riggs', is built for extreme environments and equipped for everything from base construction and resource gathering to specimen collection and intense combat. It even allows for instantaneous travel across vast distances via rifts.

The core of The Riftbreaker experience lies in its blend of base building, defense, and exploration. To achieve your ultimate goal of creating a stable, two-way rift back to Earth, you'll need to go beyond simple solar collectors and steel. Instead, you must meticulously construct an intricate network of mines, refineries, power plants, and research facilities to generate the immense power reserves required. As your industrial operations expand and disrupt Galatea 37's natural balance, you'll inevitably attract the attention of its hostile inhabitants. Fortifying your base with robust walls, strategic barriers, and formidable defense towers is paramount to repelling increasingly aggressive assaults from thousands of creatures intent on your eradication. Galatea 37 itself is a largely uncharted world within the Sycorax belt, teeming with rare minerals and unique substances. Exploring its diverse biomes will reveal exotic flora and fauna, alongside challenging weather phenomena. Establishing outposts in resource-rich zones and utilizing rift technology for efficient material transport will be key to your survival and success. The game offers both a compelling campaign that guides you through all of Galatea 37's biomes, requiring you to establish persistent bases, research alien life, and engage in constant combat, and a Survival mode where you endure waves of procedurally generated enemies. For a more relaxed experience, Sandbox mode grants complete control over game parameters, allowing you to craft your ideal scenario. The Riftbreaker also features extensive customization options, letting you adjust enemy frequency, strength, resource abundance, and more, with multiple difficulty presets to suit any player. We also invite you to join our community forums, Discord, and social media to share your feedback and help shape the future of the game.

**Orcs Must Die! 2: The Ultimate Orc-Slaying Experience**

Prepare for an even more intense battle against the orc horde in *Orcs Must Die! 2*, the highly anticipated sequel to the 2011 AIAS Strategy Game of the Year from Robot Entertainment. This action-packed tower defense game invites you and a friend to decimate orcs in unprecedented numbers. Step back into the shoes of either the formidable War Mage, who charges headfirst into the fray, or the cunning Sorceress, who masterfully controls the battlefield with potent magic and mind-altering spells.

The fight continues in new, challenging environments, including fortified strongholds and deep dwarven mines. Wield a vast arsenal of devastating weapons, powerful spells, strategic guardians, and ingenious traps to obliterate thousands of orcs and other monstrous foes. Dive into a brand-new campaign mode, playable solo or in cooperative multiplayer with a friend, to continue the epic struggle. For those seeking an ultimate test of survival, the new Endless Mode offers relentless waves of increasingly formidable enemies. Unlock and upgrade a wide array of classic and new defenses, customizing your strategy to unleash maximum destruction upon the slobbering masses.

**Key Features:**

*   **Co-Op Mayhem:** Choose your hero: the brave War Mage, a frontline combatant, or the strategic Sorceress, who commands the battlefield from afar with her magical prowess.
*   **Engaging Story Campaign:** Continue the narrative from the original game with a compelling new story, playable in single-player or cooperative mode.
*   **Challenging Endless Mode:** Test your mettle against an unending onslaught of enemies, either alone or with a companion.
*   **Classic Mode (Steam Exclusive):** Steam players who own the original *Orcs Must Die!* will automatically gain access to co-op versions of 10 classic levels, now featuring new enemy types.
*   **Diverse Enemy Roster:** Confront over 20 distinct and vile creatures, including formidable Earth Elementals, hulking Trolls, and the noxious Bile Bats, alongside familiar foes from the original game.
*   **Expansive Arsenal:** Deploy more than 50 unique traps, weapons, and guardians, complemented by an all-new selection of magical trinkets.
*   **Deep Upgrade System:** With over 225 persistent upgrades for traps and weapons, you can meticulously craft an arsenal perfectly tailored to your preferred combat style. As one developer noted, "The sheer number of upgrade combinations allows for an incredible amount of player expression."
*   **High Replayability:** Multiple game modes, the punishing "Nightmare" difficulty, and an extensive skull-ranking system ensure countless hours of engaging gameplay.
*   **Competitive Leaderboards:** Ascend the single-player and co-op leaderboards and vie for ultimate supremacy against your friends.

**Orcs Must Die! - A Strategic Defense Against the Horde**

In Robot Entertainment's fantasy action-strategy title, *Orcs Must Die!*, players step into the role of a formidable War Mage tasked with repelling relentless waves of orcs and other monstrous foes. The core objective involves defending twenty-four distinct fortresses, ranging from claustrophobic corridors to expansive arenas, against an onslaught of enemies. This strategic defense requires a mastery of an arsenal that includes a diverse array of weapons, potent spells, and an extensive selection of traps and summoned minions.

The gameplay experience is rich with strategic depth and replayability. According to the game's design, players can choose from six distinct weapons and spells, such as the rapid-fire crossbow or the versatile bladestaff, alongside elemental magic. To further bolster defenses, nineteen unique traps and minions are available, from the classic arrow walls and spike traps to more elaborate spinning blades and summoned allies. Facing eleven different enemy types, including formidable ogres and flying hellbats, players must adapt their tactics. The game features a story campaign spread across three acts, which, as noted by game developers, aims to unravel the mystery behind the orc invasion. Persistent upgrades allow for the enhancement of traps, ensuring that strategic choices made throughout the game contribute to an increasingly effective orc-slaying experience. The game also offers significant replay value through modes like "Nightmare Mode" and a skull ranking system, encouraging players to compete for the title of "Best Orc Killer" on global leaderboards.

Monday Night Combat is a **thrilling class-based, third-person shooter** that redefines the future of competitive gaming. It's not just a game; it's the most popular lethal sport of the future, masterfully blending **intense combat, brutal finishing moves, and exciting gameshow-like challenges** to deliver an unparalleled action experience. Forget fighting for abstract concepts like "honor" or "duty." In Monday Night Combat, the ultimate prize is the **real American dream: cash, fame, and lucrative endorsements!**

**Key Features of Monday Night Combat:**

Prepare for the **Throwback Throwdown** in Monday Night Combat! Uncle Tully’s Funland has been revamped with exciting new gameplay features. First, meet **Chickey Cantor**, who now spawns in Uncle Tully’s Funland. Your objective is to make Chickey fly away by shooting him, earning your entire team a **powerful single-life buff**. Alternatively, wait for Chickey to slam the ground, then **grapple him and ride him for eight seconds to earn substantial cash rewards**. However, be warned: riders become **easy targets for enemy Pros**.

Secondly, Monday Night Combat introduces **new bot spawners**. These specialized spawners feature buttons for precisely deploying **Jackbots, Black Jacks, Slims, Scramblers, Gremlins, Gapshots, and Bouncers**. The **Co-op Blitz mode** allows players to defend their precious Money Ball against relentless robot armies, either solo or with up to four players via Steam. During various Blitz challenges, the money you earn from destroying bots can be strategically spent on **building defensive turrets** around the Moneyball, **upgrading one of six unique character classes**, or activating **devastating robot-crushing environmental hazards**.

The challenges within Co-op Blitz mode are diverse, ranging from a **ten-round Exhibition Blitz** to surviving endless waves of robots with ever-increasing difficulty in the **Super Sudden Death Blitz**. All money earned from each Challenge contributes to your **persistent Lifetime Earnings**. This cumulative wealth unlocks **over 370 ProTags**, allows you to **create custom classes**, and secures your position on the **global Leaderboards**.

In **Competitive Multiplayer Crossfire mode**, teams of players clash head-to-head via Steam. Each team is bolstered by an endless stream of robots fighting on their behalf. To achieve victory, you must **overwhelm your opponent’s robot stream, strategically upgrade your Pros, and fortify your base defenses**.

**Customizable Characters and Persistent Progression:**

Every Pro in Monday Night Combat is meticulously designed to cater to a **unique playstyle**, complete with their own set of **upgradeable skills**. You can further refine these skills and abilities through a wide array of unlockable items within the **Custom Class feature**.

Your dedication is rewarded with **persistent stats**. Every match played in Monday Night Combat earns you money that accumulates towards your Lifetime Earnings. This can then be invested in unlocking custom classes and acquiring coveted ProTags. Your total Lifetime Earnings also directly determine your **player level**. Monday Night Combat meticulously tracks a comprehensive set of persistent statistics for every facet of gameplay. Furthermore, MNC boasts **over 370 ‘ProTags’**, which are distinctive, customizable tags you can proudly display to fellow players and friends.

**Dedicated Servers:**

Monday Night Combat supports **dedicated servers**, allowing for multiple instances of the game to run simultaneously with a full standalone client.

Ratropolis is a unique blend of roguelite, deck-building, and tower defense mechanics, all orchestrated within a real-time strategy framework. Your mission is to guide a humble rat outpost to a secure haven, diligently defending your burgeoning rat populace against a relentless onslaught of predators and formidable monstrous creatures. The ultimate objective is to construct the grandest 'Ratropolis' imaginable and immortalize your name in the annals of rat history!

To achieve this ambitious goal, you will strategically deploy a vast arsenal of over 500 cards, encompassing diverse categories such as economy, building, military, and skill-based abilities. Every leader embarks on their perilous journey with an initial deck of 8 fundamental cards. The art of constructing an efficient and synergistic deck is paramount to safeguarding your rats from the ceaseless waves of ravenous enemies. Through careful selection, removal, and upgrading of your cards, you will forge a deck truly befitting a visionary leader.

The task of defending your rat citizens within the city will undoubtedly present a significant challenge. Fortunately, you can enlist the assistance of specialized advisers, each possessing unique talents in areas like finance, defense, or leadership. These invaluable allies will present you with superior strategic options when moments of intense chaos inevitably arise. While the fall of your city signifies the end of a particular campaign, remember that every conclusion marks the genesis of a new beginning. By unlocking new cards, you will continuously expand your strategic repertoire, ensuring that each subsequent defense offers a fresh and engaging experience. Now, it is time to lead Ratropolis to triumph and rescue your Ratizens from impending destruction!

**Key Features:**

*   **Unique Gameplay:** Experience an innovative fusion of real-time deck building, roguelite progression, and tower defense strategy.
*   **Highly Addictive:** Immerse yourself in engaging and fast-paced gameplay that demands swift judgment and decisive action.
*   **Exceptional Replayability:** While accessible to pick up, mastering the intricacies of Ratropolis offers a deeply rewarding challenge.
*   **Over 100 Events:** Encounter a multitude of random decision events that guarantee a novel experience with every playthrough.
*   **Vast Card Collection:** Unlock over 500 distinct cards, empowering you to grow stronger and evolve your strategies after each game.
*   **Multiple Endings:** Embark on a choose-your-own-adventure experience with 6 possible distinct endings.
*   **Diverse Leaders:** Command 6 unique leaders, each boasting their own distinct playstyle and inherent traits.
*   **Charming Protagonists:** Lead adorable rats, not ferocious felines!

Monday Night Combat is a class-based, third-person shooter that redefines the future of combat sports. It masterfully blends intense gunplay, brutal finishing moves, and exciting gameshow-style challenges to deliver an unparalleled action experience. Forget fighting for abstract concepts like "honor" or "duty"; in Monday Night Combat, you fight for the ultimate prize: cash, fame, and lucrative endorsements.

**Key Features:**

The "Throwback Throwdown" event brings exciting new gameplay to Monday Night Combat's Uncle Tully's Funland. Prepare for Chickey Cantor, who now appears in this vibrant arena. Shoot Chickey to make him fly away, granting your entire team a powerful single-life buff. Wait for Chickey to land, then grapple him and ride him for eight seconds to earn substantial in-game currency. Be warned, however, as riders become prime targets for enemy Pros.

Additionally, new bot spawners have been introduced. These spawners feature dedicated buttons for summoning specific robot types, including Jackbots, Black Jacks, Slims, Scramblers, Gremlins, Gapshots, and Bouncers.

The Co-op Blitz mode allows players to defend their vital Money Ball against relentless robot armies, either solo or with up to four players via Steam. During various Blitz challenges, players can strategically spend money earned from destroying bots. This currency can be used to construct defensive turrets around the Moneyball, upgrade one of six unique character classes, or activate devastating environmental hazards designed to crush robots. Challenges range from a ten-round Exhibition Blitz to the ultimate test of endurance in Super Sudden Death Blitz, featuring endless robot waves of escalating difficulty.

Money accumulated from each Challenge contributes to your persistent Lifetime Earnings. This ever-growing total unlocks over 370 ProTags, enables the creation of custom classes, and allows you to climb the Leaderboards.

**Competitive Multiplayer:**

The Crossfire mode pits teams of players against each other on Steam. Each team is supported by an unending stream of allied robots. Overwhelming your opponent's robot forces, upgrading your Pros, and fortifying your base defenses are crucial for achieving victory.

**Customizable Characters:**

Each Pro character is designed for a unique playstyle and comes equipped with their own set of upgradeable skills. Further personalize these skills and abilities using a wide array of unlockable items within the Custom Class feature.

**Persistent Stats:**

Every match of Monday Night Combat rewards players with money that contributes to their Lifetime Earnings. This currency is used to unlock custom classes and purchase earned ProTags. Your Lifetime Earnings also determine your overall player level. Monday Night Combat meticulously tracks a comprehensive set of persistent statistics for all aspects of gameplay. The game boasts over 370 'ProTags,' which are customizable badges that you can proudly display to other players and friends.

**Dedicated Servers:**

Monday Night Combat supports the hosting of multiple instances of dedicated servers with a full standalone client, ensuring a robust and reliable online experience.

The Microsoft Flight Simulator Game of the Year (GOTY) Edition is a special release that acknowledges the significant positive feedback, reviews, and awards the simulator has received. More than just an award celebration, it's a gesture of gratitude to the dedicated community, both new and long-time players, who have transformed Microsoft Flight Simulator into a true phenomenon. A key highlight for existing PC players is that this GOTY Edition will be provided as a free update.

This enhanced edition introduces a wealth of new content. Players can look forward to piloting five new aircraft: the Boeing F/A-18 Super Hornet, the VoloCity, the Pilatus PC-6 Porter, the CubCrafters NX-Cub, and the Aviat Pitts Special S1S. The experience is further enriched with eight meticulously crafted airports located in Germany, Switzerland, and the US. Additionally, players will benefit from an updated weather system, early access to DX12 capabilities, and a dev mode replay system for reviewing their flights. For those eager to explore, six new Discovery Flights are available, taking players to destinations like Helsinki, Freiburg im Breisgau, Mecca, Monument Valley, Singapore, and Mount Cook. To further aid aspiring pilots, fourteen new tutorials have been added.

The core of Microsoft Flight Simulator offers an unparalleled sense of immersion. The world is rendered with stunning detail, featuring over 37 thousand airports, 1.5 billion buildings, and an astonishing 2 trillion trees, alongside mountains, roads, and rivers, creating a truly vast and beautiful planet to explore. This "Living World" is dynamic and ever-changing, mirroring Earth's vibrancy with live traffic, real-time weather conditions, and even animal life.

Aspiring pilots can hone their skills across a diverse range of aircraft, from nimble light planes to powerful commercial jets, all equipped with comprehensive and accurate flight models. Each aircraft boasts highly detailed cockpits with realistic instrumentation. A new Checklist System caters to all skill levels, allowing players to scale their assistance from full manual control to full assist, with interactive and highlighted instrument guidance.

The simulator's advanced features include a Live Weather engine, enabling users to experience real-time atmospheric conditions, including accurate wind speed and direction, temperature, humidity, and precipitation. The New Day & Night Engine allows for flights at any time of day or year, facilitating night VFR (Visual Flight Rules) navigation. At its heart, a state-of-the-art Aerodynamic Modeling engine, with over 1000 control surfaces per plane, ensures a truly realistic flight experience.

Beyond the GOTY Edition, other versions offer distinct content. The Deluxe Edition builds upon the base Microsoft Flight Simulator by including five additional highly accurate planes with unique flight models and five extra handcrafted international airports. These include the Diamond Aircraft DA40-TDI, Diamond Aircraft DV20, Textron Aviation Beechcraft Baron G58, Textron Aviation Cessna 152 Aerobat, and Textron Aviation Cessna 172 Skyhawk. The Deluxe Edition's handcrafted airports are Amsterdam Airport Schiphol (Netherlands), Cairo International Airport (Egypt), Cape Town International Airport (South Africa), O’Hare International Airport (USA), and Adolfo Suárez Madrid–Barajas Airport (Spain).

The Premium Deluxe Edition further expands the offerings, incorporating everything from the Deluxe Edition plus five more highly accurate planes with unique flight models and five additional handcrafted international airports. The Premium Deluxe aircraft are the Boeing 787-10 Dreamliner, Cirrus Aircraft SR22, Pipistrel Virus SW 121, Textron Aviation Cessna Citation Longitude, and Zlin Aviation Shock Ultra. The Premium Deluxe Edition's handcrafted airports are Denver International Airport (USA), Dubai International Airport (United Arab Emirates), Frankfurt Airport (Germany), Heathrow Airport (United Kingdom), and San Francisco International Airport (USA).

**Portal: A Mind-Bending Puzzle Experience**

Prepare for **Portal™**, a groundbreaking single-player game from Valve that redefines puzzle-solving. This highly anticipated title places players within the enigmatic **Aperture Science Laboratories**, a facility where the very laws of physics can be manipulated. Early buzz suggests **Portal** is a truly **innovative game**, offering **hours of unique and engaging gameplay** that will challenge your perception of space.

The core of **Portal**'s genius lies in its central mechanic: the ability to **create portals**. As game critics have noted, this fundamentally **changes how players interact with their environment**. You will learn to **evaluate, adapt, and unlock the possibilities** within any given space, using these portals to **transport objects and yourself across distances** in ways previously unimagined. This novel approach, which some have compared to the impact of Half-Life® 2's Gravity Gun on object manipulation, delivers a truly **mind-bending puzzle experience** filled with **physical challenges and intricate puzzles**.

**Portal: A Revolutionary New Puzzle Game**

Get ready for **Portal™**, a groundbreaking single-player game from Valve. This highly anticipated title is set within the enigmatic **Aperture Science Laboratories**. Portal is already being hailed as one of the most **innovative games on the horizon**, promising players **hours of unique and engaging gameplay**.

The core of Portal's design is to fundamentally **change how players interact with their environment**. You'll learn to **approach, manipulate, and deduce the possibilities** within any given space. This innovative approach is reminiscent of how Half-Life® 2's Gravity Gun revolutionized object interaction.

In Portal, you'll face **physical puzzles and challenges**. The key to success lies in **opening portals**. These portals allow you to **maneuver objects, and yourself, through space** in entirely new ways. Prepare for a truly **mind-bending puzzle experience**.

Embark on an **epic fairy tale journey** in "Brothers - A Tale of Two Sons," a captivating experience developed by Starbreeze Studios and helmed by visionary Swedish film director Josef Fares. This unique game redefines co-op play by allowing you to **control both brothers simultaneously** in single-player mode, offering an unparalleled interactive adventure.

As you guide these two siblings, you'll encounter a variety of challenges. **Solve intricate puzzles**, explore richly detailed and diverse environments, and face off against formidable **boss battles**. The innovative control scheme requires you to master one brother with each thumbstick, demanding coordination and strategic thinking.

The narrative centers on a father clinging to life, leaving his two desperate sons with a singular, urgent mission. To save him, they must embark on a perilous quest to find and retrieve the legendary **'Water of Life.'** Along the way, their survival hinges entirely on their ability to **rely on one another**. They will discover that one must be **strong where the other is weak**, and **brave where the other is fearful**. This profound interdependence is the very essence of their bond – they are, truly, Brothers. Prepare for a journey that will undoubtedly leave an **unforgettable mark** on your gaming experience.

**What Remains of Edith Finch: A Chronicle of Unforgettable Family Fables**

What Remains of Edith Finch, a critically acclaimed narrative adventure, has garnered significant accolades, including the prestigious Best Game award at the 2018 BAFTA Game Awards. Its exceptional storytelling was further recognized with Best Narrative awards at the GDC 2018 Choice Awards, the 2018 SXSW Gaming Awards, and The Game Awards 2017. This compelling experience presents a mosaic of peculiar and poignant tales centered on a family residing in Washington state. Players assume the role of Edith Finch, tasked with navigating the sprawling, labyrinthine Finch family home. Her exploration is driven by a quest to uncover the stories of her ancestors, delving into her family's enigmatic past and seeking to comprehend the tragic circumstances that have left her as the sole surviving member.

Each discovered narrative offers a unique opportunity to inhabit the final moments of a different Finch family member, spanning from the distant past to the contemporary era. As reported by game critics, the gameplay mechanics and thematic tones within these individual stories are as diverse as the Finch family members themselves. A consistent element across all these vignettes is the first-person perspective, immersing the player directly into each character's experience. Furthermore, every narrative culminates in the inevitable demise of the featured family member. Ultimately, as highlighted by its developers at Giant Sparrow, the studio also responsible for the innovative first-person painting game *The Unfinished Swan*, the game aims to evoke a profound sense of humility and wonder, reflecting on humanity's place within a vast and often incomprehensible universe.

Name: LIMBO
Description:
Uncertain of his sister's fate, a boy enters LIMBO

Name: The Stanley Parable
Description:
The Stanley Parable is a first person exploration game. You will play as Stanley, and you will not play as Stanley. You will follow a story, you will not follow a story. You will have a choice, you will have no choice. The game will end, the game will never end. Contradiction follows contradiction, the rules of how games should work are broken, then broken again. This world was not made for you to understand. But as you explore, slowly, meaning begins to arise, the paradoxes might start to make sense, perhaps you are powerful after all. The game is not here to fight you; it is inviting you to dance. Based on the award-winning 2011 Source mod of the same name, The Stanley Parable returns with new content, new ideas, a fresh coat of visual paint, and the stunning voicework of Kevan Brighting. For a more complete and in-depth understanding of what The Stanley Parable is, please try out the free demo.

Name: Thirty Flights of Loving
Description:
Explore the world of Thirty Flights of Loving through a first-person short story. In this sequel to Gravity Bone, take a deep dive with high-flying schemers, lovelorn criminals, and more stray kittens than you can shake a stick at. Saddle up, gunslinger. Featuring an original soundtrack by Chris Remo.

**Year Walk: A Journey into Swedish Folklore and the Supernatural**

Step into the eerie world of **Year Walk**, a game that brings to life a captivating Swedish tradition. Historically, people would perform strange rituals to glimpse their future. Now, you can experience year walking yourself, entering a realm where the supernatural and reality blur. This unique first-person game cleverly combines 2D and 3D elements. You'll explore the dark, creature-filled forests of 19th-century Sweden. Your mission: to see your future and discover if your love will be returned.

To succeed, you must solve challenging puzzles and pay close attention to hidden clues. The game includes an encyclopedia packed with information about the mysterious folklore creatures you'll meet. As folklore experts explain, "The practice of year walking was deeply rooted in a desire to understand the unknown." Mysteries and clues are hidden everywhere in Year Walk. Players need to look closely and dive into the mix of real and imagined events to understand what happened on that cold New Year's Eve. This updated version of Year Walk offers more: new areas, an in-game map, improved art, tougher puzzles, a bigger encyclopedia with myths and creatures, a hint system, and Steam Achievements.

**Blind Drive: Experience a Game Driven by Sound**

Get ready for a unique gaming adventure with Blind Drive, a dark comedy action arcade game where you experience the world solely through sound. You play as Donnie, who is blindfolded and driving into oncoming traffic. What starts as a scientific experiment quickly turns into a fight for survival. The game's creators say the experience is meant to be "hyper-immersive," so players can really feel the chaos. You'll steer through a dangerous world with speeding cars, angry drivers, and the constant threat of police. All this happens while a cruel person taunts you on the phone. The story, as explained, is a funny crime-comedy with mobsters, dolphins, and a very angry Grandmother. A full cast of voice actors brings this story to life.

Blind Drive's gameplay is fast and easy to pick up, using just two buttons to control your actions. This simple design, along with its jazzy look, gives the game a unique style. The game has 27 levels full of action, including tough boss battles, secret areas, and a very impolite G.P.S. The developers stress that headphones are key to the full experience. They even suggest playing with your eyes closed because the sound design is so good. Blind Drive also offers strong accessibility options. This includes full text-to-speech support for NVDA and Windows TTS, and gamepad support with advanced haptic feedback. Players can turn on text-to-speech by pressing SHIFT+A.

Half-Life 2 stands as a celebrated benchmark in **immersive gaming**, building directly upon the monumental success of its predecessor. The original Half-Life, launched in 1998, fundamentally redefined the landscape of interactive storytelling and action. Its groundbreaking approach garnered over 50 game-of-the-year awards and earned it the prestigious title of "Best PC Game Ever" from PC Gamer. This initial triumph translated into impressive sales, with over eight million copies sold globally.

The sequel, Half-Life 2, elevates this remarkable legacy through **unmatched realism and responsiveness**. It masterfully retains the suspense, challenge, and sheer excitement of the original, immersing players in a world where their choices carry **significant impact**. Players possess the agency to alter their environment and even influence the emotional states of both allies and adversaries.

Once again, players assume the role of **Gordon Freeman**, a scientist who returns to an Earth subjugated by alien forces. Humanity finds itself depleted of resources and drastically reduced in population. Freeman is tasked with finding a means to rescue humanity from the repercussions of his past actions at Black Mesa, bearing the weight of countless hopes.

This advanced, real-time experience is brought to life by Valve's revolutionary **Source® engine**. This cutting-edge technology introduces several pivotal advancements, as acknowledged by industry experts. As Valve states, the engine features a "sophisticated facial animation system, using 40 muscles, creates the most realistic characters seen in games." These characters exhibit a broad spectrum of human emotions and respond with remarkable fluidity and intelligence. Furthermore, the physics engine ensures that objects, from small stones to substantial vehicles, behave according to fundamental natural laws such as weight, friction, gravity, and buoyancy, a fact readily apparent in gameplay demonstrations. Game reviews have lauded the "shader-based renderer, similar to those used by Pixar, creates visually impressive and lifelike game worlds." Game analysis has also highlighted the "intelligent AI" of both friendly and enemy characters, noting their ability to "spot dangers, move through complex areas, and use weapons creatively, avoiding simple attacks."

Name: Half-Life
Description:
Named Game of the Year by over 50 publications, Valve's debut title blends action and adventure with award-winning technology to create a frighteningly realistic world where players must think to survive. Also includes an exciting multiplayer mode that allows you to play against friends and enemies around the world.

Name: Half-Life: Alyx
Description:
Half-Life: Alyx is Valve’s VR return to the Half-Life series. It’s the story of an impossible fight against a vicious alien race known as the Combine, set between the events of Half-Life and Half-Life 2. Playing as Alyx Vance, you are humanity’s only chance for survival. The Combine’s control of the planet since the Black Mesa incident has only strengthened as they corral the remaining population in cities. Among them are some of Earth’s greatest scientists: you and your father, Dr. Eli Vance. As founders of a fledgling resistance, you’ve continued your clandestine scientific activity—performing critical research, and building invaluable tools for the few humans brave enough to defy the Combine. Every day, you learn more about your enemy, and every day you work toward finding a weakness. ABOUT GAMEPLAY IN VR: Valve’s return to the Half-Life universe that started it all was built from the ground up for virtual reality. VR was built to enable the gameplay that sits at the heart of Half-Life. Immerse yourself in deep environmental interactions, puzzle solving, world exploration, and visceral combat. Lean to aim around a broken wall and under a Barnacle to make an impossible shot. Rummage through shelves to find a healing syringe and some shotgun shells. Manipulate tools to hack alien interfaces. Toss a bottle through a window to distract an enemy. Rip a Headcrab off your face and throw it out the window. COMMUNITY-BUILT ENVIRONMENTS A set of Source 2 tools for building new levels is included with the game, enabling any player to build and contribute new environments for the community to enjoy through Half-Life: Alyx's Steam Workshop . Hammer, Valve’s level authoring tool, has been updated with all of the game's virtual reality gameplay tools and components.

## Galactic Civilizations® II: Ultimate Edition - Your Complete Space Empire Journey

Embark on an epic space adventure with **Galactic Civilizations® II: Ultimate Edition**. This all-in-one package brings together the full, celebrated series for a deep-space strategy experience. You'll guide your people through a huge, changing galaxy, becoming a master of trade, science, diplomacy, and war.

At its heart, **Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords** puts you in charge of a civilization exploring the stars. You can discover new star systems made just for you or follow a story about the old Dread Lords. The praised expansion, **Dark Avatar**, adds more fun with new enemies, ships, and ways to play, like mining asteroids and settling planets in special ways. It also brings new ways to make deals with others and a smarter computer opponent. Lastly, **Twilight of the Arnor** throws the galaxy into a fight against the Dread Lords. It gives humans and others a way to defeat them. This part adds powerful Terror Stars, unique tech for each group, tools to build your own maps and stories, new ship designs, and better ways to improve your planets.

The Ultimate Edition shines with beautiful 3D graphics, deep ship design options, and twelve different civilizations to lead, or you can build your own. You can win by conquering others, spreading your culture, forming alliances, inventing new tech, or achieving a higher state. The game offers engaging play across many galaxy sizes, a tough AI that plays fair, and online battles through the Metaverse. With lots of support for player-made mods, you can add even more to the game. As one expert noted, "The depth of strategy and replayability in Galactic Civilizations II is truly remarkable." The game also features advanced ways to talk with other empires, helping you trade and form friendships.

**Crysis** is a groundbreaking **first-person shooter** that immerses you in a **dynamic, evolving world**. You'll face constant challenges across **varied combat zones**, from frozen jungles to alien landscapes in zero gravity. This means you must **always change your strategy** to win.

The heart of **Crysis** is the **advanced Nanosuit**. This **high-tech suit** lets you **boost your powers instantly** during fights. It improves your **speed, strength, defense, and stealth**. This gives you many **smart ways to fight**. You also get a **big collection of customizable guns**. You can use **new weapons**, find **alien tech**, and equip **special bullets**. These can be powerful fire rounds or quiet ones for stealth takedowns.

Expect tough enemies with **smart AI** that require **clever plans**, not just fast shooting. **Crysis** wants you to **size up situations and act first**, not just react. A unique part of the game is **fighting in zero gravity**. Here, you battle aliens in a place where **physics work differently**. Learning to move in zero-G and control your guns is key, adding a new level of difficulty.

Using Crytek's **CryENGINE 2™**, **Crysis** offers **top-tier graphics** with DX10 support. It looks **amazing** and runs well even on older computers. The game has an **open, interactive world** where you decide how to play. You can **break things**, drive **planes and boats**, and **use the surroundings** to get the upper hand. As one reviewer noted, the Nanosuit's abilities allow for "unparalleled flexibility and enabling creative tactical choices for every encounter."

**Half-Life 2: Episode Two: Continue the Fight for Humanity**

Half-Life® 2: Episode Two is the thrilling continuation of Valve's acclaimed trilogy, picking up the epic Half-Life® adventure. You resume your role as Dr. Gordon Freeman, last seen escaping City 17 with Alyx Vance as the Citadel unleashed a cataclysmic storm.

In Episode Two, your mission is critical:

*   **Race against Combine forces:** You must outmaneuver and battle the relentless Combine as you journey to White Forest.
*   **Deliver vital intelligence:** Your objective is to transport a crucial information packet, pilfered from the Citadel, to a hidden enclave of resistance scientists.

Episode Two builds upon the celebrated Half-Life gameplay, introducing:

*   **Innovative weaponry:** Discover and utilize new and unique weapons to overcome your enemies.
*   **Engaging vehicles:** Take control of new vehicles to navigate the challenging terrain.
*   **Terrifying new creatures:** Confront and defeat a host of newly spawned, formidable creatures.

**XCOM: Enemy Unknown: Defend Earth from Alien Invaders**

In XCOM: Enemy Unknown, you lead a secret global organization fighting a terrifying alien invasion. Your main job as commander is to manage resources, develop new technologies, and control both big military actions and individual soldiers.

This new version of the classic game, made by Firaxis Games, keeps the spirit of the original. It tells a new story about the invasion, with new alien enemies and weapons to help Earth. You will need to study alien tech, build and run your base, plan battles carefully, and lead your soldiers in tough, turn-based fights.

Success depends on smart strategy. The game mixes deep tactical combat with exciting action. Managing your base is very important. You'll hire and train soldiers, and build up your XCOM headquarters to find and fight the aliens. In tactical combat, you'll lead squads on the ground and use powerful aircraft. The war is global, and your team will go on more than 70 missions. You'll also need to work with governments worldwide.

According to Jake Solomon, the game's lead designer, "We wanted to capture the feeling of being overwhelmed by an alien threat, but also the satisfaction of fighting back and winning." This focus on player agency and the struggle against a superior foe is central to the XCOM experience. The game's director, Sid Meier, has often emphasized the importance of "a good game [that] is a series of interesting decisions." XCOM: Enemy Unknown certainly delivers on this, forcing players to make difficult choices about resource allocation, research priorities, and soldier deployment.

Name: XCOM® 2
Description:
XCOM 2 is the sequel to XCOM: Enemy Unknown , the 2012 award-winning strategy game of the year. Earth has changed. Twenty years have passed since world leaders offered an unconditional surrender to alien forces. XCOM , the planet’s last line of defense, was left decimated and scattered. Now, in XCOM 2 , the aliens rule Earth, building shining cities that promise a brilliant future for humanity on the surface, while concealing a sinister agenda and eliminating all who dissent from their new order. Only those who live at the edges of the world have a margin of freedom. Here, a force gathers once again to stand up for humanity. Always on the run, and facing impossible odds, the remnant XCOM forces must find a way to ignite a global resistance, and eliminate the alien threat once and for all. XCOM ON THE RUN: Take command of the Avenger, an alien supply craft converted to XCOM’s mobile headquarters. New open-ended gameplay lets you decide where to guide your strike team, how to grow popular support, and when to combat enemy counter-operations. RECRUIT RESISTANCE FIGHTERS: Five soldier classes, each with its own skill tree, let you create specific soldiers for your tactical plan. TACTICAL GUERRILLA COMBAT: New gameplay systems offer more tactical flexibility in combat. Use concealment to ambush enemy patrols. Loot enemies for precious gear and artifacts. Rescue VIPs and save fallen comrades by carrying them to the extraction point. A NEW BREED OF ENEMY: A diverse cast of enemies from powerful new alien species to the ADVENT, enforcers of the alien regime, offer a distinct tactical challenge. RESEARCH, DEVELOP AND UPGRADE: Configure and build rooms on the Avenger to give XCOM new capabilities on the battlefield. Use your Scientists and Engineers to research, develop and upgrade weapons and armor to fit your preferred tactics. EACH MISSION IS A UNIQUE CHALLENGE: Go on missions around the world, from wildlands to the heart of the alien-controlled megacities, to the depths of alien installations. There are virtually infinite combinations of maps, missions and goals.

Name: Half-Life 2: Episode One
Description:
Half-Life 2 has sold over 4 million copies worldwide, and earned over 35 Game of the Year Awards. Episode One is the first in a series of games that reveal the aftermath of Half-Life 2 and launch a journey beyond City 17. Also features two multiplayer games. Half-Life 2 not required.

**Subnautica: Dive into an Alien Ocean Adventure**

Subnautica plunges players into a breathtaking underwater adventure on an alien ocean planet, offering a vast, open world brimming with both wonder and peril. As the sole survivor of a crashed spaceship, your only path forward is deeper into the planet's mysterious oceans.

The game's environments are incredibly diverse, ranging from sun-drenched shallow coral reefs to the crushing depths of treacherous trenches, glowing bio-luminescent rivers, and fiery lava fields. Players must constantly manage their oxygen supply while navigating kelp forests, plateaus, reefs, and intricate cave systems. The water is alive with a multitude of creatures, some beneficial, but many posing significant threats.

Upon crash-landing in your Life Pod, the immediate priority is survival: finding water, food, and crafting essential equipment. Players will scavenge resources from the ocean floor to build diving gear, lights, habitat modules, and submersibles. Venturing further and deeper allows access to rarer materials, enabling the creation of more advanced tools and vehicles.

**Building Your Underwater Sanctuary**

Constructing bases on the seabed is a key element of Subnautica. Players can design their habitats, choosing layouts and components, while also managing hull integrity against increasing depth and pressure. These bases serve as vital hubs for storing resources, parking vehicles, and replenishing oxygen, crucial for extended exploration.

**Unraveling the Planet's Secrets**

Subnautica is not just about survival; it's also about uncovering a compelling mystery. Signs of distress are everywhere, hinting at a planet in peril. Players will question what caused their crash, what is infecting the marine life, and who constructed the enigmatic structures scattered across the ocean floor. The ultimate goal is to find a way to escape the planet alive.

**Mastering the Ecosystem**

The vibrant alien ocean presents opportunities to manipulate its intricate food chain. Players can use the environment to their advantage, perhaps luring a threatening creature with a piece of fish or making a swift escape from a pursuing predator.

**Conquering Extreme Environments**

To explore the deepest and hottest regions, players can construct a Pressure-Re-Active Waterproof Nanosuit, or PRAWN Suit. This suit can be further modified with tools like mining drills, torpedo launchers, propulsion cannons, and grappling hooks, allowing for greater interaction with the environment and defense against its inhabitants.

**The Perils and Beauty of the Night**

As daylight fades, the ocean transforms. Predators emerge, making areas that were once safe become treacherous. However, the darkness also reveals a hidden beauty, a spectacle that those who remain sheltered will never witness. Exploring the world below the ocean floor, through winding cave systems that range from claustrophobic passages to caverns illuminated by bio-luminescent life and lava flows, requires constant vigilance regarding oxygen levels and lurking threats.

**An Open Development Journey**

Subnautica's development is an open process, with players able to receive weekly or daily updates, track the team's progress, and view real-time change logs. The development team actively encourages feedback from within the game.

**About the Developers**

Subnautica is brought to you by Unknown Worlds, a small studio with roots tracing back to the 2003 Half-Life mod Natural Selection. Founded by Charlie Cleveland and Max McGuire, the globally distributed team operates from a central office in San Francisco, California.

**Important Warning:** This game contains flashing lights that may be unsuitable for individuals with photosensitive epilepsy or similar conditions. Player discretion is advised.

BioShock™ offers a groundbreaking shooter experience, pushing the boundaries of the genre with its unique blend of weaponry and genetic augmentation. Players are equipped with a diverse arsenal, ranging from traditional firearms to more exotic tools like grenade launchers and chemical throwers. However, the game's core innovation lies in the ability to genetically modify your DNA, transforming yourself into a truly formidable force.

The game introduces "Plasmids," injectable modifications that grant extraordinary superhuman abilities, fundamentally changing how players approach combat. For instance, you can unleash electrical currents through water to incapacitate multiple enemies at once, or freeze foes solid before delivering a decisive blow. This dynamic system ensures that no two combat encounters are alike, and each player's journey through the game will be distinct. Beyond these powers, BioShock™ encourages mastery of biological augmentation and environmental warfare. Players can unleash firestorms from their fingertips or command swarms of hornets. The game promotes creative problem-solving, allowing players to hack into systems, upgrade weapons, and craft new ammunition. Ultimately, the environment itself becomes a weapon, alongside your augmented body and the elements. This unique approach extends to the game's setting: an incredible, art deco underwater metropolis, a visually stunning world that is as much a character as any you will encounter. For those interested in the game's distinctive aesthetic, a free PDF titled "BioShock: Breaking the Mold" is available for download, offering an inside look at its art.

**BioShock Infinite: A Daring Rescue in the City of Columbia**

In BioShock Infinite, players step into the boots of Booker DeWitt, a former U.S. Cavalry veteran burdened by debt and facing dire consequences. His one chance at redemption lies in a perilous mission: to rescue Elizabeth, a young woman held captive since childhood within the breathtaking, yet sinister, flying metropolis of Columbia. This unlikely partnership forces Booker and Elizabeth to rely on each other, forging a powerful connection as they navigate their daring escape. Together, they must master an evolving arsenal of weapons and extraordinary abilities to survive the airborne city's many dangers and expose its hidden darkness.

**Key Features of BioShock Infinite:**

*   **The City in the Sky:** Journey from the submerged ruins of Rapture to the radiant skies of Columbia. This technological marvel presents a visually stunning and lively world, concealing a deeply disturbing secret. As one critic noted, Columbia is a "beautiful and vibrant world that holds a very dark secret."

*   **An Unlikely Mission:** Set in the year 1912, the narrative centers on Booker DeWitt, a hired gun tasked with extracting a mysterious girl from the sky-city of Columbia. Failure is not an option; his life depends on its success.

*   **Whip, Zip, and Kill:** Transform Columbia's intricate Sky-Lines into your personal weaponized roller coasters. Traverse the flying city at high speeds, delivering brutal, hands-on combat to your adversaries.

*   **Tear Through Time:** Manipulate the fabric of reality by opening "Tears" in time and space. This allows you to reshape the battlefield, summoning weapons, turrets, and other crucial resources from thin air to gain a tactical advantage.

*   **Vigorous Powers:** Unleash devastating supernatural abilities known as Vigors. Hurl explosive fireballs, command bolts of lightning, and unleash swarms of crows to obliterate any who stand in your way.

*   **Custom Combat Experience:** Arm yourself with deadly weaponry in one hand and potent Vigors in the other. Coupled with the ability to manipulate Tears, you can forge your own unique combat style as you fight to rescue Elizabeth and achieve freedom within the floating city of Columbia.

*   **1999 Mode:** Upon completing BioShock Infinite, players unlock "1999 Mode." This challenging mode offers experienced gamers a taste of the intricate design and demanding balance that defined classic 20th-century hardcore gaming experiences.

**Sid Meier's Civilization III Complete: Your All-In-One Strategy Experience**

Dive into the ultimate Civilization III experience with Sid Meier's Civilization III Complete. This comprehensive package includes the original, addictive Sid Meier's Civilization III. You'll also get the enhanced multiplayer expansion, Sid Meier's Civilization III: Play the World*. Plus, enjoy all the new civilizations, scenarios, and features from Sid Meier's Civilization III: Conquests!

Civilization III Complete offers:

*   **More Exploration:** Discover new lands and expand your empire.
*   **More Strategies:** Employ diverse tactics to outwit your opponents.
*   **More Play Modes:** Experience varied ways to engage with the game.
*   **More Ways to Win:** Achieve victory through multiple paths.

*Please note: Online multiplayer for Sid Meier's Civilization III: Play the World will be suspended on May 31st, 2014. Local Area Network (LAN) mode will remain supported.*

Name: Return to Castle Wolfenstein
Description:
World War II rages and nations fall. SS head Himmler has Hitler's full backing to twist science and the occult into an army capable of annihilating the Allies once and for all. Battling alone, you're on an intense mission to pierce the black heart of the Third Reich and stop Himmler -- or die trying. Fighting in advanced team-based multiplayer mode, you'll wage your own WWII in an all-out Axis vs. Allies contest for frontline domination. Powered by the Quake III Arena engine, the Wolfenstein universe explodes with the kind of epic environments, A.I., firepower and cinematic effects that only a game created by true masters can deliver. The dark reich's closing in. The time to act is now. Evil prevails when good men do nothing. Epic Environments Intense Story-Driven Action Ferocious A.I. Big Screen Cinematic Effects Team-Based Multiplayer Action

Name: Unity of Command II
Description:
Built on a brand new bespoke 3D engine, the game retains Unity of Command’s signature art style and delivers highly polished fluid gameplay. Easily accessible yet hard to master, Unity of Command II is the highly anticipated sequel to the cult classic that’s been turning novice players into battle-hardened grognards since 2011. Unity of Command II lets you take command of Western Allies during the Second World War. You will manage your army’s divisions as well as their supply and logistics. For the first time in Unity of Command you will face Fog of War. Reveal the unknown by capturing enemy soldiers and launching recon to gather intel on enemy troop positions. Enemy panzers will seek to capture your units’ stragglers — regroup and strike back! Key Features Dynamic Campaign — Rewrite the history of the Second World War with a branching campaign where no two playthroughs are alike. Headquarters — This new feature places army headquarters on the map, from which you will direct unit reorganization, bridging and resupply. Headquarters are not only essential to reinforcing and recovering lost unit strength, but are also able to deploy special abilities such as Emergency Supply, Motorizing units using HQ trucks, and many more. Theater Assets — This feature from the original game is greatly expanded in Unity of Command II. Wreak havoc behind enemy lines by sabotaging infrastructure. Order your aircraft to provide aerial recon, deliver devastating bombing runs, or sustain units behind enemy lines using air supply assets. Bonus Objectives — Participate in optional history-altering “what-if” objectives — earn the opportunity to Rush for the Apennines and smash through German defenses before they dig in. Fog of War — Deal with your enemies — but you’ll have to find them first. Reveal enemy positions by capturing stragglers, upgrading the HQ and using its special abilities to uncover enemy special defense markers. Deep Operations — Unity of Command changed the world of turn-based strategy games forever by introducing its signature feature, supply lines. Keep a watchful eye on your logistics while planning to strike deep beyond enemy lines, sever supply lines and encircle enemy units. Accessible Scenario Editor — Unity of Command II features a full-fledged Allied campaign, with the addition of several defining battles of WWII that can be experienced from the Axis side. The game comes with a built-in scenario editor, allowing players to create and share new battlefields using the integrated Steam Workshop support.

Name: Europa Universalis IV
Description:
Paradox Development Studio is back with the fourth installment of the award-winning Europa Universalis series. This classic grand strategy game gives you control of a nation through four dramatic centuries. Rule your land and dominate the world with unparalleled freedom, depth and historical accuracy. Write a new history of the world and build an empire for the ages. Start before the Renaissance on a map of the world as it was then. Choose from any of hundreds of nations and then rule up to the Age of Revolutions. Or, if you wish, start your game at any date in the span, with historical monarchs and other leaders. Hundreds of dynamic historical events are yours to experience, from merely troubling civil wars to world changing moments like the Protestant Reformation. Discover and settle the New World, or resist European conquest. Control the flow of trade by developing your trade power in key provinces, using ships and governmental policy to bring the wealth of the world to your own ports. Build alliances into iron bonds, cemented by royal marriage or play a flexible hand, keeping your options open. Strike when your enemies are weak, using your armies to grab new land and new potential riches. Your nation’s pace of development will be heavily influenced by the person on the throne. Experience rapid development under a skilled monarch only to see things slow down when a less competent heir takes over. Plan for the future by spending monarch power wisely. Four hundred years of research into new ways of war, administration and trade are available. Unlock new weapons, new buildings and new ship types. Over time, you can embrace national ideas that represent both your historic legacy and your ambitions for the future. From grand voyages of discovery to religious wars to revolutionary governments, the entire history of the early modern world waits for you to rewrite it in Europa Universalis IV.

**Sunless Skies: Sovereign Edition: Embark on a Victorian Empire's Stellar Journey**

Prepare to captain a magnificent steam locomotive as a new Victorian empire boldly ventures into the cosmos. In *Sunless Skies: Sovereign Edition*, you'll lead your intrepid crew through perilous adventures, pushing the boundaries of their sanity. Engage in daring smuggling operations, barter for precious barrels of time, and even find moments for a game of cricket and a comforting cup of tea amidst the stars. This definitive edition of *Sunless Skies* masterfully integrates all post-launch additions, including new officers, formidable enemies, advanced engines, captivating stories, and charming mascots. It also features a completely reimagined region, a robust "Full Steam" mode for intense journeys and desperate escapes, and the highly anticipated horn. Furthermore, dozens of quality-of-life enhancements have been implemented to enrich your experience.

**Forge Your Captain's Legacy**

Your journey begins with a crucial choice: define your captain's past. Were you a streetwise urchin, a devout priest, or a fiery revolutionary? Uncover the events that led you to the skies and the secrets you carry. With each advancement, you'll deepen your character's history, perhaps revealing a family's black sheep or a lost love. The skies are unforgiving, and many captains will meet their end. However, each will leave an indelible mark on the world, bestowing an inheritance upon those who follow, for better or for worse. As Failbetter Games, the developers, state, "We are all changed by the dark."

**Explore a Beautiful, Hostile Universe**

Venture into the vast, dark, and marvelous Fallen London Universe, a realm first glimpsed in our previous game, *Sunless Sea*. While this is a completely new narrative and not a direct sequel, it offers a fresh perspective on this captivating world. Your locomotive is your sole protector against the myriad dangers of the Heavens. Meticulously maintain and upgrade it with exotic weaponry and equipment, such as a Pneumatic Mining Array or the swift Brassraven. Learn to craft potent weapons like the Wrath of Heaven from your vanquished foes. When your coffers are full, consider acquiring an entirely new vessel, perhaps the capacious Pellinore-class Trader or the sleek, menacing Medea-class Destroyer.

**Confront Celestial Threats**

Engage in thrilling real-time combat against rival locomotives, ranging from opportunistic pirates to the experimental warships of the imperial navy. Battle nightmarish abominations like the Undeparted or swarms of irate Chorister-bees. Strategically pit factions against each other and master the unique combat behaviors of each adversary. Utilize the "Full Steam" mode to either evade imminent danger or relentlessly pursue your quarry.

**Survive the Extremes**

Manage your crew's morale and your captain's own psychological fortitude against starvation, madness, and terror. Carefully balance your fuel and supplies with your ambitions to explore new horizons, acquire knowledge, or amass riches. The universe is a challenging mistress, and as the game suggests, "Most of your captains will die."

**Assemble Your Crew**

Populate your ship with a diverse cast of upgradeable officers, each possessing their own compelling quests. Encounter a repentant devil, an incognito princess, an entire brigade of rats, and even—remarkably—your own Aunt!

**The Unfettered World**

Freed from gravity's constraints, the Victorian Empire has expanded its dominion across the skies, even constructing a new sun. The Empress, wielding control over time from her Throne of Hours, presides over a vast and merciless empire. The High Wilderness presents a wondrous yet horrifying vision of space, where conventional rules do not apply. Winds sweep through shattered celestial ruins, fogs coil within stellar jungles, and industrial sprawl pollutes the heavens with smog. The stars themselves are sentient beings, the Judgements, vast intelligences that govern existence. However, they are fading, their thrones left empty as something extinguishes them one by one. Your captain must navigate this impossible world, trading, exploring, fighting, and surviving. Choose your allegiances wisely, for you may be the force that tips the scales of power. Will you support Her Majesty's burgeoning empire, the rebels seeking to overthrow London's rule, or forge your own independent path? Will you ultimately retire in triumph, or be lost to the encroaching darkness?

**Key Features:**

*   **Vast Narrative:** Experience over 800,000 words of interconnected stories, drawing inspiration from literary giants like C.S. Lewis, Jules Verne, H.P. Lovecraft, and H.G. Wells.
*   **Artistic Vision:** Immerse yourself in lush, hand-drawn 2D art.
*   **Diverse Regions:** Explore four distinct regions: the celestial wilderness, an impossible industrial empire, a pagan midnight expanse, and the domain of the dead.
*   **Dynamic Combat:** Engage in real-time battles against terrifying celestial foes and ruthless pirates.
*   **Locomotive Customization:** Equip your engine with bizarre and powerful weaponry.
*   **Survival Mechanics:** Battle starvation, mutiny, terror, and nightmares—or succumb to them.
*   **Playstyle Variety:** Choose to build a lineage of captains across generations or reload your most recent captain to continue the adventure.
*   **Narrative Progression:** Uncover your captain's past as you traverse the skies.
*   **Rich Economy:** Earn your fortune through a unique, story-driven trading system or embrace the life of a smuggler.
*   **Charming Companions:** Collect a variety of pets, including the Inadvisably Big Dog, Useless Cat, and Perfect Pangolin.
*   **Full Accessibility:** Enjoy customizable key remapping for keyboard and mouse, alongside complete controller support.

**About Failbetter Games:**

Failbetter Games is a small, London-based British game studio that has been crafting independent games since 2009. Join us as we venture into the dark.

Assassin's Creed 2: A Renaissance of Vengeance and Skill

Assassin's Creed 2 builds upon the groundbreaking success of its predecessor, which shattered records as the fastest-selling new intellectual property in video game history. This highly anticipated sequel introduces players to Ezio Auditore da Firenze, a charismatic young Italian noble, and immerses them in the vibrant, yet perilous, era of the Renaissance. While retaining the acclaimed core gameplay that defined the original, Assassin's Creed 2 offers a wealth of new experiences designed to surprise and challenge players. The game unfolds as an epic narrative of family, vengeance, and conspiracy, set against the stunning, yet brutal, backdrop of 15th-century Italy. Players will witness Ezio forge a unique bond with Leonardo da Vinci, confront the formidable powers of Florence's most influential families, and navigate the intricate canals of Venice, all on his path to becoming a master assassin.

Ezio Auditore da Firenze: An Assassin for a New Age

Ezio Auditore da Firenze is a young Italian nobleman thrust into the shadowy world of assassins after a devastating betrayal of his family. Driven by a thirst for vengeance, Ezio is portrayed as a charming, free-spirited individual with a distinct panache, yet he possesses a deeply human side. Through his journey, players will embody this complex character and learn to master the art of assassination.

Renaissance Italy: A World of Art and Intrigue

The 15th century in Italy was not a unified nation but rather a tapestry of powerful city-states, where influential families wielded significant political and economic sway in centers like Florence and Venice. This historical setting, renowned for its artistic and cultural rebirth, also harbors chilling tales of corruption, greed, and murder. As one critic noted, "The Renaissance was a period of immense beauty and innovation, but beneath the surface, a darker current of power struggles and deceit ran deep."

Unprecedented Freedom in Gameplay

Assassin's Creed 2 grants players unparalleled freedom, allowing them to undertake missions at their own pace and in their preferred manner within its open-ended world. The game reintroduces the exhilarating free-running mechanics from the original and expands the player's repertoire with new abilities, including swimming and even the exhilarating prospect of flight. This diverse range of gameplay options ensures that each player can forge their own unique path through the adventure.

A Living, Breathing World

The game features a dynamic and immersive world where every character encountered presents a potential opportunity or challenge. Blending seamlessly into crowds is more intuitive, and engaging with in-game characters can yield substantial rewards, though it may also lead to unexpected and significant consequences.

Mastering the Art of Assassination

Players will hone their skills to become true master assassins. This involves wielding an array of new weapons, learning to disarm adversaries and turn their own weaponry against them, and executing stealthy assassinations with the iconic hidden blades.

Please note: As of November 19th, 2018, the online features for Assassin's Creed 2 are no longer supported. Consequently, the Multiplayer and Co-op modes are inaccessible. (MAC ONLY)

Name: Wolfenstein II: The New Colossus
Description:
Wolfenstein® II: The New Colossus™ is the highly anticipated sequel to the critically acclaimed, Wolfenstein®: The New Order™ developed by the award-winning studio MachineGames. An exhilarating adventure brought to life by the industry-leading id Tech® 6, Wolfenstein® II sends players to Nazi-controlled America on a mission to recruit the boldest resistance leaders left. Fight the Nazis in iconic American locations, equip an arsenal of badass guns, and unleash new abilities to blast your way through legions of Nazi soldiers in this definitive first-person shooter. STORY: America, 1961. Your assassination of Nazi General Deathshead was a short-lived victory. Despite the setback, the Nazis maintain their stranglehold on the world. You are BJ Blazkowicz, aka “Terror-Billy,” member of the Resistance, scourge of the Nazi empire, and humanity’s last hope for liberty. Only you have the guts, guns, and gumption to return stateside, kill every Nazi in sight, and spark the second American Revolution. KEY FEATURES: The Mission: Liberate America from the Nazis Strap in for a heart-pounding journey as you fight the Nazi war machine on American soil. As BJ Blazkowicz, protect your family and friends, forge new alliances and face the demons of your troubled past as you rally pockets of resistance to overthrow the Nazi occupation. The People: Rally the Resistance Immerse yourself in a world brought to life by unforgettable characters who bring a new level of personality to the franchise. Reunite with your friends and fellow freedom fighters such as Anya, Caroline, Bombate, Set, Max Hass, Fergus or Wyatt, and befriend new characters such as Horton and Grace as you take on the evil Frau Engel and her Nazi army. The Arsenal: Wield Devastating Guns and Future Tech Blast Nazis to bits with high-tech weaponry such as the Laserkraftwerk, a multi-purpose, high-intensity laser weapon that can disintegrate enemies, or the Dieselkraftwerk, a rapid-fire, gas-powered grenade launcher that can devastate groups of enemies, or get up close and personal with advanced pistols, submachine guns, and hatchets. When you need a little more versatility, upgrade and dual-wield your favorite guns! The Plan: Kill Every Nazi in Your Way Everyone’s favorite pastime! Unleash your inner war hero as you annihilate Nazis in new and hyper-violent ways. Lock and load futuristic guns and discover BJ’s new set of abilities as you fight to free America. Regardless of your playstyle, invent all-new ways of stabbing, shooting, and killing Nazis.

Name: Assassin's Creed 2
Description:
Assassin’s Creed® 2 is the follow-up to the title that became the fastest-selling new IP in video game history. The highly anticipated title features a new hero, Ezio Auditore da Firenze, a young Italian noble, and a new era, the Renaissance. Assassin’s Creed 2 retains the core gameplay experience that made the first opus a resounding success and features new experiences that will surprise and challenge players. Assassin’s Creed 2 is an epic story of family, vengeance and conspiracy set in the pristine, yet brutal, backdrop of a Renaissance Italy. Ezio befriends Leonardo da Vinci, takes on Florence’s most powerful families and ventures throughout the canals of Venice where he learns to become a master assassin. EZIO, A NEW ASSASSIN FOR A NEW ERA Ezio Auditore da Firenze is a young Italian noble who will learn the ways of the assassins after his family was betrayed and he looks to seek vengeance. He is a lady’s man, a free soul with panache yet has a very human side to his personality. Through him, you become a master assassin. RENAISSANCE ITALY Italy in the 15th century was less a country and more a collection of city-states where families with political and economic strength began to take leadership roles in cities like Florence and Venice. This journey through some of the most beautiful cities in the world takes place in a time in history where culture and art were born alongside some of the most chilling stories of corruption, greed and murder. A NEW-FOUND FREEDOM You will be able to perform missions when you want and how you want in this open-ended world that brings back free-running and adds elements such as swimming and even flying to the adventure. The variety in gameplay adds another layer for you to truly play through the game any way you choose. DYNAMIC CROWD Discover a living, breathing world where every character is an opportunity for the player. Blending in with the crowd is easier, working with in-game characters provide ample rewards but can also lead to surprising consequences. BECOME A MASTER ASSASSIN Perfect your skills to become a master assassin where you brandish new weapons, learn to disarm enemies then use their weapons against them, and assassinate enemies using both hidden blades. Please note that as of November 19th, 2018, the online features for this game are no longer supported. The Multiplayer mode / Co-op mode will no longer be accessible. (MAC ONLY)

CasinoRPG offers a unique Vegas-themed MMORPG experience, combining role-playing, tycoon, city-building, and casino gameplay. You start as a janitor and can become a casino mogul through smart play and successful businesses. The main draw is its multiplayer casino games, like slots, poker, blackjack, and roulette, where your wins help you climb the ranks.

This world has many things to do:

*   **Casino Games:** Play classic games such as slots, poker, blackjack, roulette, solitaire, video poker, bingo, and scratchers. The game regularly adds new games.
*   **Tycoon Simulations:** Be a casino owner, designing and running your casino floors in a live tycoon simulation.
*   **City Building:** Help build a lasting, open-world city where all casinos are owned, designed, and run by players. You and many others shape the city's look.

Buy land and build your own casinos, carefully designing everything from the outside to the inside. Missions drive the story, letting you meet characters like the Mayor and Detective Watts as you advance. CasinoRPG is a lively, changing virtual city where your choices truly matter. As one player noted, "The freedom to build and manage my own casino is what really sets this game apart." Another player added, "It's amazing to see the city grow and change based on what we all do."

Name: Laruaville 10 Match 3 Puzzle
Description:
