This is a Match 3 game with many additional bonus levels and new mechanics you won't see in the other games. - 30 tricky Bonus levels as an optional addition to the main Match3 gameplay - Mahjong - Solitaires - Hidden Objects and Find the Difference scenes - a town to build and a story to follow The ghosts are back and this time they’re going to have a run-in with a famous wizard! Merlin, the mightiest wizard of antiquity, has awoke and built himself a castle. Unfortunately, ancient castles were poorly designed with high humidity, dark corridors and drafty rooms! Merlin is smart however, and he has stolen the Sun and placed it in the castle for him to enjoy alone! But what about the rest of us? Maybe a friend from Merlin’s past can convince him to return the Sun to its rightful place. - For both hardcore and casual players - Follow the ghosts' next chapter - Play bonus games and build up your town - New mechanics you’ve never seen

**Quest for Cathay Kingdom Mah Jong: A Unique Solitaire Experience**

Embark on a **unique Solitaire Mah Jong adventure** with Quest for Cathay Kingdom. This game innovates by blending familiar Mah Jong mechanics with exciting new elements. You'll encounter combinations from traditional Mah Jong, **match-3 puzzle movements**, and even **wildcards**. The gameplay also features **betting and buying/selling moves**, adding a strategic layer not typically found in Mah Jong.

The game offers a rich, **fictional story campaign** woven with historical facts. Explore territories like India, Pakistan, Afghanistan, Mongolia, and China during a fascinating period of discovery.

Beyond the campaign, enjoy **three distinct single-game modes**:

*   **Waterfall Mah Jong:** A variation inspired by river-themed puzzles.
*   **Match Mah Jong:** Experience Mah Jong with a match-3 twist.
*   **Cathay Mah Jong:** Discover the original Mah Jong variant created specifically for this game.

**Additional Features:**

*   Earn **Steam Achievements**.
*   Choose between **Black and Light piece set themes**.
*   Immerse yourself in **thematic music**.
*   Enjoy a **4-hour story campaign** and approximately **8 hours of gameplay** across all modes.
*   Experience **high replayability** through single games, unlocked levels, and procedurally generated boards.

Name: Gra&Vity
Description:
Gra & Vity is a minimalist puzzle game in which you control gravity in order to join the two characters. For this, you can use only two directions: horizontal (right and left) and vertical (top and bottom) Features: Challenges logical thinking Simple mechanics Abstract and minimalist art Smooth soundtrack 50 levels Free from punctuation, texts, time or distractions

Name: Solitaire 3D
Description:
Enjoy over 100 different solitaire games (including all your favorites: Spider, Pyramid, Klondike etc.), multiple card decks, a wide range of backgrounds, online high scores, statistics, sound effects, 3D animation effects, and much more. With Solitaire 3D you can also create your own card decks, put faces on the court cards if you wish, and even print them out to create a real-life card deck! Compete with players across the world, and also against your rivals with online high scores for each game! With emphasis on ease-of-play and smooth beautiful graphics, Solitaire 3D is the perfect solitaire partner for all.

**Win by Definition: A Card Game Adventure Where You Forge Your Own Victory**

Tired of predictable card games where the objective is always to deplete an opponent's health points or accumulate a set score? "Win by Definition" offers a radical departure from conventional gameplay, presenting a unique one-player card game adventure. In this innovative experience, the path to victory is not predetermined but is instead defined by the cards themselves.

The core of "Win by Definition" lies in its revolutionary approach to game mechanics. As a player, you embody a role within a nascent, undefined world. Your journey involves exploring this realm, and crucially, interacting with the cards that govern its very existence. Unlike traditional games, cards in "Win by Definition" are not merely tools for combat or point accumulation. They are the architects of your reality. You will draw cards, manage your graveyard, and even exile elements from the game. More intriguingly, specific cards may be required to access new stages, traverse the world, or even engage in what could be considered "battle" with other cards you acquire. The fundamental principle is to "define the victory, and challenge every way for the victory."

**Unquestionable Gameplay: Simplicity Redefined**

Explaining the precise rules of "Win by Definition" is a deliberate challenge, a testament to its groundbreaking design. As the developer, Toorun12, puts it, "If I say 'You use one card. Repeat this.', It may be an explanation of the rules." The game's most striking feature is its profound simplicity, paradoxically leading to immense complexity in its application.

"Everything is undefined until a stage starts," the developer explains. This means that crucial game elements such as what to draw each turn, the quantity of cards drawn, the source of these draws, the location of your hand, the very definition of how you win, the presence of opponents, and even the concept of "life points" are all fluid and subject to change.

**Illustrative Card Effects: Shaping Your Reality**

The following examples represent a mere fraction of the diverse and imaginative card effects found within "Win by Definition," showcasing how players actively shape the game's parameters:

*   "Add 1 'Card A' to your hand."
*   "Put 100 cards in your hand into the graveyard."
*   "Set your 'life point' to 2."
*   "If you have 30 or more graveyards, you win."
*   "Add one of your 'one of your hand' to your hand. (Note: This refers to a card specifically named 'one of your hand', not a card from your hand.)"
*   "'Cemetery' means 'hand'."
*   "Play 'song.ogg'."
*   "Make the background bold with the tile of 'gizagiza' (jagged)."
*   "Make 'the field' private information that you cannot see."

**From the Developer: A New Perspective on Card Games**

Toorun12, the creator of "Win by Definition," shares their vision for this unique project: "So, for the first time, my name is Toorun12. It's for the first time we have developed a game. The content is, sort of a 'mysterious adventure'. It would be great if you could re-recognize what should be 'win' and what is the best thing we call literally 'card game' after a mysterious experience through out this." This sentiment underscores the game's ambition to challenge players' preconceived notions of what a card game can be, offering a truly novel and thought-provoking experience.

**sfäre: An Interactive Exploration of Evolving Visuals and Sound**

sfäre offers a unique interactive experience centered on exploration rather than traditional creation. The application allows users to delve into a dynamic world of intricate patterns. At its core, sfäre features straightforward controls that manipulate lines emanating from the screen's center. These lines, composed of small dots, can be shaped to form complex designs. Four luminous orbs positioned in the corners each influence a distinct aspect of the evolving visuals. This interactive element transforms sfäre into a journey of discovery, continuously unveiling a mesmerizing stream of softly moving and pulsing imagery.

The visual artistry of sfäre is enhanced by its tranquil soundtrack, which includes a variety of tracks designed to harmonize with the visuals. Although not strictly a music visualizer, the creators intentionally synchronized the sounds and patterns to foster a cohesive and immersive atmosphere. As one observer remarked, "The interplay between the visuals and the audio is genuinely captivating." The inclusion of horizontal and vertical mirror options enables the creation of off-center designs, leading to potentially striking visual outcomes. This focus on serenity and wonder often leaves users feeling revitalized after engaging with sfäre, finding that the peaceful interaction provides a helpful respite from daily pressures.

Boulders: Puzzle presents a unique spatial reasoning challenge where players must strategically manipulate a cuboid to connect with a designated goal cube. This engaging game encourages players to think both logically and spatially, as they navigate through increasingly complex levels. The core mechanic involves rotating the player's cuboid to alter its length and position, enabling it to reach the objective.

The game features a variety of cube types that significantly impact gameplay. Player cubes are essential for extending or shortening the player cuboid, allowing access to different areas within the levels. Ground cubes serve as the only surfaces the player cuboid can traverse and are also instrumental in disconnecting player cubes, thereby shortening the cuboid. Destructor cubes pose a threat, as any connected player cube will be destroyed, fragmenting the player cuboid. Duplicator cubes offer a different kind of transformation, converting connected player cubes into more duplicator cubes and also causing fragmentation. The ultimate objective is to connect the player cuboid to the Goal cube to successfully complete each level.

Boulders: Puzzle offers extensive replayability with multiple levels designed to test players' skills. Furthermore, the game supports community-created content, allowing players to explore and enjoy levels designed by others. For those who wish to further refine their abilities and engage in friendly competition, an optional feature allows players to measure and compare three key attributes with their friends: Moves (total cuboid rotations), Steps (individual player cube movements), and Time (completion duration). The game also includes a free, integrated level editor, empowering players to design and share their own challenging puzzles.

Name: Instant Farmer - Logic Puzzle
Description:
A country life, growing a vegetable garden in your own ranch. In this tiny fantasy countryside experience, that is easy to do and very relaxing. Just keep in mind: water brings life. Swap the blocks of earth, stone, water, and others, like water channels and lawn sprinklers, so that all the arable soil receives the necessary water. Solve the challenge and feel the pleasure of watching the plants instantly grow and bear fruit. There is no time limit or resources to manage, so you can calmly just focus on the core mechanics while listening to a soothing soundtrack and animal sounds. Figuring out the patterns of blocks will make it easier to solve the puzzles. As you progress solving the logic puzzles, see your farm expand and evolve in the background with new types of vegetables. With clean skies, fresh air, and crystal clear water, among birds and listening to the sounds of nature. Featuring: 50 logic puzzles to complete. An exclusive and immersive soundtrack.

**Zombie Solitaire 2 Chapter 3: The Egyptian Finale - Your Last Stand Against the Undead**

The final chapter of your wild escape from the zombie apocalypse has arrived! Your madcap journey, fleeing genetically altered tofu burger-eating zombies, has led you to the sands of Egypt. But even here, the relentless zombie invasion continues its spread. Is there any hope left? A cryptic hint points you toward the ultimate zombie lair, and you begin a cross-country quest. Armed with a stash of sweets, you're ready to unleash a sugar shock to deter those persistent critters. Prepare for fun adventure puzzles and multiple-choice quests that will guide you closer to your destination. Engage in thrilling time management duels and Match 3 battles against the undead. Are you ready for the most hilarious showdown yet?

**What's New in This Installment:**

This latest chapter, the fourth in the popular 'Zombie Solitaire' series, includes many small updates based on player feedback. As one player noted, "The new levels are incredibly addictive, and the story keeps getting funnier!"

*   **Over 100 New Levels:** Experience a wealth of fresh challenges.
*   **Improved Solitaire Gameplay:** Enjoy enhanced and more engaging solitaire levels.
*   **Quick Time Management Battles:** Jump into lightning-fast strategic duels.
*   **Humorous Zombie Story:** Delight in a funny narrative packed with creative ideas.
*   **Helpful Power-Ups:** Use numerous power-ups and wild cards to advance.
*   **Challenging Match 3 Duels:** Test your skills in demanding Match 3 battles.
*   **Interactive Multiple-Choice Quests:** Your choices influence the story in these entertaining adventures.
*   **Diverse Mini-Games:** Discover fun mini-games, including adventure quests and puzzles.

This premium entertainment experience is perfect for the whole family, offering a wacky adventure with tons of zombies – hopefully for the last time!

Explore more of our great casual games.

Team Fortress 2 is a top-tier free-to-play online game, known for its lasting appeal and exciting gameplay. As PC Gamer once stated, it's "the most fun you can have online." This highly praised game is now completely free, with no hidden fees or advantages for paying players. It remains one of the most popular and well-regarded free games available.

The game's enduring success is largely due to **regular free updates** from Valve, which frequently add new ways to play, maps, and gear. Team Fortress 2 features **nine unique classes**, each with its own skills and character, offering a style for everyone. New players can easily get started with **detailed training and offline practice modes** to improve their abilities before jumping into matches. Popular game types like Capture the Flag, Control Point, Payload, Arena, and King of the Hill provide varied and thrilling experiences. Additionally, the game offers **deep customization**, letting players find, create, purchase, and exchange hundreds of items to make their characters their own. Importantly, Team Fortress 2 follows a **"free-to-play, not pay-to-win" approach**. This means most items from the Mann Co. Store can be obtained through gameplay, rather than needing real money.

Name: Apex Legends™
Description:
Conquer with character in Apex Legends, a free-to-play* Hero shooter where legendary characters with powerful abilities team up to battle for fame & fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Master an ever-growing roster of diverse Legends, deep-tactical squad play, and bold, new innovations that go beyond the Battle Royale experience — all within a rugged world where anything goes. Welcome to the next evolution of Hero Shooter. KEY FEATURES A Roster of Legendary Characters — Master a growing roster of powerful Legends, each with their own unique personality, strengths, and abilities that are easy to pick up but challenging to truly master. Build Your Crew — Choose your Legend and combine their unique skills together with other players to form the ultimate crew. Strategic Squad Play — Whether you're battling on a massive, floating city in Battle Royale or dueling in close-quarters Arenas, you'll need to think fast. Master your Legend's unique abilities and coordinate with your teammates to discover new tactics and powerful combinations. Innovative Combat — Master an expanding assortment of powerful weapons and equipment. You'll need to move fast and learn the rhythms of each weapon to get the most out of your arsenal. Plus, change it up in limited-time modes, and get ready for a boatload of new content each season. Ever-expanding Universe — Apex Legends takes place in an immersive universe where the story continues to evolve, maps change each season, and new Legends keep joining the fight. Make your mark on the Apex Games with a multitude of distinctive outfits, and join the adventure! This game includes optional in-game purchases of virtual currency that can be used to acquire virtual in-game items, including a random selection of virtual in-game items.

Name: Titanfall® 2
Description:
Call down your Titan and get ready for an exhilarating first-person shooter experience in Titanfall® 2! The sequel introduces a new single player campaign that explores the bond between Pilot and Titan. Or blast your way through an even more innovative and intense multiplayer experience - featuring 6 new Titans, deadly new Pilot abilities, expanded customization, new maps, modes, and much more. KEY FEATURES Experience a captivating single player story . Titanfall® 2 features a single player campaign packed with action and inventive twists. Play as a Militia rifleman stranded behind enemy lines, who encounters a veteran Vanguard-class Titan. The two must work together to uphold a mission they were never meant to carry out. Enjoy multiplayer action that's second to none. The sequel gives players more of the adrenaline-fueled multiplayer combat they've come to expect from the franchise. Take the fast-paced, first-person action to the next level with more Titans, deadlier Pilot abilities, and much more. And be sure to stand out in the middle of all the chaos with new, expanded Pilot, Titan and loadout personalization options! Titanfall™ 2 Ultimate Edition Content The best way to jump into one of the most surprising shooters of 2016 is with the Titanfall™ 2 Ultimate Edition. Ultimate Edition includes Titanfall™ 2 base game, Deluxe Edition content (Scorch & Ion Prime Titans, Deluxe Edition Warpaint for 6 Titans, Deluxe Edition Camo for all Titans, Pilots & Weapons, Deluxe Edition Nose Arts for 6 Titans, Deluxe Edition Callsign), and Jump-Starter content (All Titans unlocked, all Pilot tacticals unlocked, 500 credits to unlock loadouts, cosmetics and gear, 10 2x XP tokens, the Underground R-201 Carbine Warpaint).

Experience the thrilling first-person shooter, **Titanfall™**. Join millions of players in a futuristic war where agile Pilots and massive Titans clash.

In Titanfall, you control a Pilot with incredible agility. **Wall-run, leap between buildings, and perform acrobatic moves** like diving and tumbling. This fast-paced movement system makes other shooters feel slow.

When you need more power, **call down your Titan**. This 24-foot-tall robot descends from orbit. Fight with your Titan or **take control of its cockpit** to unleash heavy weapons. Titans can be customized with various armaments, just like your Pilot.

Your Titanfall purchase includes the **Season Pass**, giving you access to all three map packs: Expedition, Frontier's Edge, and IMC Rising. This means you get **nine extra maps** to battle in.

**Titanfall Deluxe Edition is a multiplayer-only experience.**

Paladins® is a free-to-play fantasy team-based shooter that has captivated over 25 million players. In this vibrant world, you embody a legendary Champion, blending guns and magic. You can customize your Champion's core abilities to match your exact playstyle. The game boasts a diverse roster of characters, from skilled human sharpshooters and mech-riding goblins to mystical elves and jetpack-equipped dragons.

Each Champion offers a unique set of skills, and new characters are consistently introduced, ensuring the gameplay remains fresh and engaging. Paladins is entirely free to play. All gameplay-affecting elements can be earned through playing, while cosmetic items are available for purchase. "No matter what your playstyle is, you’ll find it in Paladins," the game's description states.

The innovative deckbuilding system allows for incredible customization. You can transform a single Champion into an iron sights sniper, a grenade-slinging explosives expert, or a rapid assault rifle user. By selecting from dozens of cards, you can tailor abilities and truly make each Champion your own. Imagine embodying an ancient goddess, an interstellar bounty hunter, a cutthroat pirate, or a frost giant – all within Paladins. Hundreds of skins are already available, with new favorites appearing in every update.

## SUPERHOT VR: A Unique Time-Bending Action Experience

SUPERHOT VR offers a truly unique action experience by making time move only when you move. This award-winning game challenges players to survive by strategically using slow-motion bullets and snatching weapons from enemies. You'll find yourself in outnumbered situations, where quick thinking and precise movements are key to shooting, slicing, and dodging your way through intense scenarios.

### A Puzzle-Shooter Like No Other

This game stands out as an original hybrid puzzle-shooter. It blurs the lines of reality, making players question what's real as they get drawn into its distinct mechanics. This innovative approach has earned it many awards, including "VR Game of the Year" from major award ceremonies.

### Built for Virtual Reality

SUPERHOT VR was completely reimagined and redesigned for VR and hand-tracking controllers. Developed over three years in close partnership with the SUPERHOT Team and Oculus, it brings the intense action of the original SUPERHOT directly into your virtual world, offering a fully immersive experience.

### Critically Acclaimed

SUPERHOT VR's quality has been recognized with numerous prestigious awards, cementing its place as a top virtual reality game. Some of these honors include:

*   GDCA Best VR Game 2018
*   SXSW Best VR Game 2018
*   DICE Awards Immersive Reality Game of The Year 2017
*   New York Game Awards Best Virtual Reality Game 2017
*   Unity Vision Summit Virtual Reality Game 2017
*   Pixel.Awards Best Virtual Reality Game 2017
*   Digital Dragons Best Virtual Reality Game 2017

The game also received nominations, such as GDCA Best VR Game 2017 and SXSW Trending Game of the Year 2017.

### The SUPERHOT FOREVER Update

The SUPERHOT FOREVER update significantly boosts the game's replayability. It adds hours of new challenges, achievements, and endless levels. This update introduces exciting new ways to play with the core time-bending gameplay:

*   **Headshot Challenge:** Only headshots defeat enemies, testing your accuracy.
*   **Score Attack:** Compete against your own best scores in both slow-motion and real-time.
*   **No Shooting Mode:** Try to finish the game without firing any weapons.
*   **Hardcore Mode:** Face faster enemies and quicker reactions for a tougher challenge.

### Become Part of the System

This game is designed to push your abilities and help you perform at your best, offering a difficult but rewarding experience. As you conquer its challenges, you'll feel like you've become one with the system, surpassing your previous limits. SUPERHOT VR transforms you, making you "ONE OF US," free from typical gameplay constraints. The game suggests that "MIND CONTROL DELETE" will ultimately liberate you.

Monday Night Combat is a thrilling third-person shooter where players compete in a popular, lethal sport. This game uniquely blends intense combat, satisfying finishing moves, and engaging gameshow challenges. Instead of fighting for abstract ideals, players battle for cash, fame, and endorsements, embodying the American dream.

### New Content and Gameplay

**The Throwback Throwdown in Uncle Tully's Funland**

Uncle Tully's Funland, now part of the Crossfire map, introduces exciting new gameplay. A new character, Chickey Cantor, spawns here. Shooting Chickey makes him fly away, granting your team a significant single-life buff. After Chickey lands, players can grapple and ride him for eight seconds to earn in-game currency. However, riders are vulnerable to enemy Pros.

**New Bot Spawners**

Specialized bot spawners allow players to summon various enemy types, including Jackbots, Black Jacks, Slims, Scramblers, Gremlins, Gapshots, and Bouncers.

### Game Modes

**Co-op Blitz Mode**

Defend your Money Ball against waves of robots in this cooperative mode. Play solo or with up to four players via Steam. Earned money can be spent on defensive turrets, character class enhancements, or environmental hazards. Challenges range from the ten-round Exhibition Blitz to the Super Sudden Death Blitz with endless, escalating robot waves.

**Competitive Multiplayer Crossfire Mode**

Teams battle each other on Steam, supported by endless streams of robots. Success depends on overwhelming enemy robot forces, upgrading Pros, and fortifying base defenses.

### Progression and Customization

**Persistent Progression**

Money earned from challenges contributes to your Lifetime Earnings. This unlocks over 370 ProTags, allows custom class creation, and helps you achieve high Leaderboard rankings.

**Customizable Characters**

Each Pro character has a unique playstyle and upgradeable skills. Players can further refine these abilities with unlockable items through the Custom Class feature.

**Persistent Stats and ProTags**

Every match awards money that accumulates towards Lifetime Earnings. This currency unlocks custom classes and earned ProTags. Your total Lifetime Earnings also determines your player level. The game meticulously tracks persistent statistics. Over 370 'ProTags' are available to display to other players.

**Dedicated Servers**

The game supports hosting multiple instances of Monday Night Combat on dedicated servers, with a full standalone client for robust online play.

**Plants vs. Zombies™ Garden Warfare 2: Deluxe Edition - The Ultimate Battle for Suburbia**

Prepare for the most hilarious and action-packed shooter in the galaxy with Plants vs. Zombies Garden Warfare 2! Dr. Zomboss has taken over Suburbia, turning it into a plant-free zombie utopia. It's time for the plants to fight back and reclaim their home. Dive into the chaotic new 24-player Herbal Assault mode, or team up with friends in 4-player co-op or go solo. With fresh modes, exciting new classes, and an abundance of humor, Plants vs. Zombies Garden Warfare 2 empowers you to wage war on seriousness and your friends in any way you choose.

The game also introduces the Backyard Battleground, your personal interactive hub. Here, you and up to three friends can tackle daily quests and challenges, and engage with your beloved PvZ characters. As one reviewer noted, "The Backyard Battleground is a fantastic addition, offering a dynamic space for players to strategize and have fun between battles."

**Deluxe Edition Includes:**

*   Grass Effect Z7 Imp and Mech Character Variant
*   Exclusive Plant Class Custom Accessories Pack
*   Exclusive Zombie Class Custom Accessories Pack
*   Phenomenal Character Variant Pack
*   200,000 Coins Starter Pack
*   Emoji Pack

**Key Features:**

*   **Plants Take the Offensive:** This time, the plants are bringing the fight directly to the zombies. Lead the charge to reclaim Suburbia, or stand firm as the zombies to preserve Zomburbia in entirely new game modes.
*   **More Characters, Classes, and Customization:** A total of 14 playable character classes are now available, with 6 new classes joining the fray. Choose from over 100 unique plants and zombies from across time, ensuring you can stand out on the battlefield.
*   **Play Your Way:** Plants vs. Zombies Garden Warfare 2 offers a wealth of engaging game modes for both solo and multiplayer experiences. Fancy some company? Jump into the new Herbal Assault mode for an epic 24-player online showdown across Suburbia. Alternatively, join forces with either the plants or zombies in 4-player co-op. For those who prefer a solitary experience, solo play is also an option.
*   **A Living, Breathing PvZ World:** The epic struggle for Suburbia unfolds across 12 vibrant maps, each brimming with personality and humor. Battle your way through Zombossified cityscapes and bustling airspaces, all filled with hidden secrets waiting to be uncovered. As one player enthusiastically put it, "The maps are incredibly detailed and full of surprises; you never know what you'll find around the next corner."

Gears 5, a significant entry in the acclaimed Gears of War series, offers a fresh experience with numerous new features. The campaign thrusts players into an all-out war where Kait Diaz embarks on a personal journey to understand her link to the enemy. This quest reveals the true threat to Sera, which is Kait herself. The game enhances replayability with new campaign features, allowing players to carry over character and weapon skins into subsequent playthroughs, alongside bonus difficulties and modifiers.

For competitive players, the PvP modes have been expanded since launch. "Versus" caters to all skill levels, from casual enthusiasts to seasoned professionals, ensuring a rewarding experience for every playstyle. The PvE component encourages cooperative survival. Players can select their character and class to tackle either the enduring "Horde" mode or the more objective-driven "Escape" mode.

Gears 5 also supports three-player Campaign Co-op, enabling friends to join online or via split-screen. The game prioritizes accessibility, offering extensive customization options. These include full controller remapping, single-stick movement, support for the Adaptive Controller, narrated UI and menus, and improved subtitles, among other enhancements. An Xbox profile is required to play; players can sign in with an existing profile or create a new one at no cost.

Name: Plants vs. Zombies: Battle for Neighborville™
Description:
Welcome to Neighborville, where all is well. Except that a crazy, new, coniferous conflict between brain-less and botanicals is brewing! What are you gonna do, call the crops? Soil your plants? Prepare to kick some grass in a plant-on-zombie conflict that will take you to the outer edges of Neighborville and back again. KEY FEATURES Go All Out in Online Multiplayer - Jump into the fray with up to 24 players in online multiplayer across a gigantic suburban skirmish. Bring the unique abilities of each character class to 6 PvP modes–including the new Battle Arena–and experience the unbeleafable thrills of combat. Venture to the Outer Edges of Neighborville - The tension across the terra has expanded with free-roam regions that extend beyond the town of Neighborville. Squad up with up to 3 friends in the Giddy Park social region and take back Weirding Woods, Mount Steep and Neighborville Town Centre. It’s grow time! Customize Every Character for Battle - Join the newest bloom in the age-old battle between plants and zombies with 20 fully customizable classes at launch, including a Team Play class for each faction. Deck every character out with ludicrous looks and wacky weapons that show off your unique personality. NOTE: SPLIT SCREEN COUCH CO-OP NOT AVAILABLE ON PC VERSION. The Deluxe Edition includes the base game and outrageous exclusive content. Rock out with the Judge Z costume for 80s Action Hero, peck your battles with Peashooter’s Chickpea costume, express yourself with 5 explosive emojis, and learn about Battle for Neighborville in a special digital comic. Deluxe Edition exclusive content includes: Plants vs. Zombies: Battle for Neighborville Standard Edition Legendary Chickpea costume for Peashooter Legendary Judge Z costume for 80s Action Hero Digital comic 5 emojis

Name: Super Meat Boy
Description:
Super Meat Boy is a tough as nails platformer where you play as an animated cube of meat who's trying to save his girlfriend (who happens to be made of bandages) from an evil fetus in a jar wearing a tux. Our meaty hero will leap from walls, over seas of buzz saws, through crumbling caves and pools of old needles. Sacrificing his own well being to save his damsel in distress. Super Meat Boy brings the old school difficulty of classic NES titles like Mega Man 2, Ghost and Goblins and Super Mario Bros. 2 (The Japanese one) and stream lines them down to the essential no BS straight forward twitch reflex platforming. Ramping up in difficulty from hard to soul crushing SMB will drag Meat boy though haunted hospitals, salt factories and even hell itself. And if 300+ single player levels weren't enough SMB also throws in epic boss fights, a level editor and tons of unlock able secrets, warp zones and hidden characters. Story mode, featuring over 300 levels spanning 5+ chapters Play as a Head Crab! (Steam Exclusive) 33 legitimate Achievements Warp zones that will warp you into other games Over 16 unlockable able and playable characters from popular indie titles such as, Minecraft, Bit.Trip, VVVVVV and Machinarium Epic Boss fights Full Level Editor and Level Portal (January 2011) A story so moving you will cry yourself to sleep for the rest of your life

**Octahedron: Transfixed Edition - A Psychedelic Action Platformer**

Experience Octahedron: Transfixed Edition, a psychedelic action platformer where you defy gravity and ride platforms that materialize as you play. This game immerses you in a vibrant, underground world. Your objective is to climb colorful peaks and escape Veetragoul, all while moving to a dynamic rhythm.

The central mechanic involves **platforms that appear from nowhere**. Players can summon these platforms beneath them with a button press, riding them until their energy runs out. As you progress, you'll find **neon-powered upgrades** that boost your platforming skills. These upgrades enable you to defeat enemies with laser beams, smash through obstacles, and solve complex puzzles. The game features **meticulously designed levels**, offering 50 unique stages. Collecting fragments of the Octahedron unlocks new sections, bonus levels, and earns you special medals. Mastering the **precise controls** is crucial for successful platforming. You must maneuver past hazards and enemies that move in sync with the **pulsating soundtrack**. The game features an immersive soundtrack with contributions from artists like Chipzel, Andre Sobota, and Monomirror. As one developer stated, "We aimed to build a world that felt vibrant and reacted to the player's input."

**Star Drift Evolution: Master the Art of Powersliding**

Experience **Star Drift Evolution**, a minimalistic racing game that puts your driving skills to the ultimate test. This game is all about **precision and mastery**, where powersliding through corners is not just an option, but the **fastest way to drive**. Success hinges on your ability to **pick the right car for the right track** and execute each turn with flawless perfection. Are you ready to prove your mettle?

**Physics with a Satisfying Sense of Weight**

Dive into a driving experience defined by **refined physics** that deliver both style and challenge. Feel the **weight of the car** as you throw it into tight corners, mastering the art of the slide like a true champion.

**Conquer 75 Diverse Tracks**

Explore a vast array of tracks, from **simple dirt ovals** to intricate, **challenging point-to-point courses**. Each offers a unique test of your drifting prowess.

**Choose Your Perfect Ride from Over 50 Cars**

With **more than 50 cars**, each boasting distinct stats, you'll need to find the ideal vehicle for every track. Strategize by considering attributes like **top speed, acceleration, grip, and downforce**.

**Compete in Multiple Modes**

*   **Single Player Career:** Race against AI opponents and conquer **450 Star Challenges**.
*   **Online Multiplayer:** Engage in 'Trackmania Style' races for up to 20 players, featuring **no car collisions** so everyone can focus on perfecting their lines.
*   **Split Screen Multiplayer:** Challenge up to 4 friends in local split-screen races. You can even tackle Career Star Challenges together in **co-op mode**.

**Customize Your Play Style**

Select your preferred viewpoint with **classic top-down cameras** or immersive **arcade chase cams**. You can even **customize your own camera settings** to race your way.

**Easy to Learn, Difficult to Master**

Star Drift Evolution features **simple controls, no grind, and a clean UI**, allowing you to jump into the action quickly and become competitive immediately. The focus is squarely on the **core gameplay: mastering the art of drifting**.

**Climb the Leaderboards**

Utilize the **automatic ghost replay system** to challenge your opponents' best times. Constantly face the ghost of the next player on the leaderboard as you ascend the ranks.

**Immerse Yourself in the Soundtrack**

Enjoy a curated selection of **over 25 retro and synthwave tracks** from talented artists like Kenobit, Electroshark, and Luke McQueen II.

**Full Controller and Wheel Support**

The game offers **full controller support** with the ability to manually remap buttons in-game. While wheel support has been reported by testers (e.g., Thrustmaster T150 with manual mapping), it cannot be guaranteed for all wheels.

Experience the exhilarating rush of high-speed racing with TrackMania² Canyon, a significant evolution of Nadeo Studio's beloved online racing phenomenon. This sequel immerses players in a breathtaking Canyon environment, offering a racing experience that transcends typical driving games. Prepare for a journey filled with loops, wall rides, ramps, and a host of other daring stunts, all set within a fully customizable world where tracks are generated and powered by the players themselves.

TrackMania² Canyon distinguishes itself with a suite of impressive features. According to game developers, the **INCREDIBLE NEW GRAPHICS** showcase a stunning Canyon landscape with limitless potential, optimized for broad PC compatibility. Players will discover a **UNIQUE THRILLING RACING EXPERIENCE**, as the cars boast more realistic feel and precise handling than ever before. The game maintains the series' hallmark **INTUITIVE AND ACCESSIBLE GAMEPLAY**, catering to both solo and multiplayer enthusiasts with user-friendly creative tools.

Furthermore, **ENHANCED CREATIVE FREEDOM** is a cornerstone of TrackMania² Canyon. Players have access to more design elements and programmable parameters for tracks, cars, and scripts, allowing for unparalleled customization. The **EMBEDDED COMMUNITY INSTRUMENTS** facilitate the sharing of spectacular creations and video highlights globally. An **IN-GAME VIDEO STUDIO** empowers players to edit professional-quality recaps of their most impressive races. This vibrant ecosystem is fueled by a **VERY ACTIVE COMMUNITY**, consistently contributing an abundance of diverse user-generated content.

TrackMania² Canyon also boasts a robust infrastructure for competitive play. As reported by the game's creators, over 200,000 players engage daily, supported by dedicated servers that enable **FUN AND CRAZY MULTIPLAYER** action, with over 100 participants able to compete simultaneously on a single track. **OFFICIAL RANKINGS** are available for both solo and multiplayer modes, reinforcing its status as a premier online racing title. This strong foundation has cemented TrackMania's position as the world's most played online racing game and a significant presence in e-sports.

In a city where information is strictly controlled, agile couriers known as Runners are essential for transporting vital data while constantly evading surveillance. You embody Faith, a highly skilled Runner, in this first-person action-adventure game. Your sister has been falsely accused of a crime in this seemingly perfect city, and you are now relentlessly hunted.

Mirror's Edge™ immerses you directly into Faith's experiences. You will navigate a stunning, dizzying urban landscape, engaging in thrilling combat and high-speed pursuits. The game provides an unparalleled sense of motion and perspective, deeply drawing you into Faith's dangerous life. As the developers emphasize, "Survival is your only option," posing the critical question: "Will you rise above or fall?" Mastering the art of running is paramount for your continued existence. Developed by the creators of the Battlefield series, Mirror's Edge presents a unique action-adventure experience.

### Master Your Movement

Fluidly combine acrobatic skills like wall-runs, leaps, and vaults to navigate the city. Leverage every aspect of the urban environment to your advantage and to facilitate your escape.

### Experience True Immersion

The first-person viewpoint intensifies every action. Feel the dizzying heights, the natural flow of movement, and the visceral impact of close calls and incoming gunfire.

### Embrace the Challenge

You have the option to confront your enemies or avoid them. Your speed and agility enable you to outsmart pursuers and neutralize threats. The game skillfully blends chase sequences, complex puzzles, and dynamic combat.

### Discover Runner Vision

Activate Runner Vision to see the city from a Runner's perspective. Rooftops become navigable paths and strategic escape routes. Understanding the city's flow is crucial for maintaining your momentum and staying alive.

TrackMania United Forever stands as the definitive edition of the immensely popular car racing game, TrackMania. This version consolidates all previous environments from the series and introduces a vast, enhanced single-player campaign. Players can dive into 4 distinct modes – Race, Platform, Stunt, and Puzzle – across 420 tracks that escalate in difficulty. The game promises exhilarating gameplay at breakneck speeds on visually stunning tracks, featuring daring jumps, loops, sharp turns, turbo boosts, and a variety of obstacles like track-breakers, rails, and ramps. Each track is designed to deliver a fresh and intense experience, ensuring sensational gaming whether you're playing solo or online.

"TrackMania is the most entertaining car racing game ever," boasts the game's description, highlighting its broad appeal with millions of players engaging in both single and multiplayer modes.

United Forever offers seven distinct vehicle types, each providing unique gameplay and driving sensations across seven different TrackMania environments. Notably, the Stadium environment is compatible with the free-to-play TrackMania Nations Forever. The game supports both solo and team-based multiplayer modes, allowing players to join millions of others on TrackMania servers worldwide. A significant graphical update enhances the three classic environments: Desert, Snow, and Rally.

The game also features an integrated peer-to-peer sharing system, enabling players to showcase their custom creations, such as modified vehicles and avatars, to opponents. Players can earn 'Coppers,' the in-game currency, by achieving medals in solo play or by trading their custom content, including cars, skins, tracks, and videos, with other players. Official rankings are available for both solo and multiplayer modes. In solo play, in addition to earning medals for exceptional racing, players can compete in official rankings by recording their best times on the game's tracks.

The robust TrackMania editors empower players to create their own tracks, vehicles, and videos using the paint shop and movie studio tools. Furthermore, players can seamlessly continue their progress from TrackMania Nations Forever, carrying over all their data, including medals, ladder positions, scores, and friends lists.

Name: Nimbus
Description:
Nimbus is a unique combination of racing & puzzling. The player controls a craft with no means of directly propelling itself and needs to use whatever is scattered around the levels to acquire thrust and reach the goal. Traverse a world map with several distinct islands in order to recover your lost love. Light on story, but heavy on gameplay Nimbus offers several hours of increasingly harder challenges. Key features: Over 50 levels available on the main campaign Unique game play that is easy to understand, but hard to master A varied blend of levels that requires a combination of skill & puzzle solving Plenty of opportunity for optimizing how you approach each level in order to beat the best times Several trails, levels and ships to unlock Loads of secrets & tricks

Name: Dustforce DX
Description:
Clean up the world with style! As an acrobatic janitor, you are an adept force against dust and disorder. Leap and dash off walls and ceilings, and deftly traverse precarious environments. Cleanse each level swiftly and thoroughly to achieve mastery in this 2D sweep-'em-up platformer. Key Features: Over 75 levels varying in difficulty from elegant exploration levels to intense challenges for hardcore players. Over 100 community-made levels included in their own area of the game. Compete on the online leaderboard and instantly watch replays of every players' best attempts. Play against your friends with local multiplayer matches. Roam through a myriad of beautiful environments accompanied by an original soundtrack. Make your own worlds with the level editor, and seamlessly share and play them with the rest of the community.

TrackMania² Valley is the latest addition to TrackMania², the highly anticipated racing game series from Nadeo Studio. This new environment brings a fresh take on arcade rally racing, combining fast-paced action with realistic driving. As with other TrackMania² games, Valley offers a solo campaign, a deep multiplayer experience, and endless possibilities for user-created content, all running on the ManiaPlanet system.

The game aims to deliver a compelling experience for players. "TrackMania² Valley offers a truly thrilling racing sensation," promising a more realistic car feel and precise handling. This focus on gameplay is complemented by its visual appeal. The Valley environment is described as "breathtaking," providing ample creative potential while maintaining optimized performance for various PCs.

Accessibility remains a core tenet of the TrackMania series. Valley features "intuitive and accessible gameplay" in both solo and multiplayer modes. This ease of use is balanced with sophisticated creative tools, allowing players enhanced freedom. You can design tracks, vehicles, and game scripts with a wide range of design elements and programmable options.

The game also emphasizes community and content sharing. Players can "seamlessly share your remarkable creations and video highlights with a global community." An integrated video editing suite allows for the creation of "professional, TV-quality highlight reels" directly within the game. The community is noted as "exceptionally active," consistently generating a "vast and diverse range of user-created content and activities."

Multiplayer is a significant draw, with the capacity for "over 100 players" to compete on the same track simultaneously. Official leaderboards are available for both solo and multiplayer modes, allowing players to track their progress and achievements. TrackMania 2 Valley supports extensive customization and content distribution, fostering a vibrant player base.

Name: Offspring Fling!
Description:
Offspring Fling is a game about a poor forest creature that has misplaced all of her children. She'll have to fight her way through over 100 levels of action puzzle platforming to get them all back home. There's danger around every corner, but she won't rest until her family is safe again. Key Features: An intense number of levels (Over 100!) Awesome puzzles, and rad platforming action Ghost replays to help you beat your best time Replay sharing that lets you race against others A lot of secret unlockables if you're cool enough! A beautiful soundtrack by Alec Holowka Throwing babies and watching them bounce off stuff! Cute and cuddly looking things to look at! Immense satisfaction

Name: EVE Online
Description:
THE #1 SPACE MMO EVE Online is the largest single shard space MMO of all time. With over 7,000 solar systems and nearly 20 years of rich player-created history, join this storied universe and play free to experience everything from immense PvP or PvE battles to mining, exploration, and industry. Seize your destiny as an immortal, a Capsuleer capable of piloting over 350 fully customizable starships from small, nimble Frigates to formidable Battleships and massive Freighters. Embark on a solo adventure through the twisting nexus of wormhole space, form a mighty industrial empire to transform athe building blocks of the universe, or take up arms with likeminded players to conquer vast frontiers together. Who will you be in New Eden? PLAY FREE Experience this vast spaceship MMO for free as an Alpha Clone with access to Frigates, Destroyers, Cruisers, Battlecruisers, and Battleships of any faction. Enterprising Capsuleers may also choose to upgrade to Omega Clone for unlimited Ship access and double training speed. SINGLE SHARD, SINGLE SERVER SANDBOX As a single sharded MMO, all players of EVE Online play on the same server across all timezones. Jump in and join thousands of players in the greatest space sandbox there is. Every decision you make, battle you win, and system you claim becomes a part of the long, rich history of New Eden. Where will you leave your mark? GAMING'S BIGGEST BATTLES There's no limit on what you can accomplish as a Capsuleer. EVE currently holds the Guinness World Record for the largest multiplayer video game PvP battle - 8,825 players in a single conflict. Take part in massive spaceship battles from day one or train up and command those fleets yourself. PLAYER DRIVEN ECONOMY EVE's player economy is one of unprecedented scale. The single shard nature of the universe makes for a single economy spread across thousands of space stations. Whether you want to trade on the local markets, produce new ships and equipment, or make cunning investments based on knowledge of player politics, it's all possible. LIMITLESS CHOICES Pursue a life of exploration, warfare, prosperity, or all of the above! Pilot over 350 different vessels and customize it to your liking with thousands of unique modules. Modify your ship as a fast and nimble fighter or design it from the ground up as a heavily shielded brawler to go toe to toe with others. Feeling lucky? Take a chance and modify your equipment further using alien technology found deep in Abyssal Deadspace. CONTINUOUS DEVELOPMENT With over 17 years of active development and free expansions, EVE is one of the longest running space MMOs out there. Join a thrilling universe filled with the unrelenting activity and combined history of millions of other players!

**STAR WARS™: Squadrons: Master the Art of Space Combat**

Prepare to **master the art of starfighter combat** in the authentic piloting experience that is STAR WARS™: Squadrons. This game plunges you into the heart of **first-person, multiplayer space dogfights**, allowing you to feel the adrenaline rush as you fight alongside your squadron. Enlist as a pilot and step into the cockpits of iconic starfighters from both the New Republic and Imperial fleets, engaging in **strategic 5v5 space battles**.

To truly dominate, you'll need to **modify your starfighter** and carefully adjust the composition of your squadron to perfectly suit varying playstyles and crush the opposition. Success hinges on teamwork; pilots will triumph together by completing tactical objectives across both familiar and **never-before-seen battlefields**. These include the awe-inspiring gas giant of Yavin Prime and the desolate, shattered moon of Galitan. Take command of legendary starfighters such as the nimble X-wing and the formidable TIE fighter.

**Customize your loadouts and cosmetics** to personalize your experience. A crucial element of gameplay involves **diverting power between weapons, shields, and engines**, immersing you deeply in the cockpit as you manage your ship's vital systems. For an unparalleled level of immersion, the **entire game can be played in virtual reality (VR)**, allowing you to truly live your STAR WARS pilot fantasy.

**The cockpit is your domain.** Utilize its intricate dashboards to your advantage. With only a thin hull of metal and glass separating you from the vast perils of space, you will **feel the raw intensity of combat from a visceral first-person perspective**. Embark on thrilling multiplayer modes and experience a unique single-player STAR WARS story that will draw you into the pilot's seat completely.

**STAR WARS™ Single-Player Story:**
Uncover the true meaning of being a pilot in the aftermath of Return of the Jedi. This compelling narrative unfolds from alternating perspectives between two distinct factions, featuring both iconic and emerging leaders locked in a desperate battle for control of the galaxy. The New Republic champions freedom, while the Empire enforces order. **Your skills are needed to join the galaxy's finest.**

**All Wings Report In:**
Strategize and plan your skirmishes with your squadron in the briefing room before launching into the evolving battlefields scattered across the galaxy. Compete in **intense 5v5 multiplayer dogfights**, or unite with your squadron to decisively tip the scales in monumental fleet battles. Together, you represent the galaxy's finest pilots.

**Master Legendary Starfighters:**
Take control of diverse classes of starfighters from both the New Republic and Imperial fleets, including the agile A-wing and the devastating TIE bomber. **Modify your ship, strategically divert power between its core systems**, and obliterate your opponents in thrilling, strategic space dogfights.

**The Mission is Clear:**
STAR WARS: Squadrons offers a **fully self-contained experience from day one**, where you earn rewards exclusively through gameplay. Climb the ranks and unlock new components such as advanced weapons, resilient hulls, powerful engines, enhanced shields, and unique cosmetic items. This clear path for progression ensures that the gameplay remains **fresh and engaging** throughout your journey.

In the 22nd century, mega-corporations fiercely compete for dominance across our solar system. This fragile peace is irrevocably broken by a startling discovery near the solar system's edge, sparking a devastating conflict known as 'The Jupiter Incident.' Nexus - The Jupiter Incident invites players into this gripping space opera.

This real-time, mission-based tactical space game offers a compelling experience:

*   **Intense Space Combat:** Experience visually stunning, cinematic real-time battles.
*   **Deep Strategic Command:** Employ masterful tactics and decisive action while leading a fleet of up to a dozen battleships.
*   **Varied Challenges:** Confront alien threats, explore uncharted star systems, and navigate the wonders and dangers of space.
*   **Grand Narrative:** Embark on an epic campaign spanning 6 episodes and more than 26 engaging missions.
*   **Diverse Mission Types:** Engage in a wide array of objectives, from espionage and combat to stealth, sabotage, rescue, and scientific discovery.
*   **Adaptable Fleet:** Command a fleet of up to 10 intricately detailed, customizable spaceships, offering control from basic maneuvers to simulation-level complexity.
*   **Formidable Foes:** Face off against 6 unique alien species, each employing distinct strategies and commanding a fleet of 30 alien vessels.
*   **Vast In-Game World:** Interact with over 50 distinct characters and utilize more than 90 different weapons and devices.
*   **Interactive Galaxy Map:** Navigate a dynamic starmap system complete with animated celestial bodies and realistic light effects.
*   **Engaging Exploration:** Zoom in on over 350 planets, moons, and comets within a fully realized 3D universe, where celestial bodies adhere to authentic physical laws.

As one developer noted, "The game aims to immerse players in a believable, yet fantastical, future of space exploration and conflict." Another source highlighted the game's "meticulous attention to detail in its ship design and combat mechanics."

Will you rise to defend Earth and conquer the challenges of 'The Jupiter Incident'?

**Chorus: Evolving the Space Combat Shooter Experience**

Prepare for an **evolution of the space-combat shooter genre** with Chorus. This thrilling new title puts you in the role of Nara, a former elite warrior of the Circle. Now a fugitive, Nara is driven by a singular mission: to dismantle the dark cult that created her and seek redemption across the galaxy.

**A Personal Quest for Redemption and Resistance**

Pilot Nara, an ace pilot haunted by her past, alongside Forsaken, her sentient starfighter, on a deeply personal quest. Their mission is to **unite resistance forces** against the oppressive Circle and their enigmatic leader, the Great Prophet. This journey will take them across the galaxy and beyond, confronting the darkness that has shaped Nara's life. As one developer noted, "Chorus is about Nara's journey of self-discovery and her fight for freedom."

**Explore a Universe of Mystery and Intense Battles**

Venture into a **dark new universe** brimming with intrigue and intense battles. Explore vast, awe-inspiring space stations and venture into otherworldly planes, engaging in exhilarating zero-g combat. From sweeping cosmic vistas to the claustrophobic confines of crystalline passages, Chorus masterfully blends grand space exploration with **fast-paced, exhilarating action**. The game's world is designed to be both beautiful and dangerous, offering players a truly immersive experience.

**Master Your Arsenal and Unique Abilities**

Chorus delivers a unique gameplay experience centered around its dual protagonists and evolved combat mechanics. You'll **play as both Nara and her sentient starfighter, Forsaken**, on their intertwined quest. Experience **fast-paced action** that pays homage to classic space shooters while introducing innovative elements. Your mission is to **fight to rally forces** against the formidable Circle and the Great Prophet. Prepare to confront a **diverse array of enemies**, from swarms of agile starfighters and colossal battleships to the mysterious and terrifying Void entities.

To overcome these threats, you will **acquire and upgrade powerful weapons and mind-bending abilities**. Master Forsaken's unique drift mechanic and unlock devastating powers such as extra-sensory perception, teleportation, and telekinesis. The ability to **combine these powers** is key to becoming an unstoppable force. As the game's creative director stated, "We wanted to give players a deep and satisfying combat system that rewards experimentation and skill." All of this unfolds within a **stunning sci-fi world**, a dark and mysterious universe brought to life with breathtaking next-gen visuals in 4K.

**Sable: A Journey of Self-Discovery in a Vast Desert World**

Embark on an unforgettable journey with Sable, a young woman undertaking her Gliding. This rite of passage will lead her across vast deserts and mesmerizing landscapes. She'll explore the remnants of spaceships and ancient wonders.

**Explore the Open World**

Traverse the dunes on your hoverbike. Scale monumental ruins and encounter other nomads. Unearth long-forgotten mysteries. Discover Sable's true identity beyond her mask. The world is rich with remnants of past civilizations, waiting to be explored.

**Master Movement and Customization**

Climb, leap, hover, and glide. Use every ability at your disposal to discover every inch of the world. Customize your hoverbike by finding or earning new parts.

**Connect with Others and Collectibles**

Help other clans and nomads you meet on your travels. Lose yourself in the adventure and find yourself through masks, outfits, and other collectibles. These items allow you to express who you are to those around you.

**Forge Your Path**

Complete puzzles to earn rewards. Forge your path through unforgiving terrain. Sable's unique art style and original soundtrack by Japanese Breakfast create an immersive experience. Explore everything at your own pace. There is much to discover. Take the leap.

## Star Conflict: Dominate the Cosmos in Epic Space Warfare

**Star Conflict** is a thrilling, massively multiplayer space combat game where you step into the boots of an elite pilot embroiled in a vast interplanetary conflict. This immersive experience offers **intense Player versus Player (PVP) battles** and **cooperative Player versus Environment (PVE) missions** across a multitude of breathtaking space locations.

Dive into **diverse combat scenarios**, from **dogfights against other players** in dozens of unique arenas to challenging PVE quests designed for both solo adventurers and coordinated squadrons. Beyond structured combat, Star Conflict features a **dynamic sandbox mode** that fuels emergent gameplay and player-driven conflicts. You can also **form or join corporations** to engage in large-scale territorial wars, adding a deep strategic layer to the interstellar struggle.

Your arsenal is vast, featuring **over a hundred distinct ships**, each with unique roles and capabilities. From nimble scouts to formidable frigates, your fleet awaits. With **nine tactical roles**, hundreds of modules, and extensive customization options, you can **tailor every vessel to your playstyle**. The ability to **craft modules and ships** further enhances this deep personalization.

Venture into **invaded space colonies** overrun by an ancient alien race. Embark on quests, gather valuable loot, and craft essential upgrades. You'll encounter other pilots, offering opportunities to **forge alliances**, team up against pirates, or confront the menacing alien threat. Each ship can be adapted for various missions, whether it's **reconnaissance, stealthy ambushes, or crucial support**. An impressive array of weapons and gadgets, combined with your crafting prowess, empowers you to **execute your chosen tactics effectively**.

**Forge powerful alliances** with friends to create formidable squadrons and participate in thrilling PVP and PVE engagements. Establish your own corporation and **vie for control of territories**, aiming to leave your mark on the universe's history. **Continuously develop your skills**, establish specialized abilities, and refine your combat tactics. Whether you prefer a **direct assault, stealthy long-range engagements, or a surprise attack**, the ultimate strategy is yours to command.

The galaxy is a fractured landscape, divided between militant star empires and independent mercenary factions. In a desolate corner known as **Sector 1337**, lies the "area of the dead"—a world left behind where the remnants of a once-great alien civilization have been discovered. Vast factories and sprawling cities now lie in decay, and the debris of colossal ship battles litter the landscape. A mysterious Cataclysm eradicated all life within its reach, yet humanity presses onward. Mercenaries and adventurers are drawn to Sector 1337, eager to scavenge its ruins and claim abandoned artifacts, often disregarding the inherent dangers. Those who return speak of unprecedented riches, drawing more looters to the sector, leading to **fierce battles to secure lost alien treasures**.

Space Pirates and Zombies (SPAZ) is a top-down space combat game that emphasizes action and skill. It offers a familiar experience to classic games but elevates it with full physics simulation and modern graphics, creating spectacular explosions. However, SPAZ offers much more than just combat. Players command an expanding and evolving fleet, unlocking deep tactical elements accessible instantly. You can issue orders, switch ships, and adjust fleet AI settings on the fly. The game's Tactics Panel provides the tools to adapt to changing battles and turn the tide in your favor.

Beyond the action and tactics, SPAZ incorporates a detailed technology and level-up system, reminiscent of RPGs. Players can research and build new ships by defeating enemies. Exploring the galaxy yields components, and research points can be used to unlock their potential, allowing for extensive fleet customization. The game's universe is a persistent, randomly generated galaxy filled with story elements, factions, enemies, missions, and items, ensuring a unique experience with every playthrough. Amidst the struggle for survival, players will uncover the mystery of a spreading Zombie infestation that operates with its own real-time, multi-tiered ecosystem.

Key features include:

*   **33 ships** to research, build, outfit, and pilot.
*   **70 unique components** to discover and customize your fleet's performance.
*   A **fully physics-based combat system**.
*   Battles against **Zombie infestations**, featuring a full zombie ecosystem with four distinct stages of un-life.
*   Exploration of a **persistent, randomly generated galaxy** with hundreds of star systems.
*   The **freedom to explore** and tackle challenges at your own pace.
*   The ability to **aid, flee, or exploit warring factions** within each star system.
*   A unique **event system** that allows players to influence the balance of power in any star system.
*   Hundreds of upgrades across **15 categories**, requiring careful spending of research points.

Starpoint Gemini Warlords is a captivating space simulation game that seamlessly blends role-playing and strategy elements. In this expansive universe, you have the ultimate choice: command your mighty war fleets from afar or take direct control of your ship to showcase your combat prowess. As the Warlord, you can pilot your vessel, aiming and firing manually, or delegate tasks to your gunners while you unleash unique skills. Gather your trusted companions to join you in battle, and when the need arises, call upon your fleets to participate in glorious combat.

Battles within Starpoint Gemini Warlords are incredibly diverse, ranging from intense one-on-one duels and small skirmishes to massive fleet engagements unfolding in the orbits of distant planets. You'll construct ships and assemble formidable war fleets to challenge the various war-mongering factions scattered across the Gemini system. However, strategic awareness is paramount; a seemingly outmatched fleet might be bolstered by "warmasters"—highly trained specialists capable of turning the tide of battle. Fortunately, you can direct your fleets to follow you, leading them personally to victory.

Enhance your headquarters by adding modules to unlock advanced weaponry and upgrades. Develop new ships, including the colossal station-sized Proxima, and construct new structures to activate bonuses that benefit your entire territory. As the leader of your people, a powerful stronghold is essential. Expand your territory to spread your influence and bolster your resources, but be cautious not to overextend your defenses, leaving yourself vulnerable to enemy opportunism. Fortify and improve your territories by building crucial resource and defense structures. Expanding the T-Gate network will significantly speed up your fleets' travel across your growing empire, where timely arrivals can be decisive.

Your journey begins with a small, agile gunship, and you'll progress to commanding massive carrier-class vessels capable of deploying numerous fighter wings. Customize your chosen ship with a vast array of weapons and enhancements, and even personalize its appearance to create your perfect vessel.

**Key Features:**

*   **Massive Game World:** Explore a vast universe populated by over 60 diverse factions, all ready to clash with your war fleets.
*   **Campaign Mode:** Immerse yourself in the story of the "exiles," who sought refuge on the barren planet of Phaeneros on the outskirts of Gemini after escaping an alien invasion of the Sol system.
*   **Free Roam Scenarios:** Engage in five distinct free roam scenarios, each offering a unique starting setup.
*   **Extensive Ship Selection:** Choose from nearly 90 different ships, including nimble gunships, agile corvettes, and imposing carriers.
*   **Personal Headquarters:** Construct and upgrade your own headquarters to enhance your economic and military capabilities.
*   **Procedural Content:** Take on procedurally generated freelance jobs to earn Credits for ship upgrades, and be prepared for unexpected encounters through procedurally generated events.
*   **Character Classes:** Select from three unique character classes or create your own hybrid class.
*   **Technological Advancement:** Conduct research on a multitude of technologies that impact everything from your personal ship to the broader galactic landscape.
*   **Conquest and Dominion:** Construct ships, assemble war fleets, and dispatch them across the system to conquer territories for the glory of the Solari Concord.
*   **Infrastructure Development:** Build and upgrade infrastructure throughout the star system to improve resource gathering and solidify your dominion.
*   **Diplomacy and Trade:** Engage in diplomatic relations and sign trade deals to gain crucial advantages.
*   **Enhanced Mod Support:** Experience significantly improved mod support compared to its predecessor, Starpoint Gemini 2.

For more detailed information, consult the official Starpoint Gemini Wiki on Gamepedia.

Gratuitous Space Battles (GSB) offers a unique take on sci-fi strategy by focusing entirely on massive, unprovoked space combat. It strips away common genre elements like intricate backstories, complex resource management, and time-consuming diplomacy. Instead, players are immediately immersed in the thrill of enormous fleets clashing in spectacular, unprompted battles. GSB skillfully merges the visual grandeur of a Real-Time Strategy (RTS) game with the strategic unit placement and design elements characteristic of tower defense titles.

In GSB, direct control of individual ships during combat is absent. Your fleet operates based on pre-programmed orders and formations that you meticulously craft before the battle commences. As the ultimate space commander, your responsibilities include designing individual starships, organizing your fleet, and issuing overarching engagement directives. This is not a game that relies on rapid reflexes; it's a strategic experience that emphasizes careful thought, meticulous planning, and a comprehensive grasp of the battlefield. As one player aptly described it, "The sheer scale of the battles is breathtaking, and the strategic depth is surprisingly profound."

Success in these immense space engagements depends on your adeptness at balancing defensive strategies, such as shields and armor, with powerful offensive armaments like laser cannons and plasma torpedoes. GSB also features an innovative multiplayer challenge system. You have the option to upload your most powerful fleet to serve as an AI opponent for other players, and then observe how they fare against your creation. This system guarantees a continuous stream of ingeniously designed adversaries, providing a constant test of your strategic acumen.

The game provides:
*   Four distinct player races that can be unlocked.
*   A selection of over 40 unique ship hulls for players to utilize.
*   More than 120 spaceship modules available for extensive customization.
*   Several gameplay modes, including skirmishes against AI opponents, an unending survival mode, and the opportunity to face off against other players' fleets through the online challenge system.
*   Diverse gameplay scenarios, as each battle introduces unique spatial anomalies that modify the engagement rules.

In the vast universe of Darkstar One, players have significant freedom to forge their own path. The game's story progresses through missions that lead you across the galaxy, introducing you to various alien races, advanced technologies, and tougher enemies.

Your adventure will take you to many solar systems to find ancient artifacts. These relics are key to upgrading your ship, the Darkstar One. You'll also need to earn credits to buy better gear, like powerful weapons and strong shields. Credits can be earned in many ways, such as finishing missions, hunting bounties, pirating, smuggling, trading, providing escorts, fulfilling transport jobs, and collecting rewards.

The game features a large, simulated galaxy with many alien species, unique ship designs, and different combat tactics. A deep story is told through over fifty minutes of video cutscenes. Players can customize and improve the Darkstar One to fit their playstyle. You could build a fast attacker with light weapons or a tough cruiser with heavy firepower.

The game offers over two hundred weapons, shields, and equipment items. Rockets, torpedoes, and mines have special uses; for example, mines can be used to attack enemies or block missiles. A standout feature is the 'Spell Weapon,' which acts like magic from role-playing games. This weapon becomes more powerful as you play, giving you more tactical options.

You can also get and use special weapons from alien races, each with unique abilities that require different fighting styles. Darkstar One also includes special missions where you explore interesting places like canyons or underground alien environments. Your choices also affect your reputation; you can be a hero or a villain, and even use political conflicts to your advantage.

Name: Grand Theft Auto: Vice City
Description:
Welcome to Vice City. Welcome to the 1980s. From the decade of big hair, excess and pastel suits comes a story of one man's rise to the top of the criminal pile. Vice City, a huge urban sprawl ranging from the beach to the swamps and the glitz to the ghetto, was one of the most varied, complete and alive digital cities ever created. Combining open-world gameplay with a character driven narrative, you arrive in a town brimming with delights and degradation and given the opportunity to take it over as you choose. Having just made it back onto the streets of Liberty City after a long stretch in maximum security, Tommy Vercetti is sent to Vice City by his old boss, Sonny Forelli. They were understandably nervous about his re-appearance in Liberty City, so a trip down south seemed like a good idea. But all does not go smoothly upon his arrival in the glamorous, hedonistic metropolis of Vice City. He's set up and is left with no money and no merchandise. Sonny wants his money back, but the biker gangs, Cuban gangsters, and corrupt politicians stand in his way. Most of Vice City seems to want Tommy dead. His only answer is to fight back and take over the city himself.

Name: The Making of Karateka
Description:
Prince of Persia creator Jordan Mechner was a college student when he created one of the biggest-selling games of 1984: Karateka. Now, in a new interactive documentary from Digital Eclipse, the story of how a teenager with an Apple II created one of the most groundbreaking, influential games of all time. THE ORIGIN STORY OF A LEGENDARY GAME CREATOR Discover how Karateka was made through an exhaustive archive of design documents, playable prototypes, and all-new video features. Like walking through a museum, you can explore the interactive timelines at your own pace. PLAY THE ACCLAIMED ORIGINALS Enjoy pixel-perfect versions of the original Karateka games and a variety of never-before-seen early prototypes, with rich quality-of-life features like save anywhere, rewind, chapter select, and director's commentary. TWO REMASTERED GAMES Karateka Remastered is an all-new version of the original game featuring cutting-room-floor content, commentary, achievements, and more. Deathbounce: Rebounded is a fast and frantic twin-stick shooter based on Jordan's unpublished prototype. A GROUNDBREAKING MASTERPIECE Discover how Karateka became one of the first games to include cinematic scenes, a moving original soundtrack, rotoscoped animation, and a Hollywood-style love story, influencing the decades of games that followed. THE GOLD MASTER SERIES New from Digital Eclipse (Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Cowabunga Collection, Atari 50: The Anniversary Celebration), the Gold Master Series presents iconic games in an innovative 'interactive documentary' format, putting the shared history of games and their creators into one comprehensive package.

Pinball FX3 delivers a massive, community-powered pinball adventure, featuring beloved Williams™ tables for players everywhere. To celebrate its launch, the Fish Tales™ table is completely free. Zen Studios is committed to creating a dynamic platform for pinball fans, encouraging competition with multiplayer battles, player-created tournaments, and organized league play.

A significant aspect of Pinball FX3 is its dedication to valuing player loyalty. The game provides free backwards compatibility, letting you bring your existing Pinball FX2 purchases into the new experience at no extra charge. For players eager to sharpen their abilities, Pinball FX3 introduces new single-player modes aimed at enhancing gameplay. Additionally, all tables have received substantial graphical upgrades, incorporating real-time lighting and shadow effects. Zen Studios intends to continuously support Pinball FX3 with frequent content additions and new features, guaranteeing an ever-changing and thrilling pinball world. As one developer stated, "We wanted to ensure that our dedicated players felt rewarded for their past investment in the Pinball FX universe." This commitment extends to the visual presentation, with another source noting, "The new lighting engine truly brings the tables to life, offering a more immersive experience than ever before."

Counter-Strike is the world's leading online action game, offering an intensely realistic experience in team-based terrorist warfare. Players ally with teammates to achieve strategic objectives, such as neutralizing enemy positions or rescuing hostages. Success hinges on individual performance, as "your role affects your team's success," and conversely, "your team's success affects your role," according to the game's developers. This dynamic interplay makes every match a test of coordination and skill.

**The Gallery: Heart of the Emberstone - A Groundbreaking VR Sci-Fi Adventure**

Explore a revolutionary virtual reality science fiction story with *The Gallery: Heart of the Emberstone*. This acclaimed VR series, which has won over 30 awards including 'VR Game of the Year', was a pioneer in roomscale movement and interaction. This top-tier puzzle exploration game draws inspiration from dark 1980s fantasy adventure films, immersing you in a world filled with mystery and discovery.

In *Heart of the Emberstone*, your journey takes you to the planet Ember, in search of your sister, Elsie. There, you will uncover the remnants of a civilization shattered by a conflict between two siblings. You will also meet a giant ally on a mission to find their missing partner. Your main goal is to use the Gauntlet, a tool that can control energy, to reconstruct the history of this lost world and reveal the real intentions of the mysterious figure who brought you there. This eagerly awaited sequel builds upon the original VR adventure, continuing your grand quest through the Starseed to the far-off planet of Ember.

Key elements of the game include uncovering a dark history inspired by classic 80s fantasy, skillfully using the telekinetic Gauntlet, and solving puzzles crafted for VR's physical interaction and precise hand tracking. Players will encounter a massive ally and strange alien beings in impressive roomscale settings. These are enhanced by immersive spatial audio and a new score from award-winning composer Jeremy Soule. The game provides many hours of play within a carefully built fantasy realm, featuring experimental movement options for a personalized VR experience. As one critic noted, "The Gallery truly sets a new standard for VR storytelling."

Available for Arcades on SpringboardVR.

**Hotline Miami: A Brutal Descent into 1989 Miami's Underworld**

Hotline Miami is a fast-paced action game known for its intense violence, gunplay, and close-quarters combat. The game is set in an alternate 1989 Miami. You play as a mysterious antihero carrying out a violent spree against the criminal underworld. These missions are prompted by cryptic messages on your answering machine.
