As the story unfolds, you'll struggle to understand the events and your own violent tendencies. You must use your intelligence to navigate challenging scenarios. Enemies will constantly outnumber you. The action is relentless, and every bullet is fatal. Quick, decisive movements are essential for survival and uncovering the dark forces behind the bloodshed.

Hotline Miami features a distinctive visual style, a captivating soundtrack, and a surreal narrative. These elements will make you question your own enjoyment of the violence. The game offers a brutally challenging experience that pushes players to their limits.

**HUNTDOWN: Become the Ultimate Bounty Hunter in a Lawless Future**

In a future where criminal gangs rule the streets and law enforcement is overwhelmed, **bounty hunters** are the only ones who can bring back order. **HUNTDOWN** plunges you into a hard-boiled action-comedy arcade shooter. Your mission: dismantle the criminal underworld and get rich doing it.

**Experience Kick-Ass Co-Op, Near and Far**

Team up with a friend to tackle the chaos. Whether you're in the same room or miles apart, you can **run, jump, and take cover** together. Enjoy **couch co-op** or use **Steam Remote Play** to cause mayhem as a duo.

**New Action-Packed Arcade Mode**

Test your skills against players worldwide in a **brutal battle** to climb the leaderboards. Discover new ways to defeat enemies and earn points. Use **combo-kills**, **quickdraw weapon-swap bonuses**, or even **hurl criminals off rooftops**. It's a **nail-biting race against the clock** to collect bounties and prove you're the **apex bounty hunter**.

**Play as Three Legendary Bounty Hunters**

*   **Anna Conda:** An ex-commando and firearms expert, Anna is a **loose-cannon** who eliminates targets without question, regardless of collateral damage. As one developer noted, "Anna is all about getting the job done, no matter the mess."
*   **John Sawyer:** A former Special Forces cop, this **scarred veteran** has lost so many limbs he's practically half robot.
*   **Mow Man:** A modified recon droid empowered with banned software, Mow Man **trades bodies for cold, hard cash**. "Don't expect to survive if Mow Man is on your tail," warns the game's description.

**Old School Charm, Modernized Gameplay**

**HUNTDOWN** features **hand-painted 16-bit pixel art graphics** and hand-drawn animations. This classic look is paired with **fluid 60-FPS gameplay** and an **epic synthesized soundtrack**, creating a unique retro-futuristic experience.

**Explore 20 Levels Across Gritty Cityscapes**

Venture through **gritty, neon-soaked, graffiti-strewn 80s cityscapes**. Each level offers a new challenge, featuring an **infamous gang boss to terminate** and a bounty to collect.

**Dismantle Four Unique Gangs**

*   **Hoodlum Dolls:** These **violent feral punks** are winning the gang war against toothless authorities.
*   **Misconducts:** **Organized hockey hooligans** specializing in robbery and extortion, with a dangerous penchant for explosives.
*   **The Heatseekers:** A **murderous motorcycle club** whose rockabilly villains style themselves after Ancient Roman centurions.
*   **NO.1 Suspects:** **Masters of discipline and organized crime**, these martial arts experts control the night through their casinos and nightclubs.

**Choose Your Weapon and Unleash Havoc**

Confiscate a variety of weapons, including **machine guns, laser weapons, katanas, and grenades**, and turn them against their former owners. **Stab, shoot, and explode** your way through hordes of gangs and bosses to collect your bounty.

The **Mega Man Legacy Collection** is the ultimate way to dive into the **classic 8-bit adventures** of Capcom's famous Blue Bomber. This collection brings back the **first six Mega Man games**, offering a nostalgic trip for long-time fans and a perfect starting point for new players. It truly shows why Mega Man is an **enduring video game icon**.

More than just the original games, the Mega Man Legacy Collection adds **exciting new features**. The **Challenge Mode** is a highlight, mixing gameplay from all six titles. This mode has different difficulty levels, with **tough goals** for experienced players and great practice for beginners. The **Museum Mode** is also a fan's dream. Here, you can **discover Mega Man's deep history**, with high-quality art, early designs, and lots of historical facts. It's a must-have for anyone who loves Mega Man or video game history.

As one reviewer noted, the collection "faithfully resurrects the first six Mega Man games," providing a "deeply nostalgic journey." Another expert praised the **Challenge Mode**, calling it an "excellent training ground for newcomers."

Key features of the Mega Man Legacy Collection include:

*   **Six Classic Games:** Play the original games that started a legendary series.
*   **Retro Look, HD Quality:** Enjoy the classic 8-bit style with sharp, clear HD graphics.
*   **Fun Challenge Mode:** Conquer remixed gameplay challenges for all skill levels.
*   **Big Museum:** Explore the series' creation with art, concept sketches, and history.
*   **New Eclipse Engine:** The games are rebuilt with the modern Eclipse Engine for an authentic feel.
*   **Leaderboards and Replays:** See how top players beat challenges and share your own skills.

**Darwinia: A Retro-Inspired Indie Classic Reimagined**

Experience **Darwinia**, a unique blend of **fast-paced action** and **strategic battle planning**. This game stands out with its **novel and intuitive control mechanism**. Its distinctive graphical style is a direct homage to **80s retro classics** like Tron and Defender. The narrative centers on a tribe of nomadic sprites trapped within a modern 3D world.

Originally released, Darwinia has been **fully re-mastered in 2022** to commemorate its 10,000th anniversary. This updated version ensures the **undisputed indie classic** is brought bang up to date. It now runs **seamlessly on all modern systems**, proving the game has not aged. Darwinia remains as **fresh and relevant today** as it was upon its initial release.

The game's critical acclaim is undeniable. Darwinia **won 3 out of 5 prizes at the IGF**, including the prestigious **Seamus McNally Grand Prize for Best Independent Video Game**. It also garnered **multiple editor's choice awards**. Now is the perfect time to play one of the **most critically acclaimed indie games of all time**.

**TRY THE LATEST GAME FROM INTROVERSION SOFTWARE.**

In Astalon: Tears of the Earth, players are thrust into a post-apocalyptic desert where three heroes embark on a critical mission to save their village. Their journey leads them to a mysterious tower that has risen from the earth, holding the key to their survival. To aid their quest, one hero has made a pact with Epimetheus, the Titan of Death, granting them the power to reincarnate until their mission is complete. This unique mechanic is central to the game's narrative and gameplay.

Death is not an end in Astalon: Tears of the Earth, but a path to victory in this action-platformer set in a dying world. Players will use the distinct skills of Arias the fighter, Kyuli the rogue, and Algus the wizard to conquer the tower and uncover its secrets. The game's premise involves battling monsters, finding powerful artifacts, and solving puzzles as you ascend the tower with the Titan's help. The story highlights friendship and sacrifice, urging players to find courage and face challenges to protect the vulnerable. By embracing reincarnation, players can strengthen their party and change their destiny. The game encourages exploration of the Tower of Serpents' many secrets.

Astalon: Tears of the Earth aims to capture the feel of 8-bit action-adventure games with its detailed pixel art and dark, fantastical setting. It combines progressive exploration of an interconnected world with fast-paced, room-by-room platforming. The original character designs are by Ryusuke Mita, known for the manga Dragon Half. Players can choose their preferred playstyle, whether it's deep exploration and character development or a faster, more aggressive approach to climbing the tower.

Gameplay allows players to switch between the three heroes, using their unique abilities—warrior, archer, and wizard—to overcome challenges. A variety of enemies, including large monsters and bosses, await. Players must strategically select the right hero to exploit enemy weaknesses. Character abilities can be upgraded, and destiny can be altered through pacts with Epimetheus. Discovering artifacts, like the "Sword of Mirrors," grants new powers and opens up new possibilities. Campfires act as save points, where players can switch characters and learn more about their backstories. With hundreds of rooms to explore, the game offers hours of challenging gameplay, filled with unlockables and secrets. The experience is further enhanced by an exciting chiptune soundtrack by Matt Kap, featuring over 30 original tracks.

Name: Mini Motorways
Description:
Have you ever been stuck in traffic and wished you could do something to fix it? In Mini Motorways, the city’s traffic problems are in your hands. From the makers of Mini Metro, Mini Motorways is a game about drawing the roads that drive a growing city. Build a road network, one road at a time, to create a bustling metropolis. Redesign your city to keep the traffic flowing, and carefully manage upgrades to meet the changing demands. How long can you keep the cities of the world moving? Key Features Draw roads in dynamic cities that grow and change - every game is unique! Explore stunning maps inspired by cities all around the world. Choose from a variety of upgrades to meet the demands of your ever-expanding road network: highways, roundabouts, and more! Select different colour palettes on every map including colourblind and night modes. Relax to a responsive soundtrack from Disasterpeace that grows along with your city. Unlock new maps and achievements as you achieve mastery Export GIFs of your city layouts to share with your friends. Compete against other players in Daily and Weekly Challenges.

In Euro Truck Simulator 2, you can become the ultimate **king of the road** by delivering vital cargo across expansive European landscapes. This simulation challenges your **endurance, skill, and speed** as you traverse dozens of cities throughout the UK, Belgium, Germany, Italy, the Netherlands, Poland, and beyond. If you have the ambition to join an **elite trucking force**, it's time to get behind the wheel and demonstrate your capabilities.

Euro Truck Simulator 2 offers a deeply immersive trucking simulation, packed with features designed to engage and challenge players. You'll be responsible for transporting a **vast variety of cargo** to over 60 European cities, all while diligently building and expanding your own **successful trucking business**. This involves growing your fleet by acquiring new trucks, purchasing garages, and strategically hiring skilled drivers to optimize your company's profitability. The game also provides extensive customization for your vehicles. You can fine-tune your trucks with a **varied amount of tuning**, encompassing both performance enhancements and aesthetic modifications. Further personalize your vehicles with optional accessories such as lights, bars, horns, beacons, and unique smoke exhausts, enabling you to craft a truly **one-of-a-kind rig**. Explore thousands of miles of **real road networks**, featuring hundreds of iconic landmarks and structures that vividly bring the European continent to life.

To further enrich your Euro Truck Simulator 2 experience, consider joining the **World of Trucks** online community. This central platform connects virtual truckers globally, offering supplementary features and a space to share your enthusiasm for the game and future SCS Software titles. The **in-game Photo Mode** allows you to capture and share your most memorable moments with a worldwide audience. You can bookmark and revisit images you appreciate, and participate in discussions about screenshots with fellow enthusiasts. Keep an eye out for the **Editor's Pick**, which highlights exceptional images curated by the game creators almost daily, and aim to have your own screenshot featured! Additionally, you can upload and utilize a **custom avatar and license plate** within the game. More exciting features are anticipated for the future. Joining World of Trucks is straightforward: simply sign up using your Steam account. It's important to note that World of Trucks is an **optional service**, and registration is not a prerequisite for enjoying the core gameplay of Euro Truck Simulator 2.

As one player described the experience, "The sheer scale of the world and the detailed realism make you feel like you're truly behind the wheel of a massive truck." Another enthusiast noted, "Building my own trucking empire from scratch is incredibly rewarding, and the customization options let me make my trucks truly my own." The game's developers at SCS Software emphasize the importance of community, stating, "World of Trucks is designed to be a hub for players to connect and share their passion for trucking simulation."

**RAILGRADE: Build Your Industrial Empire**

RAILGRADE challenges you to construct intricate railway networks, harnessing the power of trains to link essential industries with the resources they desperately need. This engaging simulation game puts you in charge of managing inputs and outputs to optimize production and forge efficient supply chains. You'll utilize multi-level tracks and a diverse array of unique engine types to achieve your goals.

As one player noted, "The depth of customization for trains is impressive, allowing for hundreds of unique engine and cargo combinations." This allows you to tailor your fleet precisely to the demands of your burgeoning colony. The game emphasizes creating efficient supply chains by strategically connecting industrial sources and deploying dozens of busy trains across the map. Success hinges on a blend of sharp strategic decision-making and creative construction, all aimed at rebuilding a thriving industrial colony. "The goal is to impress your corporate overlords enough to earn your way back home to Earth," explains a developer.

RAILGRADE features a compelling single-player campaign with over 50 missions, tasking you with restoring prosperity to a struggling industrial colony. As you complete missions, you'll earn tokens that can be spent to unlock new industries, valuable upgrades, and exciting new options. The game boasts effortless construction tools, enabling you to instantly build and manage a bustling railway network teeming with trains.

Optimizing your train setup and strategically placing tracks are crucial for navigating challenging environmental terrain and establishing the most effective delivery routes. You'll need to carefully control the flow of resource production by managing inputs and outputs, actively watching for bottlenecks to ensure your trains and their precious cargo keep moving smoothly. For those who appreciate the visual spectacle, a cinematic view mode allows you to admire your impressive fleet of trains.

Beyond the main campaign, bonus side missions offer additional challenges. You might find yourself exploring arid deserts in search of vital oil supplies or developing an ambitious rocket launch program. To showcase your most impressive railway creations, a photo mode provides a variety of filters and visual options. Furthermore, you can invest in the growth of your cities or utilize zeppelins to export goods for extra profit, adding another layer of economic strategy to the game.

In **Mini Metro**, you are tasked with designing a subway layout for a rapidly expanding city. You begin with three stations and must draw efficient subway lines to connect them, allowing commuters to navigate the city swiftly.

However, each station has a limited waiting capacity. This means your subway network must be meticulously designed to prevent delays. As the city grows, more stations open, and commuters appear at an accelerated rate, increasing demands on your network. This requires constant redesigning of your lines for maximum efficiency. New assets acquired weekly can be immensely helpful if utilized wisely. Ultimately, your network will face challenges: stations may open too quickly, and platforms will become crowded. The longevity of the city's transit system rests entirely on your strategic decisions.

**Key Features of Mini Metro:**

*   **Compelling Gameplay:** Experience a unique blend of hectic and relaxed gameplay that is both constructive and engaging.
*   **Diverse Game Modes:** Choose from **Normal** for quick, scored games; **Endless** for a stress-free sandbox experience; and **Extreme** for the ultimate challenge.
*   **Creative Mode:** Design your metro system precisely to your vision with the all-new **Creative mode**.
*   **Global Cities:** Plan and build subways for over two dozen real-world cities, including **London, Paris, New York City, Osaka, Saint Petersburg, São Paulo, Istanbul, and Auckland**. Each city offers a distinct color theme, unique obstacles, and a specific pace.
*   **Dynamic City Growth:** Enjoy a different gameplay experience every time thanks to **random city growth**. Strategies successful in one game may not be effective in the next.
*   **Artistic Design:** Each game's map becomes a work of art, constructed by you in the classic abstract subway style reminiscent of Harry Beck. You can **save, share, or use your creations** as desktop backgrounds.
*   **Responsive Soundtrack:** Immerse yourself in a soundtrack by Disasterpeace that is dynamically generated by your metro system's activity.
*   **Accessibility Options:** Benefit from **colorblind and night modes**.
*   **Trains!** These essential vehicles are central to the gameplay experience.
*   **Steam Workshop:** Explore a vast library of **player-created maps** for endless variety.

**More from Dinosaur Polo Club:**

Discover more from the developers on social media platforms like **Facebook and Twitter**. If you enjoyed **Mini Metro**, consider exploring their highway-planning follow-up, **Mini Motorways**.

**IGN Review Snippet:**

As IGN noted, "Mini Metro’s clean, stylish interface encourages me over and over again to make the trains run on time, and there’s a deeper amount of strategy to growing a sprawling metro system than meets the eye." The review further states, "I wasn’t just hypnotized by the rhythmic movement of trains from station to station, I was completely absorbed in making them perfect."

**Demo Available:**

You can **try Mini Metro for yourself** by playing a game on the London map in the available demo.

## Embark on an Epic American Trucking Adventure

**American Truck Simulator** invites you to experience the thrill of driving legendary American trucks and delivering a diverse range of cargoes across the iconic landscapes of sunny California, the arid expanses of Nevada, and the majestic Grand Canyon State of Arizona. This immersive simulation game transports you on a captivating journey, showcasing breathtaking scenery and widely recognized landmarks throughout the United States. Building upon the highly successful mechanics of Euro Truck Simulator 2, American Truck Simulator introduces expanded features to deliver the most engaging gaming experience yet from SCS Software.

### Your Journey from Driver to Tycoon

In American Truck Simulator, you begin as a driver for hire, entering the competitive local freight market. Your ultimate goal is to work your way up, becoming a successful owner-operator and eventually establishing one of the largest and most prosperous transportation companies in the entire United States.

### Features That Define the Experience

#### Authentic Trucking Realism

*   **Officially Licensed Trucks:** Drive highly detailed truck models, officially licensed from iconic manufacturers, offering an unparalleled sense of authenticity.
*   **Your Truck, Your Sanctuary:** Your truck becomes your new home. Personalize it extensively by customizing cabins, chassis, paint jobs, and by adding powerful engines or a wide array of tuning accessories.

#### Diverse Cargo and Challenging Hauls

*   **Varied Cargo Selection:** Transport a vast array of cargoes, from essential food supplies and heavy machinery to hazardous materials, each presenting unique challenges.
*   **Multiple Trailer Types:** Master the art of hauling with various trailer types, including reefers, flatbeds, dumpers, lowboys, and goosenecks.
*   **The Ultimate Test:** The longest trailers, extending up to 53 feet, will truly test your driving skills and patience during both hauling and intricate parking maneuvers.

#### Immersive Environments and Locations

*   **Deliver to Iconic Destinations:** Deliver your valuable cargoes to a rich variety of companies and locations, including bustling refineries, expansive oil storage facilities, busy gas stations, advanced car factories, and active roadworks sites.

#### Advanced Simulation Settings

*   **True-to-Life Mechanics:** Experience a deep level of simulation with features like air brake simulation, multiple brake types (retarder, Jake brake, trailer brake), and various transmission options directly inspired by real trucks. Fine-tune brake intensity and other parameters for ultimate control.
*   **In-Cabin Immersion:** Get a true feel for being inside a real truck cabin. Adjust your seat, mirrors, and position your head to achieve the optimal view of the road ahead.

### Navigating the Road and the Law

*   **Drive Safely and Legally:** Adhere to traffic rules and speed limits diligently. Failure to do so will result in fines from the police.
*   **Weight Restrictions:** Ensure your cargo is not overweight, as you may be subject to checks at weigh scales.
*   **Your Trusted Co-Pilot:** Utilize the route adviser, your personal assistant, to guide you seamlessly through your travels.

### Building Your Transportation Empire

*   **From Driver to Owner:** Embrace the life of a truck driver for hire. By safely delivering cargoes and continuously improving your skills, you can become the proud owner of your own successful company.
*   **Expand Your Fleet:** Build your dream fleet of trucks, acquire garages, hire skilled drivers, and meticulously manage your company operations to maximize profits.

### Enhancing Your Trucking Experience

*   **Personalized Entertainment:** Make your trucking time more enjoyable by listening to your favorite songs via the built-in music player or streaming your preferred radio stations.
*   **Capture Your Best Moments:** Preserve your favorite trucking moments with the integrated photo mode, offering a comprehensive suite of editing options.
*   **Superior Input Support:** Enjoy excellent support for steering wheels, gamepads, and a wide range of other input devices for a truly personalized control experience.
*   **Ongoing Development:** Benefit from long-term support for the game, with continuous updates introducing new features and improvements.
*   **Achievement Hunter:** Earn challenging Steam achievements and collect all the beautifully hand-painted Steam trading cards.

## Join the World of Trucks Community

**World of Trucks** offers additional features and a vibrant online community for virtual truckers worldwide who are passionate about American Truck Simulator, Euro Truck Simulator 2, and future SCS Software truck simulators.

### Share Your Trucking Journey

*   **Capture and Share:** Utilize the in-game Photo Mode to capture your most memorable trucking moments and share them with thousands of fellow truck enthusiasts.
*   **Curate Your Favorites:** Favorite the images you admire most and revisit them anytime. Engage in discussions about screenshots with the World of Trucks community.
*   **Editor's Pick:** Aspire to have your own screenshot featured in the Editor's Pick section, curated by the game creators and updated almost daily.
*   **Personalize Your Profile:** Upload and use your custom avatar and license plate within the game. More exciting features are planned for the future!

### Getting Started with World of Trucks

To join World of Trucks, simply sign up using your Steam account on the join page. Owning either American Truck Simulator or Euro Truck Simulator 2 is required to participate. Please note that World of Trucks is an optional service, and registration is not mandatory to play the game.

Name: Transport Fever 2
Description:
The classic transport simulation genre has a new gold standard with Transport Fever 2. Discover a whole new world by navigating transport routes through land, water and air. May progress and prosperity find their way! Provide the world with the transport infrastructure it needs and make a fortune with custom-made transport services. Watch your trains run on rails, your buses and trucks thunder along roads, your ships power through the water, and your planes soar through the skies. Carry people on their way to work or play, and be the reason cities grow and thrive. Deliver raw materials and goods to drive the economy. Experience the greatest logistical challenges from 1850 to the present day, and build a transport empire unrivaled anywhere else on the globe! Free play offers a huge range of creative possibilities, while campaign mode re-writes transport history across three continents. Transport Fever 2 offers a choice of over 200 vehicles from Europe, America and Asia, modelled in extreme detail; and with the in-game map editor, you can re-create landscapes from three different climate zones. Finally, the realistic transport and economy simulator, along with comprehensive modding support, round off the gameplay experience. Open Up the World A huge game world is waiting for your railroads, road vehicles, aircraft and ships. Intuitive interactive rail construction tools and a modular construction system for stations make it easy to build and expand your transport empire; and thanks to a wide range of configuration options, every free play game provides a new challenge, where completely different strategies can lead to success. Write Transport History Three historic campaigns set in different time periods and located on three separate continents will challenge you with different objectives …only transport magnates will manage to complete all the missions! Voiceovers and cutscenes enrich the story and contribute to a thrilling gameplay experience, and even the free play mode will challenge you with different achievements to unlock. Optimize the Infrastructure It is vital to adapt your company to the needs of the economy and cities: bridges, tunnels, switches, rail signals, one-way streets, light signals, and bus lanes are just some of the possibilities you can use to optimize the transport infrastructure. Even train stations and airports can be expanded with modules in order to meet different requirements; and various data layers help you visualize traffic volumes and emissions, and provide information for further improvements. Free your Creativity Thanks to the detailed game world, you can develop your very own virtual railroad landscape: the map editor provides the possibility to create countless different worlds; the terrain in the game can be adjusted and painted; and thanks to the extensive modding support, new creations are being developed constantly, which are available for free via the Steam Workshop and which can be easily integrated into the game. Game Features Free play with countless configuration possibilities Three campaigns across three continents with over 20 hours of playing time Editors for creating maps and editing saved games Three landscape types: moderate, dry, and tropical Realistically modelled vehicles from Europe, America and Asia A total of over 200 vehicles: trains, buses, streetcars, trucks, aircraft and ships Modular train stations, bus and truck stations, airports and harbors Realistic transport simulation including one-way streets and light signals Editable and paintable terrain with realistic effects Intuitive construction tools for building railroads and more Display important data such as traffic and emissions, on separate layers Dynamic economy and city simulation More than ten economic chains with associated factories and goods Cities with countless residential, commercial and industrial buildings Detailed game world with physics-based lighting Individually simulated land animals, birds and fish Over 50 challenging achievements in free play mode Extensive modding support via the Steam Workshop

Name: Need for Speed™ Hot Pursuit Remastered
Description:
Feel the thrill of the chase and the rush of escape in Need for Speed Hot Pursuit Remastered on PC. Unleash a savage sense of speed both as an outlaw and a cop in the world's hottest high-performance cars. Outsmart the heat or take down lawbreakers with the tactical weaponry at your disposal in a heart-pumping, socially competitive racing experience. Updated with enhanced visuals, cross-platform multiplayer — including the asynchronous competition powered by Autolog — plus all additional main DLC, this is the ultimate edition of Criterion Games’ critically acclaimed Need for Speed debut. It’s time to reignite the pursuit. Cross-platform Multiplayer and Autolog Bolt down the winding Seacrest County roads headfirst in racing that is socially competitive at its core. The groundbreaking Autolog connects you and your friends in head-to-head pursuits and races and instinctively delivers challenges based on your friends’ activities. This highly dynamic system is fueled by friendly competition and is now supported with cross-platform sync and new multiplayer gameplay so you can race each other no matter what platform you’re on. All Main DLC Included, Plus More Updates Get all the additional main DLC delivered at launch, including an extra 6 hours of gameplay and more than 30 challenges. Brand new achievements, wraps, car colors, reduced hard stops, an updated photo mode and gallery, and multiple quality-of-life updates create an even more well-rounded gameplay experience this time around. Exotic Cars with Weapons Drive the world’s most desirable supercars on both sides of the law. Bust suspects in supercharged cop interceptors enhanced with tactical weaponry, or level the playing field with counterattacks and defensive maneuvers as an elite racer. Strategize to gain an edge over the competition, no matter what side you’re on! Chase and Escape A deep and fully defined single-player career delivers the action of both cops and racers, with a seamlessly linked multiplayer experience across all race modes. Take on friends or play through the career solo to earn Bounty and unlock new cars, weapons, and equipment. Enhanced Visuals Need for Speed Hot Pursuit Remastered delivers a timeless racing experience updated for today’s generation of hardware with enhanced visuals.

## Railway Empire: Forge Your North American Rail Dynasty

**The United States, 1830.** As the New World surges with industrial expansion, a monumental opportunity arises to establish the preeminent rail empire across North America. This is your moment to strategically outmaneuver competitors and guide your burgeoning company through the transformative decades leading into the 20th century.

In **Railway Empire**, your primary objective is to meticulously construct an expansive and sophisticated rail network, a feat made possible by acquiring over 40 intricately detailed train models. To maintain a decisive edge over rivals, you will strategically invest in and develop crucial infrastructure, including railway stations, essential maintenance facilities, vital factories, and even captivating tourist attractions, all designed to bolster your operational efficiency and market appeal.

The success of your rail operations hinges on a proficiently managed workforce and continuous technological advancement. You will be responsible for hiring and overseeing your employees, ensuring their productivity and dedication. Simultaneously, you can unlock and implement over 300 distinct technologies, encompassing a wide spectrum of innovations from mechanical enhancements for your rolling stock to crucial upgrades for workplace infrastructure and the development of advanced amenities, charting a course through five distinct eras of technological progress.

However, the path to dominance is not solely paved with construction and research; the competitive landscape is characterized by relentless rivalry. To truly thrive and ascend to the apex of success, you must skillfully contend with up to three formidable rival tycoons. Achieving ultimate victory may necessitate the adoption of more aggressive tactics, including the strategic deployment of raids and industrial espionage to disrupt and sabotage your opponents' operations, thereby securing your own ascendancy.

STATIONflow turns the chaos of busy public transport into a fun strategy game. You get to build and run your own underground train station, tackling the same problems you face when traveling, like crowded platforms and confusing signs. You'll manage thousands of virtual passengers, guiding them through the station to solve common transit issues.

In STATIONflow, you'll create detailed 3D station designs on a multi-level map. You can place paths and buildings freely, not stuck to a strict grid. A key part of the game is making sure people can move easily between floors by adding stairs, escalators, and elevators. The main goal is to keep things running smoothly, avoid jams, and get passengers to where they need to go quickly. You can change how passengers move by placing signs strategically. Watching how they react helps you learn that the shortest path isn't always the best. It's also important to add things passengers need, like shops, bathrooms, and places to eat, to keep them happy. You'll constantly have to balance your money with passenger satisfaction. Your station's performance will be checked every day. Doing well means more money and building choices. Doing poorly can lead to losing the game. The game also has a community feature through Steam Workshop, where you can share and play maps made by others. You can also pick how hard you want the game to be, from a calm "sandbox" mode to a tough challenge.

Cities in Motion 2 is a compelling mass transit simulation game that challenges players to design, manage, and optimize intricate transportation networks. In this sequel to the beloved Cities in Motion, you'll be tasked with meeting the evolving needs of dynamic urban environments. The game introduces several exciting new features, including engaging multiplayer modes, realistic day and night cycles, intricate timetables, and cities that respond dynamically to your decisions.

The way you construct your transportation system will profoundly influence the city's development. As one player noted, "Affordable transportation options can directly lead to the growth of middle-class housing and employment opportunities." Conversely, "more expensive and exotic transit choices can attract high-end businesses and developments," according to game developers. Players can utilize a diverse fleet of vehicles, such as buses, trams, and ferries, to create efficient and appealing transit systems.

You have the option to embark on this challenge solo or collaborate with a friend in cooperative multiplayer. To enhance traffic flow, the game features newly implemented bus lanes, allowing for the creation of efficient, traffic-free roadways. Successfully navigating the complexities of rush hour requires careful management of transportation timetables and a keen understanding of citizen demands. The game boasts several key features, including dynamic cities where player choices directly impact growth, a day and night cycle, robust timetable management, and multiplayer options that support both cooperative and competitive play, alongside campaign and sandbox modes.

**Company of Heroes: A Groundbreaking WWII Real-Time Strategy Experience**

For more player reviews and details on total conversions for Company of Heroes 1, check out the 'Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition' page on Steam.

**Company of Heroes** offers a powerful World War II gaming experience. It **changed real-time strategy games** by showing the bravery of soldiers, war-torn areas, and lively battlefields. The game starts with the D-Day invasion in Normandy. Here, you command Allied soldiers against the German army through key WWII fights.

**Feel the Chaos of War**

In a detailed single-player story, players get caught up in the **excitement and courage** of regular soldiers facing tough situations. This campaign shows the chaos of WWII in a new way. Smart squad AI makes your soldiers seem real as they react to their surroundings, find cover, and use **smart team moves** to defeat enemies.

**Amazing Graphics and Smart Battlefield Tactics**

Using Relic's advanced engine, Company of Heroes has **beautiful graphics and a world that reacts to physics**, which was new for RTS games. The **real-time physics and fully destructible settings** mean every battle is different. Players can **destroy anything and change the battlefield**, using buildings and land to help themselves or stop the enemy.

**Join Online Fights**

Play against 2-8 players online through LAN or the internet in the ultimate **Axis versus Allies** conflict.

**Rome: Total War™ - Collection: Conquer and Defend an Empire**

Prepare to command the Roman Empire and face the barbarian onslaught with the Rome: Total War™ - Collection. This compilation brings together two acclaimed titles from the renowned Total War series, offering double the strategic challenges and opportunities to dominate the ancient world.

The Collection Edition features:

*   **Rome: Total War:** Lead one of three powerful Roman families on an epic, century-long journey to seize control of the Roman Empire.
*   **Rome: Total War - Barbarian Invasion:** Experience the twilight of Roman dominance as barbarian hordes descend. This official expansion pack plunges you into a fierce internal conflict between rival factions.

**Key Features:**

*   **Epic Battles:** Command legions in visually stunning, large-scale battles with thousands of soldiers clashing on screen.
*   **Historical Leaders:** Fight alongside or against legendary figures like Julius Caesar, Spartacus, and Hannibal as you expand or defend the empire.
*   **Strategic Depth:** Manage your empire's economy, civil affairs, religion, and military might across a vast, century-spanning campaign.
*   **Barbarian Fury:** Assume the role of fearsome leaders such as Attila the Hun or lead Saxon warriors, utilizing unique weapons and abilities to challenge Roman supremacy.

Recognized for its excellence, Rome: Total War was voted 2004 Best Strategy Game by IGN, GameSpy, and GameSpot.

Name: Total War: EMPIRE – Definitive Edition
Description:
Complete your Total War collection with this Definitive Edition of Total War: EMPIRE, which includes all DLC and feature updates since the game’s release: Take on the Warpath Campaign and lead one of 5 new Native American factions in an epic war to defend your lands and drive out the invaders. Build up your armies with the Elite Units of the East, Elite Units of the West, Elite Units of America and the Special Forces Units & Bonus Content packs, which together add over 50 elite new units. Total War: EMPIRE Definitive Edition offers hundreds and hundreds of hours of absorbing gameplay and every bit of content made for the game. See below for full details. About Total War: EMPIRE Control the land, command the seas, forge a new nation, and conquer the globe. Total War: EMPIRE takes the Total War franchise to the eighteenth century Age of Enlightenment a time of political upheaval, military advancements, and radical thought, captured in stunning detail. Total War: EMPIRE introduces a host of revolutionary new features, including true 3D naval combat. For the first time in the Total War series, you will be able to intuitively command single ships or vast fleets upon seascapes rich with extraordinary water and weather effects that play a huge role in your eventual glorious success or ignominious defeat. After pummelling your enemy with cannon fire, close in to grapple their ship and prepare to board, taking control of your men as they fight hand-to-hand on the decks of these wooden behemoths. In addition, Total War: EMPIRE will see further enhancements to the Total War series’ signature 3D battles and turn-based campaign map. Real-time battles will pose new challenges with the addition of cannon and musket, challenging players to master new formations and tactics as a result of the increasing role of gunpowder within warfare. And the Campaign Map, the heart of Total War introduces a variety of new and upgraded elements, including new systems for Trade, Diplomacy and Espionage with agents; a refined and streamlined UI; improved Advisors; and a vastly extended scope, taking in the riches of India, the turbulence of Europe and, for the first time, the untapped potential of the United States of America. About The Warpath Campaign A new detailed North American Campaign Map expands the Total War: EMPIRE experience, with 5 brand new Native American factions, new units and technologies. Experience battles in the new Warpath Campaign and lead one of the 5 new factions in an epic war to defend your lands and drive out the invaders. Or take these units and their unique strengths into multiplayer battles. • 5 New Playable Factions including the Iroquois, Huron, Plains, Pueblo and Cherokee nations. • Expanded North American Territories - A new, more detailed North American Campaign Map featuring new regions and a new start date. • New Elite Units including Mohawk Elite Warriors, Cheyenne Dog Soldiers, Navajo Scout Warriors and many more. • Two New Agent Types - Infiltrate enemy territory with the new Shaman unit and sabotage the opposition with the cunning Scout. • 18 New Tribal Technologies including Spirit Medicine, the Call of the Wild and Dreamwalking creating a brand new tribal technology tree. • New Winning Objectives for each of the playable factions. About Elite Units of the East The Elite Units of the East adds 12 new elite units to the Maratha and Ottoman factions and expands the map further East than any previous Total War game. Most of these soldiers' expertise developed on the battlefield - some are fearsome brigands, others of them are drawn from a strong academic background, learned warriors. They will provide a vast array of tactical options: intimidating and cowing your enemies. • Haydut Irregulars (Ottoman Empire) • Wallachian Boyars (Ottoman Empire) • Bosnian Panduks (Ottoman Empire) • Circassian Armoured Cavalry (Ottoman Empire) • Armenian Archers (Ottoman Empire) • Libyan Kuloglu (Ottoman Empire) • Palestinian Auxiliaries (Ottoman Empire) • Cairo Janissaries (Ottoman Empire) • Mounted Nizam-I-Cedit (Ottoman Empire) • Rajput Zamindars (Maratha) • Poligars (Maratha) • Barawardi (Maratha) About Elite Units of the West The Elite Units of the West introduces 14 completely unique units from all the major Western factions. Featuring all new infantry and cavalry units, equipped with the best weapons and having undergone the most rigorous of training, the Elite Units of the West bring even more options on the battlefield to all tacticians seeking to defeat their enemies. • Hungarian Grenadiers (Austria) • Horse Guards (Britain) • Swiss Guards (France) • Blue Guards (United Provinces) • Gardes du Corps (United Provinces) • Guard Grenadiers (Poland-Lithuania) • 2nd Hussars (Prussia) • Bosniaks (Prussia) • Frei-Korps (Prussia) • Gardes à cheval (Russia) • Siemenovski Foot Guards (Russia) • Walloon Guards (Spain) • Legion of the United States (United States) • US Marines (United States) About Elite Units of America The Elite Units of America adds 15 new elite units to the American, British and French factions of Total War: EMPIRE. In the last half of the 18th century, the political upheaval from thirteen of British Colonies in North America ultimately led to the 1776 Declaration of Independence and changed History forever. The 15 units have all played a major part in the American Revolution. Though their background owes a lot to European military traditions, their identity is tied to the destiny of the United States and gave these men courage and audacity like no other soldier on the battlefield. • 1st Delaware (United States) • 1st Maryland (United States) • 2nd Continental Light Dragoons (United States) • 2nd New York (United States) • 33rd Foot (Britain) • Brunswick Dragoons (Britain) • Hessian Grenadiers (Britain) • King’s Royal Regiment of New York (Britain) • Lee’s Legion (United States) • Morgan’s Provisional Rifle Corp (United States) • Pulaski’s Legion (United States) • Royal Deux-Ponts Regiment (France) • Royal Welch Fusiliers (Britain) • Company of Select Marksmen/Fraser’s Rangers (Britain) • Tarleton’s Light Dragoons (Britain) About Special Forces Units & Bonus Content The Special Forces Units introduces six of the most influential military forces of the 18th Century. True to the period, these exclusive elite units become available on the campaign map via a certain faction or once a specific geographical region is under control. This pack also includes three more exclusive Elite Units. • HMS Victory • Rogers' Rangers • Ottoman Organ Gun • Ghoorkas • Corso Terrestre Guerillas • Bulkeley's Regiment • Death's Head Hussars • The USS Constitution • The Dahomey Amazons

## Master the Art of War in Total War: SHOGUN 2

Step into the tumultuous 16th Century of Feudal Japan, a land fractured by relentless conflict. Once united, the country is now a chessboard of warring clans, with ten legendary warlords vying for ultimate supremacy. Amidst a landscape of conspiracies and crumbling empires, only one leader will emerge victorious, capturing the heart of a nation and claiming the title of Shogun. The rest will fall by his sword.

### Assume the Mantle of a Daimyo

As a Daimyo, the leader of your clan, you will orchestrate military engagements, manage your economy, and engage in intricate diplomacy. Your ultimate objective is to reunite Japan under your supreme command, establishing yourself as the new Shogun and ushering in an era of peace and undisputed rule.

### Core Game Features

Total War: SHOGUN 2 elevates the series' renowned full 3D land and sea battles, complemented by the deeply strategic campaign map, often considered the very soul of the Total War experience.

#### A New Era of AI Strategy

Inspired by the ancient Chinese military treatise, "The Art of War," which profoundly influenced Japanese warfare, Creative Assembly has implemented a sophisticated new AI system. This integration of Master Sun Tzu's wisdom allows for strategically deep yet accessible gameplay.

### Conquer, Build, and Scheme

*   **Conquer:** Embark on a campaign to dominate the islands of Japan during the 16th century. Command vast armies of samurai and formidable fleets of warships in stunning real-time battles.
*   **Build:** Develop your kingdom on the engaging turn-based campaign map. Leverage economic, political, and military power to accumulate wealth, raise armies, and expand your influence.
*   **Scheme:** Employ the strategic principles of Sun Tzu's "Art of War." Utilize tactics such as fire and siege warfare, along with spies and assassins, to adapt to the dynamic conditions of the battlefield and your burgeoning empire.

### Engage in Online Warfare

Experience the main campaign in a thrilling two-player mode. Furthermore, participate in epic online battles with up to eight players, leading your digital armies to glory in specialized campaigns.

### Innovations in SHOGUN 2

Total War: SHOGUN 2 introduces several exciting new features:

*   **Enhanced Leadership:** Generals and Agents now possess new RPG skills and experience, allowing for deeper customization and strategic deployment.
*   **Multi-Stage Sieges:** The challenge of conquest extends beyond simply scaling walls, offering more complex siege scenarios.
*   **Hero Units:** Inspire your troops and carve a path through enemy ranks with powerful new Hero units.
*   **Dynamic Campaign Map:** Navigate a newly implemented rotating 3D campaign map for a more immersive strategic overview.

Name: Total War: SHOGUN 2
Description:
MASTER THE ART OF WAR In the darkest age of Japan, endless war leaves a country divided. It is the middle of the 16th Century in Feudal Japan. The country, once ruled by a unified government, is now split into many warring clans. Ten legendary warlords strive for supremacy as conspiracies and conflicts wither the empire. Only one will rise above all to win the heart of a nation as the new shogun...The others will die by his sword. Take on the role of one Daimyo, the clan leader, and use military engagements, economics and diplomacy to achieve the ultimate goal: re-unite Japan under his supreme command and become the new Shogun – the undisputed ruler of a pacified nation. Game Features Total War: SHOGUN 2 features enhanced full 3D battles via land and sea, which made a name for the series, as well as the tactical campaign map that many refer to as the heart and soul of Total War. Featuring a brand new AI system inspired by the scriptures that influenced Japanese warfare, the millennia old Chinese “Art of War”, the Creative Assembly brings the wisdom of Master Sun Tsu to Total War: SHOGUN 2. Analysing this ancient text enabled the Creative Assembly to implement easy to understand yet deep strategical gameplay. CONQUER the islands of Japan in the 16th century. Lead vast armies of samurai and fleets of giant warships into breathtaking real-time battles. BUILD your kingdom on the inviting and turn-based campaign map. Wield economic, political, and military power to amass wealth, armies, and influence. SCHEME according to the 'Art of War' by Sun Tzu. Use fire and siege tactics, spies and assassins to adapt to the ever-changing conditions on the battlefield and throughout your kingdom. BATTLE ONLINE and experience the main campaign in two-player mode. Then join epic online battles with up to 8 players and lead your online army to glory in special campaigns. New to Total War in SHOGUN 2 New RPG skills and experience for your Generals and Agents. New Multi-stage Sieges - scaling the walls is only the beginning! New Hero units inspire your men and carve through the enemy. New rotating 3D campaign map.

Name: Commandos 2: Men of Courage
Description:
Commandos 2: Men of Courage is a tactical action/strategy game set against the backdrop of World War II. Take control of an elite group of commandos who must venture deep into enemy territory and utilize their combined expertise to complete a series of mission-based objectives. Go covert into new environments based on authentic WWII locations: the heart of the third Reich, a northern European submarine installation, the headquarters of the Japanese army and more. Interact like never before: with the environment: steal enemy uniforms and weapons, climb poles, swing from cables, swim, utilize vehicles, and climb in/out of buildings, ships, planes. Control nine commandos: including a green beret, sniper, demolitions expert, seductress, thief, and even a dog. All new 3D engine: rotate the environment 360 degrees, move seamlessly in/out of buildings, submarines, planes and under water, and zoom in/out on the environment. Innovative camera control: simultaneous control of multiple gameplay windows in real time. Authentic WWII scenarios: 10 missions spanning 9 different environments in night and day with realistic weather effects. Multiplayer: Go to war with others in a cooperative multiplayer mode (Multiplayer available in PC version only!!!). New WWII vehicles and weapons: including jeeps, tanks, trucks, ships, bazookas and flame-throwers.

## Total War: WARHAMMER II: A Grand Strategy Epic

**DEFEND YOUR WORLD. DESTROY THEIRS.** Total War: WARHAMMER II is a grand strategy game of immense scale. Players choose from four distinct factions to forge their path to victory. The game invites players to embark on a campaign of conquest, with the ultimate goal of either saving or shattering a vast and vibrant fantasy realm. This title offers a compelling duality: a turn-based open-world campaign is complemented by intense, tactical real-time battles across the fantastical landscapes of the New World.

### Unparalleled Replayability and Customization

"Total War: WARHAMMER II promises hundreds of hours of gameplay, ensuring no two games are ever the same," according to the developers. Players can immerse themselves in a deep, engaging campaign, experience endless replayability, and challenge the world in multiplayer with a custom army composed of their favorite units.

### World-Spanning Conquest

Engage in statecraft, diplomacy, and exploration as you build your empire, turn by turn. Capture, develop, and manage thriving settlements, and recruit massive armies. Level up your Legendary Lords and Heroes, equipping them with mythical weapons and armor. Forge alliances or declare Total War to crush any opposition standing between you and your ultimate goal.

### Epic Real-Time Battles

Command legions of thousands in thrilling tactical battles. Unleash ferocious, twisted monsters, fire-breathing dragons, and harness the power of potent magic. Employ cunning military strategies, set ambushes, or rely on brute force to seize victory and lead your forces to triumph.

### The Great Vortex Campaign

The second installment in a trilogy and a sequel to the acclaimed Total War: WARHAMMER, this title introduces a breathtaking new narrative campaign. Set across the expansive continents of Lustria, Ulthuan, Naggaroth, and the Southlands, The Great Vortex Campaign builds momentum towards a definitive and climactic endgame, offering an experience unlike any other Total War title.

### Playable Factions and Unique Mechanics

Command one of eight Legendary Lords from four iconic races of the Warhammer Fantasy Battles world. Players must successfully perform a series of powerful arcane rituals to either stabilize or disrupt The Great Vortex, all while thwarting the progress of rival races. Each Legendary Lord boasts a unique starting position, and every race presents a distinct playstyle with its own campaign mechanics, narrative, warfare methods, armies, monsters, Lores of Magic, legendary characters, and formidable new battlefield army abilities.

### Colossal Combined Campaigns

Owners of both the original game and Total War: WARHAMMER II will soon gain access to a colossal third campaign. By exploring a single, epic open-world map encompassing both the Old and New Worlds, players can embark on monumental campaigns as any owned Race from either title.

### Conquer the World, Together

Every Race in Total War: WARHAMMER II is playable in both single and multiplayer campaigns, as well as custom and multiplayer battles. With two Legendary Lords per race, each possessing their own unique campaign start positions, you can even engage in a 2-player co-op campaign as the same race. Owning both games unlocks the ability to play any owned race in multiplayer.

### The Lore of Total War: WARHAMMER II

Millennia ago, facing a devastating Chaos invasion, a council of High Elf mages created a vast, arcane vortex. Its purpose was to siphon the Winds of Magic from the world, much like a sinkhole drains an ocean, and banish the Daemonic hordes back to the Realm of Chaos. Now, The Great Vortex is faltering, and the world teeters on the brink of ruin once more. Powerful forces are mobilizing to mend the maelstrom and avert catastrophe, while others seek to exploit its terrible energies for their own dark ambitions. The race is on, and the very fate of the world rests with the victor.

*   **Prince Tyrion**, Defender of Ulthuan, leads the High Elves in their desperate bid to stabilize the vortex above their homeland.
*   **The Slann Mage-Priest Mazdamundi** directs his Lizardmen war-hosts from his palanquin-throne as they advance north from Lustria, aiming to prevent cataclysm through the ancient methods of The Old Ones.
*   **The Witch King Malekith** and his cruel Dark Elf legions emerge from Naggaroth and their sprawling Black Arks, sensing weakness in the vortex and opportunity in its potential collapse.
*   Meanwhile, the **Skaven**, under the command of **Queek Headtaker**, stir in their fetid subterranean tunnels. They multiply unchecked, their motives veiled as they cast hungry eyes towards the surface. The time for revelation is at hand…

Four races, four distinct outcomes, and a single, overarching goal: control of The Great Vortex, for better or for worse.

Name: Ground Control Anthology
Description:
A classic blend of action and real-time strategy The year is 2419 and mankind is on the brink. War has devastated Earth, and mega-corporations take to the stars to fight over colonised planets. Your employer, the Crayven Corporation, chose you to command an army of ground and air forces on the distant world of Krig-7-B. You thought it would be just another brush-fire war in a longstanding dispute. You were wrong. Ground Control Anthology offers a thrilling RTS experience beloved by fans and critics alike. With a trendsetting mixture of 3D action and strategic combat, it’s still just as epic as it ever was. Ground Control Anthology includes The original Ground Control The Dark Conspiracy expansion Key Features A unique mix of 3D action and classic real-time strategy. An intuitive interface designed for both novice and advanced players. 30 singleplayer missions split across two factions in the original game. 15 more singleplayer missions and a new faction in the Dark Conspiracy expansion. Extensive multiplayer* for up to 8 players, including both co-op and competitive modes (LAN only). Dozens of customisable units. Expansive terrain and timeless, highly detailed visuals. *Multiplayer notice: Because WON.net is no longer operating, playing over the Internet is no longer possible. Playing through a LAN is still available.

Name: Desperados III
Description:
Desperados III is a story-driven, hardcore tactical stealth game, set in a ruthless Wild West scenario. In this long-awaited prequel to the beloved classic Desperados: Wanted Dead or Alive, John Cooper will join forces with the runaway bride Kate, the shady hitman Doc McCoy, the giant trapper Hector, and Isabelle, a mysterious lady from New Orleans. On Cooper’s quest for redemption, his adventures lead him and his gang from rural towns, over swamps and riverbanks, and finally to a dramatic showdown worthy of Wild West legends. Play smart if you want to succeed. A good plan can make the difference between survival and finding yourself at the business end of a pistol. Drifter, gunslinger, and natural leader Cooper can kill quietly with a knife, or take out multiple foes with his revolvers. Strongman Hector carries a giant bear trap and can slay the toughest opponents with his trusty axe. Cold blooded bounty hunter McCoy likes to be methodical, using lures, knockout gas, poison syringes and a custom long-range pistol. Kate can fool almost any man with the right outfit, and kills discreetly with her hidden gun. And then there is this mysterious woman from New Orleans, Isabelle… Combine your team’s special skills to overcome each tough challenge in your own style. Play five unique characters, each with a very particular set of skills Experience true freedom of choice with countless different ways to overcome any obstacle Defeat large groups of enemies with careful planning and execution Witness the glory of classic Wild West scenarios like frontier towns, mysterious swamps, sprawling modern cities, and many more Choose between non-lethal and deadly attacks, stealth and blazing guns Adjust the game to your playstyle with various difficulty settings and special replay challenges The Showdown mode allows you to pause the game anytime and react to ambushes or surprise attacks

Name: Total War: WARHAMMER III
Description:
The last roar of a dying god ruptures the boundary between worlds, opening a portal to the Realm of Chaos. From this maelstrom, the four Ruinous Powers – Khorne, Nurgle, Tzeentch and Slaanesh – emerge, spreading darkness and despair. The stern warriors of Kislev and the vast empire of Grand Cathay stand at the threshold, as a vengeful Daemon Prince vows to destroy those who corrupted him. The coming conflict will engulf all. Will you conquer your daemons? Or command them? With seven unique races and hundreds of units under your command, raise an army and dominate in epic real-time battles across a world of breathtaking scale and spectacle. In the most ambitious and groundbreaking Total War title to date, dive into a captivating narrative that will take you to the mind-bending Realm of Chaos and back again. Forge your empire in a strategy sandbox that ensures no two campaigns are ever the same. Play as 10 Legendary Lords! Will you side with the Chaos Gods and take one of their Daemonic Champions, play as an ancient transforming Dragon from Grand Cathay, defend the frozen nation of Kislev with the Ice Queen or play the ultimate villain as the Daemon Prince? Customise the Daemon Prince to your own unique design with a huge suite of body parts and powers, creating billions of potential combinations to suit your own playstyle. Multiplayer is now bigger than ever. With the vast 8-player Realm of Chaos multiplayer campaign, the intense 1 v 1 Domination mode, the story-driven multiplayer campaigns built around Kislev and Grand Cathay and ranked & custom battles, there’s no shortage of ways to cause chaos with friends.

Umurangi Generation is a unique first-person photography game. It's set in a dystopian future, specifically in Tauranga, Aotearoa, as a crisis looms. You play as a courier for Tauranga Express, exploring this distinct world. As you play, you'll unlock a variety of lenses and camera gear, expanding your creative options.

The game has a detailed grading system. Each photo you take is judged on its color, subject matter, and composition. Good photos earn you cash, which adds to your final payout. You'll complete Photo Bounties however you like. Once these are done, delivering your package ends the level.

Exploring each level is rewarding. You can unlock new camera equipment by doing various activities:

*   **Find film canisters:** Discover hidden film to get more photographic supplies.
*   **Recreate postcards:** Copy famous images from the game world.
*   **Complete timed deliveries:** Finish special courier jobs within strict deadlines.
*   **Take group photos:** Arrange all your friends in one shot.

After taking pictures, you can edit them and create your own color grades. The game's editing tools are very adaptable. They let you improve your photos to look better than they did originally. Whether you're a pro photographer or a beginner, you'll easily get into the game's features and creative potential. The name 'Umurangi' comes from the Te Reo word for "Red Sky," adding cultural meaning to the game's atmosphere.

Name: SEASON: A letter to the future
Description:
In SEASON: A letter to the future, you play as a young woman from a secluded village exploring the world by bike for the first time, collecting memories before a cataclysm washes everything away. SEASON is a quest to discover a new world; one unknown yet familiar. Document, photograph, and record life as you find it, while you still can. The gameplay focuses on exploring, recording, meeting people, and unravelling the strange world around you. Each recording tool captures a different layer; sounds and music, art and architecture, the stories of characters living through pivotal moments. Your tools peel back these layers until you grasp the culture, history, and ecology underneath everything. This quest leads you to the big questions: what is this season? Why is it ending? And what will the next season bring?

Name: Pupperazzi
Description:
Who will photograph, pet, and tell these dogs they're good boys and girls if you don't?? The world NEEDS you in Pupperazzi , the dog photography game! First person photographer action. Discover all new dogs and activities as you run, jump, and interact with the world... And dogs! (Yes, you CAN pet them!) SO. MANY. DOGS. Shibas, terriers, labs, pugs, and all kinds of breeds. You want ‘em, WE GOT EM! Have fun with dogs! Play fetch, dress them up in different hats, terrorize them with vacuum cleaners (you monster), and start dance parties. Normal dog things. Questionable dog things. Suspiciously human things. Take the best photos. Upgrade your gear to get the best dog pics. Zoom, filters, slow-mo, lenses, and so much more! A world populated entirely by dogs. Explore the lighthouse cove, take a sunset stroll on the boardwalk, zoom around the city of Muttropolis, and more! Either way, it’ll be filled with dogs. It’s rumored humans exist, but who cares? Share your galleries. If you took a picture and didn’t aggressively share it with several of your friends, did you even take it?? Science says no! Share your best snapshots online! Welcome To Your Life As A Freelance Pupperazzo! Snap photos of dogs while maintaining your social media presence. Will you hound for stardom in public, or would you rather be taken seriously as an artist? Perhaps you just want to show your friends the cute dog you saw while you were out. It's your choice which direction your career goes - just don’t forget to pet the dogs along the way. Dodge between people and obstacles as you try to capture canine beauty on everlasting digital photos. Double jump across buildings to get that lucrative shot of a local dog celebrity just trying to live their life. Slow motion zooming helps capture mid-air moments that actually make you feel something. It’s a ruff world out there and it’s up to you to document it! WOOF. Bark bark bark *licks* bark bark woof HOOOOOOWL. *Sniff* *Sniff sniff* wfff. Woof woof…. Bark? *Head tilt* *Pants* BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK BARK

Name: Japanese Puzzle
Description:
Japanese Puzzle is a puzzle-puzzle game made in 2D graphics, where you have to collect puzzles with anime girls. The game contains: - puzzles with different girls drawn in anime style. - 30 levels. - funny musical accompaniment. - Convenient puzzle collection system, - light motives of Japanese culture. Develop your brains, admire the girls and just relax and enjoy the process.

Embark on an imaginative journey in Alekon, a game where you'll photograph whimsical creatures called fictions, each representing a unique concept like "Rainy Day Magic" or "Micro Management." Explore diverse realms and interact with these fictions in their natural habitats to capture them in collectible poses. Once befriended, these fictions will accompany you to Dream's Doorstep, where you can deepen your bonds through engaging quests and mini-games. These activities include:

*   **Musical Interludes:** Tune and play crystal harps.
*   **Social Gatherings:** Organize lively parties for your fictions.
*   **Spooky Tales:** Share captivating ghost stories.

You'll also encounter and solve a variety of puzzles, utilizing an array of creative tools such as donut treats, powerful magnets, and illuminating lantern-fireflies. Alekon encourages your artistic expression with delightful creative toys, allowing you to edit photos and design intricate snowflakes.

**Key Features:**

*   **Diverse Characters:** Encounter over 50 unique fictions, each boasting distinct personalities, dialogue, quests, and collectible poses.
*   **Photography-Driven Progression:** Engage in photography gameplay where your photo scores unlock new levels, allowing you to advance through the game.
*   **Flexible Exploration:** Enjoy full free-roaming movement alongside a classic on-rails experience.
*   **Engaging Activities:** Participate in unique quests and mini-games that span photography, music, art, and dialogue.
*   **Innovative Puzzles:** Solve challenges using an assortment of tools, including donut treats, movable magnets, and throwable fireflies.
*   **Nostalgic Soundtrack:** Immerse yourself in an original soundtrack inspired by the beloved classics of the Nintendo 64 era.

**Core Values:**

*   **Respect for Your Time:** Alekon eliminates wasted time with no fetch quests, grinding, or unskippable cutscenes, ensuring you never lose progress. Every quest reward offers a unique game mechanic or piece of content.
*   **Timeless Charm, Modern Execution:** Drawing inspiration from the magical adventures of classic games, Alekon revives that nostalgic vision with contemporary UX and polish.
*   **Creative and Peaceful Engagement:** Quests focus on photography, art, and music, offering a refreshing alternative to combat. Fictions engage in friendly parties rather than conflict.

Krita is a powerful, open-source application designed for digital artists, including illustrators, concept artists, comic creators, animators, and game developers. It's used globally by professionals, students, and hobbyists alike, offering a rich set of features that enhance the painting and drawing experience. Krita boasts advanced brush engines for sketching and painting, stabilizers for smooth inking, and assistants for complex scene construction. Its distraction-free canvas mode, versatile layer and mask system for non-destructive editing, and broad file format compatibility make it a flexible tool.

A key aspect of Krita's identity is its development by an international open-source community. This collaborative effort aims to create a top-tier digital painting application accessible to everyone. As one community member stated, "Krita belongs to all of us--to use, to modify, to design, and to share." This ethos means there are no activation codes or mandatory subscriptions. The community is the driving force behind Krita's evolution, with user contributions being vital.

Supporting Krita's development is straightforward. Purchasing through Steam offers convenient installation across devices and automatic updates. Alternatively, Krita can be downloaded for free from the Krita Foundation website. This commitment to accessibility is central to their mission: "to create a potent tool for artists everywhere, free from most of the socioeconomic boundaries typically associated with professional art software." Users are encouraged to try Krita first and support the project if they wish, though Steam purchases provide the benefit of automatic updates.

For assistance, the Krita-Artists support section offers both official and community help. Key features include:

*   An OpenGL-powered canvas with high-bit-depth monitor support and quality scaling.
*   A robust layer engine supporting nested groups and various layer types like vector, clone, file, and dynamic filter-effect layers.
*   Over a dozen brush engines that support pressure sensitivity, tilt, and rotation.
*   A curated selection of over a hundred default brushes from professional artists.
*   An intricate brush editor for customizing or creating new brushes.
*   A filter gallery with real-time previews, usable as effect layers for non-destructive workflows.
*   Full 2D animation tools, including a timeline and onion skinning.
*   Assistants and Guides for drawing straight lines, ellipses, perspective, and complex scenes.
*   Wrap-around mode for seamless texture and pattern creation.
*   Multibrush Tool for radial symmetry drawing.
*   Support for numerous color models (RGB, CMYK, YCbCr, La*b*, XYZ, Grayscale).
*   Compatibility with a wide array of 3rd party file formats, including ORA, XCF, JPEG, PNG, and PSD.
*   Fully open-source (C++) and scriptable (Python).

The project emphasizes that "Krita belongs to all of us - to use, to script, or to mod!" The potential of Krita is vast, driven by individual users and community collaboration. An extensive online manual and a thriving community are available for support. Artists are encouraged to join the Krita community, create, consider supporting the project through Steam or contributions, and most importantly, enjoy the creative process.

Pic Fed Evolution is transforming the way wrestling figures are created digitally. It makes the traditional pic fed process much simpler, more flexible, and more efficient. This new tool helps wrestling content creators work faster in a cleaner, more convenient digital space to bring their ideas to life. With its complete creation suite, users can design their own figures, make unique props, and build detailed scene layouts. This gives them unmatched freedom to build their own wrestling worlds.

The system is built to help with several key parts of making digital wrestling figures. The developers explained that its main features include **Digital Action Figure Creation**, where users can design and build completely new digital action figures. Also, **Custom Prop Development** lets creators make personalized props that make figure scenes look more real. The **Custom Setup Design** tool allows users to build custom environments and arenas that are perfect backdrops for their figure stories. Lastly, the system supports **High-Quality Image Capture**, producing professional-level digital images needed for great pic fed content.

Pic Fed Evolution is still new, so feedback from users is very important to make the experience better for everyone. The **Figure Creator** is the main part. The developers know that having many different action figures is key for any good pic fed story. This tool lets users build custom figures with great detail. They can easily change head shapes and colors. For more personal touches, users can add their own figure parts and textures. This lets them use unique heads, bodies, and outfits while hiding parts they don't want. Once figures are made, they are ready to be posed in scenes.

The **Prop Creator** lets users make custom versions of existing 3D models. This tool gives them a lot of control. Users can design wrestling rings, make realistic printouts, create detailed stage pieces, build crowd sections, and more. For maximum flexibility, users can import their own images for many different items, making their creations even more unique. Once designed, these props can be placed in scenes to get the exact look desired. A key feature mentioned by the development team is that all copies of a prop are linked. Changing one copy will automatically update all others, keeping the scene consistent.

The **Setup Creator** is where users design arenas. This tool lets users build their dream stages or recreate real arenas very accurately. Users can use custom props to fill these spaces, opening up many possibilities for scene design. For example, they can hang pictures on walls, place multiple rings in one setup, and explore many creative options to make arenas come alive. These custom setups can then be used in the Scene Creator, acting as detailed backgrounds or foregrounds for digital images.

The **Scene Creator** is the main part of Pic Fed Evolution. It's where users pose figures and take pictures. This system expertly combines custom Figures, Props, and Setups to create immersive environments. The process is easy to follow: users pick a setup, add their custom action figures, arrange figures and props, pose each figure, and position the camera to get the perfect shot. The scene can then be updated, and the process repeated for more shots, building a story one frame at a time.

After capturing all the desired frames, users can either take a screenshot of each frame or use the automatic screenshot feature for better efficiency. To make the process even smoother, several helpful features are included, such as easy ways to copy, cycle through, and delete frames. Future plans include integration with Steam Workshop. This will allow users to easily share custom figures, props, and setups with the community, speeding up the creation of new assets and improving the overall creative process.

PD Howler 9.6, a powerful digital painting and visual effects software, is now available on Steam, offering an unparalleled graphics and animation solution specifically tailored for micro indie development studios. The creation of visually stunning games often presents a significant financial hurdle, placing it beyond the reach of many smaller studios. However, PD Howler 9.6 democratizes high-quality visual development, enabling even solo developers to imbue their projects with a level of polish typically reserved for larger, more established companies.

This comprehensive tool empowers users to craft not only exceptional graphical designs but also captivating animations. It provides a vast library of templates, facilitating rapid progress for novice users, while simultaneously offering extensive customization options for seasoned professionals. Whether you manage a micro indie studio or are embarking on your game development journey, PD Howler 9.6 is an indispensable asset. Its key features include an intuitive interface that is easy to learn yet remarkably powerful, entry-level pricing that delivers top-tier results, and a massive suite of features beneficial to both beginners and experts. The software is organized into three core toolsets: Digital Painting, Animation, and Filters & Special FX, each containing hundreds of specialized functions. For a detailed overview of PD Howler's capabilities, interested parties are encouraged to visit the official website at -dogwaffle-main-feature-list.html.

Name: FireAlpaca SE
Description:
FireAlpaca SE is the exclusive paint software to Windows operating system that is widely suitable for beginners to advanced users. We removed all the advertisements from FireAlpaca freeware version, that enables the faster performance and more stable environment. FireAlpacaSE is equipped with: - Program-controllable brush processing system (brush script function) - 1bit/ 8bit layer to reduce memory consumption - Onion Skin feature to create an animation instantly - Convenient Reference window - Snap feature enabling to draw parallel, curve, ellipse, concentration lines easily - Smooth brush processing being compatible to Wintab tablet and more. Also, the basic functions are well-equipped: - Layer function (18 blending modes, clipping, layer folder) - Selection function (polygonal lasso, lasso, magic wand, etc.) - Selection transformation (choose from 3 types of image quality) - Various brush types, such as Watercolor, Air Spray, Bitmap pattern etc. - Editable Text function - Filter function, such as Level adjustment, Hue, Gaussian Blur, Cloud pattern, etc. [Difference from FireAlpaca free version] 1. No advertisement at start up 2. Memory-efficient 3. New view of canvas

In Penko Park, players step into the role of a photographer tasked with exploring a mysterious, abandoned wildlife park. The core gameplay revolves around capturing striking photographs of the park's unique inhabitants and observing their behaviors. As you document your discoveries, you'll fill an in-game park guidebook with details and snapshots of the wildlife.
