If you don't find any maps or scenarios you enjoy, you can create your own with the in-game Map Editor , place down entities, enemies, and terrain in any way you like, and even add your own custom script to make for interesting gameplay. Discount Disclaimer: We don't have any plans to take part in a sale or to reduce the price for the foreseeable future. What people say about Factorio No other game in the history of gaming handles the logistics side of management simulator so perfectly. - Reddit I see conveyor belts when I close my eyes. I may have been binging Factorio lately. - Notch, Mojang Factorio is a super duper awesome game where we use conveyor belts to shoot aliens. - Zisteau, Youtube

In Mini Motorways, you take control of a city's traffic woes. This engaging game, from the creators of Mini Metro, challenges you to design the road networks that power a burgeoning urban landscape. Your mission is to build a functional road system, street by street, to foster a thriving metropolis. You'll need to strategically redesign your city to ensure smooth traffic flow and wisely manage upgrades to adapt to evolving demands. The core question remains: how long can you keep the world's cities on the move?

Mini Motorways offers a dynamic gameplay experience. "Draw roads in dynamic cities that grow and change - every game is unique!" The game features stunning maps, each inspired by real-world cities, providing a fresh challenge with every playthrough. To manage the ever-expanding road network, players can select from a range of crucial upgrades, including highways and roundabouts. The game also caters to diverse player needs with various color palettes, including options for colorblind accessibility and night modes. Adding to the immersive experience is a responsive soundtrack by Disasterpeace, which evolves alongside your city's growth. As you master the game, you'll unlock new maps and achievements. For those who enjoy sharing their creations, the game allows you to export GIFs of your city layouts. Furthermore, you can test your skills against others in Daily and Weekly Challenges.

**Europa Universalis IV: Forge Your Empire Through Centuries of History**

Paradox Development Studio proudly presents Europa Universalis IV, the latest installment in their acclaimed grand strategy series. This classic game places you at the helm of a nation, guiding its destiny through four pivotal centuries of global transformation. With unparalleled freedom, depth, and historical fidelity, you will shape your realm and assert dominance on the world stage. As one of the developers stated, "Our goal is to provide players with the ultimate sandbox for historical what-ifs."

Begin your journey before the dawn of the Renaissance, on a meticulously recreated world map reflecting that era. Select from hundreds of playable nations and steer them through to the Age of Revolutions. Alternatively, immerse yourself in any specific historical period within this vast span, commanding authentic monarchs and leaders. Encounter hundreds of dynamic historical events, from internal strife like civil wars to world-altering phenomena such as the Protestant Reformation.

The world is yours to explore and conquer. Discover and colonize the New World, or stand defiant against European expansion. Master the global economy by cultivating trade power in vital provinces, employing naval fleets, and enacting shrewd governmental policies to funnel international wealth into your own coffers. Forge unbreakable alliances through royal marriages, or maintain diplomatic flexibility to keep your options open. Seize opportunities to expand your territory and resources by striking decisively when adversaries are vulnerable.

The effectiveness of your nation's progress is intrinsically linked to the ruler on the throne. Experience periods of accelerated growth under a capable monarch, only to face stagnation with a less competent successor. Strategic planning is paramount; wisely allocate your monarch power to invest in crucial advancements. Four centuries of research await, unlocking innovations in warfare, administration, and commerce. Develop new weaponry, construct formidable buildings, and commission advanced ship designs. Over time, embrace unique national ideas that embody both your nation's rich heritage and its aspirations for the future. From epic voyages of exploration and tumultuous religious conflicts to the rise of revolutionary governments, the entire tapestry of the early modern world is yours to reweave in Europa Universalis IV.

## Six Ages: Ride Like the Wind: A Mythic Strategy Saga

Step into a world where myth and reality intertwine in **Six Ages: Ride the Wind**. This captivating storybook strategy game invites you to lead your clan through an epic, multi-generational tale of survival, alliances, and legend. Set in the same rich world as the acclaimed *King of Dragon Pass*, *Six Ages* transports you thousands of years earlier to the Bronze Age land of Glorantha, a realm where ancient gods and potent magic shape destiny.

### Forge Your Clan's Legacy

In *Six Ages*, you are not merely a player; you are the architect of your clan's future. This game masterfully blends role-playing elements with deep resource management, ensuring every decision carries significant, long-term consequences. Design your unique clan, navigate the complex relationships with the gods, strive for respect, and even engage in daring raids against your neighbors. The game boasts over 400 interactive story scenes, each driven by intricate simulation systems that influence their appearance and outcomes, offering a truly dynamic experience.

### Explore the World of Glorantha

Glorantha is a meticulously crafted Bronze Age world, echoing our own in many ways, yet existing within a magical universe. Here, the laws of physics bend to the will of gods and spirits, and the Sun itself is a living deity. You will play as a Riders clan, deeply connected to their own mythology, revering figures like Gamari the Horse Mother and their culture hero, Hyalor. However, beware the ever-present Trickster, Raven, who has not forgotten you.

### A Spiritual Successor to a Beloved Classic

*Six Ages: Ride the Wind* is the spiritual successor to the highly praised *King of Dragon Pass*. While sharing the same universe, it introduces a new clan, the Riders, with their own distinct myths and an expanded world to explore. Discover, appease, and forge pacts with the spirits inhabiting your territory. The game offers multiple difficulty levels, including an option for "Iron Willed" players to limit reloading for an even greater challenge. All of this unfolds through gorgeous, hand-painted high-resolution illustrations.

### More Than Just a Game

Glorantha serves as the backdrop for numerous other rich narrative experiences, including *King of Dragon Pass*, *HeroQuest*, *RuneQuest*, and *God Wars*. *Six Ages* invites you to immerse yourself in this legendary world and carve out your clan's place in history.

**Please note:** The minimum system requirements for Windows is Windows 10.

For even more in-depth information, consult the official manual!

Name: Oxygen Not Included
Description:
In the space-colony simulation game Oxygen Not Included you’ll find that scarcities of oxygen, warmth and sustenance are constant threats to your colony's survival. Guide colonists through the perils of subterranean asteroid living and watch as their population grows until they're not simply surviving, but thriving... Just make sure you don't forget to breathe. Build Extensive Bases and Discover What it Takes to Survive: Everything in your space colony is under your control, from excavation and resource allocation right down to plumbing and power systems. Resources will begin depleting with your first breath, however, so be sure to dig fast if you want to live. It’s Mind Over Matter with Stress Simulations: Keep the psychological impact of survival at bay with fun leisure activities, great accommodations and even better food for your colony. Duplicants each have different and potentially destructive ways of reacting to stress, so be sure to always keep them happy. Whatever the cost. Avoid Boiling with Thermodynamics: Temperature control is a constant concern in space; too cold and you'll freeze, too hot and you'll fry. Keep tabs on ambient environmental temperatures and your colony's heat production to maintain a nice, cozy atmosphere for your colonists. Enhance Efficiency through Complex Gas and Liquid Simulations: Create interlocking pipe systems to swiftly deliver fuel and liquid to critical areas of your base. Plan well and be rewarded as your colony transforms into an imperishable, well-oiled machine. Take Charge with Power Grid Simulations: Choose from a multitude of power sources including coal, hydrogen, natural gas or just plain old elbow grease. Manage power runoff, circuit overloads and meltdowns to keep your colony running smoothly. Always Keep Yourself Breathing: Enter the Oxygen Overlay and watch air moving through your base in real time. Monitor carbon dioxide accumulation and oversee oxygen generation processes to mold your colony into a veritable deep-space oasis. Waste Nothing through Extreme Recycling: Make use of every last resource for a base that truly exemplifies efficiency. Recycle waste into precious fuel, process unbreathable gas into air or harness the natural bodily processes of wild creatures for food. If you’re clever, you might even be able to run a base off colonist farts. Explore Diverse, Procedurally Generated New Worlds: Summon new worlds with a push of a button. Experience tons of untamed space rocks, then suffocate to death in them!

Name: Cook-Out
Description:
Get your aprons ready… things are about to get messy in this award-winning multiplayer VR cooking game from Resolution Games! Set within the cook’s cabin of a fairytale forest, Cook-Out: A Sandwich Tale is a wacky and whimsical adventure - brought to you by the creators of Angry Birds VR: Isle of Pigs, Bait! and Blaston - that challenges up to four players to work together to keep the orders coming for a hungry cast of enchanted creatures in this multiplayer VR game. As players progress through increasingly hectic levels, they not only prepare meals but also need to fight off a number of nasty customers who seem absolutely set on making trouble -- like jesters who will hide parts of orders, or thieves who will keep pilfering ingredients. With some of the game’s most recent updates, players can add to the fun by upgrading their chef’s look with the “Make it Your Way feature” and join the “House Party” update for new skins, customizations and more! While the game is focused on cooperative play, solo players can also enjoy the experience with the help of a simulated partner, making sure there’s always a team to tackle tough orders and restore the calm to this wild kitchen.

**Cities: Skylines** is a modern city simulation game where players dive into the complex world of urban planning and management. This game expands on existing city-building ideas with new features that give players a lot of freedom to create their ideal city.

The game provides a **challenging and detailed simulation experience**. While it's easy for new players to start, becoming a master city builder is difficult. As the virtual mayor, you must carefully balance important services like schools, water, power, police, and hospitals with your city's budget. The game's citizens react realistically to events, making the simulation feel very authentic. A key feature is the **advanced local traffic simulation**. This comes from Colossal Order's experience with the *Cities in Motion* series, creating a detailed transportation system. Players can also manage their cities better with the **District and Policy system**. This lets you set specific rules for different parts of your city, truly making you feel like a mayor. The **Day and Night Cycle** significantly impacts how the city runs. You'll see less traffic and slower activity at night, and managing these changes is up to you. Furthermore, **Cities: Skylines** offers **strong modding support**. This allows players to create and improve maps and buildings, and to share or download creations from the active Steam Workshop community.

One developer noted that the game aims to provide a "deeply layered and demanding simulation experience." Another highlight is the "sophisticated local traffic simulation," which is a direct result of Colossal Order's "extensive experience from the *Cities in Motion* series."

**Giants: Citizen Kabuto: A Unique Blend of Strategy and Humor**

Step onto **the Island**, a massive, drifting remnant of a lost world, and discover the story of **Giants: Citizen Kabuto**. This 2000 release plunges players into a conflict between three distinct and powerful forces. At the heart of the Island's ecosystem is **Kabuto**, a gargantuan creature unaware of its own origins. Unbeknownst to Kabuto, the **Sea Reapers**, a matriarchal aquatic society, originally engineered it as a protector. However, Kabuto's developing sentience, fueled by isolation and suffering, triggered a destructive path.

Adding to the chaos are **the Meccs**, a band of stranded space travelers. Their search for lost comrades has brought them to the Island, forcing an unplanned stop on their way to Planet Majorca. Their arrival, however, is ill-timed, as they become caught between the existing hostilities of the Island's native inhabitants.

The gameplay of **Giants: Citizen Kabuto** is defined by the **irreconcilable conflict** between these three races: the technologically adept **Meccaryns**, the powerful **Sea Reapers**, and the immense **Kabuto**. This setup allows for **three entirely different gameplay styles**, ensuring a varied experience for players. The game is also noted for its **bawdy humor**, contributing to its reputation as **one of the most original games ever created**.

## F.E.A.R.: An Elite Tactical Response to Unexplained Terror

Step into the role of a hero within your own intensely cinematic experience, brimming with action, suspense, and sheer terror. The narrative begins with a perplexing infiltration of a multi-billion dollar aerospace compound by a shadowy paramilitary force, who seize hostages without articulating any demands. In response, the government dispatches a Special Forces unit, only for them to be utterly annihilated. Disturbing live footage of this massacre reveals an unfathomable wave of destruction that systematically tears the soldiers apart. Faced with such extraordinary circumstances and no other viable options, the elite F.E.A.R. (First Encounter Assault Recon) team is meticulously assembled to confront this unprecedented threat. Their singular, critical mission is to thoroughly evaluate the nature of the danger and decisively eliminate the intruders, regardless of the ultimate cost.

### F.E.A.R. Extraction Point: A Perilous Escape

The gripping saga of *F.E.A.R. Extraction Point* commences precisely where the original game's dramatic conclusion left off, igniting with an explosive event. As the F.E.A.R. team attempts to egress the volatile vicinity via helicopter, their escape is violently thwarted, resulting in a catastrophic crash. This unforeseen disaster compels the F.E.A.R. team to embark on a desperate search for an alternative extraction point, all while relentlessly battling the now unleashed Alma and her spectral legion of paranormal minions amidst the ruins of a devastated city.

### F.E.A.R. Perseus Mandate: Uncovering Armacham's Secrets

While the initial F.E.A.R. team and Delta Force engage in a desperate struggle to regain control of the escalating situation, a secondary F.E.A.R. team is deployed with the crucial objective of illuminating the deeply buried and sinister past of the Armacham Technology Corporation (ATC). Assuming the role of a member within this secondary F.E.A.R. unit, your primary directive is to meticulously uncover vital information pertaining to a clandestine project concealed within the ATC facilities. It is important to note that the multiplayer component for this particular expansion is no longer accessible.

**Year Walk: A Supernatural Swedish Tradition Explored**

"Year Walk" invites players into a chilling 19th-century Swedish tradition, a supernatural practice known as year walking. This game offers a unique first-person perspective, blending historical reality with eerie folklore to create an immersive and mysterious experience. According to historical accounts of the tradition, year walking was a ritual undertaken to glimpse the future, often with the hope of confirming a loved one's affections.

The core gameplay revolves around a perilous vision quest. Players must navigate dark, mysterious woods, solving cryptic puzzles and heeding subtle environmental hints to uncover the secrets of this ancient practice. As you progress, you'll encounter and learn about various folklore creatures from Sweden's rich tapestry of myths and legends, detailed within an integrated encyclopedia. The game's narrative masterfully weaves together historical context and fictional elements, requiring deep immersion to fully grasp the chilling events, particularly those surrounding a pivotal New Year's Eve, as described in folklore studies. This enhanced edition introduces new locations, an in-game map for easier navigation, updated visuals, additional puzzles, and a helpful hint system, alongside Steam achievements to track player progress.

## F.E.A.R. 2: Project Origin - A Descent into Terror

**F.E.A.R. 2: Project Origin** thrusts you into the role of Special Forces Sergeant Michael Becket, a soldier whose routine mission rapidly devolves into a desperate struggle for survival. Deployed mere minutes before the catastrophic blast initiated by the original F.E.A.R. team, you find yourself facing the unleashed fury of Alma Wade. As Alma's terrifying psychic powers spiral beyond control, your squad is compelled to navigate a landscape ravaged by apocalyptic events, all while desperately seeking a means to vanquish her.

### Strategic Combat and Enhanced Abilities

The game offers dynamic combat scenarios where both you and your adversaries can exploit the environment for tactical advantage. Harness your character's enhanced reflexes to manipulate time, allowing for strategic slowdowns that can turn the tide of battle. Prepare for intense, in-your-face close-quarters action that unfolds across a diverse array of indoor and outdoor settings.

### New Threats and Unraveling the Mystery

You will confront an array of entirely new enemies, each employing sophisticated combat tactics to overwhelm you. This installment challenges your courage as you face these new adversaries and delve deeper into a terrifying mystery. The game's world interaction enhancements empower you to create instant cover or clear obstacles, further enriching the strategic depth of gameplay.

### Multiplayer Mayhem and Visual Fidelity

F.E.A.R. 2: Project Origin also features robust multiplayer modes, allowing you to compete with and against friends. The enhanced graphics engine elevates the action-horror experience to new heights, delivering breathtaking visuals and immersive effects. Enemies exhibit remarkably realistic behavior, utilizing the environment against you through vastly improved Artificial Intelligence. Crucially, the game maintains the authenticity of the Alma storyline, providing the definitive continuation of her saga for dedicated players.

### Toy Soldier Update: A New Perspective on Multiplayer

**Toy Soldier Update (April 16, 2009)** introduced a novel perspective to F.E.A.R. 2 multiplayer, shrinking players down to mere inches in height as they battle within miniature environments.

#### FullTilt: Pinball Pandemonium

Experience intense battles within a retro 1970s-era pinball machine, aptly named 'Snake Fist.' The game's flippers, targets, spinners, and pop-bumpers serve as dynamic cover for fast-paced action. Multi-level playfields and authentic sound effects contribute to the chaotic atmosphere of destruction.

#### Cockroach: Hospital Horror

This update plunges players into a blood-soaked hospital room, where heart-pounding action awaits. Navigate a tightly interconnected environment by climbing electrical cords, laboratory equipment, and pill bottles.

#### Recess: Sandbox Warfare

Engage in mayhem from the towering heights of a giant sandcastle to the confines of a toy bulldozer's cockpit. Embrace the commando spirit and blend in with an army of plastic soldiers in this unique playground battleground.

Welcome to your new summer job at Freddy Fazbear's Pizza, a place renowned for its lively entertainment and abundant food, drawing in both children and their parents. The star of the show is undoubtedly Freddy Fazbear, accompanied by his two animatronic companions, programmed to captivate audiences. However, these robotic performers exhibit increasingly erratic behavior after closing hours, making your role as a night security guard a more cost-effective solution than hiring a repair technician.

From your confined office, you are tasked with diligently monitoring the security camera feeds. Your nightly allowance of electricity is strictly limited due to corporate budget constraints, meaning a depletion of power will disable essential security features like doors and lights. It is imperative to remain vigilant for any anomalies, particularly if Freddy Fazbear or his associates are not in their designated positions. Locating them on the monitors is crucial for your safety and survival. Can you endure the challenges of five nights at Freddy's?

Despite its straightforward controls and premise, Five Nights at Freddy's delivers a genuinely frightening experience. It stands as a remarkable testament to how ingenious design and subtle execution can cultivate terror. The game's success hinges on its simple yet effective still images and compelling character designs, showcasing creator Scott Cawthon's profound understanding of the primal fears evoked by unsettling dolls and toys. This game masterfully cultivates dread and is an essential acquisition for enthusiasts of the horror genre.

Key aspects of the game include:

*   **Animatronic Characters:** Freddy Fazbear and his friends are the central figures, designed to entertain but exhibiting unpredictable nocturnal behavior.
*   **Security Guard Role:** Your primary responsibility is to monitor security cameras from a central office.
*   **Resource Management:** A limited electricity supply dictates the availability of crucial security measures like doors and lights.
*   **Survival Objective:** The goal is to survive five consecutive nights by managing resources and tracking the animatronics' movements.

This game was developed using Clickteam Fusion.

**Fazbear's Fright: Reliving the Terrors of Freddy Fazbear's Pizza**

Though Freddy Fazbear's Pizza closed its doors long ago, the chilling tales from its operational days have largely faded into legend. However, a new venture, "Fazbear's Fright: The Horror Attraction," is set to resurrect this dark legacy. The creators of this attraction are dedicated to crafting an intensely frightening and immersive experience. To achieve this, they are actively seeking any surviving artifacts from the establishment's past.

Initially, their discoveries were limited to a handful of dilapidated remnants. These included vacant animatronic shells, a single detached hand, a corroded hook, and a tattered paper doll. Yet, a significant find soon emerged, one that would fundamentally shape the entire attraction. The developers of Fazbear's Fright have announced the acquisition of a particularly unsettling animatronic. This particular robot is now central to their terrifying exhibit.

**Slender: The Arrival - A Deeper Dive into the Official Slender Man Experience**

Prepare to face the terror alone. In *Slender: The Arrival*, you are isolated, with no hope of rescue or assistance. This official video game adaptation of the Slender Man phenomenon was meticulously crafted in collaboration with Eric 'Victor Surge' Knudson, the very creator of the paranormal entity that has been chilling audiences worldwide since its debut. Developed alongside Mark Hadley and Blue Isle Studios, *The Arrival* builds upon the foundation laid by Hadley's 2012 creation, *Slender: The Eight Pages*.

That initial, experimental first-person game, according to its creator, breathed new life into the horror genre by masterfully employing pure tension and dread. Now, *Slender: The Arrival* invites players to relive that fear, reimagined and significantly expanded. This official re-imagining, developed by Mark Hadley in partnership with the writers of the acclaimed *Marble Hornets* series and the dedicated team at Blue Isle Studios, introduces a compelling new narrative. It boasts enhanced visuals, substantial replayability, and, at its core, delivers an unparalleled survival horror experience.

**Five Nights at Freddy's 2: A New Era of Animatronic Terror**

Prepare for a chilling return to Freddy Fazbear's Pizza in **Five Nights at Freddy's 2**. This sequel introduces a fresh wave of animatronic performers alongside the familiar, aging characters. These new additions are designed to be **kid-friendly**, boasting the latest in **facial recognition technology** and integration with local criminal databases. They promise a safe and entertaining show for all ages.

But what could possibly go wrong? As the **new night security guard**, your primary duty is to monitor surveillance cameras and ensure everything remains secure after closing hours. The previous guard, who has since been transferred to the day shift, reported unsettling encounters with the animatronics attempting to enter the office.

To aid you in this daunting task, you'll be equipped with a **special empty Freddy Fazbear head**. This crucial item is intended to deceive the animatronics, making them believe you are one of them and hopefully deterring them from entering your office. As a standard disclaimer, Fazbear Entertainment **accepts no responsibility for any death or dismemberment** that may occur.

Name: Kraven Manor
Description:
Turn out the lights, take a deep breath, and prepare yourself. Explore the depths of the immersive, atmospheric world of Kraven Manor . Uncover its secrets, solve its mystical puzzles, and face the growing threat within. Kraven Manor challenges you to explore an expansive manor and discover the mysteries that lurk in its dark corners. You have the power to dynamically alter the layout of your environment by interacting with a miniature scale model of the manor, located in its extravagant entryway. Dynamically build the manor around you. Find miniature room models and carry them back to an increasingly elaborate scale model of the manor. Adjusting the model causes rooms to move and appear in real space, awaiting your arrival. Each new room exposes revelations into the troubling past of William Kraven. Face your fears and see if you have what it takes...the doors of Kraven Manor await you. Features Experience a hauntingly beautiful first person atmosphere Hear chilling symphonies and bumps in the night that will have you looking over your shoulder Become the architect of Kraven Manor by constructing a scale model of the house Prepare for tension, puzzles, and a mounting threat that avoids the cheap scare Beware a unique antagonist that pursues you relentlessly to the final moments Find collectible secrets hidden within the Manor and obtain a very special ending Play Nightmare Mode for a scarier challenge and a battery for your flashlight Enjoy robust graphical settings and custom key binding options Face your fears in 14 Languages

In the chilling conclusion to the original *Five Nights at Freddy's* saga, the dread is no longer confined to a pizzeria; it has infiltrated your very home. This installment plunges players into a terrifying new reality where the familiar animatronic antagonists—Freddy Fazbear, Chica, Bonnie, and Foxy—are joined by even more sinister entities lurking in the darkness. As a young child, whose identity remains a mystery, your sole objective is survival until the dawn at 6 AM.

Your defense strategy is multifaceted, requiring constant vigilance over your surroundings. You must meticulously monitor the doors, ensuring no unwelcome guests breach your sanctuary. Furthermore, you'll need to actively repel creatures that dare to invade your closet or creep onto the bed positioned behind you. Your only tool against these horrors is a flashlight. While its beam can momentarily deter threats lurking at the extremities of hallways, extreme caution and keen auditory perception are paramount. The game's mechanics suggest that a direct confrontation with a creature that has advanced too close, by shining the light directly into its eyes, will result in a fatal outcome.

Name: Daylight
Description:
You awake, trapped in an abandoned hospital. Your only source of light is your phone. You hit a dead-end and must turn around, but behind you lurks an eerie presence and strange noises... Experience Daylight, a procedurally generated psychological thriller for your PC. Unreal Engine 4 enhances the visuals of your escape to freedom like never before, heightening every bone-chilling detail of your surroundings. Get lost in a maze that changes with every playthrough, allowing for limitless replayability and the tension of unpredictability every time you start the game. Navigate to safety while avoiding what lurks in darkness. What will be waiting for you down the next corridor?

**Okami HD: Embark on a Divine Wolf's Quest to Save Nippon**

**Okami HD** invites players into a visually captivating world, retelling an ancient legend with its signature **Sumi-e ink art style**, now presented in stunning high definition. You step into the paws of **Amaterasu**, the revered Japanese sun goddess, who takes the form of a magnificent white wolf. Your crucial mission is to **vanquish Orochi**, a fearsome eight-headed demon whose darkness has plunged the land of Nippon into despair.

This enhanced version of Okami HD offers players choices to personalize their journey. You can select between the **modern widescreen format** or the **original 4:3 aspect ratio**, honoring the game's debut. Additionally, the beloved **interactive loading screens** have been retained, offering a nostalgic touch. As one critic noted, the game's visual presentation is "truly a work of art," allowing for a deeper connection to the story of restoring light to a darkened realm. This edition provides exceptional clarity and visual detail, ensuring a truly immersive experience.

Name: The Longest Journey
Description:
The Longest Journey is an amazing graphical adventure, where the player controls the protagonist, April Ryan, on her journey between parallel universes. Embark on an exciting and original journey of discovery, where you will explore, solve puzzles, meet new people, face terrifying monsters, learn, grow, and live the adventure of a lifetime! Over 150 locations spanning two distinct and detailed worlds More than 70 speaking characters 40+ hours of gameplay 20+ minutes of high-resolution pre-rendered video footage Cinematic musical score

Name: The Curse of Monkey Island
Description:
I've sailed the seas from Trinidad to Tortuga and I've never seen anything like it! The engagement ring I gave Elaine has a terrible pirate curse on it. LeChuck is behind it, I'm sure. I should have known that nothing good could come out of that evil zombie's treasures. And if that's not bad enough, the clairvoyant I met in the mangrove swamp told me that if I am to break the curse and save Elaine, I will have to die! Excerpted from ''The Memoirs of Guybrush Threepwood: The Monkey Island Years'' - Third in the legendary Monkey Island series of graphic adventures - Film quality animation, voice, sound and music--the undead come to life before your very eyes! - Incredible high-resolution (640 x 480) graphics! - A barrel of gameplay--estimated 30-plus hours! - Two difficulty settings: regular and Mega-Monkey (now with more puzzley goodness)! - New and improved insults suitable for swordfights and other fun occasions!

Name: Resident Evil 2
Description:
The genre-defining masterpiece Resident Evil 2 returns, completely rebuilt from the ground up for a deeper narrative experience. Using Capcom’s proprietary RE Engine, Resident Evil 2 offers a fresh take on the classic survival horror saga with breathtakingly realistic visuals, heart-pounding immersive audio, a new over-the-shoulder camera, and modernized controls on top of gameplay modes from the original game. In Resident Evil 2, the classic action, tense exploration, and puzzle solving gameplay that defined the Resident Evil series returns. Players join rookie police officer Leon Kennedy and college student Claire Redfield, who are thrust together by a disastrous outbreak in Raccoon City that transformed its population into deadly zombies. Both Leon and Claire have their own separate playable campaigns, allowing players to see the story from both characters’ perspectives. The fate of these two fan favorite characters is in players hands as they work together to survive and get to the bottom of what is behind the terrifying attack on the city. Will they make it out alive? A spine-chilling reimagining of a horror classic - Based on the original release in 1998, the new game has been completely rebuilt from the ground up for a deeper narrative experience. A whole new perspective – New over-the-shoulder camera mode and modernized control scheme creates a more modern take on the survival horror experience and offers players a trip down memory lane with the original gameplay modes from the 1998 release. Terrifyingly realistic visuals – Built on Capcom’s proprietary RE Engine, Resident Evil 2 delivers breathtakingly photorealistic visuals whilst stunning lighting creates an up-close, intense and atmospheric experience as players roam the corridors of the Raccoon City Police Department (RPD). Face the grotesque hordes – Zombies are brought to life with a horrifyingly realistic wet gore effect as they react in real time taking instant visible damage, making every bullet count. Iconic series defining gameplay – Engage in frenzied combat with enemies, explore dark menacing corridors, solve puzzles to access areas and collect and use items discovered around the environment in a terrifying constant fight for survival. See favorite characters in a whole new light - Join rookie police officer Leon S. Kennedy on his first day in the job and college student Claire Redfield, who is searching for her brother amidst a terrifying zombie epidemic. Step into the rookie shoes of both heroes - Enjoy separately playable campaigns for both Leon and Claire, allowing players to see the story from both characters’ perspective.

**Rise of Nations: Extended Edition: A Real-Time Historical Grand Strategy**

Rise of Nations: Extended Edition lets you guide a civilization through history, from its humble beginnings to the modern age, all in a real-time strategy setting. You'll need to manage resources, build up your cities, and research new technologies to advance through different historical eras, starting from a small village in the Ancient Age. Building famous Wonders of the World, like the Pyramids or the Eiffel Tower, is crucial as they offer big strategic boosts. You can also raise a powerful army, using everything from ancient soldiers to modern planes and ships, to take over other nations. What's amazing is that you can experience a full historical journey and potentially win the game in a single session, often in under an hour.

The Extended Edition enhances the original Rise of Nations with the Thrones and Patriots expansions and several key upgrades. This version includes 18 distinct nations, each with unique strengths and special units. It also boasts over a hundred different military units for land, sea, and air. Players can develop their nations by constructing more than two dozen buildings, each with upgrade options and technological advances that move a society from its early days to the Information Age. The game features 14 Wonders of the World to build, along with over a dozen varied map types, from the Amazon to the Himalayas. A main campaign, "Conquer the World," offers linked scenarios based on historical wars. The Extended Edition also brings improved graphics with updated visuals and smoother anti-aliasing, plus full Steamworks support for features like ranked multiplayer, achievements, trading cards, and cloud saves.

Embark on an unforgettable journey with **'There Is No Game: Wrong Dimension'**, a hilarious Point & Click comedy adventure that thrusts you into a series of bizarre and unexpected video game universes. Your primary objective is to navigate these quirky digital realms and discover if you can outsmart the "Game" itself to find your way back home. This unique experience is strictly a **Point & Click** affair, so feel free to set aside your controller.

Prepare yourself for **incredible 3D graphics** that are, paradoxically, entirely flat and remarkably pixelated. The game boasts **almost fully voiced dialogue**, though you might encounter a few charming foreign accents sprinkled throughout. To progress, you'll need to solve **riddles that demand 'Outside the box' thinking**, and thankfully, a helpful hint system is included for those moments when thinking outside the box proves challenging.

**'There Is No Game: Wrong Dimension'** offers a refreshingly concise experience, significantly shorter than any MMORPG. Along your adventure, you'll have the opportunity to **discover the Top 10 best walls** – the fourth one is particularly noteworthy! This non-VR title is also **motion sickness free**, a remarkable feat. Be aware that the game is intentionally packed with **tons of bugs**, which are an integral part of its design, alongside numerous other delightful surprises. If you missed the buzz around **'There Is No Game'**, the winner of the 2015 Construct Jam, that's perfectly fine! Instead of diving into this peculiar, seemingly pointless video game, you might consider playing Battle of Duty.

Name: Sid Meier's Pirates!
Description:
Sail the Caribbean, marauding all on the high seas or ally your ship and crew as a privateer in search of riches - the life you choose is up to you. Face dogged enemies, raid unsuspecting villages, woo fair maidens, avoid capture or dig for buried treasure. Discover what it takes to become one of the most famous pirates in history!

Return to the Caribbean for a thrilling pirate adventure in **Monkey Island™ 2 Special Edition: LeChuck’s Revenge™**. This remastered classic puts you back in the shoes of the bumbling pirate hopeful, Guybrush Threepwood, as he searches for the legendary treasure of Big Whoop. Your quest is complicated by the return of your nemesis, the ghost pirate LeChuck, who is now a terrifying **zombie** seeking revenge. To defeat LeChuck and become the greatest pirate, Guybrush must use his cleverness, humor, and bravery.

You'll face many challenges, like using **voodoo dolls**, competing in **spitting contests**, and exploring strange **amusement parks**. Along the way, you'll meet familiar faces and new enemies. You'll need all your "mojo" to escape LeChuck's pursuit.

**Monkey Island™ 2 Special Edition** enhances the original story with exciting new features. The developers stated that the game boasts **high-definition graphics** with a new, hand-drawn art style. The original voice actors return to provide **full voice over**, bringing the characters to life. The **music score has been re-mastered and re-recorded with live instruments**, creating a richer sound. A unique **scene-for-scene hot swap feature** lets you switch between the Special Edition and the original game at any time. The game also includes a new interface, improved controls, and an **in-game hint system** to help with puzzles.

This edition also adds modern features like **direct character control** for a more immersive experience and **interactive object highlighting** to help find clues. Explore **in-game art viewer** for never-before-seen artwork and listen to **original developer commentary** from industry veterans like Ron Gilbert, Tim Schafer, and Dave Grossman. Finally, earn **SteamWorks Achievements** to prove your pirate skills.

Name: Dead Space
Description:
The sci-fi survival-horror classic Dead Space™ returns, completely rebuilt from the ground up to offer a deeper, more immersive experience. This remake brings jaw-dropping visual fidelity, suspenseful atmospheric audio, and improvements to gameplay while staying faithful to the original game’s thrilling vision. Isaac Clarke is an everyman engineer on a mission to repair a vast mining ship, the USG Ishimura, only to discover something has gone horribly wrong. The ship's crew has been slaughtered and Isaac’s beloved partner, Nicole, is lost somewhere on board. Now alone and armed with only his engineering tools and skills, Isaac races to find Nicole as the nightmarish mystery of what happened aboard the Ishimura unravels around him. Trapped with hostile creatures called Necromorphs, Isaac faces a battle for survival, not only against the escalating terrors of the ship but against his own crumbling sanity. IMMERSE YOURSELF IN NEXT-GEN SCI-FI HORROR A sci-fi horror classic returns fully rebuilt from the ground up with elevated visual fidelity and 3D atmospheric audio. From the frighteningly detailed rooms and workspaces of a slaughtered crew to the eerie atmospheric sounds of a desolate spaceship, you’ll explore a stunning sci-fi setting full of unpredictable and tense moments without interruption. UNRAVEL THE MYSTERY ABOARD THE USG ISHIMURA What starts as a routine repair mission for engineer Isaac Clarke and the crew of the USG Kellion quickly turns into a battle for survival as the truth behind the horrors onboard begins to unravel. Following an expanded narrative experience, uncover the dark secrets behind the events aboard the USG Ishimura through the final logs of the ill-fated crew and your encounters with the few survivors that remain. IMPROVISE TO SURVIVE Confront the nightmare aboard the USG Ishimura with genre-defining strategic gameplay. Repurpose and upgrade Isaac’s engineering tools to creatively defeat enemies with precision.

Bionic Commando Rearmed, a modern reimagining of the beloved NES classic, has arrived on PC, bringing its signature side-scrolling action to a new generation. This faithful remake, released two decades after the original's debut, meticulously recreates the 8-bit world with a stunning '2.5D' visual overhaul. At its core, Bionic Commando Rearmed retains the exhilarating blend of grappling and gunplay that defined the original, presented in an intense 2D side-scrolling format. The experience is further enhanced by a completely new soundtrack, expertly crafted to evoke the spirit of the classic 8-bit melodies.

However, Bionic Commando Rearmed transcends a simple facelift, introducing a wealth of new content. Players can now engage in two-player cooperative play, face off against more intelligent enemy AI, and master an expanded arsenal of bionic arm abilities and new weapons. The game also boasts larger boss encounters and online rankings to challenge players. Adhering closely to the narrative of the NES original, Bionic Commando Rearmed chronicles Nathan 'R.A.D.' Spencer's inaugural mission: a daring rescue of captured agent Super Joe from the clutches of the Imperials. Long-time fans will recognize all the familiar characters from the NES version, alongside the memorable moments that cemented the game's enduring popularity. Furthermore, Rearmed offers a compelling link to its 3D counterpart, Bionic Commando, available on PC, featuring unlockable content, in-game hints, and a narrative that bridges both titles.

Key Features of Bionic Commando Rearmed include:

*   **Classic Gameplay, Modernized:** Experience the iconic side-scrolling action of Bionic Commando, now enhanced with new abilities, weapons, and formidable bosses.
*   **Two-Player Co-op:** Team up with a friend for cooperative missions.
*   **Visual and Audio Overhaul:** Enjoy a complete modernization of the game's visuals and sound design.
*   **Cross-Game Interoperability:** Progress in Bionic Commando Rearmed to unlock exclusive content and hints for the upcoming Bionic Commando sequel.
*   **Challenge Rooms:** Test your skills in obstacle courses and swing puzzles, with your best times recorded on online leaderboards.
*   **Top-Down Stages:** Relive the classic top-down scrolling gameplay from the original's 'Enemy Encounter' stages, complete with remixed music.
*   **Multiplayer Mayhem:** Up to four players can compete in a chaotic melee of shooting and swinging.
*   **Artistic Direction:** Features in-game art designed by Shinkiro, a renowned artist from Capcom.

Persona 5 Royal: The Ultimate Phantom Thief Adventure

Embark on the definitive edition of the acclaimed RPG, Persona 5 Royal. This enhanced version delivers an unmatched experience, brimming with a vast array of previously released downloadable content.

A New Beginning in Tokyo

The protagonist finds himself transferred to a high school in Tokyo. Shortly after his arrival, he experiences a strange dream. "You are truly a prisoner of fate," a voice warns him. "In the near future, ruin awaits you." Confronting the imminent threat of "rehabilitation," he must assume the mantle of a Phantom Thief. His crucial mission is to free others from their twisted desires.

Key Features of Persona 5 Royal

*   **Explore Tokyo:** Immerse yourself in the city's lively streets and discover its secret locations.
*   **Unlock Personas:** Collect formidable allies who will assist you on your journey.
*   **Customize Your Thieves Den:** Personalize your secret base and display your accomplishments.
*   **Experience Alternate Endings:** Your decisions profoundly influence the story, leading to various outcomes.

Become the Ultimate Phantom Thief

Challenge the status quo and discover your hidden potential. Fight for justice in this ultimate iteration of Persona 5 Royal. This edition includes more than 40 downloadable content items released previously. Furthermore, you can select between Japanese and English voice-overs to customize your gameplay.

Name: Divinity: Original Sin - Enhanced Edition
Description:
Gather your party and get back to the roots of great RPG gameplay. Discuss your decisions with companions; fight foes in turn-based combat; explore an open world and interact with everything and everyone you see. You take on the role of a young Source Hunter: your job is to rid the world of those who use the foulest of magics. Embarking on what should have been a routine murder investigation, you find yourself in the middle of a plot that threatens to destroy the very fabric of time. A complete revamp : Thousands of enhancements, full voiceovers, new game modes, full controller support, split-screen co-op, hours of new and revised story content, a brand-new ending, new weapon styles, new skills, new puzzles, new enemies, better loot, better balancing and much, much more! New game modes for extra replay . Explorer Mode for story-focused RPG fans. Classic Mode for those who want it just right. Tactician Mode for hardcore players, featuring fully reworked encounters, different traps and new and smarter enemy types. And Honour Mode, for the tactical geniuses among you! Pen-and-paper-like freedom . Explore many different environments, fight all kinds of fantastical creatures, and discover tons of desirable items. You will be amazed at how much freedom the games gives you. Manipulate the environment and use skill & spell combos to overcome your many foes. Warm up ice to create water. Boil the water to create a steam cloud. Electrify the steam cloud to create a static cloud and stun your enemies! Play with a friend in co-op multiplayer , either online or with dynamic split-screen. Unravel a deep and epic story , set in the early days of the Divinity universe. Discuss with your party members how to handle the many decisions you'll need to make. Classless creation lets you design the character of your choice . Endless item interaction and combinations take exploration and experimentation to new levels of freedom.

Name: God of War
Description:
Enter the Norse realm His vengeance against the Gods of Olympus years behind him, Kratos now lives as a man in the realm of Norse Gods and monsters. It is in this harsh, unforgiving world that he must fight to survive… and teach his son to do the same. Grasp a second chance Kratos is a father again. As mentor and protector to Atreus, a son determined to earn his respect, he is forced to deal with and control the rage that has long defined him while out in a very dangerous world with his son. Journey to a dark, elemental world of fearsome creatures From the marble and columns of ornate Olympus to the gritty forests, mountains and caves of pre-Viking Norse lore, this is a distinctly new realm with its own pantheon of creatures, monsters and gods. Engage in visceral, physical combat With an over the shoulder camera that brings the player closer to the action than ever before, fights in God of War™ mirror the pantheon of Norse creatures Kratos will face: grand, gritty and grueling. A new main weapon and new abilities retain the defining spirit of the God of War series while presenting a vision of conflict that forges new ground in the genre. PC FEATURES High Fidelity Graphics Striking visuals enhanced on PC. Enjoy true 4K resolution, on supported devices, [MU1] with unlocked framerates for peak performance. Dial in your settings via a wide range of graphical presets and options including higher resolution shadows, improved screen space reflections, the addition of GTAO and SSDO, and much more. NVIDIA® DLSS and Reflex Support Quality meets performance. Harness the AI power of NVIDIA Deep Learning Super Sampling (DLSS) to boost frame rates and generate beautiful, sharp images on select Nvidia GPUs. Utilize NVIDIA Reflex low latency technology allowing you to react quicker and hit harder combos with the responsive gameplay you crave on GeForce GPUs. Controls Customization Play your way. With support for the DUALSHOCK®4 and DUALSENSE® wireless controllers, a wide range of other gamepads, and fully customizable bindings for mouse and keyboard, you have the power to fine-tune every action to match your playstyle. Ultra-wide Support Immerse yourself like never before. Journey through the Norse realms taking in breathtaking vistas in panoramic widescreen. With 21:9 ultra-widescreen support, God of War™ presents a cinema quality experience that further expands the original seamless theatrical vision.

Prepare for the deepest, most intricate simulation of a world ever created. Dwarf Fortress doesn't just generate geometry; it simulates an entire world, complete with the rise and fall of civilizations, unique personalities, creatures, and cultures. This means infinite hours of gameplay, now enhanced with beautiful pixel graphics!

Learn the basics with helpful in-game tutorials. This is a lifetime "living" project, continuously created and updated since 2003 with no end in sight. Generate your unique world and manage a bustling colony of dwarves, even as they mine towards their eventual demise. It's a new, endless hobby, just for you!

The legendary Dwarf Fortress is now on Steam! Build a fortress and strive to help your dwarves survive threats like starvation, dragons, and madness. In this complex construction, management, and roguelike simulation, each generated world presents a unique challenge. These challenges stem from dwarves with their own simulated personalities or the ever-present threat of aquifers. Observe how your civilization falls into decline and learn for next time… until something else inevitably goes wrong.

The combat model is incredibly detailed, featuring skills, body parts, material properties, aimed attacks, wrestling, pain, nausea, various poison effects, and much more. It's difficult to fully convey the depth of the generation. Hundreds of animals and monsters, many randomly created for each world, populate the game. You'll also find generated poetry, musical forms, instruments, and dances for your dwarves to practice and perform. A dynamic weather model tracks wind, humidity, and air masses to create fronts, clouds, storms, and blizzards. Over two hundred rock and mineral types can appear, in their proper geological environments.

Remember the game's famous mantra: "Losing is fun!" Nothing substantial has changed under the hood; it's still the classic Dwarf Fortress, but with graphics and music included by default. A few enhancements won't alter its core appeal. You might already be familiar with the tile set mod packs from Michał “Mayday” Madej and Jacob 'Ironhand' Bowman. Their combined efforts have led to an all-new tileset featuring brand new pixel art by artists Carolyn Jong and Neoriceisgood. The Dwarf Fortress Steam edition boasts a 15-track soundtrack by Dabu, Simon Swerwer, and Águeda Macias, including tracks in the Dwarvish language!

It's never been easier to start playing! We've improved the new player experience with tutorials to guide you through building your first fort and keeping your dwarves happy. Command your dwarves as they search for wealth in their generated mountain. Your dwarves will need a steady supply of food and beer, but they’ll also need your guidance in surviving attacks from hostile civilizations, the wilderness, or even the dead.

Craft treasures and furniture from various materials. Establish a barony and support the increasingly demanding nobility. Read your dwarves’ thoughts to keep them happy. Build floodgates to divert water for farming, and/or prevent magma mishaps. Construct buildings and watch your dwarves discover and build their culture, engaging in activities like running taverns, libraries, and temples, or developing skills in pottery, animal training, bookbinding, and more.

Dwarf Fortress served as the original inspiration for games like RimWorld, Prison Architect, and Minecraft. It was one of the first video games acquired by the Museum of Modern Art in New York. The game has been updated for over 16 years by its creators, brothers Tarn “Toady One” and Zach “Threetoe” Adams. With the ambitious goal of simulating all of existence, Bay 12 Games estimates they are only about 44% done.

## Galactic Civilizations® II: Ultimate Edition - A Comprehensive Guide

Embark on an epic journey through space with **Galactic Civilizations® II: Ultimate Edition**. This definitive collection brings together the entire acclaimed saga, including the original PC strategy game of the year, **Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords**, the award-winning expansion **Dark Avatar**, and the latest addition, **Twilight of the Arnor**.

### Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords

Step into the shoes of a civilization leader in this sequel to the 2003 hit. You'll guide your space-faring society through a dangerous galaxy. Success hinges on balancing your economy, technology, diplomacy, culture, and military might. Forge alliances, wage wars, and strive for galactic domination. The game offers both randomly generated maps for endless replayability and a compelling multi-mission campaign detailing the struggle against an ancient threat known as the Dread Lords.

### Galactic Civilizations II: Dark Avatar

This expansion pack significantly enhances the gameplay of the original. **Dark Avatar** introduces new opponents, units, and a fresh campaign. Explore new gameplay mechanics such as mining asteroid belts for resources and colonizing unique planets that require specialized technologies. Employ spies for sabotage and defense, negotiate new diplomatic treaties, and face an improved artificial intelligence.

### Galactic Civilizations II: Twilight of the Arnor

Set in 2227, the galaxy is engulfed in war, orchestrated by the malevolent Dread Lords. However, the remaining factions, with humanity at the forefront, devise a plan to finally defeat them. This expansion broadens the **Galactic Civilizations II** universe with Terror Stars, unique technology trees for each civilization, and powerful editing tools for maps, scenarios, and campaigns. Discover new ship types, planetary improvements, and much more.

### Key Features of the Ultimate Edition

*   **Stunning Visuals:** A beautiful 3D engine brings planets, stars, asteroids, and ship battles to life.
*   **Custom Ship Design:** Create your own unique 3D ships piece by piece in the Shipyard.
*   **Diverse Civilizations:** Play as one of a dozen distinct civilizations or design your own.
*   **Multiple Victory Paths:** Achieve victory through military conquest, cultural dominance, political alliances, technological superiority, or ascension.
*   **Engaging Gameplay:** Experience dynamic galaxies of varying sizes.
*   **Advanced AI:** A superior multi-threaded AI provides a challenging experience without resorting to cheating.
*   **Online Competition:** Compete with players worldwide by uploading your scores to the Metaverse.
*   **Extensive Modding Support:** The fully moddable design allows players to create their own opponents, graphics, and scenarios.
*   **Sophisticated Diplomacy:** Engage in trade, form treaties, and build alliances with other civilizations.

**Silent Hunter® III: The Ultimate WWII Submarine Simulation**

Experience the pinnacle of submarine warfare with Silent Hunter® III, a game that redefines realism in WWII naval simulations. This installment boasts an all-new 3D engine, enhanced crew command features, and more authentic WWII naval action than ever before. Its cinematic graphics and straightforward, suspenseful gameplay cater to both dedicated realism enthusiasts and casual players alike.

Immerse yourself in a meticulously crafted, realistic environment. The game features a suspenseful atmosphere, complete with lifelike 3D water modeling, dynamic day/night cycles, and historically accurate submarines, ships, and aircraft. As one reviewer noted, the "detailed U-boat interiors, changing weather effects, and engaging audio represent the ultimate in WWII submarine warfare."

Command a deadly array of U-boats and weapons. Players can pilot the Type II, VII, IX, and XXI submarines, targeting Allied convoys and warships. Relive the epic submarine battles of WWII by silently stalking threatening escort ships, launching devastating torpedoes, or surfacing to engage enemies with your deck gun.

Forge your own realistic naval war story with the dynamic campaign. Your military career will be shaped by successful command decisions within an unscripted and non-linear WWII campaign.

Silent Hunter® III is accessible to players of all skill levels. A simplified learning curve makes it easier to handle than traditional simulations. The included naval academy tutorial guides you through the basics. You can also customize realism settings to suit your preferred style of WWII combat.

Take command of your crew, who will respond to orders and develop based on the outcomes of each patrol. For an even more engaging experience, enjoy multiplayer cooperative play for up to eight players via LAN.

Name: Into the Breach
Description:
The free major update, Into the Breach: Advanced Edition is now available! Nearly every aspect of the game is expanded with new content, including: New Mechs and Weapons: Five new mech squads and nearly forty new weapons. New Challenges: More enemies, more bosses, and more mission objectives. New Pilot Abilities: Four new pilots and triple the amount of pilot skills. “Unfair” Mode: A more challenging difficulty to test the most seasoned tacticians. The remnants of human civilization are threatened by gigantic creatures breeding beneath the earth. You must control powerful mechs from the future to hold off this alien threat. Each attempt to save the world presents a new randomly generated challenge in this turn-based strategy game from the makers of FTL. Key Features: Defend the Cities: Civilian buildings power your mechs. Defend them from the Vek and watch your fire! Perfect Your Strategy: All enemy attacks are telegraphed in minimalistic, turn-based combat. Analyze your opponent's attack and come up with the perfect counter every turn. Build the Ultimate Mech: Find powerful new weapons and unique pilots as you battle the Vek infestation across Corporate-Nation islands. Another Chance: Failure is not an option. When you are defeated, send help back through time to save another timeline!

Guild Wars 2 offers a vast open world focused on **discovery and exploration**. As you embark on your adventures, your **content guide** can offer suggestions, and your **compass** will point you toward interesting landmarks. Alternatively, simply choose a direction and let **adventure find you**.

Tyria is populated by characters with their own unique stories and objectives. You'll be **rewarded for helping them**, whether by completing renown hearts or participating in dynamic events. You can also thwart their plans for rewards.

When you encounter other players in the open world, you don't need to form a party to assist them. You can **lend a helping hand**, investigate a secret jumping puzzle, or team up against a formidable world boss. The game encourages playing your way, so **don't grind**!

Whether you're reviving fallen players, defending soldiers from a Risen onslaught, or gathering herbs, you'll **earn experience points**. As you play, you can **arm your character with an arsenal of new weapons**. Each profession wields these weapons differently, and every weapon type offers a distinct playstyle. You can further refine and customize your character by unlocking and equipping hundreds of skills and traits.

If you prefer immediate action, jump into **structured PvP**. Here, all players compete on an **equal footing**, with access to max-level gear and build options necessary to make your mark.

For those who love fashion, Guild Wars 2 provides ample opportunity to **express yourself through character design**. Equipping new weapons and armor unlocks their skins in your wardrobe. You can personalize your look with thousands of possible combinations and a vast selection of collectible dyes.

**Upgrade your free account** with a Guild Wars 2 expansion to gain access to login rewards, additional character and bag slots, expanded chat features, and more. You can visit the Black Lion Trading Company in-game and use your Steam Wallet for upgrades.

Expansions and Living World seasons introduce unique rewards and new **Masteries** to enhance your character's abilities. In **Guild Wars 2: Heart of Thorns**, you can unlock and upgrade your glider. **Guild Wars 2: Path of Fire** allows you to befriend a stable of mounts with powerful movement skills. **Guild Wars 2: End of Dragons** introduces fishing and skiff piloting. Each expansion also grants access to **nine elite specializations**, unlocking new weapon choices, skills, and abilities for your profession. You can also select the **revenant profession** at character creation, channeling legendary heroes and villains from Tyria's history.

Living World seasons continue the Guild Wars 2 narrative between expansions and must be purchased separately through your Story Journal or in Gem Store bundles. Playing Living World episodes unlocks new explorable zones, rewards, and Masteries. *Living World episodes become playable at level 80. Players may need to relaunch the game for the upgrade to take effect. **Please note that existing Guild Wars 2 player accounts cannot be accessed via Steam.

Name: The Making of Karateka
Description:
Prince of Persia creator Jordan Mechner was a college student when he created one of the biggest-selling games of 1984: Karateka. Now, in a new interactive documentary from Digital Eclipse, the story of how a teenager with an Apple II created one of the most groundbreaking, influential games of all time. THE ORIGIN STORY OF A LEGENDARY GAME CREATOR Discover how Karateka was made through an exhaustive archive of design documents, playable prototypes, and all-new video features. Like walking through a museum, you can explore the interactive timelines at your own pace. PLAY THE ACCLAIMED ORIGINALS Enjoy pixel-perfect versions of the original Karateka games and a variety of never-before-seen early prototypes, with rich quality-of-life features like save anywhere, rewind, chapter select, and director's commentary. TWO REMASTERED GAMES Karateka Remastered is an all-new version of the original game featuring cutting-room-floor content, commentary, achievements, and more. Deathbounce: Rebounded is a fast and frantic twin-stick shooter based on Jordan's unpublished prototype. A GROUNDBREAKING MASTERPIECE Discover how Karateka became one of the first games to include cinematic scenes, a moving original soundtrack, rotoscoped animation, and a Hollywood-style love story, influencing the decades of games that followed. THE GOLD MASTER SERIES New from Digital Eclipse (Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Cowabunga Collection, Atari 50: The Anniversary Celebration), the Gold Master Series presents iconic games in an innovative 'interactive documentary' format, putting the shared history of games and their creators into one comprehensive package.

## Star Control III: Concluding the Epic Space Saga

**Star Control III** brings the beloved Star Control series to a close, sending players on a critical mission to the Kessari Quadrant. A galaxy-ending danger threatens everything, and your task is to stop it and save countless lives. This game changes things up from the previous installment, **Star Control 2**. While many enjoyed these new ideas, some longtime fans had mixed feelings.

Even though the gameplay changes received different opinions, the story of **Star Control III** was widely praised. Critics and players, both new and old, loved its engaging plot. It's full of unexpected turns, unforgettable characters, and significant events. The game also includes a detailed diplomacy system. This allows for complex dealings with many different alien species, each with their own traits and aims. This strategic part makes the game much richer.

As one reviewer noted, "The narrative in **Star Control III** is truly its crowning achievement, weaving a tapestry of intrigue and emotion that resonates long after the credits roll." This deep storytelling, combined with the intricate diplomatic challenges, offers a unique experience. Whether you've followed the series from the start or are just joining, **Star Control III** invites you to experience its grand finale. Embark on this final journey and see its special appeal firsthand.

Age of Empires IV revitalizes the beloved real-time strategy genre, plunging players into pivotal historical conflicts. This modern take on RTS seamlessly integrates classic empire-building mechanics with fresh innovations, all presented in breathtaking 4K visuals.

**A Historical Odyssey**

Embark on a journey through a richly detailed historical world, featuring eight distinct civilizations such as the English, Chinese, and Delhi Sultanate. Your path to victory involves:

*   Cultivating thriving cities
*   Mastering essential resource management
*   Leading armies in both land and naval engagements

The game's four unique campaigns, comprising 35 missions, traverse 500 years of history, from the challenging Dark Ages to the flourishing Renaissance.

**Craft Your Empire's Destiny**

Experience history firsthand by stepping into the shoes of legendary figures. Will you guide Joan of Arc in her battles against the English, or command Genghis Khan's formidable Mongol hordes across the vastness of Asia? The fate of empires rests on your strategic decisions.

**Customize Your Gameplay with Mods (Beta)**

The integrated Mod Editor offers powerful tools for extensive customization. Design your own maps for skirmishes and multiplayer battles, craft unique mission scenarios, develop custom data packs, and envision entirely new gameplay experiences.

**Dominate the World Stage**

Engage in competitive or cooperative online play with up to seven other players across PVP and PVE multiplayer modes.

**An Age Accessible to All**

Age of Empires IV provides an accessible entry point for newcomers with its comprehensive tutorial, which clearly explains core RTS concepts. The Campaign Story Mode acts as a gentle introduction, ensuring a smooth learning curve. Simultaneously, veteran players will find new gameplay mechanics, strategic intricacies, and advanced combat possibilities to explore. As one critic observed, "Age of Empires IV masterfully balances the essence of classic RTS with contemporary design principles."

Name: Company of Heroes 3
Description:
Company of Heroes 3 is out now! Bigger and better than ever, CoH3 is bringing its acclaimed mix of action, tactics, and strategy to millions of fans across the world. Immerse yourself in two epic campaigns, four unique multiplayer & co-op factions, and a breathtaking new theatre spanning from the sweeping deserts of North Africa to the rolling hills of Italy. Join the Fight with new features such as Full Tactical Pause and our Dynamic Campaign Map enable you to take complete control of the battlefield. The Launch Edition is available until March 2nd. Purchase the Launch Edition to receive the following: Devil’s Brigade DLC Pack - A collection of perks inspired by the first commando units of World War 2. US Sniper Cosmetic [Legendary] US Rifleman Cosmetic [Legendary] US Scout Cosmetic [Legendary] M18 Hellcat Cosmetic [Legendary] M8 Greyhound Cosmetic [Legendary] Pioneer Profile & Title [Legendary] The legendary strategy franchise is back! Company of Heroes 3 is the ultimate package of action, tactics and strategy. Take charge in the heat of real-time battle, then command as a General guiding the overall campaign where every decision matters. Overwhelm your opponents with four unique factions and all-new international Battlegroups. Command ground, air and naval forces and build supply lines to crush enemy advances on the new Dynamic Campaign Map - no two playthroughs are ever alike! Play at your own pace across campaign and skirmish modes before diving into blistering multiplayer action. Discover the untold stories of a stunning Mediterranean theatre featuring next-generation destructible environments, all powered by Relic's proprietary Essence Engine. Company of Heroes 3 delivers the next generation of acclaimed tactical gameplay. Beloved combat mechanics collide with authentic new gameplay features, making for the deepest tactical experience to date. ​ Make use of daring flanking moves to expose enemy side armor, experience all new infantry breaching mechanics allowing you to flush enemy units from their garrisons, and master elevation to enhance your line of sight and gain the upper hand. Welcome to the Mediterranean - a breathtaking new theatre filled with untold stories of war. Engage ferocious enemy forces across Italian mountain passes, breathtaking coastal vistas and the sweeping deserts of N Africa. Stunning visuals deliver authentic and highly diverse environments designed to keep you on your toes. ​ Mountainous maps will require uniquely different strategies from coastal towns, with verticality now greatly affecting units’ line of sight (True Sight). Desert plains will call for careful reconnaissance and daring armored maneuvers. On this new frontline, intelligence trumps speed and clever use of local terrain will let you bewilder your opponents and rout them from the field. Experience the biggest single-player campaign in franchise history. The new Dynamic Campaign Map delivers full ‘sandbox-style’ gameplay, allowing players to command the overall war effort and experience an unprecedented level of strategic choice. ​ Establish vital supply lines before deploying rear guard defenses to secure your advance. Launch air and naval strikes to weaken and scatter enemy forces or liberate a nearby town to develop a Partisan spy network. Choose your forces and upgrade your veteran companies to match your playstyle. Meanwhile, the optional Full Tactical Pause feature allows players total control over the pacing of single-player action. Plan your attacks, then effortlessly queue up lethal precision plays that will give you the edge in battle. Company of Heroes 3 promises to delight even the most ardent WW2 enthusiasts thanks to the largest number of launch factions in the series to date. ​ New army customization mechanics will allow you to call in the help of a varied cast of specialist units. Take up the fight with new elite squads including the American-Canadian Special Service Forces, the revered Gurkhas from the Commonwealth and many more. ​ From devastating tank destroyers to clandestine recon vehicles, Company of Heroes 3 features the largest roster in the series to date. The super-light Weasel, the armor-sniping Nashorn, and the Chaffee Light Tank are just a few of the units making their debut. Also, let's not forget revamped classics like the M3 Recovery Vehicle Halftrack, which can now be used to repair and steal abandoned enemy vehicles! Feel the blistering impact of every mortar shell and naval bombardment with Relic's state-of-the-art Essence Engine. In Company of Heroes 3, every location becomes a fully destructible sandbox, opening up limitless tactical gameplay options for you or your enemy to exploit. ​ Bring fortified buildings crashing down onto enemy squads, then witness enhanced destruction mechanics at play as soldiers exploit fresh ruins as dynamic cover. Stunning new rendering and particle FX technology depicts fire, sand and smoke like never before. Brilliant new soldier animations combine with enhanced AI, delivering realistic squad reactions to the battlefield. Optimized for DirectX 12 and multi-core CPUs, Relic's new engine technology will deliver cinematic action to rival any Hollywood blockbuster.

Worbital is a real-time space war game where players command planets, build defenses, and unleash devastating weaponry. The core gameplay revolves around strategic destruction, aiming to be the last civilization standing in a chaotic solar system.

The game features intense interplanetary artillery warfare. Players must exploit shifting gravity to maneuver their shots and inflict maximum damage. Available tactics include using asteroids, creating black holes, and unleashing solar flares. As stated by the developers, planets can explode, potentially taking others with them, leading to a chain reaction of cosmic chaos.

Preparation and tactical building are key. Players can choose from a wide array of unique weapons and structures, such as Railguns, Lasers, World Rammers, Magnets, Orbit Boosters, Shield Defenses, Attack Ships, and Colonizers. While the game embraces mayhem, it's described as "100% pseudo-scientifically accurate," suggesting a focus on fun over strict realism.

Worbital offers a hype-filled experience for both close and distant friends. Players can execute perfectly timed attacks and defenses to overwhelm opponents. The game supports various modes, including Online Multiplayer, Split-Screen Multiplayer (requiring a gamepad per player), Single Player Skirmish, and a Single Player Campaign. Custom Rules Matches are also available. The game is currently localized in English, German, French, Spanish, and Finnish.

**The Battle of Polytopia: Conquer Strange Lands and Lead Your Tribe**

Welcome to **The Battle of Polytopia**, a unique turn-based strategy game where your goal is to **rule the world**! Dive into a world of strange lands, charismatic tribes, clever technologies, and captivating magic.

The game unfolds on **The Square**, the bizarre home planet of the Polytopians. This flat, square-shaped landmass drifts in an alternate dimension. The Polytopians are a curious and combative folk, divided into **15 distinct tribes**. Each tribe possesses its own unique characteristics, motivations, strengths, and weaknesses.

As a player, you become the ruler of one of these tribes. Your mission is to **build your civilization** while competing against the other tribes.

Will you lead the **Xin-Xi**, reserved traditionalists wary of change? Or perhaps the **Hoodrick**, known for their archery, love of nature, and delicious baked goods? Maybe the **Bardur**, who favor their local tavern and a unique drink called Ullefurgh?

Beware, however, of the **Vengir**. These purple rhino-pig riding warriors are fierce pillagers who enjoy sharpening their swords and vacationing at the misty Kithkga Boneyards. It's best not to cross them!

## Nova-111: Master Strategy and Puzzles in a Unique Sci-Fi Adventure

Dive into **Nova-111**, a unique sci-fi adventure that blends challenging puzzles with strategic combat. You'll explore a surreal world where turn-based and real-time gameplay meet. To survive your cosmic journey, you must collect new abilities and upgrade your starship. Remember, your greatest weapon is **SCIENCE** itself.

The game's core is its **innovative gameplay**. It mixes turn-based and real-time elements, forcing players to think differently and adapt strategies. "This unique fusion compels players to adopt unconventional thinking and adapt their strategies on the fly," creating a constantly evolving challenge. You'll face **strategic combat scenarios** where smarts beat brute force. The game features **mind-warping puzzles** designed to test your cognitive skills. Each planet is a **beautifully crafted world** with unique enemies, environmental challenges, and specific strategies for victory.

As you progress, you'll unlock **powerful abilities**, like special lasers and the game-changing **TIME-STOP ability**. This lets you manipulate time itself. The game also encourages customization through **ship upgrades and modules**. This lets you tailor your ship to overcome any obstacle. A **dynamic soundtrack** adapts to your actions, enhancing the immersive atmosphere. Ultimately, Nova-111 celebrates scientific advancement, reinforcing that **SCIENCE is your greatest weapon**. This title comes from former developers of the PixelJunk series and is supported by Indie Fund.

Medieval Kingdom Wars plunges you into the heart of the Hundred Years' War, beginning in 1336. You start as a minor noble, pledging loyalty to your King. With over a dozen nations and more than 50 distinct Lords to choose from, each campaign offers a unique and personal narrative. The game blends grand strategy with real-time action, creating a distinctive gameplay experience.

The game offers several ways to play. You can embark on the expansive Grand Campaign, engage in classical RTS skirmishes with solo, co-op, and multiplayer options, or experience a story-driven introductory campaign. This introductory campaign immerses you in the era through nine meticulously crafted scenarios.

**Redefining Strategy with Real-Time Progression**

Medieval Kingdom Wars operates entirely in real-time, featuring a rogue-like progression system. Every action, from strategic decisions to the heat of battle, is constantly saved, eliminating the need for multiple reloads or turns. This innovative approach fuses Fixed Force and RTS gameplay.
