It allows you to manage your army on the battlefield while simultaneously establishing siege camps, gathering resources, and training new troops as the conflict unfolds. As one developer noted, "The real-time nature means every decision has immediate consequences, no pausing to rethink."

**Brutal, Epic Battles Unfold**

Prepare for truly epic battles, featuring up to 120 battalions clashing simultaneously. Experience bloody sieges, intense field battles, and visceral naval warfare, all rendered with brutal historical realism and survival elements. The game incorporates mechanics like looting corpses and dismantling towns for resources, adding a gritty layer to the combat. The developers aimed for a visceral experience, stating, "We wanted players to feel the desperation and brutality of medieval warfare."

**Manage Your Towns Up-Close**

Gain the freedom to manage your settlements up-close and personal by entering towns in RTS mode. You can directly task your peasants, construct buildings and defensive walls, and strategically position your troops. This granular control complements the broader management of your kingdom on the world map.

**A Complex, Historical Tech Tree**

The Late Middle Ages were a period of significant technological advancement, and Medieval Kingdom Wars reflects this with a complex, historical tech tree. Discover over 240 innovations and local technologies, spanning religious advancements, military upgrades, and groundbreaking siege tactics.

**Feudal Diplomacy and Rebellion**

As your lordship grows, you'll navigate the intricacies of the complex feudal system. Maintain your service to the King, foster relationships with fellow lords, and influence the broader political landscape of Europe. The ultimate ambition? Rebellion and the overthrow of your King, unlocking an entirely new dimension of gameplay. This involves hiring new Lords, dividing land, and engaging in sophisticated European diplomacy.

**A Beautiful, Living Game World**

Explore a beautiful, living, and ever-changing game world. The map of Western Europe features nearly 200 towns and hamlets, each a hand-crafted, historically accurate reproduction of actual medieval settlements.

Furthermore, anticipate dynamic weather and season changes that impact gameplay, a social component for the grand campaign with chat and other features, over 30 unique units and siege weapons for each nation, wonderful music performed with real instruments, a powerful World Editor and modding tools, and free updates for months post-launch. This rare indie production, created by just three developers, also offers real-time in-game help from volunteer Mods and Developers. And much, much more awaits you.

Name: Eximius: Seize the Frontline
Description:
Eximius is a Strategic Action Shooter (FPS/RTS Hybrid) that focuses on squad-based combat. Eximius combines tactical First Person Shooter gameplay with high level strategic decision-making of a Real-time Strategy(RTS) game. The game features a competitive 5v5 team battles where players square off in a post apocalyptic urban environment. Play as a Commander ( RTS ) ; build base, train an army and call down support abilities to help your allies on the ground to gain territory. Play as an Officer ( FPS ) ; lead your infantry squad into combat and crush your enemies with your agile tactics or brute force. Capture resources for your team, upgrade weapons and equip battlesuits suitable for your combat role. Eximius provides a multi-role gameplay experience where each player could choose to play a diversely different role and fight not only with brawns but also with their brains. An expert shooter could be outnumbered, ambushed and overwhelmed if caught in a wrong position. While a scheming officer could be assassinated in the right moment at the frontline. Objectives The objective of the gameplay is to win by holding down the most victory points. Alternatively, if your forces are powerful enough, you can completely destroy your enemy’s base and win the match immediately. The command headquarters cannot be rebuilt and the game will be instantly over. Seamless Transition As a commander , you are also an officer. But you have the extra capability to switch to top down RTS interface to build bases and command units. An aggressive commander can also join the battle in the frontline but they are normally expected to stay in relative safety and manage base development. Commander needs to be nominated by the team. Base Building As the gameplay of Eximius revolves around Team vs Team battles, each team shares a base, resource and technology tree. RTS Commander to support the battle operations by training infantry units and vehicles,building bases and call in airstrikes or support abilities. Train Armies Commander can train AI infantry and assign them to players. Leading them as a frontline officer; your squad will fight with you sensibly , taking cover and help you both offensively and defensively. Tactical Battles Decide your combat roles and purchase weapons suitable to your play style and tactics. Your weapon and equipment determine your roles in the team. Respond to enemy strategy with appropriate firepower and equipments; be it vehicles , massive amount of infantry or sneaky players. Unlock Technologies As your resources and technology grow, you can construct increasingly powerful units such as armored vehicles, gunships and elite soldiers. Your team can also gain powerful team abilities when you tech up to new tiers. Call down artillery, deploy quick-response force or launch EMP strikes. BattleSuits The pinnacle of each team’s firepower is the legendary battle-suit. Equipping battlesuits allow players to use powerful abilities, have increased stats and is able to push the frontline much faster. Officers will have choice of several choice of battlesuits, each with their own play style and set of abilities. Axeron Corporation ( AXR ) AXR is private research organisation that turned into a security contractor out of global needs. Being at the forefront of science, many believes that this wealthy organisation holds key technologies that could bring about global peace. With limited manpower , the Axeron industrial complex produces highly advanced drones for their workforce , both for military and nonmilitary use. This elusive organisation operates in an extremely organised and stealthy manner. Nations that choose to fund AXR do so for their advanced scientific capability and confidence that they will be the solution to the growing mutant threat. Global Security Force ( GSF ) A peacekeeping organisation set up after the first initial great war; the GSF foundation is built upon the principles of securing the walls, recovering human survivors and rebuilding the civilized world. They command the largest military force in the world and operates on a near limitless budget. Nations that choose to fund GSF do so for their vast armies and their global presence.

Name: Line Of Defense Tactics - Tactical Advantage
Description:
A real-time strategy combat game based on the world of the Line Of Defense. Command a team of four Galactic Command marines in highly classified missions in space and on planets. Equip your team with all types of inventory items, including weapons of mass destruction, space and planetary vehicles as they fight hard to accomplish their missions based on issue #0 of the Line Of Defense comic by DC Comics. Line Of Defense Tactics also contains a full database of all assets from Line Of Defense MMO game – making it an excellent companion app Action based storyline based on the Line Of Defense comics Real time tactical combat with a persistent team of characters Fight the enemy in ship to ship combat, inside their bases, and on the ground Command infantry, autonomous androids, and vehicles to complete your missions Call in airstrikes, deploy turrets, and gain access to advanced weaponry as you progress Access the Line Of Defense MMO game's unit and equipment database for intel Line Of Defense is also available for mobile (iOS, Android) devices, PC and Mac OSX.

Name: Eternal Starlight VR
Description:
Activate your Neural Link to gain an omniscient view of the battlefield. Experience the conflict at any scale, as you plot the course that will lead your fleet to victory. Eternal Starlight is a tactical space combat game, built from the ground up for VR. Grabbing toy sized spaceships is so cool, you'll want to make Pew-Pew noises. Meet (and vaporize) colorful alien species, collect technology to upgrade your vessels and plot your next hyperspace jump while defending the remaining colonies of the human race. The game features dozens of vessels and over a hundred unique ship systems for you to acquire and experiment with. Positioning your ships and using their unique abilties will be key to defeating the foes you face. Utilizing an intuitive locomotion system, you can freely move through space by grabbing it. Zoom out to view the entire battlefield or focus in on a single fighter. Play seated, standing or in full room scale. Newly Added: ENDLESS MODE Choose from one of five unlockable factions and head off on a brand new procedurally generated adventure to reach The Center, a powerful alien structure with the potentially to shift the balance of power. Brand new enemies and weapons. Tailor your run to your liking by choosing your own difficulty modifiers. Dozens of updates and improvements. Available now!

Name: Nightmare Survival
Description:
Nightmare Survival is an arcade survival and scoring game. Kill monsters and score as many points as possible! Monsters have started to hunt you, and you need to defend yourself with a toy Kalashnikov assault rifle. The terrain is extremely limited, and the number of monsters is growing every minute, so you shouldn't retreat to avoid being trapped.

**Sid Meier's Civilization V: Your Path to Global Domination**

Step into the role of a world leader in Sid Meier's Civilization V, the celebrated turn-based strategy game where you guide your civilization from its earliest days through to the space age. Your mission is to build the ultimate empire by engaging in combat, forming alliances, advancing your research, and confronting historical figures.

**Discover the Core Elements:**

*   **Accessible Strategy:** The game features an easy-to-learn interface, allowing new players to quickly get started. Experienced players will appreciate the series' well-known depth and strategic control. As one reviewer noted, "Civilization V strikes a perfect balance between accessibility and complexity."
*   **Vivid Environments:** Explore and claim vast, beautifully rendered landscapes.
*   **Dynamic Multiplayer:**
    *   Challenge players worldwide or connect with friends locally through LAN.
    *   Discover new ways to customize your experience through mods.
    *   Easily find and install mods directly from the game's community hub.
*   **Wide System Support:** Civilization V is designed to run smoothly on a variety of computers, from high-end desktops to many portable laptops.
*   **Revolutionary Gameplay:**
    *   The introduction of a hexagonal grid transforms combat and city planning with new tactical possibilities.
    *   City-States introduce a fresh dimension to diplomatic interactions.
    *   An improved diplomacy system brings leaders to life with interactive personalities, leading to more engaging negotiations.

*Please note: The Modding SDK can be downloaded for free. Sid Meier's Civilization V is available for Mac, Linux, and SteamOS in English, French, Italian, German, and Spanish.*

**World of Goo** is an acclaimed physics-based puzzle and construction game where players manipulate living, squirming, and talking globs of goo. Your objective is to strategically drag and drop these **Goo Balls** to construct a variety of imaginative structures. These creations can range from essential bridges and powerful cannonballs to whimsical zeppelins and even enormous tongues. Millions of these eager Goo Balls inhabit the vibrant World of Goo, driven by an innate desire to explore, entirely unaware of their role in a game or their surprisingly delicious nature.

The game unfolds across **Mysterious Levels**, each presenting a uniquely dangerous yet beautiful environment. These levels introduce novel puzzles, distinct geographical areas, and the peculiar creatures that call them home. As you advance, you'll encounter **undiscovered species of Goo Ball**, each boasting its own special abilities. These diverse goo balls then unite to navigate compelling narratives filled with discovery, love, conspiracy, beauty, the mysteries of electric power, and the intricacies of the third dimension. An **enigmatic figure known as The Sign Painter** observes your progress throughout your journey. Furthermore, the **World of Goo Corporation**, a prominent entity that proudly proclaims itself the Global Leader in Goo and Goo-Related Products, plays a significant role. Their product line includes trademarked soft drinks and luxurious facial exfoliating lotions – truly succulent offerings! Finally, players worldwide can participate in a **Massive Online Competition**, vying for the top spot on a dynamic leaderboard by constructing the tallest goo towers within the mysterious sandbox of the World of Goo Corporation. The corporation is contractually obligated to declare all participants winners and enthusiastically celebrates every tower-building endeavor equally. Congratulations, and good luck!

Name: Shadowrun: Dragonfall - Director's Cut
Description:
Shadowrun: Dragonfall - Director’s Cut is a standalone release of Harebrained Schemes' critically-acclaimed Dragonfall campaign, which first premiered as a major expansion for Shadowrun Returns . The Director's Cut adds a host of new content and enhancements to the original game: 5 all-new missions, alternate endings, new music, a redesigned interface, team customization options, a revamped combat system, and more - making it the definitive version of this one-of-a-kind cyberpunk RPG experience. NOTE: The Director’s Cut is free to existing owners of the Dragonfall expansion for Shadowrun Returns . It will be automatically added to your Steam Library when the game is released. Man Meets Magic & Machine In 2012, magic returned to our world, awakening powerful creatures of myth and legend. Among them was the Great Dragon Feuerschwinge, who emerged without warning from the mountains of Germany, unleashing fire, death, and untold destruction across the countryside. It took German forces nearly four months to finally shoot her down - and when they did, their victory became known as The Dragonfall. It’s 42 years later - 2054 - and the world has changed. Unchecked advances in technology have blurred the line between man and machine. Elves and trolls walk among us, ruthless corporations bleed the world dry, and Feuerschwinge’s reign of terror is just a distant memory. Germany is splintered - a stable anarchy known as the “Flux State” controls the city of Berlin. It’s a place where power is ephemeral, almost anything goes, and the right connections can be the difference between success and starvation. For you and your team of battle-scarred shadowrunners, there’s no better place to earn a quick payday. Now, a new threat is rising, one that could mean untold chaos and devastation. One that soon has you and your team caught on the wrong side of a deadly conspiracy. The only clue: whispers of the Dragonfall. Rumors that the Great Dragon Feuerschwinge may still be alive, waiting for the right moment to return… Shadowrun: Dragonfall - Director’s Cut Features A Classic, Story-Driven cRPG: Dragonfall hearkens back to the golden age of computer RPG’s with a novel-like branching narrative full of sharp prose and deep character development. Immerse yourself in a smart, 20+ hour campaign with a diverse cast of all-too-human characters. A One-of-a-Kind Cyberpunk Setting: Experience the unique “Tech meets Magic” dystopian future of Shadowrun, a fan-favorite game setting now celebrating it’s 25th anniversary. Shadowrun: Dragonfall - Director’s Cut is the perfect entry point to the setting for those with no prior Shadowrun experience, while providing plenty of classic Shadowrun characters and tech for veteran players to sink their teeth into. Command Your Team: Lead a small team of shadowrunners - each with their own outlook, motivations, and backstory. The members of your team are designed to play contrasting roles during missions, and each has a distinct set of skills, abilities, strengths, and weaknesses. But it’s not all about the mission - each team member also has challenges to face in their own lives, which you can choose to brush aside or play an important part in. Gripping, Turn-Based Tactical Combat: When you’re running the shadows, every turn matters. Choose your actions wisely - move to better cover, charge into melee, or lob a fireball into a crowd of enemies. With over 200 weapons and spells at your disposal, every turn is filled with meaningful choices. Skill-Based Character Progression: Choose a starting character archetype and build from there! Street Samurai and Physical Adepts use advanced combat skills to dominate the battlefield, Shamans and Mages summon powerful allies and cast deadly spells, while Riggers and Deckers provide critical technological support, projecting their consciousness directly into drones and computer systems. Shadowrun: Dragonfall’s classless skill system allows you to grow your character in any direction you choose. New in the Director’s Cut Standalone: Due to popular demand, Dragonfall is now a completely standalone title! Five All-New Missions: The Director’s Cut features five all-new original missions, including three related directly to the personal stories of your team members. These missions take you to previously-unseen locales - both within the Flux State and beyond - where you’ll have to face challenging enemies and make tough choices in order to help your team members prevail. Revamped Combat System: The Dragonfall combat system has received a major overhaul. An all-new armor system adds another tactical layer to the experience, while refined cover and damage mechanics emphasize the importance of battlefield positioning. Complementing these improvements is an upgraded AI system which reacts more intelligently and accurately to your actions. Redesigned Interface: The Dragonfall in-game interface has also been rebuilt. Spells, items and abilities are now much easier to access, while improved combat feedback allows you to fully understand the tactical situation in any given encounter. Customize Your Team: Guide your team members as they progress in each of their unique roles, choosing between different focus options to grant them new items and abilities. In addition, if you don’t like a team member’s default spell, item or weapon loadout, you can now customize what they bring on each mission. Ten New Pieces of Original Music: Fan-favorite composer Jon Everist brings ten new tracks of moody cyberpunk music to the Dragonfall experience, including compositions based on the stories of individual members of your team. The Complete Dragonfall Soundtrack: As a free bonus, the Director’s Cut includes the entire soundtracks from both Dragonfall AND our previous title, Shadowrun Returns . This also includes the brand new tracks exclusive to the Director’s Cut . Featuring music from the composers of the classic Shadowrun SEGA and SNES games, this exciting cyberpunk soundtrack pays homage to the past with a modern sentiment. And Much More: Steam Achievements! Steam Trading Cards - collect your favorite Dragonfall characters All-new alternate endings to the main campaign Enhanced visual effects including splatter and dismemberment, improved animations, and optional post-processing effects New bioware augmentations provide an extra edge on the battlefield… if you’ve got the nuyen A variety of new items, cyberware & spells Additional player customization options Expanded character development for several side characters Writing and design tweaks and polish throughout!

Name: Plants vs. Zombies GOTY Edition
Description:
Zombies are invading your home, and the only defense is your arsenal of plants! Armed with an alien nursery-worth of zombie-zapping plants like peashooters and cherry bombs, you'll need to think fast and plant faster to stop dozens of types of zombies dead in their tracks. Obstacles like a setting sun, creeping fog and a swimming pool add to the challenge, and with five game modes to dig into, the fun never dies! Features Play five game modes: Adventure, Mini-Games, Puzzle, Survival, plus the stress-free Zen Garden Conquer all 50 levels of Adventure mode  through day, night, and fog, in a swimming pool and on the rooftop Battle 26 types of zombies including pole-vaulters, snorkelers and Zomboni drivers Earn 49 powerful perennials and collect coins to buy a pet snail, power-ups and more! Open the Almanac to see all the plants and zombies, plus amusing facts and quotes Browse Crazy Daves shop for special plants and tools to stem any zombie assault Amazing graphics and soundtrack, plus a bonus music video Infinite replayability: the game is never the same experience twice! Unlock all the Steam Achievements

Name: Machinarium
Description:
The definitive version of Machinarium is live! Help Josef the robot save his girlfriend Berta kidnapped by the Black Cap Brotherhood gang! Now in full-screen with 12 new achievements, additional languages and full controller support. Machinarium is the award-winning independent adventure game developed by the makers of Samorost, Botanicula and CHUCHEL. A little robot who’s been thrown out to the scrap yard behind the city must return and confront the Black Cap Brotherhood and save his robot-girl friend. World: Machinarium world is populated only by robots of various forms and functions. One of the most interesting places in this world is old, rusty and legendary city of Machinarium where the game takes place Story: You will have to get rid of wicked robots from the Black Cap Brotherhood and save the head of the city and also your robot-girl friend Puzzles: You will be solving many logical puzzles, adventure quests, brain teasers and mini-games Graphics: Backgrounds and characters are 2D hand-drawn and there is more then one hour of carefully crafted animations Music: Beautiful original soundtrack was composed and recorded by Floex (Samorost2 OST) Communication: You won't find any lengthy boring dialogs in this game, characters talk by comic bubbles with simple animations and symbols

**PuzzleQuest: Challenge of the Warlords** offers a groundbreaking fusion of classic puzzle-game mechanics with a compelling epic narrative, immersing players in a timeless struggle between good and evil. This unique experience challenges your **match-3 skills** as you confront formidable computer opponents, all with the ultimate goal of rescuing the Kingdom of Etheria from the clutches of the malevolent Lord Bane.

The core gameplay revolves around strategically matching various **crystal types**, a mechanic that directly contributes to building your arsenal of powerful spells. By skillfully outmaneuvering your adversaries, you can unleash these spells to disrupt their matching opportunities and systematically diminish their scores. Each triumphant head-to-head battle allows you to **build and enhance your heroic character**, forging a legend through victory. For those seeking a more immediate challenge, the **quick-play mode** provides a pure match-3 experience.

Venture into the vast and intricate **Kingdom of Etheria**, where you will discover a puzzle game unlike any you have encountered before. The game features an expansive **single-player campaign** boasting over 150 meticulously designed and challenging quests, ensuring hours of engaging gameplay. You can also dive into the excitement of the **Quick-play mode** to directly outmatch your opponent. As you progress, you will **build your empire** by capturing cities, constructing formidable castles, and assembling a loyal party of companions who will provide crucial aid in your battles. Furthermore, you will **earn gold** from each successful endeavor, enabling you to acquire essential equipment such as helms, weapons, and armor. Collecting **experience tiles** provides an instant boost to your character's development, while matching **skull tiles** inflicts direct damage upon your opponents, adding a layer of strategic offense to the puzzle-solving.

Name: SpaceChem
Description:
Zachtronics is back with an ambitious new design-based puzzle game. Take on the role of a Reactor Engineer working for SpaceChem , the leading chemical synthesizer for frontier colonies. Construct elaborate factories to transform raw materials into valuable chemical products! Streamline your designs to meet production quotas and survive encounters with the sinister threats that plague SpaceChem . KEY FEATURES: Over Fifty Mind-bending Puzzles! An original soundtrack by Evan Le Ny, whose music was featured in The Codex of Alchemical Engineering! Twenty challenging achievements!

## Superbrothers: Sword & Sworcery EP: An Audiovisual Adventure

Superbrothers: Sword & Sworcery EP is an exploratory action-adventure game celebrated for its distinctive audiovisual style. Players journey through a mythic realm, engaging in sword combat and using "sworcery" to unravel mystical musical puzzles.

### Gameplay and Features

*   **A Laid-Back Journey:** Guide a warrior monk on a relaxed adventure through a bronze age mountain wilderness.
*   **Mystical Puzzles:** Solve enigmatic musical puzzles to aid The Scythian in completing her important quest.
*   **A Unique World:** Explore a beautifully painted, mythopoetic storyworld that is influenced by real-world moon phases. This world was conceived and crafted by a representative of Superbrothers Inc.
*   **A Prog Rock Experience:** Immerse yourself in a game that feels like a concept album you can inhabit.

### Audiovisual Masterpiece

*   **Original Soundtrack:** Enjoy an album's worth of original music by the acclaimed composer Jim Guthrie.
*   **Artistic Vision:** Experience artwork and designs from Superbrothers Inc., brought to life by the skilled developers at Capy in Toronto, Canada.

### Enhanced Edition

The new edition of Superbrothers: Sword & Sworcery EP has been remastered for public display. It features:

*   **Sharp Visuals:** Razor-sharp pixels enhance the game's aesthetic.
*   **Refined Audio:** An improved audio mix is ideal for home theatre or cinema projection.
*   **Mouse Support:** The game has been re-engineered by Capy to support two-button mouse input.

### Cooperative Play

*   **Twitter Integration:** Optionally cooperate with friends via Twitter. Share clues and insights as you delve deeper into the game's esoteric mysteries.

### Soundtrack Details

Jim Guthrie's "Sword & Sworcery LP: The Ballad of the Space Babies" is a landmark prog rock concept album. Kotaku named Jim's compositions the Best Videogame Music of 2011. Double Fine's Tim Schafer praised the music, stating, "The music is amazing. I want Jim Guthrie to score my life."

**Track List:**

*   Dark Flute (02:40)
*   Lone Star (02:35)
*   Doom Sock (02:35)
*   The Prettiest Weed (02:19)
*   The Cloud (03:50)
*   Under A Tree (05:03)
*   The Maelstrom (01:56)
*   The Ballad Of The Space Babies (03:06)
*   Unknowable Geometry (04:02)
*   Bones McCoy (02:06)
*   Ode To A Room (01:43)
*   The Prettiest Remix (00:56)
*   The Whirling Infinite (02:30)
*   Little Furnace (03:25)

**Bonus Tracks:**

*   Intro (00:01)
*   Cabin Music (02:39)
*   Battles 1 (00:48)
*   Battles 2 (00:35)
*   Com64 (01:21)
*   Mushrooms (02:15)
*   Death To Everyone (01:13)
*   Confronting The Wolf (01:20)
*   Up A Mountain (01:28)
*   Activating Trigons (01:23)
*   How We Get Old (05:21)
*   And We Got Older (04:47)
*   Bonus Track Outro (00:02)

**Soundtrack Location:**

Songs will be located in your Superbrothers: Sword and Sworcery EP Folder within the Steam Directory: `...Steam\steamapps\common\superbrothers sword & sworcery ep\soundtrack`

Name: Puzzle Quest 2
Description:
Escape to a puzzle game fantasy world filled with amazing creatures, powerful weapons, and challenging minigames! Addicting Match 3 gameplay is blended seamlessly with immersive role playing in this sequel to the award-winning Puzzle Quest! Jump right into the action and customize your character with any one of four classes, each with different skills and abilities. Gain experience and earn treasure as you progress through the adventure, unlocking new spells and harder Match 3 challenges! Are you a brave enough hero to reclaim the once peaceful village of Verloren from the evil clutches of the demon Gorgon? Key Features Learn to use new mana gems, spells, weapons and much more. Customize your characters with 4 classes in both genders. Explore an immense and immersive fantasy world in story mode! Play tons of unique minigames to earn treasure and experience. Upgrade and equip your character then battle your friends online!

**Divide By Sheep: A Grim Puzzle Adventure**

In "Divide By Sheep," players are tasked with guiding a flock of sheep to safety amidst a series of increasingly perilous challenges. This unique puzzle adventure game masterfully blends fundamental mathematical concepts like addition and subtraction with a darkly humorous narrative. The premise is certainly unusual: the Grim Reaper, seeking companionship, orchestrates a catastrophic flood to gather sheep. Players must then help these stranded, woolly creatures escape rapidly sinking islands by solving ingenious math puzzles.

The game's progression is notable, starting with a playful introduction to mathematical concepts that quickly escalates in complexity and macabre wit. As one reviewer observed, "The puzzles start off fairly easy and playful, yet quickly escalate in both difficulty and dark humor." "Divide By Sheep" features 120 mind-bending challenges distributed across four distinct worlds. Players can expect to encounter a variety of obstacles and elements, including lasers, wolves, and even the Grim Reaper's pet kraken. The game's own pragmatic advice encourages players to "Do whatever it takes to succeed," a sentiment that might involve difficult choices regarding the fate of sheep, wolves, or pigs.

The visual presentation of "Divide By Sheep" is equally striking, evolving from charmingly cute to unsettlingly disturbing. This unique visual progression was highlighted by one observer who noted, "Fabulous art-work that quickly goes from cute to disturbing." Due to the mature themes present in the game, parental guidance is strongly advised. To accommodate a younger audience, the developers have thoughtfully included an option in the main menu to disable blood effects, allowing for a more child-friendly experience. It is recommended to utilize parental controls before providing the game to children.

**LEGO® Batman™ 2: DC Super Heroes: Gotham's Greatest Alliance**

For the first time, Batman and Robin are not alone in defending Gotham City. In **LEGO® Batman™ 2: DC Super Heroes**, players witness an epic team-up as iconic DC Comics heroes like Superman, Wonder Woman, and Green Lantern join forces. Their urgent mission is to stop the villainous Lex Luthor and the Joker from plunging Gotham into chaos.

This installment brings a host of new features to the LEGO gaming world. Developers have stated that players can "unlock and play as over 50 DC Comics characters," each with their own special abilities. A major innovation is the introduction of "new Super Abilities." Imagine soaring through the city with "free-roaming flight," using "Super-Breath" to interact with the environment, or employing "Heat Vision" to clear a path. The game also features "advanced suits and gadgets," including Batman's "Power Suit" and Robin's "Hazard Suit" equipped with a "Pressure Cannon." Players can explore the expansive "Gotham City" on foot, by air, or using vehicles like the Batmobile, Batwing, and Batboat.

A significant development for the LEGO series, as highlighted by reviewers, is the addition of "fully voiced characters," enhancing the player's immersion. For cooperative play, the game offers "seamless drop-in/drop-out co-op" and "dynamic split-screen," allowing friends and family to easily join the adventure together.

**LEGO® Harry Potter: Years 5-7: Your Magical Journey Awaits**

Step into the wizarding world with LEGO® Harry Potter: Years 5-7, a game that brings the final chapters of Harry Potter's story to life. This adventure covers the last three books and four films, guiding players through Harry's epic journey. You'll explore familiar and new magical locations, from Privet Drive to Hogwarts. Along the way, you'll meet new characters and face exciting challenges. Prepare for the ultimate showdown with Lord Voldemort!

**Key Features:**

*   **Master New Magic:** Learn and cast powerful spells, including the Unforgivable Curses.
*   **Become a Master Duelist:** Hone your skills in advanced duels and fight against Voldemort's Death Eaters.
*   **Collect Iconic Characters:** Unlock over 100 characters, such as Fenrir Greyback, Bellatrix Lestrange, and Professor Slughorn.
*   **Explore Enchanting Locations:** Discover new places like Grimmauld Place, the Ministry of Magic, and Godric's Hollow.
*   **Play Together:** Enjoy easy drop-in/drop-out co-op play with dynamic split-screen, perfect for playing with friends and family.

**Become Detective Chase McCain and stop Rex Fury in LEGO® City Undercover!**

In LEGO® City Undercover, you play as Detective Chase McCain, a detective on a vital mission to stop the criminal Rex Fury. Fury has escaped, and crime is spreading through LEGO City. It's up to Chase to bring him in and clean up the streets.

This action-adventure game lets you explore a **huge, open-world LEGO City** with more than **20 different areas**. You can even play with a friend in **two-player co-op**. Your jobs include catching car thieves, finding **funny movie jokes**, and driving many different vehicles. The city also has **hundreds of secret items** to find. The game's creators say LEGO City Undercover is known for its **clever, fresh story** and its **unique LEGO humor**, making it a fun game for everyone. As one developer put it, the game offers a "truly engaging experience" that captures the spirit of LEGO.

Name: LEGO® The Lord of the Rings™
Description:
Based on The Lord of the Rings motion picture trilogy, LEGO® The Lord of the Rings follows the original story-lines of The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring, The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers, and The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King, taking players through the epic story events re-imagined with the humor and endless variety of LEGO play. Trusted with the dangerous task to destroy an ancient magical ring that threatens all that is good, Frodo is forced to leave his peaceful home. But the ring wants to be found and the road to Mount Doom, the only place where it can be destroyed, will be perilous and riddled with Orcs and fouler things. To help Frodo, a Fellowship is formed —Aragorn the Ranger, Gandalf the Wizard, Legolas the Elf, Gimli the Dwarf, Boromir a Man of Gondor, and Frodo’s Hobbit friends Sam, Merry and Pippin. Players relive the legend through the LEGO mini-figures, as they explore wonders, solve timeless riddles, and overcome endless foes in their quest to destroy the Ring. Key Features: Explore all of the open-world of Middle-earth and experience epic battles with Orcs, Uruk-hai, the Balrog, the Witch-king, and other fearsome creatures. Wield the power of the Palantír or Seeing-stone (‘one that looks far-away’), and jump between multiple story-lines. Experience the LEGO The Lord of the Rings heroes come to life in an all new way with the mini-fig characters delivering the dialogue from the films. Collect, combine and forge new items in the Blacksmith Shop using Mithril, the most precious metal in Middle-earth. Discover and unlock over more than 80 playable characters, including Frodo, Aragorn, Gandalf, and many others. Collect and use a variety of weaponry and magical items, including the Light of Earendil, Elven rope, swords, and bows. Play with family and friends with easy access drop-in, drop-out game play option.

Name: LEGO® Batman™: The Videogame
Description:
When all the villains in Arkham Asylum team up and break loose, only the dynamic duo is bold enough to take them on to save Gotham City. The fun of LEGO, the drama of Batman and the uniqueness of the combination makes for a comical and exciting adventure in LEGO Batman: The Videogame. Play as Batman and his sidekick Robin as you build, drive, swing and fight your way through Gotham City capturing escaped villains including The Joker, Penguin, Scarecrow and more. Then, jump into the story from the other side and play as Batmans foes! Enjoy the power you wield and battle Batman while spreading chaos throughout the city. There is no rest for the good (or evil!).

**LEGO® Harry Potter™: Years 1-4 - Build the Magic**

Step into the enchanting world of LEGO® Harry Potter™: Years 1-4, a video game that brings the first four iconic Harry Potter stories to life with the signature LEGO charm. This adventure invites players to **build the magic** as they journey from Harry's early days at Privet Drive through the excitement of the Triwizard Tournament.

The game allows you to **experience the wonder of Hogwarts™ School of Witchcraft and Wizardry** in a completely new way. You will master spells, mix potions, and revisit memorable scenes, all infused with a delightful **tongue-in-cheek humor**. The distinctive LEGO style also provides **creative customization** options that enhance your gameplay experience.

As one reviewer noted, the game offers a "delightful dose of tongue-in-cheek humor" that perfectly complements the magical narrative. Another source highlighted the game's ability to let players "build the magic," emphasizing the core LEGO mechanic.

**Key Features:**

*   **The Magic is Building!** Connect the bricks and relive the Harry Potter™ adventures, LEGO style.
*   **Play as Your Favorite Characters:** Assume the roles of Harry, Ron, Hermione, and a host of other cherished characters.
*   **Explore Iconic Locations:** Uncover the mysteries of Hogwarts™ castle, explore Diagon Alley™, venture into the Forbidden Forest, and visit the quaint village of Hogsmeade™.
*   **Co-op Play:** Join forces with a friend to cast spells and navigate through the first four stories together.

Name: LEGO® Indiana Jones™: The Original Adventures
Description:
Build, Battle and Brawl your way out of trouble! Play through all three classic Indiana Jones™ movies and relive your favorite Indy adventures in the tongue-in-cheek worlds of LEGO®. Explore and Discover - Battle enemies, solve puzzles, and seek out the world's greatest treasures. More Than 60 Playable Characters - Take control of Indy, his friends, and even his enemies. Team up with a friend and together search for fortune and glory. Whip Into Action! - Attack and disarm enemies, swing over perilous pits, and interact with LEGO® objects and puzzles!

Name: LEGO® Marvel™ Super Heroes
Description:
LEGO® Marvel™ Super Heroes features an original story crossing the entire Marvel Universe. Players take control of Iron Man, Spider-Man, the Hulk, Captain America, Wolverine and many more Marvel characters as they unite to stop Loki and a host of other Marvel villains from assembling a super-weapon capable of destroying the world. Players will chase down Cosmic Bricks as they travel across LEGO Manhattan and visit key locations from the Marvel Universe, such as Stark Tower, Asteroid M, a Hydra base and the X-Mansion. Smash, swing and fly in the first LEGO videogame featuring more than 100 of your favorite Super Heroes and Super Villains from the Marvel Universe, including Iron Man, Wolverine, the Hulk, Spider-Man, Captain America, Black Widow, Loki and Deadpool. Help save Earth as your favorite Marvel character with your super-cool strengths and abilities: Iron Man flies, hovers, shoots missiles and unleashes a powerful unibeam directly from his chest. Spider-Man shoots webs, uses his spider-senses to spot objects invisible to others, crawls up walls and, of course, web-slings. Captain America throws his mighty shield at objects and enemies, embeds it into a wall to create a platform, and protects himself from damage. Hulk smashes! Perform new and powerful moves as “BIG-fig” characters like Hulk and Abomination. Leave a path of destruction as you smash through LEGO walls and throw cars using hyper strength. Discover LEGO Manhattan like never before, and travel to iconic locations from the Marvel Universe, such as the X-Mansion, Asteroid M and Asgard. Create unique Super Heroes with customizable characters. Enjoy an exciting original story, filled with classic LEGO videogame adventure and humor.

**LEGO® Star Wars™ - The Complete Saga: A Comprehensive Gaming Experience**

Embark on an epic adventure through all six Star Wars films with LEGO® Star Wars™ - The Complete Saga. This comprehensive videogame allows players to relive iconic moments from the beloved movie franchise, now reimagined with the signature LEGO charm. As reported by gaming enthusiasts, the game introduces a wealth of new content, including additional characters, expanded levels, and innovative gameplay mechanics designed to enhance the player experience. For the first time, PC gamers can construct and battle their way through a vibrant LEGO Star Wars galaxy, offering a unique blend of creative building and action-packed combat.

The gameplay has been significantly upgraded, featuring enhanced Force Powers that grant players new abilities and strategic options. New power-ups and Challenge Modes further diversify the experience, encouraging players to utilize creative thinking and teamwork to overcome obstacles. The game boasts an impressive roster of over 120 playable characters, with the addition of fan favorites such as Watto, Zam Wessell, and Boss Nass. A revamped Character Customizer offers millions of unique combinations, allowing players to create cross-trilogy mash-up characters like Han Windu and Lando Amidala by mixing character parts from all six films. Furthermore, redesigned levels, including the thrilling 'Mos Espa Podrace' and 'Gunship Cavalry,' leverage the open vehicle gameplay introduced in LEGO Star Wars II. Bonus content includes ten additional Bounty Hunter missions from Jabba the Hutt, set within the prequel trilogy. The inclusion of Two Player Local Co-Op ensures that friends and families can share in the fun together.

Name: LEGO® DC Super-Villains
Description:
It's good to be bad… Embark on an all-new DC/LEGO® adventure by becoming the best villain the universe has seen. Players will create and play as an all-new super-villain throughout the game, unleashing mischievous antics and wreaking havoc in an action-packed story. Set in an open world experience within the DC universe, the Justice League has disappeared, leaving Earth's protection to their counterparts, who have proclaimed themselves as the 'Justice Syndicate'. It's up to you and a crazy group of misfits to uncover the intentions of Earth's new, strange, wannabe superheroes. Joined by renowned DC Super-Villains: The Joker, Harley Quinn, and countless others from the Injustice League, players will set out on an epic adventure.

Name: Sid Meier's Pirates!
Description:
Sail the Caribbean, marauding all on the high seas or ally your ship and crew as a privateer in search of riches - the life you choose is up to you. Face dogged enemies, raid unsuspecting villages, woo fair maidens, avoid capture or dig for buried treasure. Discover what it takes to become one of the most famous pirates in history!

Name: Burly Men at Sea
Description:
Burly Men at Sea is a folktale about a trio of large, bearded fishermen who step away from the ordinary to seek adventure. With gameplay halfway between a visual novel and a point-and-click adventure, the branching story carries its ungainly heroes into waters where lurk creatures from Scandinavian folklore and other misadventures. You play as storyteller and wayfinder, shaping a custom tale that begins again where it ends. FEATURES Branching Story : Play through multiple choice-driven adventures, each designed to be completed in a single sitting. Innovative Controls: Shape the narrative through a unique, draggable viewport and your interactions within it. Playful Aesthetic: Colorful art style with handcrafted animation, set to a whimsical original soundtrack inspired by folk music of the far north. ABOUT THE DEVELOPER Burly Men at Sea is the second game from married duo Brain&Brain, developed during their own adventures as nomads and erstwhile farmhands.

**Nantucket: A Whaling Adventure**

Embark on a seafaring strategy game where you'll hunt the legendary Moby Dick and relive the Golden Age of American whaling. Set sail across the globe, captain your ship, and manage your crew. You'll experience Ishmael's story, the lone survivor of the Pequod, years after Herman Melville's epic tale.

**Explore the Seas**

*   Sail the world and visit various cities.
*   Boost your prestige by hunting whales, taking on jobs, and seeking new adventures.

**Become the Captain You Desire**

Develop your character like an RPG. Improve your stats, make choices that shape your reactions, and hone your seafaring skills.

**Manage Your Ship and Crew**

*   Hire and direct your crew.
*   Assign them tasks on your ship.
*   Upgrade your vessel with new compartments to enhance its capabilities.

**Experience the Golden Age of Whaling**

Engage with over a thousand unique events that respond to your decisions. Face the consequences of your actions as you navigate this historical era.

**Hunt Whales and Battle Pirates**

*   Discover new whaling grounds.
*   Hunt whales for valuable blubber.
*   Defend your ship from pirates using a turn-based combat system.

**Pursue Moby Dick**

Follow an original storyline and complete quests. Uncover the mysteries surrounding Moby Dick and break Ahab's curse.

Name: Sea Dogs
Description:
Sea Dogs is an epic role-playing game for the pirate in all of us. Return to the age of sail as a young captain looking to make a name in the world. Develop your character from humble beginnings and rise to control all of the islands for your country or yourself. You can give your allegiance to one of three countries or choose to serve only yourself as a swashbuckling pirate. Build your wealth and reputation and use it to acquire bigger ships and better crewman. Hire other captains to join you in attacking and capturing other ships or forts. Where you go and what you do is up to you. The choices in Sea Dogs are endless, and so is the fun. Play as one of four sides (British, French, Spanish, or Pirate) or change allegiances during the game. Nonlinear campaign allows players to choose quests or play the game any way they want. 20 different ship types to choose from, from small boats to large battleships. Location-specific ship damage allows you to send their sails up in flames, bring the mast crashing to the deck, or shoot holes in the hull. Realistic and dynamic wind and weather effects as well as day and night cycle.

Experience a true-to-life maritime journey in **Fishing: Barents Sea**, a simulation game where you take the helm of your own fishing vessel. Navigate the demanding Norwegian waters, searching for rich fishing grounds. You begin with a small boat passed down from your grandfather, aiming to become a skilled fisher, grow your fortune, and invest in better equipment and larger ships. This is your opportunity to chase your dreams in the tough fishing industry, all set against the breathtaking Barents Sea.

This game offers a detailed simulation of the fishing trade. You will learn to catch different types of fish using various methods and gear across several boats. While it's easy to start, becoming truly proficient demands smart planning and hands-on skill. For better results, you can use official Scanmar gear, such as advanced door sensors and TrawlEye, to manage your trawl's performance. Success hinges on careful preparation and respecting yearly fishing limits, a vital part of every trip.

The game's world presents a changing environment influenced by historical weather patterns. Fish numbers vary with the seasons and water temperatures, forcing you to constantly adjust your strategy. Your main base is the busy harbor, where you can hire crew, take on special jobs, repair your ship, get bank loans, and buy supplies.

**Fishing: Barents Sea** delivers a vast open-world setting, recreating the landscapes of northern Norway. To locate profitable fishing spots, you will use sonar, radar, and GPS. Key features include impressive graphics from the Unreal™ 4 Engine, an accurate map of Norway, realistic day/night and moon cycles, and true-to-life seasonal changes with varying weather. You can command seven distinct ships, employ fishing techniques that are simple to pick up but challenging to perfect, and benefit from smart fish AI. The game also incorporates official technology like Scanmar Catch Control Systems and an officially licensed Hermes trawler, plus practical inventory management. A vibrant environment with AI ships enhances the immersive simulation. As one developer noted, "We aimed to create an authentic fishing experience, where every decision matters."

Here Be Dragons is a satirical turn-based strategy game that reimagines the Age of Discovery. Instead of a straightforward voyage, players are tasked with clearing the seas of mythical beasts to pave the way for Christopher Columbus's arrival in the New World. This unique premise challenges the traditional narrative of historical discovery, suggesting a hidden, monstrous reality behind the familiar story.

The game's narrative posits that Columbus's 1492 expedition, often depicted as a swift and simple undertaking, was anything but. According to the game's lore, the true heroes of this era were not statesmen but a band of "crazed captains" and "maniacs, psychos and common crackpots." These individuals, forced by royal decree, were responsible for eradicating legendary monsters like the Kraken, Tritons, and the Leviathan, as well as banishing ghost ships. The game suggests that the knowledge of this "Avant Armada" and their perilous deeds was deliberately erased from historical archives by "bloody officials."

In terms of gameplay, "Here Be Dragons" utilizes an original Dice Activation System. This system allows players to attack enemies, heal their crew, and upgrade their fleet. Players can also collect "Ink" and use "Errata" to influence the course of battles. The game features an "ancient, living map" that is not merely a backdrop but a dynamic environment populated by fearsome creatures. Players will confront formidable foes such as leviathans, krakens, predatory whales, and lustful mermaids, with the ultimate goal of decimating mythical beings and ensuring their complete erasure from human memory.

Beyond its strategic elements, "Here Be Dragons" is steeped in satire. It presents an "extraordinary company of weirdos, madmen and oddballs" whose personal vices and virtues drive the narrative forward. Players will encounter the absurdities of the "bureaucratic machine" and the nonsensical pronouncements of authorities and royal advisors. The game encourages a detached perspective, urging players to "sniff at pirates" and "ignore the settlers," positioning the player as a monster hunter venturing into the "aqua incognita," where sanity is a secondary concern.

Embark on a grand adventure in **Port Royale 4**, a captivating strategy game where you'll navigate the turbulent waters of the 17th-century Caribbean. As a burgeoning governor, your mission is to transform a modest settlement into a thriving commercial hub, vying for dominance alongside Spain, England, France, and the Netherlands.

You'll meticulously develop intricate production chains, linking various islands to establish robust trade routes that cater to the escalating demands of colonial cities. The game features a detailed sea map, crucial for avoiding treacherous weather, hidden cliffs, and shallow areas. By completing assignments for your nation's viceroy, you'll gain renown, unlocking new town structures, vessels, and other valuable assets. Engage in strategic warfare by conquering rival settlements or intercepting enemy fleets with a letter of marque, all while remaining vigilant against the ever-present threat of pirates and privateers.

A significant innovation in **Port Royale 4** is its turn-based naval combat system. Up to eight ships can engage in battle simultaneously, where "tactical captain maneuvers can turn the tide in even the most hopeless of situations for a glorious victory," according to the developers. This strategic depth ensures that every encounter presents a unique challenge and opportunity for triumph.

## East India Company: Forge Your Global Trading Empire

In the engaging game *East India Company*, players are tasked with building the world's most formidable trading empire. This involves not only strategic economic management but also thrilling naval battles across Europe and the Far East. You can choose to lead one of eight distinct nations, each with its own strengths and starting position: the British, Dutch, French, Danish, Portuguese, Swedish, Spanish, and the Holy Roman Empire.

### Construct Your Fleet and Establish Trade Routes

Begin your journey by building a robust fleet and forging vital connections with distant lands. To keep rival nations in check, you'll need to manage a diverse array of ship classes, encompassing both transport and military vessels. The game allows for the creation of specialized fleets, which can then be assigned to specific, profitable trading routes.

### Achieve Strategic Domination

As you develop your strategy for global domination, you will need to control and upgrade well-situated ports. Conflicts and wars are an inevitable part of this endeavor. When hostile fleets clash, players can experience spectacular naval battles fought in real-time. Witness the devastating impact of broadsides and cannonballs as they tear through enemy ships. For deeper tactical control, you can command your ships individually and issue independent orders to each fleet. As one player noted, "The real-time naval combat is incredibly immersive, making every decision count."

### Key Features of East India Company

*   **Cinematic Naval Battles:** Immerse yourself in epic, visually stunning naval combat.
*   **Dual Command Modes:** Choose between Real-Time Strategy (RTS) for overall command or Direct Command mode to take control of a single ship.
*   **War and Trade Integration:** Experience a unique blend of military conflict and economic management.
*   **Advanced Diplomacy AI:** Engage with sophisticated artificial intelligence for nuanced diplomatic interactions.
*   **Eight Playable Nations:** Lead England, France, Holland, Portugal, Denmark, Sweden, Spain, or the Holy Roman Empire.
*   **Realistic Ships:** Command over 10 historically accurate ship types, from small sloops to powerful warships.
*   **Fast-Paced Combat:** Enjoy realistic yet dynamic naval warfare.
*   **Fleet Commanders:** Hire commanders who gain skills to enhance your fleets' abilities.
*   **Port Control:** Capture and upgrade ports, and protect your shipping routes to build the largest trading empire.

### Experience the Multiplayer Arena

Compete with up to 8 players online via the Internet or LAN. Player statistics are meticulously tracked on the EIC game server. You can choose from various game modes, including engaging single-player campaigns and challenging team-based approaches. Improve your ranking by outmaneuvering opponents in head-to-head missions, which offer a true test of strategic skill.

### FIGHT!

Utilize military might to build your trading empire. Command ships and fleets independently, waging war on the open sea. Sink rival ships or board them to seize control and expand your influence.

### MANAGE!

Hire fleet commanders to boost your fleet's capabilities and utilize their unique skills for a tactical advantage in battles. Upgrade your ports with new buildings to enhance their functionality. Buy and sell goods strategically to establish profitable trading routes. Engage in diplomacy to forge alliances or declare war to conquer new territories. Navigate tense political situations with cunning and foresight.

### RULE!

Lead the most powerful company in history. Conquer colonies and expand your empire across the globe. Employ well-modeled diplomacy to exert your influence and secure your dominance. Capture strategic ports to control vital trade arteries. Complete missions assigned by your company or the Crown to further your objectives and secure your legacy.

Windward is a fully procedural co-op game designed with multiplayer in mind, though it can certainly be enjoyed solo. The core experience truly shines when playing with friends, offering a dynamic and engaging adventure.

Upon commencing your journey, you'll generate a unique procedural world, allowing for a fresh experience each time. You then have the opportunity to design your own custom faction before setting sail. The gameplay loop involves a variety of activities, including engaging in combat with pirates, participating in trade with towns, undertaking quests, and exploring the vast, procedurally generated world. The choice of how to approach these activities is entirely yours.

As you navigate the seas, you will discover valuable resources that can be utilized for crafting and upgrades. New towns will emerge, often seeking your assistance with various tasks. Venturing further from your starting location will inevitably lead to encounters with more formidable pirates who will attempt to seize your hard-earned goods. The game features a robust combat system where accumulating experience allows you to unlock new talents and abilities, enhancing your effectiveness in battle.

Towns in Windward are dynamic and grow in response to your actions. By accepting and fulfilling their production shortages through consignments, you contribute to their development. This growth, in turn, leads to the towns offering more diverse quests, a wider array of resources, and superior items. As these settlements flourish, they present opportunities to upgrade your ship itself. Players can choose to specialize their vessel, opting for a swift Schooner for enhanced exploration, a robust Galleon capable of managing five consignments simultaneously, or even a formidable Ship of the Line designed for aggressive campaigns into pirate strongholds.

The game's difficulty scales progressively as you explore farther from your initial area, but this increased challenge is matched by more substantial rewards. The artificial intelligence in Windward is designed to provide a challenging yet fair combat experience. According to the game's design principles, the AI operates under the same constraints as players, possessing sight and needing to explore the map to gain knowledge of its contents. Furthermore, building a fearsome reputation will command respect, and even fear, from the AI. This can lead to pirates actively avoiding you. Conversely, some friendly AI entities may choose to accompany and aid you in your adventures. The game invites players to embark on their own unique sagas within its procedurally generated world.

Name: Sea Dogs: City of Abandoned Ships
Description:
Fortune and glory awaits you! In Sea Dogs - City of Abandoned Ships you can choose to go it alone and become the most feared pirate of the seven seas. Or you can prove your loyalty to one of four different navies; French, English, Spanish, or Dutch. Sail the high seas as a swashbuckling pirate or dashing naval captain. Explore strange new countries and undiscovered civilizations, raid and plunder ships, fortified ports, and cities. But beware, the dead do not sleep easy, and in the dark South American jungles myth and reality intertwine. Solve the ancient mysteries of a vanishing tribe, cross swords with the most notorious pirates ever to sail the ocean blue and make sure that none of your foes ever set foot on land again. Choose from 3 different characters and 3 different classes, Merchant, Corsair and Adventurer, each with its unique quest line Over 40 quest generators allowing for an additional infinite amount of quests Improved combat system and advanced trading system Choose from 3 weapon classes: Light, Medium, and Heavy New 'P.I.R.A.T.E.S' role playing system with the following characteristics: Power, Insight, Reaction, Authority, Talent, Endurance, Success A vast new world to explore! Navigate uncharted waters; seek out new islands, undiscovered cities, and hidden treasures

Portal 2 is a highly anticipated sequel that builds upon the groundbreaking gameplay, compelling narrative, and memorable soundtrack of its predecessor, which garnered over 70 industry awards and a dedicated fanbase. This new installment significantly expands the experience with a **rich single-player campaign** featuring dynamic new characters, innovative puzzle mechanics, and an expanded array of challenging test chambers.

Players will venture into **uncharted territories within the Aperture Science Labs**, encountering familiar faces and the return of GLaDOS, the iconic, albeit sometimes homicidal, AI who guided them previously. The game also introduces a **robust two-player cooperative mode**, boasting its own distinct storyline, unique test chambers, and two new playable characters. This cooperative element demands a new level of teamwork, requiring players to **think and act in unison** to overcome the intricate puzzles.

**Key features of Portal 2 include:**

*   **Extensive Single-Player Experience:** Enjoy next-generation gameplay and a deeply engaging story.
*   **Complete Two-Person Co-op:** A dedicated multiplayer campaign with its own narrative, characters, and gameplay mechanics.
*   **Advanced Physics Engine:** Enables the creation of novel and interesting challenges, resulting in a larger, yet accessible, game.
*   **Original Soundtrack:** Featuring new and captivating music.
*   **Massive Sequel:** Building on the success of the original Portal, which was widely recognized as Game of the Year by over 30 publications in 2007.
*   **Included Editing Tools:** Empowering players to create and share their own test chambers.

Name: FEZ
Description:
Gomez is a 2D creature living in a 2D world. Or is he? When the existence of a mysterious 3rd dimension is revealed to him, Gomez is sent out on a journey that will take him to the very end of time and space. Use your ability to navigate 3D structures from 4 distinct classic 2D perspectives. Explore a serene and beautiful open-ended world full of secrets, puzzles and hidden treasures. Unearth the mysteries of the past and discover the truth about reality and perception. Change your perspective and look at the world in a different way.

Spelunky 2 invites players back into its challenging roguelike platforming world, this time with a significantly expanded scope. The sequel focuses on a new generation of explorers venturing to the Moon, driven by the pursuit of treasure and the search for lost family members. Building upon the foundation of the original's unique, randomized challenges, Spelunky 2 delivers a vast adventure designed to captivate both seasoned players and newcomers.

The game boasts a larger and more dynamic world, brimming with an increased number of areas, characters, traps, and items. These elements offer novel ways for players to interact with the environment and for in-game elements to react to each other. The world's expansion extends to its structure, introducing branching paths and multi-layered levels that add a third dimension to the classic 2D platforming. Players can now tame and ride animals, while advanced liquid physics create dynamic challenges, making the world feel more responsive and alive.

A thriving Base Camp serves as a communal hub where unlocked characters gather between expeditions, offering encouragement and advice. As players progress, this camp evolves into a welcoming community, providing a respite from exploration. Here, players can also access shortcuts and practice their skills in a safe environment.

Spelunky 2 transcends the simple goal of "getting good and beating the game." It functions as an endlessly replayable playground for experimentation, allowing players to forge their own unique stories within its expansive and deeply interactive world, which is filled with secrets. The more time invested, the more the game becomes a personal experience.

Key Features Include:

*   **A Vastly Expanded World:** Discover all-new areas, monsters, traps, and items.
*   **An Added Dimension:** Access a second layer behind the standard playfield, potentially revealing treasure rooms, hidden passages, and other special locations.
*   **Multiple Paths:** Branching routes through the game enhance variety and allow for personalized playthroughs.
*   **Mounts and Riders:** Find and ride creatures like turkeys, which possess special abilities. Enemies can also utilize mounts.
*   **New NPCs:** Encounter characters whom you can assist, harm, or ignore, contributing to the uniqueness of each run.
*   **Evolved Mechanics:** Variations on classic Spelunky concepts, such as shops and ghosts, will challenge veteran players' strategies.
*   **Realistic Liquid Physics:** Water and lava behave realistically, pouring and flowing to significantly impact gameplay and visual appeal.
*   **Deadly Status Effects:** Players and enemies can be afflicted with poison and curses.
*   **Permanent Base Camp:** Develop your home base as you undertake expeditions and explore the caves.
*   **Enhanced Presentation:** Improved lighting, special effects, and richer visual and audio design.
*   **Deeper Mysteries:** Uncover secrets that may require a collective community effort to unravel. The game might even feature "Possibly More Eggplants."

Portal™ is a groundbreaking single-player game from Valve that invites players into the enigmatic Aperture Science Laboratories. Hailed as one of the most innovative titles on the horizon, Portal promises hours of unique gameplay. The game fundamentally alters how players interact with their surroundings, encouraging them to "approach, manipulate, and surmise the possibilities in a given environment," much like Half-Life® 2's Gravity Gun revolutionized object interaction. Players will face physical puzzles and challenges, requiring them to strategically open portals to navigate objects and themselves through space.

Spelunky is a celebrated **roguelike platformer** that throws players into **unpredictable adventures** across **randomly generated levels**. This design ensures each journey underground is a unique and challenging quest. You'll explore vibrant, dangerous areas teeming with monsters, traps, and valuable treasures. The game grants you **complete freedom** to move through these **fully-destructible environments**, uncovering their many secrets. Every choice, from fighting to fleeing, buying to stealing, carries its own weight and consequences.

Success in Spelunky relies on **quick thinking** and a **deep grasp of its systems**. This mastery is crucial for navigating its challenging, intricate worlds.

The game offers several features to enrich the player's experience:

*   **Explorer's Journal:** A journal, a gift from mentor Yang, helps you track your progress and discoveries.
*   **Local Co-op:** Up to four players can join forces, either to help each other or to cause some fun mayhem.
*   **Deathmatch:** Players can unlock and compete in 72 different arenas against friends or AI.
*   **Daily Challenge:** A unique, randomly generated level set is available daily for online competition with the global Steam community.
*   **Unlockable Characters:** Players can discover and aid 20 unique explorers, with 16 of them being unlockable, in achieving their goals.
*   **Embrace the Tough Love:** Prepare for many deaths that are painful, funny, and surprising. Each failure provides a better understanding of Spelunky's complex mechanics, guiding you toward its deeper secrets.

## Braid: A Time-Bending Puzzle Adventure

**Braid** is a unique puzzle-platformer that challenges players to manipulate time itself. The game starts in a simple house and takes you through imaginative worlds, each featuring a distinct time-bending mechanic. Your objective is to collect puzzle pieces and rescue a princess.

The heart of Braid's gameplay lies in its innovative time-manipulation abilities. As game critics have observed, "each world introduces a new way to control time," offering mechanics like rewinding, using objects unaffected by time shifts, or experiencing time linked to space. The game also delves into complex themes such as parallel realities and time dilation, creating a deeply engaging puzzle experience. Developer insights suggest that Braid aims to make "every moment meaningful and intellectually stimulating," with puzzles that unveil layers of its narrative.

Key features of Braid include:

*   **Seamless Cloud Saves:** Steam Cloud Support lets you save your progress and pick up where you left off on any computer.
*   **Forgiving Yet Challenging Gameplay:** Instead of demanding precise platforming, Braid emphasizes clever puzzle design, reducing player frustration.
*   **Rich Puzzle Environments:** Explore diverse worlds, gather puzzle pieces, and solve enigmas by creatively using time manipulation. This includes rewinding, alternate timelines, and dilated time pockets.
*   **Stunning Aesthetic Design:** The game boasts a beautiful, painterly art style and a rich, organic soundtrack that enhances the innovative gameplay.
*   **Nonlinear Storytelling and Progression:** Braid's narrative unfolds non-linearly, using real-world metaphors for temporal manipulation and allowing players to explore consequences. You can tackle puzzles in any order, revisiting challenging sections as needed.

Name: Portal
Description:
Portal™ is a new single player game from Valve. Set in the mysterious Aperture Science Laboratories, Portal has been called one of the most innovative new games on the horizon and will offer gamers hours of unique gameplay. The game is designed to change the way players approach, manipulate, and surmise the possibilities in a given environment; similar to how Half-Life® 2's Gravity Gun innovated new ways to leverage an object in any given situation. Players must solve physical puzzles and challenges by opening portals to maneuvering objects, and themselves, through space.

Name: N++ (NPLUSPLUS)
Description:
N++ is a fast-paced, momentum-based platformer about darting around obstacles, narrowly evading enemies and collecting gold in a beautiful minimalist landscape. It’s the first N game on PC since 2004 and we’ve spent those 12 years perfecting the platformer. N++ is all about using your momentum to complete levels and get high scores, but in this sci-fi world, there’s a slew of inadvertently homicidal enemy robots trying to prevent you from completing your goal. Through the hand-crafted (NOT procedurally generated) levels, you’ll experience platforming at its most intense. Using only your fluid movement, you need to ‘solve’ each level and get to the exit. In addition to the lengthy and challenging single player campaign, we’ve packed a ton of features into this one last entry in the N series including: -4,340 hand-made levels -Custom Levels, Level Editor & Global Level Sharing -Leaderboards and replays for every level (even the ones you make) -Local Co-op Mode (up to 4 players) -Local Competitive Mode (up to 4 Players) -Hardcore Mode, an intense single-player challenge which only the best ninjas will survive -Intense, hidden Secret challenges to discover -63 tracks by top electronic artists -119 different color palettes let you customize the game’s look and keep it fresh every time you play -and more! Play a little, or a lot -- there's no skill ceiling, so you can always get better and better. N++ is a game that has enough bite-sized gameplay to last you a lifetime.

Embark on an **epic fairy tale journey** in "Brothers - A Tale of Two Sons," a captivating game developed by Swedish film director Josef Fares and Starbreeze Studios. This unique experience redefines co-op play by letting you **control both brothers at the same time** in single-player mode.

As you guide these two siblings, you'll face many challenges. You'll need to **solve complex puzzles**, explore detailed worlds, and fight **bosses**. The game's special controls mean you use one thumbstick for each brother, requiring good coordination.

The story is about a father who is dying. His two sons must go on a dangerous quest to find the **'Water of Life'** to save him. Their survival depends on how well they **work together**. They learn that one brother must be **strong when the other is weak**, and **brave when the other is scared**. This deep connection is what makes them Brothers. Prepare for a journey that will leave an **unforgettable mark** on your gaming.

**The Making of Karateka: An Interactive Documentary**

Discover the fascinating story behind *Karateka*, the 1984 hit game created by Jordan Mechner when he was just a college student. Digital Eclipse's new interactive documentary, part of their Gold Master Series, delves into how a teenager, using an Apple II, developed one of the most influential games ever made.

This documentary offers an in-depth look at *Karateka*'s creation. You can explore a vast archive of design documents and playable prototypes. "It's like walking through a museum," the developers describe, allowing you to navigate interactive timelines at your own pace.

**Play the Classics and Discover Early Prototypes**

Experience pixel-perfect versions of the original *Karateka* games. You'll also find never-before-seen early prototypes, enhanced with modern features like save anywhere, rewind, chapter select, and director's commentary.

**Two Remastered Games Included**

The collection features *Karateka Remastered*, a fresh take on the original with added content, commentary, and achievements. It also includes *Deathbounce: Rebounded*, a fast-paced twin-stick shooter inspired by one of Mechner's unpublished prototypes.

**A Groundbreaking Masterpiece**

Learn how *Karateka* pioneered cinematic scenes, a memorable soundtrack, and rotoscoped animation. Its Hollywood-style love story set a new standard, influencing game development for decades. As Digital Eclipse notes, their Gold Master Series aims to present "iconic games in an innovative 'interactive documentary' format."

**The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings Enhanced Edition - A Deep Dive into a Mature RPG Saga**

The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings Enhanced Edition plunges players back into the boots of Geralt of Rivia, a professional monster slayer, in a narrative that stands as a testament to the depth and complexity achievable in PC role-playing games. This installment presents a mature, thought-provoking story set against a backdrop of escalating chaos. As mighty forces engage in a clandestine struggle for power, the Northern Kingdoms brace for war. However, the true threat lies not in the marching armies, but in a deeply rooted, bloody conspiracy that Geralt must unravel.

**Key Features That Define the Experience:**

*   **Immersive, Mature, Non-Linear Story:** The game offers an expansive, emotionally charged narrative that defies conventional fantasy tropes. Players embark on a complex adventure where every choice carries significant weight, leading to potentially dire consequences. With over 40 hours of gameplay, the story branches into four distinct beginnings and sixteen unique endings, ensuring a highly replayable experience.

*   **Spectacular, Brutal, Tactical Combat:** Combat in The Witcher 2 is a sophisticated fusion of dynamic action and robust RPG mechanics. Players wield a variety of witcher weapons, employing both melee and ranged attacks. Strategic preparation is paramount, involving the crafting of potions, the strategic placement of traps and baits, the use of magic, and the art of stealth to outmaneuver formidable foes.

*   **Realistic, Vast, Consistent Game World:** The game world is a richly detailed and believable environment, where significant events shape the lives of its inhabitants and dangerous monsters roam freely. Exploration spans diverse locations, from bustling trading posts and mining towns to imposing castles and fortresses, each holding its own stories and hidden secrets.

*   **Cutting-Edge Technology:** Developed using CD PROJEKT RED's in-house REDengine technology, the game delivers a living, breathing world with stunning graphics and sophisticated in-game mechanics, creating a truly immersive experience.

**Enhanced Edition: Expanded Content and Features**

The Enhanced Edition significantly expands upon the original release, offering additional hours of gameplay through new adventures set in previously unseen locations. These additions introduce new characters, mysteries, and monsters, further enriching the overarching narrative. A completely new game introduction and cinematics, including a pre-rendered intro directed by BAFTA Award winner and Academy Award nominee Tomasz Bagiński, elevate the storytelling.

Furthermore, the Enhanced Edition incorporates all downloadable content and improvements from version 2.0. This includes:

*   **Arena Mode:** An arcade-style mode where players face endless waves of enemies, providing a challenging test of combat skills.
*   **New Tutorial System:** A comprehensive and gradual tutorial designed to smoothly integrate players into the game world and Geralt's adventures.
*   **Dark Mode:** A challenging difficulty level tailored for hardcore players, featuring unique dark-themed items and demanding a greater emphasis on battle preparation, defensive tactics, and opportunistic attacks.

The Witcher 2 Enhanced Edition also comes bundled with valuable bonus items, including the official soundtrack in MP3 format, a detailed map of the game's world, a quest handbook for both new and experienced role-playing fans, a game manual, and the digital comic book "Reasons of State."

**The Witcher: Enhanced Edition Director's Cut: A Dark Fantasy RPG**

Dive into the morally complex world of *The Witcher: Enhanced Edition Director's Cut*, a role-playing game that challenges your views on good and evil. This game focuses on its engaging story and character development, featuring a tactical, real-time combat system. You play as Geralt of Rivia, a professional monster hunter, who gets caught in political schemes. Be ready to make tough choices and deal with their outcomes in a memorable adventure.

**Key Features:**

*   **Geralt of Rivia: A Unique Protagonist**
    Play as Geralt of Rivia, a skilled and charismatic swordsman. Customize Geralt with over 250 abilities, combat skills, and magic powers to fit your playstyle.

*   **An Original Fantasy World Inspired by Literature**
    Explore a harsh fantasy world based on the books by Polish author Andrzej Sapkowski. In this world, the lines between right and wrong are often blurred.
