*   **Non-Linear Storyline with Meaningful Choices**
    Experience an epic story with many twists. Your morally gray decisions significantly affect the story, leading to one of three different endings. Quests can be completed in various ways, influencing the final outcome.

*   **Stunning Tactical Action**
    Engage in smooth, real-time combat inspired by medieval sword fighting. Master six combat styles, use dozens of potions, and employ a complex alchemy system. Modifiable weapons and powerful magic add strategic depth. As the developers stated, "Motion capture performed by medieval fighting experts at Frankfurt's renowned Metric Minds studio, resulting in 600 spectacular and authentic in-game combat animations."

**About The Witcher: Enhanced Edition**

*The Witcher: Enhanced Edition* improves upon the original award-winning game with many enhancements. The game includes "over 5000 rewritten and re-recorded lines of dialogue in English," a completely redone German version, and over 200 new gesture animations. These updates make the characters feel more real and consistent.

Technical and gameplay improvements include:

*   **Enhanced Inventory:** A special sack for alchemy items and a simple sort-and-stack feature make managing items easier.
*   **Technical Improvements:** Enjoy much shorter loading times, better stability, more responsive combat, faster inventory loading, and the option to turn on auto-saving.
*   **Character Differentiation System:** This system randomly changes the appearance of in-game models, adding more visual variety to monsters and non-player characters.

The *Enhanced Edition* also comes with bonus content: an interactive comic book, the D'jinni Adventure Editor, two new adventures offering over 5 hours of gameplay, the official soundtrack, "Making of" videos, an official game guide, and two maps of the game's world.

Name: Nancy Drew®: The Haunted Carousel
Description:
Nancy Drew®: The Haunted Carousel is a first-person perspective, point-and-click adventure game. The player is Nancy Drew and has to solve a mystery. Explore rich environments for clues, interrogate suspects, and solve puzzles and mini-games. You, as Nancy Drew, have just entered a tightening circle of fear and crime as you explore a seaside amusement park that’s swirling with secrets. An antique carousel horse as been stolen! Now, late at night, the merry-go-round takes off on bizarre riderless journeys to nowhere. Are the painted ponies searching for their missing lead horse, or is there another explanation for the midnight rides? Take a spin with danger to unravel the mystery of a ghostly carousel! Dare to Play. Play mini-games in the arcade Reconstruct a historic carousel Keep track of clues and suspects with your laptop Erase Mistakes with the 'Second Chance' option Use a cell phone to take and make calls anywhere   About The Nancy Drew Adventure Series The original #1 selling PC adventure series. See a comparison of the Dossier and Adventure Series

Name: Middle-earth™: Shadow of Mordor™
Description:
Note: certain features for the Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor videogame will no longer be available beginning Dec. 31, 2020. Affected Features: • The Nemesis Forge feature will no longer be available. Therefore, players will no longer be able to transfer their in-game Nemeses from Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor to Middle-earth: Shadow of War. • Vendetta missions and Leaderboards will no longer be available. • WBPlay will no longer be available, but the epic runes 'Orc Hunter' and 'Gravewalker' will automatically be awarded to all players. Winner of over 50 “Best of 2014” Awards including Game of the Year, Best Action Game and Most Innovative Game.

Name: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl
Description:
In 1986, the world's worst nuclear disaster occurred at the Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant. Soviet authorities established an 'Exclusion Zone' around, but a second explosion hit the reactor in 2006, creating The Zone as we know it – dangerous place, filled with mutated creatures, deadly radiation, and a strange, anomalous energy. The Zone was cordoned off by the military, who would shoot on sight anyone foolish enough to get inside. Year 2012. The Zone is still a dangerous place and a threat to all mankind. Mercenaries, bounty hunters and explorers ventured further and further into the heart of the Zone driven by reports of strange 'artifacts' imbued with anomalous energy. To sell them on the black market or trying to find the 'truth' behind the Zone. Whatever their motivation, over time these individuals - Scavengers, Trespassers, Adventurers, Loners, Killers, Explorers and Robbers - have become known as S.T.A.L.K.E.R.s. You will have to find your own way to survive in the Zone! An immersive storyline, seamlessly blended with a living, breathing, non-linear open-world environment. An accurately modeled real-world buildings and locations from deep inside of the Chernobyl Exclusion Zone. Unique 'Survival FPS' gameplay, which combines action, stealth, survival and RPG elements - to create an incomparable experience in the Zone. Enemy Threat Evaluation AI system - NPC characters react to changes in environments and situations. Realistic combat mechanics with accurate ballistic properties. Dynamic day-night cycle and weather system, that directly impacts gameplay. Advanced physics and dynamic lighting effects powered by the 'X-Ray Engine'. Intense multiplayer action, supporting up to 32 players.

Embark on a thrilling mystery aboard the 1914 Orient Express in "The Last Express Gold Edition." This acclaimed adventure game, from Jordan Mechner, the creator of Prince of Persia, plunges you into a world of intrigue on the eve of World War I. As the luxurious train begins its final journey from Paris to Constantinople in July 1914, you play as Robert Cath, an American doctor summoned by his friend, Tyler Whitney.

Upon boarding, Robert discovers Tyler dead in his compartment, clutching a mysterious Russian scroll. This discovery launches an investigation across the train's opulent carriages, from private compartments to the bustling restaurant. "The Last Express" masterfully blends a complex narrative with unexpected plot twists, weaving together conspiracy, romance, and murder. As one critic noted, the game offers "an immersive and tensed real-time system" that keeps players on the edge of their seats.

Your journey aboard the Orient Express is a race against time. Engage in conversations, listen in on secrets, and meticulously investigate to uncover the killer and their motives. The game features unique, stylized graphics and multiple endings, emphasizing that "actions got consequences." This award-winning title is widely regarded as one of the finest adventure games ever created, offering a truly unforgettable experience.

**Nancy Drew®: Curse of Blackmoor Manor: Unraveling a Medieval Mystery**

Step into the shoes of the renowned detective Nancy Drew in *Nancy Drew®: Curse of Blackmoor Manor*, a captivating first-person, point-and-click adventure game. Your mission: to solve a perplexing mystery within the ancient walls of Blackmoor Manor, a Fourteenth Century English mansion steeped in a tragic past. This marks Nancy Drew's first international escapade, as she travels to England to investigate the mysterious illness plaguing Linda Penvellyn, the newlywed wife of a British diplomat and a neighbor's daughter.

Linda remains secluded behind her bed curtains, her condition shrouded in an unsettling enigma. Is she a victim of fear, hiding from an unseen threat, or is a more sinister force at play within the manor? As Nancy Drew, you must confront your own fears and delve into the heart of this mystery to uncover the truth. "Dare to Play.™" as you journey to England and tackle challenging puzzles designed to break the manor's alleged evil curse.

Explore gorgeously detailed rooms, meticulously searching for clues that will illuminate the path forward. Engage with a cast of intriguing suspects, including a notably sardonic talking parrot. Should you make a misstep, the innovative ‘Second Chance’ feature allows you to erase mistakes and continue your investigation. The game offers flexibility, allowing you to play at your own pace with both Junior and Senior detective difficulty levels.

**About The Nancy Drew Adventure Series**

*Nancy Drew®: Curse of Blackmoor Manor* is part of the original #1 selling PC adventure series. This series is celebrated for its immersive storytelling and engaging puzzle-solving. For those interested in the broader Nancy Drew gaming universe, a comparison of the Dossier and Adventure Series is available.

**Nancy Drew®: Danger on Deception Island: A Pacific Northwest Mystery Adventure**

In Nancy Drew®: Danger on Deception Island, you become the famous young detective on a remote Pacific Northwest island. This first-person, point-and-click adventure game puts you in a detailed world. You'll search for clues, question suspects, and solve puzzles. Your vacation quickly changes when someone vandalizes your host Katie Firestone's whale-watching boat. This is just the start of strange "accidents" happening in Snake Horse Harbor. Is the trouble linked to an orphaned orca whale nearby, or is something more sinister hidden in the fog?

To find the truth, you must face danger and reveal the island's secrets. You can kayak through waters and caves, and solve puzzles using tools like Morse code and the Anagram Buster. The game also offers relaxing activities like building sandcastles, digging for clams, and playing chess. Players can choose between Junior and Senior Detective difficulty levels. As part of the popular Nancy Drew Adventure Series, Danger on Deception Island offers an exciting experience for fans.

Name: Nancy Drew®: Secret of the Old Clock
Description:
Nancy Drew®: Secret of the Old Clock is a first-person perspective, point-and-click adventure game. The player is Nancy Drew and has to solve a mystery. Explore rich environments for clues, interrogate suspects, and solve puzzles and mini-games. The year is 1930. A fiery explosion at the Lilac Inn leaves its owner, Emily Crandall, teetering on the edge of sanity and propels you, as Nancy Drew, headlong into adventure. A will left behind by an eccentric millionaire could solve Emily’s problems, and fortunately, you’ve got a car and can drive anywhere you want. But watch out! When you’re on the trail of a desperate villain, the road can get very bumpy! Dare to Play.™ Drive Nancy’s blue roadster Go back in time to 1930 Play miniature golf Based on the first Nancy Drew book   About The Nancy Drew Adventure Series The original #1 selling PC adventure series. See a comparison of the Dossier and Adventure Series

**Nancy Drew®: Legend of the Crystal Skull: Unravel a Mysterious Inheritance**

In *Nancy Drew®: Legend of the Crystal Skull*, you embody the famous detective to solve a puzzling mystery. This first-person, point-and-click adventure game tasks you with uncovering the truth behind Bruno Bolet's death and the vanishing of his fabled crystal skull.

Bruno Bolet, the former owner of the "Whisperer," was convinced his crystal skull protected him from everything but murder. Following his sudden death, his nephew Henry arrived at the unsettling Bolet manor to manage his estate. However, the skull was missing from the manor's chaotic state. Now, you must team up with Nancy's close friend, Bess Marvin, to find this potent artifact before it falls into the wrong hands.

### Explore the Secrets of Bolet Manor

Venture into the eerie Bolet manor, a location brimming with peculiar challenges and concealed perils. You will need to infiltrate a secret society, discover hidden crypts, and gather strange objects such as glass eyeballs. Be ready to face Bruno's unusual pets, including an iguana, alligator, and spider, as you navigate the manor's mysteries.

### Investigate as Two Beloved Detectives

Join this exciting investigation as two iconic characters: Nancy Drew and her trusted companion, Bess Marvin. Their combined detective abilities will be vital in cracking the case.

### Enjoy Engaging Mini-Games

Sharpen your abilities with a range of entertaining mini-games. These arcade-style challenges, such as bowling, blasting angry wasps, and dodging dangerous chomping teeth, add an extra element of enjoyment to your detective work.

### Select Your Detective Difficulty

Tailor your gaming experience by choosing either Junior or Senior detective mode. This feature lets you adjust the challenge and even fix errors without restarting, ensuring a seamless and pleasant adventure.

### About The Nancy Drew Adventure Series

*Nancy Drew®: Legend of the Crystal Skull* is a proud addition to the original, top-selling PC adventure series starring Nancy Drew. Explore a comparison between the Dossier and Adventure Series to learn more about this cherished franchise.

## Dragon Age: Origins - Ultimate Edition: Your Epic Journey Awaits

Step into the boots of a Grey Warden, one of the last of a legendary order of guardians, in **Dragon Age: Origins - Ultimate Edition**. Mankind's ancient enemy has returned, and the kingdom is fractured by civil war. Fate has chosen you to unite these shattered lands and defeat the archdemon.

### Explore a Rich and Dangerous World

Prepare to explore a stunning world filled with complex moral choices that will shape your destiny. Engage in intense, bone-crushing combat against massive and terrifying creatures. Your decisions matter, and the fate of the kingdom rests on your shoulders.

### The Awakening Expansion: A New Chapter

The saga of the Grey Wardens continues in the **Awakening Expansion Pack**. You'll be named their commander, facing new enemies and discovering new skills and spells. Explore an entirely new region of the world, Amaranthine, and uncover its secrets.

### All Nine Content Packs: Deepen Your Adventure

Dive even deeper into the Dragon Age storyline with all nine included content packs:

*   **The Stone Prisoner**
*   **Warden's Keep**
*   **Return to Ostagar**
*   **Feastday Gifts**
*   **The Darkspawn Chronicles**
*   **Feastday Pranks**
*   **Leliana's Song**
*   **The Golems of Amgarrak**
*   **Witch Hunt**

These packs offer new rewards, introduce new party members, and expand the lore of the Dragon Age universe.

**Dragon Age: Origins - Ultimate Edition** is a critically acclaimed title, recognized with over 50 awards, including more than 30 'Best of 2009' accolades.

**The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings Enhanced Edition**

Step into the dark and intricate world of **The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings Enhanced Edition**, the second chapter in the epic RPG saga of Geralt of Rivia, a professional monster slayer. This installment delivers a mature, thought-provoking narrative, crafting one of the most **elaborate and unique role-playing games** ever released on PC. A time of **untold chaos** has descended. Powerful forces are secretly vying for control, and the Northern Kingdoms are mobilizing for war. However, armies alone cannot thwart a **bloody conspiracy**.

**Key Features:**

*   **Immersive, Mature, Non-Linear Story:** Immerse yourself in a vast, emotionally charged, and non-linear story set in a truly unique fantasy world. Embark on a complex adventure where **every decision carries dire consequences**. Experience over 40 hours of narrative-driven gameplay, featuring **4 distinct beginnings and 16 different endings**.

*   **Spectacular, Brutal, Tactical Combat:** Engage in combat that masterfully blends **dynamic action with deep RPG mechanics**. Wield an arsenal of unique witcher weapons, offering both **melee and ranged options**. Prepare for battle with a wide array of tactical choices: **craft potions, set traps, cast magic, and utilize stealth**.

*   **Realistic, Vast, Consistent Game World:** Discover a deep, rich game world where **ominous events shape populations** and bloodthirsty monsters roam. Explore diverse locations, from bustling trading posts and mining towns to imposing castles and fortresses, uncovering their hidden stories and **dark secrets**.

*   **Cutting-Edge Technology:** Experience a **believable, living world** with stunning graphics, powered by CD PROJEKT RED's in-house **REDengine technology**.

**About The Witcher 2 Enhanced Edition:**

The Enhanced Edition significantly expands the experience with exciting new content. Enjoy **additional hours of gameplay** through new adventures in previously unseen locations, introducing fresh characters, mysteries, and monsters. A **new game introduction and cinematics**, including a pre-rendered intro directed by BAFTA winner Tomasz Bagiński, enhance the narrative.

This edition also includes all DLCs and improvements from version 2.0:

*   **Arena Mode:** Test your combat skills against **endless waves of enemies** in this arcade-style mode.
*   **Extensive Tutorial System:** A new, gradual tutorial smoothly introduces players to the game world and Geralt's adventures.
*   **Dark Mode:** A challenging difficulty level for **hardcore players**, featuring unique dark-themed items and demanding a greater focus on **battle preparation, defense, and opportunistic attacks**.

The Witcher 2 Enhanced Edition comes bundled with these bonus items:

*   Official soundtrack in MP3 format
*   A map of the game's world
*   A quest handbook for all players
*   Game manual
*   “Reasons of State” digital comic book

**The Wolf Among Us: A Gritty Fairytale Thriller**

Dive into the dark and dangerous world of **The Wolf Among Us**, a mature thriller where you play as **Bigby Wolf**, the infamous Big Bad Wolf. Developed by the creators of the acclaimed 2012 Game of the Year, The Walking Dead, this game plunges you into a gritty urban setting inspired by the award-winning Fables comic books from DC Comics/Vertigo.

The narrative kicks off with a **brutal and bloody murder**, setting the stage for a series of escalating challenges. In this gripping game series, **every decision you make carries enormous consequences**. You'll experience an evolution of Telltale's groundbreaking choice and consequence mechanics. As Bigby Wolf, the Sheriff of Fabletown, you'll quickly learn that life in this **big, bad city is terrifying and dangerous**.

As Telltale Games' CEO, Dan Connors, stated about their approach to storytelling, "We're trying to make games that feel like interactive movies." This sentiment is evident in **The Wolf Among Us**, where the player's choices directly shape the unfolding narrative. The game is structured into **5 compelling episodes**, all of which are now available:

*   **Episode 1: Faith**
*   **Episode 2: Smoke and Mirrors**
*   **Episode 3: A Crooked Mile**
*   **Episode 4: In Sheep's Clothing**
*   **Episode 5: Cry Wolf**

**Key Features:**

*   Brought to you by the **award-winning team** behind The Walking Dead.
*   Based on the critically acclaimed, **Eisner Award-winning Fables comic book series**.
*   Your choices are vital, but **WHEN you choose to act is just as crucial** to the outcome.
*   Experience a **mature and gritty reimagining** of fairytale, legend, and folklore characters now living in our world.
*   This game serves as a **perfect starting point** for newcomers to the Fables universe, even if you've never read the comics. The game is set **before the events of the first comic issue**, offering a unique perspective.

In 2097, humanity's first encounter with alien life on Mars takes a dangerous turn. Your mission, meant for peaceful exploration, is suddenly stopped by a massive cave-in, trapping you underground. To survive, you must quickly learn and adjust to the complex alien environment around you.

As you explore this world beneath the surface, you will find secrets much greater than you first imagined. The choices you make under extreme stress will decide the future of a forgotten planet. "Waking Mars" provides a special adventure where you will use a jetpack to travel through the deep parts of Mars, meeting many different and amazing alien creatures. These beings are not alone but are part of a living, breathing ecosystem. Your survival depends on understanding and controlling their actions, which will let you shape and grow your own ecosystems. This skill is vital for uncovering the deep mysteries of Mars' history.

The main parts of this engaging experience include:

*   **Exploration:** Travel through a vast and mysterious network of caves.
*   **Discovery:** Figure out strange signals and find ancient ruins that suggest a lost past.
*   **Survival:** Live through an alien world with unusual creatures and dangerous landscapes.
*   **Ecosystem Cultivation:** Develop a lively, connected ecosystem by carefully managing alien plants and creatures. This means growing one type of life to support another, getting rid of pests, and studying how each organism acts.

"Waking Mars" was recognized as a 2012 IGF Nominee for Excellence in Audio, and it includes almost two hours of highly praised original music. The game also has controls made specifically for PC, working well with both a mouse and keyboard, and gamepads.

**MASAGORO: A First-Person Horror Exploration Game**

Embark on a chilling journey in "MASAGORO," a first-person horror exploration game where you step into the role of a lone explorer. This single-player experience focuses on uncovering the dark secrets of an abandoned Ryokan, a traditional Japanese inn, also named 'Masagoro'. As you navigate its decaying halls, you'll piece together scattered clues to reveal the mysteries of its past. The game's protagonist, a former resident of 'Meshii-village', is compelled to explore this forgotten place due to a sudden recollection and a fascination with derelict structures.

The Ryokan's design is a meticulous recreation of early Showa period architecture, drawing inspiration from real abandoned Japanese hotels and the experiences of urban explorers, according to game developers. To enhance the immersive horror, "MASAGORO" utilizes Valve's Steam Audio technology, providing advanced 3D sound that amplifies the unsettling phenomena. This compelling horror experience typically takes two to three hours to complete, challenging players to confront and battle malevolent spirits within the eerie interior.

**Winter Voices: A Unique RPG Exploring Grief and Inner Demons**

Winter Voices is a unique, story-driven role-playing game that immerses players in a fictional world on the cusp of the Industrial Revolution. The game focuses on a 24-year-old heroine dealing with the recent death of her father. Her difficult journey takes her through a harsh winter, where her main battles are not against external enemies, but against her own inner demons.

The first season of Winter Voices includes seven downloadable episodes. Each episode reveals more about the protagonist's compelling and emotional story. The gameplay combines real-time "point and click" exploration with strategic, turn-based combat. Players will navigate dialogue and explore a detailed world, engaging in a unique form of psychic warfare through turn-based mechanics.

**Key Features of Winter Voices:**

*   **A Deep and Creative Story:** Explore the complexities of the human mind in a chilling role-playing experience that delves into profound emotional themes.
*   **Innovative Gameplay:** Players will use unique "defense of the mind" mechanics to battle inner demons, confronting fears, illusions, guilt, and madness.
*   **Strategic Combat:** Experience a defensive approach to turn-based combat that emphasizes strategy and resource management.
*   **An Unusual World:** Discover a meticulously crafted world outside of conventional time, set at the dawn of the Industrial Revolution.
*   **An Evocative Soundtrack:** Haunting melodies guide the journey of self-discovery, creating a dark, intriguing, and atmospheric mood that complements the character's path and mysterious past.

**Winter Voices Prologue: Avalanche**

The story starts in a snow-covered village in a secluded valley. A sudden death, a difficult home life, and new sensory abilities force the young heroine to leave. Driven by her subconscious, the orphaned protagonist departs her father's village. This challenging journey, in search of answers, will lead players through many difficult events. Players will guide the heroine as she overcomes anger, sadness, pain, and fear, seeking to understand the whispers of Winter.

Name: Letters - a written adventure
Description:
Handwritten nostalgia Journey back to the 90s and move through beautifully hand-drawn letters, as you follow the life of Sarah. Learn more about her friends, nerdy obsessions or why she has the most annoying sister ever. Then go digital as Sarah grows older. Revel in the nostalgic pixel world of the early 2000s internet while navigating all the drama, anxiety and joys of teenagehood. Shape your future Watch Sarah grow up and make decisions that will change how her life will turn out as an adult (no pressure). Take revenge on your sister, play video games all day or fall in love. It’s all up to you. Don’t like the outcome? Just go ahead and rewrite her story. (See? we told you, no pressure.) Power of words In a world made from paper and computers, words matter. So use them to change drawings that block your way, help friendly characters and interact with Sarah's friends. Finding the right words is hard sometimes. Especially for shy people like Sarah. So help her by breaking them apart and creating new ones for her to use instead. Playfully wholesome Letters is a cozy, often funny, sometimes sad game about friendship, growing up and finding your way in life. Explore Sarah’s colorful world and use the power of words to change her life! Or… just stack cats or something. FEATURES innovative word-based riddle mechanic , you've never seen before relatable coming of age story , inspired by real-life branching storyline where you can discover new possibilities with every playthrough beautifully hand-drawn visuals & pixel art evolving with Sarah’s age comfy, playful & casual game that focuses on narration and having fun with words good for practicing English skills in a fun way QUICK FACTS language: English playtime: approx. 3 hours (1 playthrough)

Here's a revised version of the document, aiming to meet your quality targets:

**ANOTHER EDEN: An Epic RPG Across Time and Space**

ANOTHER EDEN is a highly-rated RPG with a Metascore of 88. This exciting and epic adventure brings together acclaimed creators from a number of well-known and popular series.

**A Story of Loss and Hope**

The narrative begins with a personal tragedy: "It all started the day she disappeared right before my eyes." This event is followed by the sudden destruction of the city. Fueled by this loss, a solemn oath is made: "Once again, I'm setting out on a journey beyond time and space. To save our lost future. Before the darkness of time falls upon us all..."

**Game Overview**

ANOTHER EDEN offers a unique RPG experience that transcends space and time.

*   **Epic Storytelling:** Master storyteller Masato Kato, known for his work on *Chrono Trigger*, crafts an epic story that spans the Antiquity, Present, and Future.
*   **Memorable Soundtrack:** The main theme is composed by Yasunori Mitsuda, and the original soundtrack features over 60 songs performed by orchestras and folk instruments.

**Explore a Vast World**

Embark on an adventure across multiple continents and three distinct time periods: Antiquity, the Present, and the Future.

**Strategic Gameplay**

*   **Turn-Based Battles:** Engage in highly strategic turn-based combat. Fill your gauge to unleash a powerful Another Force attack.
*   **Party Customization:** Combine your allies' attributes, equipment, and abilities to achieve victory.
*   **Abundant Content:** Discover a wealth of content, including individual character quests, subquests, episodic stories, and mini-games. Experience diverse story settings, from a dream-like school to the adventures of a wandering cat.

**Key Staff**

*   **Scenario:** Masato Kato (*Chrono Trigger*)
*   **Musical Composition:** Yasunori Mitsuda (*Chrono Trigger*), Shunsuke Tsuchiya (*Luminous Arc 2*), Mariam Abounnasr
*   **Art Director:** Takahito Exa (*BINCHOTAN*)
*   **Producer:** Reiyan

**Voice Cast**

Jared Zeus, Julie Rogers, Janine Harouni, Tim Watson, Rebecca Kiser, Rebecca Boey, Shai Matheson, Skye Bennett, Kerry Gooderson, Taylor Clarke-Hill, Jessica McDonald, Nick Boulton, Rina Takasaki, Nell Mooney, Samantha Dakin, Rory Fleck Byrne, Laura Aikman, Tuyen Do, Naomi McDonald, Ina-Marie Smith, Jackson Milner, Gunnar Cauthery, Joe Corrigall, Katie Lyons, Liz Kingsman, Jaimi Barbakoff.

**Scarlet Hollow** plunges players into a chilling hand-drawn horror-mystery experience set in the seemingly tranquil, yet deeply unsettling, rural landscape of Appalachia. This captivating adventure, brought to life by award-winning graphic novelist Abby Howard, unfolds in a North Carolina town harboring a sinister secret. The narrative, characterized by sharp writing and impactful player choices, is delivered across seven episodes, with the initial three already available and subsequent installments planned as free updates.

Your intended peaceful retreat to visit a cousin in **Scarlet Hollow** rapidly devolves into a desperate week-long struggle for survival. Beneath the town's placid facade lies a terrifying reality: sealed coal mines conceal deadly secrets, strange creatures prey on livestock, and vengeful spirits torment the inhabitants, cultivating an pervasive atmosphere of constant dread.

**Scarlet Hollow** distinguishes itself with several key features designed to immerse players in its unique horror:

*   **Branching Narrative and Role-Playing:** The game emphasizes **meaningful choices** that profoundly influence the story's progression and your character's relationships. Dialogue is dynamically shaped by your character's defined personality through role-playing, offering 21 distinct character builds. Whether you approach situations as observant, clueless, or even possessing the ability to communicate with animals, your chosen traits will fundamentally alter your interactions within the game world.

*   **Dynamic Relationships and Atmosphere:** Your connections with the townsfolk are **reactive**, evolving based on your actions. You can cultivate friendships, forge rivalries, or even pursue romantic bonds. The game masterfully builds tension and dread through **atmospheric horror**, relying on disturbing imagery and psychological unease rather than relying on cheap jump scares.

*   **Unique Monsters and Romance:** Prepare to encounter **original monster designs** inspired by local Appalachian myths and cryptids, adding a distinct flavor to the horror. The game also offers **diverse romance options**, allowing you to connect with a variety of characters, including goths, paranormal investigators, and even supernatural beings.

*   **Stunning Hand-Drawn Art:** The visual presentation is a cornerstone of **Scarlet Hollow**, featuring hundreds of **intricate, hand-drawn and inked backgrounds** meticulously crafted on large paper. The **detailed sprites**, with major characters boasting numerous variations, vividly capture every emotion, outfit change, and environmental interaction, contributing to a deeply immersive experience.

Please be advised that **Scarlet Hollow** contains occasional flashing images. Players sensitive to such visual stimuli should proceed with caution.

**Twin Mind: Murderous Jealousy Collector's Edition - A Detective Duo's Intuitive Investigation**

In **Twin Mind: Murderous Jealousy Collector's Edition**, you'll step into a captivating detective story centered around twin siblings Randall and Eleanor Jones. While both are deeply committed to justice, their investigative styles present a fascinating contrast. Randall, the pragmatist, relies on **pure logic and deduction** to unravel mysteries. Eleanor, on the other hand, embraces a more **mystical, intuitive approach**, sensing truths that logic alone might miss. This unique partnership is immediately put to the test when they are called to investigate a shocking murder that occurs onstage at the local theater. As they delve deeper into the victim's past, it becomes increasingly clear that this criminal case is far more complex than it initially appears, hinting at a web of secrets and hidden motives.

To solve this perplexing mystery, players will need to **masterfully combine Randall's logical reasoning with Eleanor's intuitive insights**. The core gameplay involves **uncovering hidden clues and secrets** scattered throughout the environment, meticulously piecing together the truth like a complex puzzle. You must **navigate a labyrinth of deception**, carefully distinguishing fact from fiction to ultimately **uncover the motive behind the crime**.

The **Collector's Edition** offers exclusive content for dedicated investigators. **Discover hidden treasures** by finding hidden coins, morphing objects, and other collectibles to complete your sets and earn rewards. **Replay and conquer** your favorite hidden-object scenes and mini-games to unlock challenging achievements, testing your observation skills repeatedly. For those seeking an edge, a **strategic advantage** is provided through a comprehensive strategy guide, ensuring your investigation stays on track and no detail is overlooked. Prepare yourself for one of the most unusual cases you'll ever encounter in this mystifying Hidden-Object Puzzle Adventure game. Gather your wits and wisdom to help Randall and Eleanor crack the case and bring this compelling detective story to a satisfying close.

## NBA 2K17: The Pinnacle of Basketball Simulation

NBA 2K17 builds on the success of NBA 2K16. It solidifies the franchise's reputation as the most authentic basketball video game available. Critics have praised it, with GamesRadar calling it a game "all sports video games should aspire to be."

### Elevating the Game

NBA 2K17 pushes the boundaries of sports gaming. It aims to further blur the distinction between the virtual court and real-life basketball. Prepare for an even more immersive and realistic experience.

**NBA 2K19: Dominate the Court with New Features**

NBA 2K19 introduces exciting new ways to control your game and build your legacy.

**Unleash Your Potential with Takeover**
Harness your MyPLAYER’s full basketball potential with the **new Takeover feature**. This allows you to unlock **special moves and abilities** never before seen on the court. You can also activate **Team Takeover** to unleash the power of your entire squad.

**Experience the Neighborhood**
The updated Neighborhood offers a vibrant online experience. Make a name for yourself on the court, at the Under Armour Cages, and during live events. Ball until dawn with **new day to night transitions**. You can also join the Jordan Rec Center or get your crew back together for exciting **3 on 3 streetball action**.

**Build Your Ultimate MyTEAM**
Create your very first MyPLAYER card and compete with legends like LeBron and Kobe in **MyTEAM**. The new **Unlimited mode** lets you pick any five cards from your deck without restrictions to battle other players online.

**Forge Your Path in MyCAREER**
The original career story mode returns with an **all-new, immersive narrative**. Chart your journey from a local legend to a global phenomenon, starting in China, moving to the G League, and eventually the NBA. This mode features an **all-star cast**, endorsements tied to your popularity, and new **team chemistry elements** to help you dominate the hardwood.

Name: NBA 2K20
Description:
NOTE: All multiplayer servers for NBA 2K20 will be shutdown as of 12/31/2021. After that time, all game functions requiring online servers will no longer function. WELCOME TO THE NEXT NBA 2K has evolved into much more than a basketball simulation. 2K continues to redefine what’s possible in sports gaming with NBA 2K20, featuring best in class graphics & gameplay, ground breaking game modes, and unparalleled player control and customization. Plus, with its immersive open-world Neighborhood, NBA 2K20 is a platform for gamers and ballers to come together and create what’s next in basketball culture. BEST IN CLASS GAMEPLAY Take your skills to the next level with the most realistic player control ever, featuring an upgraded motion engine with signature styles, advanced shooting controls, a new dribble size-up system, refined off-ball collisions, and a new read & react defensive game. MyCAREER Up-and-coming visionary Sheldon Candis directs the most visually stunning MyCAREER cinematic experience to date. A star-studded cast including Idris Elba, Rosario Dawson, and NBA all-stars past and present bring the journey to life in a completely new and immersive way. THE NEXT NEIGHBORHOOD Experience a more vibrant, active Neighborhood. Access even more 2K Compete Events, unlock animations with the new Show-Off Stick, play a round on the 9 hole Disc Golf course, and earn more exclusive gear than ever before. BRING YOUR GAME & REP UP The Park remains the center stage where players hone their skills and battle to be the best. And with the return of Park Rep, everyone will know who’s legit and who needs a seat on the bench. Unlock exclusive items as you rep up, and use them on any of your MyPLAYER builds! Tons of new prizes available with the new and improved Rep system. MyPLAYER BUILDER More control than ever before. The new MyPLAYER Builder allows you to make decisions on every aspect of your MyPLAYER’s potential, including choosing your own Takeover. With over 100 archetypes and 50 new badges, the combinations are nearly endless. WELCOME TO THE WNBA For the first time, all 12 WNBA teams and over 140 players are in the game and ready to run in Play Now and Season modes. Complete with gameplay animations, play styles, and visuals built exclusively for the women’s game. MyTEAM NBA 2K’s fantasy card collector. Master MyTEAM with daily goals, card-leveling, a reimagined Triple Threat, limited-time events, and even more prizes. Enjoy a simplified user experience that both veterans and rookies will appreciate, and stay connected to the community with Locker Codes, Leaderboards, Developer Tips, Team of the Week, and more. DYNAMIC SOUNDTRACK In collaboration with Steve Stoute and United Masters, this year’s soundtrack features a diverse array of top songs from both well-known and up-and-coming artists from across the globe. LEGENDARY TEAMS Play with over 10 new legendary teams from the past, including the 2009-10 Portland Trail Blazers, 2015-16 Cleveland Cavaliers, 2013-14 San Antonio Spurs, 2002-03 Phoenix Suns, and All-Decade teams from every era of NBA history. Over 100 total legendary teams to choose from. NEXT LEVEL PRESENTATION Dynamic, broadcast-quality gameplay presentation featuring the deepest roster of talent in sports videogame history, led by Kevin Harlan, Ernie Johnson, and many more. It’s an audio experience unlike any other, with over 60,000 new lines of dialogue, all-new studio shows and game intros, MyPLAYER interviews, records and milestone coverage, and over 2,000 arena specific crowd reactions and sounds. MyGM/MyLEAGUE Think you can build the next dynasty? Take full control of a franchise and develop a champion from the ground up. Featuring new skill trees, a revamped relationship system, simulator customization, revised scouting, and more. 2KTV – SEASON 6 Hosted by Alexis Morgan & Chris Manning, NBA 2KTV returns for another season as the hub for all things NBA 2K. Featuring members of the 2K community, exclusive interviews with NBA & WNBA stars, the latest 2K20 news, tips & insights directly from developers, and your weekly Top Plays!

Name: Basketball Pro Management 2015
Description:
**THE BASKETBALL SIM REFERENCE** Basketball Pro Management 2015 puts you in control of managing and coaching your own basketball team, including leagues and regulations from around the globe. From recruiting and coaching players, to setting training schedules and budgets, the team's success is all riding on your shoulders. **NEW! NORTH AMERICAN LEAGUE-SPECIFIC REGULATIONS** Complete dissociation of the North American system with key parts of the collective bargaining agreement implemented : Recruitment is made only via trades / contracts to free players. Contracts exceptions are included: minimum, mid-level, rookie, etc. as well as the types of contracts. Players can be traded between teams in exchange for other players or draft picks. The concepts of salary cap is fully implemented. Manage your payroll wisely to avoid the luxury tax payment. **ADDITIONAL FEATURES & ENHANCEMENTS** Manage everything from recruitment to finances, and training to coaching. 43 playable leagues, including six women's leagues. New: International competitions (e.g. Olympics, World Cup) New: Six national competitions added (including China, Great Britain, Australia and Lebanon) 13,000+ players and 1,600+ teams, all customizable in the database editor. Set training schedules to focus and guide player-growth. Plan your tactics and change them on the fly during the game. 2D and new 3D game simulations. Create your own plays with the editor included in the game.

**NBA Playgrounds: Classic Arcade Basketball Action**

Experience the thrill of classic arcade basketball with NBA Playgrounds. This game brings you fast-paced, over-the-top 2-on-2 action. You can play solo, team up with friends for local multiplayer on PC, or jump into exciting online games. Get ready to perform amazing dunks and pull off wild moves to beat your opponents on the court.

NBA Playgrounds is designed to be accessible yet challenging. As the developers stated, the game is "easy to learn, hard to master." This means new players can start playing right away, while experienced players can develop advanced strategies. The game features a large roster of current and former NBA stars, as mentioned in its marketing. You can also choose any official NBA team and play on different courts around the world. A key part of the game is collecting your favorite players to improve their skills over time. A special challenge lets you face off against the legendary Allen Iverson. The developers have also promised that more NBA superstars will be added after the game's release, offering continued content for fans.

Name: Fast Break
Description:
Three-on-three basketball with full court action! No one else gives you the choices or control like Fast Break from Accolade™. This is computer basketball with double-clutch, mid-air, off-the-glass animation. Basketball action so lifelike you can almost feel the elbows and floor burns. Just check out these stats: Three-on-three team play (guard, center & forward) More plays – go to the playbook for 15 offensive and 5 defensive pro-style plays More shots – choose from three-point bombs to rim-ripping slams More control – design your own plays with the exclusive 'Playmaker' feature Just like watching a live game with a network television court perspective One or two player capability Take 'em to the hoop and jam. Pull up for a fade-away jumper. Play a tight man-to-man or double team the guard. Fast Break gives you the flexibility to do it all. So lace up those hi-tops. It's time to lead the Fast Break.

BasketBelle is an **innovative 2D platformer** that reimagines basketball mechanics in a series of **unique and experimental chapters**. Prepare to experience the familiar elements of basketball, such as dribbling and dunking, applied in **unforeseen and imaginative scenarios**.

One moment, you might find yourself **dribbling within the surreal landscape of a purple blob creature's intestines**. The next, you could be **soaring through the clouds to dunk above the iconic Parisian moon**. This captivating adventure is brought to life by a **dynamic soundtrack** and **distinctive cardboard-inspired visuals**, all contributing to the narrative of a sister who must be rescued through the **extraordinary power of basketball**.

The game boasts **8 distinct Chapters**, each offering a fresh interpretation of basketball's core mechanics. These chapters seamlessly blend action-packed sequences with intricate puzzles, alongside some truly **unconventional and memorable experiences**. The music is intricately woven into the gameplay, with **passive control** that reacts directly to your actions. For instance, each dribble triggers a bass hit, while shooting the ball momentarily silences the percussion, creating an immersive audio-visual feedback loop. The game's visuals are a striking fusion of **cardboard textures and vibrant colors**, making every scene visually arresting.

Included as **bonus content** with your purchase, you'll receive:

*   The **BasketBelle EP**, featuring the full soundtrack with bonus tracks in MP3 format, along with accompanying cover art.
*   The **BasketBelle sketchbook**, a full-color PDF filled with concept sketches and insightful liner notes.
*   A **browser version of BasketBelle**, playable on Mac and Linux (though not accessible via the Steam launcher).
*   Exclusive access to an **11-minute "Making Of" featurette**, offering a behind-the-scenes look at the game's development.

You can locate all of this exciting bonus content within the BasketBelle installation folder, typically found at: `...\Steam\steamapps\common\BasketBelle\Bonus_Content\`.

Name: NBA 2K Playgrounds 2
Description:
NBA arcade action is back with NBA 2K Playgrounds 2! The sequel to the original smash hit takes street balling to the next level with a massive roster of current and retired NBA players, improved online matchmaking with dedicated servers, four-player online matches, three-point contests, new playgrounds, custom matches, and more! Pick your team, get ready to jam, and Ball Without Limits! Exciting Game Modes Take street balling to the next level with a variety of exciting features, including new Season and Playgrounds Championship modes! Play 2-on-2locally with friends, four-player online games with improved matchmaking, or head-to-head three-point contests. Expanded Roster Collect over 400 NBA players, from all-time greats Michael Jordan, Kobe Bryant, & Dr. J, to current stars Karl-Anthony Towns, Jayson Tatum, & Ben Simmons. Featuring new player models and signature player animations. All-New Playgrounds Flash your moves around the world on 10 all-new playground courts. Hit jumpers beachside in the California sun, prove your game under the bright lights of Seoul, or head down under and ball in the Australian outback.

Name: Swing Dunk
Description:
'JUST SWING AND DUNK!' Swing Dunk delivers a stunning combination of fast-paced basketball and a stylish hoverboarding experience. Ride your hoverboard to slip through your opponent’s defense and SWING the ball to shoot or throw down a SLAM DUNK. Train your skills and SWING your way to victory! Basketball like no one has ever experienced! It's not just point and shoot! Use the momentum from swinging the ball to shoot, pass, and DUNK! 3 vs 3 full-court / 1 vs 1 half-court available! Never get bored! Supports up to 8 players per game (4vs4), multiplayer Supports game controller / keyboard + mouse Your One and Only Character! Various characters, gloves, appearance, hoverboard, and effects Customize your very own character at the Locker Plenty of equipable visual effects to make your best play shine even more! Set perks to change your gameplay experience! Set your own perks to create unique moves! Choose the perfect perks and become the best teamplayer!

Name: Basketball Hero VR
Description:
This is a fun vr basketball game that currently has 5 maps, decent graphics, different song genres to choose from, graphics settings, awesome dunks, and much more! The current music genres are rock, pop, rap, country, dubstep, and happy. You can also choose graphics settings from very low to ultra. Both of those can be found in the settings section in the lobby! The maps include a normal basketball court, an anti-gravity court, the great crater, a bedroom, and BlockyBall. I am currently working on multiplayer and overhauling the maps. I am always trying to add new maps though. There are also timed tests that range from 1 minute to 20 minutes to test your ability at basketball! There are timers that can go infinitely unless you are in a test. There is always a scoreboard showing the timer and your total score!

Team Fortress 2, a game PC Gamer called "the most fun you can have online," is now free to play. This means you can enjoy the critically acclaimed title without any hidden costs. The popular online action game gets regular free updates. These updates add new game modes, maps, equipment, and many cosmetic hats.

The game has nine unique classes. Each class has special abilities and distinct personalities, fitting different player skills and preferences. New players can find a character that suits their playstyle and experience level. Training modules and offline practice modes are available to help you get ready for competitive play. Popular game modes include Capture the Flag, Control Point, Payload, Arena, and King of the Hill.

You can personalize your experience in Team Fortress 2 by collecting, crafting, buying, and trading hundreds of weapons, hats, and other items. You can customize your favorite class to match your gameplay style and look. Importantly, you don't need to spend money to win. Most items from the Mann Co. Store can be earned through playing the game.

**The Curse of Monkey Island: Guybrush's Perilous Quest to Break a Pirate's Curse**

In *The Curse of Monkey Island*, the aspiring pirate Guybrush Threepwood faces a dire situation. His beloved Elaine has fallen victim to a powerful pirate curse, originating from the very engagement ring he gave her. Guybrush suspects the notorious zombie pirate, LeChuck, is behind this dark magic, likely as revenge for Guybrush interfering with LeChuck's stolen treasures. Adding to the peril, a prophecy from a swamp clairvoyant reveals a grim path: Guybrush must confront his own death to break the curse and save Elaine. This dramatic story is the heart of the third game in the beloved *Monkey Island* graphic adventure series, as detailed in "The Memoirs of Guybrush Threepwood: The Monkey Island Years."

This classic adventure stands out for its cinematic quality. It features animation that rivals film, immersive voice acting, and a vibrant soundscape, all enhanced by an outstanding musical score. The game showcases impressive high-resolution graphics, bringing its undead world to life with remarkable detail. Players can expect a lengthy adventure, with an estimated 30 hours of gameplay. *The Curse of Monkey Island* offers two difficulty levels: the standard "regular" mode and the tougher "Mega-Monkey" option, which presents more complex puzzles. The game also introduces a new collection of clever and original insults, ideal for lively sword fights and other humorous interactions.

**Psychonauts 2** puts you in the shoes of Razputin "Raz" Aquato, a talented young psychic and acrobat who has finally joined the **Psychonauts**. This elite psychic espionage group is facing a major crisis. As many reviews point out, the game expertly mixes fun missions with a story full of conspiracy and mystery, creating a unique adventure.

The Psychonauts' leadership is shaky. Their leader is acting strangely after being kidnapped. This internal problem is made worse by a **mole within the organization**, leading to a climate of distrust and peril. Raz's main job is to handle this dangerous situation. Game designer Tim Schafer explained that a key part of the game is Raz's ability to **enter people's minds directly**. Inside these strange mental worlds, players face inner struggles, **find hidden memories**, and help characters overcome emotional issues. The game has a unique visual style and a wide range of **psychic powers that can be upgraded**. These powers let players blast, burn, levitate, and even control time. Players need these abilities to solve tricky puzzles, beat strange enemies, and help Raz **stop a dangerous psychic villain** who is threatening the organization. The gameplay provides a **fun, challenging, and diverse platforming experience**, with acrobatic jumps and tricky navigation, as noted in game reviews.

Name: Cuphead
Description:
Cuphead is a classic run and gun action game heavily focused on boss battles. Inspired by cartoons of the 1930s, the visuals and audio are painstakingly created with the same techniques of the era, i.e. traditional hand drawn cel animation, watercolor backgrounds, and original jazz recordings. Play as Cuphead or Mugman (in single player or local co-op) as you traverse strange worlds, acquire new weapons, learn powerful super moves, and discover hidden secrets while you try to pay your debt back to the devil!

Name: Grapple Dog
Description:
About Grapple Dog is an exhilarating 2D pixel-art platformer. Use your awesome grappling hook to clear tricky challenges as Pablo, the Grapple Dog! Sail across 6 colourful worlds with a crew of fearless adventurers to stop the robotic overlord Nul from destroying the world! Features 🐶 Exhilarating action – Jumping! Swinging! Collecting gems! Dogs! Grapples! Driving a little boat around! And most exciting of all, dog petting! 🐕 6 colourful worlds – Sail across the map to explore 6 worlds, featuring 33 levels filled with hidden collectibles to find, secret areas to investigate, spectacular boss battles to overcome, and bonus levels to master 🐕‍🦺 Go, go, Grapple Dog! – A lighthearted adventure with tons of fun characters, you play as Pablo, the Grapple Dog! Sail with your merry band of fearless adventurers on your quest to stop the robotic overlord Nul from destroying the world 🐩 Play your way – Hone your grapple skills with optional collectibles and a testing speedrun Time Trial mode, or utilise the many in-built accessibility options to play without restrictions – have fun however you see fit 🪝 Bold & funky – A bold, colourful art style from a pixel art veteran makes Grapple Dog pop from start to finish, with a funky fresh soundtrack that’s sure to stick in your head, and buttery smooth 60fps gameplay

## Rogue Legacy 2: A Deeper, More Evolved Genealogical Rogue-LITE Experience

Rogue Legacy 2 expands on its predecessor, offering a rich genealogical rogue-LITE experience with endless replayability and deep player choice. The sequel keeps the core elements that made the original popular, like randomized runs and ever-changing characters. It also significantly improves persistent upgrades and the idea of persistent dead heirs. In Rogue Legacy 2, your lineage is more than just a story; it's the key to your progress. You can use your parents' inheritance to strengthen the family manor and give your descendants a better chance against the game's many challenges.

### Unique Heirs, Infinite Possibilities

Every child you control in Rogue Legacy 2 is unique, with their own traits and abilities. This ensures no two playthroughs are the same. For example, your heir might be a Ranger who excels at ranged attacks, or a vegan with specific dietary needs that affect gameplay. This variety guarantees a fresh and engaging experience every time you play.

### Play Your Way: Strategic Depth and Adaptability

Rogue Legacy 2 lets players set their own pace and playstyle. You can choose a fast-paced approach, rushing into the procedurally generated world. Or, you can take a more careful strategy, building your character's strength and abilities before facing tougher challenges. This flexibility suits both action-oriented players and those who prefer a more deliberate approach.

### A World of Constant Discovery

Each journey into the Kingdom of Rogue Legacy 2 is a new experience. The landscape constantly changes with new monsters, clever traps, and unique architectural layouts. This dynamic environment rewards improvisation and adaptability over memorization, making each expedition a true test of strategy and reflexes.

### Diverse and Distinct Classes

The sequel introduces 15 new classes, each offering a different playstyle and mechanics. Play as the Ranger, raining down poisoned arrows from above. Soar as the Dragon Lancer, a swift aerial fighter. Or, become the Bard, charming enemies as you dance through them. These distinct classes provide a wide range of combat and exploration options.

### A Striking New Artistic Vision

Rogue Legacy 2 features a new artistic direction with a captivating 2.5D aesthetic. This style combines 3D characters with hand-drawn backgrounds, enhanced by heavy shading and innovative animation techniques that maintain the series' signature look.

### Revamped Biome Generation for Unparalleled Variety

The developers have greatly improved biome generation in Rogue Legacy 2, making each area feel fresh and distinct. Each biome now uses unique "build strategies," resulting in randomly generated regions with completely unique structures and environmental features, deepening the sense of exploration.

### True Metroidvania Progression with Heirlooms

To fully embrace the Metroidvania spirit, Rogue Legacy 2 introduces Heirlooms. These are permanent items that grant your heroes new abilities, opening up previously inaccessible areas and revealing the world's secrets. These are not just keys; they are transformative powers that change how you interact with and move through the game world. Finding these powerful Heirlooms requires proving your worth and actively searching for them in challenging environments.

### Evolved Traits System for Meaningful Choices

The traits system in Rogue Legacy 2 is an evolution of the original. Traits are now directly tied to gold modifiers, encouraging players to embrace new challenges. The more difficult a trait is, the greater the reward, making the choice of heir a truly strategic decision each generation.

### Relics and Resolve: High-Stakes Power-Ups

A thrilling new addition is the ability to discover and wield Relics. These unique items dramatically alter your run, offering stat boosts, special challenges, or even new abilities. However, this power comes with risk: the more Relics you collect, the more your hero's resolve is tested, and all collected Relics are lost upon death.

### Enhanced Accessibility for All Players

Rogue Legacy 2 prioritizes accessibility with "House Rules." This system lets players customize their experience by toggling contact damage, adjusting global damage and health, and even granting flight for difficult platforming sections. This control ensures every player can tailor the game to their preferred difficulty and playstyle. New mechanics like "Off-shore Banking" also provide struggling players with more ways to succeed.

### A Deep and Expanding Narrative

The lore of Rogue Legacy has been greatly expanded in the sequel, offering a narrative that runs exceptionally deep. New lore elements can be discovered across multiple New Game+ cycles, turning beating the game once into just the start of a larger journey. Players will uncover the story of an inevitable kingdom collapse, delve into the dark secrets of those responsible, and form meaningful connections with characters.

### New Game+ for Near-Infinite Replayability

Your adventure in Rogue Legacy 2 continues long after defeating the final boss. Multiple playthroughs reveal a wealth of additional content. The game's difficulty increases dynamically through player choice, allowing you to select unique biome hazards and special boss encounters, ensuring the experience remains fresh and engaging for near-infinite replayability.

### More of Everything You Loved

Rogue Legacy 2 naturally delivers more of the elements players loved in the original. Expect an abundance of new traits, spells, classes, biomes, enemies, equipment, rooms, and story content. The sequel is packed with secrets and surprises, offering a significantly expanded and enriched experience.

### Uncover the Madness: Clownanthropy and Beyond!

Prepare for the delightful absurdity of "Clownanthropy," where punching clowns is just the beginning! This is just a glimpse of the vast content in Rogue Legacy 2. From Scar Challenges and Fairy Rooms to the intriguing Curio Shoppe, the game is full of discoveries. Don't just read about it; dive into the world of Rogue Legacy 2 and experience its wonders for yourself!

**Psychonauts: Exploring the Human Mind Through Psychic Powers**

*Psychonauts*, a critically acclaimed action-adventure platformer from Double Fine Productions, invites players on an extraordinary psychic journey into the human mind. The game's protagonist is Razputin, a young individual gifted with remarkable psychic abilities. Raz harbors a deep aspiration to join the Psychonauts, a distinguished international organization comprised of psychic secret agents. In pursuit of this goal, Raz gains entry into their clandestine training facility, Whispering Rock Psychic Summer Camp.

This is no ordinary summer camp. A dark conspiracy emerges when a shadowy antagonist kidnaps Raz's fellow campers and absconds with their minds. Raz is compelled to utilize his impressive psychic powers, such as Telekinesis and Levitation, and his most powerful talent—the capacity to delve into the minds of others. His critical mission involves recovering the stolen brains and ensuring they do not fall into malevolent hands. The game's official description emphasizes the player's role: "Fight mental demons! Uncover hidden memories! Sort emotional baggage! Explore the fantastic realm of the inner mind!" Embrace the challenge, join the ranks of the Psychonauts, and immerse yourself in this unforgettable adventure.

Name: RimWorld
Description:
RimWorld is a sci-fi colony sim driven by an intelligent AI storyteller. Inspired by Dwarf Fortress, Firefly, and Dune. You begin with three survivors of a shipwreck on a distant world. Manage colonists' moods, needs, wounds, illnesses and addictions. Build in the forest, desert, jungle, tundra, and more. Watch colonists develop and break relationships with family members, lovers, and spouses. Replace wounded limbs and organs with prosthetics, bionics, or biological parts harvested from others. Fight pirates, tribes, mad animals, giant insects and ancient killing machines. Craft structures, weapons, and apparel from metal, wood, stone, cloth, and futuristic materials. Tame and train cute pets, productive farm animals, and deadly attack beasts. Trade with passing ships and caravans. Form caravans to complete quests, trade, attack other factions, or migrate your whole colony. Dig through snow, weather storms, and fight fires. Capture refugees or prisoners and turn them to your side or sell them into slavery. Discover a new generated world each time you play. Explore hundreds of wild and interesting mods on the Steam Workshop. Learn to play easily with the help of an intelligent and unobtrusive AI tutor. RimWorld is a story generator. It’s designed to co-author tragic, twisted, and triumphant stories about imprisoned pirates, desperate colonists, starvation and survival. It works by controlling the “random” events that the world throws at you. Every thunderstorm, pirate raid, and traveling salesman is a card dealt into your story by the AI Storyteller . There are several storytellers to choose from. Randy Random does crazy stuff, Cassandra Classic goes for rising tension, and Phoebe Chillax likes to relax. Your colonists are not professional settlers – they’re crash-landed survivors from a passenger liner destroyed in orbit. You can end up with a nobleman, an accountant, and a housewife. You’ll acquire more colonists by capturing them in combat and turning them to your side, buying them from slave traders, or taking in refugees. So your colony will always be a motley crew. Each person’s background is tracked and affects how they play. A nobleman will be great at social skills (recruiting prisoners, negotiating trade prices), but refuse to do physical work. A farm oaf knows how to grow food by long experience, but cannot do research. A nerdy scientist is great at research, but cannot do social tasks at all. A genetically engineered assassin can do nothing but kill – but he does that very well. Colonists develop - and destroy - relationships. Each has an opinion of the others, which determines whether they'll become lovers, marry, cheat, or fight. Perhaps your two best colonists are happily married - until one of them falls for the dashing surgeon who saved her from a gunshot wound. The game generates a whole planet from pole to equator. You choose whether to land your crash pods in a cold northern tundra, a parched desert flat, a temperate forest, or a steaming equatorial jungle. Different areas have different animals, plants, diseases, temperatures, rainfall, mineral resources, and terrain. These challenges of surviving in a disease-infested, choking jungle are very different from those in a parched desert wasteland or a frozen tundra with a two-month growing season. Travel across the planet. You're not stuck in one place. You can form a caravan of people, animals, and prisoners. Rescue kidnapped former allies from pirate outposts, attend peace talks, trade with other factions, attack enemy colonies, and complete other quests. You can even pack up your entire colony and move to a new place. You can use rocket-powered transport pods to travel faster. You can tame and train animals. Lovable pets will cheer up sad colonists. Farm animals can be worked, milked, and sheared. Attack beasts can be released upon your enemies. There are many animals - cats, labrador retrievers, grizzly bears, camels, cougars, chinchillas, chickens, and exotic alien-like lifeforms. People in RimWorld constantly observe their situation and surroundings in order to decide how to feel at any given moment. They respond to hunger and fatigue, witnessing death, disrespectfully unburied corpses, being wounded, being left in darkness, getting packed into cramped environments, sleeping outside or in the same room as others, and many other situations. If they're too stressed, they might lash out or break down. Wounds, infections, prosthetics, and chronic conditions are tracked on each body part and affect characters' capacities. Eye injuries make it hard to shoot or do surgery. Wounded legs slow people down. Hands, brain, mouth, heart, liver, kidneys, stomach, feet, fingers, toes, and more can all be wounded, diseased, or missing, and all have logical in-game effects. And other species have their own body layouts - take off a deer's leg, and it can still hobble on the other three. Take off a rhino's horn, and it's much less dangerous. You can repair body parts with prosthetics ranging from primitive to transcendent. A peg leg will get Joe Colonist walking after an unfortunate incident with a rhinoceros, but he'll still be quite slow. Buy an expensive bionic leg from a trader the next year, and Joe becomes a superhuman runner. You can even extract, sell, buy, and transplant internal organs. And there's much more than that! The game is easy to mod and has an active mod community . Read more at . (All non-English translations are made by fans.)

OlliOlli World is a vibrant skateboarding action-platformer that invites players into the imaginative world of Radlandia. This game emphasizes fluid movement and creative expression, allowing players to "flip and flow" through diverse environments. As you "grind, trick, and air" your way through this colorful landscape, you'll encounter unique characters and embark on a quest to find the mystical skate gods and achieve "Gnarvana." The game offers a delightful and quirky experience, filled with missions, challenges, and opportunities to forge new connections.

Players can personalize their character's appearance, signature tricks, and overall style. The explorable levels are designed with multiple paths, encouraging diverse approaches and player individuality. "OlliOlli World marks the third entry in the critically-acclaimed OlliOlli series from Roll7," a studio recognized for its BAFTA and multiple awards.

The game transports you to a "lush skateboarding utopia" teeming with eccentric characters and visually rich locations ripe for exploration. Discover new routes, side quests, and trick possibilities in areas like Inflatable Alley or Los Vulgas. The experience is further enhanced by a curated soundtrack of IDM and Electronica music. Roll7 has focused on creating "super tight controls" that combine with refined gameplay for an exceptionally smooth experience.

Even if you're new to skateboarding games, OlliOlli World is designed to be accessible. Newcomers can "tear down streets and pull off sick method grabs without fear of faceplanting the curb." For those seeking a challenge, the game offers millions of unique levels in its sandbox mode, allowing for mastery of its "hugely deep combo system with over 100 moves to master and combine." Players can also compete globally in Leagues, striving for the highest scores.

As you progress through Radlandia, you'll unlock special rewards to customize your character. Whether you want to "skate in your flip flops" or "wear a bumble bee onesie," OlliOlli World embraces all forms of expression. The game champions player freedom, stating, "as long as you’re on board anything goes!" This commitment to accessibility, depth, and player freedom allows everyone to experience the signature "flow state gameplay" that OlliOlli World is known for.

Get ready for a messy, multiplayer VR cooking adventure with Cook-Out: A Sandwich Tale! This award-winning game from Resolution Games, the creators of Angry Birds VR and Blaston, puts you in a fairytale forest cook's cabin. Up to four players can team up to serve hungry, enchanted creatures.

### Wacky Kitchen Chaos

Cook-Out is a whimsical game where you'll prepare meals in increasingly hectic levels. But it's not just about cooking! You'll also need to fend off troublesome customers. Jesters might hide order components, and thieves could steal ingredients.

### Customize Your Chef and Join the Fun

Recent updates add even more excitement. The "Make it Your Way" feature lets you upgrade your chef's appearance. The "House Party" update introduces new skins and customizations.

### Play Solo or Together

While Cook-Out shines in cooperative play, solo players can still enjoy the action. A simulated partner will help you tackle tough orders and bring peace back to the wild kitchen.

Name: Freespace 2
Description:
The year is 2367, thirty two years after the Great War. Or at least that is what YOU thought was the Great War. The endless line of Shivan capital ships, bombers and fighters with super advanced technology was nearly overwhelming. As the Terran and Vasudan races finish rebuilding their decimated societies, a disturbance lurks in the not-so-far reaches of the Gamma Draconis system. Your nemeses have arrived... and they are wondering what happened to their scouting party.

Name: Microsoft Flight Simulator Game of the Year Edition
Description:
The Microsoft Flight Simulator Game of the Year (GOTY) Edition celebrates all the positive feedback, reviews and awards garnered, but it is also a “Thank You” to our fans – new and old – that have made Microsoft Flight Simulator such a phenomenon. Best of all, the Microsoft Flight Simulator Game of the Year Edition will be available as a free update for existing players on PC. Game of the Year Edition • Enjoy 5 new aircraft – the Boeing F/A-18 Super Hornet, the VoloCity, the Pilatus PC-6 Porter, CubCrafters NX-Cub, Aviat Pitts Special S1S. • Experience 8 handcrafted airports in Germany, Switzerland and the US, an updated weather system, early access to DX12 and a dev mode replay system. • Soar high with 6 new Discovery Flights (Helsinki, Freiburg im Breisgau, Mecca, Monument Valley, Singapore, and Mount Cook) and 14 new tutorials. The World is at your Fingertips. • Vivid and Detailed Landscapes – Immerse yourself in the vast and beautiful world that is our planet with over 37 thousand airports, 1.5 billion buildings, 2 trillion trees, mountains, roads, rivers and more. • Living World – Earth is vibrant and ever-changing and so is the world of Microsoft Flight Simulator which includes live traffic, real-time weather and animals. Earn Your Wings. • Aircraft – Hone your pilot skills in a variety of aircraft from light planes to commercial jets with comprehensive flight models. Every aircraft includes highly detailed and accurate cockpits with realistic instrumentation. • New Checklist System - From pro to beginner, scale your level from full manual to full assist with interactive and highlighted instrument guidance and checklist. Test Your Skills. • Live Weather – The new weather engine enables users to switch on the live weather mode to experience real-time weather including accurate wind speed and direction, temperature, humidity, rain and more. • New Day & Night Engine - experience flight at any time of day or year allowing for night VFR, visual flight rules, navigation. • Aerodynamic Modeling - a state-of-the-art physics engine with over 1000 control surfaces per plane allows for a truly realistic experience. The Deluxe Edition includes everything from Microsoft Flight Simulator plus 5 additional highly accurate planes with unique flight models and 5 additional handcrafted international airports. Deluxe Additional Aircraft • Diamond Aircraft DA40-TDI • Diamond Aircraft DV20 • Textron Aviation Beechcraft Baron G58 • Textron Aviation Cessna 152 Aerobat • Textron Aviation Cessna 172 Skyhawk Deluxe Additional Handcrafted Airports • Amsterdam Airport Schiphol (Netherlands) • Cairo International Airport (Egypt) • Cape Town International Airport (South Africa) • O’Hare International Airport (USA) • Adolfo Suárez Madrid–Barajas Airport (Spain) The Premium Deluxe Edition includes everything from the Microsoft Flight Simulator Deluxe edition plus 5 additional highly accurate planes with unique flight models and 5 additional handcrafted international airports. Premium Deluxe Additional Aircraft • Boeing 787-10 Dreamliner • Cirrus Aircraft SR22 • Pipistrel Virus SW 121 • Textron Aviation Cessna Citation Longitude • Zlin Aviation Shock Ultra Premium Deluxe Additional Airports • Denver International Airport (USA) • Dubai International Airport (United Arab Emirates) • Frankfurt Airport (Germany) • Heathrow Airport (United Kingdom) • San Francisco International Airport (USA)

**Owlboy: Embark on a Story-Driven Platform Adventure Through the Clouds**

**Owlboy** offers players the chance to **soar through the clouds and explore a breathtaking new world**. This story-driven platform adventure game encourages you to gather your friends and traverse expansive open skies. You will face challenging enemies and overcome obstacles in a journey described as "one of the most intricately detailed adventures of this generation."

The game centers on Otus, a mute owl grappling with the expectations of his kind. This personal struggle intensifies with the sudden emergence of sky pirates, propelling you on a quest through monster-infested ruins. During your adventure, you will encounter new allies, uncover hidden secrets, and carry "burdens that no one should have to bear."

**Owlboy** celebrates pixel art, reimagined for contemporary players. It masterfully blends story-driven action with innovative flight and platforming mechanics. A key gameplay element is the ability to **carry virtually anything**, introducing a strategic layer to exploration. Furthermore, you can **recruit Otus’s diverse friends to serve as gunners**. Each companion possesses unique abilities and backstories that deepen the narrative. Prepare for **large, intricate dungeons that culminate in significant and challenging boss battles**. This adventure, meticulously developed over a decade, promises an unforgettable experience.

**IL-2 Sturmovik: 1946** is a comprehensive flight simulator that **combines all the original IL-2 series content**. This includes IL-2 Sturmovik™: Forgotten Battles, the Ace Expansion Pack, Pacific Fighters™, and unique alternate history campaigns set in 1946.

What began as a single-aircraft study sim has evolved into an **astonishing anthology**. It boasts an incredible **229 flyable aircraft** and over **300 aircraft in total**. The game has been updated to the latest version, **4.12.2**. This community-driven update introduces **widescreen support with correct FOV**, along with numerous new planes, maps, and scenarios.

**New Content Highlights:**

*   **Aircraft:** **32 new flyable fighters and bombers**, plus four new AI aircraft.
*   **Maps:** Explore large, new historical maps of the **Kiev region** and **Manchuria**. A bonus **Burma map** and an online **Khalkin Gol / Nomonhan map** are also included.
*   **Campaigns:** **Nine new campaigns** feature nearly 200 missions, offering exceptional realism. Experience detailed careers for German, Soviet, and Japanese fighter and bomber pilots. Objectives range from flying jet bombers over occupied Europe to intercepting B-29 Superfortresses over Iwo Jima and the Japanese home islands.

**Alternate History:** Three of the nine campaigns delve into alternate history. These focus on **hypothetical battles between the Soviet Union and Germany in 1946**, even as WWII continues.

**Paint Schemes:** Nearly **1,000 new paint schemes** have been added. These historical liveries adorn new and existing aircraft, showcasing individual planes and squadrons that served during WWII.

**IL-2 Sturmovik: 1946: A Comprehensive Flight Simulation Anthology**

IL-2 Sturmovik: 1946 is an expansive flight simulation package that bundles all the content from the original IL-2 series. This includes IL-2 Sturmovik™: Forgotten Battles, the Ace Expansion Pack, Pacific Fighters™, and unique alternate history campaigns set in 1946. What began as a focused study simulator for a single aircraft has evolved into a vast collection, featuring an impressive 229 flyable aircraft and over 300 aircraft in total.

The game has been updated to the latest version 4.12.2, a community-driven enhancement that brings widescreen support with accurate field of view, numerous new aircraft, maps, and scenarios. This update introduces 32 new flyable fighters and bombers, alongside four new AI aircraft. Players can explore large, new historical maps of the Kiev region and Manchuria, which depicts a border area between the USSR, China, and Japanese-occupied Korea. A substantial bonus Burma map and an online Khalkin Gol / Nomonhan map are also included.

Nine new campaigns, comprising almost 200 missions, offer unparalleled realism and meticulous detail. These campaigns provide in-depth careers for fighter and bomber pilots across the German, Soviet, and Japanese air forces. Missions range from flying jet bombers over occupied Europe to intercepting American B-29 Superfortresses over Iwo Jima and the Japanese home islands.

Three of the nine campaigns venture into alternate history, exploring hypothetical battles between the Soviet Union and Germany in 1946, even as World War II continues. The package also boasts nearly 1,000 new paint schemes. These historical liveries, applied to both new and existing aircraft, represent individual planes or squadrons that served during WWII, adding another layer of authenticity to the simulation.

Name: Falcon 4.0
Description:
The New Benchmark in Flight Sim Technology The North Koreans have crossed the DMZ. Your F-16 squadron has been called for the strike back...
