Only the makers of the acclaimed Falcon 3.0 could launch a new era of flight simulators. Falcon 4.0 breaks the sight-and-sound barrier with its cutting-edge graphics, realism, dynamic campaigns and multiplayer gameplay. Only MicroProse could push the envelope to offer accurate topographical terrain, detailed radar and weapons simulation, hyper-realistic flight models and stunning visuals. Features: The realism in Falcon 4.0 is as intense as the vapor streaming over your leading edge flaps when you crank on the Gs. You'll recognize your Dogfight team members by their aircraft markings. Of course the guys on the other teams are ready to paint little bull's-eyes over them. At the heart of Falcon 4.0 is the real-time campaign engine, tested and approved by actual F-16 pilots. Falcon 4.0's detailed, accurate topology and stunning graphics break new ground in the world of modern military flight sims. In Falcon 4.0, you'll discover an enormous range of aircraft and ground units - all in chilling detail. Steam Trading Cards included!

Name: B-17 Flying Fortress: The Mighty 8th
Description:
The missions undertaken by the crews of B-17 bombers during World War II are the stuff of legend. What was it to fly through relentless anti-aircraft fire over Nazi-occupied Europe? What was it to have a thin layer of steel between life and death at 15,000 feet? Furiously fend off enemy fighters zipping around your plane and then precisely deliver your cargo of bombs over enemy targets? Find out for yourself as you lead a 10-men crew to victory... or defeat... against squadrons of Nazi warplanes in the legendary B-17 Flying Fortress! A WWII Campaign to fight and survive through Carry out a realistic 25-missions tour of duty based on historically accurate scenarios and targets, or Take to the skies in 'Quick Start' assignments with available Instant Action mode. Plan real missions, select authentic flying formations, and manage both crews and bombers. Assess your crew's strengths and skills to effectively re-position members and cope with wounded personnel and casualties. It’s a 10-men job Take to the skies in any one of ten B-17 Flying fortress crew positions: Pilot, Co-Pilot, Navigator, Bombadier/Chin Turret Gunner, Radio Operator, Engineer/Top Turret Gunner, Port Waist Gunner, Starboard Waist Gunner, Ball Gunner, and Tail Gunner! Take total control: Take-off, land, shoot from various crew positions, navigate across a realistically mapped Europe, operate the radio, line up the bomb run, release the bombs and bail out if necessary. Choose your plane, choose your allegiance Fly a variety of aircraft from the legendary B-17 to the rugged escort fighters - Choose between the American B-17G bomber, P-38 Lightning, P-51 Mustang, P-47 Thunderbolt, and the German Bf 109, Fw 190, and ME 262 fighters. Yes, you can even fight 'The Mighty Eight' in the role of a German Luftwaffe pilot! Back from 2000! This is the original MicroProse B-17 Flying Fortress: The Mighty 8th, the legendary sequel to B-17 Flying Fortress: World War II Bombers in Action. Fly the B-17 Flying Fortress and become a legend before your own time!

**A Short Hike** is a delightful game that lets you explore the stunning scenery of **Hawk Peak Provincial Park**. You can **hike, climb, and soar** through peaceful mountains, creating a truly immersive experience.

The game offers complete freedom to explore the island. You can stick to the **marked trails** or head into the **backcountry** as you make your way to the summit. Along the way, you'll meet **other hikers**, find **hidden treasures**, and have plenty of chances to **enjoy the world around you**. There's no need to hurry; you can **hike at your own pace**. Enjoy activities like **fishing by the river** or **swimming at the lake**. Finding **hidden treasures** can help you reach new areas. For an exciting view, try **diving off mountain peaks to soar over the forests**. Talking with the **other hikers** can lead to useful tips and shared discoveries. Adding to the peaceful atmosphere is a **beautiful original soundtrack by Mark Sparling**, which **changes as you explore** the wilderness. As game designer Adamgryu stated, "The goal was to create a game that felt like a vacation."

**Redout: Enhanced Edition - Experience Next-Generation AG Racing**

Get ready for **next-generation AG racing** with Redout: Enhanced Edition! This game is a thrilling homage to legendary arcade racers like F-Zero, WipeOut, Rollcage, and POD. It delivers an **uncompromising, fast, tough, and satisfying driving experience**, capturing the exhilarating vertigo that defines the genre.

Redout's **physics-based floating and driving models** mean every turn, slope, and maneuver applies unique forces to your ship. The game boasts a striking **sharp low-polygon style**, blending intricate meshes and terrains with the cutting-edge shading and lighting of Unreal Engine 4. This creates a **beautiful and instantly recognizable aesthetic**. Race through diverse environments, from breezy coastlines and eerie frozen landscapes to vast desert plains, all set against the backdrop of a melancholic, semi-abandoned Earth.

**Key Features:**

*   **Online Multiplayer:** Compete against **up to 12 players worldwide** for a truly challenging experience.
*   **Optional VR Support:** Immerse yourself with **Oculus Rift, HTC Vive, or OSVR**, featuring a brand-new cockpit view.
*   **Career Mode:** Embark on over **100 events** to race, gain experience, level up, and upgrade your ship.
*   **A Diverse World:** Explore **25 tracks** across **5 distinct locations** on a post-apocalyptic Earth, including challenging boss circuits.
*   **Endless Variety:** Master **11 event types**, from classic races to innovative Arena Races and Score-Based Endurance challenges.
*   **Create Your Story:** Choose from **6 racing teams**, each demanding a unique driving approach, and progress through **4 increasingly fast racing classes**.
*   **Powerups:** Utilize **over 10 racing-focused, upgradable powerups**, including turbo boosts, shields, repair drones, advanced grip systems, and slipstream enhancers.
*   **Dynamic Soundtrack:** Experience a **full 5.1 surround sound** and a dynamic soundtrack that intensifies with your speed.

**Unrivaled Speed and Immersion**

Redout is engineered to be the **fastest game ever made**. It's not just about the numbers; it's about the **vibrations, the blur of the landscape, the high-speed collisions, the effects, and the sounds** that combine for an intensely immersive sense of speed.

**Challenge the World Online**

Prove your skills against **up to 12 players globally** and claim your title as the ultimate Redout pilot. Do you have what it takes to achieve true glory?

**A Soundtrack That Drives You**

Prepare for one of the most **intense and dynamic soundtracks** you've ever encountered. Redout's audio adapts to your playstyle and performance, enhancing the visual experience and pulling you deeper into the race.

**Experience VR Like Never Before**

Step into your HMD for an unparalleled sense of **3D and distance**. Understand apexes with precision and achieve a new level of control. VR support is entirely optional.

**Master the Handling**

Control is paramount when racing at **800 km/h**. Redout features **believable physics** inspired by quad-copter controllers and magnetic forces, offering next-generation AG handling. Learn to corner without braking, utilizing every tool at your disposal. Steering, strafing, and turbo boosts are just the beginning; upgrades and powerups will grant you even greater command over your ship.

**Join a Thriving Community**

Connect with fellow racers on the **official Discord server**. Whether you're looking for casual matches or just want to chat, our community is a great place to get exclusive development news and insights into the Redout universe.

**A Rich Dystopian Setting**

The year is **2560**. Earth, depleted of its natural resources, faces environmental devastation. While most of humanity has migrated to celestial bodies, Earth remains a hub for entertainment, including the thrilling **Solar Redout Racing League (SRRL)**. Here, humanity's best pilots pilot high-speed anti-gravity ships on magnetic tracks, risking everything for glory.

Name: War Thunder
Description:
War Thunder is the most comprehensive free-to-play, cross-platform, MMO military game dedicated to aviation, armoured vehicles, from the early 20th century to the most advanced modern combat units. Join now and take part in major battles on land, in the air, and at sea, fighting with millions of players from all over the world in an ever-evolving environment. In War Thunder, aircraft, attack helicopters, ground forces and naval ships collaborate in realistic competitive battles. You can choose from over 2,000 vehicles and an extensive variety of combat situations many of which are exclusive. You can find yourself blasting your pursuers from a bomber turret, defending your teammates on the ground from an air raid with anti-aircraft guns, shooting down enemy planes with a firestorm from multiple rocket launchers, or trying to sink an enemy warship with a torpedo from a fast attack boat. Features include: Seamless cross-platform gameplay between Windows PC, Linux, Mac, PlayStation®4, PlayStation®5, Xbox One with Xbox Series X|S – everyone on the same server. Over 2,000 highly detailed aircraft, helicopters, tanks, warships and other combat vehicles crafted carefully from historical documents and surviving sources. 100 maps representing the main historical battle theaters. Intense PvP experiences in full-scale combat missions at various difficulty settings for all play styles and degrees of experience. Rich PvE content including dynamic historical campaigns and solo missions. Regular content updates including new vehicles, maps, missions and nations. Astonishing graphics, authentic sound effects and beautiful music creating an atmosphere to fully immerse yourself in. Create custom content for War Thunder and share it on War Thunder Live , with the prospect of earning real money through the Revenue Share Partner System!

**Rise of the Tomb Raider™: 20 Year Celebration Edition**

Experience the ultimate adventure with Rise of the Tomb Raider: 20 Year Celebration. This comprehensive edition bundles the acclaimed base game with a full Season Pass, packed with exciting new content.

**New Adventures and Challenges:**

*   **Blood Ties:** Explore the iconic Croft Manor in a brand-new story chapter.
*   **Lara’s Nightmare:** Defend Croft Manor from a terrifying zombie invasion.
*   **Co-Op Endurance Mode:** Team up with a friend to survive extreme conditions in this new online mode.
*   **Extreme Survivor Difficulty:** Test your mettle with the ultimate challenge.
*   **Tomb Raider III Inspired Gear:** Unlock an outfit and weapon paying homage to the classic Tomb Raider III.
*   **Classic Lara Skins:** Embody Lara with five iconic classic skins.

**Existing DLC Highlights:**

*   **Baba Yaga: The Temple of the Witch:** Venture into a new tomb to confront an ancient terror.
*   **Cold Darkness Awakened:** Battle waves of infected predators in this intense challenge.

**Key Features of Rise of the Tomb Raider:**

*   **Lara’s Journey:** Lara uncovers a profound ancient mystery, drawing the attention of the ruthless Trinity organization. Racing against Trinity, she follows clues to a myth about the Lost City of Kitezh. Driven to find its secrets before Trinity, Lara embarks on her first true tomb-raiding expedition to Siberia.
*   **Woman vs. Wild:** In Rise of the Tomb Raider, Lara faces not only human adversaries but also the unforgiving natural world. Hunt wildlife to craft essential weapons and scavenge for rare resources within vibrant, yet hostile, ecosystems. Prepare for treacherous environments and unstable landscapes that will push Lara to her absolute limits.
*   **Guerilla Combat:** Master your surroundings to your advantage. Scale trees and dive underwater to evade or eliminate enemies. Customize Lara’s gear, weapons, and ammunition to match your preferred playstyle, whether it's stealthy infiltration or all-out assault. Craft explosives on the fly to create chaos and wield Lara’s signature combat bows and climbing axe.
*   **Return to Tomb Raiding:** The legendary tombs are back, grander and more perilous than ever. Explore vast, breathtaking ancient spaces filled with deadly traps. Solve intricate environmental puzzles and decipher ancient texts to reveal hidden crypts, uncovering a world brimming with secrets.

**Tomb Raider: Lara Croft's Gritty Origin Story**

Dive into the **intense and gritty origin story** of Lara Croft in Tomb Raider. Witness her transformation from a young woman into a **hardened survivor**, driven by raw instincts and an incredible capacity to push beyond human limits. Lara must battle to **unravel the dark history of a forgotten island** and escape its relentless grip.

**Experience Lara's Epic Adventure**

Download the **Turning Point trailer** to witness the beginning of Lara's epic journey. This game offers a **turning point** in her life, showcasing her intense origin story.

**Key Features:**

*   **A Turning Point:** Experience Lara Croft’s intense origin story, charting her evolution from a young woman to a hardened survivor.
*   **An All-New Raiding Experience:** Explore a **mysterious island** brimming with environmental puzzles, visceral combat, and hidden tombs.
*   **Fight to Live:** **Salvage resources**, gain experience, and upgrade Lara’s weapons and tools to survive the island’s hostile inhabitants.
*   **Survive as a Team:** Engage in a variety of **multiplayer modes**, playing as either Lara’s Shipmates or Yamatai’s Scavengers.

**Resident Evil 5: Unraveling Africa's Bio-Terror Crisis**

The shadow of the Umbrella Corporation and its devastating viral creations has seemingly receded, yet a new, insidious bio-threat has emerged, demanding global intervention. Following the catastrophic events in Raccoon City, seasoned operative Chris Redfield has committed his career to dismantling the proliferation of bio-organic weapons. His current assignment, as a vital operative for the Bioterrorism Security Assessment Alliance (BSAA), takes him to Africa. Here, he must investigate a mysterious biological agent that is rapidly turning the local populace into terrifyingly aggressive beings.

Working alongside Sheva Alomar, a skilled BSAA agent native to the region, Chris and Sheva must pool their expertise and bravery to uncover the grim reality behind this escalating bio-terror. Their mission will plunge them into perilous landscapes and pit them against horrifying mutations spawned by the agent.

For players diving into this installment, several key details are important. This version is a port of the 2009 Games for Windows - Live release. Acquiring the Untold Stories Bundle on Steam will grant you the full Resident Evil 5 Gold Edition experience. It's important to note that, unlike the original Games for Windows - Live version, this release **does not** include NVIDIA GeForce 3D Vision support. Furthermore, if you previously owned the Games for Windows Live edition, you are entitled to a free Steam copy, with more information available in the Steamworks Migration FAQ.

Name: The Wolf Among Us
Description:
From the makers of the 2012 Game of the Year: The Walking Dead, comes a gritty, violent and mature thriller based on the award-winning Fables comic books (DC Comics/Vertigo). As Bigby Wolf - THE big bad wolf - you will discover that a brutal, bloody murder is just a taste of things to come in a game series where your every decision can have enormous consequences. An evolution of Telltale's ground-breaking choice and consequence game mechanics will ensure the player learns that even as Bigby Wolf, Sheriff of Fabletown, life in the big bad city is bloody, terrifying and dangerous. Over a season of content spanning across 5 episodes: Episode 1: Faith - Available Now Episode 2: Smoke and Mirrors - Available Now Episode 3: A Crooked Mile - Available Now Episode 4: In Sheep's Clothing - Available Now Episode 5: Cry Wolf - Available Now Key Features From the team that brought you 2012 Game of the Year, The Walking Dead Based on the Eisner Award-winning Fables comic book series Now, it’s not only WHAT you choose to do that will affect your story, but WHEN you choose to do it A mature and gritty take on characters from fairytales, legends and folklore who have escaped into our world A perfect place to begin your Fables journey, even if you’ve not read the comics; this game is set before the events seen in the first issue

**The Walking Dead: A Game of Survival and Choice**

Step into the harrowing world of **The Walking Dead**, a gripping five-part game series that expands upon Robert Kirkman’s acclaimed comic book universe. You'll embody **Lee Everett**, a convicted criminal granted a new lease on life amidst a world overrun by the undead.

In this post-apocalyptic landscape, the dead walk, and the living will do anything to survive. Your journey takes a pivotal turn when you become the protector of **Clementine**, an orphaned girl. This responsibility may be your path to redemption in a world that has descended into chaos.

**Experience the True Horror of the Zombie Apocalypse**

Based on Robert Kirkman’s Eisner-Award winning comic book series, The Walking Dead plunges players into the heart of the zombie apocalypse. This isn't just a game; it's an experience that forces you to confront the brutal realities of survival.

**Your Choices Matter**

Prepare for a **tailored game experience** where the decisions you make have profound and lasting consequences. Every choice you face, from the seemingly small to the life-altering, will shape your story across the entire series. You'll be thrust into situations demanding **immediate and difficult choices**, with no time for contemplation as the undead relentlessly pursue you.

**Broken Sword 3: The Sleeping Dragon - Unraveling an Ancient Conspiracy**

Prepare to be drawn into a world of intrigue and peril with *Broken Sword 3: The Sleeping Dragon*, a multi-BAFTA-nominated adventure game. This installment plunges players back into the shoes of George Stobbart and Nico Collard as they embark on a globe-trotting quest to unravel a profound ancient conspiracy. The narrative kicks off with the mysterious death of a computer hacker in Paris, a seemingly isolated incident that quickly escalates into a much larger, more sinister plot.

As George and Nico delve deeper, they discover that powerful seismic events are not mere natural occurrences but are linked to a fiendish source of pure evil. The game's plot weaves together the secrets of the Templars with this emerging threat, creating a compelling mystery that players must piece together. *Broken Sword 3: The Sleeping Dragon* distinguishes itself with breathtaking 3D graphics and a powerful, unique interface, immersing players in its distinctive visual style and the rich universe of Broken Sword.

Rainbow Billy: The Curse of the Leviathan is a captivating 2.5D adventure game that puts **creature capture** at its heart, weaving a narrative rich with themes of **diversity and self-acceptance**. Players embark on a quest to restore color to a world that has been drained of its vibrancy. This immersive experience is set to deliver over 30 hours of engaging gameplay.

The game's expansive world spans more than 85 islands and caves, offering a vast playground for exploration. Within this world, players can discover hidden treasures, engage in fishing, build friendships, and face a variety of challenges. A central tenet of the game's design, as emphasized by its creators, is the profound impact of **kindness and understanding** in driving positive change.

Key gameplay mechanics include:

*   **Befriending Creatures:** Players have the opportunity to collect over 60 unique creatures. The game encourages players to assist these creatures through **non-violent encounters**, helping them overcome their problems. As noted in game reviews, assembling a varied team is essential for navigating the game's challenges.
*   **Solving Puzzles:** The game presents players with intricate environmental puzzles that must be solved to progress through its diverse landscapes and uncover secrets that grant access to new areas.
*   **Restoring Color:** A primary objective involves reintroducing color to the desaturated world. This gameplay element is intrinsically linked to the game's narrative. Developer insights reveal that the game aims to encourage players to **embrace their true selves**, fostering themes of empathy and personal growth.

Name: The Walking Dead: Season Two
Description:
The Walking Dead: Season Two continues the story of Clementine, a young girl orphaned by the undead apocalypse. Left to fend for herself, she has been forced to learn how to survive in a world gone mad. Many months have passed since the events seen in Season One of The Walking Dead, and Clementine is searching for safety. But what can an ordinary child do to stay alive when the living can be just as bad – and sometimes worse – than the dead? As Clementine, you will be tested by situations and dilemmas that will test your morals and your instinct for survival. Your decisions and actions will change the story around you, in this sequel to 2012’s Game of the Year. Decisions you made in Season One and in 400 Days will affect your story in Season Two Based on Robert Kirkman’s award-winning comic books Play as Clementine, an orphaned girl forced to grow up fast by the world around her

Name: Batman: The Enemy Within - The Telltale Series
Description:
In this latest chapter from the award-winning studio behind Batman - The Telltale Series, both Bruce Wayne and Batman will be forced into precarious new roles. The Riddler has returned to terrorize Gotham City, but his gruesome puzzles merely foreshadow an even greater crisis. With the arrival of a ruthless federal agent and the return of a still nascent Joker, Batman must navigate uneasy alliances while Bruce Wayne undertakes a perilous series of deceptions. Which of Batman’s new allies will you choose to trust? And how deep into the darkness will you let Bruce descend? Includes access to all five episodes (available now!) in this all-new season from the award-winning studio, Telltale Games.

**Resident Evil 4: A New Era of Horror**

**Resident Evil 4** plunges players into a chilling new chapter of survival horror, casting them as **Special Agent Leon S. Kennedy**. His critical mission: to rescue the U.S. President's daughter, a task that leads him to a secluded European village. This setting marks a significant shift from the zombie-filled environments of earlier games. In this remote locale, Leon encounters **terrifying new creatures** driven by a sinister parasite called **Las Plagas**. He also battles a fanatical cult, **Los Illuminados**, who are manipulating **mind-controlled villagers** to achieve their sinister goals.

The game offers a **stunning HD experience**, running at a **smooth 60 frames per second** for the first time. A **complete visual overhaul** has been implemented, achieving the game's **highest graphical quality ever**. As one critic noted, "The graphical upgrade is truly remarkable, breathing new life into a beloved classic." The game is **fully optimized for widescreen displays**, featuring sharper text and upgraded textures for characters, environments, and in-game items.

Further enhancing the PC version, **Resident Evil 4** includes full **Steam platform support**. This means players can enjoy Achievements, Cloud saves, Trading Cards, and global leaderboards. **Native keyboard and mouse support** is also a key feature, providing customizable key bindings, mouse sensitivity, and acceleration settings. This new PC release contains all content from previous versions. It also offers subtitle support in English, French, Italian, German, and Spanish, and includes previously released bonus content such as the **Separate Ways epilogue**.

Name: Ragnarock
Description:
Are you ready to rock? Ragnarock is a solo/multiplayer VR rhythm game in which you play a viking captain competing in a ship race. With your two hammers, crush the incoming runes in sync with epic viking music. Keep hitting the runes perfectly to accumulate combo energy in your hammers, and you will be able to activate a speed boost! Viking music: The tracklist is curated with love and care. Unleash the drummer in you and play to the epic rock and metal tracks of Alestorm, Gloryhammer, Saltatio Mortis, Wind Rose and many more. All have a festive viking/celtic/pirate style, which will make you feel the viking power in you! Simple gameplay: Following the tradition of arcade games, Ragnarock is easy to play, hard to master. To move forward, only your sense of rhythm matters. However, to win the race, you will have to train and use your skills wisely. Multiple difficulty settings will help you improve over time. Only the most experienced players will be able to collect all the gold medals, beat the high scores and sign their name on the leaderboard! Cross-platform multiplayer mode: The multiplayer PvP mode brings real-time competition against your friends or other people. Start a public or private game (up to 6 players) and beat them all to finish in first place! In solo, you can also race against ghost ships (representing your best score or other players from the leaderboard) to add some competition. Mythological environments: Ragnarock transports you to the land of the vikings in stylized environments inspired by nordic mythology. Support for custom songs: Want to play a track from your personal music library? You can create a custom playable song from any song you own, and play it in solo mode. More info in our FAQ (-vr.com/faq) .

**Banner Saga 3: The Epic Viking Saga Concludes**

The Banner Saga trilogy, a beloved strategic RPG known for its compelling story and memorable characters, reaches its grand finale with Banner Saga 3. This award-winning series, which has earned over 20 awards and 4 BAFTA nominations, now brings its six-year Viking narrative to a definitive conclusion. As the encroaching Darkness threatens to consume the world, the survival of your caravan depends on the critical choices you make and the trust you place in your companions.

In this final installment, players will guide over 40 heroes through challenging trials. You'll encounter familiar faces from earlier games and forge new alliances. For the first time, the game features potent menders and playable Dredge characters. However, the developers have emphasized that "no character is truly safe." The story branches significantly, with your choices from previous games carrying over to ensure a deeply personal and consequential experience. Every decision and past event carries weight.

Banner Saga 3 enhances the series' signature combat with more unique and customizable encounters. Players will face unsettling new warped enemies and engage in challenging multi-wave battles. You can also leverage powerful heroic titles to empower allies and change the course of battle. The game's striking art style and animation reach new heights, showcasing breathtaking landscapes twisted by the Darkness into strange and beautiful forms. More story sequences are fully animated than in the first two games combined. The final, full-length score, composed by Grammy-nominated Austin Wintory and performed by a live orchestra, provides a triumphant auditory conclusion to the trilogy.

To fully experience the intended narrative, players are encouraged to import their save files from previous Banner Saga games. This will unlock new and unexpected outcomes based on your past decisions, both major and minor. With the Darkness relentlessly advancing, the end is near, and the burden of survival rests on you and your resilient survivors. Banner Saga 3 offers a definitive closure, revealing the ultimate fate of this award-winning saga. Rally your companions, steel your resolve, and prepare to face the encroaching storm.

Banner Saga 2 builds upon its award-winning predecessor, delivering an epic, story-driven role-playing experience. This sequel immerses players in an emotional journey across a world teetering on the brink of collapse. The survival of your Viking clans hinges on your leadership, astute resource management, and adept combat tactics within a world that has deeply resonated with the indie gaming community.

### The Epic Viking Saga Continues

Banner Saga 2 showcases stunning hand-drawn 2D combat and animations, now enhanced with improved special effects. The evocative musical score, composed by Grammy-nominated artist Austin Wintory, accompanies you throughout this perilous adventure.

### Player Choice Shapes the Narrative

Your narrative unfolds based on the decisions made in the first game, alongside new, challenging choices presented in Banner Saga 2. As one reviewer observed, "The weight of your choices is palpable, shaping not just your immediate path but the very fate of your people."

### Introducing New Characters and a New Race

Players will encounter new, captivating characters, including the Horseborn, a formidable new race.

### Enhanced Strategic Combat with Lasting Consequences

Engage in more strategic battle boards where each confrontation carries significant weight. The permanent loss of characters in combat will directly impact your caravan and ongoing quest.

### The Journey Itself is Crucial

The successful construction and management of your caravan across a vast landscape are paramount to achieving your goals. Navigating these trials is essential for your survival and the continuation of your civilization.

## Northgard: A Viking Saga of Conquest and Survival

Embark on an epic journey in **Northgard**, a land brimming with mystery, danger, and untold riches. After years of exploration, brave Vikings have discovered this new continent. The most daring Northmen have set sail to conquer these shores, seeking fame for their Clan and aiming to etch their names in history through conquest, trade, or devotion to the Gods.

### The Perils of Northgard

Survival in Northgard is a constant challenge. Fierce Wolves and Undead Warriors roam the land, while formidable Giants must be befriended or defeated. Players must also endure the harshest winters ever witnessed in the North.

### Building Your Viking Settlement

Establish your settlement on this newly discovered continent. Assign your Vikings to various crucial jobs, such as Farmers, Warriors, Sailors, and Loremaster. Careful resource management is key to surviving the brutal winters and vicious foes that inhabit Northgard.

### Strategic Expansion and Victory

Expand your territory and uncover unique strategic opportunities. Northgard offers multiple paths to victory, including Conquest, Fame, Lore, and Trading. Test your skills against friends or a challenging AI with varying difficulty levels and personalities. Dedicated servers allow you to climb the ranks and achieve the ultimate Norse God status.

### The Regal Horn Saga

The story begins with the murder of the Viking High King and the theft of his Regal Horn by a man named Hagen. This event ignites a saga that follows Rig, the King's son and heir, and his trusted advisor Brand. Their journey takes them across Northgard, where they will forge new alliances, confront enemies, and uncover a threat far greater than Hagen, along with the true motives behind the King's assassination.

### Mastering the Clans

To complete the 11 campaign chapters, players must master the unique characteristics of the first six clans. Taming the unforgiving wilderness of Northgard is essential for success.

### Evolving Gameplay with New Clans

Since the initial colonization of Northgard, six new clans have joined the fray, introducing fresh playstyles and combat strategies. With each new clan release, Northgard receives free major content updates. These updates introduce new ways to play and allow you to explore the full potential of Northgard.

Name: The Banner Saga
Description:
Live through an epic role-playing Viking saga where your strategic choices directly affect your personal journey. Make allies as you travel with your caravan across this stunning yet harsh landscape. Carefully choose those who will help fight a new threat that jeopardizes an entire civilization. Every decision you make in travel, conversation and combat has a meaningful effect on the outcome as your story unfolds. Not everyone will survive, but they will be remembered. Key Features Player choice that drives your own narrative – every decision you make in travel, conversation and combat has a meaningful effect on the outcome as your story unfolds. Over 25 playable characters from 2 different races, human and varl, the horned giants – embark on your epic journey with a variety of characters from 7 different classes, each with unique abilities and upgrade options to fit your play style. Strategic combat with consequences - victory or defeat and even the permanent loss of a character depends on which characters you choose to take into battle and what decisions you make afterwards. The journey is as important as battle – your role in building and managing your caravan as you travel the vast frozen landscape is critical to not only your own survival but the survival of an entire civilization. An epic Viking saga brought to life in 2D glory – beautifully hand drawn combat sequences and animations, accompanied by an evocative score from Grammy-nominated composer Austin Wintory, will immerse you into a fantasy realm inspired by Norse mythology. Multiplayer Combat Enhanced – sharpen your combat skills in the free multiplayer game “Factions”. Compete against other players with many of the character classes you see in The Banner Saga. The Banner Saga is the first part of a planned trilogy. If you complete this game, your unique progress and storyline will carry over to the next part of the story.

Name: Jotun: Valhalla Edition
Description:
Impress the Gods! Jotun is a hand-drawn action-exploration game set in Norse mythology. In Jotun , you play Thora, a Viking warrior who died an inglorious death and must prove herself to the Gods to enter Valhalla. Explore vast regions of Norse Purgatory to find runes to unleash the jotun, giant Norse elementals. Fight them using only your massive two-handed axe, the blessings of the Gods and your skills! Jotun: Valhalla Edition features Valhalla Mode, the ultimate battle against even fiercer versions of the Jotun! A true challenge for those who wish to impress the Gods! Features Experience beautiful hand-drawn animation Fight five epic jotuns, giant Norse elementals Explore nine vast and mysterious levels filled with Viking mythology Learn about Thora's life and death in an overarching story Summon powers bestowed upon you by the Viking Gods Hear authentic Icelandic voice-overs Listen to an amazing original soundtrack, specifically composed for every gameplay moment by Max LL Join the Jotun Family: Mailing List Facebook Twitter Twitch

**Ancestors Legacy: Conquer Medieval Europe in this RTS**

Ancestors Legacy invites you to command armies and conquer medieval Europe in a history-inspired real-time strategy experience. Dive into the Middle Ages by choosing one of four distinct nations: Viking, Anglo-Saxon, German, or Slav. Your campaign involves more than just taking territory; you'll raid and pillage enemy camps, villages, and towns to secure victory.

To succeed, players must master several key elements. This includes utilizing a full range of tactical options and leveraging the environment to their advantage. Effective base management, developing temporary bases and settlements, is also crucial. Ancestors Legacy combines resource management and base building with large-scale, squad-based battles. Powered by Unreal Engine 4, the game features vast battlefields rendered in stunning detail. Experience medieval combat like never before with a cinematic action camera that puts you directly into the heart of the fight at the press of a button.

The game offers a rich experience with several key features. Players can engage in an extensive single-player campaign across four playable nations, reliving historically inspired events from the Middle Ages. Strategic depth is provided through advanced tactics that combine terrain, unit experience, and morale. The cinematic battle camera and Unreal Engine 4 visuals ensure an immersive and visually impressive experience. For those seeking competition, intense multiplayer matches await. The game also boasts streamlined management for resources and village construction, precise controls with native gamepad support, and cross-play functionality allowing you to compete with players on both Steam and GoG.

Name: Volgarr the Viking
Description:
Remember when games were tough? Return to the Golden Age of arcades with an all-NEW hardcore action experience that pulls no punches! Volgarr the Viking possesses all the hallmarks of the true classics - simple controls, high challenge, and meticulous design - combined with hand-made pixel animation, an epic soundtrack, and buckets of blood. Flex your gaming muscles and step into the arena with Volgarr the Viking. We dare you. Key Features Classic hardcore arcade action! Seven worlds to explore across 30+ maps 40+ unique traps and enemies, including screen-filling bosses Thousands of frames of handcrafted pixel animation Orchestrated soundtrack Meticulous control design with full customization Full controller support (including legacy DirectInput devices!) Steam achievements and leaderboards Multiple paths through the game and multiple endings Awesome retro-style game manual!

Get ready for a **hilariously gruesome adventure** in Zombie Vikings, a new co-op game for one to four players. Developed by the creators of the popular indie hit, Stick It to The Man!, this game promises a **dead funny experience**.

You'll control a **putrid posse** of fearsome Vikings resurrected from Norse soil: **Gunborg, Seagurd, Hedgy, and Caw-kaa**. Your critical mission takes you through epic worlds to retrieve Odin’s lost eye. Prepare to **hack through the gingerbread swamps of Molgaga**, **cruise through the intestines of the Midgaard Serpent**, and even **fight giant poultry**!

This co-op story brawler is designed for **1-4 players**, offering both single-player and online/offline multiplayer modes. The game features **over 25 levels across 8 distinct worlds**, plus **5 Versus Arenas** for competitive play. Each of the four playable Zombie Vikings has **unique power moves**, encouraging varied combat strategies.

Discover **over 40 unlockable weapons**, such as the hilariously named **Stinknir** and **Blunt Fish Trauma**! You can also collect **Viking Runes** to unlock new and **cool abilities**. These runes allow you to **mix up your style of play** and adapt to any challenge. For the ultimate cooperative experience, you can even **stitch all your friends together into a giant mega Zombie** – because, as the game suggests, **working together is undeniably fun**! The game's narrative was written by **Zach Weinersmith of SMBC Comics**, known for his acclaimed work.

**Dead In Vinland** is a survival and management game that blends RPG and adventure elements. Players lead a Viking family trying to survive on a mysterious, uncharted island. As Eirik, you must manage your family's physical and mental health, explore the island, organize your camp, and interact with its inhabitants. The island holds secrets vital for survival.

This game is a deep survival simulation. You need to gather resources like food and water while managing character health. Players must combat diseases, wounds, and harsh weather. The game uses a turn-based system for strategy. **Dead In Vinland** offers three difficulty modes: easy, extreme, and iron man.

You can build and expand your camp with 18 unique activity stations and craft over 130 upgrades. Lead a community of 14 characters, each with unique traits and stories. Your dialogue choices affect relationships, and you can pursue romances, remove characters, or recruit new ones. The game includes activities like hunting, fishing, and gardening. Advanced camp stations help develop your settlement.

Embark on 70 non-linear quests that lead to the game's conclusion, with your choices impacting character fates. You'll encounter Björn Headcleaver and his robbers, forcing a choice between paying tribute or rebelling.

**Dead In Vinland** features a comprehensive RPG system. It includes managing five health states, developing 20 skills, and handling over 600 character traits. You'll collect over 100 items and deal with 30 diseases and 20 potentially fatal wounds. Characters gain five random special traits upon leveling up. Combat involves 3 vs 3 battles against Björn's minions, with five playable character classes and five passive classes. The game's mature, humorous story spans over 150,000 words. As the second game in the "Dead In…" series, it follows Dead In Bermuda. Both can be played independently, but playing both offers deeper insight into the series' lore.

Name: Portal 2
Description:
Portal 2 draws from the award-winning formula of innovative gameplay, story, and music that earned the original Portal over 70 industry accolades and created a cult following. The single-player portion of Portal 2 introduces a cast of dynamic new characters, a host of fresh puzzle elements, and a much larger set of devious test chambers. Players will explore never-before-seen areas of the Aperture Science Labs and be reunited with GLaDOS, the occasionally murderous computer companion who guided them through the original game. The game’s two-player cooperative mode features its own entirely separate campaign with a unique story, test chambers, and two new player characters. This new mode forces players to reconsider everything they thought they knew about portals. Success will require them to not just act cooperatively, but to think cooperatively. Product Features Extensive single player: Featuring next generation gameplay and a wildly-engrossing story. Complete two-person co-op: Multiplayer game featuring its own dedicated story, characters, and gameplay. Advanced physics: Allows for the creation of a whole new range of interesting challenges, producing a much larger but not harder game. Original music. Massive sequel: The original Portal was named 2007's Game of the Year by over 30 publications worldwide. Editing Tools: Portal 2 editing tools will be included.

**ELDEN RING: Forge Your Legend in a Vast Open World**

Prepare to rise, Tarnished, and embrace your destiny in **ELDEN RING**, a groundbreaking fantasy action RPG. This title invites you to wield the power of the Elden Ring and claim your title as Elden Lord within the vast and mysterious Lands Between. According to the developers, the game offers a world of unrivaled scope, seamlessly connecting open fields brimming with diverse challenges to immense dungeons boasting intricate, three-dimensional designs. Your exploration will be rewarded with the thrill of uncovering unknown threats and achieving a profound sense of accomplishment.

**ELDEN RING** also emphasizes forging your unique hero with unparalleled freedom. Beyond customizing appearance, players can freely mix and match weapons, armor, and magic to develop their hero to suit their playstyle. Whether you aim to become a mighty warrior by enhancing strength or a master of arcane arts, the choice is yours. Immerse yourself in an epic drama born from myth, where the story unfolds in fragments, weaving a multilayered narrative. The intersecting desires of various characters shape the fate of the Lands Between, as noted in game lore. Furthermore, the game connects players in unique online ways, offering traditional multiplayer for cooperative journeys alongside an innovative asynchronous online system. This system allows players to feel the presence of fellow adventurers without direct interaction, according to game design principles.

Tetris Effect: Connected provides a **fresh and captivating experience** for the classic puzzle game, combining **engaging challenges** with **beautiful visuals and sound**. This game reimagines the familiar Tetris gameplay, making it more exciting than ever.

The game includes **more than 30 solo levels** and **over 10 different ways to play**, catering to different preferences. It supports **playing with others online and in person**, enabling teamwork or friendly competition. A key feature is its **lively gameplay**, where the music, scenery, and effects **change with your moves**, all set to a **highly praised soundtrack**. Even the Tetris blocks respond to how you play, creating a **reactive world**.

A main addition is the **new "Zone" feature**. This lets you **stop time and the falling blocks**, giving you a strategic edge to get out of difficult situations or score more points by clearing extra lines. For PC players, Tetris Effect: Connected offers **major improvements**, including better performance on Steam with support for **4K visuals**, **unlimited frame rates** (when Vsync is off), **wide screens**, and advanced graphics settings for both **regular and VR play**.

The **"Connected" team mode** lets up to **three players combine their game areas** and cooperate. Also, different **solo modes** are available, designed to create various moods like "Calm," "Concentrate," "Traditional," or "Exciting." For a throwback feel, the game has levels inspired by **earlier Tetris games** and a **traditional score challenge mode** for multiple players that resembles the 8-bit era. The **full range of multiplayer options** is extensive, featuring **play across different platforms**, **competitive matches**, **games with friends**, and a **system for leveling up** with unlockable player icons.

**Team Fortress 2 is now completely free to play, offering endless online action without any hidden costs.** This highly-rated game, celebrated by PC Gamer as "the most fun you can have online," remains one of the most enduringly popular online titles. Its continued success is fueled by consistent **free updates** that introduce new game modes, maps, equipment, and a vast array of cosmetic hats.

The game features **nine distinct classes**, each possessing unique abilities and personalities, ensuring a perfect fit for every player regardless of skill level or preferred playstyle. Newcomers can easily begin their journey with **comprehensive training modules and offline practice modes**. These resources are designed to help players hone their skills before engaging in TF2's dynamic game modes, which include beloved classics such as Capture the Flag, Control Point, Payload, Arena, and King of the Hill.

**Players can personalize their gameplay experience** through hundreds of weapons, hats, and other items. These can be collected, crafted, purchased, or traded, allowing for unique character customization. This allows you to tailor your favorite class to both your playstyle and aesthetic preferences. Crucially, Team Fortress 2 adheres to a **"free-to-play, not pay-to-win" model**. This commitment means that the majority of items available for purchase in the Mann Co. Store can also be acquired through regular in-game activities.

Name: Spelunky 2
Description:
Spelunky returns in this greatly-expanded sequel to the original roguelike platformer! Meet the next generation of explorers as they find themselves on the Moon, searching for treasure and missing family. Spelunky 2 builds upon the unique, randomized challenges that made the original a classic, offering a huge adventure designed to satisfy players old and new. A Bigger and More Dynamic World, with So Much to See and Do Spelunky 2's world is even denser than the one in the original game, offering many more areas, characters, traps, and items, as well as new ways to interact with them (and for them to interact with each other). The world has expanded in other ways, too, with branching paths and multi-layered levels adding a third dimension to the classic 2d platforming. Animals can also be tamed and ridden. And dynamic liquid physics create new challenges and make the world feel extra reactive and alive. Build a Community, Make Friends Back in Base Camp, characters you unlock will mill about and relax between runs, offering encouragement and advice. As you explore, your camp will expand and develop into a thriving little community to welcome you whenever you need a break from exploring. While there, you can also access shortcuts and practice your moves in safety. The Game is Yours to Explore Spelunky 2 is not just about 'getting good and beating the game' - more than that, it's an endlessly replayable playground to experiment in and find your own way, creating stories against the backdrop of an expansive, deeply-interactive world filled with secrets. The more you play, the more the game becomes yours! Key Features, Summarized: A Bigger World with all new areas, monsters, traps, and items! An Extra Dimension is added by allowing players to access a second layer behind the normal playfield. The second layer might contain treasure rooms, hidden passages, and other special places. Multiple Routes Through the Game will add variety and give players more ways to personalize a run. Find and Ride Mounts (like turkeys!) that have special abilities. Enemies may ride mounts, as well! New NPCs that you can help, hurt, or ignore… to make each run feel even more like a unique story. Variations and Changes to Classic Spelunky Concepts like shops and ghosts that will make veteran players rethink their strategies. Improved Liquid Physics allow water and lava to move and pour realistically, which drastically affects the playfield (and looks cool) Deadly Poison and Curses can be inflicted on players and enemies alike. Build a Permanent Home at Base Camp as you do runs and explore the caves. Improved Lighting and Special Effects are paired with richer visual and audio design. Deeper Mysteries that may require a community effort to unravel. Possibly More Eggplants

Dota 2, a highly popular strategic battle game on Steam, captivates millions of players globally with its dynamic gameplay. The game features a vast roster of over a hundred unique heroes, ensuring that every match presents a fresh challenge, regardless of a player's experience level. This constant evolution is driven by regular updates that introduce new mechanics, features, and heroes, maintaining Dota 2's engaging and ever-changing landscape.

The game's core philosophy is encapsulated by its slogan: "One Battlefield. Infinite Possibilities." This statement rings true due to Dota 2's extensive hero selection and the myriad of powerful items available. This combination guarantees that no two games will ever unfold identically. The game's flexible design allows any hero to fulfill various roles, and players can strategically acquire items to adapt to the specific demands of each match. This inherent freedom empowers players to devise and execute their own unique strategies without constraint.

A key aspect of Dota 2's accessibility is its commitment to free-to-play fairness. The developers emphasize that "all heroes are free," meaning all essential gameplay content, including every hero, is accessible to all players from the outset. While cosmetic items can be purchased, the fundamental elements required to play and compete are entirely free. Furthermore, Dota 2 strongly promotes teamwork, encouraging players to form alliances with friends. Despite its intricate nature and continuous development, Dota 2 remains approachable for newcomers. Beginners can effectively grasp the fundamentals by engaging with AI bots or by utilizing the hero demo mode for practice. The sophisticated matchmaking system is designed to consistently pair players with opponents of comparable skill levels, fostering balanced and competitive matches.

Guild Wars 2 invites you into a dynamic open world brimming with opportunities for discovery and exploration. As you venture through its landscapes, a helpful content guide can offer suggestions, while your compass will direct you toward intriguing landmarks. Alternatively, you can simply choose a direction and let adventure find you.

### Exploring Tyria's Rich World

Tyria is alive with characters, each boasting unique stories and objectives. You'll find rewards for aiding them or for thwarting their plans by completing renown hearts and participating in dynamic events. For further assistance, consult the new player guide. As one player noted, "The world feels alive, and there's always something new to stumble upon."

### Seamless Open-World Interaction

Encountering other players in the open world doesn't require you to form a party. You are free to offer assistance, investigate hidden jumping puzzles, or band together against formidable world bosses. The game champions playing your way, eliminating the need for tedious grinding. Whether you're reviving fallen allies, defending soldiers from a Risen attack, or gathering resources, you will earn experience points.

### Character Progression and Customization

As you play, equip your character with a diverse array of new weapons. Each profession wields these weapons distinctively, and every weapon type provides a unique playstyle. You can further refine and personalize your character by unlocking and equipping hundreds of skills and traits.

### Structured PvP and Fashion

If immediate action appeals to you, dive into structured PvP. Here, all players compete on an equal footing, with access to max-level gear and the build options necessary to make your mark. For those who appreciate aesthetics, express your individuality through character design. Equipping new weapons and armor unlocks their skins in your wardrobe. Personalize your look with thousands of possible combinations and a vast selection of collectible dyes.

### Expanding Your Guild Wars 2 Experience

Upgrade your free account with a Guild Wars 2 expansion to gain access to login rewards, additional character and bag slots, enhanced chat features, and more. You can purchase upgrades using your Steam Wallet via the in-game Black Lion Trading Company.

#### Expansions and Living World Content

Expansions and Living World seasons introduce unique rewards and new Masteries that enhance your character's capabilities.

*   **Guild Wars 2: Heart of Thorns:** Unlock and upgrade your glider.
*   **Guild Wars 2: Path of Fire:** Befriend a stable of mounts with powerful movement skills.
*   **Guild Wars 2: End of Dragons:** Learn to fish and pilot a skiff.

Each expansion also grants access to nine elite specializations, unlocking new weapon choices, skills, and abilities for your profession. Additionally, you can select the Revenant profession at character creation, channeling legendary heroes and villains from Tyria's history.

Living World seasons continue the Guild Wars 2 narrative between expansions. These must be purchased separately through your Story Journal or in Gem Store bundles. Playing Living World episodes unlocks new explorable zones, rewards, and Masteries.

*Living World episodes become playable at level 80. Players may need to relaunch the game for the upgrade to take effect.*

**Please note that existing Guild Wars 2 player accounts cannot be accessed via Steam.**

**Mass Effect™ 3 N7 Digital Deluxe Edition (2012): Your Last Stand for Humanity**

The galaxy faces its gravest threat as the Reapers have launched a devastating invasion, reducing Earth to ashes and causing civilizations across the cosmos to crumble. As Commander Shepard, you are tasked with leading humanity's final, desperate fight for survival and reclaiming our home planet from these relentless, terrifying machines. To achieve victory, you will require a formidable force, and fortunately, the galaxy is a place where unexpected allies frequently emerge. Your mission involves recruiting diverse species and forging crucial alliances, but you must also steel yourself for the possibility of profound loss, as your most trusted companions may make the ultimate sacrifice in the heat of battle. It is now Commander Shepard's solemn duty to champion the fate of the human race and secure the salvation of the entire galaxy, a monumental undertaking with immense pressure.

To confront this overwhelming enemy, you must fight with unparalleled strategic brilliance, leveraging an expanded arsenal of new abilities and combat maneuvers. Commander Shepard can now employ blind firing tactics against adversaries and develop more potent melee attacks, significantly enhancing offensive capabilities. Furthermore, when fighting in concert with your squad, you can synergize new biotic and tech powers to unleash devastating Power Combos, turning the tide of even the most dire engagements.

**Assemble Your Ultimate War Machine:**

*   **Build a Diverse Team:** Construct your final fighting force by selecting from a wide array of alien races and distinct classes, meticulously combining their unique skills to surmount seemingly insurmountable odds.
*   **Welcome New Allies:** You will be joined by compelling newcomers such as James Vega, a soldier renowned for his unyielding resolve, and EDI, a highly trusted artificial intelligence now inhabiting a newly acquired physical form.
*   **Reunite with Familiar Faces:** Be prepared to encounter beloved characters from your past adventures, but exercise caution, as not all of them may survive the climactic final battle.

**Experience Integrated Co-op Multiplayer:**

*   **Team Up with Friends:** Engage in an integrated co-op multiplayer mode, joining forces with your friends online to liberate vital conflict zones from increasingly formidable enemy forces.
*   **Enhance Your Campaign:** Customize your warrior and earn new weapons, armor, and abilities that directly contribute to building your war preparedness statistics within your single-player campaign.

**The N7 Digital Deluxe Edition Includes:**

*   Mass Effect 3 N7 Arsenal pack featuring exclusive in-game items:
    *   N7 Crusader shotgun
    *   N7 Hurricane submachine gun
    *   N7 Valiant Sniper rifle
    *   N7 Eagle handgun
    *   N7 hoodie
*   Downloadable Art book and lithograph
*   Mass Effect Digital Comic by Dark Horse Comics
*   From Ashes DLC

Name: It Takes Two
Description:
Embark on the craziest journey of your life in It Takes Two, a genre-bending platform adventure created purely for co-op. Invite a friend to join for free with Friend’s Pass and work together across a huge variety of gleefully disruptive gameplay challenges. Play as the clashing couple Cody and May, two humans turned into dolls by a magic spell. Together, trapped in a fantastical world where the unpredictable hides around every corner, they are reluctantly challenged with saving their fractured relationship. Master unique and connected character abilities in every new level. Help each other across an abundance of unexpected obstacles and laugh-out-loud moments. Kick gangster squirrels’ furry tails, pilot a pair of underpants, DJ a buzzing night club, and bobsleigh through a magical snow globe. Embrace a heartfelt and hilarious story where narrative and gameplay weave into a uniquely metaphorical experience. It Takes Two is developed by the award-winning studio Hazelight, the industry leader of cooperative play. They’re about to take you on a wild and wondrous ride where only one thing is for certain: we’re better together. KEY FEATURES Pure co-op perfection — Invite a friend to join for free with Remote Play Together**, and experience a thrilling adventure built purely for two. Choose from couch or online co-op with split-screen play, and face ever-changing challenges where working together is the only way forward. Gleefully disruptive gameplay — From rampaging vacuum cleaners to suave love gurus, you never know what you’ll be up against next. Filled with genre-bending challenges and new character abilities to master in every level, experience a metaphorical merging of gameplay and narrative that pushes the boundaries of interactive storytelling. A universal tale of relationships — Discover a touching and heartfelt story of the challenges in getting along. Help Cody and May learn how to overcome their differences. Meet a diverse cast of strange and endearing characters. Join forces and go on an adventure you’ll treasure — together! ABOUT HAZELIGHT Hazelight is an award-winning independent game development studio based in Stockholm, Sweden. Founded in 2014 by Josef Fares (film director and creator of the award-winning game Brothers: A Tale of Two Sons), Hazelight is committed to pushing the creative boundaries of what is possible in games. In 2018, Hazelight released the BAFTA award-winning A Way Out — the first-ever co-op only, third-person action-adventure — as part of the EA Originals program. ABOUT EA ORIGINALS EA Originals helps shine a light on some of the most passionate, independent, and talented game studios across the globe. Discover innovative and unforgettable gaming experiences from highly creative game makers who love to enchant and inspire.

Name: Borderlands 2
Description:
A new era of shoot and loot is about to begin. Play as one of four new vault hunters facing off against a massive new world of creatures, psychos and the evil mastermind, Handsome Jack. Make new friends, arm them with a bazillion weapons and fight alongside them in 4 player co-op on a relentless quest for revenge and redemption across the undiscovered and unpredictable living planet. Key Features: All-New Characters and All-New Classes: Four all new playable classes including the Siren, the Commando, the Gunzerker and the Assassin. Step into the role of the Gunzerker, whose highly deadly skills allow him to dual-wield any two weapons found in the game. Not only that, you will build on that skill to do more things with two guns than you ever imagined possible. Dual machine guns? Cool. Dual rocket launchers? Of course! Dual Sniper Rifles? Sure, if that’s your thing! Want to try other styles? More tactical perhaps? There are multiple classes to choose from! Dynamic Co-op online, and LAN: Share your adventures with friends both online and via LAN. Borderlands 2 features a seamless system enabling you to drop in and drop out of a campaign without ever having to restart the game. On top of that you can even take your new gear from any game to any other! World Connected Story: Find yourself left for dead in the frozen tundra of Pandora as you begin your quest of revenge and redemption. Expose the evil surrounding the Hyperion Corporation and take on the perpetrator of a universe-wide grand deception -- the nefarious Hyperion CEO, Handsome Jack. (Oh, also: he's stolen credit for the opening of the Vault.) 87 Bazillion...Everything: In addition to the new gun system, you will lust after procedurally generated shields, grenades, Relics, class mods and much, much more. And you thought the original Borderlands had a ton of loot! Brand new environments on Pandora: Hunt through entirely brand new areas of Pandora that are more alive than ever! From the arctic tundra, through the dangerous grasslands, past the mysterious corrosive caverns to beyond, you’ll be surprised by the unpredictable world of Pandora at every turn! Brand new enemies: A whole slew of new enemies are out there to kill you in Borderlands 2. Hulking, gorilla-like Bullymongs, vicious predatory Stalkers and the Hyperion mechanical army, run by Handsome Jack, are just some of the new enemies in Borderlands 2. Note: The Mac and Linux versions of Borderlands 2 are available in English, French, Italian, German and Spanish only.

Name: Slay the Spire
Description:
We fused card games and roguelikes together to make the best single player deckbuilder we could. Craft a unique deck, encounter bizarre creatures, discover relics of immense power, and Slay the Spire! Features Dynamic Deck Building : Choose your cards wisely! Discover hundreds of cards to add to your deck with each attempt at climbing the Spire. Select cards that work together to efficiently dispatch foes and reach the top. An Ever-changing Spire : Whenever you embark on a journey up the Spire, the layout differs each time. Choose a risky or safe path, face different enemies, choose different cards, discover different relics, and even fight different bosses! Powerful Relics to Discover : Powerful items known as relics can be found throughout the Spire. The effects of these relics can greatly enhance your deck through powerful interactions. But beware, obtaining a relic may cost you more than just gold... Slay the Spire left Early Access and comes with: Four characters that each have their own unique set of cards. 350+ fully implemented cards. 200+ different items to be found. 50+ unique combat encounters. 50+ mysterious events that can help or harm you. Daily Climbs allow you to compare yourself with every other player in the world. Custom mode that allows mixing and matching various crazy run modifiers.

## HEX: Shards of Fate: A Strategic Card Game with RPG Elements

HEX: Shards of Fate offers a unique digital experience for fans of strategic card games and role-playing adventures. It combines the deep strategy of collectible card games (TCGs) with the progression found in online RPGs. Players explore the world of Entrath, tackling dungeon challenges and engaging in tactical card battles.

The game features a robust deck-building system with over 1,000 unique cards. According to the developers, winning battles can reward players with valuable equipment. This equipment can enhance their strategic options. The game also includes gem socketing, which allows for further deck customization and synergy. HEX also features a variety of champions, each with special abilities that can impact battles and support a player's card army. This mix of card strategy, character growth, and a fantasy world is designed to be highly engaging.

《魔物讨伐团》是一款融合了卡牌对战和RPG元素的Roguelike冒险游戏，是经典卡牌游戏《Monster Slayers》的官方中文强化版本。这款游戏不仅提供了官方的全文汉化，还包含了所有DLC，并对原有系统进行了显著的增强。

玩家在游戏中可以操控多达14种各具特色的职业，包括盗贼、游侠、骑士、牧师、野蛮人、法师、刺客、武僧、兽王、狂战士、亡灵巫师、药剂师、飞龙和商人。通过与各种奇特魔物的战斗以及经历随机事件，玩家可以构建出独一无二的传奇牌组。游戏以其完善的卡牌设计和独特的天赋系统著称，提供了近乎无限的牌组搭配和出牌可能性。

《魔物讨伐团》的官方讨论QQ群是791224753，欢迎各位卡牌爱好者加入交流。职业卡牌选手和知名UP主也在群中，期待与你一同探讨游戏策略。

**游戏特色：**

*   **丰富的职业选择：** 游戏包含6名基础职业、6名进阶职业以及2名特殊风格职业，共计14种。每个职业解锁后都拥有其独特的牌组，为玩家提供了多样化的游戏体验。
*   **畅爽的出牌体验：** 出牌动作与攻击招式紧密结合，流畅的连招设计带来了极致的“爽”感。
*   **个性化角色系统：** 采用纸娃娃系统，角色表情丰富且支持换装，配合真人配音，极大地增强了游戏的代入感。
*   **声望与装备体系：** 即使在战斗中失败，玩家也能通过积累装备和声望来强化下一次的战斗体验。装备和声望兑换的天赋系统为玩家提供了持续的希望。
*   **多样的克制设定：** 游戏巧妙地融入了元素和阵营的克制关系，例如“火与水”、“光明与黑暗”等。牧师能够有效压制不死生物，而火焰则是对付畏惧火焰敌人的最佳手段。

**独一无二的组牌过程：**

玩家的最终牌组效果是多种因素共同作用的结果，包括职业卡组、战斗中获取的卡牌、商人购买的卡牌、随机事件带来的卡牌、随从技能、天赋树解锁以及装备提供的加成。

**更讲究策略的探索式地图：**

游戏地图的选择与职业的克制关系相结合，将运气与策略有机地融合在一起。玩家将面对丰富多样的怪物，穿越无数的地牢进行战斗。正如游戏所言：“那些杀不死你的，只会让你变得更加强大！”

**传奇模式与无尽模式：**

通关游戏仅仅是开始。新职业的解锁、新玩法的出现，将带来更多卡牌组合、更多武器装备，以及更丰富的游戏乐趣。

Name: Monster Slayers
Description:
Developed by Nerdook (Reverse Crawl, Vertical Drop Heroes), Monster Slayers is a complete reimagining of the free web-based hit of the same name, which has been played over 4 million times on gaming portal, Kongregate. A rogue-like deck-building RPG adventure, Monster Slayers uses an innovative card-based battle system and lets you customize a deck to suit your play style. Create a new hero to join the Monster Slayers Guild and choose your path through the perilous Northern Valley as you follow your quest to defeat the legendary Harbinger and become a true Monster Slayer. Features Battle undead goblins, lion outlaws, mighty dragons and other monstrous foes using a unique card-based combat system Strategically shape your deck as you acquire new cards from merchants, treasure chests, and allies Collect fame from each run to unlock new abilities that can be used by future heroes Every playthrough is different: levels, enemy encounters and loot are randomly generated Choose from six different classes: Rogue, Ranger, Knight, Barbarian, Cleric, Wizard Recruit companions to join you on your quest and make use of their special abilities Equip your hero with stat-boosting loot to improve the chances of victory Fight for your place at the top of the Monster Slayers leaderboards Inspired by the much-loved deck-building RPG, Dream Quest, created by Peter Whalen (Hearthstone)

## Monster Train: Defend Hell's Last Pyre

In *Monster Train*, the forces of heaven have pushed back, and it's up to you to defend the last burning pyre of Hell. This roguelike deck-builder introduces a unique strategic element with its three vertical playfields. To reclaim Hell, players must carefully navigate a branching path, choosing locations that offer crucial benefits like champion upgrades, new unit recruitment, card enhancements, passive bonuses, or even card duplication. The game features five distinct clans, each with unique mechanics, encouraging diverse playstyles. Players select a primary and a supporting clan, unlocking access to cards from both, and can further refine their decks through card upgrades and special map nodes that allow for card duplication before facing the final boss.

*Monster Train* offers exceptional replayability, boasting over 220 cards, 10 starter decks, and 5 monster clans with fundamentally different gameplay. Clan progression unlocks new cards, and champions can be upgraded multiple times. The game also supports extensive modding through Steam Workshop, allows any card to be upgraded twice, features over 21 unique random events, and presents 25 covenant (difficulty) levels. In multiplayer, "Hell Rush" pits up to eight players against each other in a real-time race against the clock. The "Daily Challenge" offers a new, modified run each day with global leaderboards, while "Custom Challenge" allows players to design and share their own unique scenarios. Content updates, such as "Friends & Foes," "Wild Mutations," and "Herzal's Workshop," have introduced new champions, bosses, cards, mutators, difficulty settings, and full mod support, continually expanding the game's strategic depth and replayability.

Name: Thronebreaker: The Witcher Tales
Description:
The Witcher World is Back! 'A spectacularly crafted RPG' - 5/5 - GamesRadar+ 'One of the best-written RPGs in years' - 9.4/10 - IGN 'Superb ' - 9/10 - GameSpot Thronebreaker is a single player role-playing game set in the world of The Witcher that combines narrative-driven exploration with unique puzzles and card battle mechanics. Crafted by the developers responsible for some of the most iconic moments in The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt, the game spins a truly regal tale of Meve, a war-veteran and queen of two Northern Realms — Lyria and Rivia. Facing an imminent Nilfgaardian invasion, Meve is forced to once again enter the warpath and set out on a dark journey of destruction and revenge. KEY FEATURES AN ALL NEW EPIC TALE Experience an all-new 30-hour Witcher world tale with 20 possible world end-states. Embark on a grand adventure full of thought-provoking quests. Influence the state of the world around you by making difficult choices and face their consequences. Meet a cast of rich, multidimensional characters — some of them will join you on your quest, others you’ll have to face on the battlefield. TRAVEL TO NEVER-BEFORE-SEEN KINGDOMS Explore new and mysterious regions of the monster-infested world of The Witcher. Traverse vast lands and unique locations, all with their distinct theme — from vibrant countrysides and war-torn landscapes, to grand castles and snow-capped mountains. Save villages from hordes of monsters, look for treasures hidden among ancient ruins, scour the land for resources, and more — the world of Thronebreaker is teeming with things to do. PREPARE FOR WAR Develop and customize your very own battle camp. Train and recruit units, unlock new skills and work on your tactics. Manage resources you find and trade them with local merchants. Learn more about your companions and increase their strength in battle. LEAD YOUR ARMY IN EPIC BATTLES Build an army from characters you meet and interact with during your journey. Fight in epic story battles and solve unique puzzles and challenges. Use unique skills and abilities of your army and lead it to victory. Thronebreaker: The Witcher Tales comes with these bonus items: Official Thronebreaker Soundtrack Digital version of GWENT: Art of The Witcher Card Game artbook from Dark Horse Concept art, including the map of Lyria The Witcher graphic novel 'Fox Children' by Dark Horse Steam copy of The Witcher: Enhanced Edition Director’s Cut

Chaos Reborn is a turn-based wizard combat game from Julian Gollop, the designer of the original XCOM. It offers both single-player Realm Quests and numerous online multiplayer options.

### Magical Duels

Up to six players can engage in magical duels across various arenas. Players build a spell deck featuring unique spells and creatures, such as the Gooey Blob and Shadow Wood.

### Game Modes and Leagues

Chaos Reborn includes a monthly league system and several game modes. You can participate in live or asynchronous battles.

### Exploring the Realms

Venture into the Realms of Chaos to battle Wizard Lords and Kings. You can invite players to join you in co-op battles or invade other players' realms. Player-designed Wizard Kings can create their own Realms, which are then rated by others.

Name: Astrea: Six-Sided Oracles
Description:
Astrea is a DICE-deck-building roguelike that flips the script on deckbuilders by using dice instead of cards and an unique dual “damage” system: Purification vs Corruption. Build a dice pool strong enough to purify Astrea's out-of-control corruption and save the Star System. • Unique dual “damage” system: Purification vs Corruption - In Astrea there is a new type of “damage” system. Purification can be used to damage enemies or heal yourself. On the other hand, corruption can be used to damage yourself or heal the enemies. Pacify enemies through Purification, or Corrupt yourself to unleash abilities that help tip the scales. • Dynamic Health Bar system - With skills attached to your health bar, you can take Corruption to enable these skills and unleash powerful abilities. But be careful, if you take too much Corruption you will be consumed by it. • Not cards, but dice! - Build a dice pool that fits your playstyle. Choose from over 350 dice and three dice types; reliably safe, perfectly balanced, or powerfully risky. A dice type system designed with high-risk, high-reward in its core. • Customize your dice - Forge your fate by editing die faces with new actions, tipping the odds of powerful results into your favor. • Choose from Six Brave Oracles - Each possessing their own unique dice sets, abilities, and playstyles. From ingenious spellcasters to brutish berserkers, whether you like beating the opponent into submission or outsmarting them with clever plays, there’s an oracle for you. • 20 Upgradeable Support Sentinels - Enchanted constructs that offer supportive dice rolls making them reliable companions in the heat of battle. • Uncover Over 170 Modifying Blessings - Imbue your Oracle with unique passives yielding potent effects that change up your fundamental tactics. Choose between Star Blessings, passive effects with lower power, or Black Hole Blessings, powerful passive effects with a drawback. • More than 20 random events - Find mysterious locations that can change the course of your run. • Manipulate your enemies and control your fate - Enemies attack using their own die, making it possible for you to manipulate their die to change their intent. • 16 Difficulty Levels - Customize your experience using difficulty levels to test all your abilities. Long ago - when ancient ruins were once flourishing civilizations and their populace lived in idyllic bliss - a mystical star governed all. Loyal disciples, called Six-Sided Oracles, were blessed by their star, granting them the strength to seal away the gift of heavenly bodies within mystic relics. All was perfect and harmonious, until that one fateful day - The Crimson Dawn Cataclysm. A ferocious inferno sundered down from the sky, engulfing the entirety of the star system, crumbling the foundations of their society and corrupting the souls of the weak-willed. The disciples of the star were lost to the chaos - their creations scattered across a vast world of ruin. Could there still exist those who were capable of wielding their power? Eons later, descendants of the Six-Sided Oracles embark on a journey to finish the failed battle that their predecessors started and save their star system.

Name: Reigns: Game of Thrones
Description:
Reigns: Game of Thrones is the heir to the award-winning HBO® TV series Game of Thrones® and the smash-hit swipe ‘em up series Reigns from Nerial and Devolver Digital. Through the fiery visions of Melisandre, claim the Iron Throne as Cersei Lannister, Jon Snow, Daenerys Targaryen, and more to carefully navigate the complex relationships and hostile factions of the Seven Kingdoms. Employ ruthless tactics to outwit political rivals and wield impervious charm on your fickle bannerman. Maintain the balance and favor of the people to extend your reign and maybe, one day, survive the horrors of the coming winter. A Formidable Cast: Rule from the Iron Throne as Cersei Lannister, Jon Snow, Daenerys Targaryen, Tyrion Lannister, Sansa Stark, and more. Change between each king and queen you unlock to face challenges and mysteries unique to their story. Impose Your Will: Swipe left or right to change the fate of the Seven Kingdoms forever as you hear the impassioned pleas and unpredictable demands from the people of Westeros. If a particular character becomes bothersome, tear their card in half to unburden Your Majesty with their concerns – but at what cost? Reenvision Westeros: Melisandre’s visions are your playing field and extend beyond the TV series to imagine the many fates of those that would sit upon the Iron Throne. Rebuild the Great Sept of Baelor as Cersei or discover the path of the Seven Kingdoms if Sansa Stark had married Jaime Lannister. Regal Mini Games: Even the most powerful rulers need to set aside their worries and partake in more trivial matters now and then. From jousting to tavern brawls, these distractions aren’t without consequence! A Grander Reigns: Fans of the Reigns series will be delighted with the biggest, deepest entry in the series that does not simply retell the stories you know but rather lets you create new adventures at your whim. Iconic Soundtrack: Decide the fate of Westeros and those that reside in your land to the soaring score of the HBO series by Ramin Djawadi. ©2018 Home Box Office, Inc. All Rights Reserved. HBO and related trademarks are the property of Home Box Office, Inc.

Embark on an epic deckbuilding RPG adventure in **Gordian Quest**, a game where a sinister curse has plunged the land into darkness, monsters roam freely, and scoundrels exploit the chaos. As heroes emerge from the shadows, you are called to lead them on a perilous quest to save what remains of this fallen world and eradicate the root of evil. Will you succumb to the claws of your enemies or the dire consequences of your own poor decisions? Your **Gordian Quest** is about to commence.
