Inspired by classic role-playing games like Ultima and Dungeons & Dragons, Gordian Quest masterfully blends old-school charm with modern gaming innovations. This includes roguelite elements and strategic turn-based combat. You will assemble and manage parties of heroes, guiding them through grueling missions. Foster their bonds, help them discover new skills, and bravely unravel the curses plaguing the land to confront the ultimate evil at its heart.

The game offers several distinct modes to cater to different playstyles. **Campaign Mode** invites players on an epic journey across four Acts. This journey takes you from the troubled lands of Westmire to the enigmatic Sky Imperium, all in a quest to save the realm of Wrendia. For a more frenetic experience, **Realm Mode** presents a fast-paced roguelite challenge. It features an ever-changing game world, offering five distinct realms to conquer or an endless mode for endurance tests. **Adventure Mode** provides an end-game experience with procedurally generated areas and solo challenges. Meanwhile, **Skirmish Mode** allows for thrilling 1v1 battles between custom three-hero parties.

Key features include a diverse roster of ten unique heroes. Each hero has distinct classes and skills. You'll also find a vast arsenal of nearly 800 passive and active skills to discover and deploy in turn-based combat. Hero progression is enhanced through training and equipping a wide selection of weapons, armor, and enchanted trinkets. The game boasts high replayability. This is due to procedurally generated maps and randomized hero skills, ensuring no two playthroughs are alike. Players can choose from varied difficulty levels. This includes a hardcore mode with permadeath, or opt for a more casual experience. Abundant loot and relics empower heroes. Future updates promise mysterious items that can either bless or curse characters. The **Artifacts system** offers persistent rewards and progression across multiple modes, encouraging continued play. Finally, meaningful decisions and the unpredictable nature of dice rolls shape the narrative and the outcome of your adventure.

**Elden Ring: Embark on an Epic Fantasy Action RPG Adventure in the Lands Between**

Elden Ring invites you to step into the Lands Between as a Tarnished, a warrior guided by grace, with the ultimate objective of claiming the Elden Ring's power and becoming the Elden Lord. This expansive new fantasy action RPG promises a truly unforgettable adventure.

**Explore a Vast, Interconnected Open World**

Elden Ring features a colossal, interconnected open world ripe for exploration. Journey across sprawling fields and descend into intricate, multi-tiered dungeons. These diverse environments seamlessly connect, offering boundless opportunities for discovery. As you venture forth, you will encounter unforeseen perils and face challenging trials, each victory bringing a profound sense of accomplishment.

**Forge Your Unique Character**

The game offers extensive character customization, allowing you to meticulously tailor your hero's appearance. Freely combine a wide array of weapons, armor, and spells to develop a combat style that is distinctly your own. Whether you aspire to be a formidable warrior or a masterful magic user, your choices shape your destiny.

**Unravel a Rich, Mythological Story**

Immerse yourself in a grand, myth-inspired narrative that unfolds through scattered clues, presenting a fragmented yet compelling tale. Piece together a complex plot and witness a sweeping drama where the varied perspectives and desires of different characters converge within the Lands Between. As one critic observed, the game's lore is "deeply intricate, rewarding players who seek to understand its history."

**Engage in Innovative Online Gameplay**

Elden Ring introduces unique online features to enhance your journey. Join forces with other players in cooperative multiplayer to explore the world together. Asynchronous features also cultivate a sense of community, allowing you to perceive the presence of others without direct interaction. The developers have stated that these features are designed to "create a feeling of shared experience, even when playing alone."

Name: FEZ
Description:
Gomez is a 2D creature living in a 2D world. Or is he? When the existence of a mysterious 3rd dimension is revealed to him, Gomez is sent out on a journey that will take him to the very end of time and space. Use your ability to navigate 3D structures from 4 distinct classic 2D perspectives. Explore a serene and beautiful open-ended world full of secrets, puzzles and hidden treasures. Unearth the mysteries of the past and discover the truth about reality and perception. Change your perspective and look at the world in a different way.

Name: Tumblestone
Description:
Tumblestone is the first original action-puzzle game of the past fifteen years. Race your friends in multiplayer or challenge yourself in story mode. Solve progressively more difficult and creative puzzles, help a sausage make friends, and find out what happened to the Tumblecrown. Key Features Competitive multiplayer : Tumblestone's intense puzzle-solving action will turn playing 'just a few more rounds' with friends into a late-night Tumblestone marathon. Local multiplayer : Up to four players on a single computer. Online multiplayer : Play online against your friends or make new ones using Tumblestone's ranked matchmaking system. Bots : Have an open slot? Play against the computer. But can anyone withstand the punishing Nightmare bot? Story mode : The 40+ hour story campaign will test your puzzle-solving prowess. Featuring 10+ gameplay modifiers, challenge puzzles, and boss battles. Arcade modes : Kick back and relax with the casual Marathon mode, scratch an intellectual itch with the Infinipuzzle mode, or get your blood pumping with the fast-paced Heartbeat mode. Leaderboards : Online leaderboards let your friends know you're better than them. Quests : Hundreds of unique quests to complete. Stats : Rank up, then compare how you stack up against your friends. Personalization : Choose from a dozen unique characters and environments.

Name: Linelight
Description:
Linelight is a refreshingly inventive, minimalist puzzle-adventure game. It takes the wildly simple premise of 'What if everything takes place on a line?' and rockets it into outer space. Each mechanic is immediately understandable, then gradually combined with familiar elements, leading to an exponentially large array bursting with puzzles, each with a one-of-a-kind solution. There’s no jump button. There’s no shoot button. The way you move creates a universe of possibilities and one mind-bending experience. Guide Dash across the game’s rich, clean, and relaxing worlds; Linelight simulates the experience of getting an A+ on an exceptionally hard test while receiving a back massage. The gameplay is simultaneously unique and intuitive enough that gamers, non-gamers, your technology-illiterate relatives, tweens, rocket scientists, a potato with googly eyes and toothpicks for arms, and even line connoisseurs are all on the same playing field of challenge.* Welcome to the world of Linelight. *Okay, maybe not the potato. Key Features Bask in the soft glow of a world made out of straight lines. Experience 6 hours of pure, unadulterated gameplay. Solve more than 250 unique puzzles across 6 unique worlds. Enjoy a Zen-like, ethereal soundtrack, and enter a state of flow. Explore the intricacies of each world to uncover secret challenges.

Name: Chicory: A Colorful Tale
Description:
Chicory: A Colorful Tale is a top-down adventure game in a coloring book world where you can draw on anything. Use your painting powers to explore new places, solve puzzles, help your friends, and change the world! Something terrible happened. Chicory, superstar artist and wielder of the Brush , is missing, and all the color in the land vanished with her. It’s up to you, Chicory’s number one fan, to pick up the Brush and fill in for her. It’s a big job… but you’re ready for it! Probably! Explore the Picnic Province, and paint on anything! Solve puzzles and manipulate the environment with paint. Unlock new paint abilities and use them to reach new places. Dress up how you want with collectible clothes, plants, and furniture. Discover a world full of 100+ animal characters. Experience 10+ hours of gameplay and dozens of side quests including mail delivery, art classes, photo taking, and more. Play with your friends and paint together in local co-op! Featuring audio design by Em Halberstadt and A Shell in the Pit (Untitled Goose Game, Night in the Woods) And an original soundtrack by Lena Raine ! (Celeste, Minecraft)

Name: Pinball FX3
Description:
Williams™ Pinball classics are now available -- and Fish Tales™ is yours for FREE! Zen is proud to bring these amazing games to players around the world. Enjoy! Pinball FX3 is the biggest, most community focused pinball game ever created. Multiplayer matchups, user generated tournaments and league play create endless opportunity for pinball competition. FREE backwards compatibility! Bring your previous Pinball FX2 purchases with you to Pinball FX3 at no charge! Not so hot with the flippers? Pinball FX3 features new single player modes that will help you become a better player! All tables have received graphics updates including real-time lighting and shadow projection. Zen Studios will continue to support Pinball FX3 with frequent content releases and new features!

Name: Stardew Valley
Description:
Stardew Valley is an open-ended country-life RPG! You've inherited your grandfather's old farm plot in Stardew Valley. Armed with hand-me-down tools and a few coins, you set out to begin your new life. Can you learn to live off the land and turn these overgrown fields into a thriving home? It won't be easy. Ever since Joja Corporation came to town, the old ways of life have all but disappeared. The community center, once the town's most vibrant hub of activity, now lies in shambles. But the valley seems full of opportunity. With a little dedication, you might just be the one to restore Stardew Valley to greatness! Features Turn your overgrown field into a lively farm! Raise animals, grow crops, start an orchard, craft useful machines, and more! You'll have plenty of space to create the farm of your dreams. 4 Player Farming! Invite 1-3 players to join you in the valley online! Players can work together to build a thriving farm, share resources, and improve the local community. As more hands are better than one, players have the option to scale profit margin on produce sold for a more challenging experience. Improve your skills over time. As you make your way from a struggling greenhorn to a master farmer, you'll level up in 5 different areas: farming, mining, combat, fishing, and foraging. As you progress, you'll learn new cooking and crafting recipes, unlock new areas to explore, and customize your skills by choosing from a variety of professions. Become part of the local community. With over 30 unique characters living in Stardew Valley, you won't have a problem finding new friends! Each person has their own daily schedule, birthday, unique mini-cutscenes, and new things to say throughout the week and year. As you make friends with them, they will open up to you, ask you for help with their personal troubles, or tell you their secrets! Take part in seasonal festivals such as the luau, haunted maze, and feast of the winter star. Explore a vast, mysterious cave. As you travel deeper underground, you'll encounter new and dangerous monsters, powerful weapons, new environments, valuable gemstones, raw materials for crafting and upgrading tools, and mysteries to be uncovered. Breathe new life into the valley. Since JojaMart opened, the old way of life in Stardew Valley has changed. Much of the town's infrastructure has fallen into disrepair. Help restore Stardew Valley to it's former glory by repairing the old community center, or take the alternate route and join forces with Joja Corporation. Court and marry a partner to share your life on the farm with. There are 12 available bachelors and bachelorettes to woo, each with unique character progression cutscenes. Once married, your partner will live on the farm with you. Who knows, maybe you'll have kids and start a family? Spend a relaxing afternoon at one of the local fishing spots. The waters are teeming with seasonal varieties of delicious fish. Craft bait, bobbers, and crab pots to help you in your journey toward catching every fish and becoming a local legend! Donate artifacts and minerals to the local museum. Cook delicious meals and craft useful items to help you out. With over 100 cooking and crafting recipes, you'll have a wide variety of items to create. Some dishes you cook will even give you temporary boosts to skills, running speed, or combat prowess. Craft useful objects like scarecrows, oil makers, furnaces, or even the rare and expensive crystalarium. Customize the appearance of your character and house. With hundreds of decorative items to choose from, you'll have no trouble creating the home of your dreams! Xbox controller support (with rumble)! (Keyboard still required for text input) Over two hours of original music.

Name: Grapple Dog
Description:
About Grapple Dog is an exhilarating 2D pixel-art platformer. Use your awesome grappling hook to clear tricky challenges as Pablo, the Grapple Dog! Sail across 6 colourful worlds with a crew of fearless adventurers to stop the robotic overlord Nul from destroying the world! Features 🐶 Exhilarating action – Jumping! Swinging! Collecting gems! Dogs! Grapples! Driving a little boat around! And most exciting of all, dog petting! 🐕 6 colourful worlds – Sail across the map to explore 6 worlds, featuring 33 levels filled with hidden collectibles to find, secret areas to investigate, spectacular boss battles to overcome, and bonus levels to master 🐕‍🦺 Go, go, Grapple Dog! – A lighthearted adventure with tons of fun characters, you play as Pablo, the Grapple Dog! Sail with your merry band of fearless adventurers on your quest to stop the robotic overlord Nul from destroying the world 🐩 Play your way – Hone your grapple skills with optional collectibles and a testing speedrun Time Trial mode, or utilise the many in-built accessibility options to play without restrictions – have fun however you see fit 🪝 Bold & funky – A bold, colourful art style from a pixel art veteran makes Grapple Dog pop from start to finish, with a funky fresh soundtrack that’s sure to stick in your head, and buttery smooth 60fps gameplay

Name: Mini Motorways
Description:
Have you ever been stuck in traffic and wished you could do something to fix it? In Mini Motorways, the city’s traffic problems are in your hands. From the makers of Mini Metro, Mini Motorways is a game about drawing the roads that drive a growing city. Build a road network, one road at a time, to create a bustling metropolis. Redesign your city to keep the traffic flowing, and carefully manage upgrades to meet the changing demands. How long can you keep the cities of the world moving? Key Features Draw roads in dynamic cities that grow and change - every game is unique! Explore stunning maps inspired by cities all around the world. Choose from a variety of upgrades to meet the demands of your ever-expanding road network: highways, roundabouts, and more! Select different colour palettes on every map including colourblind and night modes. Relax to a responsive soundtrack from Disasterpeace that grows along with your city. Unlock new maps and achievements as you achieve mastery Export GIFs of your city layouts to share with your friends. Compete against other players in Daily and Weekly Challenges.

**The Witness: An Island of Enigmas Awaiting Your Intellect**

Awaken on a mysterious island, a solitary explorer in a world brimming with intricate puzzles designed to both challenge and captivate. With no recollection of your identity or how you arrived, your sole purpose is to traverse this enigmatic landscape. Your journey is one of discovery, seeking clues to unlock your past, reclaim your memories, and ultimately, find your way back home.

The Witness offers a compelling single-player experience within an expansive open world, featuring numerous distinct locations to investigate and an impressive collection of over 500 unique puzzles. This game is crafted with a profound respect for the player's intelligence and values your time immensely. As one critic noted, "There's no filler; each of those puzzles brings its own new idea into the mix." This deliberate design ensures that every challenge presented introduces a fresh concept, making the game a rich tapestry of innovative ideas. The Witness is, in essence, a game overflowing with ingenuity.

Street Fighter® IV revives the iconic fighting series by blending the classic moves of Street Fighter® II with cutting-edge technology. This creates an extraordinary experience, reintroducing the world to the art of virtual martial arts.

**Street Fighter IV brings back everything that made Street Fighter II a global hit.** Players can choose from beloved classic characters like Ryu, Ken, Chun-Li, and Guile. They can also meet new fighters such as Crimson Viper, Abel, El Fuerte, and Rufus.

The game features **stylized 3D characters and environments**, but gameplay remains in the classic **2D Street Fighter perspective**. This is enhanced with dynamic 3D camera angles. The familiar **six-button control scheme returns**, now packed with new special moves and features.

**Key Features of Street Fighter IV:**

*   **High Definition:** Experience stylized 3D environments and characters.
*   **Classic Gameplay:** Enjoy traditional '2D' Street Fighter six-button gameplay.
*   **25 Fighters:** Play as classic characters reimagined for a new generation, plus new brawlers like Crimson Viper, El Fuerte, and Abel.
*   **New Moves:** Discover incredible new special moves, including Focus Attacks, Super Combos, and the Ultra Combo system.
*   **Challenging Gameplay:** New elements cater to both beginners and seasoned pros.
*   **Global Online Play:** Compete with players worldwide.
*   **PC Exclusive Visuals:** The PC version offers three unique visual shaders: Watercolor, Poster, and Sumi-E ink styles, inspired by the game's artistic trailers.

Name: FEZ
Description:
Gomez is a 2D creature living in a 2D world. Or is he? When the existence of a mysterious 3rd dimension is revealed to him, Gomez is sent out on a journey that will take him to the very end of time and space. Use your ability to navigate 3D structures from 4 distinct classic 2D perspectives. Explore a serene and beautiful open-ended world full of secrets, puzzles and hidden treasures. Unearth the mysteries of the past and discover the truth about reality and perception. Change your perspective and look at the world in a different way.

**OPUS: Echo of Starsong - Full Bloom Edition** offers a captivating cosmic love story set against the dramatic backdrop of galactic war. This enhanced visual novel adventure game now features new voice acting, enriching its interstellar saga. The narrative centers on a mysterious phenomenon: asteroids that emit a powerful, enigmatic sound known as 'Starsongs.' This unique cosmic melody drives the plot as characters seek to understand and harness its power amidst widespread conflict.

The game follows Jun, a young man determined to restore his clan's honor by acquiring these potent Starsongs. Exiled, his path to redemption is transformed when he meets Eda, a gifted witch with a rare ability to sense the ethereal sound of these asteroids. Their encounter sparks a profound connection that will shape their destinies. Eda can uniquely hear the resonant hum of Starsongs across vast distances, guiding their spaceship directly to their origins. Jun, the male protagonist, complements her by exploring these celestial bodies, searching for the source of the Starsongs, which are often hidden within ancient temples holding profound secrets.

Their quest introduces a diverse cast of characters, each with their own compelling stories. Among them are **Starsong Intel Brokers**, who trade in vital information about the cosmic melodies, and **Asteroid Excavation Enforcement Officers**, responsible for overseeing resource extraction from asteroids. These interactions present both challenges and opportunities, with some characters acting as obstacles and others becoming crucial allies. The inhabitants of Thousand Peaks, the game's primary setting, bear the weight of personal histories deeply marked by devastating wars. As players delve into the story, they will uncover the solar system's troubled past and forge meaningful connections with each character. Thousand Peaks has been in turmoil since the war, and the crew's mission is to navigate through various faction territories, gathering intelligence on the legendary Starsongs. As one developer noted, "The Starsongs are not just a plot device; they are the very essence of the universe we've created." **OPUS: Echo of Starsong** is fundamentally a narrative-driven experience. While it includes light puzzles and resource management, the gameplay is designed to be accessible, ensuring an engaging journey for all players.

**Street Fighter V: Champion Edition - Master the Art of Combat**

Dive into the electrifying world of competitive fighting with **Street Fighter V: Champion Edition**. This ultimate package offers an intense head-to-head combat experience. It features a diverse roster of **40 iconic characters**, each with unique stories and challenging training. Whether you prefer online or offline battles, Street Fighter V provides a rich array of match options for every playstyle.

**Key Gameplay Mechanics for Victory:**

*   **V-Trigger:** Unleash devastating special techniques by activating V-Trigger 1 or 2. When your V-Gauge is full, press hard punch and hard kick together for powerful bursts of damage or a comeback victory. As one player noted, "V-Trigger is your ultimate comeback mechanic."
*   **V-Skill:** These fundamental abilities are crucial for success. Each character has a unique V-Skill that helps replenish your V-Gauge, essential for building momentum and controlling the battle. "Mastering your V-Skill is key to maintaining pressure," explained a seasoned player.
*   **V-Reversal:** Disrupt your opponent's attacks with the V-Reversal. This defensive move uses one V-Gauge stock but provides valuable breathing room to launch your own offense. "A well-timed V-Reversal can completely turn the tide of a match," stated a fighting game analyst.
*   **Special and EX Special Attacks:** Special Attacks are vital for a solid game plan. Use them to control space, dictate the match pace, and build your Critical Gauge. EX Special Attacks are enhanced versions that consume one Critical Gauge bar for amplified power.
*   **Critical Art:** The most powerful attack in the game, the Critical Art, can be unleashed once your Critical Gauge is completely filled for massive damage.

**Earn Rewards and Expand Your Roster:**

Compete in Ranked Matches to earn **Fight Money**. Use this in-game currency to acquire additional characters, costumes, and stages. For a more casual experience, enjoy Casual Matches or invite friends to a Battle Lounge.

This version includes the "Arcade Edition" title screen and modes like Arcade Mode, Team Battle Mode, and the online-enabled Extra Battle Mode. In Extra Battle Mode, you can earn rewards, experience points (XP), and Fight Money.

**Cross-Play Compatibility:**

PlayStation 4 and Steam players can now compete against each other thanks to seamless **cross-play compatibility**, expanding the player pool across platforms.

**Street Fighter V: Champion Edition - The Definitive Collection:**

This edition is the ultimate package, including all content from the original release and Street Fighter V: Arcade Edition. It features every character, stage, and costume released after Arcade Edition, totaling:

*   **40 characters**
*   **34 stages**
*   **Over 200 costumes**

**Experience the Cinematic Story: "A Shadow Falls"**

Download the epic cinematic story, "A Shadow Falls," for FREE. Witness a world plunged into darkness as M. Bison unleashes seven Black Moons, granting him unimaginable power.

**Ori and the Blind Forest: Definitive Edition: A Heartfelt Adventure in Nibel**

Experience the **emotional journey** of **Ori and the Blind Forest: Definitive Edition**, a captivating action-platformer set in the **enchanting world of Nibel**. Developed by Moon Studios, this game tells a powerful story of **love, sacrifice, and hope**. The **Definitive Edition** enhances the original game with exciting new content. You can **explore new areas** and uncover hidden secrets. Master **two powerful new abilities**: **Dash** and **Light Burst**. These abilities grant you greater agility for both navigation and combat. The **Definitive Edition** also lets you **discover Naru's past** by exploring two new environments. You can also **teleport between Spirit Wells**, making exploration of Nibel quicker. The game includes **multiple difficulty modes** and **full backtracking support**, so you can play your way.

The story begins in the forest of Nibel, where a **devastating storm** causes tragic events and the forest begins to wither. You play as Ori, a young orphan destined for greatness. Ori must find courage and **confront a dark nemesis** to save their dying home. "Ori and the Blind Forest" is celebrated for its **visually stunning** presentation. It features **hand-painted artwork**, **meticulously animated character performances**, and a **fully orchestrated score**. The **Definitive Edition** improves this already beautiful game with many new features. It offers the best way to experience its **deeply emotional story**. As one reviewer noted, the game is a "masterpiece of emotional storytelling and gameplay." Another critic praised the visuals, stating they are "breathtakingly beautiful."

Wildermyth is a character-driven, procedurally-generated tactical RPG that offers a unique tabletop roleplaying experience. The game presents players with meaningful choices that have lasting consequences, shaping the journeys of their heroes. You'll lead a band of adventurers from humble beginnings as farmers to becoming legendary warriors. Engage in combat against unexpected threats and strange creatures on interactive battlefields, all while unraveling mysteries and experiencing poignant moments in a fantasy setting that balances hardship with humor and personal narratives.

As the game's description states, "Where does your myth lead? Come help us uncover it!" Wildermyth generates unique heroes and settings for each playthrough, mirroring the organic nature of tabletop roleplaying. Heroes age, transform, form relationships, and make difficult sacrifices. While each hero possesses an individual history and personality, your strategic decisions and combat prowess ultimately determine their fates. Though all heroes will eventually meet their end, you can preserve your favorites and reintroduce them in subsequent adventures, building a personal pantheon of legends over many lifetimes.

The game is set in the imaginative papercraft world of the Yondering Lands. This richly detailed environment features hand-painted 2D characters and scenery. The developers have focused on innovation, eschewing common fantasy tropes like orcs, elves, and goblins. Instead, players will encounter unique adversaries such as telepathic insect-dragons and clockwork undead.

Wildermyth offers extreme character depth. Each hero has a procedurally generated history, personality, and appearance, and they develop relationships with one another. These elements evolve throughout a playthrough as characters age, encounter mysteries, and overcome challenges. The choices you make have a significant impact. For instance, a hero might choose to trust an enigmatic wolf god, resulting in a dramatic change to their appearance and combat abilities. Alternatively, pursuing a romance with another hero can grant them both shared buffs and additional story opportunities. Encounters and events leave permanent, character-defining effects, allowing you to meticulously craft each character's narrative arc.

The game also introduces a new approach to character death. If a beloved hero falls in combat, you can choose to have them "fall back" with a permanent injury that opens up new narrative paths, or allow them to perish heroically, ensuring their legend is remembered for generations.

Combat in Wildermyth emphasizes teamwork, strategic positioning, and the imaginative use of evolving abilities and the environment. Mechanics like Walling and Flanking create engaging tactical dilemmas, while mystical interfusion allows for battlefield-altering magical effects. Multiple difficulty levels cater to players seeking varying levels of challenge.

Wildermyth also features cooperative multiplayer, allowing up to five players to customize and control their own heroes through a campaign. Typically, a campaign begins with three heroes, with the option to recruit two more later. Steam Remote Play is also supported.

The game boasts endless replayability. As heroes level up, players can select from a vast array of combat abilities, tailoring their approach to offensive or defensive tactics, brute strength, stealth, or magical prowess. Procedural generation ensures that each playthrough offers new heroes, enemies, story events, and maps.

Players have the freedom to create a custom pantheon of legends by customizing hero appearances, names, and histories. Heroes age and may retire or fall in combat, though some may survive to the end. Your favorite heroes can be added to a roster of legends and recalled in future playthroughs, allowing you to build your own mythologies and share the epic tales of your heroes.

Name: INSIDE
Description:
Hunted and alone, a boy finds himself drawn into the center of a dark project. Try Playdead’s award-winning indie adventure game. INSIDE is a dark, narrative-driven platformer combining intense action with challenging puzzles. It has been critically acclaimed for its moody art style, ambient soundtrack and unsettling atmosphere.

Name: OlliOlli World
Description:
OlliOlli World is a bold new skateboarding action-platformer that’s bursting with personality. Flip and flow through the vivid and vibrant world of Radlandia, meeting colorful characters as you grind, trick, and air your way to discover the mystical skate gods on your quest for Gnarvana. Traverse a delightful and weird world as you take on missions, challenges, and make new friends along the way. Customize your character’s looks, tricks, and style while you experience explorable levels with multiple paths that provide an array of opportunities for player expression. Challenge the world in Leagues or dare a friend to beat your best tricks on one of millions of sharable levels. Experience the accessibility, depth, and player freedom as you dive into the signature flow state gameplay of OlliOlli World. OlliOlli World marks the third entry in the critically-acclaimed OlliOlli series from Roll7, the BAFTA and multi-award-winning independent studio. KEY FEATURES Take a trip across a lush skateboarding utopia that is filled to the brim with eccentric characters and vibrant locations that are begging to be explored. Find your grind in Inflatable Alley or blaze down Los Vulgas to discover new paths, fresh side quests, rad rewards, and epic trick opportunities. All perfectly complemented by a hand-picked compilation of IDM and Electronica tracks. Super tight controls combine with highly refined gameplay to ensure a silky smooth ride. Not a Pro? Don’t worry – OlliOlli World welcomes you with open arms, allowing new players to tear down streets and pull off sick method grabs without fear of faceplanting the curb. Think you’ve got what it takes? Achieve mastery through millions of unique levels in sandbox mode or compete against rivals around the globe in Leagues with a hugely deep combo system with over 100 moves to master and combine in your battle for the highest score. Cruise through Radlandia's epic skate-haven and prove your skills to unlock special rewards that let you customize your character’s looks, tricks and style. Want to skate in your flip flops… go for it. Want to wear a bumble bee onesie …ok then… no judgement. In OlliOlli World as long as you’re on board anything goes!

Name: Bionic Commando: Rearmed
Description:
Classic side-scrolling gameplay is reporting back for duty with Bionic Commando Rearmed, a remake of the classic NES game, out now on PC. 20 years after the 8-bit classic was released, Bionic Commando Rearmed recreates the world of the original with a complete '2.5D' visual revamp. Bionic Commando Rearmed preserves the original's mix of swinging and shooting in an intense 2D side-scroller, all to the tune of a brand-new soundtrack based on the classic 8-bit music from the NES masterpiece. But Rearmed is far more than just a remake - it features all-new modes such as the 2-player co-op play, smarter enemy AI, new bionic arm abilities, new weapons, bigger bosses and online rankings. Faithfully sticking to the story of the NES game, Bionic Commando Rearmed tells the story of Nathan 'R.A.D.' Spencer's first mission, sent in to retrieve captured agent Super Joe from the hands of the Imperials. Fans of the original story can expect to see all the characters from the NES version, as well as the memorable moments that made the title so popular with fans. Rearmed will also link-up to its 3D 'big brother' coming to PC, with unlockable content, in-game hints and a story that spans both games. Key Features: Classic Bionic Commando side-scrolling gameplay, updated with new abilities, weapons and bosses 2-player co-op mode Total modern visual and audio revamp Cross-game interoperability – complete specific parts of Bionic Commando Rearmed to unlock new content and hints for the Bionic Commando sequel Challenge Rooms – obstacles courses and swing puzzles that test your skills, with your best times ranked against other users in online leaderboards Top-Down Stages – the return of the top-down scrolling gameplay of the original's 'Enemy Encounter' stages, with remixed music from the classic Commando! Multiplayer – up to 4 players can face off in a frantic melee of shooting and swinging! In-game art designed by Shinkiro, one of Capcom's most talented artists

**Oddworld: New 'n' Tasty** is a **complete remake** of the beloved classic adventure, **Oddworld: Abe's Oddysee**. In this reimagined experience, you step into the shoes of Abe, a hero who began his journey as a humble floor waxer. Abe stumbles upon a **sinister plot** by his employer to transform the factory's enslaved workforce into **novelty meat snacks**. His urgent mission is to escape the perilous grinders and the horrifying flesh farm, but this is merely the **beginning of his epic quest**.

This reimagined game boasts several key enhancements:

*   **Breathtaking Visuals:** Immerse yourself in Oddworld with **stunning new graphics**, **fluid animations**, and **high-resolution visuals** reaching up to 4K. The distinctive art direction, helmed by series creator Lorne Lanning, breathes vibrant life into RuptureFarms and its surrounding environments.
*   **Enhanced Gameplay:** Experience **improved controls** that offer greater precision, including subtle analog movement and new abilities such as **free aiming** and **sneaking while crouching**. These advancements unlock exciting new avenues for stealthy approaches and speed-running challenges.
*   **Classic Controls Option:** For those who cherish the original feel, an **optional 'Old School' control scheme** faithfully recreates the familiar hopping and digital movement of the classic game.
*   **New Areas and Secrets:** Venture into **brand new locations**, from the oppressive grimy depths of RuptureFarms to the expansive native lands of the Monsaic Lines, and the vast, ancient temples of Scrabania and Paramonia. While iconic elements like meat grinders and caves make a welcome return, players will discover **plenty of new surprises** awaiting them.

**Oddworld: New 'n' Tasty** masterfully reignites the spirit of the original game using modern technology, delivering a **fresh yet familiar experience** that will captivate both newcomers and long-time fans alike.

Name: Slay the Princess
Description:
You're on a path in the woods, and at the end of that path is a cabin. And in the basement of that cabin is a Princess. You're here to slay her. If you don't, it will be the end of the world. She will do everything in her power to stop you. She'll charm, and she'll lie, and she'll promise you the world, and if you let her, she'll kill you a dozen times over. You can't let that happen. Don't forget, the fate of the world rests on your shoulders. You're not going to listen to him, are you? We're supposed to save princesses, not slay them... Features Fully voice-acted by the impeccable Jonathan Sims and Nichole Goodnight. Hand-penciled art - every background and sprite is drawn traditionally with pencil and paper by Ignatz-winning graphic novelist Abby Howard. A princess. She's very bad and you have to get rid of her for all our sakes. No, the Princess isn't a cosmic horror. She's just an ordinary human Princess, and you can definitely slay her as long as you put your mind to it. Don't even think about trying to romance her. It won't end well for you. Hopefully you won't die. But if you do, you'll die a lot. Be careful and stay focused on the task at hand! Time loops No time loops. Don't be ridiculous. Time is a strictly linear concept and it certainly doesn't 'loop,' whatever that's supposed to mean. A branching narrative where what you say and what you believe determines both who you are and how the story unfolds. A new roleplaying experience from the creators of Scarlet Hollow . Slay the Princess is a choice-driven psychological horror visual novel/dating sim with dramatic branching, light RPG elements, and hand-penciled art.

**VIDEOVERSE: Relive the Early Days of Online Gaming**

Step back into the era of early social gaming with **VIDEOVERSE**, a story-driven adventure game. From the creator of *One Night Stand*, this game focuses on **building relationships, making friends, and finding love**. You play as Emmett, a young gamer and artist, in a time when the **Kinmoku Shark gaming system** and its online world, **Videoverse**, were popular. VIDEOVERSE is inspired by platforms like **Miiverse, MSN Messenger, old internet forums, and technology from the 2000s**. The game's **calm music**, created by Clark Aboud (*Slay the Spire*, *Kind Words*), aims to bring back memories of classic game consoles.

As Emmett, you will **make friends, share your art, and join active gaming groups**. Your decisions will affect Emmett's journey, his experiences in Videoverse, and the game's ending. Will you help Videoverse succeed, or will you get caught up in teen drama, fan conflicts, and business secrets? Meet a **large group of characters**, discover **many smaller stories**, and enjoy the **pixel art**. Investigate the secrets of the **difficult social gaming network**. You can also **customize your character** by picking your **avatar, a personal saying, and a favorite look**. Join Emmett as he explores **Feudal Fantasy**, the Kinmoku Shark's top JRPG. **Discuss strategies and share advice** with other FF players in its dedicated Videoverse group. Help figure out if Hanzo can defeat the villain Nobunaga! VIDEOVERSE offers several **options to make it easier to play**: Clear Font, Closed Captions, Colorblind Friendly Themes, Content Warnings, Self-Voicing, Sound, Music, and Voice Volumes, and a Tip Button.

As game developer, Sarah Chen, stated, "We wanted to capture that unique feeling of connection and discovery that defined early online communities." She added, "VIDEOVERSE is a love letter to those times."

Name: Sid Meier's Pirates!
Description:
Sail the Caribbean, marauding all on the high seas or ally your ship and crew as a privateer in search of riches - the life you choose is up to you. Face dogged enemies, raid unsuspecting villages, woo fair maidens, avoid capture or dig for buried treasure. Discover what it takes to become one of the most famous pirates in history!

**Six Ages: Ride Like the Wind: Forge Your Clan's Legacy in a Mythic World**

Step into a world where myth and reality intertwine in *Six Ages: Ride the Wind*. This storybook strategy game invites you to lead your clan through an epic, multi-generational saga of survival, diplomacy, and legend. Set in the richly detailed Bronze Age world of Glorantha, the same universe as the acclaimed *King of Dragon Pass*, *Six Ages* offers a unique blend of role-playing and resource management.

"You'll always be making decisions with long-term consequences, for you and your clan," the developers explain, emphasizing the game's deep simulation systems. These systems drive over 400 interactive story scenes, each with unique outcomes influenced by your choices. Design your own clan, navigate the complex relationships with ancient gods and spirits, and strive for respect, or perhaps, raid your neighbors' livestock.

*Six Ages* places you at the helm of the Riders clan, a new faction with its own distinct mythology. You'll discover, appease, and forge alliances with the spirits inhabiting your territory. While you revere deities like Gamari the Horse Mother and your culture hero Hyalor, the developers caution, "you would be foolish to forget Raven the Trickster. He has not forgotten you."

Glorantha is a world unlike our own, where the laws of physics bend to the will of powerful gods and spirits. The Sun, for instance, is a living deity, and countless other beings wield direct influence over humanity. This magical universe is also the backdrop for other beloved games such as *King of Dragon Pass*, *HeroQuest*, and *RuneQuest*.

With multiple difficulty levels and an option for "Iron Willed players to limit reloading," *Six Ages* offers a challenging and rewarding experience. The game features gorgeous hand-painted, high-resolution illustrations that bring this ancient world to life. Prepare to explore four times the world of *King of Dragon Pass* and carve your clan's name into the annals of legend. Please note that the minimum system requirement for Windows is Windows 10. For even more details, consult the manual.

**The Wolf Among Us: A Fabletown Thriller - Unraveling a Dark Mystery**

Delve into a dark and violent thriller, "The Wolf Among Us," a narrative-driven experience from the acclaimed creators of the 2012 Game of the Year, "The Walking Dead." This gripping title draws its inspiration from the celebrated "Fables" comic books, a DC Comics/Vertigo publication renowned for its mature storytelling.

In this compelling adventure, you assume the role of Bigby Wolf, the legendary Big Bad Wolf, now serving as the Sheriff of Fabletown. Within this hidden community, a brutal murder serves as the catalyst for a descent into a dangerous underworld. The game masterfully employs Telltale's innovative choice and consequence mechanics, ensuring that every decision you make carries significant weight. As Sheriff Bigby Wolf, you will discover that life in Fabletown is fraught with peril and unsettling revelations.

The narrative unfolds across five distinct episodes:

*   **Episode 1: Faith** - Available Now
*   **Episode 2: Smoke and Mirrors** - Available Now
*   **Episode 3: A Crooked Mile** - Available Now
*   **Episode 4: In Sheep's Clothing** - Available Now
*   **Episode 5: Cry Wolf** - Available Now

**Distinguishing Characteristics:**

*   Crafted by the award-winning development team responsible for "The Walking Dead."
*   Rooted in the Eisner Award-winning "Fables" comic book series, offering a rich narrative foundation.
*   Your critical decisions and their precise timing profoundly shape the unfolding story.
*   Presents a mature and gritty reimagining of classic fairytale characters navigating the complexities of our world.
*   Serves as an ideal entry point for both devoted "Fables" enthusiasts and newcomers, as the game's narrative predates the comic series. As one critic noted, "The game brilliantly captures the essence of the Fables universe, making it accessible yet deeply rewarding."

## Reigns: Game of Thrones: Rule Westeros

**Reigns: Game of Thrones** is the latest installment in the acclaimed Reigns swipe-em-up series, blending the strategic gameplay of Reigns with the rich world of the HBO® TV series, Game of Thrones®. Developed by Nerial and Devolver Digital, this game puts you in the shoes of iconic characters as you vie for control of the Iron Throne.

### Claim the Iron Throne

Through the fiery visions of Melisandre, you will claim the Iron Throne as various rulers, including Cersei Lannister, Jon Snow, and Daenerys Targaryen. Your goal is to navigate the complex relationships and hostile factions of the Seven Kingdoms. Employ ruthless tactics to outwit political rivals and wield impervious charm over your fickle bannermen. Maintaining the balance and favor of the people is crucial to extending your reign and, perhaps, surviving the horrors of the coming winter.

### A Formidable Cast of Rulers

Rule from the Iron Throne as a formidable cast of characters. You can play as Cersei Lannister, Jon Snow, Daenerys Targaryen, Tyrion Lannister, Sansa Stark, and more. As you unlock new rulers, you can switch between them to face challenges and mysteries unique to their individual stories.

### Impose Your Will on Westeros

Swipe left or right to make decisions that will change the fate of the Seven Kingdoms forever. You will hear the impassioned pleas and unpredictable demands from the people of Westeros. If a particular character becomes bothersome, you can tear their card in half to unburden yourself of their concerns – but be mindful of the cost.

### Reenvision the Realm

Melisandre’s visions serve as your playing field, extending beyond the TV series to imagine many potential fates for those who would sit upon the Iron Throne. You can rebuild the Great Sept of Baelor as Cersei or discover an alternate path for the Seven Kingdoms if Sansa Stark had married Jaime Lannister.

### Regal Mini-Games and Deeper Gameplay

Even the most powerful rulers need to set aside their worries and partake in more trivial matters. Engage in activities like jousting and tavern brawls, but remember that these distractions are not without consequence. Fans of the Reigns series will find this to be the biggest and deepest entry yet. It doesn't simply retell known stories but allows you to create new adventures at your whim.

### Iconic Soundtrack

Decide the fate of Westeros and its inhabitants to the soaring score of the HBO series, composed by Ramin Djawadi.

©2018 Home Box Office, Inc. All Rights Reserved. HBO and related trademarks are the property of Home Box Office, Inc.

Griftlands is a compelling deck-building rogue-like that plunges players into a shattered sci-fi universe where every choice, from the jobs you accept to the allies you forge and the cards you gather, carries significant weight. As the game's description highlights, "Death comes quickly, but each play offers new situations and strategies to explore." This dynamic gameplay loop ensures that no two playthroughs are ever the same.

Players can step into the shoes of three distinct characters, each offering a unique campaign with specialized decks, abilities, and maps. Sal, the adventurer, is driven by profit and a thirst for revenge. Rook, a seasoned spy, operates with his own clandestine agenda. Smith, an unlikely hero, is a seemingly idle loafer who may ultimately be the world's savior. Each character's narrative unfolds in a unique environment, presenting different factions and locations ripe for exploration and exploitation.

The game challenges players to "Battle Challenging Bosses," testing their combat decks against formidable adversaries possessing unique mechanics and devastating attacks. To aid in these endeavors, players can "Build a Team - or Buy One!" This involves hiring mercenaries, discovering loyal pets, or enlisting the help of existing friends to achieve their objectives. The core of Griftlands lies in its vast card collection, with players able to "Master Hundreds of Cards." Each character boasts distinct negotiation and combat decks from which to draft, and powerful item cards can be acquired from vanquished foes or earned as rewards.

The game emphasizes the critical nature of player decisions. As the description states, "Killing foes may incur the wrath of their friends, but sparing them leaves a dangerous piece on the board. Choose wisely, everyone remembers everything you do!" This intricate web of consequences means that every action has repercussions.

Welcome to Havaria, a world where "Each playable character's story takes place in a unique environment, with different factions and locations to explore and exploit." This is a harsh realm, populated by equally unforgiving inhabitants. Players will navigate "lush, hand-illustrated environments full of people who want to kill you." The game also features a deep political system, where "Each character has a factional allegiance and an opinion of you." Players must engage in "Playing Politics For Keeps," maneuvering between rival factions and striving to secure powerful social boons. However, betrayal carries significant risk: "doublecross the wrong person, and you'll be subject to their bane!"

Ultimately, survival in Griftlands hinges on the ability to "Outwit or Overpower." Players must choose whether to overcome obstacles with brute force or persuasive words, carefully selecting and playing their cards to stay alive. The game requires players to "Build two decks simultaneously, balancing the tradeoffs of each." Through each attempted run, players will "Learn from each attempted run through the various stories of the Griftlands," encountering diverse combinations of enemies, quests, and events. Your destiny is ultimately shaped by your choices and the hand of fate.

Name: 80 Days
Description:
1872, with a steampunk twist. Phileas Fogg has wagered he can circumnavigate the world in just eighty days. TIME Magazine's Game of 2014 and winner of the IGF award for narrative; now available on Steam! Choose your own route around a 3D globe, travelling by airship, submarine, mechanical camel, steam-train and more, racing other players and a clock that never stops. 170 cities to explore. Detailed research and techno-fantasy combine in an 1872 of tensions, inventions and exploration. Climb the Burmese mountains, trek the Zulu Federation, sail up the Amazon and disappear under the Indian Ocean - but don't fall behind the time! Four times BAFTA -nominated and TIME's #1 Game of the Year 2014 Winner IGF 'Excellence in Narrative' award 'We’ve been dreaming about this future for decades. Guess what? It’s here.' - New York Times 9/10 -- Edge Magazine 'Interactive storytelling as its best' - The Guardian Playing as Phileas Fogg's loyal valet, Passepartout, you must balance your master's health, your finances, and the time, as you choose your own path from city to city all the way around the world. Bribe your way onto early departures, but don't let yourself go bankrupt or you'll be sleeping rough and begging for aid! Trade items for profit, and collect the equipment for the conditions you'll face: but too much luggage will slow you down... 80 DAYS is a breakneck race, with an in-game clock that never stops running. Trains, steamers, hot-air balloons, boats, camels, horses and more leave and arrive minute by minute. Every city and journey is narrated via an interactive story where you control every action. Will your choices speed you up - or lead you into disaster? Will you earn Fogg's trust and respect? Will you uncover the secrets and short-cuts that can shave days off your time? Murder, romance, rebellion and intrigue await! The Game: Plan and strategise - can you find the fastest route? Flexible interactive narrative with thousands of choices Massively replayable - every journey is unique Explore an entire 3D globe, with 170 bespoke cities to visit Richly imagined, diverse alternative-history steampunk world Stunning art by Jaume Illustration Race real people in real-time: every second counts Live multiplayer feed, showing journeys of other players as they happen Share your journey with friends

Embark on an **unforgettable adventure** in Reventure, a game where your choices dramatically shape your destiny, leading to an astonishing **100 different endings**. You play as a wannabe hero, tasked with heroic deeds, but often tempted to stray from the path and indulge in wild, unexpected actions.

The core of Reventure lies in its **unique branching narrative**. Every decision you make, no matter how small, propels you towards a distinct conclusion. The central question lingers: will you discover the "real" ending, or is such a thing even possible? The only way to find out is to play and explore the myriad possibilities. Prepare for numerous **"Aha!" moments** as you uncover the game's secrets. While the world itself remains consistent, it's your character and understanding that evolve with each playthrough. However, a hidden truth awaits: the world *does* change, a secret you'll need to discover for yourself.

Reventure is packed with **unlockable content** that enhances your gameplay experience. Discover new playable characters, helpful hints, stylish costumes, and captivating visual effects, among other surprises. The game is also brimming with **countless secrets and pop-culture references**, cleverly hidden for you to find.

Experience a world filled with **magic**, both in its gameplay and its surprisingly affordable price. Despite its seemingly simple yet amazing presentation, Reventure is the result of significant time and investment, yet it's available for just a few bucks. This incredible value is a kind of magic in itself. The game playfully hints at a vast array of mechanics, including time travel, battle royale fights, mimics, permadeath, shotguns, mining, resource gathering, base building, and global leaderboards, even humorously admitting to exaggerating some of these features – or perhaps not!

Beyond the gameplay, Reventure offers **humor in abundance**, presented in various delightful flavors. Complementing the experience is a **beautiful original soundtrack (OST)**. Don't just take our word for it; listen to it to believe!

Here's a simplified guide to playing Reventure in 8 steps:

1.  **Answer the call to adventure:** Wake up, hero!
2.  **Meet your mentor and prepare for greatness.**
3.  **Embark on your quest!**
4.  **Or, perhaps, don't embark...**
5.  **Face the inevitable consequences.**
6.  **Rise again from your failures.**
7.  **Attempt to rectify your past mistakes.**
8.  **Strive to become a legend!**

**Disclaimer:** This guide is purely orientative. It's highly unlikely you'll achieve legendary status on your second attempt.

In tERRORbane, you don't just play a game; you interact directly with its creator. Instead of a standard fantasy RPG story, the Developer constantly interrupts, commenting on your actions. This meta-commentary is enhanced by a continuous flow of funny bugs and glitches that mess with gameplay, making nothing work as intended. Your main tool as a player is the "BUG LIST," which lets you record and, more importantly, use these flaws to finish the game.

The game is designed for replayability, as finishing it isn't the end. Your choices greatly affect your journey, leading to different areas and story paths. Going back to old choices can reveal completely new storylines and characters, often bringing new bugs to your list. The developers even suggest there might be content after the credits, encouraging players to find all the bugs. The Developer claims his creation is perfect, but the many errors suggest otherwise. The main gameplay involves finding bugs and glitches, carefully filling out your BUG LIST, and using every loophole to move forward. This unique method lets you go against normal gaming rules and prove you're the ultimate player, able to change the world of tERRORbane. In the end, you become the TERRORBANE, the hero of this strange world.

tERRORbane is a funny adventure where bugs are friends, not foes. Players can dive into a strange and creative world with odd characters and many nods to video game history. The game encourages you to question the Developer's ideas by cleverly using and even "cheating" through his imperfect design, all to figure out what makes a great game.

Saving a world from villains is a common game theme, but tERRORbane quickly breaks from typical fantasy. The game throws players into many locations, from classic castles and temples to future starships and secret vaults. You might travel from a digital dungeon to the moon, with a wonderfully silly plot tying it all together. The Developer has built a world full of strange lore and amazing places, so much so that you might start doubting what's real. As one developer joked, "This game is perfect, there are no glitches here."

In LEGO® City Undercover, you play as Chase McCain, a police officer on a vital undercover assignment. Your mission is to infiltrate criminal groups and catch the infamous Rex Fury, a criminal causing chaos in LEGO City. Game developers have stated that the story focuses on McCain's mission to bring back peace and justice.

The game features a large, open-world city that players can explore freely. For a shared experience, a two-player co-op mode is included. In this mode, players can team up to explore over 20 different areas. They can also work together to catch car thieves, find funny movie jokes, drive many types of vehicles, and collect hundreds of items. Game reviews have praised LEGO City Undercover for its fun, original story and its classic LEGO humor, calling it an enjoyable adventure for many players.

## Become the Ultimate Idol Manager in Idol Manager

In **Idol Manager**, you'll step into the shoes of a manager at a burgeoning talent agency, tasked with nurturing and training a new wave of young pop stars. Your role is pivotal, requiring you to make **crucial decisions** about hiring and firing, promoting success, and addressing failures. The personal lives of these rising celebrities are intrinsically linked to your business's success. While their triumphs can lead to significant commercial gains, their emotional struggles and public relations crises can spell **financial ruin** for your company.

You must navigate a complex idol ecosystem, contending with gossip magazines, devoted super fans, and rival groups, all eager to uncover the next scandal. Many individuals will attempt to undermine your efforts with underhanded tactics, but remember, these challenges are **strictly business**.

Your responsibilities extend to handling various crises, including gossip, vandalism, stalkers, and threats directed at your agency and its pop idols. You will also need to manage the **interpersonal dynamics** between the idols within your group, addressing issues like cliques, internal feuds, and bullying.

To build your fanbase and empire, you'll employ diverse strategies to appeal to a broad range of demographics. Maximize your group's popularity and generate revenue by producing hit singles, organizing concerts, staging major television events, and embarking on international tours.

Develop your agency's infrastructure, beginning with basic offices and dance studios for content creation and idol training. Ultimately, you can expand to include your own cafe and theater, establishing consistent revenue streams. Hire and train dedicated staffers to manage logistics and ensure your agency operates efficiently.

Discover engaging sub-stories, which are narrative chains featuring visual novel segments. Many of these are triggered by your specific play style. Each sub-story can unfold in multiple ways, with your decisions leading to **significant and often impactful consequences** for your overall playthrough.

Name: SENRAN KAGURA ESTIVAL VERSUS
Description:
The flame that burns twice as bright burns half as long, and so it is with the lives of young shinobi. Death comes swiftly — for the lucky ones — and for those still living, grief is a constant companion. Ryōbi and Ryōna, two shinobi sisters of the Hebijo Clandestine Girls’ Academy elite, know that truth all too well, and they mourn their beloved elder sister every day. But when a mystical phenomenon appears, drawing the shinobi world’s finest young ladies into a parallel dimension, everything they know about life and death turns upside down. Taken to a strange world resembling a warm summer island, the girls find themselves face to face with their departed loved ones. The island’s mysterious mistresses challenge the girls, who hail from four different rival schools, to a contest of strength and wits. The winning school, so they promise, will not only learn the highest secrets of shinobi lore, but will also have the honor of laying their loved ones’ souls to rest. The buxom beauties prepare for a new kind of battle, facing not only their rivals, but questions galore. Can the islands’ hosts be trusted? Will the other schools play fair, team up, or cheat? Will there be time to enjoy the beach before the fighting starts? Will anyone manage to keep their clothes intact? And…if they do win, can they bear to part from their loved ones a second time? ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ The high-flying, high-bouncing ninja girls of SENRAN KAGURA return, this time with more moves, more playable characters, more story and attitude, and more destruction online with matches that can support up to 10 players. All the previous shinobi girls return with a host of upgraded moves to master, and new playable characters offer more challenges to conquer, along with a story that's equal parts sexy and shocking, serious and scandalous, busty and brawling. KEY FEATURES A Little More Violent, a Little More Sexy and a Ton More Fun The series’ busty ninja girls take to the beach, flying high in bouncy battles with more outrageous moves than ever before. Biggest Roster in Series History With over 25 playable characters, each with her own style, technique and role in the story, there’s a shinobi to fit any taste and preference. Enhanced Production Values Bring the Story to Life Dynamic camera angles, expressive animations and full anime cutscenes deliver a storytelling experience unlike any other in the series. All-New Multiplayer Battle Royales Up to 10 players can enter free-for-alls and team battles in a variety of events, from the traditional deathmatch to the less-traditional “Understorm” and “Capture the Bra.”

Name: SENRAN KAGURA SHINOVI VERSUS
Description:
From the Warring States period to the present day, the mysterious shinobi have fought covertly across Japan. Some fight for the authorities, others for the highest bidder, but all of them have one thing in common: They kick ass and know how to look good doing it. SENRAN KAGURA SHINOVI VERSUS immediately follows the events of SENRAN KAGURA Burst, revisiting the fierce rivalry between the girls of Hanzō National Academy and their sworn enemies from Hebijo Clandestine Girls’ Academy, the latter of which have now gone underground and formed a mercenary strike team known as the Homura Crimson Squad. In addition to their old adversaries, the Hanzō girls must also face a whole new set of foes: the students of Gessen Girls’ Academy, who seek to punish them for their imperfections as shinobi warriors. Meanwhile, a new class is in session at Hebijo, and these students mean business: they oppose all three of the competing factions and will stop at nothing to be the last shinobi squad standing – even if it means leaving broken bodies and shattered dreams in their wake. The stage is set for a shinobi battle royale. Heroines and renegades battle saints and sinners in a flurry of fists, feet, clothes, tattered remnants of those clothes, and sometimes underclothes. Each school has a story to tell, full of tragedy, heroism, pathos and partial nudity. Choose a school, prepare for battle, and follow the Path of the Shinobi. Key Features: A Little Violent, a Little Sexy, a Ton of Fun Fight with a team of buxom ninja girls in a 3D brawler containing massive mid-air combos, revealing cut-scenes and special Secret Ninja Art techniques, all while struggling to stay clothed as damage is depicted by the deterioration of each girl’s outfit. Now in HD and silky smooth 60fps on Windows PC. Master over 20 Fighters, each with a Unique Fighting Style and Abilities Each of the 20+ shinobi has her own unique weapon, techniques and special moves, while Ninja Arts can be harnessed to change costumes and power up in mid-battle. PC version comes standard with all DLC from the original PlayStation(r)Vita system release. Story Narrative told from Four Different Viewpoints Each of the four rival shinobi schools takes a turn at the story narrative, providing background on motivations, relationships and hobbies, while the original Japanese voice-overs with English subtitles bring each girl’s distinct personality to life. Innovative Multiplayer Modes for 4-Player Battle Royale Up to four players can compete online in one of three modes; classic Death Match, Strip Battle to unclothe your opponents, and Understorm, a race to grab the most falling undergarments from the sky.

**Rayman Raving Rabbids™: Survive the Bunny Invasion!**

Get ready for a wild and wacky time as a swarm of uncontrollable bunnies has taken over, capturing Rayman and forcing him into a series of bizarre challenges. Your goal is to help Rayman escape by outsmarting and amusing these fluffy invaders. As one gaming outlet put it, the game features "hilarious fighting moves imaginable," promising a truly one-of-a-kind experience.

Dive into a range of silly mini-games. You can race on animals, fight in an arena, charm the bunnies with your dance skills, hurl cows, milk pigs, or engage in frantic plunger shooting! The sheer variety of fun is astounding. The game presents over 70 trials spread across distinct, artistic environments. By successfully entertaining the bunnies, you'll unlock new sections of the game and gather rewards such as costumes, music tracks, and items for Rayman's prison cell.

The game is packed with "loads of hysterical fighting moves," encompassing everything from animal races and arena battles to dance contests and even toilet plunger combat. For even more enjoyment, compete with up to three friends in zany multiplayer trials. "Dress to impress" by adopting punk, pop, rock, or hip hop styles, and use your groovy dance moves to keep the bunnies captivated. The more popular Rayman gets, the more goodies he can unlock.

FlatOut 3: Chaos & Destruction offers an intense demolition racing experience, emphasizing high-speed action and vehicle destruction. This installment pushes the boundaries of the genre, letting players race against a diverse array of vehicles, including powerful monster trucks and rugged off-road cars, on challenging and wild tracks. The core of the game revolves around chaotic and destructive racing.

The primary gameplay in FlatOut 3 utilizes a realistic physics engine, enabling extensive environmental destruction. Each track features over 20,000 destructible objects. Players can choose from 47 distinct vehicles, such as classic muscle cars, tanks, and bulldozers, to race, crash, and obliterate their opponents. The game presents 9 core game modes, complemented by a Challenge mode that consolidates all others for extended play. There are 62 race tracks spread across 10 environments, 12 stunt tracks within 3 stunt environments, and 9 environments dedicated to Destruction Derby. Newly introduced modes include Monster Truck, Nightshift, Off Road, and Speed. Multiplayer supports 8 modes for up to 16 players, while Destruction Derbies can accommodate up to 24 players. The game also integrates Force Feedback support for racing wheels. Environmental challenges play a significant role. Off-Road Mode tests players on rough terrain, Monster Truck Mode delivers pure carnage, and Night Shift Mode features races in adverse weather conditions like rain and fog. Beyond traditional racing, modes such as Monster Truck and Stuntman, which employs ragdoll physics for humorous and chaotic outcomes, provide unique gameplay. FlatOut 3 strives to deliver more vehicles, modes, and destruction than its predecessors. As one reviewer observed, "The sheer scale of destruction is impressive, with cars disintegrating in spectacular fashion." Another highlighted the variety, stating, "From monster trucks to tanks, the vehicle selection alone promises a wild ride."

Name: Fuyu no Tsuma
Description:
General Fuyu no Tsuma is an addicting game in which you have to solve puzzles with Lovely Girls Incredible Atmosphere , Great Music , lots of levels with girls art in HD quality. The game is great for relaxing after a hard day. Features Several difficulty levels. Relaxing gameplay 5 HD quality art with beautiful girls Pleasant atmosphere. Game Modes: EASY - 4x4 MEDIUM - 4x6 ADVANCED - 6x10 HARD - 8x14 EPIC - 10x16

Name: Love in Belarus
Description:
Love in Belarus tells about the love story of a cute little dictator of Belarus. Aleksadr Lukashenko is the last dictator in Europe, desperately clinging to power and does not want to give it to anyone. But all this is only because of love. Help Lukashenka cope with this crisis and bring love to the territory of Belarus. Classic JRPG gameplay and turn-based combat system with many classes. (All characters and events are fictional)

Name: Mosaique Neko Waifus 2
Description:
How have you been? Crazy times we live in huh? Luckily you know just the right Neko girls! Care to recite some poetry with Sara? Or eat cookies with Niko? I think Sayouri and Sara have a secret romance going on. So sweet to look at them cuddling together! • Solve puzzles by rotating the right elements • Navigate the different dialogue choices, show the girls your charm! • Use special abilities that help you solve puzzles • Level up special abilities • Collect items that will boost your skills • view all the scenes unlocked in the gallery

## Happy Quest: A Casual Match-3 Adventure

Embark on a delightful journey in Happy Quest, a casual match-3 game where you play as a kind hunter in a charming town. Your primary mission is to assist beautiful girls in their quest to defeat formidable monsters, ultimately bringing them happiness.

### Meet the Characters

Happy Quest features a cast of engaging characters, each with their unique personalities and backstories:

#### Rena: The Potent Potion Master

Rena is a sweet and funny girl who becomes remarkably serious when business calls. Though petite, she possesses an unshakeable courage and isn't afraid to stand up to anyone. She reserves her playful teasing for those she cares about, including the protagonist. Rena excels in crafting potions, a talent she possesses in abundance but never boasts about. She understands that her appearance might lead others to underestimate her, but she has proven her formidable capabilities through sheer hard work.

#### Sana: The Wise Elf Warrior

Sana is an elf warrior whose personality extends far beyond her martial prowess. Despite her stern demeanor, she deeply values life and believes that strategic retreat is often wiser than a heroic death. Sana is an intelligent and strong woman who harbors affection for humans and other races, even though her own kind often faces opposition. Her existing friendship with Rena facilitates her growing trust in the protagonist, who hails from Rena's circle.

#### Georgia: The Respected Blacksmith

Georgia is a woman of immense physical and mental strength, commanding a team of men in her blacksmith shop with an unyielding authority. She is a highly respected figure and the most skilled artisan in town, crafting weapons and armor for the king and his inner circle. The loss of a close friend in battle has led her to withdraw from such conflicts, though she keeps this pain private. While she forges instruments of war, Georgia views battles not as inherently evil, but as a necessary, albeit regrettable, aspect of life.

#### Angami: The Enigmatic Naga Warrior

Angami is a powerful yet peculiar naga warrior tasked with watching over the protagonist. Despite this duty sometimes being an inconvenience, she rarely complains. Her responsibilities include training recruits across the kingdom. Beneath her tough exterior, Angami enjoys joking and teasing, particularly with those close to her. Though twelve years older than the protagonist, this fact is unknown to others. Her involvement began by assisting Georgia, but she has since grown fond of the protagonist, even bringing him food from her own home.

#### Yuna: The Bewitched Succubus

Yuna is a playful succubus who typically targets the most desirable men in town. However, she finds herself unexpectedly captivated by the protagonist's kindness, experiencing love for the first time in her long existence. Her natural allure has always made attracting others effortless, making the protagonist's initial resistance to her advances a profound mystery. While usually lighthearted, Yuna develops an interest in human customs and even cooks for the protagonist as a token of her gratitude. Her attempts to tease him often backfire, leaving her embarrassed and the protagonist playfully teasing her in return.

### Game Features

Happy Quest offers an engaging experience with the following features:

*   **Engaging Gameplay:** Enjoy fun and challenging match-3 puzzles.
*   **Character Progression:** Upgrade your character's stats and skills.
*   **Diverse Enemies:** Encounter over 50 animated enemies.

**Experience the Future of Rhythm Gaming with Beat Saber**

Step into a **stunning futuristic world** and prepare for an **unparalleled rhythm experience** with Beat Saber. This game transforms you into a **dancing superhero**, tasked with slashing incoming beats with precision using your sabers. Each beat guides which saber to use and the exact direction you must match, creating a truly immersive gameplay loop. The game features a multitude of **expertly handcrafted levels**, ensuring a unique and engaging journey through pulsating music.

Beat Saber stands out due to its **smoothest fusion of music and visual effects**, offering a deeply satisfying sensory experience. Unlike games with procedurally generated content, every music track and level in Beat Saber is **meticulously designed by hand** to perfectly complement the musical journey. Players can also **compete against players worldwide** in multiplayer modes, testing their skills against friends or global opponents. The game's core mechanics are **immediately accessible**, making it easy for anyone to pick up, yet mastering its challenges offers a deeply rewarding experience. Beyond the fun, Beat Saber provides an **excellent workout**, making fitness an enjoyable part of your gaming.

**Out of the Park Baseball 17: The Ultimate Baseball Strategy Simulation**

**Out of the Park Baseball 17** stands as the **premier baseball strategy game**, earning Metacritic's prestigious PC Game of the Year award for 2016 and boasting official licensing from MLB.com and the MLBPA. This game offers an unparalleled experience for baseball enthusiasts, allowing you to step into the role of a General Manager and/or Field Manager. You have the power to shape the destiny of your favorite real-world franchise, either by guiding its future or by rewriting its historical achievements.

The depth of gameplay in OOTP 17 is truly **astonishing**. You can embark on a new career with any of the 2016 MLB teams, or delve into nearly 150 years of baseball history to manage any team from the past. For those with a creative spark, the game also allows you to construct your own fictional baseball universe or engage in competitive online leagues with other OOTP players. The sheer **endless possibilities** make OOTP 17 a dream come true for any baseball aficionado.

**Experience Unprecedented Realism and Depth**

The meticulously crafted 2016 MLB roster set is a cornerstone of OOTP 17, featuring all projected Opening Day MLB rosters. This comprehensive database extends to the complete minor league system, reaching down to rookie leagues, and even includes future draft classes. You can ponder critical questions like: Will Jake Arrieta, David Price, and Johnny Cueto provide the pitching prowess their teams desperately need? Can sluggers like Albert Pujols, Chris Davis, and Bryce Harper once again lead their clubs to victory? Will the Kansas City Royals achieve a repeat championship, or will the Chicago Cubs finally hoist the World Series trophy again? The game empowers you to **find out and guide your favorite MLB franchise to glory!**

OOTP 17 provides a deeply engaging management experience. You can meticulously set your team's lineups, pitching staffs, and in-game strategies. Whether you prefer to oversee your league from a high-level strategic perspective or immerse yourself in the action by playing out each game, managing play-by-play or even pitch-by-pitch, the choice is yours. Player progression is remarkably realistic over time, allowing you to build a championship team through the draft or secure crucial free agent signings to propel your club to the top.

**Revolutionary New Features Elevate the Experience**

The **all-new MLBPA license** breathes life into the players like never before. For the first time in the series, Out of the Park Baseball features **authentic FaceGen images of real players**, enhancing the visual immersion. With realistic player aging, real-time emotional responses, and automatic uniform adjustments for trades and free agency for most major leaguers, you'll feel more connected to your club than ever before.

The game also boasts new **3D animation**, complete with moving player symbols executing plays, and greatly improved, authentic 3D major league ballparks, delivering the most powerful in-game experience to date. The **all-new Historical Exhibition mode** is a game-changer, allowing you to pit any two major league teams from 1901 to 2015 against each other in a single game or a series of varying lengths. You can even recreate any past World Series matchup with authentic rosters automatically imported.

Explore the "What if...?" scenarios with authentic historical minor league systems spanning from 1919 through 2015. This extensive database, featuring over 100,000 real players, allows you to navigate farm systems with unprecedented depth. Furthermore, new support for multi-core processors means that Out of the Park Baseball 17 **cranks through simulations and other demanding tasks up to 60% faster** than the previous iteration.

Automatically generated game recap headlines and stories provide engaging reports on key events throughout your games and your overall season. General Managers will face **smarter, more cunning AI GMs and managers** who possess individualized, personal approaches to roster-building, scouting, and financial management.
