*   **Editing Tools:** Portal 2 will include tools for players to create their own content.

**The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim**

Experience **epic fantasy reborn** in the next chapter of the acclaimed Elder Scrolls saga. Developed by Bethesda Game Studios, the creators of the 2006 and 2008 Games of the Year, Skyrim offers a revolutionary open-world fantasy experience. It brings to life a **complete virtual world** that you can explore entirely on your own terms.

**Live another life in another world.** Imagine and play any character you desire, and pursue any path you choose. The legendary freedom of choice, storytelling, and adventure that defines The Elder Scrolls is realized here like never before.

Skyrim features an **all-new graphics and gameplay engine**. This engine vividly brings to life a complete virtual world, complete with rolling clouds, rugged mountains, bustling cities, lush fields, and ancient dungeons.

**You are what you play.** Customize your character by choosing from hundreds of weapons, spells, and abilities. The innovative character system empowers you to play your way and define yourself through your actions. Prepare to **battle ancient dragons** in ways you've never imagined. As the Dragonborn, you will learn their secrets and harness their power for yourself.

Name: Mass Effect 2 (2010)
Description:
Recruit. Explore. Control. Two years after Commander Shepard repelled invading Reapers bent on the destruction of organic life, a mysterious new enemy has emerged. On the fringes of known space, something is silently abducting entire human colonies. Now Shepard must work with Cerberus, a ruthless organization devoted to human survival at any cost, to stop the most terrifying threat mankind has ever faced. To even attempt this perilous mission, Shepard must assemble the galaxy’s most elite team and command the most powerful ship ever built. Even then, they say it would be suicide. Commander Shepard intends to prove them wrong. Just like in the previous game, what you say to the other characters matters a great deal. Fortunately, the conversation system has been improved. The camera now pans around characters as they talk to one another to evoke a dramatic, cinematic feel. Also, Shepard can interrupt the conversation when given the appropriate prompt, taking situations into new directions that could help or hinder the mission. Shepard is more customizable than ever, letting you create your ideal lead character — gender, facial features, class, and of course, attitude. Once you embark on missions, you’ll be treated to an improved battle system that lets you target weak points and blast off your enemy’s limbs with a variety of weapons. Set out to lead your team to victory… or die at the hands of The Collectors. Either path is possible in BioWare’s smash hit, Mass Effect 2. Which destiny will you choose? Features: The second act of BioWare’s epic sci-fi trilogy continues the story of Commander Shepard and humanity’s first steps onto the galactic stage Success – or failure – depends heavily on the crew you assemble and their loyalty to you and the mission Stunning graphics and a refined dialog system will draw you into the story like never before Numerous improvements to the intense, third-person shooter combat Deep character customization options let you create your own vision of Commander Shepard Online Disclaimer EA ACCOUNT, REGISTRATION WITH ENCLOSED SERIAL CODE, INTERNET CONNECTION AND ACCEPTANCE OF END USER LICENSE AGREEMENT REQUIRED TO ACCESS ONLINE FEATURES AND/OR SERVICES. EA ONLINE TERMS AND CONDITIONS CAN BE FOUND AT WWW.EA.COM . YOU MUST BE 13+ TO REGISTER FOR AN EA ACCOUNT. EA MAY PROVIDE CERTAIN INCREMENTAL CONTENT AND/OR UPDATES FOR NO ADDITIONAL CHARGE, IF AND WHEN AVAILABLE. EA MAY RETIRE ONLINE FEATURES AFTER 30 DAYS NOTICE POSTED ON WWW.EA.COM .

**The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition Deluxe** offers a definitive experience of the acclaimed role-playing game. This package immerses players in a vast, detailed world, allowing for unparalleled exploration and adventure. Whether you choose to follow the epic main quest or uncover hidden secrets, Oblivion empowers you to shape your own destiny. The Game of the Year Edition Deluxe includes two major expansions, **Knights of the Nine** and **Shivering Isles**, which significantly expand the game's content and solidify its reputation as a landmark RPG.

In Oblivion, players have the freedom to **create any character imaginable**, from a mighty warrior to a cunning assassin or a powerful sorcerer. The game features an **intense first-person combat system** and an advanced magic system that create a dynamic and engaging role-playing experience. A key innovation is the **revolutionary Radiant AI**, which gives NPCs realistic 24/7 schedules and allows them to make independent decisions. This system contributes to a truly living world where characters interact with their environment and pursue their own goals. As one critic observed, "Radiant AI makes the world feel truly alive, with NPCs reacting to events and pursuing their own lives."

The **Shivering Isles** expansion invites players to **explore new realms** within a surreal landscape shaped by the Daedric Prince Sheogorath. This expansion presents a unique challenge, featuring **terrifying foes** such as monstrous insects, hulking Flesh Atronachs, and shambling skeletal horrors. In the **Knights of the Nine** expansion, players can **rebuild a legendary faction**. This quest involves aiding the long-disbanded Knights, restoring their honor, and defeating a growing evil that threatens the land of Cyrodiil.

The **Deluxe Edition Content** further enriches the Oblivion experience with additional Downloadable Content (DLC), all presented in English:

*   **Fighter's Stronghold Expansion:** Experience life as a noble warrior in a grand castle.
*   **Knights of the Nine Quest:** Embark on a quest to defeat evil, discover new dungeons, and interact with compelling characters.
*   **Spell Tome Treasures:** Find valuable books containing a diverse array of spells to unlock new magical abilities.
*   **Vile Lair:** Discover a hidden underwater sanctuary, perfect for nefarious players.
*   **Mehrune's Razor:** Conquer a challenging dungeon to obtain a powerful weapon.
*   **The Thieves Den:** Claim a lost pirate ship as your own, ideal for stealthy characters.
*   **Wizard's Tower:** Ascend Frostcrag Spire, a magical tower designed for magic users.
*   **Orrery:** Rebuild the Orrery to harness celestial power and uncover secrets within the Mages Guild.
*   **Horse Armor Pack:** Equip your horse with armor for protection and style.

Name: NORCO
Description:
NORCO is a Southern Gothic point & click narrative adventure that immerses the player in the sinking suburbs and verdant industrial swamps of a distorted South Louisiana. Your brother Blake has gone missing in the aftermath of your mother's death. In the hopes of finding him, you must follow a fugitive security android through the refineries, strip malls, and drainage ditches of suburban New Orleans. Immerse yourself in a surreal and uncanny South Louisiana NORCO’s painterly and cinematic pixel art draws the player into its quotidian sci-fi world of disappearing swamplands, labyrinthine oil refineries, and other landscapes inspired by the titular town of Norco, Louisiana and other parts of Greater New Orleans. Sink into the rich field recordings and sound design by fmAura and a driving, post-industrial electronic score from Gewgawly I. Unravel a mystery in a world haunted by the past and threatened by the future What starts as a straightforward search for your missing brother quickly spirals into a multigenerational mystery. The lines between salvation, memory, technology, and nature bleed together into a uniquely compelling, contemplative narrative rooted in Southern literature, pulp fiction, and point & click adventure games both classic and contemporary. Explore alongside sharply drawn characters with deep roots, rich backstories, and complex motives A chaotic bayou pirate, bar-stool private detective, escaped security android, and your stuffed childhood monkey will all offer assistance in an eroding and uncertain world. Solve puzzles, fight your way past corporate security goons, and infiltrate an influencer cult squatting an abandoned mall on the outskirts of New Orleans.

Name: Lacuna – A Sci-Fi Noir Adventure
Description:
/ The Save the World Edition includes Lacuna and the game’s atmospheric soundtrack that lets you dive deep into the sci-fi noir world of Lacuna . In addition, Assemble Entertainment donates 10% of the revenues of this edition to Go Give One ; a WHO initiative that provides COVID-19 vaccines amongst others for everyone, everywhere – prioritizing those who need them the most in countries that cannot afford them. On top of this, it’s the best option for all those who would like to support the work of the developer of Lacuna even more and do something good at the same time. Another cigarette tumbles into the abyss. The sun is slowly coming up, glistening in the sea of buildings below. I look up at the stars one last time before they disappear. They don't provide any guidance. They don't give a f*ck. I have to make this decision on my own, and very soon. Problem is, I don't know how. I've never been able to figure out why I do what I do. Not really. No more time to think. I have to go. Here's the deal You are Neil Conrad, CDI agent. Awoken by the news of a murder, you rush into a case that will soon turn your life and the whole solar system upside down. Ask questions, collect evidence, and put the pieces together until the ugly truth reveals itself... or not. No takebacks The story branches and ends based on your actions. There's no going back. Sure, you can rush your way to the end – if you don't mind paying the price. Play your cards right, and you might make it out alive. How far will you go? Some questions don't have a right answer. Will you sell out a friend to protect your family? Will you endanger a loved one in exchange for public safety? Will you keep the peace or reveal the horrible, world-shattering truth? Hungry for Point & Click Adventure? While the classics were great in their time, Lacuna does away with the baggage of many adventure game tropes: Pointing & clicking Platformer movement controls (WASD / controller) Selecting all dialog options one by one anyway Non-repeating conversations and choices Inventory management and counter-intuitive puzzles Immersive, story-driven mysteries Pixel hunting Optional outlines on anything interactable Story grinds to a halt at every puzzle can always be driven forward 'x will remember this' Real choices and multiple endings

**Her Story: Unraveling a Crime Through Interactive Video**

Explore the compelling narrative of *Her Story*, an acclaimed video game that immerses you in the role of an investigator. Developed by Sam Barlow, known for his innovative work on titles like *Silent Hill: Shattered Memories* and *Aisle*, *Her Story* offers a distinctive crime fiction experience built on non-linear storytelling. The game's foundation is a police database filled with live-action video footage. The central performance is by Viva Seifert, a talented actress and musician, also known as one half of the band Joe Gideon and the Shark.

**The Investigative Process:**

In *Her Story*, you interact with a simulated vintage desktop computer, accessing a police database containing recorded video interviews. These clips, filmed in 1994, capture a British woman recounting her husband's disappearance over seven separate interview sessions. To uncover the truth, your primary tool is typing search terms into the database. Each term you input will surface video clips where the woman speaks those exact words, enabling you to progressively assemble her story.

As one reviewer observed, "The game is an involving and moving experience. A game that asks you to listen." This groundbreaking method provides a gameplay experience that is truly unique, prompting players to actively engage with the content and form their own interpretations.

Name: The Forgotten City
Description:
Travel 2,000 years into the past and relive the final days of a cursed Roman city, where if one person sins, everyone dies. Combat is an option, but violence will only get you so far. Only by questioning an intertwined community of colourful characters, cleverly exploiting the time loop, and making difficult moral choices can you hope to solve this epic mystery. Here, your decisions matter. The fate of the city is in your hands. Explore an open-world ancient Roman city with historically authentic art, architecture, costumes and customs Investigate a gripping, non-linear mystery with multiple endings Become entwined in the lives of richly detailed, deeply interactive characters Grapple with moral dilemmas which have life-and-death consequences Play as whoever you want, by choosing your character’s gender, origin and backstory Solve problems with reason, charm, bribery, intimidation, violence, or by cleverly exploiting the time-loop

Name: Telling Lies
Description:
A Video Game About Private Conversations Telling Lies is the new video game from Sam Barlow, creator of Her Story and Silent Hill: Shattered Memories. An investigative thriller game with non-linear storytelling, Telling Lies revolves around a cache of secretly recorded video conversations. It stars Logan Marshall-Green , Alexandra Shipp , Kerry Bishé and Angela Sarafyan . How does it work? Telling Lies sits you in front of an anonymous laptop loaded with a stolen NSA database full of footage. The footage covers two years in the intimate lives of four people whose stories are linked by a shocking incident. Explore the database by typing search terms, watch the clips where those words are spoken and piece together your story. Unlike anything you've played before, Telling Lies is an intimate and intense experience. A game where you decide the truth.

**The Darkside Detective: A Fumble in the Dark - A Hilarious Point-and-Click Adventure**

Prepare for another paranormal investigation in *The Darkside Detective: A Fumble in the Dark*, returning to Twin Lakes, America's 34th most haunted city. Detective Francis McQueen is back to solve six new cases plaguing the unfortunate town. Twin Lakes is certainly cursed, making it a persistent nuisance, and it's up to McQueen to sort out the supernatural messes.

### Unraveling Twin Lakes' Peculiar Curses

Join Detective McQueen as he navigates the bizarre and humorous mysteries of Twin Lakes. The city's unique curses are a constant source of trouble. As the game's description states, "Whenever strange noises echo in the night, an unsettling chill creeps up your spine, or something just doesn't smell right, Detective McQueen is on the case."

### A New Mission for McQueen and Dooley

*A Fumble in the Dark* continues the story after the first game, with McQueen embarking on a personal mission: rescuing his sidekick, Officer Dooley. Dooley has been captured by the Darkside, and McQueen must retrieve him. Together, they tackle the city's strange, paranormal, and paradoxical occurrences.

### Six Standalone Cases Await

This frighteningly funny point-and-click adventure invites players to join McQueen and Dooley as they investigate six distinct cases. Their investigations will lead them to intriguing locations, including a carnival, a retirement home, an amateur wrestling circuit, and even Ireland. Their ultimate goal is to keep the Darkside at bay and restore normalcy to Twin Lakes.

If the premise of *The Darkside Detective: A Fumble in the Dark* appeals to you, consider playing the first title to experience the series' unique charm and humor.

Name: Strange Horticulture
Description:
Find and identify new plants, pet your cat, speak to a coven, or join a cult. Use your growing collection to influence the story and unravel Undermere’s dark mysteries. Welcome to Undermere, a quaint town surrounded by hag-infested forests and rugged mountains. You are the Horticulturist, owner of local plant store Strange Horticulture. As a cast of colorful customers come by your shop, you are quickly thrust into an occult mystery stretching back hundreds of years. Explore the lands beyond your store to find new plants, but be careful! The dark woods and lakes are not always friendly to a simple herbalist. You might discover powers beyond your wildest dreams - or lose your mind completely. Use context clues to determine which places to visit, and which to avoid! Using your trusty encyclopedia and clues found on your explorations, you learn more about the strange plants you come across. By identifying each plant, you will be able to use their effects to influence the story -- from hypnotic hallucinogens to powerful poisons.

Name: L.A. Noire
Description:
Using groundbreaking new animation technology, MotionScan, that captures every nuance of an actor's facial performance in astonishing detail, L.A. Noire is a violent crime thriller that blends breathtaking action with true detective work to deliver an unprecedented interactive experience. Search for clues, chase down suspects and interrogate witnesses as you struggle to find the truth in a city where everyone has something to hide. Amid the post-war boom of Hollywood's Golden Age, Cole Phelps is an LAPD detective thrown headfirst into a city drowning in its own success. Corruption is rampant, the drug trade is exploding, and murder rates are at an all-time high. In his fight to climb the ranks and do what's right, Phelps must unravel the truth behind a string of arson attacks, racketeering conspiracies and brutal murders, battling the L.A. underworld and even members of his own department to uncover a secret that could shake the city to its rotten core. This complete edition of L.A. Noire includes the complete original game and all previously released downloadable content including the 'Nicolson Electroplating' Arson case, the 'Reefer Madness' Vice case, 'The Consul's Car' Traffic case, 'The Naked City' Vice case and 'A Slip of the Tongue' Traffic case.

**L.A. Noire: The VR Case Files - Step into the Shoes of a 1940s Detective**

Experience the gritty reality of 1940s Los Angeles like never before in L.A. Noire: The VR Case Files. This immersive virtual reality title plunges you into the role of Detective Cole Phelps, tasked with unraveling a web of brutal crimes, intricate plots, and dark conspiracies. The game draws inspiration from actual cases from 1947 Los Angeles, a period notorious for its corruption and violence.

L.A. Noire: The VR Case Files features seven meticulously rebuilt cases, specifically designed to leverage the power of virtual reality. This enhanced version adds new dimensions of realism and immersion to Rockstar Games' acclaimed crime thriller. You'll tackle select cases from the original blockbuster game, investigating mysteries across various detective desks, including Traffic, Arson, and Homicide.

As Detective Phelps, you will:

*   **Search for clues:** Physically interact with your environment by grabbing, inspecting, and manipulating objects to uncover vital evidence.
*   **Navigate the city:** Get behind the wheel and drive to your next crime scene, experiencing the city firsthand.
*   **Pursue suspects:** Engage in thrilling chases, intense fistfights, and shootouts as you track down those responsible.
*   **Build your case:** Document your findings by taking notes or sketching directly in your detective's notebook.
*   **Interrogate witnesses:** Employ your sharpest wits to discern truth from deception in a city where secrets are commonplace.

**System Requirements and Compatibility:**

Please note that due to current performance considerations with AMD hardware, specific hardware configurations are necessary for optimal gameplay.

*   **AMD Ryzen 7 CPU users:** An NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1070 graphics card or higher is required.
*   **AMD Vega 56 graphics card users:** An Intel i7 6700 CPU or higher is required.

Currently, using an AMD CPU and GPU in combination is not supported. L.A. Noire: The VR Case Files supports only a single graphics card architecture; NVIDIA SLI and AMD CrossFire are not compatible.

System requirements may evolve with future programming updates. For the most current compatibility information, consult your hardware manufacturer and visit www.rockstargames.com/support. Certain system components, such as mobile chipsets, integrated graphics, and AGP graphics cards, may not be compatible. Unlisted specifications are not guaranteed to be supported by the publisher.

**Additional Requirements:**

Installation and gameplay necessitate logging into the Rockstar Games Social Club (age restrictions apply). An internet connection is required for activation and ongoing entitlement verification. You will also need to install the Rockstar Games Social Club platform, DirectX 9, the DirectX June 2010 Redistributable Package, Chromium, and Microsoft Visual C++ 2012 and 2015 Redistributable Packages. Authentication software that recognizes certain hardware attributes for entitlement, digital rights management, system, and support purposes is also required.

A single-use serial code registration via the internet is mandatory. Each serial code is linked to one Rockstar Games Social Club account (age restrictions apply) and permits only one PC login per Social Club account at any given time. Serial codes are non-transferable once used, and Social Club accounts are also non-transferable.

Name: Silicon Dreams  |  cyberpunk interrogation
Description:
Investigate humans and androids in a corporate-controlled dystopian future where the lines between the real and the artificial have blurred to almost nothing. Research your subjects, choose your questions carefully, and probe for the truth, however dreadful it may be. Monitor interviewees’ emotions in real time - joy, sadness, anger, disgust, shock, and fear. Use this data to your advantage, intimidating, cajoling, or even befriending your subjects in order to to uncover more information. Choose a side in the midst of a brewing conflict: lie to your superiors and spare deviant androids, or condemn them to secure your own survival within the corporation. There are no easy answers. Silicon Dreams has multiple endings depending on the choices you make. Each android could live or die by your words.

Name: INSIDE
Description:
Hunted and alone, a boy finds himself drawn into the center of a dark project. Try Playdead’s award-winning indie adventure game. INSIDE is a dark, narrative-driven platformer combining intense action with challenging puzzles. It has been critically acclaimed for its moody art style, ambient soundtrack and unsettling atmosphere.

Name: Osmos
Description:
Enter the ambient world of Osmos: elegant, physics-based gameplay, dreamlike visuals, and a minimalist, electronic soundtrack. Your objective is to grow by absorbing other motes. Propel yourself by ejecting matter behind you. But be wise: ejecting matter also shrinks you. Relax - good things come to those who wait. Independent Games Festival finalist in three categories: Seumas McNally Grand Prize, Excellence in Design and Technical Excellence Progress from serenely ambient levels into varied and more challenging worlds. (47 levels, plus bonus content) Confront attractors, repulsors and intelligent motes with similar abilities and goals as you Selected as one of the 2009 PAX 10 Procedural content: play random versions of any level Sublime electronic soundtrack by Loscil, Gas/High Skies, Julien Neto, Biosphere, and more Dynamic time-warping: slow down the flow of time to outmaneuver agile opponents; speed it up to raise the challenge

Name: Incredipede
Description:
A puzzle game that celebrates the vast diversity of life in the world. Quozzle is a lone Incredipede on a quest to rescue her sisters. She can grow new arms, legs, and muscles wherever she needs them. Give her antlers or a tail, stretch her out like a snake, use nature as a blueprint or strike out in weird new directions. Control Quozzle as she learns to swing through the trees, climb sheer cliffs, dance over rivers of lava, and even soar through the air on thermal winds. 120 puzzle levels in beautifully crafted wood-block print style Design a creature to solve every level by adding legs and muscles Control your creation using WASD, flexing muscles to walk, flap, grab, or transform Campaign mode - help Quozzle save her village and discover the truth about the terrible invaders Level Editor and thousands of player-made challenges Immersive ambient soundscape of strange animal calls and chill jungle beats

OVIVO is a unique game that explores the interplay of black and white, creating a world of illusions and hidden messages. The game's core concept revolves around the harmonious coexistence of these two opposing forces, which constantly intertwine and replace each other to maintain balance.

Players control OVO, a character formed from these two halves of the world, possessing the unique ability to switch between them. As OVO journeys through this metaphorical landscape, they must navigate various dangers and collect mysterious symbols. These symbols are key to unraveling the game's narrative, though the interpretation of the story is left entirely to the player.

A standout feature is the "flow mechanics." In the white world, gravity pulls downwards, while in the black world, it pulls upwards. Crucially, OVO's momentum is preserved when transitioning between colors, allowing the character to "float along their border as if it is carried by the flow." This mechanic adds a dynamic layer to the gameplay.

The game boasts "fascinating art," with its metaphorical world brimming with hidden images and optical illusions. OVIVO embraces a "design without words" approach, meaning the story is conveyed solely through gameplay and visuals, without any textual explanations. This emphasis on symbolism and puzzles is evident throughout, with the game "filled with allusions and hidden messages." Complementing this immersive experience is a "meditative ambient soundtrack by Brokenkites."

Name: Marginalia
Description:
“The porter drew a map for me on the back of a brochure. In smudged pencil he showed me where to turn from the main road onto a dirt road and then where to leave the road entirely. I left the streetlights behind me and traveled into the dark.' Marginalia is a first-person horror game that transports you to Kestlebrook, a secluded valley where history becomes enmeshed with a strange present. Weeks ago Eric left. Days ago you got a letter telling you to come to him. Now you're here, but precisely where is here? And better yet, when? Features: Two plotlines that interweave with one another to tell the full story of Kestlebrook. Vast tracts of New England woodland handcrafted by the developers. A story about loss and what a person will do to fix a broken past. No jump scares. Just a slow, creeping dread. Powerful ambient soundtrack. Xbox controller support Like, some mythology and runes, or, y'know, whatever. Forged in the fires of October 2014, and remade from scratch in 2017

Name: Elder Puzzle
Description:
Elder Puzzle - A puzzle game with classic game modes, dozens of levels and beautiful pictures made in the pixel-art style, in this game you can train your quick thinking and reaction, collecting puzzles into a single picture, choosing the difficulty level for your style of play. A colorful puzzle game where you collect puzzle pieces into a coherent picture, go through dozens of levels and choose your level of difficulty, each of which is limited by its own time and amount of life. Train your brains! Game features: - Choice of levels - Beautiful Pixel-Art - Choice of difficulty modes

Name: Untangle
Description:
SUMMARY Untangle the mystery surrounding Alisha's disappearance. Alisha was a top student with lots of rumors and stories, and a school bullying victim. One day, you were dragged into an otherworldly school where you were trapped with her vengeful spirit. The only hope of survival is to reveal the chilling truth behind her murder. ABOUT THIS GAME Untangle provides a first-person thriller-horror survival experience taking in a school. The fictitious storyline is set to raise awareness of school violence and bullying. Are you a bully or victim? SYPNOSIS Alisha was reported missing in your former school. She was a top student and a school bullying victim. One day, you were dragged into the alternative version of your school. Here, you discovered Alisha was dead and her vengeful spirit avenged herself with a large massacre of the school bullies. To make sure you are not going to be collateral damage, figure out what happened to Alisha and help her out! I'm sorry But Alisha can't come to the phone right now. Why? Oh, 'cause she's dead (oh) KEY FEATURES • First-Person Gameplay • Atmospheric and appealing graphics • Interesting Puzzles You can disable the effects (Bloom, Film Grain, Motion Blur, Ambient Occlusion) in the setting. It would be highly recommended to remain the settings to enhance the game experience. However, It will slow down the fps at the same time. It's best only when it fits your computer graphics setting.

Name: Relaxicon
Description:
Relaxicon helps you learn English and improve your vocabulary in a meditative way. Combine letters into words to get their definitions, score points, unlock over 70 types of challenges and enjoy original atmospheric background music and in-tune sound effects for a relaxing meditation. Use mouse or keyboard to combine words together. Press Enter to score the word and get a definition. If you made a mistake, use backspace to remove the last letter and continue typing the correct word. Or press delete to break the whole word. When you have a challenge, press space to toggle the description. Game contains over 130000 English word definitions! Soundtrack consists of 9 original ambient pieces , and all sound effects were built specifically in tune with soundtrack, for maximum relaxation and ear pleasure. Headphones are highly recommended. Newer Games by Kodo Linija / / /

Name: Undergrowth: VR Maze
Description:
When inside Undergrowth: VR Maze, this is your world. Relax, explore, and take in the view! As you explore inside the maze you will find museum pieces found around the world. With Xera as your guide, you will find nothing but positive vibes and stunning visuals with Crytek's Cryengine! The VR simulator contains an environment from nature, and the layered ambient sound is created to make it as authentic as possible. Jump in and explore with good vibes!

Name: NUMTATE
Description:
NUMTATE is a challenging grid based puzzle game in which you move blocks around by rotating, pushing and attracting them to solve numeric puzzles. The game includes 50 handcrafted Levels. Each one with another take on the mechanics which can interact with each other to create more and more complex situations. With the help of the Undo/Redo -System, you can go back and forth in your steps, if you made a mistake or want to see the puzzle in an earlier state. If you need the numbers and positions in check, the Mark-System helps you out. An optional color pallete and pattern are available if needed. The Levels in the game are not enough? Create your own levels with the Level Editor and share them via the export function or the Steam Workshop! IN SHORT: 50 handcrafted puzzles Easy mechanics, complex levels Colorblind options Intuitive level editor Custom level export function Steam Workshop support

Street Fighter IV reignites the legendary fighting game series by focusing on its roots. It combines the cherished moves and strategies of Street Fighter II with Capcom's advanced technology. This fusion delivers an exceptional experience, reintroducing players to the skill of virtual combat.

**Street Fighter IV recaptures the essence that made Street Fighter II a worldwide phenomenon.** Players can select familiar faces like Ryu, Ken, Chun-Li, and Guile. The game also introduces exciting new characters, including Crimson Viper, Abel, El Fuerte, and Rufus.

The game showcases **stylized 3D characters and settings**. Yet, the gameplay stays true to the classic **2D Street Fighter viewpoint**, enhanced with dynamic 3D camera angles. The iconic **six-button control layout is back**, now featuring fresh special moves and capabilities.

As one game designer noted, "We wanted to honor the legacy of Street Fighter II while pushing the boundaries of what a fighting game could be."

**Key Features of Street Fighter IV:**

*   **High Definition Graphics:** Enjoy visually striking 3D environments and characters.
*   **Classic Fighting Mechanics:** Experience the traditional '2D' Street Fighter gameplay with the familiar six-button setup.
*   **Diverse Roster:** Choose from 25 fighters, featuring updated versions of classic Street Fighter II characters and brand-new combatants. Discover characters like the female super-spy Crimson Viper, the lucha libre wrestler El Fuerte, and the mixed martial artist Abel.
*   **Innovative Special Moves:** Master new abilities such as **Focus Attacks**, **Super Combos**, and the powerful **Ultra Combo system**.
*   **Challenging Gameplay:** New mechanics offer fresh challenges for both new players and veteran fighters.
*   **Worldwide Online Competition:** Test your skills against players from across the globe.
*   **PC-Specific Visual Styles:** The PC edition boasts three distinct visual filters: Watercolor, Poster, and Sumi-E ink styles, inspired by the game's artistic promotional materials.

Name: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Critically acclaimed Batman: Arkham Asylum returns with a remastered Game of the Year Edition, featuring 4 extra Challenge Maps. The additional Challenge Maps are Crime Alley; Scarecrow Nightmare; Totally Insane and Nocturnal Hunter (both from the Insane Night Map Pack). Utilize the unique FreeFlow™ combat system to chain together unlimited combos seamlessly and battle with huge groups of The Joker’s henchmen in brutal melee brawls Investigate as Batman, the WORLD’S GREATEST DETECTIVE, by solving intricate puzzles with the help of cutting edge forensic tools including x-ray scanning, fingerprint scans, ‘Amido Black’ spray and a pheromone tracker Face off against Gotham’s greatest villains including The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY and KILLER CROC Become the Invisible Predator™ with Batman’s fear takedowns and unique vantage point system to move without being seen and hunt enemies Choose multiple takedown methods, including swooping from the sky and smashing through walls. Explore every inch of Arkham Asylum and roam freely on the infamous island, presented for the first time ever in its gritty and realistic entirety Experience what it’s like to be BATMAN using BATARANGS, explosive gel aerosol, The Batclaw, sonar resonator and the line launcher Unlock more secrets by completing hidden challenges in the world and develop and customize equipment by earning experience points Enjoy complete superhero freedom in the environment with the use of Batman’s grapnel gun to get to any place you can see, jump from any height and glide in any direction

Name: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Critically acclaimed Batman: Arkham Asylum returns with a remastered Game of the Year Edition, featuring 4 extra Challenge Maps. The additional Challenge Maps are Crime Alley; Scarecrow Nightmare; Totally Insane and Nocturnal Hunter (both from the Insane Night Map Pack). Utilize the unique FreeFlow™ combat system to chain together unlimited combos seamlessly and battle with huge groups of The Joker’s henchmen in brutal melee brawls Investigate as Batman, the WORLD’S GREATEST DETECTIVE, by solving intricate puzzles with the help of cutting edge forensic tools including x-ray scanning, fingerprint scans, ‘Amido Black’ spray and a pheromone tracker Face off against Gotham’s greatest villains including The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY and KILLER CROC Become the Invisible Predator™ with Batman’s fear takedowns and unique vantage point system to move without being seen and hunt enemies Choose multiple takedown methods, including swooping from the sky and smashing through walls. Explore every inch of Arkham Asylum and roam freely on the infamous island, presented for the first time ever in its gritty and realistic entirety Experience what it’s like to be BATMAN using BATARANGS, explosive gel aerosol, The Batclaw, sonar resonator and the line launcher Unlock more secrets by completing hidden challenges in the world and develop and customize equipment by earning experience points Enjoy complete superhero freedom in the environment with the use of Batman’s grapnel gun to get to any place you can see, jump from any height and glide in any direction

**Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition**

Experience **Batman: Arkham City**, a thrilling sequel that expands on the acclaimed **Batman: Arkham Asylum**. This new installment throws you into **Arkham City**, a sprawling, maximum-security prison five times larger than the original game's world. It's the new home for Gotham's worst: thugs, gangsters, and criminal masterminds.

Step into the cowl as **The Dark Knight** and deliver justice. You'll face an **incredible Rogues Gallery** of Gotham's most dangerous villains. Prepare to confront **Catwoman, The Joker, The Riddler, Two-Face, Harley Quinn, The Penguin, Mr. Freeze**, and many more.

The **Game of the Year Edition** is packed with extra content. It includes all the original game's features plus significant DLC.

**DLC included:**

*   **Catwoman Pack**
*   **Nightwing Bundle Pack**
*   **Robin Bundle Pack**
*   **Harley Quinn’s Revenge**
*   **Challenge Map Pack**
*   **Arkham City Skins Pack**

This edition offers **new gameplay content**. You get **seven new maps**, **three playable characters**, and **12 unique skins** beyond the original release.

**New Maps:**

*   Wayne Manor
*   Main Hall
*   Freight Train
*   Black Mask
*   The Joker's Carnival
*   Iceberg Lounge
*   Batcave

**Playable Characters:**

*   Catwoman
*   Robin
*   Nightwing

**New Skins:**

*   1970s Batsuit
*   Year One Batman
*   The Dark Knight Returns
*   Earth One Batman
*   Batman Beyond
*   Animated Batman
*   Sinestro Corps Batman
*   Long Halloween Catwoman
*   Animated Catwoman
*   Animated Robin
*   Red Robin
*   Animated Nightwing

Name: Bayonetta
Description:
From PlatinumGames’ legendary director Hideki Kamiya of Resident Evil and Devil May Cry fame, SEGA brings one of the most universally acclaimed character action games of all time to PC. Bayonetta. The last survivor of an ancient witch clan who keep the balance between light, dark and chaos. Entombed to protect herself – and the world as we know it – Bayonetta is discovered and revived after 500 years, sparking a chain of events with cataclysmic repercussions. Thrust straight into battle, with only one clue to her past, Bayonetta must discover the truth and fight for the future. Her daunting conquest sees her face off against countless angelic enemies and giant foes in a game of 100% pure action. BAYONETTA ON PC IS BEST EXPERIENCED WITH A CONTROLLER. Features Deadly Grace An alluring, stylish and all-action heroine unlike anyone else on the gaming landscape, Bayonetta is ready to push your senses to the limit. Climax Action Over-the-top action in extreme environments resulting in continuous high levels of tension and excitement – Bayonetta pushes the genre into new realms of intensity. Extravagant Combat Bayonetta wields an impressive arsenal of weapons through an intuitive and fluid combat system, unleashing deadly combos and special attacks with devastating results. Supernatural Powers Unleash gruesome torture attacks such as the Iron Maiden, Guillotine and more to finish off enemies and send them to hell. Full Steam Support Steam Achievements, Steam Cloud Save, Trading Cards, Leader Boards, and Big Picture Mode. Enhanced PC Graphics Options Unlocked resolutions up to 4K, anti-aliasing, anisotropic filtering, SSAO lighting, scalable texture and shadow quality, and more. English and Japanese Voice Overs Freely switch languages and subtitles at any time.

Name: Guacamelee! Gold Edition
Description:
Guacamelee! Gold Edition is a Metroidvania-style action-platformer set in a magical Mexican-inspired world. The game draws its inspiration from traditional Mexican culture and folklore, and features many interesting and unique characters. Guacamelee! builds on the classic open-world Metroidvania style of games by adding deep melee combat, a new dimension switching mechanic, and cooperative local multiplayer. The game also blurs the boundaries between combat and platforming by making many moves useful and necessary for both. Travel through a mystical and mysterious Mexican world as a luchador using the power of your two fists to battle evil. Uncover hidden wrestling techniques like the Rooster Uppercut, and Dimension Swap to open new areas and secrets. Key Features Use combat moves for both fighting enemies and platforming challenges Swap between multiple overlapping dimensions (World of the Living and the World of the Dead) 'El Infierno' level expansion. Brave the fires of El Infierno and prove yourself in a series of challenges to unlock powerful new costumes for Juan and Tostada Player costumes! Swap costumes to change the attributes of your Hero, and obtain new achievements Steam Achievements, Leaderboards, Cloud Save, and Big Picture Mode Trading Cards Create new custom costumes and share these with others via Steam Workshop Drop in/out 2-Player local co-operative play for the entire story Chickens. Lots and lots of Chickens Also Available: Super Turbo Championship Edition! An alternate, expanded edition of Guacamelee! is now available to Steam PC users! Guac STCE adds to the Gold Edition with extra powers, levels and enemies, and enhancements to gameplay and graphics. Click the banner to find out more.

In a post-apocalyptic world where humanity struggles to survive amidst chaos and mutated creatures, a **sinister threat** has emerged: dogs are vanishing. You play as Alpha, a lone wanderer still grieving the loss of his own dog from his youth. While traversing the desolate wastelands, Alpha stumbles upon mutants abducting a lost puppy. This encounter reveals Alpha's remarkable ability to **understand the pup**, who introduces himself as T. Juan!

Together, Alpha and T. Juan set out on an epic quest to solve the mystery of the disappearing dogs, inviting you to join their journey of discovery and rescue.

**Recruit Your Canine Allies:**

Your mission will be supported by a variety of canine companions, each possessing unique skills to assist you. The **Newfoundland** provides a vital passive healing ability, keeping your team strong against threats. When combat intensifies, the **Tibetan Mastiff** can activate a powerful "beast mode" to turn the tide. Additionally, the **Beagle** offers its charm and a set of distinct abilities that prove essential. It's up to you to rescue these brave dogs and strategically deploy them against the villains threatening them. Prepare to explore a world that has truly gone to the dogs, venturing through **desolate badlands**, **ruined cities**, **military bases**, and **forgotten jungles**, all while traveling in an **upgradable RV**.

**Experience a Dog-Eat-Dog Combat System:**

This harsh world presents a range of enemies, from grotesque mutants to electrifying foes. To survive, you must give your all against the many antagonists you'll face. Beyond direct combat, your strategic skills will be tested in a unique tower defense experience. When facing mutated enemies, you'll have numerous offensive and defensive options to protect your area. Your tools include **super soakers**, **steel walls**, and **wire traps**, offering a wealth of strategic choices.

## Yakuza 0: Dive into 1980s Japan

Experience the vibrant, decadent world of 1980s Japan in Yakuza 0. This action-adventure game throws you into the neon-lit streets of Tokyo and Osaka, where you'll fight your way through a gripping narrative.

### Two Protagonists, One Turbulent Story

You'll play as two iconic characters: Kazuma Kiryu and Goro Majima.

#### Kazuma Kiryu's Descent into Trouble

Follow Kazuma Kiryu as a routine debt collection spirals out of control. Kiryu finds himself entangled in a dangerous web when his target is brutally murdered, setting him on a path of escalating conflict.

#### Goro Majima's "Normal" Life

Then, step into the flamboyant world of Goro Majima. Explore his seemingly ordinary existence as the charismatic owner of a bustling cabaret club.

### Dynamic Combat and Environmental Mayhem

Yakuza 0 features a fluid combat system that allows you to switch between three distinct fighting styles on the fly. Take down hordes of enemies with brutal efficiency. Elevate your fighting by incorporating environmental objects into your attacks. Use bicycles, signposts, and even car doors to unleash bone-crunching combos and savage takedowns.

### More Than Just Fighting: Explore 1988's Japan

Beyond the intense battles, 1988's Japan offers a wealth of distractions. Immerse yourself in the era's entertainment, from energetic discos and glamorous hostess clubs to classic SEGA arcades. The richly detailed, neon-lit world is brimming with activities to pursue.

### Uncover 100 Side Stories

Engage with the colorful inhabitants of the red-light district. You might find yourself assisting a budding S&M dominatrix or ensuring a street performer reaches the restroom in time. Discover over 100 unique and memorable side stories that flesh out the game's world.

Name: Injustice™ 2
Description:
Power up and build the ultimate version of your favourite DC legends in INJUSTICE 2. •EVERY BATTLE DEFINES YOU: With every match you'll earn gear to equip, customise and evolve your roster. •A NEW THREAT RISES: Picking up where Injustice left off, Batman struggles against Superman's regime, as a new threat appears that will put Earth's very existence at risk. •THE BEST OF DC: Choose from the biggest DC Universe roster ever and battle across iconic locations in epic-scale battles. •BUILT BY NETHERREALM: Developers of the best-selling and critically acclaimed MORTAL KOMBAT franchise.

## Full Metal Furies: The Ultimate Cooperative Action RPG

Embark on an epic adventure with FULL METAL FURIES, a groundbreaking 'true-cooperative' action RPG from the creators of Rogue Legacy. This innovative title emphasizes playing together, featuring a unique combat system where every player's actions are crucial to defeating tough enemies and saving a world on the brink of destruction. Teamwork isn't just encouraged; it's the key to survival.

### Unite to Win: The Power of Cooperative Combat

FULL METAL FURIES redefines the action RPG genre by demanding real coordination to overcome enemies. Foes will appear with colored shields, and only allies of the same color can break through. This necessitates constant communication and strategic positioning. The game also highlights the importance of aiding fallen teammates. While revive bars refill over time, a swift assist can be a lifesaver. This cooperative focus eliminates common frustrations like fighting over the last hit, battling for loot, or scrambling for health drops. All resources are shared, allowing players to concentrate fully on working together. As the developers stated, "seamless teamwork is not just encouraged, it's absolutely essential for survival."

### Master Your Role: Four Unique Classes

Choose from four distinct classes, each offering a unique playstyle and special skills that benefit the team:

*   **Alex the Friendly Fighter:** Excels in close combat, utilizing quick counters and powerful combos to defeat enemies.
*   **Meg the Near-sighted Sniper:** Controls the battlefield from a distance by deploying mines and executing aerial attacks on foes.
*   **Triss the Boxy Tank:** Protects allies with her formidable shield and can repel enemies with forceful attacks.
*   **Erin the Ovally Engineer:** Dominates the area with deployable turrets and wields a powerful gun for offensive maneuvers.

### Evolving Abilities: A Deep Skill Tree System

Each class boasts an extensive skill tree, providing numerous abilities to customize and experiment with. This allows players to adapt their playstyle on the fly. Instead of changing gear, players can alter their character's abilities by swapping them. For instance, the Tank could gain a FREEZING SHOUT, the Fighter's Leap could become a POWER DIVE, or the Engineer could be equipped with a rapid-fire machine gun. This demonstrates the depth and flexibility of the combat system.

### A World of Foes: Challenging Enemy Encounters

Prepare for over 70 different enemy types, each featuring unique attack patterns and specific counter-strategies. No fight will feel like a simple grind. Enemies attack relentlessly, offering no respite. New threats emerge in every stage, keeping players on their toes. The game culminates in epic, multi-stage battles against colossal Titans, demanding peak skill and teamwork to achieve victory.

### An Intriguing World: Explore and Discover

Embark on an adventure filled with mystery, surprising plot twists, and memorable dialogue as you explore a world scarred by conflict. Journey through the snowy town of Thessaly, brave the perilous Folky Forest, delve into the ancient tombs of the Stygian Well, and uncover many other fascinating locations. However, proceed with caution, as the world harbors more secrets than it initially reveals. Hidden clues, secret areas, and even entire hidden dimensions are scattered throughout, awaiting discovery. Uncover a rich narrative spanning over 20,000 words, translated into 8 languages, and enjoy discovering 20,000 unique one-liners.

### Play Your Way: Solo or With Friends

FULL METAL FURIES offers remarkable flexibility in how you approach its cooperative missions. Up to four players can join the adventure, supporting both **ONLINE** and **OFFLINE** play. You can team up on the couch, connect online, or combine both. For those who prefer to play alone, the innovative **Pick 2** system allows you to control two party members simultaneously. A quick-switch mechanic preserves all the strategic depth of multiplayer combat. Every action and combo achievable in multiplayer can be executed in single-player, ensuring a full and engaging experience regardless of your chosen playstyle.

### Addendum: An Allegorical Journey

This complex allegorical action adventure delves into themes of atonement, allusions, and alliteration. It promises an unforgettable experience set in an alternate age, amidst the ruins of ancient Athens.

PAYDAY 2 plunges players into the roles of the original masked crew – Dallas, Hoxton, Wolf, and Chains – for an action-packed, four-player co-op shooter experience. This time, the crew descends upon Washington D.C. to orchestrate an epic crime spree, offering a dynamic range of contracts through the **CRIMENET network**. Players can select from a variety of heists, from small-scale convenience store robberies and kidnappings to high-stakes cyber-crime operations and daring bank vault extractions, all culminating in that signature **PAYDAY**. The game also allows for unique interactions within D.C., including participating in local community events and handling political errands. As players progress through these increasingly challenging and rewarding jobs, they can also delve into a robust **character customization and crafting system**, enabling them to build and personalize their own weapons and gear.

The core gameplay loop of PAYDAY 2 revolves around strategic planning and execution. According to the game's design, players must carefully select their crew, ensuring the right mix of skills is available when a job goes live. The **CRIMENET** acts as a dynamic contract database, connecting players with local contacts such as Vlad the Ukrainian, the enigmatic politician 'The Elephant,' and the South American drug trafficker Hector, each with their own distinct agendas. The game emphasizes that no two heists are ever the same, thanks to dynamic scenarios featuring randomized geometry and rare events. Furthermore, players can invest in one of five distinct Skill Trees – Mastermind, Enforcer, Ghost, Technician, and Fugitive – allowing for deep customization of skills and equipment to create the ultimate heister. The game also boasts an extensive weapon and modification system, offering a wide array of firearms that can be enhanced with various attachments affecting performance, alongside purely aesthetic customizations. A key design principle highlighted is the freedom to "Play It Your Way," with each job supporting multiple approaches, from stealthy ambushes to direct assaults, each yielding a different experience. The game's longevity is further supported by a significant history of additional content, with over 70 updates introducing new heists, characters, weapons, and gameplay features.

Name: Atomicrops
Description:
In Atomicrops you will... Farm by sowing and harvesting as many fast growing crops as you can before the day is done to earn a huge profit. Explore the far reaches of the biomes to find useful relics of farms long past. Powerful loot increases your farming abilities and helps you fight enemies. Defend your crops. Fend off nightly attackers looking to eat your crops and leave you starving. Or dead. Fight challenging bosses each season until you reach the final season - the Nuclear Winter. Purchase weapons and items in town at the end of each day. Celebrate the end of each season with special shops and rewards. Befriend an entourage of pig pals, chicken chums and cow colleagues to automate farming tasks. Woo and marry a kindred spirit from the local town to fight and farm alongside you. Permanently Upgrade your farming and fighting abilities. Earn a special currency each run that can be used on permanent improvements and unlocks. Die. Even the easiest difficulty will put your skills to the test. Victory is rewarding and hard earned. Unlock new characters, spouses, difficulties, and permanent upgrades. Most importantly, you can unlock many cats to permanently roam your homestead (yes, you can pet them). Play again! Atomicrops is designed to be heavily replayable with new surprises and item synergies to be discovered in every run. About Modern city life got you down? Well, you've just inherited your late uncle's farm. Time to pack your bags and start fresh in the peaceful countryside. What could possibly go wrong? A nuclear apocalypse, that's what. Now you're in a hellscape wasteland defending the last surviving source of sustenance - your crops. And every mutant wants a piece. Do as any self-respecting farmer would: Farm. Marry. Kill.

Name: Blacklight: Retribution
Description:
Take firefights to a futuristic new level in Blacklight: Retribution, a free-to-play FPS. See through walls with the HRV, deploy mechanized Hardsuits, and customize your weapons to dominate the opposition. In Blacklight, mastering the futuristic tech is half of victory. You'll need to carefully balance your loadout, from the extreme customization possible in designing your firearms, to the equipment you carry and the in-match bonuses you can unlock. The Hyper Reality Visor (HRV) allows you to look through walls and spot enemies, and attack from where they aren't expecting - but be careful, because you're vulnerable while using it. The other half of victory? Raw skill, same as it's always been. Good hunting, Agent... Key Features Hardsuits - Use a variety of upgrades in each match, including calling in the hulking Hardsuit mech. Powerful but slow, this armored suit packs a one-shot, one-kill railgun and a high velocity minigun to clear rooms... fast. Hyper Reality Vision - HRV Technology allows Agents to scout their enemies through the walls, pinpoint vital mission objectives, or locate weak points in an enemy Hardsuit. Weapon Depots - Scattered across the battlefield are Weapon Depots that supply your team with additional ammo, heavier weapons such as a Rocket Launcher, or provide the ability to call down airstrikes and Hardsuits. Free to Play! - Blacklight: Retribution is a fully Free-to-Play shooter. Earn Game Points (GP) after every match and use them to unlock various armor and weaponry for your Agent in game. Customize Your Loadout - An Agent’s gun is their livelihood. Choose from 1000 different gun combinations by modifying your receivers with customizable Stock, Muzzle, Barrel, Magazine, and Scope, Camo, and Weapon Tags. Protect Yourself - Whether your play style is run and gun, or survivability, or long range sniping the choice is yours to make in fully customizing your armor loadout. Level Progression - Gain experience and levels through combat to unlock access to additional weapons, armor, and equipment. Tons of Game Modes and Maps - Combat is engaged on a number of different 7 different game modes across 9 beautifully detailed maps. Game modes includes classics such Team Death Match, Domination, Capture the Flag, and Kill Confirmed while introducing new favorites likes Netwar. Private Servers - Want to scrim with your clan mates? Challenge someone 1vs1? The private server option allows Agents to set up their own password protected server away from the pesky trolls. Spectator Mode - Learn tips and tricks from the top players in Spectator mode, or simply enjoy the chaos from the best seat in the house.

**Killsquad** is a co-op action game that masterfully blends the frantic pace of a twin-stick shooter with the visceral satisfaction of hack and slash combat. This exhilarating experience is further enhanced by deep character customization and progression, allowing you to forge your unique bounty hunter.

Embark on an epic journey across five distinct planets, each teeming with a relentless onslaught of enemies eager for annihilation. Your mission is to select your hero, meticulously choose their skills, arm yourself with powerful weapons, equip essential gears, and attune potent talismans. Then, unleash unbridled fury through waves of adversaries and formidable bosses. Killsquad delivers frantic, direct, and skill-oriented control, whether you're wielding a keyboard or a gamepad. The mantra is simple: shoot fast, dodge faster, or face swift demise. The heart of Killsquad lies in its short, adrenaline-pumping contracts, designed to be completed in 10-20 minute bursts. These can be tackled solo or enjoyed with up to four friends in cooperative play. The gameplay evokes elements of a twin-stick shooter, a hack and slash adventure, a top-down dungeon crawler, and even a sci-fi bullet hell. Ultimately, it feels uniquely like Killsquad, offering immense fun whether you're playing alone or with companions.

Killsquad boasts five distinct hero classes, each offering unique weapons and skills that cater to a variety of playstyles, seamlessly integrating both melee and ranged combat. As you progress through your adventures, you'll acquire and equip powerful upgrades for each of your skills, which dynamically activate during your contracts. Upon successfully completing a contract, you'll claim your bounty, which can be spent on a vast array of new equipment, including weapons, power-ups, gear, and cosmetic items to personalize your hero. Navigate through over 30 contracts on the Campaign Map, traversing five diverse planets. You can jump into the fray with friends or join any other bounty hunter. The game allows you to join another squad mid-mission in real time, offering a dynamic cooperative experience. You can either cooperate to achieve contract objectives or compete against each other to secure the highest scores. Discover weapons and gears possessing unique characteristics that significantly impact your hero's skills. Earn the trust of the enigmatic Unseen by unearthing their Talismans – potent and intricate artifacts that grant exciting passive effects. Be warned: these abilities may initially prove detrimental, but through persistent effort and by vanquishing numerous monsters, they can be leveled up to transform into incredibly powerful items. Combine these with your skills and upgrades to engineer game-breaking builds and truly make your heroes your own. However, no bounty hunter's party would be complete without the main event: the enemies. Hordes and waves of disturbing foes will relentlessly advance, clawing and biting until nothing remains. But fear not, for you are more than capable of handling them. It is the bosses, however, that will truly test your mettle. More than 15 unique bosses await, each featuring distinct mechanics and requiring specific strategies to overcome.

**MOTHERGUNSHIP: A Bullet-Hell FPS Revolution**

Prepare for an unparalleled gaming experience with **MOTHERGUNSHIP**, a title that masterfully fuses the relentless intensity of bullet-hell shooters with the dynamic action of first-person shooters. This game distinguishes itself by offering **one of the most extensive gun customization options ever witnessed in the video game landscape**. Your mission is clear: equip yourself with an arsenal of truly over-the-top weaponry and embark on a desperate mission to defeat the robotic alien armada that has brutally conquered Earth.

**Forge Your Ultimate Weaponry**

In **MOTHERGUNSHIP**, you are empowered to craft gun monstrosities that defy logic and gravity, weapons no ordinary person could ever hope to wield. Prepare to confront **gigantic bosses** and immerse yourself in a world of **randomized mayhem** as you fight your way to the very core of the alien fleet, with the ultimate objective of destroying the formidable **MOTHERGUNSHIP** itself!

**Engage in Unrelenting Combat**

Face overwhelming odds in **brutal, non-stop combat** where your ability to think on your feet is paramount for survival. Master the art of dodging hundreds of bullets through a unique FPS/Bullet-hell hybrid gameplay system. Each alien vessel you encounter is teeming with hordes of robotic enemies, treacherous traps, and intimidating bosses, all determined to prevent you from saving humanity. It's time to go get them!

**Unleash Your Creativity with Crafting**

To stand any chance against the **MOTHERGUNSHIP**, you will absolutely need your own **personalized arsenal of destruction**. Fortunately, **MOTHERGUNSHIP** provides one of the most **modular gun-crafting systems** ever conceived for a video game. Imagine wielding a twelve-barrel gun that fires homing rockets, or perhaps a devastating lightning shotgun. Even adding a fishtank to the top of your weapon is an option! The design of your destructive arsenal is entirely in your hands.

**Join the Resistance and Fight Together**

Become a vital part of the resistance movement against the relentless robotic alien invasion. Annihilate hordes of metallic fiends and earn your path to the **Mothergunship**. Furthermore, you can experience the thrill of the fight alongside a friend in a **full co-op experience**. Work together to carve a path through the alien fleet and achieve that ultimate, glorious goal: bringing down the **MOTHERGUNSHIP**!

Name: Sniper Ghost Warrior Contracts
Description:
Fulfill contracts that offer clear objectives with a fixed monetary reward and options to complete bonus challenges for payouts. With hundreds of ways to take down a wide range of targets, Contracts offers precise, strategic sniping gameplay at its absolute best. Play as a paid assassin; a hit man for hire, and beware of rival snipers who won’t hesitate to disrupt your best-laid plans. Open-ended contracts Bounties and challenges deliver strong replayability options to eliminate targets and collect cash to redeem for upgrades. An all-new Dynamic Reticle System Offers the most realistic and intense sniping experience. Upgradeable AR Mask With the ability to scan the environment and highlight weakness or objects of interest. An arsenal of new gadgets Including drones, remote sniper turrets and gas grenades. Show off your stealth skills, execute silent takedowns and be rewarded for a strategic play style. Battle the brutal wilderness of Siberia Fight to survive the intensity of snow-covered mountains, lush forests and secret bases hidden deep in the mountainside.

**Tom Clancy's Ghost Recon: Future Soldier™: Mastering Asymmetric Warfare**

In the brutal reality of combat, there is no room for fairness, honor, or justice. Victory and defeat, life and death, are the only outcomes. The Ghosts, an elite special-operations unit, do not concern themselves with even odds. Their mission is to overwhelm and obliterate the enemy, and they leverage cutting-edge future technology to achieve this in asymmetric battles.

"Future technology is the key to winning an asymmetric battle," states the game's premise, highlighting the core gameplay loop. In *Ghost Recon: Future Soldier*, players join a team of highly trained, ruthless special-ops soldiers. Equipped with unparalleled combat technology and advanced military hardware, players are deployed to the world's most dangerous warzones to neutralize high-value targets. As the game's tagline emphasizes, "When you’re outnumbered…Only the dead fight fair."

**Key Features:**

*   **Advanced Combat Technology:** *Ghost Recon: Future Soldier* equips players with the most sophisticated combat technology designed to dominate and destroy the enemy.
*   **Cross Com:** This integrated system provides real-time intelligence projected directly onto the player's goggles. The Heads-Up Display (HUD) allows for on-the-fly drone control and the identification of critical enemy positions.
*   **Optical Camouflage:** Achieve invisibility to move undetected through hostile areas and gain a decisive advantage.
*   **Sync Shot:** Coordinate synchronized attacks on enemy targets by tagging them from the ground or via drone.
*   **Cover Swap:** Utilize a dynamic cover system to surprise, flank, and eliminate enemies by seamlessly moving between cover points.
*   **Hand-to-Hand Combat:** Master brutal close-combat maneuvers to become the ultimate "quiet professional."
*   **Extensive Animation System:** Experience over 2,500 animations, allowing your Ghost Recon character to perform a wide range of tactical movements, from rolling and sliding to climbing and disappearing, enabling stealthy takedowns.

**Campaigns and Modes:**

*   **Single-Player Campaign:** Embark on an all-new, epic Ghost Recon experience featuring 12 missions across 8 spectacular locales, from the dusty plains of Africa and the suburbs of Moscow to the icy Arctic.
*   **Co-op Campaign:** Team up with up to three friends online to tackle the 12 campaign missions cooperatively. Execute highly coordinated takedowns and devastating large-scale assaults using multiple perspectives. Your "5th man" UAV drone can draw enemy fire and mark targets, while you can lock onto enemy positions from air or ground. Deploy sonic blasts to incapacitate foes and unleash the firepower of mounted weapons systems on vehicles like jeeps and helicopters.
*   **Guerrilla Mode:** Face hundreds of enemies in this new combat mode. Inspired by real-life techniques from U.S. Army counter-insurgency experts, you and your fellow Ghosts will capture and secure designated areas, then defend against up to 50 increasingly difficult waves of enemies. Compete with friends on online leaderboards.
*   **Multiplayer Mode:** Engage in fast-paced, intense online battles with up to 12 players in 6v6 matches. Choose from three distinct classes—Rifleman, Engineer, and Scout—and unlock new gear to compete across 10 maps. Gain experience, level up, and make critical choices to customize and develop your character. Gather and share enemy intel with your team, and use the suppression system to pin down opponents while your teammates flank them. Four objective-focused game modes, including new exclusives and the classic GR Siege mode, are available. This mode was developed by Red Storm, the studio renowned for the multiplayer of *Ghost Recon Advanced Warfighter*.

**Gunsmith Mode:**

With over 20 million weapon combinations, players will find the perfect firearm for any combat scenario. The Gunsmith mode allows for deep weapon customization to gain a tactical edge. Choose from dozens of attachments and components, including triggers, barrels, and stocks, to personalize your weapon. Test your customized firearm in the firing range to ensure optimal accuracy and performance before deploying it in single-player, multiplayer, or co-op missions.

**Brink** is a unique first-person shooter that blends single-player, co-op, and multiplayer experiences. In this game, you'll develop your character regardless of whether you're playing alone, with friends, or online. You'll select your combat role to protect yourself and humanity's final sanctuary within a world featuring dynamic battlefields, extensive customization, and an innovative control system.

The game unfolds on the Ark, a city floating above the water that is now embroiled in civil war. Originally designed as a self-sustaining habitat, rising sea levels forced it to become a home for thousands of refugees. This influx has created friction between the original inhabitants and the newcomers, sparking a conflict for control between the Security and Resistance factions. The central question becomes: **which side will you choose to support?**

**Brink** introduces several distinctive features. Players can extensively personalize their character's appearance, unlocking additional options as they progress. Your character's development is consistent across all game modes, meaning your progress in the single-player campaign carries over to online co-op and competitive matches. The game facilitates smooth transitions between the campaign, co-op, and multiplayer modes. Multiplayer supports up to seven players (or AI bots) in co-op scenarios or up to 16 players in competitive matches.

A particularly noteworthy element is the **SMART Movement System**. This system builds upon standard shooter controls by incorporating a dedicated **SMART button**. When pressed, the game intelligently interprets your intended destination and executes the most effective movement. This feature assists both novice and seasoned players in making **more strategic choices** during combat. Your objectives, missions, and inventory selections are dynamically generated based on your chosen role, current location, and the ongoing state of the battle. As one developer noted, "You will **always know your objective** and the **reward for success**."

**Brink: A Seamless Blend of Shooter Gameplay**

Brink is an immersive first-person shooter that masterfully combines single-player, co-op, and multiplayer experiences into one fluid adventure. This innovative title allows you to develop your character whether you're playing solo, with friends, or battling others online. In Brink, you choose your combat role as you fight to survive and protect humanity's last sanctuary. The game boasts dynamic battlefields, extensive character customization, and a groundbreaking control system designed to keep you engaged.

The game unfolds on the Ark, a man-made floating city teetering on the edge of civil war. Originally conceived as a self-sufficient, eco-friendly habitat, the Ark has become a refuge for thousands due to rising sea levels. Tensions are escalating between the original inhabitants and the refugees, leading to a fierce conflict between the Security and Resistance factions vying for control. The choice of allegiance is yours.

**Key Features:**

*   **Unleash Your Unique Identity:** Brink's advanced player customization offers a vast array of visual options, ensuring your character is truly one-of-a-kind. As you gain experience, more customization choices become available.

*   **Two Factions, One Character:** Embark on the single-player campaign as either a Resistance or Security operative. Then, seamlessly transition your character online for cooperative or competitive play with other gamers.

*   **Fluid Transitions:** Take your personalized character online at any moment. Brink allows for effortless movement between your single-player campaign, co-op sessions with friends, and intense multiplayer battles. Online multiplayer supports up to seven other players (or AI) in cooperative missions against the opposing faction, or up to 16 players in competitive matches.

*   **Intelligent Movement with SMART:** Brink utilizes familiar shooter controls but introduces the innovative SMART button. A press of this button allows the game to intelligently assess your intended destination and execute the movement. As one developer stated, "SMART makes navigating the environment intuitive, even in the heat of battle." This feature empowers both seasoned FPS veterans and newcomers to make smarter decisions during fast-paced action.

*   **Dynamic Objectives and Rewards:** Missions, communications, and inventory selections are dynamically generated based on your role, status, location, squad, and the overall battle situation across all game modes. You'll always know your objective, what to do, and what rewards await your success.

Brink is an immersive first-person shooter that seamlessly blends single-player, co-op, and multiplayer gameplay. You can develop your character whether playing alone, with friends, or against others online. In Brink, you choose your combat role as you fight to save yourself and humanity's last refuge. The game features dynamic battlefields, extensive customization, and an innovative control system.

Brink is set on the Ark, a man-made floating city on the verge of civil war. Originally an experimental, self-sufficient "green" habitat, rising ocean levels forced the Ark to house thousands of refugees alongside its founders. Tensions between these groups have escalated, leading to a fierce battle for control between Security and Resistance forces. Which side will you join?

**Key Features of Brink:**

*   **Unique Character Customization:** Brink offers advanced player customization with countless appearance options, ensuring your character is truly unique. As you gain experience, you unlock even more customization possibilities.
*   **Two Factions, One Character:** Choose to fight in the single-player campaign as either a Resistance or Security member. Then, take your same character online for cooperative or competitive play.
*   **Seamless Gameplay Transitions:** Move between your single-player campaign, co-op with friends, and intense multiplayer action at any time. Multiplayer allows you to play with up to seven other players (or AI) cooperatively against the opposing faction, or with up to 16 players competitively.
*   **SMART Movement System:** Brink uses familiar shooter controls but adds the innovative SMART button. Pressing SMART allows the game to dynamically assess your intended destination and execute the movement. This feature helps both veteran and new FPS players make smarter decisions in fast-paced action.
*   **Dynamic Objectives and Rewards:** Objectives, communications, missions, and inventory selections are generated dynamically. These are based on your role, condition, location, squadmates, and the battle's status across all gameplay modes. You'll always know your objective, what to do, and your reward for success.

Name: The Longest Journey
Description:
The Longest Journey is an amazing graphical adventure, where the player controls the protagonist, April Ryan, on her journey between parallel universes. Embark on an exciting and original journey of discovery, where you will explore, solve puzzles, meet new people, face terrifying monsters, learn, grow, and live the adventure of a lifetime! Over 150 locations spanning two distinct and detailed worlds More than 70 speaking characters 40+ hours of gameplay 20+ minutes of high-resolution pre-rendered video footage Cinematic musical score

**Monkey Island™ 2 Special Edition: LeChuck’s Revenge™**

Return to the Caribbean with wannabe pirate Guybrush Threepwood and the zombie pirate LeChuck in this acclaimed LucasArts adventure. Monkey Island™ 2 Special Edition: LeChuck’s Revenge™ faithfully updates the classic sequel with stunning special edition details. Building on the success of The Secret of Monkey Island™: Special Edition, this reimagining offers new features and an unparalleled interactive experience.

After seemingly defeating LeChuck in their first encounter, Guybrush sets his sights on the legendary treasure of Big Whoop. However, LeChuck returns as a zombie, fueled by a desire for revenge. Guybrush must rely on his wit, humor, and adventurous spirit to finally defeat his nemesis and prove himself the greatest pirate in the Caribbean. Voodoo dolls, spitting contests, and amusement parks are just a few of the challenges Guybrush faces. He'll meet old friends, battle new enemies, and use all his mojo to overcome LeChuck's wrath.

Experience the game anew with these signature Special Edition features:

*   **High-Definition Graphics:** Enjoy a completely re-imagined art style, hand-drawn and presented in high definition.
*   **Full Voice Over:** Hear the story and characters come alive with complete voice acting from original Monkey Island franchise cast members, available in both Special Edition and Classic modes.
*   **Renewed Music Score:** A re-mastered and re-recorded musical score, performed with live instruments, enhances the atmosphere.
*   **Special Edition and Classic Modes:** Seamlessly switch between modes at any time with the scene-for-scene hot swap feature.
*   **Enhanced Gameplay:** A new, intuitive interface and controls offer a more interactive experience.
*   **In-Game Hint System:** Keep puzzles fresh and fun with an integrated hint system.

Discover all-new features:

*   **Direct Control:** Choose your playstyle with either the classic point-and-click interface or the new intuitive direct character control.
*   **Object Highlighting:** Quickly find hidden objects with interactive object highlighting.
*   **Behind-the-Scenes Art:** Explore an in-game art viewer showcasing never-before-seen artwork from both versions of the game.
*   **Original Developer Commentary:** Hear amusing stories and development insights from Ron Gilbert, Tim Schafer, and Dave Grossman.
*   **SteamWorks Achievements:** Test your pirate prowess by collecting a variety of achievements.

**The Secret of Monkey Island: Special Edition - Relive a Classic Adventure**

*The Secret of Monkey Island™: Special Edition* is a modern revival of the iconic point-and-click adventure game, designed to captivate both long-time fans and new players. First released in 1990, this updated version by LucasArts revitalizes the beloved story. The development team has given the game a fresh look with new, hand-drawn art and animation, alongside a re-mastered musical score featuring full orchestration. The entire story is now fully voiced, using the original *Monkey Island™* cast. As the developers stated, this was "crucial for authenticity."

This special edition provides a smooth experience, letting players switch between the updated graphics and the original classic version instantly. This "scene-for-scene hot swap" feature allows purists to enjoy the game as they remember it, while new players can appreciate the enhanced presentation.
