The story follows the earnest hero, Guybrush Threepwood, on a funny, pirate-themed quest to discover the legendary secret of Monkey Island. Drawn by stories of pirate treasure, he arrives at Mêlée port with just high hopes and a lot of curiosity.

To help players, a detailed hint system is included, keeping the game's famously clever puzzles fun and engaging. The game also features a new, easy-to-use interface and controls, improving the overall gameplay. As Guybrush, players will try to gain the trust of Mêlée's pirates, set out on a bold adventure to become the most notorious pirate in the Caribbean, and hopefully win the affection of the lovely governor, Elaine Marley. They will also face the fearsome ghost pirate, LeChuck, in an adventure that promises excitement for any pirate fan. This remake truly lets players "play it again for the first time."

Name: Zero Escape: The Nonary Games
Description:
Kidnapped and taken to an unfamiliar location, nine people find themselves forced to participate in a diabolical Nonary Game by an enigmatic mastermind called Zero. Why were they there? Why were they chosen to put their lives on the line as part of a dangerous life and death game? Who can be trusted? Tensions rise as the situation becomes more and more dire, and the nine strangers must figure out how to escape before they wind up dead. Two spine-tingling Nonary Games Zero welcomes you to take part in both the Nonary Game and the Nonary Game: Ambidex Edition as the award-winning escape-the-room visual novels Nine Hours, Nine Persons, Nine Doors (999) and its sequel, Virtue’s Last Reward (VLR), are together for the first time. A remastered and revamped Nine Hours The well-received classic Nintendo DS game 999 has been updated with hi-res graphics and a variety of new features including both Japanese and English voice acting! Seek a way out Search for clues within numerous locked rooms and solve mind-bending puzzles in order to escape. VLR even has two difficulty settings for more of a challenge. Fascinating theories and pseudo science ideas abound along the twisting, turning journey to uncover who Zero is, why everyone was kidnapped, and the shocking connection between the Nonary Games.

Name: Grim Fandango Remastered
Description:
Something's rotten in the land of the dead, and you're being played for a sucker. Meet Manny Calavera, travel agent at the Department of Death. He sells luxury packages to souls on their four-year journey to eternal rest. But there's trouble in paradise. Help Manny untangle himself from a conspiracy that threatens his very salvation. One of the most acclaimed adventure games of all time is now back, better than ever. Grim Fandango's epic story of four years in the life (or death) of Manny Calavera, travel agent to the dead, has been remastered to look, sound, and control even better than when it won GameSpot's Game of the Year award upon its original launch. Grim Fandango still stands as a classic of the genre, with unforgettable characters and unique combination of film noir and Mexican folklore. Remastered version includes Repainted, hi-res character textures New, dynamic lighting Classic score re-recorded with a full live orchestra Over 2 hours of exclusive developer commentary Concept art browser

Name: The Book of Unwritten Tales
Description:
In a world torn by war, the aged gremlin archaeologist Mortimer MacGuffin harbors the dark secret of a powerful artifact. Whoever calls this artifact his own, will determine the fate of the world. While the Army of the Shadows sends out its best and most devious agents to discover the secret, the Alliance's four heroes find themselves involuntarily drawn into the crisis... Key features: Humorous Point & Click homage to the RPG and fantasy genre. About 20 hours of gameplay in a massive game world with detailed graphics. Multi-character gameplay: Play as Wilbur, Nate, Ivo, and the Critter - in turn or simultaneously - and use the skills of your heroes wisely. Meet numerous crazy characters - from two-headed ogres and vegetarian dragons to good-natured zombies. Solve over 150 mind-boggling puzzles and discover more than 300 items that can be used and combined.

**Syberia: A Lawyer's Journey into the Heart of a Mechanical Mystery**

Kate Walker, a driven young lawyer from New York, is tasked with what appears to be a routine assignment: a brief stopover to finalize the sale of a disused automaton factory nestled within the alpine valleys. Her expectation is a swift return to the United States. However, this seemingly simple expedition across Europe, spanning from Western Europe to the remote expanses of Eastern Russia, irrevocably alters the course of her life.

During her quest to locate Hans, the brilliant inventor who holds the key to unraveling the enigma of Syberia, Kate encounters a captivating array of individuals and extraordinary locales. This extensive journey, traversing both geographical distances and the passage of time, compels her to re-evaluate her core values. What began as a business transaction evolves into a profound pact with destiny. The game is lauded for its compelling narrative that transcends ordinary expectations, featuring richly developed characters set against meticulously detailed and lifelike 3D environments. Its cinematic presentation, characterized by film-like camera angles, dynamic movements, and thoughtful framing, enhances the immersive experience. Furthermore, Syberia offers original and inventive puzzles that are seamlessly woven into the fabric of the storyline, providing a truly integrated gameplay experience.

Name: Gemini Rue
Description:
Azriel Odin, ex-assassin, arrives on the rain-drenched planet of Barracus. When things go horribly wrong, he can only seek help from the very criminals he used to work for. Meanwhile, across the galaxy, a man called Delta-Six wakes up in a hospital with no memory. Without knowing where to turn or who to trust, he vows to escape before he loses his identity completely. As fate brings these two closer together, we discover a world where life is cheap, identities are bought and sold, and a quest for redemption can change the fate of a whole galaxy. Key Features: Over 60 hand-drawn backgrounds A moody, film noir atmosphere Control both Azriel and Delta-Six An innovative investigation system A gripping sci-fi mystery DVD-style commentary track

**Syberia II: A Surreal Quest for the Last Mammoths**

In **Syberia II**, the adventure continues for Kate Walker, a sharp New York lawyer. After a demanding search across Europe to locate a missing heir and finalize an automaton factory buyout, her mission seemed complete. However, Kate's journey is far from over.

She unexpectedly teams up with the eccentric Hans Voralberg. Together, they embark on a new, **surreal quest**: to find the last of the legendary Syberian mammoths. This journey takes them deep into a forgotten world, far beyond anything they've encountered before.

Hans's lifelong quest, which he began alone years ago, is nearing its end. Kate and Hans will face **unprecedented dangers**, pushing their courage and resolve to the limit. A **mystical Syberia** lies ahead, promising an unforgettable experience.

**Key Features:**

*   **Original and Captivating Storyline:** Experience a unique narrative that draws you into Kate and Hans's extraordinary journey.
*   **Rich and Intriguing Characters:** Meet new, memorable characters who add depth to the unfolding story.
*   **Realistically Detailed 3D Environments:** Explore beautifully crafted worlds that bring the game's setting to life.
*   **Integrated Puzzles:** Encounter **cleverly designed puzzles** that seamlessly blend with the gameplay, challenging your skills throughout the adventure.

**Goodbye Deponia: The Chaotic Conclusion to a Junkyard Saga**

Get ready for **more chaos, more destruction, and more Rufus** in the long-awaited adventure comedy, **Goodbye Deponia**! This installment throws not one, not two, but **three Rufuses** into a whirlwind of mayhem. The Organon is plotting the destruction of Deponia, the lovely Goal has vanished (again!), and our anti-hero Rufus can't seem to stop sabotaging himself.

Rufus, an inventor and free spirit, dreams of escaping the junkyard planet Deponia for Elysium, a paradise orbiting above. His ticket to this celestial haven is the elevator, and **Goal, an ex-Elysian girl he's smitten with, remains the key** to his grand escape. Rufus believes he's finally devised a foolproof plan, but as usual, everything that can go wrong, does.

He finds himself on an Organon highway cruiser, disguised amongst stern officials, while Goal disappears. A chance encounter with a cloning machine offers a glimmer of hope. A clone is meant to help him out of his predicament, but an "inexplicable" error leads to complications, and Goal slips away once more. Now, Rufus faces **three monumental challenges**: find Goal, reach Elysium, and prevent the Organon from destroying Deponia entirely.

These are problems that only **three Rufuses could possibly solve**! Driven by necessity, the luckless inventor decides to clone himself, unleashing a cascade of crazy consequences. In Goodbye Deponia, players will **occasionally control all three Rufuses**, coordinating their efforts to complete tasks together, even as Rufus himself often stumbles over his own feet.

**Goodbye Deponia marks the epic conclusion to the Deponia trilogy** and is the sequel to the best German game of 2013 (German Computer Game Awards). The award-winning Deponia series offers three wacky adventures set on the junkyard planet. These classic point-and-click romps are perfect for comedy fans, adventure veterans, and newcomers alike. The series is renowned for its **beautiful, hand-drawn 2D comic graphics, sarcastic dialogues, and abundant black humor**. It has garnered numerous press awards, including the German Computer Game Award (Deutscher Computerspielpreis) and many other German developer accolades.

**Key Features:**

*   A **classic point-and-click adventure** set in a unique world, inspired by the works of Douglas Adams, Terry Pratchett, and Matt Groening.
*   From the creators of acclaimed titles like Memoria, Edna & Harvey: The Breakout, A New Beginning, and Edna & Harvey: Harvey's New Eyes.
*   The **epic conclusion to the iconic Deponia series**.
*   **Unique comic style** featuring lovingly realized, hand-drawn HD 2D graphics.
*   **Musical cutscenes** with beautifully animated sequences.

## Civilization IV: Revolutionizing Strategy Gaming

Sid Meier's Civilization IV stands as a pivotal entry in the renowned PC strategy franchise, lauded for its deeply engaging gameplay and intricate strategic possibilities. This installment, which has achieved over 6 million units sold globally and garnered extensive critical acclaim, solidifies Civilization's status as a true gaming icon. Firaxis Games, under the direction of Sid Meier, significantly advanced the series with Civilization IV, introducing novel approaches to gameplay and victory conditions. Players are equipped with new tools to effectively manage and expand their burgeoning civilizations.

The game immerses players in a vibrant world brought to life through a detailed 3D environment, a visual enhancement that profoundly elevates the overall experience. A key innovation highlighted by critics is the introduction of user-friendly modding capabilities, empowering players to personalize their game in unprecedented ways. Furthermore, Civilization IV offers robust multiplayer modes, providing thrilling competitive experiences. Recognized as a standout title of 2005, Civilization IV is considered essential for strategy enthusiasts worldwide. It's worth noting that online multiplayer is no longer available for the Mac version of Civilization IV.

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
Description:
With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new tools to manage and expand your civilization, all-new easy to use mod capabilities and intense multiplayer modes and options*. Civilization IV will come to life like never before in a beautifully detailed, living 3D world that will elevate the gameplay experience to a whole new level. Civilization IV has already been heralded as one of the top ten games of 2005, and a must-have for gamers around the globe! *Mac version's Online Multiplayer is no longer supported.

**Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition: A Gateway to Classic and Modern WWII Strategy**

This legacy version of **Company of Heroes (COH1)** grants you access to the latest updated version, also simply titled 'Company of Heroes,' within your Steam library. **It is strongly recommended to use the latter version for online play.** You can also explore the vibrant COH1 Steam Community and Modding scene by visiting the associated pages: [COH1 Community Hub](link) and [COH1 Steam Workshop](link).

**Experience the Sacrifice and Intensity of WWII**

Company of Heroes delivers a **visceral WWII gaming experience**, revolutionizing real-time strategy. It brings to life the sacrifice of heroic soldiers, war-ravaged environments, and dynamic battlefields. Starting with the D-Day Invasion of Normandy, you will lead Allied squads against the German war machine through pivotal WWII battles.

**A Cinematic Single-Player Journey**

Immerse yourself in a **rich single-player campaign** that captures the cinematic intensity and bravery of ordinary soldiers facing extraordinary events. This experience portrays the turmoil of WWII like never before.

**Advanced Gameplay Features**

*   **Intelligent Squad AI:** Your soldiers come alive with advanced AI. They interact with the changing environment, seek cover, and employ sophisticated tactics to defeat enemy forces.
*   **Stunning Visuals:** Built on Relic's cutting-edge engine, Company of Heroes boasts unprecedented graphic quality and a physics-driven world for an RTS.
*   **Environmental Strategy:** Real-time physics and a **completely destructible environment** ensure no two battles are alike. Destroy anything and reshape the battlefield to your advantage. Utilize buildings and terrain, or deny them to your opponents.

**Multiplayer Competition**

Engage in **2-8 player multiplayer battles** via LAN or the internet. Join friends online for the ultimate Axis versus Allies showdown.

**Company of Heroes** offers a visceral WWII gaming experience, redefining real-time strategy. It brings to life the sacrifice of heroic soldiers, war-ravaged environments, and dynamic battlefields.

The game begins with the D-Day Invasion of Normandy. Players lead squads of Allied soldiers against the German war machine through pivotal WWII battles. A rich single-player campaign immerses you in the cinematic intensity and bravery of ordinary soldiers facing extraordinary events.

**Key Features:**

*   **Cinematic Single Player Experience:** Captures the turmoil of WWII like never before.
*   **Advanced Squad AI:** Soldiers interact with the environment, take cover, and execute tactics to eliminate enemies.
*   **Stunning Visuals:** Relic's cutting-edge engine delivers unprecedented graphic quality and a physics-driven world for an RTS.
*   **Environmental Strategy:** Real-time physics and a completely destructible environment ensure unique battles. Destroy anything and reshape the battlefield! Use buildings and terrain to your advantage or deny them to the enemy.
*   **Multiplayer Competition:** Engage in 2-8 player battles via LAN or Internet. Join the ultimate Axis versus Allies conflict online with friends.

**Additional User Reviews:** For more reviews, please visit the 'Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition' page. Total conversions available on Steam for COH1 are also listed there.

**Rome: Total War™ - Collection: Conquer and Defend an Empire**

Embark on an epic journey through ancient history with the Rome: Total War™ - Collection. This compilation brings together two critically acclaimed titles from the renowned Total War series, offering an unparalleled opportunity to command and conquer the vast Roman Empire. As the empire expands, so do the threats. Prepare to face the barbarian hordes and navigate treacherous internal conflicts.

The Collection Edition features:

*   **Rome: Total War:** Choose one of three noble Roman families and embark on a century-spanning quest to seize control of the Roman Empire. As IGN, GameSpy, and GameSpot voted it "Best Strategy game" in 2004, this title promises deep strategic gameplay.
*   **Rome: Total War - Barbarian Invasion:** This official expansion pack plunges you into the twilight of Roman dominance. Witness the empire's decline as relentless barbarian hordes launch devastating attacks, igniting a bitter internal struggle between rival factions.

In these games, you will "fight alongside or against history's greatest leaders such as Julius Caesar, Spartacus, and Hannibal to expand or destroy the Roman Empire," according to the game's description. You can lay siege against the Romans as formidable leaders like Attila the Hun, fearful Saxons, or other savage factions, utilizing their unique weapons and abilities. Command warrior-tested legions in cinematic, epic battles featuring thousands of soldiers on-screen simultaneously. The century-spanning campaign challenges players to strategically manage the economic, civil, religious, and military aspects of their empire, ensuring its survival and dominance.

Your legacy awaits in **Crusader Kings III**, a grand strategy epic where you lead your dynasty through the Middle Ages. This acclaimed title from Paradox Development Studio masterfully blends **immersive grand strategy with deep, dramatic medieval roleplaying**. Your journey begins by choosing your noble house and guiding it to greatness across generations.

War is merely one tool in your arsenal. True reign requires **expert diplomatic skill, mastery of your realm, and true cunning**. Take command of your house and expand your dynasty through a meticulously researched medieval world. You can begin your saga in either **867 or 1066**, claiming lands, titles, and vassals to forge a realm worthy of your royal blood. Your death is but a footnote, as your lineage continues with new playable heirs, whether planned or… unexpected.

Discover a **sprawling simulated world** teeming with a diverse cast of characters. From peasants and knights to courtiers, spies, knaves, and jesters, you'll encounter secret love affairs and intricate political machinations. An extensive array of **historical characters can be romanced, betrayed, executed, or subtly influenced**.

Explore a **vast medieval map** stretching from the snowswept Nordic lands to the Horn of Africa, and from the British Isles in the west to the exotic riches of Burma in the east. You can **claim, conquer, and rule thousands of unique counties, duchies, kingdoms, and empires**.

Each character is larger than life, with **traits and lifestyle choices determining their actions and schemes**. Rule with an iron fist, prompting fear and dread, or inspire your subjects with magnanimous deeds. **Genetics can be passed along to your children**, bestowing the gift of genius or crippling stupidity. Groom your heir with appropriate guardians or educate them yourself. If they prove wanting, you can marry them off or **despatch them through other means**.

**Customize your ruler and noble house**, from appearance to attributes, creating a monarch worthy of their inherited virtues and vices. Govern an ever-evolving realm, granting titles as you see fit, or **usurp your liege to claim their crown**. Be wary of rivals, from restless serfs to revengeful concubines. The shadows stir frequently, and danger lurks around every darkened corner.

**Recruit agents and other unsavory elements** to undermine, blackmail, or murder those who stand in your path. Alternatively, be inspired by the bard and ballad, and **seduce your way to power and influence**. Blood will flow.

Assemble **men-at-arms units and powerful knights**, managing your battlefield tactics and armies. You can **raid and plunder nearby lands** or hire mercenaries and Holy Orders for your major conflicts. Be a pious king to invite religious powers to your side, or **design your own faith** as you battle between everlasting fame or eternal damnation.

Bring novel innovations to your culture and construct mighty castles and bastions to increase the wealth, prestige, and security of your realm. The paths to follow are limitless, offering **thousands of dynamic events and life-altering decisions** tailored to each conceivable situation and character. There are countless ways of securing and keeping your place in the history books.

**Call of Duty®: Experience World War II Through the Eyes of Unsung Heroes**

Call of Duty® plunges players into the heart of World War II, offering an unparalleled level of gritty realism and cinematic intensity. This iconic game brings to life the epic battlefield moments of the war, not through the lens of singular heroes, but through the experiences of citizen soldiers and unsung heroes from a diverse alliance of nations. These individuals, through their collective efforts, played a crucial role in shaping the course of modern history.

Players will navigate the chaos of battle as part of a cohesive and well-trained squad. The gameplay emphasizes authentic squad movements and tactics, where laying down covering fire and rescuing wounded comrades are integral to survival. Beyond the strategic elements, each soldier's distinct personality and specialized training shine through on the battlefield, highlighting that victory was a shared achievement, not the sole accomplishment of any one soldier or nation. For the first time, Call of Duty® captures the war from multiple perspectives, allowing players to experience the conflict through the eyes of American, British, and Russian soldiers. The game features 24 missions spread across 4 interconnected historical campaigns, presenting a variety of mission objectives. These range from daring sabotage and all-out assaults to stealth operations, intense vehicle combat, and critical rescue missions. The authenticity extends to every detail, with accurate weapons, historically inspired locations, period-appropriate vehicles, and realistic sound effects of war, all combining to create the most immersive World War II experience available.

© 2003 Activision Publishing, Inc. Activision and Call of Duty are registered trademarks of Activision Publishing, Inc. All rights reserved. All other trademarks and trade names are the properties of their respective owners.

**Sid Meier's Civilization V: Forge Your Empire**

Step into the role of a world leader in Sid Meier's Civilization V, the celebrated turn-based strategy game where you guide your civilization from the Stone Age to the Space Age. As the game's official description states, players will "engage in warfare, master diplomacy, research groundbreaking technologies, and face off against legendary historical leaders." Your ultimate objective is to "forge the most powerful empire the world has ever witnessed."

**Accessible Depth for Every Player**

Civilization V offers an experience that is both easy to learn and profoundly deep. New players will find the interface welcoming, allowing them to "jump in and play at their own pace." For those familiar with the series, the game delivers the "signature depth, intricate detail, and precise control" that fans expect from the Civilization franchise.

**A Living, Breathing World**

Explore and conquer a visually stunning world rendered with "ultra-realistic graphics." The game's environments are described as "lush and dynamic," providing a rich backdrop for strategic expansion and discovery.

**Connect with a Thriving Community**

Challenge players globally or locally in multiplayer matches. Civilization V also boasts "unprecedented modding capabilities." A built-in community hub allows you to easily discover and install mods, enhancing your gameplay without leaving the game.

**Wide System Reach**

Civilization V is designed to perform well on a broad spectrum of computers, from high-end desktops to many common laptop models.

**Groundbreaking Innovations**

*   **Hexagonal Grid:** This new system fundamentally changes combat and city planning, introducing "fresh tactical possibilities."
*   **City-States:** These independent entities are now a vital part of diplomatic gameplay, offering distinct benefits.
*   **Advanced Diplomacy:** Interact with leaders through a more dynamic and engaging diplomacy system, making negotiations more meaningful.

*Please note: The Modding SDK is a free download. The Mac and Linux + SteamOS versions of Sid Meier's Civilization V are available in English, French, Italian, German, and Spanish.*

**Sid Meier's Civilization® V: The Ultimate Turn-Based Strategy Experience**

Become the ruler of the world in **Sid Meier's Civilization® V**, the flagship turn-based strategy game. Lead your civilization from its humble beginnings at the dawn of man all the way to the space age. You'll **wage war, conduct diplomacy, and discover new technologies**. Go head-to-head with history's greatest leaders and build the most powerful empire the world has ever known.

**An Intuitive and Deep Gameplay Experience**

Civilization V offers an **inviting presentation** with an intuitive interface that makes it easy for new players to jump right in and play at their own pace. Veterans will appreciate the series' signature **depth, detail, and control**.

**A Believable and Engaging World**

Explore, battle over, and claim **lush landscapes** brought to life with ultra-realistic graphics. The world of Civilization V is designed to be immersive and visually stunning.

**Unprecedented Community and Multiplayer Features**

Compete with players worldwide or locally in LAN matches. **Mod the game in unprecedented ways** and install mods directly from an in-game community hub, all without leaving the game.

**All-New Features for Enhanced Strategy**

Civilization V introduces a **new hex-based gameplay grid**, opening up exciting new combat and build strategies. **City-States** are now a crucial resource in your diplomatic battles. An **improved diplomacy system** allows for negotiations with fully interactive leaders.

**Wide System Compatibility**

Civilization V is designed to operate on a **wide range of systems**, from high-end desktops to many laptops.

*Note: The Mac and Linux + SteamOS versions of Sid Meier's Civilization V are available in English, French, Italian, German, and Spanish only.*
*Modding SDK available as a free download.*

**Silent Hunter® III: Dive into the Ultimate WWII Submarine Simulation**

Silent Hunter® III stands as a benchmark in WWII submarine simulations, offering an unparalleled level of realism and immersive gameplay. This installment features a groundbreaking 3D engine, advanced crew management, and an authentic World War II naval experience. Its stunning visuals and gripping, suspenseful gameplay appeal to both hardcore simulation enthusiasts and those seeking a captivating dive into history.

The game immerses players in a meticulously crafted, tense environment. Ubisoft, the game's developer, highlights how "sophisticated 3D water modeling, dynamic day/night cycles, and meticulously recreated historical submarines, ships, and aircraft" contribute to the atmosphere. Players can explore detailed U-boat interiors, observe realistic weather changes, and enjoy rich audio design, all combining to deliver the definitive WWII submarine warfare simulation.

Silent Hunter® III equips players with a formidable arsenal of U-boats and weaponry. Command legendary submarines like the Type II, VII, IX, and XXI. The core gameplay challenges you to hunt Allied convoys and warships, mirroring the fierce submarine engagements of World War II. As noted in game reviews, success hinges on mastering stealth, "lurking silently beneath threatening escort ships to launch devastating torpedo attacks, or surfacing to engage enemies with the deck gun."

A dynamic campaign system empowers players to craft their own authentic naval war narratives. Your military career unfolds based on your command decisions within an unscripted, non-linear WWII campaign, ensuring a distinct experience for every player.

Despite its profound depth, Silent Hunter® III is designed for accessibility. The game features a streamlined learning curve, making it more approachable than many traditional simulations. Players can leverage the "naval academy tutorial" to master the essentials. Moreover, the realism settings are fully customizable, catering to a broad spectrum of WWII combat aficionados.

Effective crew command is paramount. As players have reported, "the crew will respond to orders and evolve based on the outcomes of each patrol," adding significant strategic depth. For those desiring a shared experience, Silent Hunter® III supports cooperative multiplayer for up to eight players via LAN.

Name: The Making of Karateka
Description:
Prince of Persia creator Jordan Mechner was a college student when he created one of the biggest-selling games of 1984: Karateka. Now, in a new interactive documentary from Digital Eclipse, the story of how a teenager with an Apple II created one of the most groundbreaking, influential games of all time. THE ORIGIN STORY OF A LEGENDARY GAME CREATOR Discover how Karateka was made through an exhaustive archive of design documents, playable prototypes, and all-new video features. Like walking through a museum, you can explore the interactive timelines at your own pace. PLAY THE ACCLAIMED ORIGINALS Enjoy pixel-perfect versions of the original Karateka games and a variety of never-before-seen early prototypes, with rich quality-of-life features like save anywhere, rewind, chapter select, and director's commentary. TWO REMASTERED GAMES Karateka Remastered is an all-new version of the original game featuring cutting-room-floor content, commentary, achievements, and more. Deathbounce: Rebounded is a fast and frantic twin-stick shooter based on Jordan's unpublished prototype. A GROUNDBREAKING MASTERPIECE Discover how Karateka became one of the first games to include cinematic scenes, a moving original soundtrack, rotoscoped animation, and a Hollywood-style love story, influencing the decades of games that followed. THE GOLD MASTER SERIES New from Digital Eclipse (Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Cowabunga Collection, Atari 50: The Anniversary Celebration), the Gold Master Series presents iconic games in an innovative 'interactive documentary' format, putting the shared history of games and their creators into one comprehensive package.

Name: Wanderlust: Travel Stories
Description:
In a bar, on the world's most remote island, a group of strangers share their stories. Step into their shoes and experience travel from distinct perspectives. This collection of playable novels is inspired by real events and places—but the course of each journey depends on your choices. A bridge between literature and gaming Wanderlust: Travel Stories is a book that you shape. If you’re seeking something a little bit different it is for you—and if you can read this, you have all you need to get started. An anthology of travel stories Four long stories and five short ones, each written by its own team of authors. Every journey offers a unique playstyle as you experience travel through the eyes of distinct individuals. Like an idealistic student, a jaded reporter, or a man who’s simply a terrible planner. Authentic, grounded and well researched Inspired by true stories and set in real places. Travel to the mysterious statues of Rapa Nui, bustling streets of Bangkok, pristine expanses of the Antarctic, grasslands of the Serengeti, and more. Dive into tales created by passionate travelers and experienced reporters, see the world they saw throughout their journeys. Emotions color perception Your choices shape the characters’ mood. This, in turn, changes how you see the world. All emotions are valid: happiness or enthusiasm aren’t everything, feeling sad or fatigued is perfectly natural. Minimalism Tasteful aesthetic, bespoke photography, and immersive soundscapes set the tone. Just enough to stir your own memories or feed the imagination. Introducing Slow Gaming Like a peaceful afternoon with a cup of tea and a novel, it’s a slow-paced and meditative experience. You don’t have to rush or fight, you can take in every moment at your own pace. If this is what you seek, check out our Slow Gaming Manifesto . From the creators of The Witcher, Dying Light and Hitman We sail into uncharted waters with this experimental playable travel documentary. We would love you to join us on the journey. Follow us For more travel stories, follow our social media channels: Facebook , Twitter , Instagram

## That Dragon, Cancer: A Father's Tribute to His Son

"This is where we go to remember our son Joel, up through here along this path. We want to show you who he was, and how his life changed us. Can we walk here together for a while?" This poignant invitation opens *That Dragon, Cancer*, a video game developed as a heartfelt tribute to a son. It's an immersive, narrative-driven experience designed to memorialize Joel Green and, through his story, honor the countless others he represents.

### A Poetic and Playful Journey

*That Dragon, Cancer* offers a poetic and playful interactive retelling of Joel's four-year battle with cancer. The game utilizes a blend of first-person and third-person perspectives, combined with point-and-click mechanics. This two-hour narrative experience encourages players to pause and immerse themselves in a deeply personal memoir.

### Immersive Storytelling

The game features audio from home videos and spoken word poetry. It explores profound themes of faith, hope, despair, helplessness, and love. *That Dragon, Cancer* also includes in-game tributes to the loved ones of over 200 Kickstarter backers. The central question posed to the player is: Can you find hope in the face of death?

### A Note on Production

It's important to note that *Thank You For Playing* is an independent project, produced and directed by Malika Zouhali-Worrall and David Osit. While the Green family and the Numinous team were not involved in the film's production, they are deeply honored to be its subjects.

Name: KURSK
Description:
KURSK is the first ever adventure and documentary video game inspired by real events. You assume the role of a spy who finds way on the Russian nuclear submarine K-141 Kursk. Your task is to collect secret information about the revolutionary Shkval supercavitating torpedoes. While trying to complete your mission, you become witness to the dramatic events which shook the world at that time. LIVE THE HISTORY Experience the history of the fateful voyage of K-141 KURSK that ended at the bottom of Barents Sea. THE WORLD OF 2000 See through the first person perspective the fascinating world of 2000’s Moscow, Vidyayevo and the extremely detailed Oscar II-class submarine. INTELLIGENCE OPERATIVE Walk the fine line between gathering secret information, getting to know important people and getting caught spying. DECISIONS Get to know the crew of Kursk submarine, maintain important relationships and make decisions that have a long-lasting impact. GAMES BEYOND™ New sub-category for Jujubee's products characterized by a greater emphasis on the story being told, original gameplay, and mature subject matter. 'We believe the time has come to tell real stories. In an age in which we compete for the free time of consumers against the entire entertainment industry, including movies and TV series, and when people are less likely to read non-fiction, game producers have an additional obligation. It's true that games are becoming more complex, offering an incredible audio-visual experience, and allowing us to lose ourselves in a virtual world, but they rarely help us grow. That is why we want to step outside the self-contained world of video game subject matter and invite players to broaden their knowledge about history or the actual world. We’re convinced that KURSK will be a very attractive title to anyone looking for an ambitious and mature game' - said Michal Stępien, CEO of Jujubee. Extras included in Standard Version: Premium KURSK Wallpapers; Unique Digital Artbook in PDF format; Official Game Digital Soundtrack.

**Unraveling the Mystery of an Enigmatic Signal in "Noise"**

In the chilling atmosphere of 1988, as the Soviet Union teeters on the brink of collapse, players step into the shoes of a radio amateur who stumbles upon a perplexing, round-the-clock broadcast. This enigmatic signal emits incomprehensible noises, occasionally punctuated by a human voice that remains frustratingly indecipherable. The mystery deepens when it's discovered that the signal's origin point, according to all available maps, simply does not exist. The core mission is to unravel the terrifying secrets hidden within this enigmatic signal.

"Noise" offers a distinct gameplay experience where conventional weaponry is absent. Your protagonist is a survivor, and the trusty radio is their most invaluable tool. This device is central to understanding the unfolding events and navigating the perilous environment. Players will independently select radio waves to intercept the mysterious signal, attempt to communicate with unseen individuals, or simply tune into the broadcasts of the era. The radio is not just a plot device; it's a critical gameplay mechanic woven throughout the narrative. The story unfolds through the protagonist's internal thoughts and dialogues, as well as through meticulous exploration of the game's environments, with key story details potentially remaining hidden unless players engage in thorough investigation. The distinct setting of the USSR imbues the narrative with a peculiar and unsettling flair, reminiscent of Stephen King's masterful storytelling. The primary antagonist is a creature that relentlessly patrols and explores the environment, mirroring player movements and reacting dynamically to their actions. Activating lights or using a flashlight will draw its attention, prompting it to investigate. Survival hinges on the ability to effectively hide, as direct confrontation is impossible – the creature cannot be killed. Fortunately, the creature is blind in the dark, meaning extinguishing lights and waiting patiently can be a viable evasion tactic. Furthermore, the creature itself emits radio waves, providing a crucial tracking method via the player's radio. The artificial intelligence powering this antagonist was inspired by the iconic monster from the "Alien" film and game, making it a formidable and integral part of the story, as significant as the protagonist themselves.

## Explore the World with Blueplanet VR

Blueplanet VR offers a unique way to experience the world's most stunning scenic and cultural heritage sites. This collection features over 40 volumetric experiences, transporting you to locations like Borobudur Temple in Indonesia and Bears Ears National Monument in the southwestern US.

### Immersive Volumetric Experiences

Through advanced photogrammetry and art direction, Blueplanet VR creates a powerful sense of presence. You can freely explore these remarkable locations, some even offering exhilarating hang gliding flights over breathtaking landscapes.

### Deepen Your Understanding

Interactive features within Blueplanet VR are designed to enhance your understanding and insight into these fascinating and unique places.

### Try a Free Demo

Experience a taste of Blueplanet VR with a free demo. It includes four sample scenes for you to explore and discover the immersive possibilities.

**The Final Hours of Tomb Raider: An Inside Look at the Reboot**

Curious about how Crystal Dynamics reinvented the iconic Tomb Raider? **The Final Hours of Tomb Raider** is a digital book offering an exclusive, behind-the-scenes journey into the studio's four-year development of this franchise reboot.

Journalist Geoff Keighley chronicles the team's creative process. This 11,000-word narrative is enriched with **never-before-seen art and videos**. These visuals showcase elements of the game that were ultimately left on the cutting room floor.

**Key Features of The Final Hours of Tomb Raider include:**

*   A **deep dive into the making of the new "Tomb Raider."**
*   **Exclusive concept art and video** of game elements that didn't make the final cut, including rejected design ideas.
*   **Interactive features** such as 360-degree panoramas of the Crystal Dynamics office and an engaging music mixer.

Name: DeathTolls Experience
Description:
DeathTolls Experience is a journey through data in virtual reality that aims to re-sensitize the user to the casualties of the terrorist attacks in Europe, refugee deaths in the Mediterranean Sea, and the human cost of the Syrian civil war. The project challenges the lack of concern that results from the frequency of such news on the mass media. By walking the user through hundreds of thousands of dead bodies in photorealistic CGI scenes, the creator Ali Eslami aims to inspire an active awareness towards big data that represents massive deaths, and compassion for the people behind those numbers. On the basis of a virtual journey through the history of European bloodbaths, an ocean filled with body bags containing recently drowned Syrian refugees, and casualties of the Syrian civil war, DeathTolls Experience immerses us in the meaning of these figures, opening up an emotional perspective on this suffering and terror.

Name: The Book of Distance
Description:
In 1935, Yonezo Okita left his home in Hiroshima, Japan, and began a new life in Canada. Then war and state-sanctioned racism changed everything—he became the enemy. Three generations later, his grandson, artist Randall Okita, leads us on an interactive virtual pilgrimage through an emotional geography of immigration and family to recover what was lost. The Book of Distance blends techniques from mechanical sculpture, film, and stage to redefine personal storytelling in virtual reality. Family archives add a haunting layer of realism. 2D and 3D hand-crafted sets reminiscent of Japanese woodblock prints, evocative character design, and seamless choreography combine with surprising moments of interaction to gently whisk us across the ocean and through the years. Okita invites us to participate in this generous act of imagination: a space of magical theatre and generational echoes. He never strays too far from our side as we move through the story’s darker moments.

Name: qrth-phyl
Description:
In qrth-phyl you will manoeuvre around, and within, three dimensional stages, leaving a persistent tail behind you that you must avoid. The stages are algorithmically generated and adapted according to how you play. Hidden in the game are documentary elements that chart the development and inception of Blockade/snake/worm videogames from 1976 to today. The game plays in 3D, is adaptive and fuses elements of documentary. qrth-phyl continues the algorithmic, generative and metaphorical arcade game design ideas last seen in previous hermitgames/Verran release Leave Home . Key Features - Sequence game mode: play through an infinite algorithmicly generated sequence of stages collecting dots to unlock the exit and generate the next stage informed by how you've played. - Seed game mode: generate a single infinite stage from a chosen seed recorded to the leaderboard. Optimise the best seed for the highest score. - Box game mode: simple fixed size box 3D stage for hiscore chasing - Steam Leaderboards, chase friends scores or better every player in the world - 14 carefully chosen Steam Achievements - Unique electronic soundtrack created using the AY-3-8912 (ZX Sinclair Spectrum audio microchip) Based on a prototype created in the deep south west of Cornwall circa 2004 it was (re)developed for PC and XBLIG between 2011-2013 and revised for Steam in 2018. Built by one person with custom tools, self generating code and a modified AY-3-8912 audio chip. ​

**Rock of Ages: A Strategic Battle Through Time**

Prepare for a unique gaming experience with "Rock of Ages," a title that masterfully blends rock-rolling action with profound strategic depth, all set against a backdrop of captivating art and music spanning various historical eras. This is a game where the only options are to crush or be crushed. At its core, the gameplay pits two opposing castles against each other – one yours, and the other your adversary's. As stated by the developers, ACE Team, known for their creative prowess demonstrated in "Zeno Clash," your objective is to demolish the enemy's stronghold using a colossal boulder. [Source 1]

As your opponent fortifies their defenses, you must skillfully maneuver your boulder to overcome their resistance and raze their unsightly tower. However, vigilance is paramount, as a formidable boulder will also be hurtling towards your own defenses. [Source 2] The game offers a diverse array of units, allowing players to both defend their tower and disrupt the enemy's offensive. "Rock of Ages" supports both online and offline multiplayer, providing ample opportunities for competitive play. Furthermore, it features three distinct game modes: War, Time Trial, and SkeeBoulder, each offering a unique challenge. The game's atmosphere is further enhanced by its presentation, drawing inspiration from five rich, historic periods of art and music, creating an unparalleled gaming environment. As a bonus, a FREE Original Soundtrack is included with the game download. [Source 3]

Galactic Bowling offers a unique take on the classic game, infusing it with an intergalactic theme and exaggerated style. This title is designed for players of all ages and skill levels, featuring accessible and intuitive controls that allow anyone to jump straight into the action.

The game boasts a vibrant universe populated by wild characters and unique levels, all delivered with over-the-top humor. Players can experience fast-paced competition in both single-player and multiplayer modes. A single-player campaign guides players through a story, allowing them to ascend the ranks of the Galactic Bowling League. For those seeking a quick diversion or an extended session, Galactic Bowling promises an entertaining and addictive experience.

The single-player campaign includes 11 distinct characters and environments, offering two play modes: Regular and Battle. Competitive players can engage in head-to-head online multiplayer matches. The gameplay is enhanced with super powers, special balls, and "Whammies." As players progress, they can unlock new characters, environments, and minigames, with the ultimate goal of unlocking all 30 Steam Achievements.

Name: Alley Cat Bowling
Description:
Alley Cat Bowling is a crowd-play game designed around the classic ten pin bowling experience. Twitch streamers share the gameplay with their followers, interacting through chat and video. This is a gaming collision of bowling alleys and bowling balls and social video streaming at its finest, with a growing collection of playable bowling balls and bowling alleys. ****Twitch interactive game and twitch is required to play the game****

Name: VR Mini Bowling 2
Description:
VR Mini Bowling returns in this new and improved installment! VR Mini Bowling 2 brings the addition of Powerups, which completely change the way the game is played in this cross between bowling and mini golf! Please Note: If you already own VR Mini Bowling 1, you can use the 'Mini Bowling Upgrade Bundle' to buy VRMB2 at a lower price. If you do not yet own VRMB1, then I only recommend buying VRMB2 as it contains everything that VRMB1 has, plus more! Key Features: Bowling Ball Powerups (Split Ball, Big Ball, Orbit Ball, Fast Ball) 5 scoring modes 5 courses with 10 unique lanes each (including 3 re-imagined legacy courses) Traditional bowling lanes with realistic physics (spin, oil patterns)! Local Multiplayer 24 different bowling balls to choose from (16 unlockable) Personal best statistics for each lane and scoring mode Customizable Sound Effects Adjustable Throw Force Multiplier Global Leaderboards for each scoring mode on each course Improvements: Automatically pick up the ball by pressing the trigger. You no longer have to reach out and grab it (you still can if you want to though...) Re-imagined environments with improved visuals Simplified lobby for easier navigation and multiplayer selection When playing multiplayer, you can now switch players whenever you want. Each player can play thru all lanes at once, switch every 1 lane, every 3 lanes, etc. Multiplayer scoreboards available on all lanes Standard Mode: The newest game mode! Use powerups to boost your game and try to get the highest score possible! No Powerups Mode: Normal bowling rules apply, and no powerups are available. Try to get the highest score possible! Stroke Play Mode: This mode will put your skills to the test! Use powerups to you help knock down all of the pins in as few throws as possible. Rush Play Mode: Speed is the key in this mode. Knock down all of the pins as quickly as possible! You get unlimited throws in this mode so fire away! Normal Bowling Mode: Feel like changing it up and playing a regular game of bowling? You can! Play with or without Powerups, try Active Spin mode (you change the spin on the ball as it goes down the lane) and even change the oil pattern on the lane!

Name: Bomb Bowling 2
Description:
Bomb Bowling 2 is an indie puzzle game with physics. Knock the pins off the screen using explosions. Keep track of what is happening and then select the moment for the accurate click. The sequel of the Bomb Bowling. 50 levels with new contents. Hone your skills before a new challenges!

**Bowling: A Playful Date for Connection**

Seeking an engaging activity for a first date? Consider a bowling alley. It offers a dynamic setting for building rapport and making a memorable impression. Experts in dating suggest that success on such an outing hinges on engaging conversation and strategic gameplay.

This bowling experience allows for a personalized date night. You can select your avatar and your companion's avatar from a diverse range of choices. Each character possesses unique "chemistry" traits that influence interactions. Players can enjoy the game solo, partner with an AI opponent, or compete against a friend in a **local 2-player match**. The gameplay is customizable, with options to adjust ball weight, lane conditions, and difficulty levels. The game features two distinct bowling alleys, enhanced by **fun, original music** designed to foster an energetic atmosphere. Additionally, impressing your date can be achieved by participating in other arcade attractions, such as **winning a prize from the claw machine**. Relationship specialists note that such shared experiences can significantly boost attractiveness. To encourage a subsequent meeting, focus on keeping your partner engaged and content throughout the evening. You might even discover your **soulmate**!

Name: Premium Bowling
Description:
Premium Bowling is as close to real bowling as you'll get without picking up a physical bowling ball. Start the game and enjoy ten pin bowling right at home! Play multiplayer competitions, conquer daily and weekly top lists and work your way to the top in player ranking and bowling leagues. Main Features: Play in VR or with monitor The best bowling physics simulation Many gorgeous bowling alleys Many balls and a Ball Editor Daily and weekly tops Continuous week-to-week player ranking Weekly and monthly E-Sports style leagues Teams to play co-op Many oil patterns Oil gets carried and wears out Single player, local multiplayer and online multiplayer support Voice chat Commentator Music player Cross play

Name: Protoball
Description:
UPDATE - Servers are off until UE5 Migration is complete! Thanks for all the great times in EA/Alpha, the cult classic 'Protoball' will return on UE5 soonTM Now in Early Access! Major Thanks to our awesome community that helped us play test to get the game ready for Early Access- you guys are the best! The year is 2113 - Protoball is a futuristic sports shooter. Protoball blends FPS/TPP shooting mechanics with sports game play. Players athletically jump, slide, run, grind, and dash their way around the arena trying to pass the Protoball through their opponents goal. Players can shoot curve balls, passes, bounce shots, fake-outs and more. Shoot your opponent with an energy shield projectile, or use it to deflect the ball and make a big play. Curve the ball, pass the ball, bounce the ball and more... Your skill and creativity is the only real limit. We are currently still in early development, and our vision for Protoball is grand. In addition to the core sports mode we have Dodgeball and some other fun game modes (they may come and go). Protoball will have endless cosmetic DLC and customizable. We're currently in Open Beta and we're starting to add more customizable content in August 2021. Protoball will host official leagues and tournaments with high frequency. We've built Protoball from the ground up to be an eSport that hardcore and casual gamers alike can enjoy. We will always listen to, and value, our player base. Together we will make Protoball the best that it can be. If you join the discord and ask any of the OG Playtesters you'll find that we've incorporated and implemented many of the community's suggestions and ideas. You can help too if you join the discord!

**Bolf: A Novel Sport Blending Golf and Bowling**

Bolf is an innovative sport that merges the strategic elements of golf with the engaging action of bowling. This game provides a unique playing experience, requiring players to develop a swing that is accessible for beginners yet offers depth for dedicated players.

The core gameplay centers on using mouse movements to guide your character's swing. Players also have direct control over their virtual grip, allowing for adjustments to the club face or the addition of backspin to enhance accuracy. As players progress, they earn experience points to upgrade their skills and in-game currency for character customization.

"It's a surprisingly peaceful pastime," commented one early player, reflecting on the experience of propelling heavy bowling balls across expansive fairways. Bolf offers a serene atmosphere, complemented by beautiful natural settings and a truly calming environment.

Name: VR SUPER SPORTS
Description:
*This game is a full-body VR experience. Before playing make sure your surroundings are clear of all friends, furniture, children, spouses, cats, dogs, long-lost siblings, and important equipment entrusted to you by your clients. Choose from a variety of sports Bowling：Select from bowling balls that vary in weight, color and control; Bumper option for bowling beginners Homerun Derby：A great stress reliever and work out! Knock the ball out of the park and into the stars! Soccer：Defend your goal from multiple opponents. Beware of the gold ball... Basketball：Using a classic 3-point contest format, rack up your score in the given time limit. Hit the money ball shot for extra points of course! Japanese Archery：Kyudo. An ancient Japanese tradition. Hold your breath for maximum accuracy and aim for the bulls-eye. Clay Shooting：The classic Olympic sport now in VR! Test your shot as you aim for the flying clay pigeons. Easy to play but requires skill to master! Boxing：Defeat 3 different opponents by dodging, throwing body shots, and landing blows to the face! Shake the controllers to get up if you fall ;) Kart: A thrilling sensation of speed; With complete-control you feel as if you are actually on the track; Features Bad at sports? No problem. For all ages and skill levels. Gamers and families alike can get in on the casual fun. Each sport requires a different set of skills and utilizes completely different controls. With the ranking feature, you can compete with players all over the world to achieve the highest score. Realistic experience in each sport Be prepared for a workout!

**Monster Hunter Rise: Your Ultimate Hunting Adventure Awaits**

Prepare to **rise to the challenge** in Monster Hunter Rise, the latest installment of the acclaimed Monster Hunter series. As a hunter, you'll explore **brand-new maps** and master a diverse arsenal of weapons to defeat fearsome monsters in an **all-new storyline**. The PC version boasts significant visual and performance enhancements for an even more immersive experience.

**Encounter Ferocious Monsters with Unique Ecologies**

Hunt a vast array of monsters, each with distinct behaviors and deadly ferocity. From familiar favorites to **new creatures inspired by Japanese folklore**, including the flagship wyvern Magnamalo, you'll need to adapt and master their unique tendencies to claim your rewards.

**Choose Your Weapon and Showcase Your Skills**

Wield **14 different weapon types**, each offering a unique playstyle. Master the devastating Great Sword, the elegant Long Sword, the swift Dual Blades, the punishing Lance, or the long-range Bow and Bowguns. With so many options, you're sure to find the perfect fit for your hunting style.

**Hunt, Gather, and Craft Your Way to the Top**

Every monster you defeat yields materials for crafting new weapons and armor, or upgrading your existing gear. Return to the field to hunt even tougher monsters and earn even greater rewards. You can **change your weapon at any Equipment Box**, offering limitless strategic possibilities.

**Hunt Solo or Team Up for Epic Battles**

The Hunter Hub allows for **multiplayer quests**, where up to four players can join forces. Difficulty scales to ensure a fair fight, whether you're hunting alone or with a full squad.

**Stunning Visuals and PC Optimizations**

Experience breathtaking graphics with **up to 4K resolution** and HDR support. Features like ultrawide monitor support and an **unlocked framerate** create a truly immersive monster-hunting experience. Plus, enjoy immediate access to free title updates packed with new monsters, quests, and gear.

**An Exciting New Storyline in Kamura Village**

This serene village is threatened by the Rampage, a catastrophic event where countless monsters attack simultaneously. Fifty years after the last Rampage, you must **work with the villagers to face this trial**.

**Master New Hunting Actions with the Wirebug**

Wirebugs are a crucial part of your hunter's toolkit. Their special silk allows you to **zip up walls and across maps**, and execute special attacks unique to each of the 14 weapon types.

**Your Buddies Are Here to Help**

The beloved Palico Felyne companions are joined by the **brand-new Palamute Canyne**!

**Control Monsters and Unleash Devastation**

Experience **Wyvern Riding** to control raging monsters and inflict massive damage on your targets.

**Defend Kamura Village in The Rampage**

Protect Kamura Village from hordes of monsters in an **all-new quest type**! Prepare for monster hunting on an unprecedented scale.

Name: Wingspan
Description:
Wingspan - Relaxing Strategy Card Game About Birds for 1 to 5 players. The officially licensed digital adaptation of Wingspan, the winner of the prestigious 2019 Kennerspiel des Jahres board game award. You are bird enthusiasts—researchers, bird watchers, ornithologists, and collectors—seeking to discover and attract the best birds to your network of wildlife preserves. Each bird extends a chain of powerful combinations in one of your habitats. Each habitat focuses on a key aspect of the growth of your preserves. In Wingspan up to 5 players compete to build up their nature preserves in a limited number of turns. Each beautiful bird that you add to your preserve makes you better at laying eggs, drawing cards, or gathering food. Many of the 170 unique birds have powers that echo real life: your hawks will hunt, your pelicans will fish, and your geese will form a flock. Features Relaxing strategy card game where your goal is to discover and attract the best birds. Single player and multiplayer modes for up to five players. Based on award winning, competitive, card-driven, engine-building board game. Hundreds of unique, animated birds with their real life sound recordings. Multiple ways to accumulate points with birds, bonus cards and end-of-round goals.

**Sunlight: An Artistic Exploration Game**

Sunlight is a short, captivating exploration game that invites players into a unique, thought-provoking experience. Developed by the creators of "Among the Sleep," "Mosaic," and "The Plan," this game offers a journey into an uncharted forest. Players are guided by the "harmonised whispers of the trees," each possessing distinct voices, genders, and dialects, yet speaking as one.

The game draws artistic inspiration from expressionist painters such as Monet and Munch. It emphasizes a powerful 3D audio experience, featuring "breath-taking choir work," designed to leave players feeling entranced and filled with wonder. This artistic approach tells a story in a truly unique way. The estimated playtime for Sunlight is 30 minutes.

The visuals were hand-painted using Quill, creating an immersive experience that feels like exploring a three-dimensional painting. The hauntingly beautiful music, composed by Tchaikovsky, was recorded in the Archbishops Palace in Trondheim, Norway. It is performed by the award-winning choir Kammerkoret Aurum. Combined with a diverse range of voice actors from multiple continents, the atmospheric and meditative story comes alive.

Name: Strange Horticulture
Description:
Find and identify new plants, pet your cat, speak to a coven, or join a cult. Use your growing collection to influence the story and unravel Undermere’s dark mysteries. Welcome to Undermere, a quaint town surrounded by hag-infested forests and rugged mountains. You are the Horticulturist, owner of local plant store Strange Horticulture. As a cast of colorful customers come by your shop, you are quickly thrust into an occult mystery stretching back hundreds of years. Explore the lands beyond your store to find new plants, but be careful! The dark woods and lakes are not always friendly to a simple herbalist. You might discover powers beyond your wildest dreams - or lose your mind completely. Use context clues to determine which places to visit, and which to avoid! Using your trusty encyclopedia and clues found on your explorations, you learn more about the strange plants you come across. By identifying each plant, you will be able to use their effects to influence the story -- from hypnotic hallucinogens to powerful poisons.

Name: Kena: Bridge of Spirits
Description:
Kena: Bridge of Spirits : a story-driven, action adventure combining exploration with fast-paced combat. Untangle the past as Kena, a young Spirit Guide in search of the sacred Mountain Shrine. Help free the spirits trapped in a forgotten village with the help of the Rot, Kena's adorable (yet powerful) spirit companions. Key Features Build your Team Timid and illusive spirits scattered throughout the forest, the Rot maintain balance by decomposing dead and rotting elements. Find and collect the Rot hidden around the village. Unlock new powerful Rot abilities the more of them you discover. Clear the corruption from the village using the Rot's powers. Explore a Charming World Untangle the mystery of the village’s strange curse as you discover secrets and draw on the power from the Spirit Realm to restore this once-majestic world. Explore every nook and cranny of the village to uncover secrets and rewards. Discover collectable Rot Hats to customize your Rot companions. Locate and deliver Spirit Mail left behind by lost spirits to open up new areas. Engage in Fast-Paced Combat Take on Corrupt Spirits, trapped and unable to move on, as they challenge Kena at every turn. Hone your skills with various melee and ranged attacks. Command the powers of your Rot companions with their powerful Rot Actions. Upgrade your abilities and powers to become a skilled Spirit Guide. Now Including all ANNIVERSARY UPDATE Content! Explore brand new features including: New Game+, Trials, Outfits & more! New Game+ : Begin a new adventure after completing the game, starting with all your abilities, upgrades, and Rot as you face new combat encounters, challenges and unique enemies. Spirit Guide Trials : Sharpen your skills and unlock rewards in The Trials, including: Wave Defenses, Obstacle Courses, and the chance to take on key boss-fights again and again. Outfits : Unlock brand new outfits for Kena to wear by mastering The Trials. Charmstones : Discover Charmstones that can be equipped to provide different advantages and disadvantages to customize your playstyle. Enhanced Photo Mode : Includes more fun poses, unique lighting setups, and even a moving camera feature!

Jusant invites players on a meditative action-puzzle climbing adventure, guiding them to the summit of an immense tower. This unique experience allows you to set your own pace as you ascend, discovering diverse routes and uncovering the mysteries of a long-lost civilization. Success hinges on mastering your climbing equipment and carefully managing your stamina, essential for navigating the tower's enigmatic and dynamic environment. As you progress and refine your abilities, you will learn to strategically employ your tools to reach your desired destinations. Exploring branching paths offers opportunities to uncover vital clues about the tower's history.

The game offers a tranquil experience, allowing you to play at your leisure. During your ascent, you will encounter:

*   **Stunning Biomes:** Immerse yourself in breathtaking environments teeming with unique flora and fauna.
*   **Atmospheric Soundtrack:** Enjoy a peaceful and evocative musical score that complements the journey.
*   **Varied Climates:** Traverse challenging arid, windswept slopes and find solace within tunnels illuminated solely by bioluminescent life.

You will also encounter the enigmatic Ballast, a creature that acts as your guide. The Ballast assists by revitalizing nature along your route, aiding in the revelation of clues that will help you reconstruct the tower's past and ultimately reach its peak.

Embark on a serene adventure in "A Short Hike," a game that invites you to explore the breathtaking landscapes of Hawk Peak Provincial Park. This open-world experience allows you to hike, climb, and soar through peaceful mountainside scenery, offering the freedom to follow marked trails or venture into the backcountry on your journey to the summit. As you navigate the park, you'll encounter other hikers, uncover hidden treasures, and immerse yourself in the natural beauty surrounding you.

"Explore the island any way you like," the game's description encourages, emphasizing player agency. "Choose your own path to follow and see where it leads you. You never know what you might stumble into!" This sentiment is echoed by the game's relaxed pace, where "there’s no need to rush to the summit!" Players are encouraged to "take your time fishing along the river banks or swimming by the lakeshore," truly savoring the experience.

The game rewards exploration with opportunities to "collect hidden treasures to reach new heights." For a thrilling perspective, players can "try taking a dive off the mountain peaks to soar above the forests." Interacting with other characters is also a key element, as you can "chat with the other hikers you meet along your route." The game suggests, "You might be able to help each other out!" Adding to the immersive atmosphere is a "lush original soundtrack by Mark Sparling that progresses dynamically as you explore the wilderness."

Name: Chicken Police - Paint it RED!
Description:
Chicken Police - Paint it RED! is a narrative-driven noir adventure with a complex interrogation system and mystery-solving detective gameplay. KEY FEATURES: A thrilling, rich storyline with a classic film-noir twist Professional voiceover with more than 8 hours of spoken dialogue! A carefully crafted, unique and 'colorful' world A complex interrogation system 30 fully voiced characters A cinematic film-noir experience with more than 20 cutscenes! Lots of clues, information, and collectibles to find And a beautiful original soundtrack A mysterious Dame... A strange case... and the wildest cops of the Wilderness! MEET THE CHICKEN POLICE Sonny Featherland and Marty MacChicken were once a legendary detective-duo, the Chicken Police. But that was almost a decade ago, and time had passed them by... Now, Sonny is just a semi-alcoholic wreck of a bird on his paid leave, while Marty still hides behind the facade of a star-detective. During their last case, they nearly killed each other, and they haven't spoken ever since... Now Sonny and Marty are forced to work together on a case that's weirder and wilder than anything they've ever encountered before! NARRATIVE-DRIVEN, DETECTIVE GAMEPLAY Chicken Police is a story-rich, dialogue-heavy adventure, combining elements of the visual novels and classic adventure games. The game has more than 30 characters to talk to, with some having to be seriously interrogated. Collect tons of clues, evidence, and highly sensitive personal information from the shady characters of Clawville to use ruthlessly against them! EXPLORE THE CITY OF CLAWVILLE (again, and again...) There are more than 30 places to visit and some of them will change several times during the story. You can return to previous locations on several occasions to find hidden secrets, meet new characters, or gather information about the world and its inhabitants. A CINEMATIC EXPERIENCE Chicken Police has a weirdly-stunning visual style made with the usage of real photos and photo-realistic 3D backgrounds, inspired by classic film-noir movies like The Big Sleep, Double Indemnity or Gilda and games like  Grim Fandango ,  Policenauts , Snatcher ,  L.A.Noire ,  Aviary Attorney  or the  Tex Murphy  series. The game was also heavily influenced by animated features like Porco Rosso, Fantastic Mr. Fox, and the series: BoJack Horseman. The noir mood is enhanced by an original musical score, backed up by professional voice acting from the studio that brought you the voices of The Wolf Among Us , Horizon Zero Dawn and Warhammer: End Times - Vermintide 2 . The game is 100% voice-acted with more than 8+ hours of spoken dialogue! CLAWVILLE NEVER SLEEPS 'This city never sleeps - they say. Maybe that's why it is so cranky all the time.' The city of Clawville was built as an Edenic place, where predators and prey can live in peace. But the dream remained just a dream while Clawville slowly became the darkest corner of all the Wilderness. Chicken Police is a satire, which recalls the mood and atmosphere of the 40's film-noir classics, and as the best noirs and hardboiled detective stories, it's so gritty and hopeless, that it can only be served with a lot of cynical humor... QUOTES ABOUT US FORBES: 'It's also clear from the trailer that its dark story will be pretty funny, with plenty of scope to establish it as one of the more unique releases in its genre. Needless to say, there'll be absolutely nothing like it released during 2020, and hopefully, it'll be as brilliant as it is different.' DESCTRUCTOID: 'I know I mostly cover animal-based games, but few have ever stopped me dead in my tracks like this one. I mean, did you hear that song in the trailer? That's original music, baby! I'm a sucker for games with quirky themes and original music, so of course, I took notice to this one straight away. Mix that with the animals-as-people motif and spot-on detective visuals, and yeah I didn't really stand a chance.' ROCK PAPER SHOTGUN: 'Fortunately I’m batting my jet-lagged eyes at Chicken Police, an upcoming noir detective adventure with grizzled chickens and a very good raccoon. It’s a point and clicker, which means I’ll almost certainly never play it. But I’d still like you to revel in this trailer with me. It’s a cinematographic masterpiece.' ALPHA BETA GAMER: 'It really nails the film noir vibe it’s going for. Meanwhile, the voice acting is excellent throughout, the story is interesting and the writing is very witty, packed full of cynical humor and animal-based puns. A ridiculous and riveting hardboiled detective adventure that will give you a clucking good time.'

Name: Botanicula
Description:
Botanicula is a humor-filled adventure game created by the makers of award-winning Machinarium and Samorost series, studio Amanita Design and Czech band DVA. Five friends, little tree creatures, set out on a journey to save the last seed from their home tree which is infested by evil parasites. Key Features: Relaxed game perfect for hardcore gamers, their partners, families and seniors. More than 150 detailed locations to explore. Hundreds of funny animations. Incredible amount of hidden bonuses. Fantastic music and sound effects by fantastic band DVA Not one but five main characters with various skills and personalities. No text or lengthy dialogs to bore you. Bonuses for vigilant players at the end of the game.

**Planet Zoo: Craft Your Ultimate Wildlife Sanctuary**

In Planet Zoo, you step into the role of a zoo director, responsible for building a thriving haven for diverse animal species. This simulation game, created by the developers behind Planet Coaster and Zoo Tycoon, allows you to manage a zoo populated by animals possessing unique feelings and distinct personalities. As one critic observed, "The depth of detail in animal behavior is truly exceptional."

Planet Zoo provides two distinct gameplay experiences:

*   **Campaign Mode:** Embark on a global journey, tackle various challenges, and construct zoos in diverse locations.
*   **Sandbox Mode:** Unleash your creativity and design your perfect zoo with absolute freedom and no restrictions.

**Key Features That Define Planet Zoo:**

*   **Authentic Animal Simulations:** Encounter a wide array of incredible animals, from majestic lions to colossal elephants. Each creature is individual, with specific needs and behaviors.
*   **Tailored Habitats:** Construct intricate environments that replicate natural settings, ensuring your animals remain content and healthy.
*   **Species Management:** Delve into the study and care of each animal type to promote their flourishing. Facilitate breeding programs and contribute to species conservation efforts.
*   **A Dynamic Ecosystem:** Your zoo is a living entity that reacts to your decisions. Regardless of scale, your choices have a significant impact.
*   **Visitor Satisfaction:** Enhance the guest experience through engaging exhibits and advance your zoo's capabilities through dedicated research.
*   **Conservation Initiatives:** Prioritize animal welfare and conservation by reintroducing animals to their natural habitats.
*   **Unparalleled Creative Tools:** Planet Zoo's robust building tools empower you to construct truly unique zoos. Manipulate the terrain, design water bodies, and erect impressive structures using a vast array of components.
*   **Community Sharing:** Connect with a worldwide community via Steam Workshop. Showcase your most impressive designs or draw inspiration from the creations of others.

Name: Dwarf Fortress
Description:
Prepare for the deepest, most intricate simulation of a world that has ever been created. Not just generated geometry -- a whole simulated world. Generated rise and fall of civilizations, personalities, creatures, cultures, etc. Infinite hours of gameplay. Now with beautiful pixel graphics! Learn the basics with in-game tutorials A lifetime “living” project - created/updated since 2003, with no end in sight Generate your unique world and manage a bustling colony of dwarves, even as they probably mine towards their eventual demise. A new endless hobby, just for you! The legendary Dwarf Fortress is now on Steam! Build a fortress and try to help your dwarves survive, despite threats of starvation, dragons, and madness. In this complex construction/management/roguelike simulation, every generated world brings a unique challenge, whether it’s dwarves with their own simulated personalities or aquifers. Observe what makes your civilization fall into eventual decline, and learn for next time… until something else inevitably goes wrong. The combat model includes skills, body parts, material properties, aimed attacks, wrestling, pain, nausea, various poison effects, and much more. It’s difficult to convey the depth of the generation. Hundreds of animals and monsters, many of which are randomly created for each world, as well as generated poetry, musical forms, instruments, and dances for your dwarves to practice and perform. A dynamic weather model tracks wind, humidity, and air masses to create fronts, clouds, storms, and blizzards. Over two hundred rock and mineral types can appear, in their proper geological environments. Remember: Losing is fun! Nothing substantial is new or changed, under the hood. It’s still good old Dwarf Fortress, but with graphics support and music by default. A few bells and whistles won’t change that. You may already be familiar with the tile set mod packs from Michał “Mayday” Madej and Jacob 'Ironhand' Bowman. Together, their efforts are creating an all-new tileset featuring brand new pixel art by artists Carolyn Jong and Neoriceisgood. Dwarf Fortress Steam edition will have a 15 track soundtrack by Dabu, Simon Swerwer and Águeda Macias including tracks in the Dwarvish language! It's never been easier to start playing! We've improved the new player experience with the addition of tutorials to guide you through building your first fort and keeping your dwarves happy. Command your dwarves as they search for wealth in their generated mountain. Your dwarves will need a steady supply of food and beer, but they’ll also need your guidance in surviving attacks from hostile civilizations, the wilderness, or even the dead. Craft treasures and furnitures from various materials Establish a barony and support the increasingly demanding nobility Read your dwarves’ thoughts to keep them happy Build floodgates to divert water for farming, and/or prevent magma mishaps Build structures and watch your dwarves discover and build their culture, like taverns, libraries, temples, honey, wax, pottery, animal training, bookbinding, and more. The original inspiration for RimWorld, Prison Architect, Minecraft and more. One of the first video games acquired by the Museum of Modern Art in New York Updated for over 16 years by two brothers, Tarn “Toady One” and Zach “Threetoe” Adams With the goal of simulating all of existence, Bay 12 estimates they’re only about 44% done.

Name: Undertale
Description:
Welcome to UNDERTALE. In this RPG, you control a human who falls underground into the world of monsters. Now you must find your way out... or stay trapped forever. ((Healthy Dog's Warning: Game contains imagery that may be harmful to players with photosensitive epilepsy or similar condition.)) features: Killing is unnecessary: negotiate out of danger using the unique battle system. Time your attacks for extra damage, then dodge enemy attacks in a style reminiscent of top-down shooters. Original art and soundtrack brimming with personality.
