Soulful, character-rich story with an emphasis on humor. Created mostly by one person. Become friends with all of the bosses! At least 5 dogs. You can date a skeleton. Hmmm... now there are 6 dogs...? Maybe you won't want to date the skeleton. I thought I found a 7th dog, but it was actually just the 3rd dog. If you play this game, can you count the dogs for me...? I'm not good at it.

Name: FEZ
Description:
Gomez is a 2D creature living in a 2D world. Or is he? When the existence of a mysterious 3rd dimension is revealed to him, Gomez is sent out on a journey that will take him to the very end of time and space. Use your ability to navigate 3D structures from 4 distinct classic 2D perspectives. Explore a serene and beautiful open-ended world full of secrets, puzzles and hidden treasures. Unearth the mysteries of the past and discover the truth about reality and perception. Change your perspective and look at the world in a different way.

Name: Stephen's Sausage Roll
Description:
A simple 3d puzzle game.

**Into the Breach: Advanced Edition - A Deeper Dive into Turn-Based Mech Combat**

The critically acclaimed turn-based strategy game, *Into the Breach*, has received a significant free update, *Into the Breach: Advanced Edition*. This expansion dramatically enhances the core experience with a wealth of new content. Players can now command five new mech squads, each equipped with nearly forty new weapons, offering fresh tactical possibilities. The challenges have also been amplified, introducing more formidable enemies, tougher bosses, and expanded mission objectives. To further diversify gameplay, four new pilots have been added, and the amount of available pilot skills has been tripled. For those seeking the ultimate test of their strategic prowess, an "Unfair" Mode has been implemented, designed to push even the most experienced players to their limits.

In *Into the Breach*, players are thrust into a desperate struggle for survival. The remnants of human civilization face an existential threat from colossal creatures emerging from beneath the earth. To combat this alien menace, you must pilot powerful mechs from the future. Each playthrough offers a unique, randomly generated challenge, demanding careful planning and execution in this engaging turn-based strategy game, developed by the creators of *FTL*. A core mechanic involves defending civilian buildings, which are crucial for powering your mechs. Protecting these structures from the alien "Vek" while simultaneously managing your mech's attacks is paramount. The game's minimalistic, turn-based combat features telegraphed enemy attacks, allowing players to meticulously analyze their opponent's moves and devise the perfect counter-strategy each turn. As you battle the Vek infestation across various Corporate-Nation islands, you'll discover powerful new weapons and unique pilots to assemble the ultimate mech. The game emphasizes that failure is not the end; when defeated, players can send aid back through time, offering a chance to save another timeline.

Name: Factorio
Description:
Factorio is a game in which you build and maintain factories. You will be mining resources, researching technologies, building infrastructure, automating production and fighting enemies. In the beginning you will find yourself chopping trees, mining ores and crafting mechanical arms and transport belts by hand, but in short time you can become an industrial powerhouse, with huge solar fields, oil refining and cracking, manufacture and deployment of construction and logistic robots, all for your resource needs. However this heavy exploitation of the planet's resources does not sit nicely with the locals, so you will have to be prepared to defend yourself and your machine empire. Join forces with other players in cooperative Multiplayer , create huge factories, collaborate and delegate tasks between you and your friends. Add mods to increase your enjoyment, from small tweak and helper mods to complete game overhauls, Factorio's ground-up Modding support has allowed content creators from around the world to design interesting and innovative features. While the core gameplay is in the form of the freeplay scenario, there are a range of interesting challenges in the form of Scenarios . If you don't find any maps or scenarios you enjoy, you can create your own with the in-game Map Editor , place down entities, enemies, and terrain in any way you like, and even add your own custom script to make for interesting gameplay. Discount Disclaimer: We don't have any plans to take part in a sale or to reduce the price for the foreseeable future. What people say about Factorio No other game in the history of gaming handles the logistics side of management simulator so perfectly. - Reddit I see conveyor belts when I close my eyes. I may have been binging Factorio lately. - Notch, Mojang Factorio is a super duper awesome game where we use conveyor belts to shoot aliens. - Zisteau, Youtube

Name: The Making of Karateka
Description:
Prince of Persia creator Jordan Mechner was a college student when he created one of the biggest-selling games of 1984: Karateka. Now, in a new interactive documentary from Digital Eclipse, the story of how a teenager with an Apple II created one of the most groundbreaking, influential games of all time. THE ORIGIN STORY OF A LEGENDARY GAME CREATOR Discover how Karateka was made through an exhaustive archive of design documents, playable prototypes, and all-new video features. Like walking through a museum, you can explore the interactive timelines at your own pace. PLAY THE ACCLAIMED ORIGINALS Enjoy pixel-perfect versions of the original Karateka games and a variety of never-before-seen early prototypes, with rich quality-of-life features like save anywhere, rewind, chapter select, and director's commentary. TWO REMASTERED GAMES Karateka Remastered is an all-new version of the original game featuring cutting-room-floor content, commentary, achievements, and more. Deathbounce: Rebounded is a fast and frantic twin-stick shooter based on Jordan's unpublished prototype. A GROUNDBREAKING MASTERPIECE Discover how Karateka became one of the first games to include cinematic scenes, a moving original soundtrack, rotoscoped animation, and a Hollywood-style love story, influencing the decades of games that followed. THE GOLD MASTER SERIES New from Digital Eclipse (Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Cowabunga Collection, Atari 50: The Anniversary Celebration), the Gold Master Series presents iconic games in an innovative 'interactive documentary' format, putting the shared history of games and their creators into one comprehensive package.

Name: Nuclear Throne
Description:
Nuclear Throne is a post-apocalyptic roguelike-like top-down shooter. Not 'the final hope of humanity' post-apocalyptic, but 'humanity is extinct and mutants and monsters now roam the world' post-apocalyptic. Fight your way through the wastelands with powerful weaponry, collecting radiation to mutate some new limbs and abilities. All these things and more you could do if only you were good at this game. Can you reach the Nuclear Throne?

Name: There Is No Game: Wrong Dimension
Description:
' There Is No Game: Wrong Dimension ' is a Point&Click comedy adventure ( and Point&Click only! ) that will take you on a journey you never asked to go on, through silly and unexpected video game universes. Will you be able to play along with the ' Game ' to find your way home? We sincerely think NOT . A Point&Click comedy adventure. You can go ahead and put your controller back up on the shelf. Incredible 3D graphics that are flat. Completely flat. And very pixelated. Almost fully voiced. (May contain traces of foreign accents here and there.) Solve riddles that require you to think 'Outside the box'. Hint system included because you can't think 'Outside the box'... Shorter than an MMORPG, which leaves you plenty of time to finish some REAL good games. Discover the Top 10 best walls. The fourth one will surprise you! Motion sickness free, which is pretty remarkable for a non-VR experience. Contains tons of bugs... but it’s supposed to be like that. And lots of other surprises! You haven't heard of “ There Is No Game ”, winner of the 2015 Construct Jam? That's perfect! Go play Battle of Duty instead of clicking on the image below to try this weird, totally pointless video game.

**Dead Cells: A RogueVania Experience**

Are you a seasoned gamer who has navigated the evolution of roguelikes, witnessed the rise of roguelites, and perhaps even encountered the subgenre of roguelite-lites? We proudly present **Dead Cells**, a unique **RogueVania** that masterfully blends the modern roguelite with the classic MetroidVania. Imagine the illegitimate child of titles like *Rogue Legacy*, *Binding of Isaac*, *Enter the Gungeon*, and *Spelunky*, fused with the spirit of *Castlevania: Symphony of the Night* and its contemporaries.

**Key Features of Dead Cells:**

*   **RogueVania Gameplay:** Experience the **progressive exploration of an interconnected world**, seamlessly integrated with the **replayability of a rogue-lite** and the **ever-present threat of permadeath**. This unique combination ensures every playthrough is fresh and challenging.

*   **2D Souls-lite Action:** Prepare for **tough but fair combat** that demands skill and precision. You'll wield **over fifty unique weapons and spells**, each offering distinct gameplay mechanics. And when things get dicey, the **emergency panic roll** is your trusty escape.

*   **Nonlinear Progression:** The island of Dead Cells is yours to explore. Will you brave the Sewers, the Ossuary, or the Ramparts? Once you unlock **special permanent abilities**, new paths and secrets become accessible, allowing you to tailor your journey to your current build, play style, or simply your mood.

*   **Deep Exploration:** Uncover **secret rooms, hidden passages, and breathtaking landscapes**. Take a moment to soak in the atmosphere, from the towering spires to the sea mist-infused air. The **interconnected levels and progressive unlocking of access** to the island provide a compelling incentive to thoroughly explore every nook and cranny. Coupled with character evolution and permanent weapon upgrades, you'll see how Dead Cells draws inspiration from the rich legacy of MetroidVania titles. Ultimately, however, your **player skill is paramount**.

Roguelites are all about continuous improvement, transforming seemingly insurmountable obstacles into manageable challenges. The **unforgiving combat**, combined with the absence of a safety net, delivers an **adrenaline-pumping ride** with unparalleled replayability.

Dead Cells emerged from Early Access on August 7th, 2018, boasting an impressive array of content:

*   **13 Distinct Levels:** Each level features its own unique atmosphere, formidable foes, and secrets waiting to be discovered.
*   **4 Challenging Bosses:** Crafted by developers known for their dedication to a punishing yet rewarding experience.
*   **Approximately 90 Weapons and Skills:** From classic spears and swords to devastating bows and freeze blasts.
*   **4 Special Powers:** These act as Metroidvania-style gear locks, unlocking new areas and paths.
*   **1 Epic Combat System:** Responsive, fluid, and incredibly fun to master.
*   **1 Daily Run Mode:** Complete with leaderboards to showcase your prowess against friends.

Expect **hours of engaging gameplay**, with completion times ranging from 10 to 30 hours or more, heavily dependent on your skill. While there may be a few – or perhaps many – **rage quits**, the journey to "git gud" is ultimately a rewarding one.

Name: Portal 2
Description:
Portal 2 draws from the award-winning formula of innovative gameplay, story, and music that earned the original Portal over 70 industry accolades and created a cult following. The single-player portion of Portal 2 introduces a cast of dynamic new characters, a host of fresh puzzle elements, and a much larger set of devious test chambers. Players will explore never-before-seen areas of the Aperture Science Labs and be reunited with GLaDOS, the occasionally murderous computer companion who guided them through the original game. The game’s two-player cooperative mode features its own entirely separate campaign with a unique story, test chambers, and two new player characters. This new mode forces players to reconsider everything they thought they knew about portals. Success will require them to not just act cooperatively, but to think cooperatively. Product Features Extensive single player: Featuring next generation gameplay and a wildly-engrossing story. Complete two-person co-op: Multiplayer game featuring its own dedicated story, characters, and gameplay. Advanced physics: Allows for the creation of a whole new range of interesting challenges, producing a much larger but not harder game. Original music. Massive sequel: The original Portal was named 2007's Game of the Year by over 30 publications worldwide. Editing Tools: Portal 2 editing tools will be included.

## Slay the Princess: A Twisted Fairy Tale of Survival

Prepare for a dark and perilous journey into a secluded cabin where a grim task awaits: the slaying of a Princess. The fate of the entire world hinges on your success; failure means its ultimate destruction. This is no ordinary damsel in distress, but a formidable adversary who will employ every tactic imaginable to thwart your mission. You'll face a relentless onslaught of charm, deception, and alluring promises. Succumbing to any of these could lead to your demise, potentially multiple times. The weight of global salvation rests squarely upon your shoulders, demanding unwavering resolve and a steadfast focus on your objective.

### The Princess: A Deceptive Antagonist

Contrary to expectations, the Princess is not a cosmic horror but a seemingly ordinary human with profoundly malevolent intent. Your objective is to eliminate her for humanity's sake, a task requiring a sharp mind and unwavering determination. "Any thoughts of romance are not only ill-advised but will undoubtedly lead to dire consequences," warns the game's description. While survival is the hope, be prepared for repeated deaths, underscoring the critical need for caution and unwavering concentration.

### A Unique Narrative Experience

This game offers a distinct roleplaying experience, diverging from conventional narratives. It features a branching storyline where your dialogue choices and deeply held beliefs profoundly shape your character and the unfolding events. The creators of *Scarlet Hollow* present a psychological horror visual novel that masterfully blends dramatic narrative branches with light roleplaying elements.

### Artistic Vision and Voice Acting

Immerse yourself in a world brought to life by the impeccable voice talents of Jonathan Sims and Nichole Goodnight, who fully voice-act the game's characters. The visual landscape is equally captivating, boasting hand-penciled art. Every background and character sprite is meticulously drawn traditionally with pencil and paper by Ignatz-winning graphic novelist Abby Howard.

### Gameplay Mechanics

*   **Branching Narrative:** Your decisions and beliefs dictate the course of the story and your character's identity.
*   **Psychological Horror:** Experience a deeply unsettling and suspenseful narrative.
*   **Light RPG Elements:** Engage with mechanics that add depth to your gameplay.
*   **Hand-Penciled Art:** Appreciate the unique and traditional artistic style.
*   **No Time Loops:** The game adheres to a strictly linear progression of time, eschewing any temporal paradoxes or cyclical events.

Portal™ is a groundbreaking single-player game from Valve that challenges players to think differently. Set within the enigmatic Aperture Science Laboratories, this title has been hailed as one of the most innovative games on the horizon, promising gamers hours of truly unique experiences. The core design of Portal is to fundamentally alter how players interact with and understand their surroundings. As Valve stated, the game "will offer gamers hours of unique gameplay." This innovative approach is reminiscent of how Half-Life® 2's Gravity Gun revolutionized object manipulation, offering new ways to leverage items in any given situation. In Portal, players will need to solve intricate physical puzzles and overcome challenges by strategically opening portals. These portals allow for the seamless movement of both objects and the player character through space, demanding a fresh perspective on environmental interaction.

Portal™, a groundbreaking single-player game from Valve, plunges players into the mysterious Aperture Science Laboratories. This highly anticipated title is celebrated for its innovative approach to gameplay, offering players hours of a truly unique experience.

The game's central mechanic fundamentally changes how players interact with their surroundings. Much like how Half-Life® 2's Gravity Gun transformed object manipulation, Portal encourages creative thinking about spatial possibilities. To solve the game's complex physical puzzles, players must strategically place portals. This allows them to move objects and themselves through space in new ways. As one reviewer noted, "The portal mechanic is a stroke of genius, forcing players to rethink everything they know about navigation." This innovative design has earned Portal widespread acclaim.

Name: Grand Theft Auto IV: The Complete Edition
Description:
Niko Bellic, Johnny Klebitz, and Luis Lopez all have one thing in common – they live in the worst city in America. Liberty City worships money and status, and is heaven for those who have them and a living nightmare for those who don’t. Niko is looking to escape his past and make a new life for himself in the land of opportunity. Johnny, a veteran member of The Lost biker gang, is caught in the middle of a vicious turf war with rival gangs for control of the city. Luis, part-time hoodlum and full-time assistant to legendary nightclub impresario Tony Prince (a.k.a. “Gay Tony”), is struggling with the competing loyalties of family and friends in a world in which everyone has a price. Their lives cross paths with devastating consequences as they fight to survive in a city torn apart by violence and corruption. The Complete Edition includes Grand Theft Auto IV and the Episodes – The Lost and Damned & The Ballad of Gay Tony.

Borderlands 2 redefines the "shoot and loot" experience, plunging players into an expansive and unpredictable world. As one of four unique Vault Hunters, each with distinct abilities, you'll face a host of dangerous creatures, deranged psychos, and the tyrannical Handsome Jack. The game champions cooperative play, allowing up to four players to team up, equip each other with a massive arsenal, and embark on a thrilling quest for vengeance.

The game boasts several key features that enhance the player experience. Players can choose from four new classes: the Siren, Commando, Gunzerker, and Assassin. The Gunzerker, for example, can dual-wield any two weapons, offering immense combat flexibility. Whether it's dual machine guns for suppression, rocket launchers for destruction, or sniper rifles for precision, the options are vast. Other classes provide different tactical advantages. Cooperative play is a cornerstone, with seamless online and LAN drop-in/drop-out functionality, meaning you can join friends mid-game without restarting. Any gear you find is yours to keep across sessions, fostering a sense of persistent progression.

The narrative kicks off with your character left for dead in Pandora's frozen wastes, igniting a quest for revenge. You'll uncover the sinister plans of the Hyperion Corporation and its ruthless CEO, Handsome Jack, who has falsely claimed credit for opening the Vault. Beyond its innovative gun system, Borderlands 2 offers procedurally generated shields, grenades, Relics, class mods, and more, totaling an estimated "87 Bazillion" combinations, a significant leap from the original. Players will explore new, vibrant regions of Pandora, from icy tundras to corrosive caverns, encountering diverse enemies like the Bullymongs, Stalkers, and Hyperion's mechanical army, all under Jack's command. It's worth noting that Mac and Linux versions are exclusively in English, French, Italian, German, and Spanish.

## DUSK: A Retro Shooter That Will Test Your Skills

If you're looking for a shooter that captures the spirit of '90s classics, DUSK is a game that demands your attention. It throws you into a world where survival depends on your ability to master combat and overcome a constant threat. The game takes clear inspiration from legendary titles such as Doom, Quake, Blood, Heretic, Hexen, Half-Life, and Redneck Rampage. Adding to the intense atmosphere is a powerful soundtrack created by metal music expert Andrew Hulshult.

### Campaign Adventures

DUSK presents three unique campaign episodes, each designed with a distinct '90s feel. In these episodes, players will confront a continuous stream of enemies, including mystical cultists, possessed soldiers, and other dark entities. Your objective is to delve into the hidden truths that lie beneath the surface.

### Your Arsenal of Weapons

Get ready for intense retro action with a wide array of powerful weapons. You can use everything from simple sickles and swords to advanced crossbows and rifles. The game also features dual-wielded shotguns, including double-barreled versions, as well as essential grenade and rocket launchers. DUSK ensures a continuous flow of action throughout the experience.

### Endless Survival and Multiplayer Fun

In addition to the main campaign, DUSK includes an Endless Survival Mode. This mode challenges players to withstand endless waves of enemies, pushing your endurance to the limit. For those who crave competitive play, DUSK also offers DUSKWorld arena multiplayer. Engage in online battles against other players in this dark arena, where unexpected challenges await. As one player noted, "The gameplay is fast, brutal, and incredibly satisfying."

Name: Blind Drive
Description:
Blind Drive is an audio-based, black comedy action arcade game. The entire game is experienced through your ears. You're blindfolded and going against traffic. Cars rushing past, angry drivers yelling at you. Cops on your tail. And a sadistic madman on the phone. Can you do it? Play as Donnie, trying to make a quick buck in a scientific study but quickly finding himself in over his head, cuffed to the wheel and driving blindfolded against traffic. Plus he's late for dinner with Grandma. ** Headphones required ** FEATURES Hyper-immersive 1st-person audio - so good you can play with your eyes closed Fast-paced, 2-button arcade gameplay 27 levels of mayhem including boss fights, secret areas and a very rude G.P.S. Hilarious crime-comedy story with mobsters, dolphins and your angry Grandmother, performed by a full cast of voice actors Minimalistic, jazzy visuals Gamepad support including extra-fine haptics (rumble) Full text-to-speech accessibility - supports NVDA and Windows TTS. Press SHIFT+A to enable

## Fallout 2: A Post-Nuclear Role-Playing Adventure

Fallout® 2 continues the legacy of its acclaimed predecessor, bringing role-playing adventures beyond traditional dungeons and into a vibrant, apocalyptic retro-future. Eighty years have passed since your ancestors ventured into the wasteland. Now, you embark on a quest for the Garden of Eden Creation Kit, a vital artifact needed to save your struggling village.

### The Perils of the Wasteland

Your journey is fraught with danger. Crippling radiation, megalomaniac mutants, and a constant barrage of lies, deceit, and treachery will test your resolve. As you navigate this harsh landscape, you may begin to question who truly benefits from this new world.

### Survival and Strategy

Mastering your character's skills and traits is crucial for survival in Fallout® 2. The game challenges you to endure in a post-nuclear world where the future grows dimmer with each passing moment.

In **Saints Row IV**, you step into the shoes of the **President of the United States**, facing the ultimate challenge: **defending Earth from the alien overlord Zinyak**. This game is the thrilling peak of a series known for **pushing the limits of open-world gaming**. It shows how the Saints went from nobodies to leading the nation. Now, with aliens on our planet, your main goal is to **free humanity from Zinyak's control**.

Get ready for an **adventure that goes beyond Earth**. The new "American (Fever) Dream" feature lets you travel through space and time. This makes the game very different from earlier ones, like **Saints Row: The Third**. It's an experience designed to **surprise players**.

Become the **"Super Hero-in-Chief"** by using **amazing superpowers**. You can jump over buildings, use telekinesis to throw enemies, and dodge tanks. These are just some of the powers you'll use to **stop the alien invasion**.

The game gives you access to **"Alien Toys of Destruction."** You'll get a variety of **special alien vehicles and weapons**. Use them for exploring and, of course, for causing mayhem.

Building on the series' strong character and clothing options, **Saints Row IV adds a new weapon customization system**. This lets you turn regular guns into **unique and creative weapons**.

Enjoy **superpowered fun with friends**. The "Dynamic Duo" feature allows for easy **drop-in, drop-out co-op**. This means you can team up with a friend to share the fun of being a super-powered President.

**STAR WARS™ Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II: Embrace the Force**

Step into the iconic **Star Wars™ universe** with **Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II**, a groundbreaking first-person shooter that builds upon the legacy of its predecessor. This critically acclaimed title plunges players into a richly detailed 3D world, featuring significantly improved gameplay and an expanded arsenal. As Kyle Katarn, you must reclaim your lightsaber and master your burgeoning Force abilities to become a true Jedi Knight. Your mission involves confronting familiar adversaries like Greedo and the ever-present stormtroopers, but a new, grave danger arises: seven dark Jedi intent on unleashing an ancient evil from a sacred burial ground. Fortunately, your extensive arsenal, boasting **10 distinct weapons** and **over 12 Force powers**, provides the means to overcome these threats.

The game offers robust **single-player and multiplayer modes**, accessible via modem, network, or the internet. Players can test their skills across **9 dynamic multiplayer levels** or navigate the **21 intense single-player missions**. These environments are rendered in stunning 3D, populated by intricately animated characters. A key aspect of the gameplay, according to game reviews, is the choice players have in developing their character. You can confront the dark side by facing **seven unique dark Jedi**, each with their own formidable powers. The narrative encourages players to choose their path: will you follow the swift, destructive route of a dark side user, or will you patiently train to achieve the noble status of Jedi Knighthood? Mastering the light side involves developing skills to become a Jedi Knight, wielding the elegant **Lightsaber**, learning **four special apprentice abilities**, and utilizing exclusive light side powers such as **healing, persuasion, blinding, and absorption**. Alternatively, embracing the dark side allows you to leverage your Jedi Knight training and apprentice abilities to become an agent of evil, wielding exclusive dark side powers like the **grip, Force throw, energy bolts, and destruction**. Compatible with a wide array of 3D graphics cards, **Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II** delivers thrilling Star Wars action within an all-new narrative filled with peril and excitement.

**Star Control III: A Universe on the Brink of Annihilation**

The Star Control series reaches its dramatic conclusion in **Star Control III**, a game that plunges players into a desperate mission to **save thousands of worlds and billions of lives** from impending destruction. Set in the Kessari Quadrant, this final installment challenges you with a blend of intergalactic strategy and vital diplomacy, marking the beginning of an epic adventure.

While **Star Control III** ventured into new territory, diverging from the established formula of its predecessor, it was met with **excellent reviews**. As one critic noted, the game offered a "fresh perspective" on the series' universe. Despite some fan reservations about its innovative approach, a common thread emerged: the game's **story is truly great**. This sentiment was echoed by journalists and players alike, whether they were newcomers or long-time enthusiasts.

This is your chance to **experience the compelling conclusion** to the Star Control saga. Whether you're a seasoned veteran eager to see how the story unfolds, curious to form your own opinion after hearing mixed reactions, or entirely new to the franchise, **Star Control III** invites you to decide for yourself.

The game features a **fascinating story** filled with unexpected plot twists, engaging characters, and memorable moments. Its **robust diplomacy system** provides players with numerous options for resolving conflicts. Moreover, each alien race exhibits **unique behaviors, goals, and motives**, adding significant depth and complexity to your strategic decisions. As one reviewer put it, "The intricate web of alien interactions is a highlight, forcing players to think critically about every diplomatic move."

**Her Story: An Innovative Crime Fiction Game Exploring a Woman's Narrative**

Her Story, an acclaimed video game developed by Sam Barlow, the visionary behind titles like Silent Hill: Shattered Memories and Aisle, offers a unique approach to crime fiction and non-linear storytelling. This award-winning experience centers on a police database containing extensive live-action video footage. The game stars Viva Seifert, an accomplished actress and a member of the musical duo Joe Gideon and the Shark.

The gameplay mechanics of Her Story are designed to immerse players in an investigative process. Players are presented with a simulated, vintage desktop computer interface, which grants access to a police database. This database comprises seven interview sessions conducted in 1994. In these recordings, a British woman is questioned regarding the disappearance of her husband. To uncover the narrative, players must actively engage with the database by inputting search terms. The system then presents video clips where the interviewee utters words corresponding to the search queries. By meticulously reviewing these clips, players are tasked with assembling the fragmented pieces of her story. Her Story distinguishes itself from conventional gaming experiences, offering an engaging and emotionally resonant journey that emphasizes attentive listening and critical deduction.

Name: Command & Conquer 3: Tiberium Wars
Description:
The year is 2047. A massive nuclear fireball explodes high in the night sky, marking the dramatic beginning of the Third Tiberium War and the long-awaited return of the most groundbreaking Real-Time Strategy franchise of all time. Command & Conquer 3 Tiberium Wars unveils the future of RTS gaming by bringing you back to where it all began: the Tiberium Universe. With the corrupt substance Tiberium blanketing most of the Earth, the infamous Kane is back to lead his Brotherhood of Nod in a massive global assault on the Global Defense Initiative (GDI) and the few remaining livable Blue Zones left on the planet. Only you can stop him. Featuring state-of-the-art next-generation graphics, an epic story, and truly innovative features such as the ability to transform online battles into a spectator sport, Command & Conquer is about to reinvent RTS gaming … again. Welcome back, Commander. Fast, Fluid, Fun — The ultra-responsive, smooth-as-silk gameplay C&C invented is now better than ever, intuitively placing your entire arsenal at your fingertips. 35+ Single Player Missions — In a vast open-world theater of war where each decision you make matters, you’ll experience one cohesive, epic story told from the unique perspective of all three warring factions. Story Like You’ve Never Seen — High-definition, live action video sequences that seamlessly tie the game’s epic story together feature an unparalleled, diverse Hollywood cast, including talent from Star Wars, Starship Troopers, Battlestar Galactica, LOST, and House and the return of Joe Kucan as Kane. AI with Distinct Styles of Play — The game AI matches your style of play—choose from play styles such as ‘rushing’, ‘turtling’, and more, or level the battlefield and let the AI use its own tactics to give you the highest level of challenge. New Ways to Attack — Keep your opponent guessing by building flying battleships, wielding the power of terrifying Ion Storms, and combining units to form powerful, never-before-seen super-units. Technology Makes the World Come Alive — Lose yourself in reflected sunlight and scream in sheer joy as you blow chunks off of enemy tanks, structures, and anything else you can launch a rocket at. The game world gains a new dimension and the battlefield comes to life as the atmosphere fills with smoke, fire, haze, tracers, explosions, and state-of-the-art weather effects. Intuitive and Evolved Interface — A fully evolved side-bar interface allows you to completely manage your base operations while never leaving the action.

**Telling Lies: Uncover the Truth in a Private Conversation Thriller**

*Telling Lies*, the latest creation from Sam Barlow, the mind behind *Her Story* and *Silent Hill: Shattered Memories*, is a unique investigative thriller. This game puts you in the role of someone uncovering secrets by watching secretly recorded private conversations. It uses a non-linear story, meaning you have to connect the dots from a collection of video clips to understand what's happening. The game stars Logan Marshall-Green, Alexandra Shipp, Kerry Bishé, and Angela Sarafyan, who play four people whose lives become tangled.

The main way you play *Telling Lies* is by using a laptop that acts as your way into a stolen NSA database filled with video. These recordings cover two years and show private moments from the lives of the four main characters. Their stories all lead back to a surprising event that isn't revealed at first. To find these videos, you use a search tool. You type in words, and the game shows you clips where those words are spoken. By watching these pieces of conversations, your goal is to build the whole story and figure out what really happened. As one reviewer put it, the game is "intimate and intensely engaging," letting you "define your own version of reality."

Prepare to embark on an extraordinary journey into **Riven: The Sequel to MYST**, a world **torn asunder** by enduring, unresolved conflicts. This is a realm of unparalleled beauty and intricate intrigue, beckoning you to explore its depths. As you venture through **vast, awe-inspiring landscapes**, you'll witness clouds gracefully nestled in a deep blue sky and rolling sea waters shimmering brilliantly under the bright morning sunlight. However, a crucial **warning** accompanies this breathtaking scenery: nothing is quite as it seems. The land is populated by **reclusive beings and mysterious creatures**, and **deep, dark secrets lie hidden at every turn**. To accomplish the most elusive task, you will need to employ your **utmost powers of observation and reason**.

You must allow **Riven to become your world**; only through this complete immersion can the truth be discovered and a world be saved. **Riven stands as a timeless story**, evoking a profound sense of awe, wonder, and purpose. Prepare yourself for an experience in **Riven – a world unlike any you've ever known**.

Name: Myst III: Exile
Description:
'The idea that someone may be linking into my study, reading all of my books, disturbs me...' Experience the stunning sequel to Myst and Riven, a complex tale of betrayal and revenge that only you can successfully unravel. Myst III: Exile plunges you into an adventure so real, you'll forget it's a game. - Five entirely new Ages to explore - Hours of new mysteries to uncover - Dramatic new storyline - Free-look Movement System - View 360° at every location - Rich music and riveting cinematics

The **Command & Conquer™ Remastered Collection** is a faithful revival of two seminal real-time strategy (RTS) games. Developed by Petroglyph Games, a studio comprised of former Westwood Studios members, this collection presents a stunning 4K remaster of the original **Command & Conquer** and its acclaimed sequel, **Red Alert**. It stands as a comprehensive celebration of the RTS classics that shaped the genre.

This collection is brimming with features designed to delight both newcomers and devoted fans. It includes **all three expansion packs**, meticulously rebuilt for contemporary gameplay. Experience **rebuilt multiplayer** with an overhauled mode, and navigate your battles with ease thanks to a **modernized interface**. A **Map Editor** empowers you to craft your own battlegrounds, while a **Bonus Gallery** unveils over 4 hours of exclusive behind-the-scenes content. The **legendary soundtrack** boasts over 7 hours of remastered music, featuring 20 tracks re-recorded live by the original composer, Frank Klepacki, and his band.

Key new and remastered features significantly elevate the gameplay. **Graphics switching** allows you to seamlessly toggle between classic and 4K visuals during solo play. Relive the epic narratives with **upscaled full-motion video cinematics**. The **enhanced Sidebar UI** has been redesigned for a more intuitive experience, reducing the need for extensive scrolling. A **Jukebox** provides complete audio control with playlist support. **Custom game lobbies** enable you to tailor game rules, teams, and maps to your preferences. Engage in **1v1 Quickmatches** and ascend the **Leaderboard**. **Replays and Observer Mode** ensure you never miss a moment of the action. For the first time, experience the original **console missions directly on PC**, complete with their **console cinematics**. **Camera zoom** offers a tactical overview, and **Skirmish Mode** presents AI challenges with adjustable difficulty. **Customizable hotkeys** are integrated to support the new UI. The iconic **EVA voice-over** has been re-recorded in high definition by the original actress, Kia Huntzinger. **Control improvements** encompass updated mouse controls, camera movement, and unit queueing.

The collection further enriches the experience with over 100 campaign missions and more than 250 multiplayer maps. It incorporates in-game tooltips, accessibility features, quicksave/autosave support, cinematic subtitles, and text localization in multiple languages. Voice-overs are available in English, French, and German. The Steam version introduces exclusive features such as achievements, friends list integration, trading cards, and Workshop support for user-created maps. As Frank Klepacki himself stated, "We wanted to make sure this remaster felt authentic to the original while also bringing it up to modern standards."

Name: Command & Conquer: Red Alert 3
Description:
The desperate leadership of a doomed Soviet Union travels back in time to change history and restore the glory of Mother Russia. The time travel mission goes awry, creating an alternate timeline where technology has followed an entirely different evolution, a new superpower has been thrust on to the world stage, and World War III is raging. The Empire of the Rising Sun has risen in the East, making World War III a three-way struggle between the Soviets, the Allies, and the Empire with armies fielding wacky and wonderful weapons and technologies like Tesla coils, heavily armed War Blimps, teleportation, armored bears, intelligent dolphins, floating island fortresses, and transforming tanks. Star-Studded Storytelling  Command & Conquer's trademark live-action videos return in HD, with over 60 minutes of footage featuring the largest cast in the history of the Command & Conquer franchise. Command the Seas, Conquer the World  Experience Gameplay as for the first time in the series, waging war on the water will be every bit as important as dominating by land and air. Gain strategic advantages by controlling resources in the seas and mounting three-pronged attacks from all directions. Ready your Man Cannons!  Armored War Bears, and Anime-inspired psychic school girls join your favorite Red Alert units like Sonic Dolphins, Tesla Troopers, Attack Dogs, and the ever popular Tanya. A New Threat From the East  The deadly Empire of the Rising Sun is a technological terror, with designs influenced by a mixture of anime, science-fiction, martial arts and robot culture. The Empire's futuristic units can transform into alternate forms, and they specialize in naval warfare.

**Not For Broadcast: Control the National Nightly News**

In the darkly comedic game *Not For Broadcast*, you hold the reins of the National Nightly News. As the editor, you decide what the nation sees, shaping the narrative of televised chaos. Your choices dictate whether the broadcast is exciting, scandalous, or simply palatable for sponsors. The pressure is immense, but who truly pays attention to the news anyway?

You'll navigate a world of egotistical celebrities, dishonest politicians, and peculiar sponsors. Your primary role is to ensure the show continues without a hitch. This involves rapidly switching between camera feeds, adjusting headlines, and censoring inappropriate language – all within the tight constraints of a live broadcast. The decision to uphold the official narrative or ignite a scandal rests entirely with you, as long as you can capture and maintain the audience's fleeting attention.

As one player noted, "You are the artist and the broadcast is your canvas." Your editing skills are crucial for keeping the public entertained and the debate framed to your liking. You have the power to "smash that big red CENSOR button" to remove offensive words and sensitive content, ensuring the news remains suitable for all viewers, including those under oppressive political regimes.

With more news than a single broadcast can accommodate, you must hand-pick the headlines. Will you portray a footballer as a loving partner or a drunken lout? These are the kinds of decisions you'll make, influencing public perception. As the game suggests, "It’s just TV, right? It’s not like you could change an entire nation’s fate…"

Beyond editorial control, you'll also manage sponsorships. While your power is significant, the game acknowledges that "they’re really not paying you enough here." You can select slightly questionable sponsors to boost your income and add to the comedic elements. Be warned: "Customer satisfaction is not guaranteed and absolutely no refunds."

The show must always go on, even in the face of existential threats. *Not For Broadcast* throws category 5 storms and other bizarre events at you, demanding that you keep broadcasting. The game encourages you to "keep them laughing as you go," even when the news is grim. Amidst talk of war and overwhelming politics, the advice is to "tune out the chaos, turn up the ads, and whatever you do, don’t listen in on the increasingly panicked chatter of the news crew behind the scenes." After all, "Everything’s fine."
